name: bulbasaur
description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this POKéMON.
appearance: Turquoise-green quadrupedal reptilian creature with dark green patches, small pointed ears, prominent red eyes, and a large, closed green bulb growing from its back with vine-like tendrils emerging from it.

descriptions.fr: Une étrange graine a été plantée sur son dos à la naissance. La plante germe et pousse avec ce POKéMON.
descriptions.de: Bei seiner Geburt wurde ihm ein seltsamer Samen auf den Rücken gepflanzt. Die Pflanze keimt und wächst mit diesem POKéMON.
descriptions.es: Una extraña semilla fue plantada en su espalda al nacer. La planta brota y crece con este POKéMON.
descriptions.it: Alla nascita gli è stato piantato sulla schiena uno strano seme. La pianta germoglia e cresce con questo POKéMON.
descriptions.ja: 生まれたときから、背中に不思議なタネが植えられている。タネは芽吹き、このポケモンとともに成長する。
descriptions.ko: 태어났을 때 등에 이상한 씨앗이 심어졌다. 씨앗은 싹이 터서 이 포켓몬과 함께 자란다.

name: ivysaur
description: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.
appearance: Larger turquoise-green quadrupedal reptilian creature with darker green spots, small pointed ears, prominent red eyes, and a large, opening pink bulb with unfolding leaves on its back.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque le bulbe sur son dos grossit, il semble perdre la capacité de se tenir sur ses pattes arrière.
descriptions.de: Wenn die Knolle auf seinem Rücken groß wird, scheint es die Fähigkeit zu verlieren, auf seinen Hinterbeinen zu stehen.
descriptions.es: Cuando el bulbo de su espalda crece mucho, parece perder la capacidad de mantenerse sobre sus patas traseras.
descriptions.it: Quando il bulbo sulla sua schiena si ingrossa, sembra perdere la capacità di stare in piedi sulle zampe posteriori.
descriptions.ja: 背中のつぼみが大きく育つと、後ろ足で立つ能力を失うように見える。
descriptions.ko: 등에 있는 구근이 커지면 뒷다리로 설 수 있는 능력을 잃는 것으로 보인다.

name: venusaur
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.
appearance: Massive turquoise-green quadrupedal reptilian creature with darker green spots, prominent red eyes, and a gigantic red and white flower with broad green leaves blooming from its back, supported by a thick woody trunk.

descriptions.fr: La plante fleurit lorsqu'elle absorbe l'énergie solaire. Il reste en mouvement pour chercher la lumière du soleil.
descriptions.de: Die Pflanze blüht, wenn sie Sonnenenergie absorbiert. Es bleibt in Bewegung, um Sonnenlicht zu suchen.
descriptions.es: La planta florece cuando absorbe energía solar. Se mantiene en movimiento para buscar la luz del sol.
descriptions.it: La pianta fiorisce quando assorbe energia solare. Si mantiene in movimento per cercare la luce del sole.
descriptions.ja: 太陽エネルギーを吸収すると、背中の花が開花する。日光を求めて常に移動している。
descriptions.ko: 태양 에너지를 흡수하면 식물이 꽃을 피운다. 햇빛을 찾아 계속 움직인다.

name: charmander
description: Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.
appearance: Small bipedal orange lizard-like creature with a cream-colored belly, large blue eyes, and a perpetually burning flame at the tip of its tail.

descriptions.fr: Préfère évidemment les endroits chauds. Quand il pleut, de la vapeur s'échapperait du bout de sa queue.
descriptions.de: Bevorzugt offensichtlich heiße Orte. Wenn es regnet, soll Dampf aus der Schwanzspitze austreten.
descriptions.es: Obviamente prefiere los lugares cálidos. Cuando llueve, se dice que sale vapor de la punta de su cola.
descriptions.it: Ovviamente preferisce i luoghi caldi. Quando piove, si dice che il vapore fuoriesca dalla punta della sua coda.
descriptions.ja: 暑い場所を明らかに好む。雨が降ると、尻尾の先から蒸気が噴き出すと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 분명히 더운 곳을 좋아한다. 비가 오면 꼬리 끝에서 증기가 뿜어져 나온다고 한다.

name: charmeleon
description: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.
appearance: Taller bipedal orange lizard-like creature with a cream-colored underside, sharp claws, a pronounced horn-like protrusion on its head, and a perpetually burning flame at the tip of its tail.

descriptions.fr: Quand il balance sa queue brûlante, il élève la température à des niveaux insupportablement élevés.
descriptions.de: Wenn es seinen brennenden Schwanz schwingt, erhöht es die Temperatur auf unerträglich hohe Werte.
descriptions.es: Cuando balancea su cola ardiente, eleva la temperatura a niveles insoportablemente altos.
descriptions.it: Quando agita la sua coda infuocata, eleva la temperatura a livelli insopportabilmente alti.
descriptions.ja: 燃える尻尾を振ると、温度を耐えられないほど高いレベルにまで上昇させる。
descriptions.ko: 불타는 꼬리를 휘두르면 온도를 참을 수 없을 정도로 높게 올린다.

name: charizard
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.
appearance: Large bipedal orange dragon-like creature with a cream-colored underside, powerful blue-green wings, a long neck, two prominent horns on its head, and a perpetually burning flame at the tip of its tail.

descriptions.fr: Crache un feu assez chaud pour faire fondre des rochers. Connu pour provoquer involontairement des incendies de forêt.
descriptions.de: Spuckt Feuer, das heiß genug ist, um Felsbrocken zu schmelzen. Es ist bekannt, dass es unbeabsichtigt Waldbrände verursacht.
descriptions.es: Escupe fuego lo suficientemente caliente como para derretir rocas. Conocido por causar incendios forestales sin intención.
descriptions.it: Sputa fuoco abbastanza caldo da sciogliere i massi. Noto per causare involontariamente incendi boschivi.
descriptions.ja: 岩を溶かすほど熱い炎を吐く。意図せず森林火災を引き起こすことで知られている。
descriptions.ko: 바위를 녹일 만큼 뜨거운 불을 뿜는다. 의도치 않게 산불을 일으키는 것으로 알려져 있다.

name: squirtle
description: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.
appearance: Small bipedal light blue turtle-like creature with a hard brown shell, a cream-colored plastron, and a distinctive curly tail.

descriptions.fr: Après la naissance, son dos gonfle et durcit en carapace. Il pulvérise puissamment de la mousse par la bouche.
descriptions.de: Nach der Geburt schwillt sein Rücken an und verhärtet sich zu einem Panzer. Es spritzt kräftig Schaum aus seinem Mund.
descriptions.es: Después de nacer, su espalda se hincha y se endurece hasta formar un caparazón. Rocía espuma poderosamente por la boca.
descriptions.it: Dopo la nascita, la sua schiena si gonfia e si indurisce in un guscio. Spruzza energicamente schiuma dalla bocca.
descriptions.ja: 生まれた後、背中が膨らみ甲羅になる。口から強力に泡を噴射する。
descriptions.ko: 태어난 후 등껍질이 부풀어 단단해진다. 입에서 강력하게 거품을 뿜어낸다.

name: wartortle
description: Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance.
appearance: Larger bipedal light blue turtle-like creature with a hard brown shell, a cream-colored plastron, prominent white feathery ear tufts, and a large, furry white tail.

descriptions.fr: Se cache souvent dans l'eau pour traquer ses proies insouciantes. Pour nager vite, il bouge ses oreilles pour maintenir l'équilibre.
descriptions.de: Versteckt sich oft im Wasser, um unvorsichtige Beute zu lauern. Um schnell zu schwimmen, bewegt es seine Ohren, um das Gleichgewicht zu halten.
descriptions.es: A menudo se esconde en el agua para acechar a presas desprevenidas. Para nadar rápido, mueve sus orejas para mantener el equilibrio.
descriptions.it: Spesso si nasconde nell'acqua per tendere agguati a prede incaute. Per nuotare velocemente, muove le orecchie per mantenere l'equilibrio.
descriptions.ja: 油断した獲物を狙うため、よく水中に隠れる。速く泳ぐために、耳を動かしてバランスを保つ。
descriptions.ko: 경계심 없는 먹이를 쫓기 위해 자주 물속에 숨는다. 빠르게 헤엄치기 위해 귀를 움직여 균형을 유지한다.

name: blastoise
description: A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.
appearance: Massive bipedal dark blue turtle-like creature with a hard brown shell, a cream-colored plastron, and two large gray water cannons protruding from its shoulders.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON brutal avec des jets d'eau sous pression sur sa carapace. Ils sont utilisés pour des charges à grande vitesse.
descriptions.de: Ein brutales POKéMON mit unter Druck stehenden Wasserstrahlen auf seinem Panzer. Sie werden für Hochgeschwindigkeitstakeln verwendet.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON brutal con chorros de agua a presión en su caparazón. Se utilizan para embestidas de alta velocidad.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON brutale con getti d'acqua pressurizzati sulla sua conchiglia. Sono usati per attacchi ad alta velocità.
descriptions.ja: 甲羅に加圧された水流砲を持つ、獰猛なポケモン。それらは高速タックルに使われる。
descriptions.ko: 등껍질에 가압 수압 제트가 달린 난폭한 포켓몬. 고속 태클에 사용된다.

name: caterpie
description: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.
appearance: Small, segmented green caterpillar-like creature with a cream-colored underside, large red eyes, four prominent yellow footpads, and a vibrant red Y-shaped antenna on its head.

descriptions.fr: Ses pattes courtes sont dotées de ventouses qui lui permettent de grimper inlassablement les pentes et les murs.
descriptions.de: Seine kurzen Füße sind mit Saugnäpfen ausgestattet, die es ihm ermöglichen, unermüdlich Hänge und Wände zu erklimmen.
descriptions.es: Sus patas cortas están provistas de ventosas que le permiten trepar incansablemente por pendientes y paredes.
descriptions.it: I suoi piedi corti sono dotati di ventose che gli permettono di arrampicarsi instancabilmente su pendii e pareti.
descriptions.ja: その短い足の先には吸盤があり、坂道や壁を無尽蔵に登ることができる。
descriptions.ko: 짧은 발에는 빨판이 있어 지치지 않고 경사와 벽을 오를 수 있다.

name: metapod
description: This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.
appearance: Green chrysalis-like creature with a hard, curved shell that forms a pointed peak on its head and prominent dark eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ce POKéMON est vulnérable aux attaques lorsque sa carapace est molle, exposant son corps faible et fragile.
descriptions.de: Dieses POKéMON ist angreifbar, solange sein Panzer weich ist und seinen schwachen und zarten Körper freilegt.
descriptions.es: Este POKéMON es vulnerable a los ataques mientras su caparazón es blando, exponiendo su cuerpo débil y tierno.
descriptions.it: Questo POKéMON è vulnerabile agli attacchi quando il suo guscio è molle, esponendo il suo corpo debole e tenero.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは、殻が柔らかい間は攻撃に弱く、弱くて柔らかい体をさらしている。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 껍질이 부드러울 때 공격에 취약하며 약하고 연약한 몸을 드러낸다.

name: butterfree
description: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
appearance: White-bodied moth-like creature with large purple eyes, two small blue antennae, and four large white wings adorned with black vein patterns and purple markings near the tips.

descriptions.fr: En combat, il bat des ailes à grande vitesse pour libérer une poussière hautement toxique dans l'air.
descriptions.de: Im Kampf schlägt es seine Flügel mit hoher Geschwindigkeit, um hochgiftigen Staub in die Luft freizusetzen.
descriptions.es: En combate, agita sus alas a gran velocidad para liberar un polvo altamente tóxico en el aire.
descriptions.it: In lotta, batte le ali ad alta velocità per rilasciare polvere altamente tossica nell'aria.
descriptions.ja: 戦闘中、高速で羽根をはばたかせ、猛毒の粉を空気中に放出する。
descriptions.ko: 전투 시, 빠른 속도로 날개를 퍼덕여 독성이 강한 가루를 공기 중으로 방출한다.

name: weedle
description: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head.
appearance: Small, segmented brown worm-like creature with a cream-colored underside, large black eyes, and prominent purple stingers on both its head and tail.

descriptions.fr: On le trouve souvent dans les forêts, mangeant des feuilles. Il possède un aiguillon venimeux et acéré sur la tête.
descriptions.de: Oft in Wäldern anzutreffen, wo es Blätter frisst. Es hat einen scharfen, giftigen Stachel auf dem Kopf.
descriptions.es: Se encuentra a menudo en los bosques, comiendo hojas. Tiene un aguijón venenoso y afilado en la cabeza.
descriptions.it: Spesso si trova nelle foreste, mangiando foglie. Ha un pungiglione velenoso e affilato sulla testa.
descriptions.ja: 森でよく見られ、葉っぱを食べる。頭には鋭い毒針を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 숲에서 자주 발견되며 잎을 먹는다. 머리에는 날카로운 독침이 있다.

name: kakuna
description: Almost incapable of moving, this POKéMON can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.
appearance: Yellow cocoon-like creature with a hard, conical shell that forms a prominent peak on its head and prominent dark eyes.

descriptions.fr: Presque incapable de bouger, ce POKéMON ne peut que durcir sa carapace pour se protéger des prédateurs.
descriptions.de: Fast bewegungsunfähig, kann dieses POKéMON nur seinen Panzer härten, um sich vor Raubtieren zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Casi incapaz de moverse, este POKéMON solo puede endurecer su caparazón para protegerse de los depredadores.
descriptions.it: Quasi incapace di muoversi, questo POKéMON può solo indurire il suo guscio per proteggersi dai predatori.
descriptions.ja: ほとんど動くことができず、捕食者から身を守るために殻を硬くするだけである。
descriptions.ko: 거의 움직일 수 없으며 포식자로부터 자신을 보호하기 위해 껍질을 단단하게 할 뿐이다.

name: beedrill
description: It has three poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly.
appearance: Yellow and black striped wasp-like creature with two large, sharp stingers for forelimbs, a smaller stinger on its abdomen, and two pairs of translucent wings.

descriptions.fr: Il possède trois aiguillons empoisonnés sur ses pattes avant et sa queue. Ils sont utilisés pour piquer son ennemi à plusieurs reprises.
descriptions.de: Es hat drei giftige Stachel an seinen Vorderbeinen und seinem Schwanz. Sie werden verwendet, um seinen Feind wiederholt zu stechen.
descriptions.es: Tiene tres aguijones venenosos en sus patas delanteras y en su cola. Los usa para apuñalar a su enemigo repetidamente.
descriptions.it: Possiede tre pungiglioni velenosi sulle zampe anteriori e sulla coda. Li usa per colpire ripetutamente il nemico.
descriptions.ja: 前足と尻尾に3本の毒針を持つ。敵を何度も突き刺すために使われる。
descriptions.ko: 앞다리와 꼬리에 3개의 독침이 있다. 적을 반복적으로 찌르는 데 사용된다.

name: pidgey
description: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.
appearance: Small, round-bodied bird-like creature with brown plumage, a cream-colored underside, and a distinctive light brown crest of feathers on its head.

descriptions.fr: Courant dans les forêts et les bois. Il bat des ailes au niveau du sol pour soulever un sable aveuglant.
descriptions.de: Ein häufiger Anblick in Wäldern und Gehölzen. Es schlägt mit den Flügeln am Boden, um blendenden Sand aufzuwirbeln.
descriptions.es: Un avistamiento común en bosques y selvas. Agita sus alas a ras de suelo para levantar arena cegadora.
descriptions.it: Un avvistamento comune nelle foreste e nei boschi. Batte le ali a livello del suolo per sollevare sabbia accecante.
descriptions.ja: 森や林でよく見られる。地上すれすれで翼をはためかせ、目くらましの砂を巻き上げる。
descriptions.ko: 숲에서 흔히 볼 수 있다. 지면 가까이에서 날개를 퍼덕여 눈을 멀게 하는 모래를 일으킨다.

name: pidgeotto
description: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this POKéMON will fiercely peck at any intruder.
appearance: Larger, more slender brown bird-like creature with a distinctive red and yellow-striped crest on its head, prominent yellow talons, and a long, red-tipped tail.

descriptions.fr: Très protecteur de son vaste territoire, ce POKéMON picorera férocement tout intrus.
descriptions.de: Sehr beschützend gegenüber seinem weitläufigen Territorium, wird dieses POKéMON jeden Eindringling heftig picken.
descriptions.es: Muy protector de su extensa área territorial, este POKéMON picoteará ferozmente a cualquier intruso.
descriptions.it: Molto protettivo della sua vasta area territoriale, questo POKéMON becchetterà ferocemente qualsiasi intruso.
descriptions.ja: 広大な縄張りを非常に守り、このポケモンはどんな侵入者にも激しくつつきかかる。
descriptions.ko: 넓은 영역에 대해 매우 보호적이며 이 포켓몬은 침입자를 맹렬히 쪼아댄다.

name: pidgeot
description: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP.
appearance: Large, majestic brown bird-like creature with an impressive, flowing red and yellow-striped crest extending from its head, prominent yellow talons, and a long, flowing red-tipped tail.

descriptions.fr: En chasse, il rase la surface de l'eau à grande vitesse pour attraper des proies insouciantes comme MAGIKARP.
descriptions.de: Bei der Jagd gleitet es mit hoher Geschwindigkeit über die Wasseroberfläche, um unvorsichtige Beute wie KARPADOR zu ergreifen.
descriptions.es: Cuando caza, roza la superficie del agua a gran velocidad para atrapar presas desprevenidas como MAGIKARP.
descriptions.it: Quando caccia, sfiora la superficie dell'acqua ad alta velocità per catturare prede ignare come MAGIKARP.
descriptions.ja: 狩りの際、高速で水面をかすめ、コイキングなどの無警戒な獲物を捕らえる。
descriptions.ko: 사냥할 때, 고속으로 수면을 스쳐 지나가 잉어킹과 같은 부주의한 먹이를 낚아챈다.

name: rattata
description: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal purple rodent-like creature with a cream-colored belly, large pointy ears, prominent incisors, and a long, coiled tail.

descriptions.fr: Mord n'importe quoi quand il attaque. Petit et très rapide, on le voit couramment dans de nombreux endroits.
descriptions.de: Beißt alles, wenn es angreift. Klein und sehr schnell, ist es an vielen Orten ein häufiger Anblick.
descriptions.es: Muerde cualquier cosa cuando ataca. Pequeño y muy rápido, es común verlo en muchos lugares.
descriptions.it: Morde qualsiasi cosa quando attacca. Piccolo e molto veloce, è un avvistamento comune in molti luoghi.
descriptions.ja: 攻撃するときは何でも噛む。小さくてとても素早く、多くの場所でよく見られる。
descriptions.ko: 공격할 때 무엇이든 문다. 작고 매우 빠르며 여러 곳에서 흔히 볼 수 있다.

name: raticate
description: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.
appearance: Larger, quadrupedal brown rodent-like creature with a cream-colored belly, prominent yellow incisors, long whiskers, and a long, segmented tail.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise ses moustaches pour maintenir son équilibre. Apparemment, il ralentit si elles sont coupées.
descriptions.de: Es nutzt seine Schnurrhaare, um sein Gleichgewicht zu halten. Anscheinend wird es langsamer, wenn sie abgeschnitten werden.
descriptions.es: Utiliza sus bigotes para mantener el equilibrio. Aparentemente, se ralentiza si se los cortan.
descriptions.it: Usa i suoi baffi per mantenere l'equilibrio. Apparentemente, rallenta se vengono tagliati.
descriptions.ja: ひげを使ってバランスを保つ。ひげが切られると動きが鈍くなるらしい。
descriptions.ko: 수염을 사용하여 균형을 유지한다. 수염이 잘리면 속도가 느려지는 것으로 보인다.

name: spearow
description: It flaps its small wings busily to fly. Using its beak, it searches in grass for prey.
appearance: Small, brown bird-like creature with a cream-colored belly, short red-tipped wings, and a short, pointed brown beak.

descriptions.fr: Il bat activement ses petites ailes pour voler. Il fouille l'herbe avec son bec à la recherche de proies.
descriptions.de: Es schlägt eifrig mit seinen kleinen Flügeln, um zu fliegen. Mit seinem Schnabel sucht es im Gras nach Beute.
descriptions.es: Bate con gran actividad sus pequeñas alas para volar. Con su pico, busca presas en la hierba.
descriptions.it: Sbatte le sue piccole ali freneticamente per volare. Con il suo becco, cerca prede nell'erba.
descriptions.ja: 小さな翼をせわしなく羽ばたいて飛ぶ。くちばしで草むらから獲物を探す。
descriptions.ko: 작은 날개를 바쁘게 퍼덕이며 날아다닌다. 부리로 풀밭에서 먹이를 찾는다.

name: fearow
description: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.
appearance: Large, slender white bird-like creature with prominent red wings, a long, pointed beak, and a long, flowing crest of red feathers on its head and neck.

descriptions.fr: Grâce à ses ailes immenses et magnifiques, il peut rester en l'air sans jamais avoir besoin de se poser pour se reposer.
descriptions.de: Mit seinen riesigen und prächtigen Flügeln kann es sich in der Luft halten, ohne jemals zur Rast landen zu müssen.
descriptions.es: Con sus enormes y magníficas alas, puede mantenerse en el aire sin necesidad de aterrizar para descansar.
descriptions.it: Con le sue ali enormi e magnifiche, può rimanere in volo senza mai dover atterrare per riposare.
descriptions.ja: 巨大でりっぱな翼で、休むことなく空を飛び続けることができる。
descriptions.ko: 거대하고 훌륭한 날개로 휴식 없이 공중에 머물 수 있다.

name: ekans
description: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole.
appearance: Purple snake-like creature with yellow rings encircling its body, a cream-colored belly, and an unsegmented rattle-like tail.

descriptions.fr: Se déplace en silence et furtivement. Il avale entiers les œufs d'oiseaux tels que PIDGEY et SPEAROW.
descriptions.de: Bewegt sich lautlos und verstohlen. Frisst die Eier von Vögeln wie PIDGEY und SPEAROW im Ganzen.
descriptions.es: Se mueve en silencio y sigilosamente. Engulle enteros los huevos de pájaros como PIDGEY y SPEAROW.
descriptions.it: Si muove silenziosamente e di soppiatto. Inghiottisce intere le uova di uccelli, come PIDGEY e SPEAROW.
descriptions.ja: 音もなく忍び寄る。ポッポやオニスズメなどの鳥の卵を丸ごと食べる。
descriptions.ko: 소리 없이 몰래 움직인다. 구구와 깨비참 같은 새의 알을 통째로 먹는다.

name: arbok
description: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.
appearance: Large, purple cobra-like creature with variable, intimidating eye-like patterns on its hood, a cream-colored belly, and prominent fangs.

descriptions.fr: On raconte que les marques d'avertissement féroces sur son ventre diffèrent d'une région à l'autre.
descriptions.de: Es wird gemunkelt, dass die wilden Warnmuster auf seinem Bauch von Gebiet zu Gebiet variieren.
descriptions.es: Se rumorea que las feroces marcas de advertencia en su vientre difieren de una zona a otra.
descriptions.it: Si dice che le feroci marcature di avvertimento sul suo ventre differiscano da zona a zona.
descriptions.ja: 腹の模様は地域によって異なると言われ、その獰猛な警告模様は恐れられている。
descriptions.ko: 배의 흉포한 경고 무늬는 지역마다 다르다고 전해진다.

name: pikachu
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: Small yellow rodent with brown stripes on its back, long ears tipped with black, prominent red cheek pouches, and a lightning bolt-shaped tail.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKéMON versammeln, kann sich ihre Elektrizität aufbauen und Gewitterstürme verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se reúnen, su electricidad puede acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando diversi di questi POKéMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e causare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: 多数集まると電気をためこんで、落雷を起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 여러 마리가 모이면 전기가 축적되어 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다.

name: raichu
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
appearance: Larger orange-brown rodent with a cream-colored belly, long, pointed ears tipped with brown, prominent yellow cheek pouches, and a long, thin brown tail that ends in a lightning bolt shape.

descriptions.fr: Sa longue queue sert de mise à la terre pour se protéger de sa propre puissance à haute tension.
descriptions.de: Sein langer Schweif dient als Erdung, um sich vor seiner eigenen Hochspannung zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Su larga cola le sirve de toma de tierra para protegerse de su propia energía de alto voltaje.
descriptions.it: La sua lunga coda funge da messa a terra per proteggersi dalla sua stessa potenza ad alta tensione.
descriptions.ja: 長いしっぽはアースの役割を果たし、自身の高圧な電気から身を守る。
descriptions.ko: 긴 꼬리는 접지 역할을 하여 자신의 고전압 전력으로부터 몸을 보호한다.

name: sandshrew
description: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.
appearance: Small, bipedal yellowish-brown armadillo-like creature with a cream-colored belly, large dark eyes, and a hard, segmented shell-like back.

descriptions.fr: S'enfouit profondément sous terre dans les endroits arides, loin de l'eau. Il n'émerge que pour chasser sa nourriture.
descriptions.de: Gräbt sich tief unter der Erde in trockenen, wasserfernen Gebieten ein. Es kommt nur zur Jagd nach Nahrung an die Oberfläche.
descriptions.es: Excava profundamente bajo tierra en lugares áridos, lejos del agua. Solo emerge para cazar alimento.
descriptions.it: Si seppellisce in profondità nel terreno in luoghi aridi e lontani dall'acqua. Emerge solo per cacciare cibo.
descriptions.ja: 水の少ない乾燥した場所で、地面の奥深くに潜る。食べ物を探す時だけ地上に出る。
descriptions.ko: 물이 부족한 건조한 장소에서 깊은 땅속으로 파고든다. 먹이를 사냥할 때만 모습을 드러낸다.

name: sandslash
description: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.
appearance: Larger, bipedal yellowish-brown pangolin-like creature with a cream-colored belly, sharp claws, and prominent beige spines covering its back and head.

descriptions.fr: Se recroqueville en une boule épineuse lorsqu'il est menacé. Il peut rouler ainsi pour attaquer ou s'échapper.
descriptions.de: Rollt sich bei Gefahr zu einem stacheligen Ball zusammen. Es kann im zusammengerollten Zustand rollen, um anzugreifen oder zu entkommen.
descriptions.es: Se enrolla en una bola espinosa cuando se siente amenazado. Puede rodar así para atacar o escapar.
descriptions.it: Si arrotola in una palla spinosa quando è minacciato. Può rotolare così per attaccare o fuggire.
descriptions.ja: 襲われると体を丸めて針のボールになる。丸まったまま転がって攻撃したり逃げたりする。
descriptions.ko: 위협을 느끼면 가시 돋친 공 모양으로 몸을 웅크린다. 몸을 웅크린 채 굴러서 공격하거나 도망친다.

name: nidoran-f
description: Although small, its venomous barbs render this POKéMON dangerous. The female has smaller horns.
appearance: Small, light blue quadrupedal rodent-like creature with darker blue spots, large ears with dark blue insides, and small, pointed horns on its head.

descriptions.fr: Bien que petit, ses barbes venimeuses rendent ce POKéMON dangereux. La femelle a des cornes plus petites.
descriptions.de: Obwohl klein, machen seine giftigen Stacheln dieses POKéMON gefährlich. Das Weibchen hat kleinere Hörner.
descriptions.es: Aunque pequeño, sus púas venenosas hacen que este POKéMON sea peligroso. La hembra tiene cuernos más pequeños.
descriptions.it: Anche se piccolo, le sue barbe velenose rendono questo POKéMON pericoloso. La femmina ha corna più piccole.
descriptions.ja: 小さいながらも毒のトゲを持ち、危険なポケモン。メスは角が小さい。
descriptions.ko: 작지만 독이 있는 가시를 가졌기에 위험한 포켓몬. 암컷은 뿔이 작다.

name: nidorina
description: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.
appearance: Larger, light blue quadrupedal rodent-like creature with darker blue spots, large ears with dark blue insides, and larger, pointed horns on its head.

descriptions.fr: La corne de la femelle se développe lentement. Elle préfère les attaques physiques telles que les coups de griffes et les morsures.
descriptions.de: Das Horn des Weibchens entwickelt sich langsam. Es bevorzugt physische Angriffe wie Kratzen und Beißen.
descriptions.es: El cuerno de la hembra se desarrolla lentamente. Prefiere ataques físicos como arañar y morder.
descriptions.it: Il corno della femmina si sviluppa lentamente. Predilige attacchi fisici come graffi e morsi.
descriptions.ja: メスの角はゆっくりと成長する。ひっかきや噛みつきといった物理攻撃を好む。
descriptions.ko: 암컷의 뿔은 천천히 성장한다. 할퀴기나 물기 같은 물리 공격을 선호한다.

name: nidoqueen
description: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.
appearance: Large bipedal purple reptilian creature with a cream-colored belly and chest, a spiky ruff around its neck, a thick tail, and large claws.

descriptions.fr: Ses écailles dures offrent une forte protection. Elle utilise sa masse imposante pour exécuter des mouvements puissants.
descriptions.de: Seine harten Schuppen bieten starken Schutz. Es nutzt seinen massigen Körper, um mächtige Attacken auszuführen.
descriptions.es: Sus duras escamas le brindan una fuerte protección. Usa su enorme cuerpo para ejecutar poderosos movimientos.
descriptions.it: Le sue dure scaglie offrono una forte protezione. Usa la sua stazza imponente per eseguire mosse potenti.
descriptions.ja: 硬いウロコは高い防御力を持ち、その巨体で強力な技を繰り出す。
descriptions.ko: 단단한 비늘은 강한 방어력을 제공한다. 육중한 몸을 이용해 강력한 기술을 구사한다.

name: nidoran-m
description: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.
appearance: Small, light blue quadrupedal mammalian creature with large pointed ears, a spiky dark blue dorsal fin, a prominent horn on its forehead, and a short tail.

descriptions.fr: Redresse ses oreilles pour détecter le danger. Plus ses cornes sont grandes, plus le venin qu'il sécrète est puissant.
descriptions.de: Es versteift seine Ohren, um Gefahr zu wittern. Je größer seine Hörner sind, desto stärker ist sein ausgeschiedenes Gift.
descriptions.es: Endurece sus orejas para detectar el peligro. Cuanto más grandes sean sus cuernos, más potente será el veneno que segrega.
descriptions.it: Raddrizza le orecchie per percepire il pericolo. Più grandi sono le sue corna, più potente è il veleno che secerne.
descriptions.ja: 耳をぴんと立てて危険を察知する。角が大きいほど、分泌する毒が強力になる。
descriptions.ko: 귀를 쫑긋 세워 위험을 감지한다. 뿔이 클수록 분비하는 독이 강력해진다.

name: nidorino
description: An aggressive POKéMON that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.
appearance: Medium-sized, bipedal light blue reptilian creature with large pointed ears, dark blue spikes along its back, a prominent horn on its forehead, and two smaller teeth protruding from its upper jaw.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON agressif qui attaque rapidement. La corne sur sa tête sécrète un venin puissant.
descriptions.de: Ein aggressives POKéMON, das schnell angreift. Das Horn auf seinem Kopf scheidet ein mächtiges Gift aus.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON agresivo que ataca rápidamente. El cuerno de su cabeza segrega un potente veneno.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON aggressivo che attacca rapidamente. Il corno sulla sua testa secerne un potente veleno.
descriptions.ja: 攻撃的なポケモンで、素早く襲いかかる。頭の角からは強力な毒が分泌される。
descriptions.ko: 공격적인 포켓몬으로, 재빠르게 공격한다. 머리의 뿔에서 강력한 독이 분비된다.

name: nidoking
description: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones.
appearance: Large, bipedal purple reptilian creature with a cream-colored belly, large orange spikes along its back and on its head, a prominent horn, and large claws.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise sa puissante queue au combat pour fracasser, étrangler puis briser les os de sa proie.
descriptions.de: Es setzt seinen kräftigen Schweif im Kampf ein, um die Knochen seiner Beute zu zerschmettern, zu erwürgen und zu brechen.
descriptions.es: Utiliza su poderosa cola en combate para aplastar, constreñir y luego romper los huesos de su presa.
descriptions.it: In battaglia usa la sua potente coda per schiacciare, stritolare e poi rompere le ossa della preda.
descriptions.ja: 戦いでは、強力な尻尾を使って獲物を叩きつけ、締めつけ、骨を砕く。
descriptions.ko: 전투에서는 강력한 꼬리를 이용해 상대를 때려 부수고 조여서 뼈를 부러뜨린다.

name: clefairy
description: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.
appearance: Small, bipedal pink fairy-like creature with large pointed ears with brown tips, three-toed feet, a small pair of cream-colored wings on its back, and a curly tail.

descriptions.fr: Son charme magique et mignon a de nombreux admirateurs. Il est rare et ne se trouve que dans certaines zones.
descriptions.de: Sein magischer und niedlicher Charme hat viele Bewunderer. Es ist selten und nur in bestimmten Gebieten zu finden.
descriptions.es: Su encanto mágico y adorable tiene muchos admiradores. Es raro y se encuentra solo en ciertas áreas.
descriptions.it: Il suo fascino magico e carino ha molti ammiratori. È raro e si trova solo in alcune aree.
descriptions.ja: その魔法のような可愛らしさは多くのファンを持つ。珍しいポケモンで、特定の地域でしか見られない。
descriptions.ko: 마법 같은 귀여움으로 많은 사람들의 사랑을 받는다. 희귀하며 특정 지역에서만 발견된다.

name: clefable
description: A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.
appearance: Larger, bipedal pink fairy-like creature with long pointed ears with brown tips, larger cream-colored wings on its back, and a more pronounced curly tail.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON fée timide et rarement vu. Il s'enfuira et se cachera dès qu'il sentira des gens.
descriptions.de: Ein scheues Feen-POKéMON, das selten gesehen wird. Es rennt und versteckt sich, sobald es Menschen wahrnimmt.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON hada tímido que rara vez se ve. Huirá y se esconderá en cuanto detecte la presencia de personas.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON folletto timido e raramente visto. Corre a nascondersi nel momento in cui percepisce persone.
descriptions.ja: めったに見られない臆病な妖精ポケモン。人を感じるとすぐに逃げて隠れてしまう。
descriptions.ko: 좀처럼 보기 드문 겁 많은 요정 포켓몬. 사람을 느끼면 즉시 도망쳐 숨는다.

name: vulpix
description: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.
appearance: Small, fox-like quadrupedal creature with reddish-brown fur, six curly tails, and a cream-colored tuft of fur on its head.

descriptions.fr: À la naissance, il n'a qu'une seule queue. La queue se divise à partir de sa pointe à mesure qu'il grandit.
descriptions.de: Bei der Geburt hat es nur einen Schwanz. Der Schwanz teilt sich von seiner Spitze aus, wenn es älter wird.
descriptions.es: Al nacer, solo tiene una cola. La cola se divide desde la punta a medida que envejece.
descriptions.it: Alla nascita ha una sola coda. La coda si divide dalla punta man mano che invecchia.
descriptions.ja: 生まれたときは尻尾が１本しかない。成長するにつれて、尻尾の先が分かれていく。
descriptions.ko: 태어날 때는 꼬리가 한 개뿐이다. 성장하면서 꼬리 끝이 갈라진다.

name: ninetales
description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.
appearance: Large, elegant fox-like quadrupedal creature with cream-colored fur, nine long, flowing tails, and a prominent crest of fur on its head.

descriptions.fr: Très intelligent et très vengeur. Saisir l'une de ses nombreuses queues pourrait entraîner une malédiction de 1000 ans.
descriptions.de: Sehr intelligent und sehr rachsüchtig. Das Greifen eines seiner vielen Schwänze könnte zu einem 1000-jährigen Fluch führen.
descriptions.es: Muy inteligente y muy vengativo. Agarrar una de sus muchas colas podría resultar en una maldición de 1000 años.
descriptions.it: Molto intelligente e molto vendicativo. Afferrare una delle sue tante code potrebbe provocare una maledizione di 1000 anni.
descriptions.ja: 非常に賢く、とても執念深い。多くの尻尾の１本でも掴むと、1000年の呪いにかかることがある。
descriptions.ko: 매우 영리하고 복수심이 강하다. 많은 꼬리 중 하나라도 잡으면 1000년간의 저주를 받을 수 있다.

name: jigglypuff
description: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.
appearance: Small, spherical pink balloon-like creature with large blue eyes, pointed ears, and a small, curly tuft of hair on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: Quand ses grands yeux s'illuminent, il chante une mélodie mystérieusement apaisante qui endort ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Wenn seine riesigen Augen aufleuchten, singt es eine mysteriös beruhigende Melodie, die seine Gegner in den Schlaf wiegt.
descriptions.es: Cuando sus enormes ojos se iluminan, canta una melodía misteriosamente relajante que adormece a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Quando i suoi grandi occhi si illuminano, canta una melodia misteriosamente rilassante che addormenta i suoi nemici.
descriptions.ja: その大きな目が光ると、不思議なほど心地よいメロディを歌い、敵を眠らせてしまう。
descriptions.ko: 커다란 눈이 빛나면 신비롭고 편안한 멜로디를 노래해 상대를 잠재운다.

name: wigglytuff
description: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.
appearance: Larger, spherical pink rabbit-like creature with long, floppy pointed ears, large blue eyes, and a white belly.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est doux et élastique. Lorsqu'il est en colère, il aspire de l'air et se gonfle à une taille énorme.
descriptions.de: Der Körper ist weich und gummiartig. Wenn es wütend ist, saugt es Luft ein und bläht sich zu einer enormen Größe auf.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo es suave y gomoso. Cuando se enfada,吸入 aire y se infla hasta un tamaño enorme.
descriptions.it: Il corpo è morbido e gommoso. Quando si arrabbia, aspira aria e si gonfia fino a raggiungere una dimensione enorme.
descriptions.ja: 体は柔らかくゴムのようだ。怒ると空気を吸い込み、巨大なサイズまで膨れ上がる。
descriptions.ko: 몸은 부드럽고 고무와 같다. 화가 나면 공기를 들이마셔 엄청난 크기로 부풀어 오른다.

name: zubat
description: Forms colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.
appearance: Small, purple bat-like creature with no visible eyes, large pointed ears, and a red mouth with two fangs.

descriptions.fr: Forme des colonies dans les endroits constamment sombres. Utilise les ondes ultrasoniques pour identifier et approcher ses cibles.
descriptions.de: Bildet Kolonien an ständig dunklen Orten. Nutzt Ultraschallwellen, um Ziele zu identifizieren und sich ihnen zu nähern.
descriptions.es: Forma colonias en lugares perpetuamente oscuros. Usa ondas ultrasónicas para identificar y acercarse a sus objetivos.
descriptions.it: Forma colonie in luoghi perennemente bui. Usa onde ultrasoniche per identificare e avvicinarsi ai bersagli.
descriptions.ja: 常に暗い場所に群れを作る。超音波を使って目標を特定し、接近する。
descriptions.ko: 영원히 어두운 곳에 무리를 지어 산다. 초음파를 사용하여 목표를 식별하고 접근한다.

name: golbat
description: Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.
appearance: Larger, blue bat-like creature with a wide mouth, two visible red eyes, large pointed ears, and a small pair of legs.

descriptions.fr: Une fois qu'il attaque, il ne cesse de drainer l'énergie de sa victime, même s'il devient trop lourd pour voler.
descriptions.de: Sobald es zuschlägt, hört es nicht auf, dem Opfer Energie zu entziehen, selbst wenn es zu schwer zum Fliegen wird.
descriptions.es: Una vez que ataca, no deja de drenar energía de la víctima, incluso si se vuelve demasiado pesado para volar.
descriptions.it: Una volta che attacca, non smette di prosciugare l'energia della vittima, anche se diventa troppo pesante per volare.
descriptions.ja: 一度襲いかかると、飛べなくなるほど重くなっても、獲物からエネルギーを吸い取り続ける。
descriptions.ko: 일단 공격하면, 너무 무거워 날 수 없게 되더라도 희생자에게서 에너지를 계속 흡수한다.

name: oddish
description: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.
appearance: Small, round blue plant-like creature with two small feet and five green leaves growing from its head.

descriptions.fr: Le jour, il garde son visage enfoui dans le sol. La nuit, il erre en semant ses graines.
descriptions.de: Tagsüber vergräbt es sein Gesicht im Boden. Nachts streift es umher und sät seine Samen.
descriptions.es: Durante el día, mantiene su cara enterrada en el suelo. Por la noche, vaga sembrando sus semillas.
descriptions.it: Di giorno, tiene la faccia interrata. Di notte, vaga seminando i suoi semi.
descriptions.ja: 昼間は顔を地面に埋めている。夜になると、種をまきながらさまよい歩く。
descriptions.ko: 낮에는 땅속에 얼굴을 파묻고 지낸다. 밤이 되면 돌아다니며 씨앗을 뿌린다.

name: gloom
description: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.
appearance: Medium-sized, blue plant-like creature with two small feet, three large orange-brown petals around its head, and a perpetually drooling mouth.

descriptions.fr: Le fluide qui suinte de sa bouche n'est pas de la bave. C'est un nectar utilisé pour attirer les proies.
descriptions.de: Die Flüssigkeit, die aus seinem Mund sickert, ist kein Speichel. Es ist ein Nektar, der dazu dient, Beute anzulocken.
descriptions.es: El fluido que rezuma de su boca no es baba. Es un néctar que usa para atraer presas.
descriptions.it: Il fluido che cola dalla sua bocca non è bava. È un nettare usato per attirare le prede.
descriptions.ja: 口からにじみ出る液体はよだれではない。獲物を引き寄せるための蜜である。
descriptions.ko: 입에서 흘러나오는 액체는 침이 아니다. 먹이를 유인하는 데 사용되는 꿀이다.

name: vileplume
description: It has the world’s largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.
appearance: Large, blue plant-like creature with two small feet, a gigantic red flower with white spots covering most of its body, and a short stem.

descriptions.fr: Il possède les plus grandes pétales du monde. À chaque pas, ses pétales libèrent d'épais nuages de pollen toxique.
descriptions.de: Es hat die größten Blütenblätter der Welt. Mit jedem Schritt schütteln die Blütenblätter dichte Wolken giftigen Pollens ab.
descriptions.es: Tiene los pétalos más grandes del mundo. Con cada paso, sus pétalos esparcen densas nubes de polen tóxico.
descriptions.it: Ha i petali più grandi del mondo. Ad ogni passo, i petali rilasciano dense nuvole di polline tossico.
descriptions.ja: 世界最大の花びらを持つ。一歩踏み出すたびに、花びらから毒性のある重い花粉の雲を振りまく。
descriptions.ko: 세계에서 가장 큰 꽃잎을 가졌다. 한 걸음마다 꽃잎에서 독성 꽃가루의 무거운 구름이 흩날린다.

name: paras
description: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by draw­ ing nutrients from the bug host.
appearance: Small, orange insectoid creature with a hard carapace, six legs, and two red-capped mushrooms growing on its back.

descriptions.fr: Creuse pour sucer les racines des arbres. Les champignons sur son dos grandissent en puisant les nutriments de son corps d'insecte.
descriptions.de: Gräbt sich ein, um Baumwurzeln zu saugen. Die Pilze auf seinem Rücken wachsen, indem sie Nährstoffe vom Wirtsinsekt beziehen.
descriptions.es: Excava para succionar raíces de árboles. Los hongos de su espalda crecen extrayendo nutrientes del insecto huésped.
descriptions.it: Scava per succhiare le radici degli alberi. I funghi sulla sua schiena crescono assorbendo i nutrienti dall'ospite insetto.
descriptions.ja: 地中に潜って木の根を吸う。背中のキノコは、宿主の虫から栄養を吸い取って成長する。
descriptions.ko: 땅속을 파고 들어가 나무뿌리를 빨아먹는다. 등껍데기의 버섯은 벌레 숙주로부터 영양분을 흡수하여 성장한다.

name: parasect
description: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug. Prefers damp places.
appearance: Larger, orange insectoid creature with a hard carapace, six legs, and two large, red-capped mushrooms covering its entire back, with white gills visible underneath.

descriptions.fr: Une paire hôte-parasite où le champignon parasite a pris le contrôle de l'insecte hôte. Préfère les endroits humides.
descriptions.de: Eine Wirt-Parasit-Paarung, bei der der parasitische Pilz das Wirtsinsekt übernommen hat. Bevorzugt feuchte Orte.
descriptions.es: Un par huésped-parásito en el que el hongo parásito ha tomado el control del insecto huésped. Prefiere lugares húmedos.
descriptions.it: Una coppia ospite-parassita in cui il fungo parassita ha preso il controllo dell'insetto ospite. Predilige i luoghi umidi.
descriptions.ja: 寄生キノコが宿主の虫を支配した、宿主と寄生体のペア。湿った場所を好む。
descriptions.ko: 기생 버섯이 숙주 벌레를 지배한 숙주-기생체 쌍이다. 습한 곳을 좋아한다.

name: venonat
description: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats insects. It is attracted by light at night.
appearance: Small, purple insectoid creature with large red compound eyes, white fur covering its body, and small antennae.

descriptions.fr: Vit dans l'ombre des grands arbres où il mange des insectes. Il est attiré par la lumière la nuit.
descriptions.de: Lebt im Schatten hoher Bäume, wo es Insekten frisst. Nachts wird es vom Licht angezogen.
descriptions.es: Vive en las sombras de árboles altos donde come insectos. Por la noche, es atraído por la luz.
descriptions.it: Vive all'ombra di alberi alti dove si nutre di insetti. Di notte è attratto dalla luce.
descriptions.ja: 高い木の陰に生息し、昆虫を食べる。夜になると光に引き寄せられる。
descriptions.ko: 큰 나무 그늘에 살며 곤충을 먹는다. 밤에는 빛에 이끌린다.

name: venomoth
description: The dustlike scales covering its wings are color-coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.
appearance: Larger, light purple moth-like creature with large red compound eyes, feathery antennae, and two pairs of patterned wings with a dark purple spot and light purple rim.

descriptions.fr: Les écailles pulvérulentes couvrant ses ailes sont codées par couleur pour indiquer les types de poison qu'il possède.
descriptions.de: Die staubartigen Schuppen, die seine Flügel bedecken, sind farbcodiert, um die Art des Giftes anzuzeigen, das es besitzt.
descriptions.es: Las escamas polvorientas que cubren sus alas están codificadas por colores para indicar los tipos de veneno que posee.
descriptions.it: Le scaglie simili a polvere che coprono le sue ali sono codificate per colore per indicare i tipi di veleno che possiede.
descriptions.ja: 翅を覆う粉末状の鱗粉は、その毒の種類を示すために色分けされている。
descriptions.ko: 날개를 덮고 있는 가루 같은 비늘은 색깔로 구분되어 가진 독의 종류를 나타낸다.

name: diglett
description: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.
appearance: Small, brown mole-like creature with a red nose, emerging from the ground, with no visible body below.

descriptions.fr: Vit environ un mètre sous terre où il se nourrit de racines de plantes. Il apparaît parfois à la surface.
descriptions.de: Lebt etwa einen Meter unter der Erde, wo es sich von Pflanzenwurzeln ernährt. Manchmal erscheint es über dem Boden.
descriptions.es: Vive aproximadamente un metro bajo tierra donde se alimenta de raíces de plantas. A veces aparece sobre el suelo.
descriptions.it: Vive circa un metro sottoterra, dove si nutre di radici di piante. A volte appare in superficie.
descriptions.ja: 地下約1ヤードに生息し、植物の根を食べる。時々、地上に姿を現す。
descriptions.ko: 지하 약 1야드에 살면서 식물 뿌리를 먹는다. 가끔 지상에 나타나기도 한다.

name: dugtrio
description: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.
appearance: Three brown mole-like creatures with red noses, emerging side-by-side from the ground, with no visible bodies below.

descriptions.fr: Une équipe de DIGLETT triplés. Il déclenche d'énormes tremblements de terre en creusant 60 miles sous terre.
descriptions.de: Ein Team von drei DIGDA. Es löst riesige Erdbeben aus, indem es 60 Meilen tief gräbt.
descriptions.es: Un equipo de tres DIGLETT. Provoca grandes terremotos excavando 60 millas bajo tierra.
descriptions.it: Una squadra di tre DIGLETT. Provoca enormi terremoti scavando 60 miglia sotto terra.
descriptions.ja: ディグダのトリオ。地下60マイルを掘り進み、巨大な地震を引き起こす。
descriptions.ko: 디그다 삼형제. 지하 60마일을 파고들며 거대한 지진을 일으킨다.

name: meowth
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.
appearance: Small, white feline creature with a golden oval coin on its forehead, prominent whiskers, and a curled tail.

descriptions.fr: Il se lave régulièrement le visage pour garder la pièce sur son front impeccable. Il ne s'entend pas avec Miaouss de Galar.
descriptions.de: Es wäscht sich regelmäßig das Gesicht, um die Münze auf seiner Stirn makellos zu halten. Es versteht sich nicht mit Galar-Mauzi.
descriptions.es: Se lava la cara con regularidad para mantener la moneda de su frente impecable. No se lleva bien con Meowth de Galar.
descriptions.it: Si lava regolarmente la faccia per mantenere immacolata la moneta sulla fronte. Non va d'accordo con Meowth di Galar.
descriptions.ja: 額の小判を汚さないよう、頻繁に顔を洗う。ガラルニャースとは仲が悪い。
descriptions.ko: 이마의 코인을 깨끗하게 유지하기 위해 얼굴을 자주 씻는다. 가라르 나옹과는 사이가 좋지 않다.

name: persian
description: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.
appearance: Medium-sized, cream-colored feline creature with a red jewel on its forehead, prominent whiskers, and a long, elegant tail.

descriptions.fr: Bien que sa fourrure ait de nombreux admirateurs, il est difficile à élever comme animal de compagnie en raison de sa méchanceté capricieuse.
descriptions.de: Obwohl sein Fell viele Bewunderer hat, ist es aufgrund seiner launischen Gemeinheit schwer als Haustier zu halten.
descriptions.es: Aunque su pelaje tiene muchos admiradores, es difícil de criar como mascota debido a su maldad caprichosa.
descriptions.it: Sebbene la sua pelliccia abbia molti ammiratori, è difficile da allevare come animale domestico a causa della sua malvagità capricciosa.
descriptions.ja: その毛並みは多くの人に愛されるが、気まぐれで意地悪なため、ペットとして飼うのは難しい。
descriptions.ko: 털가죽은 많은 사람들에게 칭찬받지만 변덕스럽고 심술궂어 키우기 어렵다.

name: psyduck
description: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily POKéMON will use psychokinetic powers.
appearance: Yellow duck-like creature with a flat bill, three black hairs on its head, and small red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Alors qu'il endort ses ennemis avec son regard vide, ce POKéMON rusé utilise des pouvoirs psychokinétiques.
descriptions.de: Während es seine Feinde mit seinem leeren Blick einlullt, setzt dieses gerissene POKéMON psychokinetische Kräfte ein.
descriptions.es: Mientras adormece a sus enemigos con su mirada vacía, este astuto POKéMON utiliza poderes psicocinéticos.
descriptions.it: Mentre culla i suoi nemici con il suo sguardo vuoto, questo astuto POKéMON userà poteri psicocinetici.
descriptions.ja: 虚ろな目つきで敵を油断させ、その隙にサイコキネシスを使うずる賢いポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 멍한 눈빛으로 적을 방심시킨 후 염력을 사용하는 교활한 포켓몬.

name: golduck
description: Often seen swim­ ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.
appearance: Blue duck-like creature with a red jewel on its forehead, a flat bill, and webbed hands and feet.

descriptions.fr: Souvent vu nageant élégamment près des rives des lacs. Il est souvent confondu avec le monstre japonais, Kappa.
descriptions.de: Oft an Seeufern elegant schwimmend gesehen. Es wird oft mit dem japanischen Monster Kappa verwechselt.
descriptions.es: A menudo se le ve nadando elegantemente por las orillas de los lagos. Con frecuencia se le confunde con el monstruo japonés, Kappa.
descriptions.it: Spesso visto nuotare elegantemente vicino alle rive dei laghi. È spesso scambiato per il mostro giapponese, Kappa.
descriptions.ja: 湖畔を優雅に泳ぐ姿がよく見られる。日本の妖怪、カッパと間違われることが多い。
descriptions.ko: 호숫가에서 우아하게 헤엄치는 모습이 자주 목격된다. 일본의 요괴 갓파로 오해받는 일이 많다.

name: mankey
description: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.
appearance: Small, beige primate with a prominent pink snout, three-fingered hands, and a curled tail.

descriptions.fr: Extrêmement rapide à la colère. Il peut être docile un instant puis se déchaîner l'instant d'après.
descriptions.de: Extrem schnell wütend. Es kann im einen Moment zahm sein und im nächsten Augenblick wild um sich schlagen.
descriptions.es: Extremadamente propenso a la ira. Puede ser dócil en un momento y desatar su furia al instante siguiente.
descriptions.it: Estremamente facile all'ira. Può essere docile in un momento e poi scatenarsi l'istante dopo.
descriptions.ja: 極端に怒りっぽい。ある瞬間は大人しくても、次の瞬間には暴れ回る。
descriptions.ko: 극도로 화를 잘 낸다. 한순간에는 얌전하다가 다음 순간에는 난폭해진다.

name: primeape
description: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.
appearance: Medium-sized, white primate with a prominent pink snout, four-fingered hands, and a chain-like appendage around its wrists and ankles.

descriptions.fr: Toujours furieux et tenace de surcroît. Il n'abandonnera pas la poursuite de sa proie tant qu'il ne l'aura pas attrapée.
descriptions.de: Immer wütend und noch dazu hartnäckig. Es wird seine Beute nicht aufgeben, bevor es sie gefangen hat.
descriptions.es: Siempre furioso y además tenaz. No abandonará la persecución de su presa hasta que la haya capturado.
descriptions.it: Sempre furioso e per di più tenace. Non abbandonerà l'inseguimento della sua preda finché non l'avrà catturata.
descriptions.ja: 常に激怒しており、しつこい。獲物を捕らえるまで追いかけるのをやめない。
descriptions.ko: 항상 격노하고 끈질기다. 먹이를 잡을 때까지 추적을 멈추지 않는다.

name: growlithe
description: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.
appearance: Orange puppy-like creature with black stripes, a cream-colored belly, and a cream-colored tuft of fur on its head and tail.

descriptions.fr: Très protecteur de son territoire. Il aboiera et mordra pour repousser les intrus de son espace.
descriptions.de: Sehr territorial. Es wird bellen und beißen, um Eindringlinge aus seinem Revier zu vertreiben.
descriptions.es: Muy protector de su territorio. Ladrará y morderá para repeler a los intrusos de su espacio.
descriptions.it: Molto protettivo del suo territorio. Abbaierà e morderà per respingere gli intrusi dal suo spazio.
descriptions.ja: 縄張りを強く守る。侵入者を追い払うために吠えたり噛みついたりする。
descriptions.ko: 자신의 영역을 매우 보호한다. 침입자를 쫓아내기 위해 짖고 문다.

name: arcanine
description: A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
appearance: Large, orange canine creature with black stripes, long flowing cream-colored fur on its head, chest, and tail, and a long, slender body.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON admiré depuis le passé pour sa beauté. Il court avec agilité comme s'il avait des ailes.
descriptions.de: Ein POKéMON, das seit der Vergangenheit für seine Schönheit bewundert wird. Es läuft agil, als ob es Flügel hätte.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON que ha sido admirado desde el pasado por su belleza. Corre con agilidad como si tuviera alas.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON ammirato fin dal passato per la sua bellezza. Corre con agilità come se avesse le ali.
descriptions.ja: その美しさから古くから賞賛されてきたポケモン。翼があるかのように軽やかに走る。
descriptions.ko: 옛날부터 그 아름다움으로 칭송받아온 포켓몬. 날개가 달린 듯 민첩하게 달린다.

name: poliwag
description: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand.
appearance: Small, blue tadpole-like creature with a large head, a white swirl on its belly, and a long, thin tail.

descriptions.fr: Ses jambes nouvellement développées l'empêchent de courir. Il semble préférer nager plutôt que d'essayer de se tenir debout.
descriptions.de: Seine neu gewachsenen Beine hindern es am Laufen. Es scheint das Schwimmen dem Stehen vorzuziehen.
descriptions.es: Sus piernas recién desarrolladas le impiden correr. Parece preferir nadar a intentar ponerse de pie.
descriptions.it: Le sue zampe appena cresciute gli impediscono di correre. Sembra preferire nuotare piuttosto che tentare di stare in piedi.
descriptions.ja: 新しく生えた脚は走るのに向かない。立つよりも泳ぐ方を好むようだ。
descriptions.ko: 새로 자란 다리 때문에 달리지 못한다. 서는 것보다 헤엄치는 것을 선호하는 듯하다.

name: poliwhirl
description: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.
appearance: A blue, spherical tadpole-like Pokémon with a prominent white counter-clockwise swirl on its belly, large round eyes, and white mitten-like hands.

descriptions.fr: Capable de vivre dans ou hors de l'eau. Quand il est hors de l'eau, il transpire pour garder son corps visqueux.
descriptions.de: Kann an Land und im Wasser leben. An Land schwitzt es, um seinen Körper schleimig zu halten.
descriptions.es: Capaz de vivir dentro o fuera del agua. Cuando está fuera del agua, suda para mantener su cuerpo pegajoso.
descriptions.it: Può vivere dentro o fuori dall'acqua. Fuori dall'acqua, suda per mantenere il corpo viscido.
descriptions.ja: 水陸両生で、陸上では汗をかいて体をぬめらせている。
descriptions.ko: 물에서도 뭍에서도 살 수 있다. 육상에서는 땀을 흘려서 몸을 미끈거리게 유지한다.

name: poliwrath
description: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.
appearance: A muscular, bipedal blue frog-like Pokémon with a thick white ring on its belly containing a counter-clockwise swirl, and large white boxing-glove-like fists.

descriptions.fr: Nageur expert en crawl et en brasse. Dépasse facilement les meilleurs nageurs humains.
descriptions.de: Ein Meister im Kraulen und Brustschwimmen. Überholt mit Leichtigkeit die besten menschlichen Schwimmer.
descriptions.es: Nadador experto tanto en crol como en braza. Supera fácilmente a los mejores nadadores humanos.
descriptions.it: Un abile nuotatore in stile libero e a rana. Supera facilmente i migliori nuotatori umani.
descriptions.ja: クロールと平泳ぎが得意な泳ぎの名人。どんな人間よりも速く泳ぐ。
descriptions.ko: 크롤과 평영 모두 능숙한 수영의 명인. 최고의 인간 수영 선수도 쉽게 추월한다.

name: abra
description: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.
appearance: A small, bipedal yellow fox-like Pokémon with brown fur on its shoulders and upper body, long pointed ears with brown inner markings, and it typically appears with its eyes closed.

descriptions.fr: Grâce à sa capacité de lire dans les esprits, il identifie le danger imminent et se TÉLÉPORTE en sécurité.
descriptions.de: Mittels Gedankenlesen spürt es drohende Gefahren. Dann TELEPORTIERT es sich in Sicherheit.
descriptions.es: Usando su habilidad de leer mentes, identifica el peligro inminente y se TELETRANSPORTA a un lugar seguro.
descriptions.it: Grazie alla sua capacità di leggere nella mente, identifica il pericolo imminente e si TELETRASPORTA in salvo.
descriptions.ja: 危険を察知すると、念力で安全な場所にテレポートする。
descriptions.ko: 생각을 읽는 능력으로 임박한 위험을 감지하고 안전한 곳으로 순간이동한다.

name: kadabra
description: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.
appearance: A bipedal, slender yellow fox-like Pokémon with brown stripes on its torso and tail, large pointed ears, a prominent brown mustache, and it often holds a silver spoon.

descriptions.fr: Il émet des ondes alpha spéciales depuis son corps qui provoquent des maux de tête rien qu'en étant à proximité.
descriptions.de: Es sendet spezielle Alphawellen aus seinem Körper aus, die schon allein durch seine Nähe Kopfschmerzen verursachen.
descriptions.es: Emite ondas alfa especiales desde su cuerpo que inducen dolores de cabeza con solo estar cerca.
descriptions.it: Emette speciali onde alfa dal suo corpo che provocano mal di testa solo standogli vicino.
descriptions.ja: 体から特殊なアルファ波を発し、近くにいるだけで頭痛を引き起こす。
descriptions.ko: 몸에서 특수한 알파파를 방출하여, 가까이 있는 것만으로도 두통을 유발한다.

name: alakazam
description: Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.
appearance: A bipedal, slender yellow fox-like Pokémon with brown fur on its chest and shoulders, a large head with two pointed ears, a very long brown mustache, and it wields two silver spoons.

descriptions.fr: Son cerveau surpasse un superordinateur. Son quotient intellectuel est dit de 5 000.
descriptions.de: Sein Gehirn übertrifft einen Supercomputer. Sein Intelligenzquotient soll 5.000 betragen.
descriptions.es: Su cerebro puede superar a una supercomputadora. Se dice que su coeficiente intelectual es de 5.000.
descriptions.it: Il suo cervello può superare un supercomputer. Si dice che il suo quoziente intellettivo sia 5.000.
descriptions.ja: その脳はスーパーコンピューターを凌駕する。知能指数は5000と言われている。
descriptions.ko: 뇌는 슈퍼컴퓨터를 능가한다. 지능 지수는 5,000이라고 전해진다.

name: machop
description: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.
appearance: A small, muscular, bipedal grey humanoid Pokémon with a blue, dome-shaped head, a segmented midsection, and three toes on each foot.

descriptions.fr: Aime développer ses muscles. Il s'entraîne dans tous les styles d'arts martiaux pour devenir encore plus fort.
descriptions.de: Liebt es, seine Muskeln aufzubauen. Es trainiert in allen Kampfsportarten, um noch stärker zu werden.
descriptions.es: Le encanta desarrollar sus músculos. Entrena en todos los estilos de artes marciales para hacerse aún más fuerte.
descriptions.it: Adora sviluppare i suoi muscoli. Si allena in tutti gli stili di arti marziali per diventare ancora più forte.
descriptions.ja: 筋肉を鍛えるのが大好き。あらゆる格闘技を学び、さらなる強さを目指す。
descriptions.ko: 근육을 키우는 것을 좋아한다. 모든 격투기 기술을 연마하여 더욱 강해지려 한다.

name: machoke
description: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power save belt to be able to regulate its motions.
appearance: A larger, highly muscular, bipedal grey humanoid Pokémon with a blue, dome-shaped head, a thick black power-restraining belt, and red veins visible on its upper arms.

descriptions.fr: Son corps musclé est si puissant qu'il doit porter une ceinture de force pour réguler ses mouvements.
descriptions.de: Sein muskulöser Körper ist so kräftig, dass es einen Kraftgürtel tragen muss, um seine Bewegungen zu regulieren.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo musculoso es tan poderoso que debe usar un cinturón de fuerza para poder regular sus movimientos.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo muscoloso è così potente che deve indossare una cintura di forza per regolare i suoi movimenti.
descriptions.ja: その筋肉質な体はあまりにも強力なため、動きを制御するためにパワーセーブベルトを着用している。
descriptions.ko: 근육질 몸이 너무 강력해서 움직임을 조절하기 위해 파워 세이브 벨트를 착용해야 한다.

name: machamp
description: Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon.
appearance: A large, extremely muscular, bipedal grey humanoid Pokémon with a blue, dome-shaped head, four muscular arms, a thick black power-restraining belt, and red veins visible on its upper body.

descriptions.fr: Utilisant ses lourds muscles, il lance des coups de poing puissants qui peuvent envoyer la victime par-delà l'horizon.
descriptions.de: Mit seinen kräftigen Muskeln versetzt es Schläge, die das Opfer über den Horizont schleudern können.
descriptions.es: Usando sus pesados músculos, lanza potentes puñetazos que pueden enviar a la víctima más allá del horizonte.
descriptions.it: Usando i suoi pesanti muscoli, sferra pugni potenti che possono scagliare la vittima oltre l'orizzonte.
descriptions.ja: 重い筋肉を使い、相手を地平線の彼方まで吹き飛ばす強力なパンチを放つ。
descriptions.ko: 무거운 근육을 사용하여 상대를 지평선 너머로 날려버릴 수 있는 강력한 펀치를 날린다.

name: bellsprout
description: A carnivorous POKéMON that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.
appearance: A bell-shaped, light green plant Pokémon with two large, broad green leaves serving as arms and two thin brown root-like feet.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON carnivore qui piège et mange les insectes. Il utilise ses pieds-racines pour absorber l'humidité nécessaire.
descriptions.de: Ein fleischfressendes POKéMON, das Insekten fängt und frisst. Es nutzt seine Wurzelfüße, um die nötige Feuchtigkeit aufzunehmen.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON carnívoro que atrapa y come insectos. Usa sus pies-raíz para absorber la humedad necesaria.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON carnivoro che intrappola e mangia insetti. Usa le sue radici per assorbire l'umidità necessaria.
descriptions.ja: 虫を捕らえて食べる肉食のポケモン。根のような足で必要な水分を吸い上げる。
descriptions.ko: 곤충을 가두어 잡아먹는 식충 포켓몬. 뿌리 같은 발로 필요한 수분을 흡수한다.

name: weepinbell
description: It spits out POISONPOWDER to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of ACID.
appearance: A yellow, bell-shaped pitcher plant Pokémon with a wide, red, lipped mouth, two large green leaves, and a thin brown vine extending from its top.

descriptions.fr: Il crache une POUDREPOISON pour immobiliser l'ennemi et le finit ensuite avec un jet d'ACIDE.
descriptions.de: Es spuckt GIFTPOWDER aus, um den Gegner zu immobilisieren, und beendet ihn dann mit einem Strahl von SÄURE.
descriptions.es: Escupe POLVO VENENO para inmovilizar al enemigo y luego lo remata con un chorro de ÁCIDO.
descriptions.it: Sputa VELENPOLVERE per immobilizzare il nemico e poi lo finisce con uno spruzzo di ACIDO.
descriptions.ja: 毒の粉を吐き出して敵を動けなくし、その後はアシッドのスプレーで仕留める。
descriptions.ko: 적을 마비시키기 위해 독가루를 뱉고, 그 다음 산성액을 분사하여 마무리한다.

name: victreebel
description: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.
appearance: A large, dark green pitcher plant Pokémon with a wide, gaping red-lipped mouth, two broad green leaves, and a thin brown vine with a small leaf at its end extending from its top.

descriptions.fr: On dit qu'il vit en énormes colonies au fond des jungles, bien que personne n'en soit jamais revenu.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, es lebe in riesigen Kolonien tief in Dschungeln, doch niemand ist jemals von dort zurückgekehrt.
descriptions.es: Se dice que vive en enormes colonias en lo profundo de las junglas, aunque nadie ha regresado de allí.
descriptions.it: Si dice che viva in enormi colonie nel profondo delle giungle, anche se nessuno è mai tornato da lì.
descriptions.ja: ジャングルの奥地に巨大なコロニーを形成すると言われているが、そこから生きて戻った者はいない。
descriptions.ko: 정글 깊은 곳에 거대한 군집을 이루고 산다고 전해지지만, 그곳에서 살아 돌아온 사람은 아무도 없다.

name: tentacool
description: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid.
appearance: A translucent blue jellyfish-like Pokémon with a rounded head, two large red crystalline eyes, and two long, thin light blue tentacles extending from its underside.

descriptions.fr: Dérive dans les mers peu profondes. Les pêcheurs qui l'accrochent par accident sont souvent punis par son acide urticant.
descriptions.de: Treibt in flachen Meeren. Angler, die es versehentlich haken, werden oft von seiner stechenden Säure bestraft.
descriptions.es: Deriva en mares poco profundos. Los pescadores que lo enganchan por accidente suelen ser castigados por su ácido urticante.
descriptions.it: Galleggia in mari poco profondi. I pescatori che lo agganciano per errore sono spesso puniti dal suo acido urticante.
descriptions.ja: 浅い海を漂う。誤って釣り上げた釣り人は、その刺すような酸で罰せられることが多い。
descriptions.ko: 얕은 바다를 표류한다. 실수로 낚시로 낚아 올린 낚시꾼은 따끔한 산성액으로 벌을 받는 경우가 많다.

name: tentacruel
description: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.
appearance: A large, dark blue jellyfish-like Pokémon with a rounded head featuring two prominent red crystalline eyes, eight short blue tentacles, and two much longer, thicker tentacles extending from its base.

descriptions.fr: Ses tentacules sont normalement courts. En chasse, ils s'allongent pour capturer et immobiliser la proie.
descriptions.de: Die Tentakel werden normalerweise kurz gehalten. Bei der Jagd werden sie ausgefahren, um Beute zu umschlingen und zu immobilisieren.
descriptions.es: Sus tentáculos se mantienen normalmente cortos. Durante la caza, se extienden para atrapar e inmovilizar a la presa.
descriptions.it: I suoi tentacoli sono normalmente corti. Durante la caccia, si estendono per intrappolare e immobilizzare la preda.
descriptions.ja: 触手は普段は短く保たれている。狩りの際には伸びて獲物を絡め取り、身動きさせなくする。
descriptions.ko: 촉수는 평소에는 짧게 유지된다. 사냥할 때는 촉수를 늘려 먹이를 얽매어 움직이지 못하게 한다.

name: geodude
description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.
appearance: A rough, grey, boulder-shaped Pokémon with two muscular, rock-like arms, and a distinct face with small brown eyes and a downturned mouth.

descriptions.fr: On le trouve dans les champs et les montagnes. Les gens le prennent pour un rocher et trébuchent souvent dessus.
descriptions.de: Man findet es auf Feldern und in Bergen. Da es für Felsen gehalten wird, treten oder stolpern die Leute oft darüber.
descriptions.es: Se encuentra en campos y montañas. Confundiéndolo con una roca, la gente a menudo lo pisa o tropieza con él.
descriptions.it: Si trova nei campi e sulle montagne. Confondendolo con un masso, le persone spesso ci camminano sopra o vi inciampano.
descriptions.ja: 野原や山で見られる。岩と間違えられ、人々はよく踏んだり、つまずいたりする。
descriptions.ko: 들판이나 산에서 발견된다. 사람들은 바위로 착각하고 자주 밟거나 걸려 넘어지기도 한다.

name: graveler
description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.
appearance: A large, grey, jagged boulder-like Pokémon with two pairs of muscular, rock-like arms, often depicted floating, and four short brown, stump-like feet.

descriptions.fr: Roule sur les pentes pour se déplacer. Il roule sur n'importe quel obstacle sans ralentir ni changer de direction.
descriptions.de: Rollt Hänge hinunter, um sich zu bewegen. Es rollt über jedes Hindernis, ohne langsamer zu werden oder die Richtung zu ändern.
descriptions.es: Rueda por las pendientes para moverse. Pasa por encima de cualquier obstáculo sin ralentizar ni cambiar de dirección.
descriptions.it: Rotola giù per i pendii per muoversi. Passa sopra qualsiasi ostacolo senza rallentare o cambiare direzione.
descriptions.ja: 坂道を転がり落ちて移動する。どんな障害物でも速度を落とさず、方向を変えずに乗り越える。
descriptions.ko: 경사면을 굴러서 이동한다. 어떠한 장애물도 속도를 늦추거나 방향을 바꾸지 않고 굴러 넘어간다.

name: golem
description: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal, armadillo-like Pokémon with a grey rock-like body covered by a spiky, segmented brown shell, and a small, rough brown head with short horns.

descriptions.fr: Son corps semblable à un rocher est extrêmement dur. Il peut facilement résister à des explosions de dynamite sans dommage.
descriptions.de: Sein felsartiger Körper ist extrem hart. Es kann Dynamitexplosionen leicht ohne Schaden überstehen.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo, similar a una roca, es extremadamente duro. Puede resistir fácilmente explosiones de dinamita sin sufrir daños.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo, simile a un masso, è estremamente duro. Può facilmente resistere a esplosioni di dinamite senza subire danni.
descriptions.ja: その岩のような体は非常に硬い。ダイナマイトの爆発にも簡単に耐え、傷つかない。
descriptions.ko: 바위 같은 몸은 매우 단단하다. 다이너마이트 폭발에도 쉽게 견디고 손상되지 않는다.

name: ponyta
description: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.
appearance: A graceful, equine Pokémon with a cream-colored body, a fiery red and orange mane and tail, and golden hooves.

descriptions.fr: Ses sabots sont 10 fois plus durs que des diamants. Il peut piétiner n'importe quoi et le rendre complètement plat en peu de temps.
descriptions.de: Seine Hufe sind 10-mal härter als Diamanten. Es kann alles in kurzer Zeit völlig platt treten.
descriptions.es: Sus cascos son 10 veces más duros que los diamantes. Puede pisotear cualquier cosa hasta dejarla completamente plana en poco tiempo.
descriptions.it: I suoi zoccoli sono 10 volte più duri dei diamanti. Può calpestare qualsiasi cosa rendendola completamente piatta in poco tempo.
descriptions.ja: そのひづめはダイヤモンドの10倍の硬さを持つ。どんなものでも短時間で完全に踏み潰すことができる。
descriptions.ko: 발굽은 다이아몬드보다 10배 단단하다. 어떤 것이든 짧은 시간에 완전히 밟아 납작하게 만들 수 있다.

name: rapidash
description: Very competitive, this POKéMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.
appearance: A slender, equine Pokémon with a white body, a magnificent fiery red and orange mane and tail, a sharp golden horn on its forehead, and golden hooves.

descriptions.fr: Très compétitif, ce POKéMON poursuivra tout ce qui bouge vite dans l'espoir de faire la course.
descriptions.de: Sehr wettkampforientiert, jagt dieses POKéMON alles, was sich schnell bewegt, in der Hoffnung, ein Rennen zu fahren.
descriptions.es: Muy competitivo, este POKéMON perseguirá cualquier cosa que se mueva rápido con la esperanza de competir con ella.
descriptions.it: Molto competitivo, questo POKéMON inseguirà qualsiasi cosa si muova velocemente nella speranza di gareggiare con essa.
descriptions.ja: 非常に競争心が強く、素早く動くものなら何でも追いかけ、競争しようとする。
descriptions.ko: 매우 경쟁적이며, 빠르게 움직이는 것이라면 무엇이든 뒤쫓아가서 경주하려 한다.

name: slowpoke
description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.
appearance: A plump, light pink quadrupedal Pokémon with a white belly, stubby legs, a short curly tail, and a pig-like snout with two nostrils.

descriptions.fr: Incroyablement lent et stupide. Il lui faut 5 secondes pour ressentir la douleur lorsqu'il est attaqué.
descriptions.de: Unglaublich langsam und dumm. Es braucht 5 Sekunden, um Schmerz zu empfinden, wenn es angegriffen wird.
descriptions.es: Increíblemente lento y torpe. Tarda 5 segundos en sentir dolor cuando es atacado.
descriptions.it: Incredibilmente lento e tonto. Ci vogliono 5 secondi perché senta dolore quando viene attaccato.
descriptions.ja: 信じられないほど遅くて間抜け。攻撃されても痛みに気づくまでに5秒かかる。
descriptions.ko: 믿을 수 없을 만큼 느리고 멍청하다. 공격을 받아도 고통을 느끼는 데 5초가 걸린다.

name: slowbro
description: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.
appearance: A large, bipedal, light pink Pokémon with a white belly, a tan-colored shell attached to its tail, and small, curled ears.

descriptions.fr: On dit que le KOKIYAS accroché à la queue de RAMOLOSS se nourrit des restes de son hôte.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, das SHELLDER, das sich an SLOWPOKEs Schweif festklammert, ernährt sich von den Resten seines Wirts.
descriptions.es: Se dice que el SHELLDER que está enganchado a la cola de SLOWPOKE se alimenta de los restos de su huésped.
descriptions.it: Si dice che lo SHELLDER agganciato alla coda di SLOWPOKE si nutra degli avanzi del suo ospite.
descriptions.ja: ヤドンのしっぽに張り付いたシェルダーは、宿主の残飯を食べていると言われている。
descriptions.ko: 야돈의 꼬리에 붙어있는 셀러는 숙주가 남긴 찌꺼기를 먹고 산다고 전해진다.

name: magnemite
description: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses THUNDER WAVE and similar moves.
appearance: A small, spherical grey Pokémon with a single large eye, two horseshoe-shaped magnets on its sides, and a screw protruding from its top.

descriptions.fr: Utilise l'anti-gravité pour rester suspendu. Apparaît sans prévenir et utilise Onde de Choc et des capacités similaires.
descriptions.de: Nutzt Antigravitation, um zu schweben. Erscheint ohne Vorwarnung und setzt Donnerwelle und ähnliche Attacken ein.
descriptions.es: Usa la antigravedad para mantenerse suspendido. Aparece sin previo aviso y utiliza Onda Trueno y movimientos similares.
descriptions.it: Sfrutta l'antigravità per librarsi. Appare senza preavviso e usa Ondashock e mosse simili.
descriptions.ja: 反重力で 空中に 浮かんでいる。 突然 現れ でんじは などの 技を 使う。
descriptions.ko: 반중력으로 공중에 떠 있다. 갑자기 나타나 전기자석파 등의 기술을 사용한다.

name: magneton
description: Formed by several MAGNEMITEs linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.
appearance: A Pokémon composed of three Magnemite linked together by magnetic force, forming a triangular arrangement, each with a single eye, two horseshoe-shaped magnets, and a screw on top.

descriptions.fr: Formé de plusieurs MAGNEMITEs liés ensemble. Apparaît fréquemment lors des éruptions solaires.
descriptions.de: Entsteht, wenn sich mehrere MAGNEMITE verbinden. Erscheint häufig, wenn Sonnenflecken aktiv werden.
descriptions.es: Formado por varios MAGNEMITEs unidos. Aparecen frecuentemente cuando las manchas solares entran en erupción.
descriptions.it: Formato da più MAGNEMITE uniti. Appare spesso quando le macchie solari si manifestano.
descriptions.ja: 複数の コイルが 結合して できた。 黒点が 活発な ときに よく 現れる。
descriptions.ko: 여러 마리의 코일이 결합하여 형성되었다. 흑점이 활발할 때 자주 나타난다.

name: farfetchd
description: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.
appearance: A brown duck-like Pokémon with a white belly, yellow beak, and a distinctive leek stalk perpetually clutched in its wing.

descriptions.fr: Le brin de poireau qu'il tient est son arme. Il l'utilise comme une épée de métal.
descriptions.de: Der Lauchstengel, den es hält, ist seine Waffe. Es wird ähnlich wie ein Metallschwert eingesetzt.
descriptions.es: El tallo de puerro que sostiene es su arma. Lo usa como si fuera una espada de metal.
descriptions.it: Il gambo di cipollina che tiene è la sua arma. Lo usa come se fosse una spada di metallo.
descriptions.ja: 持っている カモの 茎は 武器。 金属の 剣のように 使う。
descriptions.ko: 들고 있는 파 줄기는 무기다. 금속 검처럼 사용한다.

name: doduo
description: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.
appearance: A flightless, brown avian Pokémon with two long, scaly necks, two round heads featuring long pink beaks, and two short, stubby legs with three toes.

descriptions.fr: Un oiseau qui compense son mauvais vol par sa vitesse de course. Laisse d'énormes empreintes.
descriptions.de: Ein Vogel, der sein schlechtes Fliegen mit hoher Fußgeschwindigkeit ausgleicht. Hinterlässt riesige Fußspuren.
descriptions.es: Un ave que compensa su pobre vuelo con su gran velocidad al correr. Deja huellas gigantes.
descriptions.it: Un uccello che compensa la sua scarsa abilità nel volo con una notevole velocità di corsa. Lascia impronte giganti.
descriptions.ja: 飛行能力が 低いぶん 足が 速い。 巨大な 足跡を 残す。
descriptions.ko: 비행 능력이 낮은 만큼 다리가 빠르다. 거대한 발자국을 남긴다.

name: dodrio
description: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.
appearance: A flightless, brown avian Pokémon with three long, scaly necks, three round heads featuring long pink beaks, a black feathery ruff around its necks, and two short, stubby legs with three toes.

descriptions.fr: Utilise ses trois cerveaux pour exécuter des plans complexes. Pendant que deux têtes dorment, une reste éveillée.
descriptions.de: Nutzt seine drei Gehirne, um komplexe Pläne auszuführen. Während zwei Köpfe schlafen, bleibt einer wach.
descriptions.es: Utiliza sus tres cerebros para ejecutar planes complejos. Mientras dos cabezas duermen, una permanece despierta.
descriptions.it: Usa i suoi tre cervelli per eseguire piani complessi. Mentre due teste dormono, una resta sveglia.
descriptions.ja: ３つの 脳で 複雑な 作戦を 実行する。 ２つの 頭が 寝ていても １つは 起きている。
descriptions.ko: 세 개의 뇌를 사용하여 복잡한 작전을 실행한다. 두 개의 머리가 자고 있어도 하나는 깨어 있다.

name: seel
description: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.
appearance: A white seal-like Pokémon with a short horn on its forehead, a red tongue often visible, and a small tuft of blue fur on its head.

descriptions.fr: La corne qui dépasse de sa tête est très dure. Elle est utilisée pour briser la glace épaisse.
descriptions.de: Das hervorstehende Horn auf seinem Kopf ist sehr hart. Es wird benutzt, um dickes Eis zu durchbrechen.
descriptions.es: El cuerno que sobresale de su cabeza es muy duro. Lo usa para romper el hielo grueso.
descriptions.it: Il corno sporgente sulla sua testa è molto duro. Lo usa per sfondare il ghiaccio spesso.
descriptions.ja: 頭の ツノは とても 硬い。 厚い 氷を 砕くときに 使う。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 뿔은 매우 단단하다. 두꺼운 얼음을 부술 때 사용한다.

name: dewgong
description: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.
appearance: A large, elegant white seal-like Pokémon with a long, pointed horn on its forehead, a flowing fan-like tail, and light blue fin-like limbs.

descriptions.fr: Stocke l'énergie thermique dans son corps. Nage à une vitesse constante de 8 nœuds même dans les eaux très froides.
descriptions.de: Speichert Wärmeenergie in seinem Körper. Schwimmt selbst in eiskaltem Wasser mit konstant 8 Knoten.
descriptions.es: Almacena energía térmica en su cuerpo. Nada a una velocidad constante de 8 nudos incluso en aguas muy frías.
descriptions.it: Immagazzina energia termica nel suo corpo. Nuota a 8 nodi costanti anche in acque estremamente fredde.
descriptions.ja: 体内に 熱エネルギーを 蓄える。 極寒の 海でも 常に 時速１５kmで 泳ぐ。
descriptions.ko: 몸에 열에너지를 저장한다. 혹독하게 추운 바다에서도 꾸준히 시속 15km로 헤엄친다.

name: grimer
description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.
appearance: A purple, amorphous sludge Pokémon with two large, white, reflective eyes and a wide, pink-lipped mouth.

descriptions.fr: Apparaît dans les zones sales. Prospère en aspirant la boue polluée rejetée par les usines.
descriptions.de: Erscheint in schmutzigen Gegenden. Gedeiht, indem es verschmutzten Schlamm aufsaugt, der aus Fabriken gepumpt wird.
descriptions.es: Aparece en zonas sucias. Prolifera absorbiendo el lodo contaminado que es bombeado desde las fábricas.
descriptions.it: Appare nelle aree sporche. Prospera succhiando il fango inquinato pompato dalle fabbriche.
descriptions.ja: 汚い 場所に 現れる。 工場から 排出される 汚染された ヘドロを 吸い込んで 繁殖する。
descriptions.ko: 더러운 장소에 나타난다. 공장에서 배출되는 오염된 진흙을 빨아먹으며 번식한다.

name: muk
description: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.
appearance: A larger, more solidified purple, amorphous sludge Pokémon with two large, white, reflective eyes, and a wide, pink-lipped mouth often showing sharp teeth.

descriptions.fr: Épaissement recouvert d'une boue sale et nauséabonde. Il est si toxique que même ses empreintes contiennent du poison.
descriptions.de: Dick mit einem schmutzigen, abscheulichen Schlamm bedeckt. Es ist so giftig, dass selbst seine Fußspuren Gift enthalten.
descriptions.es: Cubierto densamente con un lodo sucio y vil. Es tan tóxico que incluso sus huellas contienen veneno.
descriptions.it: Ricoperto di una melma sporca e nauseabonda. È così tossico che persino le sue impronte contengono veleno.
descriptions.ja: 汚い 毒の ヘドロに 覆われている。 毒性が 強く 足跡すら 毒を 含む。
descriptions.ko: 더럽고 역겨운 슬러지로 두껍게 덮여있다. 독성이 너무 강해서 발자국에도 독이 있다.

name: shellder
