description: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.
appearance: A purple bivalve Pokémon encased in a rigid, off-white shell with two distinct black pearl-like eyes peering out from between its halves.

descriptions.fr: Sa carapace dure repousse tout type d'attaque. Il n'est vulnérable que lorsque sa coquille est ouverte.
descriptions.de: Seine harte Schale wehrt jede Art von Angriff ab. Es ist nur verwundbar, wenn seine Schale offen ist.
descriptions.es: Su caparazón duro repele cualquier tipo de ataque. Solo es vulnerable cuando su concha está abierta.
descriptions.it: La sua dura conchiglia respinge ogni tipo di attacco. È vulnerabile solo quando la sua conchiglia è aperta.
descriptions.ja: 硬い カラは あらゆる 攻撃を はね返す。 貝が 開いているときだけ 無防備になる。
descriptions.ko: 단단한 껍데기는 어떤 종류의 공격도 튕겨낸다. 껍데기가 열려 있을 때만 취약하다.

name: cloyster
description: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.
appearance: A purple, pearl-like body enclosed within a spiky, bivalve shell that is off-white on the outside and purple on the inside, with a single black eye and a horn-like protrusion.

descriptions.fr: Quand il est attaqué, il lance ses cornes en salves rapides. On n'a jamais vu ses entrailles.
descriptions.de: Wird es angegriffen, verschießt es seine Hörner in schnellen Salven. Man hat seine Innereien nie gesehen.
descriptions.es: Cuando es atacado, lanza sus cuernos en rápidas ráfagas. Nunca se han visto sus entrañas.
descriptions.it: Quando viene attaccato, lancia le sue corna in rapide raffiche. Le sue interiora non sono mai state viste.
descriptions.ja: 攻撃されると、角を高速で発射する。その内側は決して見られていない。
descriptions.ko: 공격받으면 뿔을 빠른 속도로 발사한다. 그 내부는 한 번도 본 사람이 없다.

name: gastly
description: Almost invisible, this gaseous POKéMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.
appearance: A spherical, gaseous body composed of purple smoke, with large white eyes that have tiny black pupils and a wide pink mouth.

descriptions.fr: Presque invisible, ce POKéMON gazeux enveloppe sa cible et l'endort sans qu'elle s'en aperçoive.
descriptions.de: Fast unsichtbar hüllt dieses gasförmige POKéMON sein Ziel ein und lässt es unbemerkt einschlafen.
descriptions.es: Casi invisible, este POKéMON gaseoso envuelve a su objetivo y lo duerme sin previo aviso.
descriptions.it: Quasi invisibile, questo POKéMON gassoso avvolge il bersaglio e lo addormenta senza preavviso.
descriptions.ja: ほとんど見えないガス状のポケモンで、標的を覆い、気づかれずに眠らせる。
descriptions.ko: 거의 보이지 않는 가스 형태의 포켓몬으로, 목표물을 감싸고 눈치채지 못하게 잠재운다.

name: haunter
description: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an­ other dimension.
appearance: A floating, purple ghost with disembodied, three-fingered hands, large white eyes with small pupils, and a long, pink tongue constantly sticking out.

descriptions.fr: Grâce à sa capacité à traverser les murs, on dit qu'il vient d'une autre dimension.
descriptions.de: Aufgrund seiner Fähigkeit, durch Blockwände zu gleiten, soll es aus einer anderen Dimension stammen.
descriptions.es: Debido a su habilidad para deslizarse a través de las paredes, se dice que proviene de otra dimensión.
descriptions.it: Grazie alla sua abilità di passare attraverso i muri, si dice che provenga da un'altra dimensione.
descriptions.ja: ブロックの壁をすり抜ける能力から、異次元から来たとされる。
descriptions.ko: 벽을 뚫고 지나가는 능력 때문에 다른 차원에서 왔다고 전해진다.

name: gengar
description: Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.
appearance: A bipedal, purple, ghost-like creature with a round body, short legs, pointed ears, a mischievous grin, large red eyes, and several sharp spikes running down its back.

descriptions.fr: Sous la pleine lune, ce POKéMON aime imiter les ombres des gens et rire de leur frayeur.
descriptions.de: Bei Vollmond ahmt dieses POKéMON gerne die Schatten von Menschen nach und lacht über ihre Angst.
descriptions.es: Bajo la luna llena, a este POKéMON le gusta imitar las sombras de la gente y reírse de su miedo.
descriptions.it: Sotto la luna piena, questo POKéMON ama imitare le ombre delle persone e ridere del loro spavento.
descriptions.ja: 満月の夜、人の影を真似て驚かせ、その恐怖を笑って楽しむ。
descriptions.ko: 보름달 아래, 사람의 그림자를 흉내 내어 사람들을 놀라게 하고 그들의 공포를 비웃는다.

name: onix
description: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, but colored black.
appearance: An extremely long, serpentine creature made of numerous grey boulders chained together, featuring a large, blocky head with two horn-like protrusions and a diamond-shaped crest between its eyes.

descriptions.fr: En grandissant, les parties de son corps faites de pierre durcissent pour devenir semblables à un diamant, mais de couleur noire.
descriptions.de: Beim Wachsen härten die steinernen Teile seines Körpers aus und werden einem Diamanten ähnlich, aber in Schwarz.
descriptions.es: A medida que crece, las partes de piedra de su cuerpo se endurecen hasta parecerse a un diamante, pero de color negro.
descriptions.it: Man mano che cresce, le parti di pietra del suo corpo si induriscono fino a diventare simili a un diamante, ma di colore nero.
descriptions.ja: 成長するにつれて、体の岩石部分は硬化し、黒いダイヤモンドのようになる。
descriptions.ko: 성장하면서 몸의 돌 부분이 굳어져 검은색 다이아몬드처럼 단단해진다.

name: drowzee
description: Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.
appearance: A bipedal, yellow, tapir-like creature with a brown, slightly curled trunk-like snout, a cream-colored belly, and an orange collar-like marking around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Endort les ennemis puis mange leurs rêves. Tombe parfois malade en mangeant de mauvais rêves.
descriptions.de: Bringt Gegner zum Einschlafen und frisst dann deren Träume. Wird gelegentlich krank, wenn es schlechte Träume frisst.
descriptions.es: Duerme a los enemigos y luego come sus sueños. Ocasionalmente se enferma por comer malos sueños.
descriptions.it: Addormenta i nemici e poi mangia i loro sogni. A volte si ammala mangiando brutti sogni.
descriptions.ja: 敵を眠らせてから夢を食べる。時々、悪い夢を食べて体調を崩すことがある。
descriptions.ko: 적을 잠재운 뒤 그들의 꿈을 먹는다. 가끔 악몽을 먹고 탈이 나기도 한다.

name: hypno
description: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of PSI moves such as HYPNOSIS and CONFUSION.
appearance: A bipedal, yellow creature with a long, cream-colored neck, a large white ruff around its neck, a pink nose, and a silver pendulum-like object held in its left hand.

descriptions.fr: Quand il croise le regard d'un ennemi, il utilise un mélange de pouvoirs psy tels que HYPNOSE et CONFUSION.
descriptions.de: Wenn es einem Gegner in die Augen sieht, setzt es eine Mischung aus PSI-Fähigkeiten wie HYPNOSE und KONFUSION ein.
descriptions.es: Cuando cruza la mirada con un enemigo, usará una mezcla de movimientos PSI como HIPNOSIS y CONFUSIÓN.
descriptions.it: Quando incrocia lo sguardo con un nemico, userà un mix di mosse PSI come IPNOSI e CONFUSIONE.
descriptions.ja: 敵と目を合わせると、さいみんじゅつやねんりきのようなエスパー技を混ぜて使う。
descriptions.ko: 적과 눈이 마주치면 최면술과 염력 같은 에스퍼 기술을 섞어 사용한다.

name: krabby
description: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.
appearance: A small, red, crab-like creature with four walking legs, two large pincers, and yellow eyes positioned on retractable stalks.

descriptions.fr: Ses pinces ne sont pas seulement de puissantes armes, elles servent aussi à l'équilibre lorsqu'il marche de côté.
descriptions.de: Seine Scheren sind nicht nur mächtige Waffen, sie dienen auch als Gleichgewicht, wenn es seitwärts läuft.
descriptions.es: Sus pinzas no solo son armas poderosas, también las usa para mantener el equilibrio al caminar de lado.
descriptions.it: Le sue chele non sono solo potenti armi, ma sono usate anche per l'equilibrio quando cammina lateralmente.
descriptions.ja: ハサミは強力な武器であるだけでなく、横歩きするときのバランスを取るためにも使われる。
descriptions.ko: 집게발은 강력한 무기일 뿐만 아니라, 옆으로 걸을 때 균형을 잡는 데 사용된다.

name: kingler
description: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.
appearance: A large, red, crab-like creature with one massive pincer claw that has several spikes, a smaller left pincer, four walking legs, and a rough, spiky red shell.

descriptions.fr: La grande pince a une puissance d'écrasement de 10000 PV. Cependant, sa taille énorme la rend difficile à manier.
descriptions.de: Die große Schere besitzt eine Zerstörungskraft von 10000 KP. Ihre enorme Größe macht sie jedoch unhandlich.
descriptions.es: La pinza grande tiene una potencia de aplastamiento de 10000 PS. Sin embargo, su enorme tamaño la hace difícil de usar.
descriptions.it: La grande chela ha una potenza di schiacciamento di 10000 PS. Tuttavia, le sue dimensioni enormi la rendono difficile da usare.
descriptions.ja: 大きなハサミは10000HPの破壊力を持つ。しかし、その巨大なサイズは使いこなすのを困難にする。
descriptions.ko: 큰 집게발은 10000HP의 파괴력을 가지고 있다. 하지만 거대한 크기 때문에 다루기 힘들다.

name: voltorb
description: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL, they have zapped many people.
appearance: A perfectly smooth sphere with a red upper half and white lower half, two wide black eyes, and NO mouth — it has a completely blank, mouthless lower face.

descriptions.fr: On le trouve généralement dans les centrales électriques. Facilement confondu avec une POKé BALL, il a électrocuté de nombreuses personnes.
descriptions.de: Meistens in Kraftwerken zu finden. Leicht mit einem POKé BALL zu verwechseln, hat es viele Leute geschockt.
descriptions.es: Se encuentra generalmente en centrales eléctricas. Fácilmente confundido con una POKé BALL, ha electrocutado a muchas personas.
descriptions.it: Si trova di solito nelle centrali elettriche. Facilmente scambiato per una POKé BALL, ha fulminato molte persone.
descriptions.ja: 通常、発電所で見られる。モンスターボールと間違えられやすく、多くの人を感電させてきた。
descriptions.ko: 주로 발전소에서 발견된다. 몬스터볼로 오인되기 쉬우며, 많은 사람을 감전시켰다.

name: electrode
description: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.
appearance: A perfectly smooth sphere with a WHITE upper half and RED lower half, two narrow black eyes, and a wide curved smile mouth on its red lower half.

descriptions.fr: Il stocke de l'énergie électrique sous très haute pression. Il explose souvent avec peu ou pas de provocation.
descriptions.de: Es speichert elektrische Energie unter sehr hohem Druck. Oft explodiert es ohne ersichtlichen Grund.
descriptions.es: Almacena energía eléctrica a muy alta presión. Con frecuencia, explota con poca o ninguna provocación.
descriptions.it: Immagazzina energia elettrica ad altissima pressione. Esplode spesso con poca o nessuna provocazione.
descriptions.ja: 高圧の電気エネルギーを蓄えている。少しの刺激でも爆発することがよくある。
descriptions.ko: 고압의 전기 에너지를 저장하고 있다. 아주 작은 자극에도 잘 폭발한다.

name: exeggcute
description: Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.
appearance: A cluster of six psychic eggs, five of which are pink with varying cracks and yellow, smiling faces, and one that is slightly cracked but lacks a distinct face.

descriptions.fr: Souvent confondu avec des œufs. Quand ils sont dérangés, ils se rassemblent rapidement et attaquent en essaim.
descriptions.de: Oft werden sie für Eier gehalten. Wenn sie gestört werden, rotten sie sich schnell zusammen und greifen in Schwärmen an.
descriptions.es: A menudo se confunden con huevos. Cuando se les molesta, se agrupan rápidamente y atacan en enjambres.
descriptions.it: Spesso scambiato per uova. Quando disturbati, si radunano rapidamente e attaccano in sciami.
descriptions.ja: 卵と間違われることが多い。刺激されると素早く集まって群れで襲いかかる。
descriptions.ko: 알로 착각하는 경우가 많다. 자극받으면 재빨리 모여들어 무리지어 공격한다.

name: exeggutor
description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.
appearance: A tall, bipedal palm tree-like creature with a thick, segmented brown trunk, two stubby legs, and three distinct, pineapple-like heads each topped with green palm leaves.

descriptions.fr: La légende raconte qu'en de rares occasions, l'une de ses têtes tombe et continue d'exister en tant que NOEUNOEUF.
descriptions.de: Der Legende nach fällt ihm manchmal ein Kopf ab und entwickelt sich zu einem OWEI.
descriptions.es: Cuenta la leyenda que, en raras ocasiones, una de sus cabezas se desprende y continúa existiendo como EXEGGcute.
descriptions.it: La leggenda narra che, in rare occasioni, una delle sue teste cada e continui a vivere come un EXEGGCUTE.
descriptions.ja: 稀に頭の１つが落ちてタマタマになるという伝説がある。
descriptions.ko: 아주 드물게 머리 중 하나가 떨어져 나가서 아라리가 된다는 전설이 있다.

name: cubone
description: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this POKéMON's real face.
appearance: A small, bipedal, brown reptilian creature with a cream-colored skull worn as a helmet and a white bone clutched in its right hand.

descriptions.fr: Comme il ne retire jamais son casque de crâne, personne n'a jamais vu le vrai visage de ce Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Da es seinen Schädelhelm nie abnimmt, hat noch niemand das wahre Gesicht dieses Pokémon gesehen.
descriptions.es: Como nunca se quita su casco de calavera, nadie ha visto el verdadero rostro de este Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Dato che non si toglie mai il suo casco di teschio, nessuno ha mai visto il vero volto di questo Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: ドクロのヘルメットを外さないため、このポケモンがどんな顔をしているか誰も見たことがない。
descriptions.ko: 해골 헬멧을 벗지 않기 때문에 이 포켓몬의 진짜 얼굴을 본 사람은 아무도 없다.

name: marowak
description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.
appearance: A larger, bipedal, brown reptilian creature wearing a cream-colored skull as a helmet, with two small fangs protruding from its lower jaw, and wielding a larger white bone as a weapon.

descriptions.fr: L'os qu'il tient est son arme principale. Il lance l'os habilement comme un boomerang pour mettre KO ses cibles.
descriptions.de: Der Knochen, den es hält, ist seine Hauptwaffe. Es wirft den Knochen geschickt wie einen Bumerang, um Ziele KO zu schlagen.
descriptions.es: El hueso que sujeta es su arma clave. Lanza el hueso hábilmente como un bumerán para noquear a sus objetivos.
descriptions.it: L'osso che stringe è la sua arma principale. Lo lancia abilmente come un boomerang per mettere KO i bersagli.
descriptions.ja: 持っている骨は主要な武器。骨をブーメランのように巧みに投げてターゲットをKOする。
descriptions.ko: 쥐고 있는 뼈는 주요 무기다. 뼈를 부메랑처럼 능숙하게 던져 상대를 KO시킨다.

name: hitmonlee
description: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.
appearance: A brown, bipedal, humanoid creature with spring-like lower legs and arms, a smooth, featureless upper torso that appears to have no neck or distinct head, and yellow-brown circular patches on its chest and back.

descriptions.fr: Quand il est pressé, ses jambes s'allongent progressivement. Il court en douceur avec de très longues enjambées.
descriptions.de: Wenn es in Eile ist, verlängern sich seine Beine allmählich. Es rennt geschmeidig mit sehr langen, galoppierenden Schritten.
descriptions.es: Cuando tiene prisa, sus piernas se alargan progresivamente. Corre suavemente con zancadas largas y amplias.
descriptions.it: Quando ha fretta, le sue gambe si allungano progressivamente. Corre agilmente con passi ampi e allungati.
descriptions.ja: 急ぐときは脚が次第に伸びていく。長い歩幅でスムーズに走る。
descriptions.ko: 서두를 때면 다리가 점차 길어진다. 긴 보폭으로 부드럽게 달린다.

name: hitmonchan
description: While apparently doing nothing, it fires punches in lightning fast volleys that are impossible to see.
appearance: A brown, bipedal, humanoid creature wearing red boxing gloves on its hands and a purple skirt-like garment around its waist.

descriptions.fr: Alors qu'il semble ne rien faire, il envoie des coups de poing en salves éclair impossibles à voir.
descriptions.de: Während es scheinbar nichts tut, feuert es blitzschnelle Faustschläge ab, die unmöglich zu sehen sind.
descriptions.es: Aunque aparentemente no haga nada, lanza ráfagas de puñetazos ultrarrápidas que son imposibles de ver.
descriptions.it: Anche se apparentemente non fa nulla, sferra pugni in raffiche fulminee impossibili da vedere.
descriptions.ja: 何もしていないように見えても、目にもとまらぬ速さでパンチを連打している。
descriptions.ko: 아무것도 안 하는 것처럼 보여도 눈에 보이지 않을 속도로 펀치를 연타하고 있다.

name: lickitung
description: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies.
appearance: A stout, bipedal, pink creature with a very long, prehensile pink tongue, a cream-colored belly, and a circular, cream-colored marking on each knee.

descriptions.fr: Sa langue peut s'étendre comme celle d'un caméléon. Elle laisse une sensation de picotement quand il lèche ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Seine Zunge kann wie die eines Chamäleons ausgefahren werden. Wenn es Gegner leckt, hinterlässt es ein kribbelndes Gefühl.
descriptions.es: Su lengua puede extenderse como la de un camaleón. Deja una sensación de hormigueo cuando lame a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: La sua lingua può estendersi come quella di un camaleonte. Lascia una sensazione di formicolio quando lecca i nemici.
descriptions.ja: 舌はカメレオンのように伸びる。敵をなめるとしびれるような感覚が残る。
descriptions.ko: 혀를 카멜레온처럼 늘일 수 있다. 상대를 핥으면 저릿저릿한 감각이 남는다.

name: koffing
description: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.
appearance: A spherical, purple creature filled with gas, featuring a cream-colored skull and crossbones design on its front and several protruding bumps that act as exhaust vents.

descriptions.fr: Parce qu'il stocke plusieurs types de gaz toxiques dans son corps, il est sujet à exploser sans avertissement.
descriptions.de: Da es verschiedene Arten von giftigen Gasen in seinem Körper speichert, neigt es dazu, ohne Vorwarnung zu explodieren.
descriptions.es: Debido a que almacena varios tipos de gases tóxicos en su cuerpo, es propenso a explotar sin previo aviso.
descriptions.it: Poiché immagazzina diversi tipi di gas tossici nel suo corpo, è incline a esplodere senza preavviso.
descriptions.ja: 体内に複数の種類の毒ガスを蓄えているため、警告なしに爆発しやすい。
descriptions.ko: 몸 안에 여러 종류의 독가스를 저장하고 있기 때문에 경고 없이 폭발하기 쉽다.

name: weezing
description: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.
appearance: A creature composed of two connected purple spherical bodies, with the larger body featuring a cream-colored skull and crossbones design and both bodies having several gas-emitting bumps.

descriptions.fr: Là où deux types de gaz toxiques se rencontrent, 2 SMOGO peuvent fusionner pour former un SMOGOGO au fil de nombreuses années.
descriptions.de: Wo zwei Arten von Giftgasen aufeinandertreffen, können 2 SMOGON im Laufe vieler Jahre zu einem SMOGMOG verschmelzen.
descriptions.es: Donde se encuentran dos tipos de gases venenosos, 2 KOFFING pueden fusionarse en un WEEZING a lo largo de muchos años.
descriptions.it: Dove due tipi di gas velenosi si incontrano, 2 KOFFING possono fondersi in un WEEZING nel corso di molti anni.
descriptions.ja: ２種類の毒ガスが混じり合う場所で、長い年月をかけて２匹のドガースが融合し、マタドガスになることがある。
descriptions.ko: 2종류의 독가스가 만나는 곳에서는 수많은 세월이 흘러 2마리의 또가스가 합체하여 또도가스가 될 수 있다.

name: rhyhorn
description: A POKéMON with a one-track mind. Once it charges,  it won't stop running until it falls asleep.
appearance: A stocky, grey, rhinoceros-like creature with rough, rocky skin, a single horn on its snout, and a row of blunt spikes running down its back.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON à l'esprit tenace. Une fois qu'il charge, il ne s'arrête de courir que lorsqu'il s'endort.
descriptions.de: Ein POKéMON mit einer festen Idee. Sobald es angreift, läuft es, bis es einschläft.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON con una mentalidad fija. Una vez que embiste, no dejará de correr hasta que se quede dormido.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON dalla mente a senso unico. Una volta che carica, non smette di correre finché non si addormenta.
descriptions.ja: 一度突進すると、眠るまで走り続ける、一本気なポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 한 번 돌진하면 잠들 때까지 계속 달리는 외골수 포켓몬이다.

name: rhydon
description: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees.
appearance: A large, bipedal, grey rhinoceros-like creature with thick, scale-like skin, a large drill-shaped horn on its snout, and a tail with a single spike at its tip.

descriptions.fr: Protégé par une peau semblable à une armure, il est capable de vivre dans de la lave en fusion à 3 600 degrés.
descriptions.de: Geschützt durch eine panzerartige Haut, kann es in geschmolzener Lava bei 3.600 Grad leben.
descriptions.es: Protegido por una piel similar a una armadura, es capaz de vivir en lava fundida a 3.600 grados.
descriptions.it: Protette da una pelle simile a un'armatura, è capace di vivere nella lava fusa a 3.600 gradi.
descriptions.ja: 鎧のような皮膚に守られ、3600度の溶岩の中でも生きていける。
descriptions.ko: 갑옷 같은 피부에 보호되어 3600도의 용암 속에서도 살 수 있다.

name: chansey
description: A rare and elusive POKéMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.
appearance: A plump, pink, bipedal creature with a white, apron-like frill around its neck, three short hairs on its head, and a large pouch on its belly holding a white egg.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON rare et insaisissable qui apporterait le bonheur à ceux qui parviennent à l'obtenir.
descriptions.de: Ein seltenes und schwer fassbares POKéMON, das angeblich Glück bringt, wenn man es fangen kann.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON raro y esquivo del que se dice que trae felicidad a quienes consiguen atraparlo.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON raro e sfuggente che si dice porti felicità a chi riesce a catturarlo.
descriptions.ja: 手に入れた者に幸福をもたらすと言われる、珍しくめったに姿を見せないポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 손에 넣은 자에게 행복을 가져다준다고 전해지는 희귀하고 좀처럼 모습을 보이지 않는 포켓몬.

name: tangela
description: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to sea­ weed. Its vines shake as it walks.
appearance: An amorphous, dark blue body completely covered in a tangle of thick, light blue, vine-like tendrils, with two large white eyes and two red boot-like feet.

descriptions.fr: Son corps entier est enveloppé de larges lianes semblables à des algues. Ses lianes tremblent quand il marche.
descriptions.de: Der ganze Körper ist mit breiten Ranken bedeckt, die Seegras ähneln. Seine Ranken wackeln, wenn es geht.
descriptions.es: Todo su cuerpo está envuelto en amplias lianas similares a algas marinas. Sus lianas se agitan al caminar.
descriptions.it: Il suo intero corpo è avvolto da ampie viti simili ad alghe marine. Le sue viti si scuotono mentre cammina.
descriptions.ja: 全身が海草に似た幅広いツタで覆われている。歩くとツタが揺れる。
descriptions.ko: 온몸이 해초와 비슷한 넓적한 덩굴로 뒤덮여 있다. 걸으면 덩굴이 흔들린다.

name: kangaskhan
description: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.
appearance: A large, bipedal, brown marsupial with thick, grey-brown armor plating on its head, shoulders, and back, carrying a smaller, light brown baby in its abdominal pouch.

descriptions.fr: Le petit s'aventure rarement hors de la poche protectrice de sa mère avant l'âge de 3 ans.
descriptions.de: Das Junge wagt sich selten vor seinem dritten Lebensjahr aus dem schützenden Beutel seiner Mutter.
descriptions.es: La cría rara vez se aventura fuera de la bolsa protectora de su madre hasta que cumple los 3 años.
descriptions.it: Il cucciolo raramente si avventura fuori dalla sacca protettiva della madre prima dei 3 anni.
descriptions.ja: 3歳になるまで、めったに母親の保護的な袋から出ない。
descriptions.ko: 3살이 될 때까지 좀처럼 어미의 보호 주머니 밖으로 나가지 않는다.

name: horsea
description: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.
appearance: A small, blue, seahorse-like creature with a coiled tail, a prominent dorsal fin, and a cream-colored belly.

descriptions.fr: Connu pour abattre les insectes volants avec des jets d'encre précis depuis la surface de l'eau.
descriptions.de: Bekannt dafür, fliegende Insekten mit präzisen Tintenstrahlen von der Wasseroberfläche aus abzuschießen.
descriptions.es: Conocido por derribar insectos voladores con precisos chorros de tinta desde la superficie del agua.
descriptions.it: Noto per abbattere insetti volanti con precisi getti d'inchiostro dalla superficie dell'acqua.
descriptions.ja: 水面から精密なインクの噴射で飛んでいる虫を撃ち落とすことで知られている。
descriptions.ko: 수면에서 정밀한 먹물 분사로 날아다니는 벌레를 쏘아 떨어뜨리는 것으로 알려져 있다.

name: seadra
description: Capable of swim­ ming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.
appearance: A blue, seahorse-like creature with a long, elegant body, spiky fins on its back and head, a spiraled tail, and a cream-colored belly.

descriptions.fr: Capable de nager à reculons en battant rapidement ses nageoires pectorales semblables à des ailes et sa queue robuste.
descriptions.de: Kann rückwärts schwimmen, indem es seine flügelähnlichen Brustflossen und den kräftigen Schwanz schnell schlägt.
descriptions.es: Capaz de nadar hacia atrás batiendo rápidamente sus aletas pectorales en forma de alas y su robusta cola.
descriptions.it: Capace di nuotare all'indietro agitando rapidamente le sue pinne pettorali a forma di ali e la sua coda robusta.
descriptions.ja: 翼のような胸びれと丈夫な尾を素早くはばたかせ、後ろ向きに泳ぐことができる。
descriptions.ko: 날개 같은 가슴지느러미와 튼튼한 꼬리를 빠르게 퍼덕여 뒤로 헤엄칠 수 있다.

name: goldeen
description: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen.
appearance: A graceful white fish with large, flowing orange fins, a prominent horn on its forehead, and a fan-shaped tail fin.

descriptions.fr: Sa nageoire caudale ondule comme une élégante robe de bal, lui valant le surnom de Reine des Eaux.
descriptions.de: Seine Schwanzflosse wogt wie ein elegantes Ballkleid, was ihm den Spitznamen "Wasserkönigin" einbrachte.
descriptions.es: Su aleta caudal ondea como un elegante vestido de baile, dándole el apodo de la Reina del Agua.
descriptions.it: La sua pinna caudale ondeggia come un elegante abito da ballo, valendogli il soprannome di Regina dell'Acqua.
descriptions.ja: 尾びれが優雅な舞踏会のドレスのようにひらめき、「水の女王」の異名を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 우아한 무도회 드레스처럼 펄럭이는 꼬리지느러미 덕분에 「물의 여왕」이라는 별명을 가지고 있다.

name: seaking
description: In the autumn spawning season, they can be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks.
appearance: A larger, orange fish with a robust body, a prominent yellow horn on its forehead, black spots across its body, and a large, flowing tail fin.

descriptions.fr: Pendant la saison de frai en automne, on peut les voir nager puissamment en remontant les rivières et les ruisseaux.
descriptions.de: Während der Laichzeit im Herbst kann man sie kräftig Flüsse und Bäche hinaufschwimmen sehen.
descriptions.es: En la temporada de desove de otoño, se les puede ver nadando vigorosamente río arriba y por los arroyos.
descriptions.it: Nella stagione di riproduzione autunnale, possono essere visti nuotare con forza risalendo fiumi e ruscelli.
descriptions.ja: 秋の産卵期には、力強く川や小川を遡上する姿が見られる。
descriptions.ko: 가을 산란기에는 강과 시냇물을 거슬러 힘차게 헤엄치는 모습을 볼 수 있다.

name: staryu
description: If its body is torn, it can grow back if the red core remains. The core flashes at midnight.
appearance: A five-pointed, brown starfish-like creature with a golden, metallic core at its center, adorned with a large red jewel.

descriptions.fr: Si son corps est déchiré, il peut repousser si le noyau rouge reste. Le noyau clignote à minuit.
descriptions.de: Wenn sein Körper zerrissen wird, kann er nachwachsen, solange der rote Kern erhalten bleibt. Der Kern blitzt um Mitternacht.
descriptions.es: Si su cuerpo se desgarra, puede regenerarse si el núcleo rojo permanece. El núcleo parpadea a medianoche.
descriptions.it: Se il suo corpo viene lacerato, può ricrescere se il nucleo rosso rimane. Il nucleo lampeggia a mezzanotte.
descriptions.ja: 体が破れても、赤い核が残っていれば再生できる。その核は真夜中に点滅する。
descriptions.ko: 몸이 찢어져도 빨간 핵이 남아 있으면 다시 자랄 수 있다. 핵은 자정에 깜빡인다.

name: starmie
description: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.
appearance: Purple starfish with a gold ring around a red gem in its center, and a second, smaller gold starfish rotated 45 degrees attached to its back, also with a red gem.

descriptions.fr: Son cœur central brille des sept couleurs de l'arc-en-ciel. Certains le considèrent comme un joyau.
descriptions.de: Sein zentraler Kern leuchtet in den sieben Farben des Regenbogens. Manche schätzen diesen Kern wie ein Juwel.
descriptions.es: Su núcleo central brilla con los siete colores del arcoíris. Algunos valoran ese núcleo como una gema.
descriptions.it: Il suo nucleo centrale brilla dei sette colori dell'arcobaleno. Alcuni lo considerano una gemma preziosa.
descriptions.ja: 身体の中央の核が七色に光り輝く。宝石として大切にする人もいるという。
descriptions.ko: 몸의 중앙에 있는 핵이 일곱 색깔로 빛난다. 보석으로 소중히 여기는 사람도 있다고 한다.

name: mr-mime
description: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.
appearance: White humanoid with a round pink belly, blue hat-like protuberances on its head, white gloves, red cheek circles, and blue, segmented arms and legs.

descriptions.fr: S'il est interrompu pendant sa pantomime, il gifle l'importun avec ses larges mains.
descriptions.de: Wenn es beim Imitieren unterbrochen wird, schlägt es den Störenfried mit seinen breiten Händen.
descriptions.es: Si se le interrumpe mientras mima, golpeará al infractor con sus anchas manos.
descriptions.it: Se interrotto mentre mima, prende a sberle il colpevole con le sue ampie mani.
descriptions.ja: パントマイム中に邪魔されると、手のひらでうるさい相手を張り倒す。
descriptions.ko: 마임 중 방해받으면 넓은 손으로 상대방을 때려눕힌다.

name: scyther
description: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.
appearance: Green insectoid bipedal with large, sharp, white scythe-like blades for forearms, a segmented torso, two pairs of light green wings, and a pointed head with three horn-like crests.

descriptions.fr: Grâce à son agilité et sa vitesse de ninja, il peut créer l'illusion qu'il y en a plusieurs.
descriptions.de: Mit seiner Ninja-ähnlichen Agilität und Geschwindigkeit kann es die Illusion erzeugen, dass es mehrere gibt.
descriptions.es: Con agilidad y velocidad de ninja, puede crear la ilusión de que hay más de uno.
descriptions.it: Con agilità e velocità da ninja, crea l'illusione che ce ne sia più di uno.
descriptions.ja: 忍者のようなすばやい動きで、あたかも複数のストライクがいるかのような錯覚を生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 닌자와 같은 민첩함과 스피드로 여러 마리의 스라크가 있는 듯한 착각을 일으킨다.

name: jynx
description: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.
appearance: Humanoid with a red dress-like body, long blonde hair, purple skin, large pink lips, and a pair of white glove-like hands.

descriptions.fr: Elle déhanche ses hanches avec séduction en marchant. Elle peut faire danser les gens à l'unisson.
descriptions.de: Es wackelt beim Gehen verführerisch mit den Hüften. Es kann Menschen dazu bringen, im Gleichschritt mit ihm zu tanzen.
descriptions.es: Al andar, menea las caderas seductoramente. Puede hacer que la gente baile al unísono con él.
descriptions.it: Agita le anche in modo seducente quando cammina. Può indurre le persone a ballare all'unisono con essa.
descriptions.ja: 腰をくねらせ色っぽく歩く。人々を自分と同じように踊らせる力を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 허리를 흔들며 요염하게 걷는다. 사람들을 자신과 함께 춤추게 하는 힘을 지녔다.

name: electabuzz
description: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.
appearance: Yellow bipedal tiger-like creature with black stripes, two black lightning bolt-shaped horns on its head, black fur tufts on its shoulders, and a black-tipped tail.

descriptions.fr: Normalement trouvés près des centrales électriques, ils peuvent s'éloigner et causer d'importantes pannes de courant dans les villes.
descriptions.de: Normalerweise in der Nähe von Kraftwerken zu finden, können sie umherirren und in Städten größere Stromausfälle verursachen.
descriptions.es: Normalmente se encuentran cerca de centrales eléctricas, pueden alejarse y causar grandes apagones en las ciudades.
descriptions.it: Solitamente si trova vicino alle centrali elettriche, può allontanarsi e causare grandi blackout nelle città.
descriptions.ja: 発電所の近くに生息するが、たまにさまよい出て街で大停電を引き起こす。
descriptions.ko: 발전소 근처에서 서식하지만 가끔 배회하여 마을에 대규모 정전을 일으킨다.

name: magmar
description: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.
appearance: Red bipedal duck-like creature with a yellow flame-like crest on its head, yellow beak-like mouth, red and orange flame patterns on its body, and a tail that resembles a burning flame.

descriptions.fr: Son corps brûle toujours d'une lueur orange qui lui permet de se cacher parfaitement parmi les flammes.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper brennt stets mit einem orangefarbenen Glühen, wodurch es sich perfekt in Flammen verstecken kann.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo siempre arde con un resplandor naranja que le permite esconderse perfectamente entre las llamas.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo arde sempre di un bagliore arancione che gli permette di nascondersi perfettamente tra le fiamme.
descriptions.ja: 常にオレンジ色の炎を燃やし、その熱で炎の中に完璧に身を隠すことができる。
descriptions.ko: 항상 오렌지색 불꽃을 피워 그 열로 불꽃 속에 완벽하게 숨을 수 있다.

name: pinsir
description: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.
appearance: Brown insectoid with large, powerful, antler-like pincers on its head, a segmented body, and sharp claws on its three-fingered hands.

descriptions.fr: S'il ne parvient pas à écraser sa victime dans ses pinces, il la fait tournoyer et la projette violemment.
descriptions.de: Wenn es das Opfer nicht in seinen Zangen zerquetschen kann, schleudert es dieses herum und wirft es mit Wucht weg.
descriptions.es: Si no logra aplastar a la víctima con sus pinzas, la hará girar y la arrojará con fuerza.
descriptions.it: Se non riesce a schiacciare la vittima tra le sue chele, la fa roteare e la scaglia via con forza.
descriptions.ja: 挟むのに失敗しても、振り回して強く投げ飛ばす。
descriptions.ko: 집게로 잡는 데 실패해도 휘둘러 강하게 내던진다.

name: tauros
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.
appearance: Brown bull-like quadruped with three white tails, large curved horns, a shaggy brown mane, and a determined expression.

descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'il vise un ennemi, il charge furieusement tout en fouettant son corps avec ses longues queues.
descriptions.de: Wenn es einen Gegner anvisiert, stürmt es wütend los, während es seinen Körper mit seinen langen Schwänzen peitscht.
descriptions.es: Cuando ataca a un enemigo, carga furiosamente mientras azota su cuerpo con sus largas colas.
descriptions.it: Quando prende di mira un nemico, carica furiosamente mentre si frusta il corpo con le sue lunghe code.
descriptions.ja: 敵を狙うと、長いしっぽで体を叩きつけながら猛然と突進する。
descriptions.ko: 적을 노리면 긴 꼬리로 몸을 때리면서 맹렬하게 돌진한다.

name: magikarp
description: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.
appearance: Orange fish with large, vacant eyes, prominent barbels on its mouth, and large, stiff fins, including a yellow dorsal fin and a white belly.

descriptions.fr: Dans un lointain passé, il était un peu plus fort que les descendants horriblement faibles qui existent aujourd'hui.
descriptions.de: In ferner Vergangenheit war es etwas stärker als die heute existierenden, furchtbar schwachen Nachkommen.
descriptions.es: En el pasado lejano, era algo más fuerte que los descendientes horriblemente débiles que existen hoy.
descriptions.it: Nel lontano passato, era in qualche modo più forte dei discendenti orribilmente deboli che esistono oggi.
descriptions.ja: 遠い昔は今いる恐ろしく弱い子孫よりいくぶんか強かった。
descriptions.ko: 먼 옛날에는 지금 있는 끔찍하게 약한 후손들보다 조금 더 강했다.

name: gyarados
description: Once it begins to rampage, a GYARADOS will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.
appearance: Long, serpent-like dragon with blue scales, a yellow underbelly, red fins along its back, and a fierce, toothy mouth.

descriptions.fr: Une fois qu'il commence à faire des ravages, un Léviator incendiera tout, même au milieu d'une violente tempête.
descriptions.de: Sobald es anfängt zu wüten, wird ein GARADOS alles niederbrennen, selbst in einem heftigen Sturm.
descriptions.es: Una vez que empieza a descontrolarse, un GYARADOS quemará todo, incluso en medio de una dura tormenta.
descriptions.it: Una volta che inizia ad andare in collera, un GYARADOS brucerà ogni cosa, anche durante una violenta tempesta.
descriptions.ja: 一度暴れだすと、たとえ嵐の中でもすべてを焼き払う。
descriptions.ko: 일단 난동을 부리기 시작하면 폭풍우 속에서도 모든 것을 불태워 버린다.

name: lapras
description: A POKéMON that has been over­ hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.
appearance: Large blue plesiosaur-like creature with a grey shell on its back, a long neck, a pair of flippers, and a small horn between its eyes.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON surchassé presque jusqu'à l'extinction. Il peut transporter des personnes sur l'eau.
descriptions.de: Ein POKéMON, das fast bis zur Ausrottung überjagt wurde. Es kann Menschen über das Wasser befördern.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON cazado excesivamente casi hasta la extinción. Puede transportar personas a través del agua.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON cacciato eccessivamente quasi fino all'estinzione. Può traghettare persone attraverso l'acqua.
descriptions.ja: 乱獲により絶滅寸前まで追い込まれたポケモン。人を乗せて水上を渡ることができる。
descriptions.ko: 남획으로 인해 멸종 위기에 처한 포켓몬. 사람들을 태우고 물을 건널 수 있다.

name: ditto
description: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.
appearance: Amorphous, light purple blob with two small, dots for eyes and a simplistic line for a mouth.

descriptions.fr: Capable de copier le code génétique d'un ennemi pour se transformer instantanément en un duplicata de l'ennemi.
descriptions.de: Kann den genetischen Code eines Gegners kopieren, um sich sofort in ein Duplikat des Gegners zu verwandeln.
descriptions.es: Capaz de copiar el código genético de un enemigo para transformarse instantáneamente en un duplicado del mismo.
descriptions.it: Capace di copiare il codice genetico di un nemico per trasformarsi istantaneamente in un duplicato del nemico.
descriptions.ja: 敵の遺伝子コードをコピーし、瞬時に敵の姿に変身することができる。
descriptions.ko: 적의 유전 코드를 복사하여 즉시 적의 모습으로 변신할 수 있다.

name: eevee
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal mammal with fluffy brown fur, a cream-colored ruff around its neck, a bushy tail, and large, pointed ears.

descriptions.fr: Son code génétique est irrégulier. Il peut muter s'il est exposé aux radiations des PIERREs élémentaires.
descriptions.de: Sein genetischer Code ist unregelmäßig. Es kann mutieren, wenn es der Strahlung von Elementsteinen ausgesetzt ist.
descriptions.es: Su código genético es irregular. Puede mutar si se expone a la radiación de las PIEDRAs elementales.
descriptions.it: Il suo codice genetico è irregolare. Può mutare se esposto alle radiazioni delle PIETRE elementari.
descriptions.ja: 遺伝子コードが不規則。エレメントストーンの放射線にさらされると突然変異を起こす可能性がある。
descriptions.ko: 유전 코드가 불규칙하다. 진화의 돌의 방사선에 노출되면 돌연변이를 일으킬 수 있다.

name: vaporeon
description: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.
appearance: Blue quadrupedal mammal resembling a mermaid with a frilled collar, a finned head crest, flippers for paws, and a large, bifurcated tail fin.

descriptions.fr: Vit près de l'eau. Sa longue queue est ornée d'une nageoire souvent confondue avec celle d'une sirène.
descriptions.de: Lebt nahe am Wasser. Sein langer Schwanz ist mit einer Flosse versehen, die oft mit der einer Meerjungfrau verwechselt wird.
descriptions.es: Vive cerca del agua. Su larga cola tiene una aleta que a menudo se confunde con la de una sirena.
descriptions.it: Vive vicino all'acqua. La sua lunga coda è dotata di una pinna spesso scambiata per quella di una sirena.
descriptions.ja: 水辺に生息する。長い尾にはヒレがあり、人魚の尾と間違われることが多い。
descriptions.ko: 물가에 산다. 긴 꼬리에는 지느러미가 있어 종종 인어의 지느러미로 오해받는다.

name: jolteon
description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000- volt lightning bolts.
appearance: Yellow quadrupedal mammal covered in spiky fur, with a white ruff around its neck, long pointed ears, and a small, pointed tail.

descriptions.fr: Il accumule les ions négatifs dans l'atmosphère pour projeter des éclairs de 10000 volts.
descriptions.de: Es sammelt negative Ionen in der Atmosphäre, um 10000-Volt-Blitzschläge auszustoßen.
descriptions.es: Acumula iones negativos en la atmósfera para lanzar rayos de 10000 voltios.
descriptions.it: Accumula ioni negativi nell'atmosfera per scagliare fulmini da 10000 volt.
descriptions.ja: 大気中のマイナスイオンを蓄積し、10000ボルトの電撃を放つ。
descriptions.ko: 대기 중의 음이온을 축적하여 10000볼트의 번개를 발사한다.

name: flareon
description: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.
appearance: Fluffy, reddish-orange quadrupedal mammal with a cream-colored ruff, large bushy tail, and prominent tufts of fur on its head and ears.

descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'il stocke de l'énergie thermique dans son corps, sa température peut monter à plus de 1600 degrés.
descriptions.de: Wenn es Wärmeenergie in seinem Körper speichert, kann seine Temperatur auf über 1600 Grad steigen.
descriptions.es: Cuando almacena energía térmica en su cuerpo, su temperatura puede dispararse a más de 1600 grados.
descriptions.it: Quando immagazzina energia termica nel suo corpo, la sua temperatura può salire a oltre 1600 gradi.
descriptions.ja: 体内に熱エネルギーをためると、体温は1600度を超えることがある。
descriptions.ko: 몸에 열에너지를 저장하면 체온이 1600도 이상으로 치솟을 수 있다.

name: porygon
description: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.
appearance: Geometric, pink and blue digital bird-like creature composed of sharp angles, with a flat beak and a rectangular tail.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON entièrement constitué de code de programmation. Capable de se déplacer librement dans le cyberespace.
descriptions.de: Ein POKéMON, das vollständig aus Programmiercode besteht. Kann sich frei im Cyberspace bewegen.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON que consiste enteramente en código de programación. Capaz de moverse libremente en el ciberespacio.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON che consiste interamente in codice di programmazione. Capace di muoversi liberamente nel cyberspazio.
descriptions.ja: プログラミングコードだけで構成されたポケモン。サイバースペースを自由に移動できる。
descriptions.ko: 프로그래밍 코드로만 이루어진 포켓몬. 사이버 공간을 자유롭게 이동할 수 있다.

name: omanyte
description: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.
appearance: Small blue ammonite-like creature with a spiraling grey shell on its back, two large eyes, and ten small tentacles.

descriptions.fr: Bien qu'éteint depuis longtemps, dans de rares cas, il peut être génétiquement ressuscité à partir de fossiles.
descriptions.de: Obwohl lange ausgestorben, kann es in seltenen Fällen genetisch aus Fossilien wiederbelebt werden.
descriptions.es: Aunque extinto hace mucho tiempo, en casos raros, puede ser genéticamente resucitado a partir de fósiles.
descriptions.it: Sebbene estinto da tempo, in rari casi può essere geneticamente riportato in vita da fossili.
descriptions.ja: 長い間絶滅しているが、まれに化石から遺伝子的に復活させることができる。
descriptions.ko: 오래전에 멸종했지만, 드물게 화석에서 유전적으로 부활시킬 수 있다.

name: omastar
description: A prehistoric POKéMON that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey.
appearance: Larger blue ammonite-like creature with a spiraling grey shell, a row of sharp teeth, and ten long, whipping tentacles.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON préhistorique qui s'est éteint lorsque sa lourde carapace l'a empêché de chasser des proies.
descriptions.de: Ein prähistorisches POKéMON, das ausstarb, als seine schwere Schale es unmöglich machte, Beute zu fangen.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON prehistórico que se extinguió cuando su pesada concha le hizo imposible atrapar presas.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON preistorico estinto quando la sua pesante conchiglia gli rese impossibile catturare le prede.
descriptions.ja: 重い殻のため獲物を捕らえることができなくなり、絶滅した古代のポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 무거운 껍질 때문에 먹이를 잡을 수 없게 되어 멸종한 고대 포켓몬.

name: kabuto
description: A POKéMON that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.
appearance: Small, dark brown horseshoe crab-like creature with a smooth, dome-shaped shell, two large red eyes on its back, and four short legs underneath.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON ressuscité d'un fossile trouvé dans ce qui était autrefois le fond de l'océan il y a des éons.
descriptions.de: Ein POKéMON, das aus einem Fossil wiederbelebt wurde, das vor Äonen auf dem ehemaligen Meeresboden gefunden wurde.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON que fue resucitado de un fósil encontrado en lo que una vez fue el fondo del océano hace eones.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON resuscitato da un fossile trovato in quello che era il fondo dell'oceano eoni fa.
descriptions.ja: 何億年も前の海底だった場所で発見された化石から復活したポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 수억 년 전 해저였던 곳에서 발견된 화석으로 부활한 포켓몬.

name: kabutops
description: Its sleek shape is perfect for swim­ ming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.
appearance: Bipedal, brown arthropod with a scythe-like blade on each arm, a flattened shell on its back, and a head that resembles a trilobite's.

descriptions.fr: Sa forme élancée est parfaite pour la nage. Il lacère ses proies avec ses griffes et leur draine les fluides corporels.
descriptions.de: Seine schlanke Form ist perfekt zum Schwimmen. Es schlitzt Beute mit seinen Klauen auf und entzieht ihnen die Körperflüssigkeit.
descriptions.es: Su forma aerodinámica es perfecta para nadar. Ataca a sus presas con sus garras y les drena los fluidos corporales.
descriptions.it: La sua forma snella è perfetta per nuotare. Lacerà la preda con gli artigli e ne estrae i fluidi corporei.
descriptions.ja: 流線型の体は泳ぎに適している。獲物をかぎ爪で切り裂き体液を吸い取る。
descriptions.ko: 유선형의 몸은 수영에 적합하다. 발톱으로 상대를 찢고 체액을 빨아들인다.

name: aerodactyl
description: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.
appearance: Grey pterodactyl-like creature with large leathery wings, a jagged crest on its head, and a long tail ending in a diamond-shaped tip.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon qui sillonnait les cieux à l'ère des dinosaures. Ses dents ressemblent à des lames de scie.
descriptions.de: Ein Pokémon, das in der Dinosaurierzeit durch die Lüfte streifte. Seine Zähne sind wie Sägeblätter.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon que vagaba por los cielos en la era de los dinosaurios. Sus dientes son como hojas de sierra.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon che vagava nei cieli nell'era dei dinosauri. I suoi denti sono come lame di sega.
descriptions.ja: 恐竜時代に空を飛び回っていたポケモン。牙はのこぎりの歯のようだ。
descriptions.ko: 공룡 시대에 하늘을 날아다녔던 포켓몬. 이빨은 톱날 같다.

name: snorlax
description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.
appearance: Extremely large, rotund blue-green bear-like creature with a cream-colored belly, closed eyes, and large, sleepy expression.

descriptions.fr: Très paresseux. Il ne fait que manger et dormir. Plus sa masse devient imposante, plus il devient paresseux.
descriptions.de: Sehr faul. Frisst und schläft nur. Je größer seine runde Masse wird, desto träger wird es.
descriptions.es: Muy perezoso. Solo come y duerme. A medida que su voluminoso cuerpo crece, se vuelve cada vez más holgazán.
descriptions.it: Molto pigro. Si limita a mangiare e dormire. Man mano che la sua massa rotonda si accumula, diventa sempre più pigro.
descriptions.ja: とても怠け者。食べて寝るだけ。その丸い巨体が増すほど、さらに怠惰になる。
descriptions.ko: 아주 게으르다. 먹고 자기만 한다. 둥근 덩치가 커질수록 더욱 더 게을러진다.

name: articuno
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.
appearance: Elegant, light blue avian creature with large, flowing tail feathers, ice-like crests on its head, and crystalline wings.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON oiseau légendaire qui apparaîtrait aux personnes condamnées et perdues dans les montagnes glacées.
descriptions.de: Ein legendäres Vogel-POKéMON, das angeblich Menschen erscheint, die in eisigen Bergen verloren und dem Untergang geweiht sind.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON pájaro legendario que se dice que aparece ante personas condenadas que se pierden en montañas heladas.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON uccello leggendario che si dice appaia a persone condannate e smarrite tra le montagne ghiacciate.
descriptions.ja: 氷の山で遭難した人々の前に現れると言われる伝説の鳥ポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 얼음 산에서 조난당한 사람들의 앞에 나타난다고 전해지는 전설의 새 포켓몬.

name: zapdos
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.
appearance: Spiky, yellow avian creature with black markings, lightning bolt-shaped wings, and a pointed beak.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON oiseau légendaire qui apparaîtrait des nuages en laissant tomber d'énormes éclairs.
descriptions.de: Ein legendäres Vogel-POKéMON, das angeblich aus Wolken erscheint, während es gewaltige Blitze herablässt.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON pájaro legendario que se dice que aparece de las nubes mientras deja caer enormes rayos.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON uccello leggendario che si dice appaia dalle nuvole mentre fa cadere enormi fulmini.
descriptions.ja: 雲の中から巨大な雷を落としながら現れると言われる伝説の鳥ポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 구름 속에서 거대한 번개를 내리치며 나타난다고 전해지는 전설의 새 포켓몬.

name: moltres
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.
appearance: Fiery, orange avian creature with large, flame-like wings and tail feathers, a pointed beak, and a crest of fire on its head.

descriptions.fr: Connu comme l'oiseau légendaire de feu. Chaque battement de ses ailes crée un éclair éblouissant de flammes.
descriptions.de: Bekannt als der legendäre Feuervogel. Jeder Flügelschlag erzeugt einen blendenden Flammenblitz.
descriptions.es: Conocido como el pájaro legendario de fuego. Cada aleteo de sus alas crea un deslumbrante destello de llamas.
descriptions.it: Conosciuto come l'uccello leggendario di fuoco. Ogni battito delle sue ali crea un bagliore abbagliante di fiamme.
descriptions.ja: 伝説の炎の鳥として知られる。羽ばたくたびにまばゆい炎の閃光を放つ。
descriptions.ko: 전설의 불꽃 포켓몬으로 알려져 있다. 날개를 퍼덕일 때마다 눈부신 불꽃 섬광을 만들어낸다.

name: dratini
description: Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.
appearance: Long, serpentine blue creature with a white belly, a small white fin on its head, and two small white wing-like fins on either side of its head.

descriptions.fr: Longtemps considéré comme un POKéMON mythique, jusqu'à ce qu'une petite colonie soit récemment découverte vivant sous l'eau.
descriptions.de: Lange Zeit als mythisches POKéMON betrachtet, bis kürzlich eine kleine Kolonie unter Wasser entdeckt wurde.
descriptions.es: Considerado durante mucho tiempo un POKéMON mítico hasta hace poco, cuando se encontró una pequeña colonia viviendo bajo el agua.
descriptions.it: Considerato a lungo un POKéMON mitico fino a poco tempo fa, quando una piccola colonia è stata trovata vivere sott'acqua.
descriptions.ja: 長い間幻のポケモンとされてきたが、最近になって水中での小さな群れが発見された。
descriptions.ko: 오랫동안 환상의 포켓몬으로 여겨져 왔으나, 최근 수중에서 작은 서식지가 발견되었다.

name: dragonair
description: A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.
appearance: Slender, light blue serpentine creature with small white wings on its head, a white belly, and two small blue orbs on its neck and tail.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON mystique qui dégage une aura douce. Possède la capacité de modifier les conditions climatiques.
descriptions.de: Ein mystisches POKéMON, das eine sanfte Aura ausstrahlt. Besitzt die Fähigkeit, die Klimabedingungen zu ändern.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON místico que desprende un aura suave. Tiene la capacidad de cambiar las condiciones climáticas.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON mistico che emana un'aura gentile. Ha la capacità di cambiare le condizioni climatiche.
descriptions.ja: 穏やかなオーラを放つ神秘的なポケモン。気候条件を変える能力を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 온화한 분위기를 풍기는 신비로운 포켓몬. 기후 조건을 바꿀 수 있는 능력이 있다.

name: dragonite
description: An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.
appearance: Large, orange bipedal dragon with small, white insect-like wings on its back, a cream-colored belly, and two small antennae on its head.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON marin extrêmement rare. Son intelligence est réputée égale à celle des humains.
descriptions.de: Ein extrem seltenes Wasser-POKéMON. Seine Intelligenz soll der von Menschen entsprechen.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON marino extremadamente raro. Se dice que su inteligencia iguala la de los humanos.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON marino estremamente raro. La sua intelligenza si dice che eguagli quella degli umani.
descriptions.ja: 極めて珍しい海のポケモン。その知能は人間並みだと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 극히 드문 바다 포켓몬. 지능은 인간과 비슷하다고 전해진다.

name: mewtwo
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.
appearance: Sleek, bipedal grey cat-like creature with a long, purple-tipped tail, a prominent tube extending from the back of its head to its spine, and piercing purple eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il a été créé par un scientifique après des années d'horribles expériences de manipulation génétique et d'ingénierie de l'ADN.
descriptions.de: Es wurde von einem Wissenschaftler nach Jahren schrecklicher Gen-Splicing- und DNA-Engineering-Experimente erschaffen.
descriptions.es: Fue creado por un científico después de años de horribles experimentos de empalme genético e ingeniería de ADN.
descriptions.it: È stato creato da uno scienziato dopo anni di orribili esperimenti di giunzione genetica e ingegneria del DNA.
descriptions.ja: 恐ろしい遺伝子操作とDNA工学の実験を何年も経て、科学者によって生み出された。
descriptions.ko: 끔찍한 유전자 접합과 DNA 공학 실험을 거쳐 과학자에 의해 만들어졌다.

name: mew
description: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.
appearance: small, pink, feline-like creature with large blue eyes, a long thin tail with a rounded tip, and large ears.

descriptions.fr: Si rare que de nombreux experts le considèrent encore comme un mirage. Seules quelques personnes l'ont vu dans le monde entier.
descriptions.de: So selten, dass viele Experten es immer noch für eine Fata Morgana halten. Weltweit haben es nur wenige Menschen gesehen.
descriptions.es: Tan raro que muchos expertos aún lo consideran un espejismo. Solo unas pocas personas en el mundo lo han visto.
descriptions.it: È talmente raro che molti esperti lo considerano ancora un miraggio. Solo poche persone al mondo lo hanno visto.
descriptions.ja: あまりにも珍しいため、多くの専門家が幻だと言い続けている。世界中でほんの数人しか目撃していない。
descriptions.ko: 너무나 희귀해서 많은 전문가들이 아직도 신기루라고 말한다. 전 세계적으로 극소수의 사람만이 목격했다.

name: chikorita
description: A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up the sun's rays.
appearance: small, pale green sauropod-like creature with a large dark green leaf on its head, a single tan collar of buds, and two small red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Une douce fragrance émane délicatement de la feuille sur sa tête. Il est docile et aime se prélasser sous les rayons du soleil.
descriptions.de: Ein süßer Duft steigt sanft von dem Blatt auf seinem Kopf. Es ist fügsam und liebt es, die Sonnenstrahlen aufzusaugen.
descriptions.es: Un dulce aroma emana suavemente de la hoja de su cabeza. Es dócil y le encanta absorber los rayos del sol.
descriptions.it: Un dolce aroma si sprigiona delicatamente dalla foglia sulla sua testa. È docile e ama assorbire i raggi del sole.
descriptions.ja: 頭の葉っぱから甘い香りが優しく漂う。おとなしい性格で、日なたで日差しを浴びるのが好きだ。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 잎에서 달콤한 향기가 은은하게 피어난다. 온순한 성격으로 햇볕을 쬐는 것을 좋아한다.

name: bayleef
description: The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.
appearance: medium-sized, pale green sauropod-like creature with a large, curled dark green leaf on its head, a necklace of reddish-brown buds around its neck, and a long tail with a small, darker green leaf at the tip.

descriptions.fr: L'odeur d'épices émane de son cou. D'une manière ou d'une autre, la renifler donne envie de combattre.
descriptions.de: Der Duft von Gewürzen kommt von seinem Hals. Irgendwie macht das Schnuppern daran Lust auf Kampf.
descriptions.es: Un aroma a especias emana de su cuello. De alguna manera, olerlo da ganas de luchar.
descriptions.it: L'odore di spezie proviene dal suo collo. Annusarlo, per qualche motivo, fa venire voglia di lottare.
descriptions.ja: 首の周りからスパイスのような匂いがする。なんだかその匂いを嗅ぐと、戦いたくなる。
descriptions.ko: 목 주변에서 향신료 같은 냄새가 난다. 왠지 모르게 그 냄새를 맡으면 싸우고 싶어진다.

name: meganium
description: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.
appearance: large, light green sauropod-like creature with a large pink flower petal collar around its neck, two prominent yellow antennae, and smaller pink flowers on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: L'arôme qui s'élève de ses pétales contient une substance qui apaise les sentiments agressifs.
descriptions.de: Das Aroma, das von seinen Blütenblättern aufsteigt, enthält eine Substanz, die aggressive Gefühle beruhigt.
descriptions.es: El aroma que emana de sus pétalos contiene una sustancia que calma los sentimientos agresivos.
descriptions.it: L'aroma che si sprigiona dai suoi petali contiene una sostanza che calma i sentimenti aggressivi.
descriptions.ja: 花びらから立ち上る香りは、攻撃的な気持ちを鎮める成分を含んでいる。
descriptions.ko: 꽃잎에서 피어나는 향기는 공격적인 감정을 진정시키는 성분을 포함한다.

name: cyndaquil
description: It has a timid nature. If it is startled, the flames on its back burn more vigorously.
appearance: small, bipedal shrew-like creature with a dark blue back and a cream-colored belly, possessing four red flame vents on its back that are often ignited.

descriptions.fr: Il a une nature timide. S'il est effrayé, les flammes sur son dos brûlent plus vigoureusement.
descriptions.de: Es hat eine schüchterne Natur. Wenn es erschreckt wird, brennen die Flammen auf seinem Rücken heftiger.
descriptions.es: Tiene una naturaleza tímida. Si se asusta, las llamas de su espalda arden con más vigor.
descriptions.it: Ha una natura timida. Se si spaventa, le fiamme sulla sua schiena bruciano più vigorosamente.
descriptions.ja: 臆病な性格。驚かせると背中の炎がさらに勢いよく燃え上がる。
descriptions.ko: 겁이 많은 성격이다. 깜짝 놀라면 등 뒤의 불꽃이 더욱 기세 좋게 타오른다.

name: quilava
description: Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back.
appearance: medium-sized, slender badger-like creature with a dark blue upper body and a cream-colored underside, featuring two large red flame vents on its head and one on its rear back.

descriptions.fr: Soyez prudent s'il tourne le dos pendant un combat. Cela signifie qu'il attaquera avec le feu de son dos.
descriptions.de: Sei vorsichtig, wenn es im Kampf den Rücken zukehrt. Das bedeutet, dass es mit dem Feuer auf seinem Rücken angreifen wird.
descriptions.es: Ten cuidado si da la espalda durante la batalla. Significa que atacará con el fuego de su espalda.
descriptions.it: Fai attenzione se ti volta le spalle durante la lotta. Significa che attaccherà con il fuoco della sua schiena.
descriptions.ja: バトル中に背を向けたら注意。背中の炎で攻撃してくる合図だ。
descriptions.ko: 배틀 중에 등을 돌리면 조심해라. 등 뒤의 불꽃으로 공격하겠다는 신호다.

name: typhlosion
description: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
appearance: large, bipedal badger-like creature with a dark blue-black body and a cream-colored underside, displaying a prominent ring of yellow-orange flames around its neck and upper back.

descriptions.fr: Si sa rage atteint son paroxysme, il devient si chaud que tout ce qui le touche s'enflamme instantanément.
descriptions.de: Wenn seine Wut ihren Höhepunkt erreicht, wird es so heiß, dass alles, was es berührt, sofort in Flammen aufgeht.
descriptions.es: Si su ira alcanza su punto máximo, se vuelve tan caliente que cualquier cosa que lo toque se incendiará al instante.
descriptions.it: Se la sua ira raggiunge il culmine, diventa così rovente che qualsiasi cosa lo tocchi prende fuoco all'istante.
descriptions.ja: 怒りが頂点に達すると、触れるものすべてを瞬時に燃え上がらせるほどの高温になる。
descriptions.ko: 분노가 절정에 달하면 닿는 모든 것을 순식간에 불태워버릴 정도로 뜨거워진다.

name: totodile
description: Its well-developed jaws are powerful and capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful.
appearance: small, bipedal blue crocodile-like creature with a red spine along its back, a cream-colored belly, and a large mouth with prominent teeth.

descriptions.fr: Ses mâchoires bien développées sont puissantes et capables d'écraser n'importe quoi. Même son Dresseur doit faire attention.
descriptions.de: Seine gut entwickelten Kiefer sind kräftig und können alles zerquetschen. Selbst sein Trainer muss vorsichtig sein.
descriptions.es: Sus mandíbulas bien desarrolladas son potentes y capaces de triturar cualquier cosa. Incluso su entrenador debe tener cuidado.
descriptions.it: Le sue mascelle ben sviluppate sono potenti e capaci di frantumare qualsiasi cosa. Anche il suo Allenatore deve fare attenzione.
descriptions.ja: 発達したアゴは、何でも砕くほどのパワーを持つ。自分のトレーナーでさえ注意が必要だ。
descriptions.ko: 발달한 턱은 무엇이든 부술 정도의 파워를 지녔다. 자신의 트레이너조차 조심해야 한다.

name: croconaw
description: If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.
appearance: medium-sized, bipedal blue crocodilian creature with a red spine and markings on its back and head, a cream-colored belly, and a large maw lined with sharp teeth.

descriptions.fr: S'il perd une défense, une nouvelle repousse à sa place. Il y a toujours 48 défenses tapissant sa gueule.
descriptions.de: Verliert es einen Fangzahn, wächst ein neuer nach. Es befinden sich immer 48 Fangzähne in seinem Maul.
descriptions.es: Si pierde un colmillo, le crece uno nuevo en su lugar. Siempre tiene 48 colmillos en su boca.
descriptions.it: Se perde una zanna, ne ricresce una nuova al suo posto. Ci sono sempre 48 zanne che rivestono la sua bocca.
descriptions.ja: キバが抜け落ちても、新しいキバが生えてくる。口の中にはいつも48本のキバが並んでいる。
descriptions.ko: 송곳니가 빠져도 새로운 송곳니가 돋아난다. 입 안에는 항상 48개의 송곳니가 줄지어 있다.

name: feraligatr
description: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.
appearance: large, bipedal blue crocodilian creature with yellow markings on its belly and chest, a red spiky pattern on its back and head, and large, powerful jaws.

descriptions.fr: Quand il mord avec ses mâchoires massives et puissantes, il secoue la tête et déchire sauvagement sa victime.
descriptions.de: Wenn es mit seinen massiven und kräftigen Kiefern zubeißt, schüttelt es den Kopf und zerfetzt sein Opfer.
descriptions.es: Cuando muerde con sus mandíbulas masivas y poderosas, sacude la cabeza y desgarra salvajemente a su víctima.
descriptions.it: Quando morde con le sue mascelle massicce e potenti, scuote la testa e dilania selvaggiamente la sua vittima.
descriptions.ja: 巨大なアゴで噛みつくと、そのまま頭を振り回し、獲物を八つ裂きにする。
descriptions.ko: 거대한 턱으로 물면 그대로 머리를 흔들어 먹이를 갈가리 찢어버린다.

name: sentret
description: A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.
appearance: small, brown, ferret-like creature with a long, striped tail, large round ears, and dark brown markings around its eyes and on its paws.

descriptions.fr: C'est un POKéMON très prudent. Il se dresse sur sa queue pour mieux observer les environs.
descriptions.de: Ein sehr vorsichtiges POKéMON. Es richtet sich auf seinem Schweif auf, um eine bessere Sicht auf die Umgebung zu haben.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON muy cauteloso. Se apoya en su cola para erguirse y obtener una mejor vista de su entorno.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON molto cauto. Si solleva sulla coda per avere una visuale migliore di ciò che lo circonda.
descriptions.ja: 警戒心が強く、しっぽで立ち上がって周りの様子をうかがう。
descriptions.ko: 경계심이 강해 꼬리로 몸을 세워 주위 상황을 살핀다.

name: furret
description: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKéMON to enter.
appearance: long, slender, light brown ferret-like creature with red stripes on its belly, dark brown rings around its eyes, and a long, light brown tail.

descriptions.fr: Il construit un nid adapté à son corps long et fin. Ce nid est inaccessible aux autres POKéMON.
descriptions.de: Es baut ein Nest, das seinem langen, dünnen Körper angepasst ist. Andere POKéMON können dieses Nest unmöglich betreten.
descriptions.es: Construye un nido que se adapta a su cuerpo largo y delgado. El nido es imposible de entrar para otros POKéMON.
descriptions.it: Costruisce un nido adatto al suo corpo lungo e snello. Nessun altro POKéMON può entrarvi.
descriptions.ja: 長く細い体に合わせて巣を作る。他のポケモンが入り込むことは不可能。
descriptions.ko: 길고 가는 몸에 맞춰 둥지를 만든다. 다른 포켓몬은 들어갈 수 없다.

name: hoothoot
description: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.
appearance: small, round, brown owl with large, bright red eyes, a single clawed foot it stands on, and a prominent clock-like marking on its belly.

descriptions.fr: Il se tient toujours sur un pied. Il alterne ses pieds si vite que son mouvement est rarement perceptible.
descriptions.de: Es steht stets auf einem Fuß. Die Füße wechselt es so schnell, dass die Bewegung kaum zu sehen ist.
descriptions.es: Siempre se apoya en una pata. Cambia de pata tan rápido que su movimiento es casi imperceptible.
descriptions.it: Sta sempre su un piede solo. Cambia zampa così velocemente che il movimento è quasi invisibile.
descriptions.ja: いつも片足で立っている。足を入れ替える速度は非常に速く、その動きを見ることはまれ。
descriptions.ko: 늘 한 발로 서 있다. 발을 바꾸는 속도가 매우 빨라서 그 움직임을 보기는 어렵다.

name: noctowl
description: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.
appearance: large, wise-looking brown owl with two prominent 'eyebrow' feathers, bright red eyes, and a patterned chest and belly.

descriptions.fr: Ses yeux sont adaptés pour concentrer la moindre lumière, ce qui lui permet de voir dans le noir.
descriptions.de: Seine Augen sind besonders angepasst. Sie konzentrieren selbst schwaches Licht und ermöglichen ihm, im Dunkeln zu sehen.
descriptions.es: Sus ojos están especialmente adaptados. Concentran incluso la luz tenue y le permiten ver en la oscuridad.
descriptions.it: I suoi occhi sono appositamente adattati. Concentrano anche la luce più debole e gli permettono di vedere al buio.
descriptions.ja: 特別に発達した目でわずかな光も集め、暗闇の中でも見通すことができる。
descriptions.ko: 특별히 발달한 눈으로 희미한 빛까지 모아서 어둠 속에서도 사물을 볼 수 있다.

name: ledyba
description: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.
appearance: small, red ladybug-like creature with black spots on its shell-like wings, white hands and feet, and two short black antennae.

descriptions.fr: C'est un POKéMON très timide. Il a peur de bouger s'il est seul, mais est très actif en groupe.
descriptions.de: Es ist sehr schüchtern. Allein ist es zu ängstlich, um sich zu bewegen. In einer Gruppe wird es jedoch aktiv.
descriptions.es: Es muy tímido. Tendrá miedo de moverse si está solo. Pero será activo si está en grupo.
descriptions.it: È molto timido. Se è da solo, avrà paura di muoversi. Ma in gruppo diventa attivo.
descriptions.ja: 非常に臆病な性格。１匹だと動くのが怖いが、群れだと活発になる。
descriptions.ko: 매우 겁이 많다. 혼자 있으면 움직이는 것을 두려워하지만 무리 지어 있으면 활발해진다.

name: ledian
description: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.
appearance: bipedal, red ladybug-like creature with large black spots on its back and hands, a white face with two short black antennae, and black legs.

descriptions.fr: Quand les étoiles scintillent dans le ciel nocturne, il virevolte, dispersant une poudre lumineuse.
descriptions.de: Wenn die Sterne am Nachthimmel flimmern, flattert es herum und verstreut ein leuchtendes Pulver.
descriptions.es: Cuando las estrellas parpadean en el cielo nocturno, revolotea esparciendo un polvo brillante.
descriptions.it: Quando le stelle scintillano nel cielo notturno, vola tutt'intorno, spargendo una polvere luminosa.
descriptions.ja: 夜空に星が瞬くと、光る粉をまき散らしながら舞い飛ぶ。
descriptions.ko: 밤하늘에 별이 반짝이면 빛나는 가루를 흩뿌리며 날아다닌다.

name: spinarak
description: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.
appearance: small, green, spider-like creature with a large abdomen resembling a face, two pairs of red eyes, and a white silk string extending from its spinneret.

descriptions.fr: Il reste immobile dans la même pose pendant des jours dans sa toile, attendant que sa proie s'approche.
descriptions.de: Es liegt tagelang in derselben Pose regungslos in seinem Netz und wartet darauf, dass sich ahnungslose Beute nähert.
descriptions.es: Permanece inmóvil en la misma pose durante días en su telaraña, esperando que su presa desprevenida se acerque.
descriptions.it: Rimane immobile nella stessa posa per giorni nella sua tela, aspettando che una preda ignara si avvicini.
descriptions.ja: 自分の巣の中で何日も同じポーズでじっとして、近づいてくる獲物を待ち構えている。
descriptions.ko: 며칠이고 둥지 속에서 같은 자세로 가만히 앉아 다가오는 먹이를 기다린다.

name: ariados
description: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It is hard to tell which end is which.
appearance: larger, red and purple spider-like creature with a prominent white-faced pattern on its abdomen, a long yellow horn on its head, and four visible legs.

descriptions.fr: Il tisse de la soie non seulement avec son postérieur, mais aussi avec sa bouche. Difficile de savoir où est l'avant ou l'arrière.
descriptions.de: Es spinnt Fäden nicht nur aus seinem Hinterteil, sondern auch aus seinem Maul. Es ist schwer zu erkennen, welches Ende welches ist.
descriptions.es: Hila seda no solo por su parte trasera, sino también por su boca. Es difícil saber qué extremo es cuál.
descriptions.it: Tesse il filo non solo dalla parte posteriore ma anche dalla bocca. È difficile distinguere quale sia la testa e quale la coda.
descriptions.ja: お尻だけでなく口からも糸を出す。どっちが前か後ろか、判断するのは難しい。
descriptions.ko: 엉덩이뿐만 아니라 입에서도 실을 뿜는다. 어느 쪽이 앞이고 뒤인지 구분하기 어렵다.

name: crobat
description: It flies so si­ lently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.
appearance: large, purple, bat-like creature with two pairs of wings, four legs that are also wings, and a long snout with two fangs.

descriptions.fr: Il vole si silencieusement dans le noir sur ses quatre ailes qu'on peut ne pas le remarquer même à proximité.
descriptions.de: Es fliegt mit seinen vier Flügeln so lautlos durch die Dunkelheit, dass es selbst aus der Nähe unbemerkt bleiben kann.
descriptions.es: Vuela tan silenciosamente en la oscuridad con sus cuatro alas que puede no ser notado incluso cuando está cerca.
descriptions.it: Vola così silenziosamente nel buio sulle sue quattro ali che può non essere notato anche quando è vicino.
descriptions.ja: ４枚の翼で暗闇を音もなく飛ぶので、すぐ近くにいても気づかれないことがある。
descriptions.ko: 4개의 날개로 어둠 속을 소리 없이 날기 때문에 바로 가까이에 있어도 눈치채지 못하는 경우가 있다.

name: chinchou
description: Chinchou blink their shining antennae at one another to claim their respective turf.
appearance: small, blue, fish-like creature with two prominent antennae ending in yellow light-bulb-like organs, and large red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Les LOUPIO clignent leurs antennes lumineuses pour délimiter leur territoire respectif.
descriptions.de: CHINCHOU blinken mit ihren leuchtenden Antennen, um ihr jeweiliges Revier zu markieren.
descriptions.es: Los CHINCHOU parpadean sus antenas brillantes entre sí para reclamar sus respectivos territorios.
descriptions.it: CHINCHOU si mandano segnali con le loro antenne luminose per marcare i rispettivi territori.
descriptions.ja: ２本の光る触角をチカチカさせて仲間と縄張りを主張しあう。
descriptions.ko: 두 개의 빛나는 촉각을 깜빡여서 동료들과 영역을 주장한다.

name: lanturn
description: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.
appearance: large, blue, fish-like creature with a prominent yellow antenna ending in a light bulb, a white belly, and large red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Sa lumière est si brillante qu'elle peut éclairer la surface de la mer depuis plus de trois miles de profondeur.
descriptions.de: Das von ihm ausgestrahlte Licht ist so hell, dass es die Meeresoberfläche aus einer Tiefe von über drei Meilen erleuchten kann.
descriptions.es: La luz que emite es tan brillante que puede iluminar la superficie del mar desde una profundidad de más de tres millas.
descriptions.it: La luce che emette è così brillante da poter illuminare la superficie del mare da una profondità di oltre tre miglia.
descriptions.ja: 発する光は非常に明るく、水深3マイル以上からでも海の表面を照らすことができる。
descriptions.ko: 내뿜는 빛은 매우 밝아서 3마일이 넘는 깊은 바닷속에서도 수면을 비출 수 있다.

name: pichu
description: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.
appearance: small, yellow mouse-like creature with large black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a small black collar marking around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Il ne maîtrise pas encore le stockage de l'électricité. Il peut envoyer une décharge s'il est amusé ou surpris.
descriptions.de: Es ist noch nicht geschickt darin, Elektrizität zu speichern. Es kann einen Stromstoß aussenden, wenn es belustigt oder erschreckt wird.
descriptions.es: Aún no es hábil almacenando electricidad. Puede soltar una descarga si se divierte o asusta.
descriptions.it: Non è ancora abile nell'accumulare elettricità. Potrebbe emettere una scossa se divertito o spaventato.
descriptions.ja: まだ電気を蓄えるのが苦手。楽しんだり驚いたりすると、思わず放電してしまうことがある。
descriptions.ko: 아직 전기를 모으는 것이 미숙하다. 즐겁거나 깜짝 놀라면 전기를 방출할 수 있다.

name: cleffa
description: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.
appearance: small, pink, star-shaped creature with two pointed ears, a small curl on its head, and a perpetually smiling expression.

descriptions.fr: En raison de sa silhouette inhabituelle, semblable à une étoile, les gens croient qu'il est arrivé ici sur une météorite.
descriptions.de: Wegen seiner ungewöhnlichen, sternförmigen Silhouette glauben die Menschen, dass es auf einem Meteoriten hierherkam.
descriptions.es: Debido a su silueta inusual, similar a una estrella, la gente cree que llegó aquí en un meteorito.
descriptions.it: A causa della sua insolita silhouette a forma di stella, si crede che sia arrivato qui su una meteora.
descriptions.ja: その珍しい星のようなシルエットから、隕石に乗ってやってきたと人々は信じている。
descriptions.ko: 특이한 별 모양의 실루엣 때문에 사람들이 운석을 타고 이곳에 왔다고 믿고 있다.

name: igglybuff
description: It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.
appearance: small, round, pink balloon-like creature with large blue eyes, a small curl of hair on its forehead, and a tiny tuft of pink hair on its head.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est très mou. S'il commence à rouler, il rebondira partout et sera impossible à arrêter.
descriptions.de: Es hat einen sehr weichen Körper. Wenn es anfängt zu rollen, prallt es überall ab und ist unmöglich aufzuhalten.
descriptions.es: Tiene un cuerpo muy blando. Si empieza a rodar, rebotará por todas partes y será imposible de detener.
descriptions.it: Ha un corpo molto morbido. Se inizia a rotolare, rimbalzerà ovunque e sarà impossibile fermarlo.
descriptions.ja: とても柔らかい体を持つ。一度転がり始めると、あちこち跳ね回って止めることができない。
descriptions.ko: 몸이 매우 부드럽다. 일단 구르기 시작하면 여기저기 튀어 다니며 멈출 수 없게 된다.

name: togepi
description: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.
appearance: small, pale yellow, egg-shaped creature with red and blue triangular patterns on its shell, stubby arms and legs, and a small spike on its head.

descriptions.fr: Sa coquille semble être remplie de joie. On dit qu'il partage la bonne fortune quand il est bien traité.
descriptions.de: Die Schale scheint voller Freude zu sein. Es heißt, dass es Glück teilt, wenn es freundlich behandelt wird.
descriptions.es: Su caparazón parece lleno de alegría. Se dice que comparte la buena suerte cuando es tratado con amabilidad.
descriptions.it: Il guscio sembra essere colmo di gioia. Si dice che condivida la buona fortuna se trattato gentilmente.
descriptions.ja: 殻には喜びが満ちているようだ。優しくされると、幸運を分けてくれると言われている。
descriptions.ko: 껍질은 기쁨으로 가득 찬 것 같다. 친절하게 대하면 행운을 나눠준다고 전해진다.

name: togetic
description: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, car­ ing people and shower them with happiness.
appearance: small, white, winged fairy-like creature with red and blue triangular patterns on its chest, a prominent spiked crest on its head, and a red collar-like marking.

descriptions.fr: On dit qu'il apparaît devant les personnes bienveillantes et attentionnées pour les inonder de bonheur.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, dass es vor gutherzigen, fürsorglichen Menschen erscheint und sie mit Glück überschüttet.
descriptions.es: Se dice que aparece ante personas bondadosas y cariñosas y las colma de felicidad.
descriptions.it: Si dice che appaia davanti a persone di buon cuore e premurose e le inondi di felicità.
descriptions.ja: 心優しく思いやりのある人の前に現れ、幸せを降り注ぐと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 상냥하고 다정한 사람들 앞에 나타나 행복을 뿌려준다고 전해진다.

name: natu
description: Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always star­ ing at something.
appearance: small, green bird-like creature with a round body, red and yellow markings on its chest and tail, and large, dark, oval eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ses ailes n'étant pas encore complètement développées, il doit sautiller pour se déplacer. Il regarde toujours quelque chose fixement.
descriptions.de: Da seine Flügel noch nicht voll ausgewachsen sind, muss es hüpfen, um sich fortzubewegen. Es starrt immer auf etwas.
descriptions.es: Como sus alas aún no están completamente desarrolladas, tiene que saltar para moverse. Siempre está mirando fijamente algo.
descriptions.it: Poiché le sue ali non sono ancora completamente cresciute, deve saltellare per muoversi. Fissa sempre qualcosa.
descriptions.ja: 羽がまだ完全に生え揃っていないため、跳ねて移動する。いつも何かをじっと見つめている。
descriptions.ko: 날개가 아직 완전히 자라지 않아 뛰어다닌다. 항상 무언가를 응시하고 있다.

name: xatu
description: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.
appearance: tall, green bird-like creature with red and black stripes on its body and wings, yellow and black striped tail feathers, and a red crest on its head.

descriptions.fr: On dit qu'il reste immobile et silencieux parce qu'il voit le passé et le futur en même temps.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, dass es still und ruhig bleibt, weil es gleichzeitig Vergangenheit und Zukunft sieht.
descriptions.es: Se dice que permanece quieto y en silencio porque está viendo el pasado y el futuro al mismo tiempo.
descriptions.it: Si dice che rimanga immobile e silenzioso perché vede passato e futuro contemporaneamente.
descriptions.ja: 過去と未来を同時に見ているため、じっと静かにしていると言われている。
descriptions.ko: 과거와 미래를 동시에 보고 있기 때문에 가만히 조용히 있는다고 전해진다.

name: mareep
description: If static elec­ tricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.
appearance: small, sheep-like creature with a fluffy cream-colored wool coat, yellow skin underneath, and a long tail ending in a yellow ball.

descriptions.fr: Si l'électricité statique s'accumule dans son corps, sa toison double de volume. Le toucher vous choquera.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich statische Elektrizität in seinem Körper ansammelt, verdoppelt sich sein Vlies. Eine Berührung wird dich schockieren.
descriptions.es: Si la electricidad estática se acumula en su cuerpo, su vellón duplica su volumen. Tocarlo te dará una descarga.
descriptions.it: Se l'elettricità statica si accumula nel suo corpo, il suo vello raddoppia di volume. Toccarlo ti darà una scossa.
descriptions.ja: 体に静電気がたまると、羊毛の量が倍になる。触ると感電する。
descriptions.ko: 몸에 정전기가 쌓이면 털의 부피가 두 배로 늘어난다. 만지면 감전된다.

name: flaaffy
description: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow.
appearance: medium-sized, pink sheep-like creature with a white wool 'collar' and tail tip, blue stripes on its ears, and a long tail ending in a black sphere.
