descriptions.fr: À force de stocker trop d'électricité, il a développé des zones où même le duvet ne pousse plus.
descriptions.de: Durch das Speichern von zu viel Elektrizität hat es Stellen entwickelt, an denen selbst flaumige Wolle nicht mehr wächst.
descriptions.es: Como resultado de almacenar demasiada electricidad, desarrolló parches donde ni siquiera la lana suave crecerá.
descriptions.it: A causa dell'eccessivo accumulo di elettricità, ha sviluppato chiazze in cui neanche la lanugine più soffice cresce.
descriptions.ja: 電気を蓄えすぎた結果、産毛すら生えない箇所ができた。
descriptions.ko: 전기를 너무 많이 모은 결과, 솜털조차 자라지 않는 부분이 생겼다.

name: ampharos
description: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.
appearance: Ampharos is a yellow bipedal sheep-like Pokémon with a white belly, black-and-white striped ears, a red gem on its forehead, and a black-segmented tail tipped with a prominent red orb.

descriptions.fr: L'extrémité de sa queue brille intensément et peut être vue de loin. Elle sert de balise aux personnes égarées.
descriptions.de: Die Spitze seines Schweifes leuchtet hell und ist von Weitem sichtbar. Sie dient verlorenen Menschen als Leuchtfeuer.
descriptions.es: La punta de su cola brilla intensamente y puede verse desde lejos. Sirve de baliza para la gente perdida.
descriptions.it: La punta della sua coda brilla intensamente e può essere vista da lontano. Funge da faro per le persone smarrite.
descriptions.ja: しっぽの先が明るく光り、遠くからでも見える。迷った人の道しるべになる。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리 끝이 밝게 빛나 멀리서도 볼 수 있다. 길 잃은 사람들에게 등대 역할을 한다.

name: bellossom
description: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.
appearance: Bellossom is a small, green humanoid Pokémon with two large red flowers on its head, green leafy arms, and a skirt of alternating red and yellow petals.

descriptions.fr: Abondant sous les tropiques. Quand il danse, ses pétales se frottent et produisent un agréable tintement.
descriptions.de: Ist in den Tropen reichlich vorhanden. Wenn es tanzt, reiben seine Blütenblätter aneinander und erzeugen einen angenehmen Klingelton.
descriptions.es: Abundante en los trópicos. Cuando baila, sus pétalos se rozan y producen un agradable sonido de campaneo.
descriptions.it: Abbondante nei tropici. Quando danza, i suoi petali si sfregano producendo un piacevole suono tintinnante.
descriptions.ja: 熱帯地方に多く生息する。踊ると花びらがこすれ合い、心地よい鈴のような音を出す。
descriptions.ko: 열대 지방에 풍부하다. 춤을 출 때 꽃잎이 서로 마찰하며 기분 좋은 방울 소리를 낸다.

name: marill
description: The tip of its tail, which con­ tains oil that is lighter than wa­ ter, lets it swim without drowning.
appearance: Marill is a small, spherical blue Pokémon with a white belly, large round blue ears, and a thin black zigzag-patterned tail ending in a large white, buoyant sphere.

descriptions.fr: L'extrémité de sa queue contient une huile plus légère que l'eau, ce qui lui permet de nager sans se noyer.
descriptions.de: Die Spitze seines Schweifes enthält Öl, das leichter ist als Wasser, wodurch es schwimmen kann, ohne zu ertrinken.
descriptions.es: La punta de su cola, que contiene un aceite más ligero que el agua, le permite nadar sin ahogarse.
descriptions.it: La punta della sua coda contiene un olio più leggero dell'acqua, che gli permette di nuotare senza annegare.
descriptions.ja: 尻尾の先には水より軽い油が含まれており、溺れることなく泳ぐことができる。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리 끝에는 물보다 가벼운 기름이 들어있어, 물에 빠지지 않고 헤엄칠 수 있다.

name: azumarill
description: It lives in water virtually all day long. Its body color and pattern act as camouflage that makes it tough for enemies to spot in water.
appearance: Azumarill is a larger, ovular blue Pokémon with a white belly, long white-lined blue ears, short blue arms, a white bubbly collar pattern, and a white, spherical tail.

descriptions.fr: Il vit dans l'eau pratiquement toute la journée. Sa couleur et son motif agissent comme un camouflage qui rend difficile sa détection par les ennemis dans l'eau.
descriptions.de: Es lebt praktisch den ganzen Tag im Wasser. Seine Körperfarbe und sein Muster dienen als Tarnung, die es Feinden schwer macht, es im Wasser zu entdecken.
descriptions.es: Vive en el agua prácticamente todo el día. El color y el patrón de su cuerpo actúan como camuflaje, haciendo que sea difícil para los enemigos detectarlo en el agua.
descriptions.it: Vive in acqua praticamente tutto il giorno. Il colore e il motivo del suo corpo fungono da camuffamento, rendendo difficile per i nemici individuarlo in acqua.
descriptions.ja: ほぼ一日中水中で暮らす。体の色や模様は水中でのカモフラージュとなり、敵に見つかりにくい。
descriptions.ko: 거의 하루 종일 물속에서 산다. 몸의 색깔과 무늬는 물속에서 위장 역할을 하여 적들이 발견하기 어렵게 한다.

name: sudowoodo
description: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composi­ tion appears to be closer to a rock than a plant.
appearance: Sudowoodo is a brown, bipedal Pokémon with a stubby, tree-like body, three round yellow spots on its back, short legs, and spherical green 'hands' attached to short, branch-like arms.

descriptions.fr: Bien qu'il se fasse toujours passer pour un arbre, sa composition semble plus proche d'une roche que d'une plante.
descriptions.de: Obwohl es sich immer als Baum ausgibt, scheint seine Zusammensetzung eher der eines Steins als einer Pflanze zu gleichen.
descriptions.es: Aunque siempre finge ser un árbol, su composición parece estar más cerca de una roca que de una planta.
descriptions.it: Sebbene finga sempre di essere un albero, la sua composizione sembra più simile a una roccia che a una pianta.
descriptions.ja: いつも木のフリをしているが、その体は植物よりも岩石に近いようだ。
descriptions.ko: 항상 나무인 척하지만, 그 구성은 식물보다 암석에 더 가깝다고 한다.

name: politoed
description: If POLIWAG and POLIWHIRL hear its echoing cry, they respond by gather­ ing from far and wide.
appearance: Politoed is a bipedal, green frog-like Pokémon with a creamy yellow belly, large red cheek pouches, prominent green hands, and a large, spiraling blue curl on its head.

descriptions.fr: Si Ptitard et Têtarte entendent son cri résonnant, ils répondent en se rassemblant de loin.
descriptions.de: Wenn Quapsel und Quaputzi seinen hallenden Ruf hören, reagieren sie, indem sie von nah und fern zusammenkommen.
descriptions.es: Si Poliwag y Poliwhirl escuchan su grito resonante, responden reuniéndose de todas partes.
descriptions.it: Se Poliwag e Poliwhirl sentono il suo grido echeggiante, rispondono radunandosi da ogni dove.
descriptions.ja: ニョロモやニョロゾがその鳴き声を聞くと、遠くからでも集まってくる。
descriptions.ko: 발챙이와 수륙챙이가 그 울음소리를 들으면, 멀리서도 모여든다.

name: hoppip
description: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.
appearance: Hoppip is a tiny, spherical pink Pokémon with two large green leaves sprouting from its head and two small, stubby feet.

descriptions.fr: Pour éviter d'être emportés par le vent, ils se regroupent en grappes. Cependant, ils apprécient les douces brises.
descriptions.de: Um nicht vom Wind weggeweht zu werden, versammeln sie sich in Gruppen. Sanfte Brisen genießen sie jedoch.
descriptions.es: Para no ser arrastrados por el viento, se agrupan en racimos. Sin embargo, disfrutan de las suaves brisas.
descriptions.it: Per non essere spazzati via dal vento, si radunano in gruppi. Tuttavia, apprezzano le dolci brezze.
descriptions.ja: 風に飛ばされないように、群れで集まって行動する。とはいえ、そよ風は好きらしい。
descriptions.ko: 바람에 날아가지 않도록 무리 지어 모인다. 하지만 잔잔한 바람은 좋아한다.

name: skiploom
description: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluc­ tuates up and down.
appearance: Skiploom is a green, bipedal Pokémon with a light pink bulbous head, two green leaf-like arms, and a large yellow flower with small green leaves on its head.

descriptions.fr: La fleur sur sa tête s'ouvre et se ferme au gré des fluctuations de température.
descriptions.de: Die Blüte auf seinem Kopf öffnet und schließt sich, wenn die Temperatur schwankt.
descriptions.es: La flor en la parte superior de su cabeza se abre y se cierra a medida que la temperatura fluctúa.
descriptions.it: Il fiore sulla sua testa si apre e si chiude al variare della temperatura.
descriptions.ja: 頭の上の花は、気温の上下に合わせて開閉する。
descriptions.ko: 머리 위에 있는 꽃은 기온의 오르내림에 따라 피고 진다.

name: jumpluff
description: Once it catches the wind, it deft­ ly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.
appearance: Jumpluff is a green, bipedal Pokémon with a pink bulbous head, green leafy feet, and three white cotton puffballs: one on its head and one on each of its two elongated arm-like structures.

descriptions.fr: Une fois qu'il a attrapé le vent, il contrôle habilement ses spores de coton pour flotter, même autour du monde.
descriptions.de: Sobald es den Wind erfasst, steuert es geschickt seine Baumwollsporen, um zu schweben, sogar um die ganze Welt.
descriptions.es: Una vez que atrapa el viento, controla hábilmente sus esporas de algodón para flotar, incluso alrededor del mundo.
descriptions.it: Una volta che cattura il vento, controlla abilmente le sue spore di cotone per fluttuare, anche in giro per il mondo.
descriptions.ja: 一度風を捕まえると、綿毛の胞子を巧みに操り、世界中を漂うことができる。
descriptions.ko: 일단 바람을 잡으면, 솜털 포자를 능숙하게 조종하여 전 세계를 떠다닐 수 있다.

name: aipom
description: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.
appearance: Aipom is a purple monkey-like Pokémon with a cream-colored muzzle, large ears, and a long tail that ends in a three-fingered hand.

descriptions.fr: Sa queue est si puissante qu'il peut l'utiliser pour s'accrocher à une branche d'arbre et se maintenir en l'air.
descriptions.de: Sein Schweif ist so kräftig, dass es ihn benutzen kann, um einen Ast zu greifen und sich in der Luft zu halten.
descriptions.es: Su cola es tan poderosa que puede usarla para agarrar la rama de un árbol y sostenerse en el aire.
descriptions.it: La sua coda è così potente che può usarla per afferrare un ramo d'albero e tenersi sospeso in aria.
descriptions.ja: 尻尾はとても力強く、木の枝を掴んで宙にぶら下がることができる。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리는 매우 강력해서 나뭇가지를 붙잡고 공중에 매달릴 수 있다.

name: sunkern
description: It may drop out of the sky suddenly. If attacked by a SPEAROW, it will violently shake its leaves.
appearance: Sunkern is a small, brown, seed-like Pokémon with two large green leaves extending from its head and small, beady black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il peut tomber soudainement du ciel. Attaqué par un Piafabec, il agite violemment ses feuilles.
descriptions.de: Es kann plötzlich vom Himmel fallen. Wird es von einem Habitak angegriffen, schüttelt es seine Blätter heftig.
descriptions.es: Puede caer del cielo de repente. Si un Spearow lo ataca, agita sus hojas violentamente.
descriptions.it: Può cadere improvvisamente dal cielo. Se attaccato da uno Spearow, agita violentemente le sue foglie.
descriptions.ja: 突然空から降ってくることがある。オニスズメに襲われると、激しく葉を震わせる。
descriptions.ko: 갑자기 하늘에서 떨어지는 일이 있다. 깨비참에게 공격받으면 잎을 거세게 흔든다.

name: sunflora
description: It converts sun­ light into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.
appearance: Sunflora is a yellow, sunflower-like Pokémon with large orange and red petals framing its face, small green leaf-like arms, and short green stem-like legs.

descriptions.fr: Il convertit la lumière du soleil en énergie. Dans l'obscurité après le coucher du soleil, il ferme ses pétales et s'immobilise.
descriptions.de: Es wandelt Sonnenlicht in Energie um. In der Dunkelheit nach Sonnenuntergang schließt es seine Blütenblätter und verharrt regungslos.
descriptions.es: Convierte la luz solar en energía. En la oscuridad tras la puesta de sol, cierra sus pétalos y se queda quieto.
descriptions.it: Converte la luce solare in energia. Al buio, dopo il tramonto, chiude i suoi petali e resta immobile.
descriptions.ja: 太陽の光をエネルギーに変換する。日没後の闇の中では、花びらを閉じてじっと動かない。
descriptions.ko: 햇빛을 에너지로 바꾼다. 해가 지고 어두워지면 꽃잎을 닫고 가만히 있는다.

name: yanma
description: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter win­ dows in the area.
appearance: Yanma is a red, dragonfly-like Pokémon with a long segmented tail, four large translucent wings with red tips, and two prominent, multi-faceted black and green compound eyes.

descriptions.fr: S'il bat très vite des ailes, il peut générer des ondes de choc capables de briser les fenêtres aux alentours.
descriptions.de: Wenn es seine Flügel sehr schnell schlägt, kann es Schockwellen erzeugen, die Fenster in der Umgebung zersplittern lassen.
descriptions.es: Si agita las alas muy rápido, puede generar ondas de choque que rompen las ventanas de la zona.
descriptions.it: Se sbatte le ali molto velocemente, può generare onde d'urto in grado di frantumare le finestre della zona.
descriptions.ja: 翼をものすごい速さで羽ばたかせると、周辺の窓ガラスを割るほどの衝撃波を生み出すことができる。
descriptions.ko: 날개를 엄청나게 빠르게 퍼덕이면 주변의 창문을 박살 낼 정도의 충격파를 발생시킬 수 있다.

name: wooper
description: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
appearance: Wooper is a blue, salamander-like Pokémon with a darker blue belly, short stubby legs, and two prominent purple, branch-like gills protruding from each side of its head.

descriptions.fr: Ce POKéMON vit dans l'eau froide. Il quitte l'eau pour chercher de la nourriture quand il fait froid dehors.
descriptions.de: Dieses POKéMON lebt in kaltem Wasser. Es verlässt das Wasser, um Nahrung zu suchen, wenn es draußen kalt wird.
descriptions.es: Este POKéMON vive en aguas frías. Sale del agua en busca de comida cuando hace frío en el exterior.
descriptions.it: Questo POKéMON vive in acque fredde. Lascia l'acqua per cercare cibo quando fuori fa freddo.
descriptions.ja: 冷たい水の中に棲む。外が寒くなると、水中から出てきて餌を探す。
descriptions.ko: 차가운 물속에 산다. 바깥이 추워지면 물속에서 나와 먹이를 찾는다.

name: quagsire
description: This carefree POKéMON has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.
appearance: Quagsire is a light blue, bipedal amphibian-like Pokémon with a darker blue zigzag pattern on its back, large forearms, and two small, fan-like blue frills on its head.

descriptions.fr: Ce POKéMON insouciant a une nature décontractée. En nageant, il heurte toujours les coques des bateaux.
descriptions.de: Dieses sorglose POKéMON ist von unbekümmerter Natur. Beim Schwimmen stößt es immer wieder gegen Bootshüllen.
descriptions.es: Este POKéMON despreocupado tiene una naturaleza tranquila. Mientras nada, siempre choca contra los cascos de los barcos.
descriptions.it: Questo POKéMON spensierato ha una natura tranquilla. Mentre nuota, urta sempre gli scafi delle barche.
descriptions.ja: この のんきな POKéMONは 気楽な性格。泳いでいるといつもボートの船体にぶつかる。
descriptions.ko: 느긋한 성격의 포켓몬이다. 헤엄치다 보면 항상 보트의 선체에 부딪힌다.

name: espeon
description: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its ene­ my's actions.
appearance: Espeon is a sleek, lavender feline Pokémon with large pointed ears, white fur tufts on its chest, a prominent red gem embedded in its forehead, and a long, bifurcated tail.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise la fine fourrure qui recouvre son corps pour sentir les courants aériens et prédire les actions de son ennemi.
descriptions.de: Es nutzt die feinen Haare, die seinen Körper bedecken, um Luftströmungen wahrzunehmen und die Handlungen seiner Gegner vorherzusagen.
descriptions.es: Usa el fino pelo que cubre su cuerpo para sentir las corrientes de aire y predecir las acciones de su enemigo.
descriptions.it: Usa il pelo sottile che gli ricopre il corpo per percepire le correnti d'aria e prevedere le azioni del nemico.
descriptions.ja: 体を覆う細い毛で空気の流れを感じ取り、敵の行動を予測する。
descriptions.ko: 온몸을 덮는 가느다란 털로 공기의 흐름을 감지하여 적의 행동을 예측한다.

name: umbreon
description: When agitated, this POKéMON pro­ tects itself by spraying poisonous sweat from its pores.
appearance: Umbreon is a sleek, black canine Pokémon with glowing red eyes, prominent yellow rings on its forehead, ears, and legs, and a long, dark tail.

descriptions.fr: Quand il est agité, ce POKéMON se protège en projetant une sueur empoisonnée depuis ses pores.
descriptions.de: Wenn es aufgeregt ist, schützt sich dieses POKéMON, indem es giftigen Schweiß aus seinen Poren sprüht.
descriptions.es: Cuando se agita, este POKéMON se protege rociando sudor venenoso de sus poros.
descriptions.it: Quando è agitato, questo POKéMON si protegge spruzzando sudore velenoso dai pori.
descriptions.ja: 興奮すると、この POKéMONは毛穴から毒の汗を噴き出して身を守る。
descriptions.ko: 흥분하면 이 포켓몬은 모공에서 독이 든 땀을 뿜어 몸을 지킨다.

name: murkrow
description: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.
appearance: Murkrow is a black, crow-like Pokémon with prominent red eyes, a yellow beak, a red jagged feather crown on its head, and tattered, broom-like tail feathers.

descriptions.fr: Craigni et détesté par beaucoup, il est censé porter malheur à quiconque le voit la nuit.
descriptions.de: Von vielen gefürchtet und verabscheut, soll es allen Unglück bringen, die es nachts sehen.
descriptions.es: Temido y odiado por muchos, se cree que trae mala suerte a quienes lo ven de noche.
descriptions.it: Temuto e detestato da molti, si crede che porti sfortuna a chiunque lo veda di notte.
descriptions.ja: 多くの者に恐れられ、嫌われている。夜に見た者には不幸が訪れると信じられている。
descriptions.ko: 많은 이들에게 두려움과 미움을 받으며 밤에 목격한 자에게 불행을 가져온다고 알려져 있다.

name: slowking
description: It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.
appearance: Slowking is a pink, bipedal Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, a large spiraling pink and white shell on its head adorned with a red gem, and a yellow ruffled collar around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Il possède un intellect et une intuition incroyables. Quelle que soit la situation, il reste calme et serein.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt einen unglaublichen Intellekt und Intuition. Egal in welcher Situation, es bleibt ruhig und gefasst.
descriptions.es: Posee un intelecto y una intuición increíbles. Sea cual sea la situación, se mantiene calmado y sereno.
descriptions.it: Possiede un intelletto e un'intuizione incredibili. Qualunque sia la situazione, rimane calmo e raccolto.
descriptions.ja: 驚くべき知性と直感力を持つ。どんな状況でも、冷静沈着だ。
descriptions.ko: 놀라운 지성과 직감력을 지녔다. 어떤 상황에서도 침착하고 냉정함을 유지한다.

name: misdreavus
description: It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.
appearance: Misdreavus is a grey, spherical-headed ghost Pokémon with large red eyes, a jagged mouth, yellow beaded necklace-like markings, and a long, flowing, purple lower body adorned with several red orbs.

descriptions.fr: Il aime jouer des tours malicieux, comme crier et gémir pour effrayer les gens la nuit.
descriptions.de: Es spielt gerne schelmische Streiche, wie Schreien und Heulen, um Menschen nachts zu erschrecken.
descriptions.es: Le gusta jugar trucos traviesos como gritar y lamentarse para asustar a la gente por la noche.
descriptions.it: Gli piace giocare brutti scherzi, come urlare e lamentarsi per spaventare le persone di notte.
descriptions.ja: 夜中に叫び声やうめき声を出して人を驚かすなど、いたずらをするのが好き。
descriptions.ko: 밤에 비명이나 신음소리를 내서 사람들을 놀라게 하는 짓궂은 장난을 즐긴다.

name: unown
description: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tab­ lets. It is said that the two are somehow related.
appearance: Unown is a thin, flat, black glyph-like Pokémon with a single large white eye, whose body is shaped like various letters of the Latin alphabet or punctuation marks.

descriptions.fr: Leurs formes ressemblent à des hiéroglyphes sur d'anciennes tablettes. On dit qu'ils sont liés d'une manière ou d'une autre.
descriptions.de: Ihre Formen ähneln Hieroglyphen auf alten Tafeln. Es wird gesagt, dass die beiden in irgendeiner Weise miteinander verbunden sind.
descriptions.es: Sus formas recuerdan a jeroglíficos de tablillas antiguas. Se dice que ambos están relacionados de algún modo.
descriptions.it: Le loro forme somigliano a geroglifici su antiche tavolette. Si dice che i due siano in qualche modo collegati.
descriptions.ja: そのすがたは　いにしえの　せきばんに　きざまれた　ひえろぐりふに　にている。なにか　かんけいがあるのではと　いわれている。
descriptions.ko: 그 모습은 고대의 석판에 새겨진 상형문자와 닮았다. 뭔가 관계가 있는 것은 아닐까 하고 말해지고 있다.

name: wobbuffet
description: It hates light and shock. If attack­ ed, it inflates its body to pump up its counter­ strike.
appearance: Wobbuffet is a large, blue, sac-like Pokémon with a wide red-lipped smile, white beady eyes, a black dot on its chest, and a slender black tail that ends in two prominent black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il déteste la lumière et les chocs. S'il est attaqué, il gonfle son corps pour préparer sa contre-attaque.
descriptions.de: Es hasst Licht und Erschütterungen. Wird es angegriffen, bläht es seinen Körper auf, um seinen Gegenschlag vorzubereiten.
descriptions.es: Odia la luz y los golpes. Si le atacan, hincha su cuerpo para preparar su contraataque.
descriptions.it: Odia la luce e gli urti. Se attaccato, gonfia il corpo per preparare il suo contrattacco.
descriptions.ja: ひかりと　しょうげきを　きらう。　おそわれると　からだを　ふくらませて　はんげきに　そなえる。
descriptions.ko: 빛과 충격을 싫어한다. 공격당하면 몸을 부풀려서 반격에 대비한다.

name: girafarig
description: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent and bite.
appearance: Girafarig is a yellow, giraffe-like Pokémon with brown spots, a pink mane, a long neck, and dark brown, zebra-striped hindquarters that culminate in a short, black, two-eyed head-like tail.

descriptions.fr: Sa queue possède un petit cerveau indépendant. Attention ! Si vous l'approchez, elle pourrait réagir à votre odeur et mordre.
descriptions.de: Sein Schwanz hat ein eigenes kleines Gehirn. Vorsicht! Kommt man ihm zu nahe, könnte es auf den Geruch reagieren und beißen.
descriptions.es: Su cola posee un pequeño cerebro propio. ¡Cuidado! Si te acercas, podría reaccionar a tu olor y morder.
descriptions.it: La sua coda ha un piccolo cervello autonomo. Attenzione! Se ti avvicini, potrebbe reagire al tuo odore e mordere.
descriptions.ja: しっぽに　ちいさな　のうみそが　ある。　ちかづくと　においに　はんのうして　かみつくので　きをつけよう。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리에 작은 뇌가 있다. 가까이 가면 냄새에 반응해서 물어뜯으니 조심하자.

name: pineco
description: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.
appearance: Pineco is a dark blue, pinecone-like Pokémon with two small black eyes, a spikey, ridged top, and a prominent black circular opening on its front.

descriptions.fr: Il aime épaissir sa coquille en y ajoutant des couches d'écorce. Le poids supplémentaire ne le dérange pas.
descriptions.de: Es verdickt gerne seine Schale, indem es Baumrinde hinzufügt. Das zusätzliche Gewicht stört es nicht.
descriptions.es: Le gusta hacer su caparazón más grueso añadiendo capas de corteza. El peso adicional no le molesta.
descriptions.it: Ama ispessire il suo guscio aggiungendo strati di corteccia d'albero. Il peso aggiuntivo non lo disturba.
descriptions.ja: きの　かわなどを　からだに　つけくわえ　かくを　ぶあつく　するのを　このむ。おもくなっても　へいき。
descriptions.ko: 나무껍질 등을 몸에 붙여 껍질을 두껍게 만드는 것을 좋아한다. 무거워져도 괜찮다.

name: forretress
description: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery.
appearance: Forretress is a large, spherical, red Pokémon encased in a gray, segmented metallic shell, featuring multiple stubby cannon-like appendages, small black eyes, and a visible black interior.

descriptions.fr: Son corps entier est protégé par une carapace dure comme l'acier. Ce qui se cache à l'intérieur de l'armure est un mystère total.
descriptions.de: Sein ganzer Körper ist von einer stahlharten Schale geschützt. Was sich im Inneren der Rüstung verbirgt, ist ein völliges Geheimnis.
descriptions.es: Todo su cuerpo está protegido por un caparazón duro como el acero. Lo que se esconde dentro de la armadura es un misterio total.
descriptions.it: Il suo intero corpo è protetto da un guscio duro come l'acciaio. Ciò che si cela all'interno dell'armatura è un mistero totale.
descriptions.ja: からだじゅうが　はがねのように　かたい　からで　おおわれている。　その　よろい　の　なかに　なにが　ひそんでいるかは　いっさい　ふめい。
descriptions.ko: 온몸이 강철처럼 단단한 껍질로 덮여 있다. 그 갑옷 안에 무엇이 숨어있는지는 전혀 불명.

name: dunsparce
description: When spotted, this POKéMON escapes backward by furi­ ously boring into the ground with its tail.
appearance: Dunsparce is a cream-colored, serpentine Pokémon with blue stripes along its back, two small white wings, a prominent drill-like tail, and beady black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Quand il est repéré, ce POKéMON s'enfuit à reculons en creusant furieusement la terre avec sa queue.
descriptions.de: Wird es entdeckt, flüchtet dieses POKéMON rückwärts, indem es sich wütend mit seinem Schwanz in den Boden bohrt.
descriptions.es: Cuando lo avistan, este POKéMON escapa hacia atrás excavando furiosamente el suelo con su cola.
descriptions.it: Quando viene avvistato, questo POKéMON scappa all'indietro scavando furiosamente nel terreno con la sua coda.
descriptions.ja: みつかってしまうと　しっぽを　つかい　もうれつな　いきおいで　じめんを　ほりすすみ　うしろむきに　にげていく。
descriptions.ko: 발견되면 꼬리를 사용해 맹렬한 기세로 땅을 파고들어 뒤로 도망간다.

name: gligar
description: It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the star­ tled victim to inject poison.
appearance: Gligar is a purple, scorpion-like Pokémon with large red eyes, prominent pincers, blue wing membranes stretching between its limbs, and a segmented tail ending in a sharp stinger.

descriptions.fr: Il vole droit vers le visage de sa cible, puis s'accroche à la victime surprise pour injecter du poison.
descriptions.de: Es fliegt direkt auf das Gesicht seines Ziels zu und klammert sich dann an das überraschte Opfer, um Gift zu injizieren.
descriptions.es: Vuela directamente a la cara de su objetivo y luego se aferra a la víctima sorprendida para inyectar veneno.
descriptions.it: Vola dritto verso il viso del suo bersaglio, poi si aggrappa alla vittima sorpresa per iniettare veleno.
descriptions.ja: まっすぐに　めがけて　とびかかり　おどろいた　あいてに　きばを　くいこませて　どくを　ながしこむ。
descriptions.ko: 똑바로 목표를 향해 달려들어 놀란 상대에게 엄니를 박아 독을 주입한다.

name: steelix
description: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.
appearance: Steelix is an extremely long, segmented, metallic gray serpent-like Pokémon with a large, jagged rock-like head, prominent lower jaw, and sharp, imposing facial features.

descriptions.fr: On pense que son corps s'est transformé à la suite de l'accumulation de fer en son intérieur, provenant de la terre qu'il avale.
descriptions.de: Man nimmt an, dass sein Körper sich durch die innere Ansammlung von Eisen, das es durch das Verschlucken von Erde aufnimmt, verwandelt hat.
descriptions.es: Se cree que su cuerpo se transformó como resultado de la acumulación interna de hierro al tragar tierra.
descriptions.it: Si pensa che il suo corpo si sia trasformato a causa dell'accumulo interno di ferro, derivante dall'ingestione di terreno.
descriptions.ja: つちを　たべることで　からだの　なかに　てつぶんが　たまり　その　けっか　からだが　へんかしのだと　かんがえられている。
descriptions.ko: 흙을 먹는 것으로 몸속에 철분이 쌓여 그 결과 몸이 변화한 것이라고 생각되고 있다.

name: snubbull
description: Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women.
appearance: Snubbull is a pink, bulldog-like Pokémon with prominent fangs protruding from its upper jaw, a black nose, a blue studded collar, and a blue patterned skirt-like marking around its waist.

descriptions.fr: Bien qu'il ait l'air effrayant, il est en réalité gentil et affectueux. Il est très populaire auprès des femmes.
descriptions.de: Obwohl es furchterregend aussieht, ist es eigentlich freundlich und anhänglich. Es ist bei Frauen sehr beliebt.
descriptions.es: Aunque parece aterrador, en realidad es amable y afectuoso. Es muy popular entre las mujeres.
descriptions.it: Sebbene sembri spaventoso, in realtà è gentile e affettuoso. È molto popolare tra le donne.
descriptions.ja: みためは　こわいが　じつは　やさしく　ひとになつく。　とくに　じょせいに　にんきが　たかい。
descriptions.ko: 겉모습은 무섭지만 사실은 상냥하고 사람을 잘 따른다. 특히 여성들에게 인기가 많다.

name: granbull
description: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If at­ tacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker.
appearance: Granbull is a large, purple, bulldog-like Pokémon with powerful jaws, two prominent lower fangs, a black nose, large drooping ears, a small pink patterned skirt-like marking, and a studded black collar.

descriptions.fr: Il est en fait timide et facilement effrayé. S'il est attaqué, il se débat pour repousser son agresseur.
descriptions.de: Es ist eigentlich schüchtern und leicht zu erschrecken. Wird es angegriffen, schlägt es wild um sich, um seinen Angreifer abzuwehren.
descriptions.es: En realidad es tímido y se asusta fácilmente. Si le atacan, se agita violentamente para defenderse de su agresor.
descriptions.it: In realtà è timido e si spaventa facilmente. Se attaccato, si dimena per respingere il suo aggressore.
descriptions.ja: じつは　おくびょうで　おどろきやすい。　おそわれると　てきを　おいかえそうと　おおあばれする。
descriptions.ko: 사실은 겁쟁이에 잘 놀란다. 공격당하면 적을 물리치려 폭동을 부린다.

name: qwilfish
description: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.
appearance: A round, light blue pufferfish-like Pokémon covered in numerous sharp white spikes, with a dark blue spiny dorsal fin and two dark blue pectoral fins, and prominent white lips.

descriptions.fr: Pour lancer ses piquants empoisonnés, il doit gonfler son corps en buvant plus de 10 litres d'eau d'un seul coup.
descriptions.de: Um seine Giftstacheln abzufeuern, muss es seinen Körper aufblähen, indem es auf einmal über 10 Liter Wasser trinkt.
descriptions.es: Para disparar sus púas venenosas, debe inflar su cuerpo bebiendo de una sola vez más de 10 litros de agua.
descriptions.it: Per sparare le sue spine velenose, deve gonfiare il suo corpo bevendo più di 10 litri d'acqua in una sola volta.
descriptions.ja: 毒のトゲを飛ばすために、一度に10リットル以上の水を飲んで体を膨らませる必要がある。
descriptions.ko: 독침을 발사하기 위해 한 번에 10리터 이상의 물을 마셔 몸을 부풀린다.

name: scizor
description: It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.
appearance: A red, bipedal insectoid Pokémon with a sleek metallic body, large red pincer-like claws featuring a black circular marking on the inner palm, black segments on its waist, and two pairs of translucent wings on its back.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est dur comme de l'acier. Il intimide ses ennemis en brandissant ses pinces ornées de motifs oculaires.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt einen stahlharten Körper. Feinde schüchtert es ein, indem es seine Scheren mit den Augenmustern hochhebt.
descriptions.es: Tiene un cuerpo duro como el acero. Intimida a sus enemigos levantando sus pinzas con patrones oculares.
descriptions.it: Ha un corpo duro come l'acciaio. Intimorisce i nemici sollevando le sue chele a forma di occhi.
descriptions.ja: 鋼鉄の体を持つ。目玉模様のハサミを振り上げて、敵を威嚇する。
descriptions.ko: 강철처럼 단단한 몸을 가지고 있다. 눈알 무늬의 집게를 치켜들어 적을 위협한다.

name: shuckle
description: The BERRIES it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.
appearance: A yellow worm-like creature residing within a hard, red, multi-sectioned shell with several holes, featuring a light blue head with two large white eyes and two small antennae.

descriptions.fr: Les BAIES qu'il stocke dans sa carapace en forme de vase se décomposent et deviennent un liquide gluant.
descriptions.de: Die BEEREN, die es in seinem vasenartigen Panzer aufbewahrt, zersetzen sich und werden zu einer klebrigen Flüssigkeit.
descriptions.es: Las BAYAS que guarda en su caparazón con forma de jarrón se descomponen y se convierten en un líquido pegajoso.
descriptions.it: Le BACCHE che immagazzina nel suo guscio a forma di vaso si decompongono e diventano un liquido appiccicoso.
descriptions.ja: 壺のような殻に蓄えたきのみは腐敗して、どろどろの液体になる。
descriptions.ko: 항아리 같은 등껍질에 저장한 열매는 분해되어 끈적한 액체가 된다.

name: heracross
description: It is usually docile, but if it is disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.
appearance: A large, blue beetle-like Pokémon with a prominent dark blue rhinoceros-like horn extending from its head, two large yellow eyes, and two pairs of translucent wings on its back.

descriptions.fr: Il est généralement docile, mais s'il est dérangé pendant qu'il sirote du miel, il pourchasse l'intrus avec sa corne.
descriptions.de: Es ist meist friedlich, doch wenn es beim Honignaschen gestört wird, jagt es den Eindringling mit seinem Horn fort.
descriptions.es: Suele ser dócil, pero si se le molesta mientras sorbe miel, persigue al intruso con su cuerno.
descriptions.it: Di solito è docile, ma se viene disturbato mentre sorseggia miele, insegue l'intruso con il suo corno.
descriptions.ja: 普段はおとなしいが、蜜を吸っているときに邪魔されると、ツノで侵入者を追い払う。
descriptions.ko: 평소에는 온순하지만 꿀을 빨아먹을 때 방해받으면 뿔로 침입자를 쫓아낸다.

name: sneasel
description: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.
appearance: A slender, dark purple weasel-like Pokémon with sharp white claws, a red jewel on its forehead, a pair of large yellow oval eyes, and a single black-tipped feather on its left ear.

descriptions.fr: Ses pattes dissimulent des griffes acérées. Si attaqué, il déploie soudainement ses griffes et surprend son ennemi.
descriptions.de: Seine Pfoten verbergen scharfe Krallen. Wird es angegriffen, streckt es die Krallen plötzlich aus und erschreckt seinen Gegner.
descriptions.es: Sus patas ocultan afiladas garras. Si es atacado, extiende de repente las garras y sobresalta a su enemigo.
descriptions.it: Le sue zampe nascondono affilati artigli. Se attaccato, estende improvvisamente gli artigli e spaventa il suo nemico.
descriptions.ja: 鋭いツメを隠し持っている。襲われると、突然ツメを伸ばして敵を驚かせる。
descriptions.ko: 날카로운 발톱을 숨기고 있다. 공격받으면 갑자기 발톱을 뻗어 적을 놀라게 한다.

name: teddiursa
description: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey.
appearance: A small, bipedal, light brown bear cub with a cream-colored crescent moon marking on its forehead, large cream-colored ear insides, and a small white paw pad on each of its three-toed feet.

descriptions.fr: S'il trouve du miel, sa marque en croissant brille. Il lèche toujours ses pattes car elles sont imprégnées de miel.
descriptions.de: Findet es Honig, leuchtet sein Halbmondzeichen. Es leckt sich stets die mit Honig getränkten Pfoten.
descriptions.es: Si encuentra miel, su marca en forma de luna creciente brilla. Siempre se lame las patas porque están empapadas de miel.
descriptions.it: Se trova del miele, il suo marchio a forma di mezzaluna brilla. Si lecca sempre le zampe perché sono intrise di miele.
descriptions.ja: 蜂蜜を見つけると、三日月マークが輝く。いつも蜂蜜でベトベトの自分の手足をなめている。
descriptions.ko: 꿀을 찾으면 초승달 무늬가 빛난다. 늘 꿀투성이인 자신의 발을 핥고 있다.

name: ursaring
description: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen BERRIES.
appearance: A large, bipedal, dark brown bear with a prominent yellow ring marking on its belly, large claws on its paws, and a short, tufted tail.

descriptions.fr: Bien qu'il soit bon grimpeur, il préfère casser des arbres avec ses pattes avant pour manger les BAIES tombées.
descriptions.de: Obwohl es gut klettern kann, zieht es es vor, Bäume mit seinen Vorderbeinen zu zerbrechen und die heruntergefallenen BEEREN zu fressen.
descriptions.es: Aunque es un buen trepador, prefiere romper árboles con sus patas delanteras y comer las BAYAS caídas.
descriptions.it: Sebbene sia un bravo arrampicatore, preferisce spezzare gli alberi con le zampe anteriori e mangiare le BACCHE cadute.
descriptions.ja: 木登りは得意だが、前足で木を折って落ちた木の実を食べるのを好む。
descriptions.ko: 나무 타기를 잘하지만 앞발로 나무를 꺾어 떨어지는 열매를 먹는 것을 더 좋아한다.

name: slugma
description: It never sleeps. It has to keep moving because if it stopped, its magma body would cool and harden.
appearance: A molten slug-like Pokémon composed entirely of bright red magma, with two large yellow eyes and a slightly hardened rock-like head.

descriptions.fr: Il ne dort jamais. Il doit rester en mouvement car s'il s'arrêtait, son corps de magma refroidirait et durcirait.
descriptions.de: Es schläft nie. Es muss sich ständig bewegen, denn wenn es anhielte, würde sein Magmakörper abkühlen und erstarren.
descriptions.es: Nunca duerme. Tiene que seguir moviéndose porque si se detuviera, su cuerpo de magma se enfriaría y endurecería.
descriptions.it: Non dorme mai. Deve continuare a muoversi perché se si fermasse, il suo corpo di magma si raffredderebbe e indurirebbe.
descriptions.ja: 決して眠らない。止まってしまうと、マグマの体が冷えて固まってしまうため、常に動き続けなければならない。
descriptions.ko: 절대 잠들지 않는다. 멈추면 마그마 몸이 식어 굳어버리기 때문에 계속 움직여야 한다.

name: magcargo
description: The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch.
appearance: A snail-like Pokémon with a body of bright red magma and a hardened, spiraling grey volcanic rock shell from which smoke continuously emanates, and two large yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: La carapace sur son dos n'est que de la peau refroidie et durcie. Elle se brise facilement au moindre contact.
descriptions.de: Der Panzer auf seinem Rücken ist lediglich Haut, die abgekühlt und hart geworden ist. Er zerbricht leicht bei der kleinsten Berührung.
descriptions.es: El caparazón de su espalda es solo piel que se ha enfriado y endurecido. Se rompe fácilmente con un ligero toque.
descriptions.it: Il guscio sulla sua schiena è solo pelle che si è raffreddata e indurita. Si rompe facilmente con un leggero tocco.
descriptions.ja: 背中の殻は、冷え固まった皮膚にすぎない。わずかな接触でも簡単に砕け散る。
descriptions.ko: 등껍데기는 식어 굳어진 피부일 뿐이다. 약간의 접촉에도 쉽게 부서진다.

name: swinub
description: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.
appearance: A small, stout, brown pig-like Pokémon covered in shaggy dark brown fur, with a large pink snout, small black eyes, and short legs.

descriptions.fr: Il frotte son groin sur le sol pour trouver et déterrer de la nourriture. Il découvre parfois des sources chaudes.
descriptions.de: Es reibt seine Schnauze am Boden, um Nahrung zu finden und auszugraben. Manchmal entdeckt es heiße Quellen.
descriptions.es: Frota su hocico en el suelo para encontrar y desenterrar comida. A veces descubre aguas termales.
descriptions.it: Sfrega il suo muso sul terreno per trovare e dissotterrare cibo. A volte scopre sorgenti termali.
descriptions.ja: 鼻先を地面にこすりつけて、エサを見つけて掘り出す。時々、温泉を発見することがある。
descriptions.ko: 코를 땅에 비비며 먹이를 찾아서 파낸다. 가끔 온천을 발견하기도 한다.

name: piloswine
description: Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal, shaggy brown mammoth-like Pokémon covered in long dark brown fur, with two long white tusks curving upwards, and small beady black eyes that are often obscured by its fur.

descriptions.fr: Ses longs poils recouvrent sa vue. Il ne cesse de charger ses ennemis sans les voir.
descriptions.de: Seine langen Haare verdecken ihm die Sicht, sodass es immer wieder im Zickzack vorwärts stürmt.
descriptions.es: Su tupido y largo pelo le cubre los ojos. Por ello, ataca sin cesar a lo loco.
descriptions.it: I lunghi peli che gli ricoprono il corpo gli impediscono di vedere, per cui carica a ripetizione.
descriptions.ja: 全身の 長い毛が 視界を ふさぐので くり返し 突進を 続ける。
descriptions.ko: 온몸의 긴 털 때문에 시야가 가려져 반복해서 돌진한다.

name: corsola
description: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.
appearance: A small, pink coral-like Pokémon with multiple branched white coral growths protruding from its back and head, two small black eyes, and a small mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il perd et régénère sans cesse ses cornes. La pointe de sa tête est convoitée pour sa beauté.
descriptions.de: Es stößt ständig Geweihe ab und bildet neue. Die Spitze seines Kopfes ist wegen ihrer Schönheit ein wertvoller Schatz.
descriptions.es: Se deshace y regenera sus cuernos sin cesar. La punta de su cabeza es muy apreciada por su belleza.
descriptions.it: Perde e rigenera le sue corna senza sosta. La punta della sua testa è considerata un tesoro per la sua bellezza.
descriptions.ja: 絶えず 脱皮して 成長する。 頭の先は その美しさから 珍重される。
descriptions.ko: 끊임없이 탈피하고 성장한다. 머리 끝은 그 아름다움 때문에 보물로 여겨진다.

name: remoraid
description: It has superb ac­ curacy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet.
appearance: A light blue fish-like Pokémon resembling a revolver, with a grey dorsal fin, two small black eyes, and a distinct white mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il a une précision hors pair. L'eau qu'il crache peut toucher une proie en mouvement à plus de 90 mètres.
descriptions.de: Seine Treffsicherheit ist erstaunlich. Es kann mit dem Wasserstrahl, den es abfeuert, bewegliche Ziele aus über 90 Metern Entfernung treffen.
descriptions.es: Tiene una puntería excelente. El agua que dispara puede alcanzar presas en movimiento a más de 90 metros de distancia.
descriptions.it: Ha una precisione superba. L'acqua che spara può colpire una preda in movimento da oltre 90 metri.
descriptions.ja: 優れた 命中率を 誇る。 撃ち出す 水は 90メートル以上 離れた 動く獲物にも 命中する。
descriptions.ko: 뛰어난 명중률을 자랑한다. 쏘아내는 물은 90m 이상 떨어진 움직이는 먹이도 명중시킨다.

name: octillery
description: It traps enemies with its suction- cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head.
appearance: A red octopus-like Pokémon with a large, bulbous head, eight suction-cup-covered tentacles, and two large yellow eyes, with a cannon-like snout.

descriptions.fr: Il piège ses ennemis avec ses ventouses puis les frappe avec sa tête dure comme de la pierre.
descriptions.de: Es fängt Gegner mit seinen Saugnapf-Tentakeln und zerschmettert sie dann mit seinem steinharten Kopf.
descriptions.es: Atrapa a sus enemigos con sus tentáculos de ventosa y luego los aplasta con su cabeza dura como una roca.
descriptions.it: Intrappola i nemici con i tentacoli a ventosa e poi li schiaccia con la sua testa dura come la roccia.
descriptions.ja: 吸盤つきの 触手で 敵を捕まえ 岩のように 硬い 頭で 叩きつける。
descriptions.ko: 빨판 달린 촉수로 적을 잡은 뒤 바위처럼 단단한 머리로 내리친다.

name: delibird
description: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.
appearance: A red and white penguin-like bird Pokémon with a large white belly, a red body, a yellow beak, and a large red sack-like tail that it uses to carry food.

descriptions.fr: Il transporte de la nourriture toute la journée. La légende dit qu'il a sauvé des gens perdus en leur donnant de la nourriture.
descriptions.de: Es trägt den ganzen Tag lang Futter bei sich. Es gibt Geschichten über verirrte Menschen, die durch seine Nahrung gerettet wurden.
descriptions.es: Lleva comida todo el día. Hay historias sobre personas perdidas que fueron salvadas por la comida que tenía.
descriptions.it: Trasporta cibo per tutto il giorno. Si racconta di persone disperse salvate dal cibo che aveva con sé.
descriptions.ja: １日中 エサを 運んでいる。 迷子になった 人が 助けられたという 話が 残っている。
descriptions.ko: 하루 종일 먹이를 나른다. 조난당한 사람을 가지고 있던 먹이로 구해줬다는 이야기가 남아 있다.

name: mantine
description: As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if REMORAID attach to it for scavenging its leftovers.
appearance: A large, flat, dark blue manta ray-like Pokémon with a white underside, two large white spots on its back, a small dark blue tail, and two white antennae-like structures on its head.

descriptions.fr: Alors qu'il nage majestueusement, il ne se soucie pas des Rémoraid qui s'accrochent à lui pour se nourrir de ses restes.
descriptions.de: Während es majestätisch schwimmt, kümmert es sich nicht darum, ob REMORAID sich an ihm festhalten, um seine Reste zu fressen.
descriptions.es: Mientras nada majestuosamente, no le importa si los REMORAID se adhieren a él para alimentarse de sus restos.
descriptions.it: Mentre nuota maestosamente, non si preoccupa dei REMORAID che si attaccano a lui per nutrirsi dei suoi avanzi.
descriptions.ja: 優雅に泳ぐ間、テッポウオが残飯を漁るためにくっついてきても気にしない。
descriptions.ko: 우아하게 헤엄치는 동안, 총어들이 자신의 남은 먹이를 찾으러 붙어도 신경 쓰지 않는다.

name: skarmory
description: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.
appearance: A large, silver, metallic bird-like Pokémon with sharp steel wings, a long, segmented neck, red eyes, and sharp, three-toed talons.

descriptions.fr: Ses ailes robustes semblent lourdes, mais elles sont en fait creuses et légères, ce qui lui permet de voler librement dans le ciel.
descriptions.de: Seine robusten Flügel sehen schwer aus, sind aber tatsächlich hohl und leicht, was ihm ermöglicht, frei am Himmel zu fliegen.
descriptions.es: Sus alas robustas parecen pesadas, pero en realidad son huecas y ligeras, lo que le permite volar libremente por el cielo.
descriptions.it: Le sue robuste ali sembrano pesanti, ma in realtà sono cave e leggere, permettendogli di volare liberamente nel cielo.
descriptions.ja: 丈夫な 翼は 重そうに 見えるが 実は 中が 空洞で 軽く 空を 自由に 飛び回れる。
descriptions.ko: 튼튼한 날개는 무거워 보이지만 실제로는 속이 비어 가벼워 하늘을 자유롭게 날아다닌다.

name: houndour
description: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal, dark grey dog-like Pokémon with bone-like white markings around its neck and on its back, a red collar-like marking, and small red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise différents types de cris pour communiquer avec les siens et pour poursuivre sa proie.
descriptions.de: Es benutzt verschiedene Arten von Schreien, um mit Artgenossen zu kommunizieren und um seine Beute zu jagen.
descriptions.es: Utiliza diferentes tipos de ladridos para comunicarse con los de su especie y para perseguir a su presa.
descriptions.it: Utilizza diversi tipi di versi per comunicare con gli altri della sua specie e per inseguire le prede.
descriptions.ja: 仲間と コミュニケーションを とるためと 獲物を 追い詰めるため 違う 鳴き声を 使い分ける。
descriptions.ko: 동료와 의사소통하기 위해서 그리고 먹이를 몰아붙이기 위해서 다른 울음소리를 사용한다.

name: houndoom
description: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.
appearance: A larger, quadrupedal, dark grey dog-like Pokémon with bone-like white markings resembling ribs and a collar, a ridged horn on its head, and a pointed tail with a bone-like tip.

descriptions.fr: Si vous êtes brûlé par les flammes qu'il crache de sa bouche, la douleur ne disparaîtra jamais.
descriptions.de: Wenn man von den Flammen verbrannt wird, die es aus seinem Mund speit, wird der Schmerz niemals vergehen.
descriptions.es: Si te quemas con las llamas que dispara de su boca, el dolor nunca desaparecerá.
descriptions.it: Se sei bruciato dalle fiamme che spara dalla sua bocca, il dolore non svanirà mai.
descriptions.ja: 口から 吐く 炎で 焼かれると 永遠に 痛みが 消えないと いわれている。
descriptions.ko: 입에서 내뿜는 불꽃에 타면 영원히 고통이 가시지 않는다고 한다.

name: kingdra
description: It is said that it usually hides in underwater caves. It can create whirlpools by yawning.
appearance: A sleek, dark blue seahorse-dragon-like Pokémon with a large, spiraled snout, light blue fins resembling a fan on its head and back, and a crown-like formation on its head.

descriptions.fr: On dit qu'il se cache habituellement dans des grottes sous-marines. Il peut créer des tourbillons en bâillant.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, es versteckt sich gewöhnlich in Unterwasserhöhlen. Es kann Strudel erzeugen, indem es gähnt.
descriptions.es: Se dice que suele esconderse en cuevas submarinas. Puede crear remolinos al bostezar.
descriptions.it: Si dice che di solito si nasconda in caverne sottomarine. Può creare vortici sbadigliando.
descriptions.ja: ふだんは 海底の 洞窟に 潜んでいると いわれる。 あくびを するだけで 渦潮を 起こす。
descriptions.ko: 평소에는 해저 동굴에 숨어 있다고 알려졌다. 하품하는 것만으로 소용돌이를 일으킨다.

name: phanpy
description: It swings its long snout around play­ fully, but because it is so strong, that can be dan­ gerous.
appearance: A small, round, light blue elephant-like Pokémon with large floppy ears, a short trunk, and a single red spot on each cheek.

descriptions.fr: Il balance sa longue trompe avec espièglerie, mais comme il est très fort, cela peut être dangereux.
descriptions.de: Es schwingt seinen langen Rüssel spielerisch herum, doch aufgrund seiner Stärke kann dies gefährlich sein.
descriptions.es: Balancea su larga trompa juguetonamente, pero debido a su fuerza, esto puede ser peligroso.
descriptions.it: Agita la sua lunga proboscide in modo giocoso, ma dato che è così forte, può essere pericoloso.
descriptions.ja: 長い鼻を振り回して遊ぶが、その力はとても強く、危険になることもある。
descriptions.ko: 긴 코를 휘두르며 노는 모습은 장난스러워 보이지만, 매우 강하기 때문에 위험할 수 있다.

name: donphan
description: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.
appearance: A large, grey elephant-like Pokémon with thick, grey, ridged skin, two large white tusks, and a long trunk, with tire-like markings on its legs.

descriptions.fr: Il possède des défenses acérées et dures ainsi qu'une peau robuste. Son TACKLE est assez puissant pour démolir une maison.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt scharfe, harte Stoßzähne und eine raue Haut. Sein TACKLE ist stark genug, um ein Haus einzureißen.
descriptions.es: Tiene colmillos afilados y duros, además de una piel resistente. Su TACKLE es lo suficientemente fuerte como para derribar una casa.
descriptions.it: Ha zanne affilate e dure e una pelle robusta. Il suo AZZANNODURO è abbastanza forte da abbattere una casa.
descriptions.ja: 鋭く硬いキバと、頑丈な皮膚を持つ。そのたいあたりは家を一軒倒すほど強力。
descriptions.ko: 날카롭고 단단한 엄니와 튼튼한 가죽을 가지고 있다. 몸통박치기는 집 한 채를 무너뜨릴 정도로 강력하다.

name: porygon2
description: This upgraded version of PORYGON is designed for space exploration. It can't fly, though.
appearance: A smooth, pink, geometric Pokémon with a rounded body, two short blue legs, a large blue circular tail, and a single blue eye in the center of its head.

descriptions.fr: Cette version améliorée de PORYGON est conçue pour l'exploration spatiale. Cependant, il ne peut pas voler.
descriptions.de: Diese verbesserte Version von PORYGON wurde für die Weltraumerkundung entwickelt. Es kann jedoch nicht fliegen.
descriptions.es: Esta versión mejorada de PORYGON está diseñada para la exploración espacial. Sin embargo, no puede volar.
descriptions.it: Questa versione potenziata di PORYGON è progettata per l'esplorazione spaziale. Non può volare, però.
descriptions.ja: PORYGONの強化版で、宇宙探査のために設計された。しかし、飛ぶことはできない。
descriptions.ko: PORYGON의 강화판으로, 우주 탐사를 위해 설계되었다. 하지만 날지는 못한다.

name: stantler
description: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where real­ ity is distorted.
appearance: A brown deer-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, two large, dark brown, spiraled antlers, and a small, pointed tail.

descriptions.fr: Ses bois incurvés modifient subtilement le flux d'air pour créer un espace étrange où la réalité est déformée.
descriptions.de: Seine gekrümmten Geweihe verändern subtil den Luftstrom, um einen seltsamen Raum zu schaffen, in dem die Realität verzerrt ist.
descriptions.es: Sus astas curvadas modifican sutilmente el flujo de aire para crear un espacio extraño donde la realidad se distorsiona.
descriptions.it: Le sue corna ricurve alterano sottilmente il flusso d'aria per creare uno spazio strano dove la realtà è distorta.
descriptions.ja: 湾曲したツノは、空気の流れを微妙に変化させ、現実がゆがむ不思議な空間を作り出す。
descriptions.ko: 휘어진 뿔은 공기의 흐름을 미묘하게 변화시켜 현실이 일그러지는 이상한 공간을 만들어낸다.

name: smeargle
description: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.
appearance: A bipedal, cream-colored beagle-like Pokémon with a large green painter's cap on its head, a long brown tail with a green tip that resembles a paintbrush, and a mischievous expression.

descriptions.fr: Un fluide spécial suinte de l'extrémité de sa queue. Il peint ce fluide partout pour marquer son territoire.
descriptions.de: Eine spezielle Flüssigkeit tritt aus der Spitze seines Schweifes aus. Es malt die Flüssigkeit überall hin, um sein Territorium zu markieren.
descriptions.es: Un fluido especial rezuma de la punta de su cola. Pinta con este fluido por todas partes para marcar su territorio.
descriptions.it: Un fluido speciale cola dalla punta della sua coda. Lo dipinge ovunque per marcare il suo territorio.
descriptions.ja: 尻尾の先から特殊な液体が滲み出る。その液体をそこらじゅうに塗って、自分の縄張りを主張する。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리 끝에서 특수한 액체가 스며 나온다. 그 액체를 이곳저곳에 발라 자신의 영역을 주장한다.

name: tyrogue
description: It is always bursting with en­ ergy. To make it­ self stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.
appearance: A small, bipedal, light purple humanoid Pokémon with large white hands, three toes on each foot, and a determined expression.

descriptions.fr: Il déborde toujours d'énergie. Pour se renforcer, il continue de se battre même s'il perd.
descriptions.de: Es strotzt immer vor Energie. Um stärker zu werden, kämpft es weiter, selbst wenn es verliert.
descriptions.es: Siempre está rebosante de energía. Para hacerse más fuerte, sigue luchando incluso si pierde.
descriptions.it: Scintilla sempre di energia. Per rendersi più forte, continua a combattere anche se perde.
descriptions.ja: いつもエネルギーが満ち溢れている。強くなるため、負けても戦い続ける。
descriptions.ko: 항상 에너지가 넘쳐흐른다. 강해지기 위해 지더라도 계속해서 싸운다.

name: hitmontop
description: If you become enchanted by its smooth, elegant, dance-like kicks, you may get drilled hard.
appearance: A bipedal, brown humanoid Pokémon designed to resemble a spinning top, with a dark blue cone-shaped head, two dark blue spheres on its chest, and three pointed toes.

descriptions.fr: Si vous êtes enchanté par ses coups de pied fluides, élégants et dansants, vous risquez de recevoir un coup dur.
descriptions.de: Wenn man von seinen geschmeidigen, eleganten, tanzähnlichen Tritten verzaubert wird, kann man hart getroffen werden.
descriptions.es: Si te dejas encantar por sus patadas fluidas, elegantes y danzarinas, podrías recibir un duro golpe.
descriptions.it: Se ti lasci incantare dai suoi calci fluidi, eleganti e danzanti, potresti ricevere un duro colpo.
descriptions.ja: なめらかで優雅なダンスのようなキックに魅了されると、手痛い一撃を受けるかもしれない。
descriptions.ko: 부드럽고 우아한 춤 같은 발차기에 매료되면, 강력한 일격을 당할 수도 있다.

name: smoochum
description: Its lips are the most sensitive parts on its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.
appearance: A small, humanoid, pink-skinned Pokémon with large, prominent red lips, blonde hair, and two large blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ses lèvres sont les parties les plus sensibles de son corps. Il utilise toujours ses lèvres en premier pour examiner les choses.
descriptions.de: Seine Lippen sind die empfindlichsten Teile seines Körpers. Es benutzt immer zuerst seine Lippen, um Dinge zu untersuchen.
descriptions.es: Sus labios son las partes más sensibles de su cuerpo. Siempre usa sus labios primero para examinar las cosas.
descriptions.it: Le sue labbra sono le parti più sensibili del suo corpo. Le usa sempre per prime per esaminare le cose.
descriptions.ja: 唇が体のなかで一番敏感。何かを調べるときは、必ず唇を最初に使う。
descriptions.ko: 입술이 몸 중에서 가장 민감하다. 무언가를 조사할 때는 항상 입술을 먼저 사용한다.

name: elekid
description: It rotates its arms to generate electricity, but it tires easily, so it charges up only a little bit.
appearance: A small, yellow, bipedal Pokémon with a black stripe around its midsection, a black lightning bolt-shaped pattern on its head, and two short black horns.

descriptions.fr: Il fait pivoter ses bras pour générer de l'électricité, mais il se fatigue facilement, alors il ne se charge qu'un petit peu.
descriptions.de: Es dreht seine Arme, um Elektrizität zu erzeugen, aber es ermüdet leicht, daher lädt es sich nur ein wenig auf.
descriptions.es: Gira sus brazos para generar electricidad, pero se cansa fácilmente, por lo que solo se carga un poco.
descriptions.it: Ruota le braccia per generare elettricità, ma si stanca facilmente, quindi si carica solo un po'.
descriptions.ja: 腕を回転させて電気を発生させるが、疲れやすいため少ししか充電できない。
descriptions.ko: 팔을 회전시켜 전기를 만들지만, 쉽게 지치기 때문에 조금밖에 충전할 수 없다.

name: magby
description: Each and every time it inhales and exhales, hot embers dribble out of its mouth and nostrils.
appearance: A small, red, bipedal Pokémon with a large yellow belly and chest, a prominent yellow bill-like mouth, and a small flame constantly burning on the back of its head.

descriptions.fr: Chaque fois qu'il inspire et expire, des braises chaudes s'écoulent de sa bouche et de ses narines.
descriptions.de: Jedes Mal, wenn es ein- und ausatmet, tropfen heiße Glut aus seinem Mund und seinen Nasenlöchern.
descriptions.es: Cada vez que inhala y exhala, brasas calientes gotean de su boca y fosas nasales.
descriptions.it: Ogni volta che inspira ed espira, braci ardenti gocciolano dalla sua bocca e dalle sue narici.
descriptions.ja: 息を吸ったり吐いたりするたびに、口や鼻から熱い燃えカスがポロポロとこぼれ落ちる。
descriptions.ko: 숨을 들이쉬고 내쉴 때마다 입과 콧구멍에서 뜨거운 불똥이 뚝뚝 떨어진다.

name: miltank
description: Its milk is packed with nutrition, making it the ultimate beverage for the sick or weary.
appearance: A pink, bovine-like Pokémon with a white belly and face, large black horns, black patches on its back and flank, and a prominent pink udder.

descriptions.fr: Son lait regorge de nutriments, ce qui en fait la boisson idéale pour les malades ou les fatigués.
descriptions.de: Seine Milch ist voller Nährstoffe und die ultimative Stärkung für Kranke und Schwache.
descriptions.es: Su leche está llena de nutrientes, lo que la convierte en la bebida definitiva para enfermos o cansados.
descriptions.it: Il suo latte è ricco di nutrienti, rendendolo la bevanda perfetta per i malati o gli esausti.
descriptions.ja: 栄養満点のミルクは、病気や疲れで弱った者に最高の滋養となる。
descriptions.ko: 영양 만점인 우유는 병이나 피로로 지친 사람들에게 최고의 음료수다.

name: blissey
description: Anyone who takes even one bite of BLISSEY's egg be­ comes unfailingly caring and pleas­ ant to everyone.
appearance: A large, soft-bodied, pink, egg-shaped Pokémon with a red crest on its head, small white wing-like appendages on its back, and a pouch on its belly holding a pink egg.

descriptions.fr: Quiconque prend ne serait-ce qu'une bouchée de l'œuf de BLISSEY devient infailliblement attentionné et agréable envers tous.
descriptions.de: Wer nur einen Bissen von BLISSEYs Ei nimmt, wird augenblicklich liebevoll und freundlich zu jedem.
descriptions.es: Cualquiera que pruebe siquiera un bocado del huevo de BLISSEY se vuelve infaliblemente amable y agradable con todos.
descriptions.it: Chiunque assaggi anche solo un boccone dell'uovo di BLISSEY diventa infallibilmente premuroso e piacevole con tutti.
descriptions.ja: ハピナスのタマゴを一口食べるだけで、誰でも人を思いやる優しい気持ちになれる。
descriptions.ko: 해피너스의 알을 한입만 먹어도, 누구나 남을 생각하는 다정한 마음을 갖게 된다.

name: raikou
description: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning.
appearance: A large, yellow, saber-toothed tiger-like Pokémon with black stripes, a white underside, a large purple mane forming a cloud on its back, and gray metallic wrist cuffs.

descriptions.fr: Les nuages de pluie qu'il transporte lui permettent de lancer des éclairs à volonté. On raconte qu'il est descendu avec la foudre.
descriptions.de: Die Regenwolken, die es trägt, ermöglichen ihm, Blitze nach Belieben abzufeuern. Man sagt, es sei mit dem Blitz herabgestiegen.
descriptions.es: Las nubes de lluvia que transporta le permiten lanzar rayos a voluntad. Se dice que descendió con un rayo.
descriptions.it: Le nubi temporalesche che porta con sé gli permettono di lanciare fulmini a piacimento. Si dice che sia sceso con un fulmine.
descriptions.ja: 抱え込んだ雨雲から雷を自由に放つ。雷とともに地上へ舞い降りたと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 품은 먹구름에서 번개를 자유롭게 내리친다. 번개와 함께 지상으로 내려왔다고 전해진다.

name: entei
description: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Un­ able to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.
appearance: A large, mastiff-like Pokémon with a brown body, a long, fluffy gray mane, a red plate on its face, white forelegs, and yellow rings around its ankles.

descriptions.fr: Des volcans entrent en éruption lorsqu'il aboie. Incapable de contenir son extrême pouvoir, il parcourt la terre à toute vitesse.
descriptions.de: Vulkane brechen aus, wenn es bellt. Unfähig, seine extreme Kraft zu zügeln, rast es kopfüber durch das Land.
descriptions.es: Los volcanes erupcionan cuando ladra. Incapaz de contener su poder extremo, corre desaforadamente por toda la tierra.
descriptions.it: I vulcani eruttano quando abbaia. Incapace di contenere il suo potere estremo, corre a capofitto per la terra.
descriptions.ja: 吠えることで火山が噴火する。その身に宿る力は制御できず、大地をひたすら駆け巡る。
descriptions.ko: 짖으면 화산이 분화한다. 몸에 깃든 힘을 억제하지 못하고 대지를 맹렬히 달려 나간다.

name: suicune
description: It races around the world to purify fouled water. It dashes away with the north wind.
appearance: A sleek, light blue, dog-like Pokémon with a purple mane flowing down its back, two long white streamers trailing from its head, and a light blue diamond pattern on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: Il parcourt le monde pour purifier les eaux souillées. Il s'enfuit emporté par le vent du nord.
descriptions.de: Es rast um die Welt, um verunreinigtes Wasser zu reinigen. Es saust mit dem Nordwind davon.
descriptions.es: Recorre el mundo para purificar el agua contaminada. Se aleja a toda velocidad con el viento del norte.
descriptions.it: Gira il mondo per purificare l'acqua inquinata. Si allontana sfrecciando con il vento del nord.
descriptions.ja: 汚れた水を浄化するため世界中を駆け巡る。北風とともに颯爽と走る姿は気高い。
descriptions.ko: 더러워진 물을 정화하기 위해 전 세계를 누빈다. 북풍과 함께 쏜살같이 달리는 모습은 숭고하다.

name: larvitar
description: It feeds on soil. After it has eaten a large mountain, it will fall asleep so it can grow.
appearance: A small, green, bipedal Pokémon with red diamond-shaped markings on its belly and an armored gray head featuring a horn-like protrusion.

descriptions.fr: Il se nourrit de terre. Après avoir dévoré une grande montagne, il s'endort pour grandir.
descriptions.de: Es ernährt sich von Erde. Nachdem es einen großen Berg gefressen hat, schläft es, um zu wachsen.
descriptions.es: Se alimenta de tierra. Después de comer una gran montaña, se duerme para poder crecer.
descriptions.it: Si nutre di terra. Dopo aver divorato una grande montagna, si addormenta per crescere.
descriptions.ja: 大地を食べながら成長する。一山を食べ尽くすと、さなぎになるため眠りにつく。
descriptions.ko: 대지를 먹으며 성장한다. 한 산을 다 먹어 치우면 번데기가 되기 위해 잠이 든다.

name: pupitar
description: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its THRASHING can topple a mountain.
appearance: A large, gray, bipedal, pupa-like Pokémon with two pointed limbs, four small openings on its front, and two glowing red eyes visible through slits.

descriptions.fr: Sa carapace est dure comme la roche et très résistante. Son AGITATION peut faire s'effondrer une montagne.
descriptions.de: Sein Panzer ist hart wie Stein und sehr stark. Sein SCHLAGANFALL kann einen Berg zum Einsturz bringen.
descriptions.es: Su caparazón es tan duro como la roca y también muy fuerte. Su SACUDIDA puede derribar una montaña.
descriptions.it: Il suo guscio è duro come la roccia ed è anche molto forte. La sua AGITAZIONE può far crollare una montagna.
descriptions.ja: 岩盤のように硬い殻は、非常に頑丈だ。暴れると山をひとつ吹き飛ばす。
descriptions.ko: 암반처럼 딱딱한 껍질은 아주 튼튼하다. 날뛰면 산 하나를 날려버린다.

name: tyranitar
description: Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.
appearance: A large, bipedal, armored, dark green dinosaur-like Pokémon with a gray diamond pattern on its chest, red eyes, and a spiky dorsal ridge.

descriptions.fr: Son corps ne peut être blessé par aucune sorte d'attaque, il est donc très désireux de lancer des défis à ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper kann durch keine Art von Angriff verletzt werden, daher ist es sehr erpicht darauf, Feinde herauszufordern.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo no puede ser dañado por ningún tipo de ataque, por lo que está muy ansioso por desafiar a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo non può essere ferito da nessun tipo di attacco, quindi è molto desideroso di affrontare i nemici.
descriptions.ja: どんな攻撃でも傷つかない体を持つため、敵に挑戦することを非常に好む。
descriptions.ko: 어떤 공격으로도 상처 입지 않는 몸을 가졌기에, 적에게 도전하는 것을 아주 좋아한다.

name: lugia
description: It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong.
appearance: A large, elegant, mostly white, avian-like Pokémon with a long neck, blue fin-like plates along its back, and a light blue underside.

descriptions.fr: On dit qu'il passe son temps tranquillement au fond de la mer parce que ses pouvoirs sont trop forts.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, es verbringt seine Zeit still am Meeresgrund, da seine Kräfte zu stark sind.
descriptions.es: Se dice que pasa su tiempo tranquilamente en lo más profundo del mar porque sus poderes son demasiado fuertes.
descriptions.it: Si dice che trascorra il suo tempo in silenzio in fondo al mare perché i suoi poteri sono troppo forti.
descriptions.ja: 強すぎる能力のためか海の底で静かに時を過ごすといわれている。
descriptions.ko: 너무나 강력한 능력 때문에 바다 밑바닥에서 조용히 지낸다고 전해진다.

name: ho-oh
description: Legends claim this POKéMON flies the world's skies con­ tinuously on its magnificent seven- colored wings.
appearance: A magnificent, large, phoenix-like bird with vibrant rainbow-colored plumage, predominantly red with green underwings, yellow tail feathers, and white chest feathers.

descriptions.fr: Les légendes affirment que ce POKéMON vole continuellement dans le ciel du monde sur ses magnifiques ailes aux sept couleurs.
descriptions.de: Legenden besagen, dass dieses POKéMON mit seinen prächtigen, siebenfarbigen Flügeln ununterbrochen den Himmel der Welt durchfliegt.
descriptions.es: Las leyendas afirman que este POKéMON vuela continuamente por los cielos del mundo con sus magníficas alas de siete colores.
descriptions.it: Le leggende narrano che questo POKéMON voli continuamente nei cieli del mondo sulle sue magnifiche ali dai sette colori.
descriptions.ja: ７色の美しい翼で世界中の空を飛び続けるという伝説のポケモン。
descriptions.ko: ７가지 색의 아름다운 날개로 전 세계 하늘을 계속해서 날아다닌다는 전설의 포켓몬.

name: celebi
description: This POKéMON wan­ ders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.
appearance: A small, green, fairy-like Pokémon with large blue eyes, two pointed antennae, and small transparent wings on its back.

descriptions.fr: Ce POKéMON voyage à travers le temps. L'herbe et les arbres fleurissent dans les forêts où il est apparu.
descriptions.de: Dieses POKéMON wandert durch die Zeit. Gras und Bäume gedeihen in den Wäldern, in denen es aufgetaucht ist.
descriptions.es: Este POKéMON viaja a través del tiempo. La hierba y los árboles florecen en los bosques en los que ha aparecido.
descriptions.it: Questo POKéMON vaga nel tempo. Erba e alberi fioriscono nelle foreste in cui è apparso.
descriptions.ja: 時を超えて移動するポケモン。セレビィが現れた森では草木が芽吹き生い茂る。
descriptions.ko: 시간을 넘어 이동하는 포켓몬. 세레비가 나타난 숲은 풀과 나무가 무성하게 자란다.

name: treecko
description: TREECKO has small hooks on the bottom of its feet that enable it to scale vertical walls. This POKéMON attacks by slamming foes with its thick tail.
appearance: A small, bipedal, light green gecko-like Pokémon with a red belly, yellow eyes, and a large, flat, leaf-shaped tail.

descriptions.fr: ARCKO possède de petits crochets sous les pattes qui lui permettent de grimper aux murs verticaux. Ce POKéMON attaque en frappant ses ennemis avec sa queue épaisse.
descriptions.de: GECKABOR besitzt kleine Haken an den Fußsohlen, die es ihm ermöglichen, vertikale Wände zu erklimmen. Dieses POKéMON greift an, indem es Feinde mit seinem dicken Schweif rammt.
descriptions.es: TREECKO tiene pequeños ganchos en la planta de sus pies que le permiten escalar muros verticales. Este POKéMON ataca golpeando a sus enemigos con su gruesa cola.
descriptions.it: TREECKO ha piccoli uncini sotto le zampe che gli permettono di scalare pareti verticali. Questo POKéMON attacca sbattendo gli avversari con la sua spessa coda.
descriptions.ja: キモリは足の裏の小さなカギヅメで垂直な壁でも簡単に登れる。太い尻尾で敵をなぎ倒して攻撃する。
descriptions.ko: 나무지기는 발바닥에 있는 작은 갈고리로 수직 벽도 쉽게 오를 수 있다. 굵은 꼬리로 상대를 넘어뜨려 공격한다.

name: grovyle
description: The leaves growing out of GROVYLE’s body are convenient for camouflaging it from enemies in the forest. This POKéMON is a master at climbing trees in jungles.
appearance: A bipedal, light green, raptor-like Pokémon with a red belly, two large, dark green leaf-like blades on its forearms, and two large leaves extending from its tail.

descriptions.fr: Les feuilles qui poussent sur le corps de MASSKO lui sont utiles pour se camoufler des ennemis dans la forêt. Ce POKéMON est un maître de l'escalade dans les arbres des jungles.
descriptions.de: Die Blätter, die aus REPTAINs Körper wachsen, dienen ihm zur Tarnung vor Feinden im Wald. Dieses POKéMON ist ein Meister darin, Bäume in Dschungeln zu erklimmen.
descriptions.es: Las hojas que le crecen del cuerpo a GROVYLE le son muy útiles para camuflarse de los enemigos en el bosque. Este POKéMON es un maestro escalando árboles en la jungla.
descriptions.it: Le foglie che spuntano dal corpo di GROVYLE gli sono utili per mimetizzarsi dai nemici nella foresta. Questo POKéMON è un maestro nell'arrampicata sugli alberi delle giungle.
descriptions.ja: ジュプトルに生えている葉は森に隠れるときのカモフラージュに便利。ジャングルでは木登りの名手だ。
descriptions.ko: 나무돌기에게서 자라난 잎은 숲에서 적에게서 몸을 숨길 때 편리하다. 정글에서는 나무타기의 명수다.

name: sceptile
description: The leaves growing on SCEPTILE’s body are very sharp edged. This POKéMON is very agile - it leaps all over the branches of trees and jumps on its foe from above or behind.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal, dark green gecko-like Pokémon with a light green belly, red markings on its chest, yellow eyes, and three leaf-like blades on each forearm.

descriptions.fr: Les feuilles qui poussent sur le corps de JUNGKO ont des bords très tranchants. Ce POKéMON est très agile : il bondit sur toutes les branches des arbres et saute sur son adversaire par le haut ou par derrière.
descriptions.de: Die Blätter, die auf GEWALDROs Körper wachsen, sind sehr scharfkantig. Dieses POKéMON ist sehr agil - es springt auf allen Ästen der Bäume herum und springt seinen Feind von oben oder hinten an.
descriptions.es: Las hojas que le crecen en el cuerpo a SCEPTILE tienen un filo muy agudo. Este POKéMON es muy ágil: salta por las ramas de los árboles y se lanza sobre su enemigo desde arriba o por detrás.
descriptions.it: Le foglie che crescono sul corpo di SCEPTILE hanno bordi molto affilati. Questo POKéMON è molto agile: salta su tutti i rami degli alberi e si lancia sul suo nemico dall'alto o da dietro.
descriptions.ja: ジュカインの体に生えている葉はとても切れ味が鋭い。機敏な動きで木の枝を飛び回り敵の上や後ろから襲いかかる。
descriptions.ko: 나무킹의 몸에 나 있는 잎은 날카롭다. 민첩한 움직임으로 나뭇가지를 뛰어다니며 적의 위나 뒤에서 덮친다.

name: torchic
description: TORCHIC sticks with its TRAINER, following behind with unsteady steps. This POKéMON breathes fire of over 1,800 degrees F, including fireballs that leave the foe scorched black.
appearance: A small, orange, chick-like Pokémon with a yellow, feather-like crest on its head, black eyes, and a small, flame-like tuft on its rear.

descriptions.fr: POUSSIFEU reste près de son DRESSEUR, le suivant de pas hésitants. Ce POKéMON crache du feu de plus de 1 000 degrés Celsius, y compris des boules de feu qui laissent l'adversaire noirci.
descriptions.de: FLEMMMLI bleibt bei seinem TRAINER und folgt ihm mit wackeligen Schritten. Dieses POKéMON speit Feuer von über 1 000 Grad Celsius, einschließlich Feuerbällen, die den Gegner schwarz verkohlt zurücklassen.
descriptions.es: TORCHIC se queda con su ENTRENADOR, siguiéndolo con pasos inestables. Este POKéMON lanza fuego de más de 1.000 grados Celsius, incluyendo bolas de fuego que dejan al enemigo totalmente chamuscado.
descriptions.it: TORCHIC si attacca al suo ALLENATORE, seguendolo con passi incerti. Questo POKéMON sputa fuoco di oltre 1.000 gradi Celsius, incluse palle di fuoco che lasciano l'avversario carbonizzato.
descriptions.ja: アチャモはフラフラとした足どりでトレーナーの後を付いて回る。体から1000度以上の火の玉を吐き出し敵を真っ黒に焦がす。
descriptions.ko: 아차모는 비틀거리는 걸음으로 트레이너의 뒤를 따라다닌다. 몸에서 1000도 이상의 불덩이를 내뿜어 상대를 새까맣게 태워버린다.

name: combusken
description: COMBUSKEN toughens up its legs and thighs by running through fields and mountains. This POKéMON’s legs possess both speed and power, enabling it to dole out ten kicks in one second.
appearance: A bipedal, chicken-like Pokémon with an orange body, a yellow head crest, gray legs, and a black belt-like band around its waist.

descriptions.fr: GALIFEU renforce ses jambes et ses cuisses en courant à travers champs et montagnes. Les jambes de ce POKéMON possèdent à la fois vitesse et puissance, lui permettant de donner dix coups de pied en une seconde.
descriptions.de: JUNGGLUT stählt seine Beine und Oberschenkel, indem es durch Felder und Berge läuft. Die Beine dieses POKéMONs besitzen sowohl Geschwindigkeit als auch Kraft, wodurch es zehn Tritte in einer Sekunde austeilen kann.
descriptions.es: COMBUSKEN fortalece sus piernas y muslos corriendo por campos y montañas. Las piernas de este POKéMON poseen tanto velocidad como poder, permitiéndole dar diez patadas en un segundo.
descriptions.it: COMBUSKEN tempra le sue gambe e cosce correndo attraverso campi e montagne. Le gambe di questo POKéMON possiedono sia velocità che potenza, permettendogli di sferrare dieci calci in un secondo.
descriptions.ja: ワカシャモは野原や山を駆け巡り脚と太ももを鍛え上げている。脚にはスピードとパワーが備わり1秒間に10発の蹴りを繰り出す。
descriptions.ko: 영치코는 들과 산을 뛰어다니며 다리와 허벅지를 단련한다. 다리에는 스피드와 파워가 있어 1초 동안 10번의 발차기를 날릴 수 있다.

name: blaziken
description: In battle, BLAZIKEN blows out intense flames from its wrists and attacks foes courageously. The stronger the foe, the more intensely this POKéMON’s wrists burn.
appearance: A tall, bipedal, humanoid chicken-like Pokémon with a predominantly red body, black markings on its upper legs and chest, beige fur around its wrists, and yellow feathery crests on its head.

descriptions.fr: En combat, BRASÉGALI souffle des flammes intenses de ses poignets et attaque ses ennemis courageusement. Plus l'adversaire est fort, plus les poignets de ce POKéMON brûlent intensément.
descriptions.de: Im Kampf stößt LOHGOCK intensive Flammen aus seinen Handgelenken aus und greift Feinde mutig an. Je stärker der Feind, desto intensiver brennen die Handgelenke dieses POKéMONs.
descriptions.es: En combate, BLAZIKEN expulsa intensas llamas de sus muñecas y ataca a sus enemigos con valentía. Cuanto más fuerte es el enemigo, más intensamente le arden las muñecas a este POKéMON.
descriptions.it: In battaglia, BLAZIKEN emette intense fiamme dai suoi polsi e attacca i nemici con coraggio. Più forte è il nemico, più intensamente bruciano i polsi di questo POKéMON.
descriptions.ja: バシャーモは戦いになると手首から激しい炎を噴き出し勇猛果敢に相手を攻撃する。強い敵ほど手首は激しく燃え上がる。
descriptions.ko: 번치코는 싸움이 되면 손목에서 맹렬한 불꽃을 뿜어내어 용감하게 상대를 공격한다. 강한 적일수록 이 포켓몬의 손목은 더욱 강하게 불타오른다.

name: mudkip
description: The fin on MUDKIP’s head acts as highly sensitive radar. Using this fin to sense movements of water and air, this POKéMON can determine what is taking place around it without using its eyes.
appearance: A small, light blue, quadrupedal axolotl-like Pokémon with an orange star-shaped marking on each cheek and a large, dark blue dorsal fin.

descriptions.fr: La nageoire sur la tête de GOBOU agit comme un radar très sensible. En utilisant cette nageoire pour détecter les mouvements de l'eau et de l'air, ce POKéMON peut déterminer ce qui se passe autour de lui sans utiliser ses yeux.
descriptions.de: Die Flosse auf HYDROPIS Kopf fungiert als hochsensibles Radar. Mithilfe dieser Flosse, um Wasser- und Luftbewegungen zu spüren, kann dieses POKéMON ohne seine Augen zu benutzen bestimmen, was um es herum geschieht.
descriptions.es: La aleta en la cabeza de MUDKIP actúa como un radar altamente sensible. Usando esta aleta para detectar movimientos de agua y aire, este POKéMON puede determinar lo que sucede a su alrededor sin usar sus ojos.
descriptions.it: La pinna sulla testa di MUDKIP agisce come un radar molto sensibile. Usando questa pinna per percepire i movimenti dell'acqua e dell'aria, questo POKéMON può determinare cosa sta accadendo intorno a sé senza usare gli occhi.
descriptions.ja: ミズゴロウの頭のヒレは高感度なレーダーだ。水や空気の動きを感じ取り目を使わずに周囲の様子を把握する。
descriptions.ko: 물짱이의 머리 지느러미는 고감도 레이더 역할을 한다. 이 지느러미로 물과 공기의 움직임을 감지하여 눈을 사용하지 않고도 주변 상황을 파악할 수 있다.

name: marshtomp
description: The surface of MARSHTOMP’s body is enveloped by a thin, sticky film that enables it to live on land. This POKéMON plays in mud on beaches when the ocean tide is low.
appearance: A bipedal, light blue, axolotl-like Pokémon with orange star-shaped markings on its cheeks, gray belly, and a dark blue dorsal fin extending onto its tail.

descriptions.fr: La surface du corps de FOUINARDE est enveloppée d'une fine pellicule collante qui lui permet de vivre sur terre. Ce POKéMON joue dans la boue sur les plages lorsque la marée est basse.
descriptions.de: Die Oberfläche von MOORABBELS Körper ist von einem dünnen, klebrigen Film umhüllt, der es ihm ermöglicht, an Land zu leben. Dieses POKéMON spielt bei Ebbe im Schlamm an Stränden.
descriptions.es: La superficie del cuerpo de MARSHTOMP está envuelta por una fina capa pegajosa que le permite vivir en tierra. Este POKéMON juega en el barro de las playas cuando la marea está baja.
descriptions.it: La superficie del corpo di MARSHTOMP è avvolta da una sottile pellicola appiccicosa che gli permette di vivere sulla terraferma. Questo POKéMON gioca nel fango sulle spiagge quando la marea è bassa.
descriptions.ja: ヌマクローの体は薄い粘液で覆われているので陸でも生活できる。潮が引いた砂浜で泥遊びをする。
descriptions.ko: 늪짱이의 몸은 얇은 점액으로 덮여 있어 육지에서도 생활할 수 있다. 썰물 때 해변에서 갯벌 놀이를 한다.

name: swampert
description: SWAMPERT is very strong. It has enough power to easily drag a boulder weighing more than a ton. This POKéMON also has powerful vision that lets it see even in murky water.
appearance: A large, bipedal, light blue, bulky axolotl-like Pokémon with orange star-shaped markings on its cheeks, a gray belly, and two dark blue fins on its head and back.

descriptions.fr: LAGGRON est très fort. Il a assez de puissance pour traîner facilement un rocher pesant plus d'une tonne. Ce POKéMON possède également une vision puissante qui lui permet de voir même dans l'eau trouble.
descriptions.de: SUMPEX ist sehr stark. Es hat genug Kraft, um mühelos einen mehr als eine Tonne schweren Felsbrocken zu ziehen. Dieses POKéMON hat auch ein leistungsstarkes Sehvermögen, das es ihm ermöglicht, selbst in trübem Wasser zu sehen.
descriptions.es: SWAMPERT es muy fuerte. Tiene suficiente poder para arrastrar fácilmente una roca que pesa más de una tonelada. Este POKéMON también tiene una visión potente que le permite ver incluso en aguas turbias.
descriptions.it: SWAMPERT è molto forte. Ha abbastanza potenza per trascinare facilmente un masso che pesa più di una tonnellata. Questo POKéMON ha anche una vista potente che gli permette di vedere anche in acque torbide.
descriptions.ja: ラグラージはとても力持ちだ。1トンを超える岩を楽々引きずるほどのパワーを持つ。濁った水中でも見通せる強い視力も持っている。
descriptions.ko: 대짱이는 매우 강하다. 1톤이 넘는 바위를 쉽게 끌어당길 수 있는 힘을 가지고 있다. 이 포켓몬은 탁한 물속에서도 볼 수 있는 강력한 시력을 가지고 있다.

name: poochyena
description: At first sight, POOCHYENA takes a bite at anything that moves. This POKéMON chases after prey until the victim becomes exhausted. However, it may turn tail if the prey strikes back.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal, gray canine Pokémon with dark gray fur around its neck, face, and legs, and a brown snout.

descriptions.fr: Au premier abord, POUCHYENA mord tout ce qui bouge. Ce POKéMON poursuit sa proie jusqu'à ce que la victime soit épuisée. Cependant, il peut prendre la fuite si la proie riposte.
descriptions.de: POOCHYENA beißt auf den ersten Blick alles, was sich bewegt. Es jagt seine Beute, bis diese erschöpft ist. Allerdings kann es die Flucht ergreifen, wenn die Beute sich wehrt.
descriptions.es: A primera vista, POOCHYENA muerde cualquier cosa que se mueva. Este POKéMON persigue a su presa hasta que esta se agota. Sin embargo, puede huir si la presa contraataca.
descriptions.it: A prima vista, POOCHYENA morde qualsiasi cosa si muova. Questo POKéMON insegue la sua preda finché la vittima non si esaurisce. Tuttavia, può scappare se la preda contrattacca.
descriptions.ja: ポチエナは、動くものを見つけると、とにかく噛み付く。相手がぐったりするまで追い回すが、反撃されると逃げ出すこともある。
descriptions.ko: 포챠나는 움직이는 것을 보면 일단 물어뜯는다. 상대가 지칠 때까지 쫓아다니지만, 반격당하면 도망가기도 한다.

name: mightyena
description: MIGHTYENA gives obvious signals when it is preparing to attack. It starts to growl deeply and then flattens its body. This POKéMON will bite savagely with its sharply pointed fangs.
