description: LATIOS has the ability to make its foe see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. This POKéMON is intelligent and understands human speech.
appearance: Sleek, blue, dragon-like Pokemon with white wing-like arms, a short tail, and a distinctive white triangular mark on its chest.

descriptions.fr: LATIOS a la capacité de faire voir à son ennemi une image de ce qu'il a vu ou imagine dans sa tête. Ce Pokémon est intelligent et comprend le langage humain.
descriptions.de: LATIOS besitzt die Fähigkeit, seinen Gegnern Bilder dessen vorzuführen, was es selbst gesehen oder sich in seinem Kopf vorgestellt hat. Dieses Pokémon ist intelligent und versteht menschliche Sprache.
descriptions.es: LATIOS tiene la capacidad de hacer que su enemigo vea una imagen de lo que ha visto o imaginado en su cabeza. Este Pokémon es inteligente y entiende el habla humana.
descriptions.it: LATIOS ha l'abilità di mostrare al nemico le immagini che ha visto o che immagina nella sua mente. Questo Pokémon è intelligente e comprende il linguaggio umano.
descriptions.ja: ラティオスは 敵に 自分の見たものや 頭に 描いた イメージを 見せる 能力を持つ。 この ポケモンは 知能が高く 人間の言葉を 理解する。
descriptions.ko: 라티오스는 적에게 자신이 보거나 머릿속으로 상상한 이미지를 보여주는 능력을 가졌다. 이 포켓몬은 지능이 높고 사람의 말을 이해한다.

name: kyogre
description: KYOGRE has the power to create massive rain clouds that cover the entire sky and bring about torrential downpours. This POKéMON saved people who were suffering from droughts.
appearance: Massive, whale-like Pokemon with a dark blue body, red stripes along its sides, and large pectoral fins with white tips.

descriptions.fr: KYOGRE a le pouvoir de créer de gigantesques nuages de pluie qui couvrent tout le ciel et provoquent des averses torrentielles. Ce Pokémon a sauvé des gens souffrant de sécheresses.
descriptions.de: KYOGRE besitzt die Macht, riesige Regenwolken zu erschaffen, die den gesamten Himmel bedecken und sintflutartige Regenfälle hervorrufen. Dieses Pokémon rettete Menschen, die unter Dürren litten.
descriptions.es: KYOGRE tiene el poder de crear nubes de lluvia masivas que cubren todo el cielo y provocan aguaceros torrenciales. Este Pokémon salvó a personas que sufrían sequías.
descriptions.it: KYOGRE ha il potere di creare gigantesche nubi di pioggia che coprono l'intero cielo e scatenano acquazzoni torrenziali. Questo Pokémon ha salvato persone che soffrivano la siccità.
descriptions.ja: カイオーガは 空全体を 覆う ほどの 巨大な 雨雲を 作り出し 豪雨を もたらす 力を 持つ。 この ポケモンは 干ばつに 苦しむ 人々を 救った。
descriptions.ko: 가이오가는 하늘 전체를 뒤덮을 거대한 비구름을 만들고 엄청난 폭우를 내리게 하는 힘을 가졌다. 이 포켓몬은 가뭄으로 고통받던 사람들을 구했다.

name: groudon
description: GROUDON has long been described in  mythology as the POKéMON that raised lands and expanded continents. This POKéMON took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with KYOGRE.
appearance: Enormous, red, bipedal, dinosaur-like Pokemon with black markings, grey underside, and lava-like yellow stripes glowing on its body.

descriptions.fr: GROUDON est depuis longtemps décrit dans la mythologie comme le Pokémon qui a créé les terres et étendu les continents. Ce Pokémon s'est endormi après une bataille cataclysmique avec KYOGRE.
descriptions.de: GROUDON wurde lange in der Mythologie als das Pokémon beschrieben, das Landmassen erhob und Kontinente ausdehnte. Dieses Pokémon fiel nach einer katastrophalen Schlacht mit KYOGRE in Schlaf.
descriptions.es: GROUDON ha sido descrito durante mucho tiempo en la mitología como el Pokémon que elevó las tierras y expandió los continentes. Este Pokémon se durmió tras una batalla catacísmica con KYOGRE.
descriptions.it: GROUDON è stato a lungo descritto nella mitologia come il Pokémon che ha innalzato le terre e ampliato i continenti. Questo Pokémon è caduto in un sonno profondo dopo una battaglia cataclismica con KYOGRE.
descriptions.ja: グラードンは 神話の中で 大地を 隆起させ 大陸を 広げた ポケモンとして 語り継がれてきた。 この ポケモンは カイオーガとの 破滅的な 戦いの後 眠りについた。
descriptions.ko: 그란돈은 신화 속에서 대지를 융기시키고 대륙을 넓힌 포켓몬으로 전해진다. 이 포켓몬은 가이오가와의 파멸적인 전투 후에 잠이 들었다.

name: rayquaza
description: RAYQUAZA lived for hundreds of millions of years in the earth’s ozone layer,  never descending to the ground. This POKéMON appears to feed on water and particles in the atmosphere.
appearance: Extremely long, serpentine, green dragon Pokemon with yellow ring-like markings and red-tipped fins along its body, culminating in a distinctive head with yellow-rimmed eyes.

descriptions.fr: RAYQUAZA a vécu pendant des centaines de millions d'années dans la couche d'ozone de la Terre, sans jamais descendre au sol. Ce Pokémon semble se nourrir d'eau et de particules présentes dans l'atmosphère.
descriptions.de: RAYQUAZA lebte über Hunderte von Millionen Jahren in der Ozonschicht der Erde, ohne je zum Boden herabzusteigen. Dieses Pokémon scheint sich von Wasser und Partikeln in der Atmosphäre zu ernähren.
descriptions.es: RAYQUAZA vivió durante cientos de millones de años en la capa de ozono de la Tierra, sin descender nunca al suelo. Este Pokémon parece alimentarse de agua y partículas en la atmósfera.
descriptions.it: RAYQUAZA ha vissuto per centinaia di milioni di anni nello strato di ozono terrestre, senza mai scendere a terra. Questo Pokémon sembra nutrirsi di acqua e particelle presenti nell'atmosfera.
descriptions.ja: レックウザは 数億年にわたり 地球の オゾン層で 生活しており 地上へ 降りることは ない。 この ポケモンは 大気中の 水や 粒子を 食料にしているようだ。
descriptions.ko: 레쿠쟈는 수억 년 동안 지구의 오존층에서 생활했으며 지상으로 내려온 적이 없다. 이 포켓몬은 대기 중의 물과 입자를 먹이로 삼는 듯하다.

name: jirachi
description: A legend states that JIRACHI will make true any wish that is written on notes attached to its head when it awakens. If this POKéMON senses danger, it will fight without awakening.
appearance: Small, white, humanoid-like Pokemon with three blue tags on its head, large dark eyes, and a single golden horn-like protrusion on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: Une légende dit que JIRACHI exaucera tout vœu écrit sur des notes attachées à sa tête lorsqu'il s'éveillera. Si ce Pokémon détecte un danger, il se battra sans s'éveiller.
descriptions.de: Eine Legende besagt, dass JIRACHI jeden Wunsch wahr werden lässt, der auf Notizen geschrieben und an seinen Kopf geheftet wird, wenn es erwacht. Wenn dieses Pokémon Gefahr wittert, kämpft es, ohne zu erwachen.
descriptions.es: Una leyenda cuenta que JIRACHI concederá cualquier deseo escrito en notas adheridas a su cabeza cuando despierte. Si este Pokémon siente peligro, luchará sin despertar.
descriptions.it: Una leggenda narra che JIRACHI esaudirà ogni desiderio scritto su dei biglietti attaccati alla sua testa quando si risveglierà. Se questo Pokémon percepisce un pericolo, lotterà senza risvegliarsi.
descriptions.ja: ジラーチが 目覚めたとき 頭に 付けられた 短冊に 書かれた 願い事を 何でも 叶えるという 伝説がある。この ポケモンは 危険を 察知すると 目覚めずに 戦う。
descriptions.ko: 지라치가 잠에서 깨어났을 때, 머리에 붙은 쪽지에 적힌 소원은 무엇이든 이루어준다는 전설이 있다. 이 포켓몬은 위험을 감지하면 깨어나지 않고 싸운다.

name: deoxys-normal
description: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKéMON’s chest appears to be its brain.
appearance: Tall, slender, red and blue alien-like Pokemon with long, whip-like arms, an exposed brain-like organ, and glowing blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: L'ADN d'un virus spatial a subi une mutation soudaine lors de son exposition à un rayon laser et a donné naissance à DEOXYS. L'organe cristallin sur la poitrine de ce Pokémon semble être son cerveau.
descriptions.de: Die DNS eines Weltraumvirus erfuhr eine plötzliche Mutation, als es einem Laserstrahl ausgesetzt wurde, und daraus entstand DEOXYS. Das kristalline Organ auf der Brust dieses Pokémon scheint sein Gehirn zu sein.
descriptions.es: El ADN de un virus espacial sufrió una mutación repentina al exponerse a un rayo láser y dio como resultado a DEOXYS. El órgano cristalino en el pecho de este Pokémon parece ser su cerebro.
descriptions.it: Il DNA di un virus spaziale ha subito una mutazione improvvisa a seguito dell'esposizione a un raggio laser, dando origine a DEOXYS. L'organo cristallino sul petto di questo Pokémon sembra essere il suo cervello.
descriptions.ja: 宇宙ウイルスに レーザー光線が 当たったことによって 突然変異し デオキシスが 誕生した。 胸の クリスタルは この ポケモンの 脳だと 考えられている。
descriptions.ko: 우주 바이러스의 DNA가 레이저에 노출되어 돌연변이를 일으킨 것이 바로 데오키스이다. 이 포켓몬 가슴의 크리스탈 기관이 뇌인 것으로 추정된다.

display_names.ja: デオキシス ノーマルフォルム

name: turtwig
description: Made from soil, the shell on its back hardens when it drinks water. It lives along lakes.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal, light green turtle-like Pokemon with a brown shell on its back, a small green sapling growing from its head, and a yellow lower jaw.

descriptions.fr: Faite de terre, la carapace sur son dos durcit quand il boit de l'eau. Il vit le long des lacs.
descriptions.de: Sein aus Erde bestehender Rückenpanzer wird härter, wenn es Wasser trinkt. Es lebt an Seen.
descriptions.es: Hecho de tierra, el caparazón de su espalda se endurece cuando bebe agua. Vive junto a los lagos.
descriptions.it: Fatto di terra, il guscio sul dorso si indurisce quando beve acqua. Vive lungo i laghi.
descriptions.ja: 土でできた 甲羅は 水を飲むと 硬くなる。 湖の ほとりに 生息する。
descriptions.ko: 흙으로 된 등껍데기는 물을 마시면 단단해진다. 호숫가에 서식한다.

name: grotle
description: It knows where pure water wells up. It carries fellow Pokémon there on its back.
appearance: Larger, quadrupedal, light green turtle-like Pokemon with a brown, rougher shell resembling a small patch of land, and two small tree-like growths on its back.

descriptions.fr: Il sait où jaillit l'eau pure. Il y transporte d'autres Pokémon sur son dos.
descriptions.de: Es weiß, wo reines Quellwasser aufsteigt. Es trägt andere Pokémon auf seinem Rücken dorthin.
descriptions.es: Sabe dónde brota el agua pura. Lleva a otros Pokémon allí sobre su espalda.
descriptions.it: Sa dove sgorga l'acqua pura. Vi trasporta altri Pokémon sulla schiena.
descriptions.ja: どこから 湧き出る きれいな 水の場所を 知っている。 仲間を 背中に 乗せて 連れて行く。
descriptions.ko: 깨끗한 물이 솟는 곳을 안다. 동료 포켓몬을 등에 태우고 그곳으로 데려간다.

name: torterra
description: Small Pokémon occasionally gather on its unmoving back to begin building their nests.
appearance: Massive, quadrupedal, dark green turtle-like Pokemon with an entire continent-like brown shell on its back, complete with a large tree and four mountain-like protrusions.

descriptions.fr: De petits Pokémon se rassemblent parfois sur son dos immobile pour y construire leurs nids.
descriptions.de: Kleine Pokémon versammeln sich gelegentlich auf seinem unbeweglichen Rücken, um dort ihre Nester zu bauen.
descriptions.es: Pequeños Pokémon se reúnen ocasionalmente en su inmóvil espalda para empezar a construir sus nidos.
descriptions.it: Piccoli Pokémon si radunano occasionalmente sulla sua schiena immobile per iniziare a costruire i loro nidi.
descriptions.ja: 動かない 背中の上で 小さな ポケモンたちが 集まって 巣を 作り始める。
descriptions.ko: 움직이지 않는 등 위에서 작은 포켓몬들이 모여 둥지를 짓기 시작한다.

name: chimchar
description: It agilely scales sheer cliffs to live atop craggy mountains. Its fire is put out when it sleeps.
appearance: Small, orange, monkey-like Pokemon with a creamy belly, a red circular marking on its rear, and a flame flickering at the tip of its tail.

descriptions.fr: Il escalade agilement les falaises abruptes pour vivre au sommet des montagnes escarpées. Son feu s'éteint lorsqu'il dort.
descriptions.de: Es klettert geschickt steile Klippen hinauf, um auf zerklüfteten Bergen zu leben. Sein Feuer erlischt, wenn es schläft.
descriptions.es: Escala ágilmente acantilados escarpados para vivir en la cima de montañas rocosas. Su fuego se apaga cuando duerme.
descriptions.it: Scala agilmente scogliere a picco per vivere in cima a montagne scoscese. Il suo fuoco si spegne quando dorme.
descriptions.ja: 険しい崖を 敏捷に 駆け上がり 岩山で 生活する。 眠る時は 炎が 消える。
descriptions.ko: 험한 벼랑을 민첩하게 기어 올라 바위산에 산다. 잠들 때는 불꽃이 꺼진다.

name: monferno
description: To intimidate attackers, it stretches the fire on its tail to make itself appear bigger.
appearance: Monferno is a bipedal orange monkey with a cream-colored muzzle and chest, red markings around its eyes and on its upper arms and thighs, a golden-yellow tuft of fur on its head, and a long tail tipped with a small red flame.

descriptions.fr: Pour intimider ses assaillants, il étire le feu de sa queue afin de paraître plus grand.
descriptions.de: Um Angreifer einzuschüchtern, dehnt es das Feuer an seinem Schweif aus, um größer zu wirken.
descriptions.es: Para intimidar a sus oponentes, estira la llama de su cola y aparenta ser más grande.
descriptions.it: Per intimidire i suoi avversari, allunga la fiamma della coda per apparire più grande.
descriptions.ja: 襲いかかる相手を威嚇する時は　尻尾の炎を伸ばして体を大きく見せる。
descriptions.ko: 상대를 위협할 때는 꼬리의 불꽃을 늘려 몸을 크게 보이게 한다.

name: infernape
description: It uses a special kind of martial arts involving all its limbs. Its fire never goes out.
appearance: Infernape is a bipedal ape-like Pokémon with a white face and chest, red fur covering most of its body, golden-yellow armor-like markings on its shoulders and knees, blue flames flaring from its head like a crown, and red flames emanating from its wrists.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise un art martial spécial qui fait intervenir tous ses membres. Son feu ne s'éteint jamais.
descriptions.de: Es benutzt eine besondere Kampfkunst, die alle Gliedmaßen einsetzt. Sein Feuer erlischt nie.
descriptions.es: Usa un tipo especial de artes marciales que involucran todas sus extremidades. Su fuego nunca se apaga.
descriptions.it: Usa una speciale arte marziale che coinvolge tutti gli arti. La sua fiamma non si spegne mai.
descriptions.ja: 全身を使った特殊な格闘技を使う。燃え盛る炎は決して消えることがない。
descriptions.ko: 온몸을 사용한 특수한 격투기를 쓴다. 타오르는 불꽃은 결코 꺼지지 않는다.

name: piplup
description: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.
appearance: Piplup is a small, round, dark blue penguin with a white belly and face, a light blue crown-like marking over its eyes, and a small yellow beak and feet.

descriptions.fr: Fier de nature, il déteste accepter de la nourriture des humains. Son épais duvet le protège du froid.
descriptions.de: Da es sehr stolz ist, nimmt es nur ungern Futter von Menschen an. Seine dicken Daunen schützen es vor Kälte.
descriptions.es: Al ser muy orgulloso, detesta aceptar comida de la gente. Su grueso plumón le protege del frío.
descriptions.it: Molto fiero, detesta accettare cibo dagli umani. La sua folta peluria lo protegge dal freddo.
descriptions.ja: プライドが高いため人からエサをもらうことを嫌う。厚い羽毛が寒さから身を守る。
descriptions.ko: 프라이드가 높아서 사람에게 먹이를 받는 것을 싫어한다. 두꺼운 솜털이 추위로부터 몸을 지킨다.

name: prinplup
description: It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important.
appearance: Prinplup is a bipedal, dark blue penguin with a white belly and face, a light blue mask-like marking around its eyes, two golden-yellow button-like markings on its chest, and a golden three-pronged crest on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il vit seul, loin des autres. Apparemment, chacun d'eux se croit le plus important.
descriptions.de: Es lebt allein, abseits von anderen. Offenbar glaubt jedes von ihnen, das Wichtigste zu sein.
descriptions.es: Vive en solitario, lejos de los demás. Aparentemente, cada uno cree ser el más importante.
descriptions.it: Vive da solo, lontano dagli altri. Pare che ognuno di essi si creda il più importante.
descriptions.ja: ほかの仲間から離れて１匹で暮らす。どうやらどの個体も自分がいちばん偉いと思っているらしい。
descriptions.ko: 다른 무리에서 떨어져 홀로 산다. 아무래도 모든 개체가 자신이 가장 위대하다고 생각하는 모양이다.

name: empoleon
description: The three horns that extend from its beak attest to its power. The leader has the biggest horns.
appearance: Empoleon is a large, majestic, dark blue bipedal penguin with a white belly and chin, a yellow beak, a prominent golden trident-shaped crest on its head, and sharp golden fin-like extensions on its wings.

descriptions.fr: Les trois cornes qui partent de son bec attestent de sa puissance. Le chef a les cornes les plus grandes.
descriptions.de: Die drei Hörner, die sich von seinem Schnabel erstrecken, zeugen von seiner Macht. Der Anführer hat die größten Hörner.
descriptions.es: Los tres cuernos que se extienden desde su pico dan fe de su poder. El líder tiene los cuernos más grandes.
descriptions.it: Le tre corna che gli spuntano dal becco attestano la sua potenza. Il capo ha le corna più grandi.
descriptions.ja: クチバシから伸びる３本の角はパワーの証。群れのリーダーの角がいちばん大きい。
descriptions.ko: 부리에서 뻗은 3개의 뿔은 파워의 증거. 무리의 리더는 뿔이 가장 크다.

name: starly
description: They flock in great numbers. Though small, they flap their wings with great power.
appearance: Starly is a small, stout bird with a predominantly dark gray body, a black head, a white belly with a single white spot on its chest, and yellow beak and feet.

descriptions.fr: Ils se rassemblent en grand nombre. Bien que petits, ils battent leurs ailes avec beaucoup de force.
descriptions.de: Sie sammeln sich in großen Schwärmen. Obwohl klein, schlagen sie ihre Flügel mit großer Kraft.
descriptions.es: Se agrupan en grandes bandadas. Aunque pequeños, agitan sus alas con gran fuerza.
descriptions.it: Si radunano in gran numero. Benché piccoli, battono le ali con grande potenza.
descriptions.ja: 大群で群れをなす。小さい体だが力強く羽ばたく。
descriptions.ko: 대규모 무리를 이룬다. 작은 몸이지만 힘껏 날개를 퍼덕인다.

name: staravia
description: It flies around forests and fields in search of bug Pokémon. It stays within a huge flock.
appearance: Staravia is a medium-sized bird with a gray body, white undersides, a black head featuring a prominent white streak extending from its forehead to the back, and red tips on its primary wing and tail feathers.

descriptions.fr: Il vole à travers les forêts et les champs à la recherche de Pokémon Insecte. Il reste au sein d'une immense volée.
descriptions.de: Es fliegt durch Wälder und Felder auf der Suche nach Käfer-Pokémon. Es bleibt in einem riesigen Schwarm.
descriptions.es: Vuela por bosques y campos en busca de Pokémon Bicho. Permanece dentro de una enorme bandada.
descriptions.it: Vola per boschi e campi alla ricerca di Pokémon Coleottero. Rimane all'interno di un enorme stormo.
descriptions.ja: 虫ポケモンのエサを探しに森や野原を飛び回る。巨大な群れで行動する。
descriptions.ko: 벌레 포켓몬을 찾아 숲과 들판을 날아다닌다. 거대한 무리 속에서 지낸다.

name: staraptor
description: It has a savage nature. It will courageously challenge foes that are much larger.
appearance: Staraptor is a large, powerful bird with a brown body, white undersides, a black head, and a distinctive long, red crest that extends backwards, along with a circular white pattern on its lower face and upper neck.

descriptions.fr: Il a une nature sauvage. Il défie courageusement des adversaires bien plus grands.
descriptions.de: Es hat eine wilde Natur. Es fordert mutig viel größere Gegner heraus.
descriptions.es: Tiene una naturaleza salvaje. Desafiará con valentía a enemigos mucho más grandes.
descriptions.it: Ha una natura feroce. Sfida coraggiosamente avversari molto più grandi.
descriptions.ja: 荒々しい性質を持つ。自分よりもはるかに大きな相手にも勇敢に立ち向かう。
descriptions.ko: 난폭한 성격을 가졌다. 자신보다 훨씬 큰 상대라도 용감하게 맞선다.

name: bidoof
description: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.
appearance: Bidoof is a small, rotund rodent with brown fur on its back and head, a cream-colored belly and muzzle, and large, prominent yellowish-brown front teeth.

descriptions.fr: Avec des nerfs d'acier, rien ne peut le perturber. Il est plus agile et actif qu'il n'y paraît.
descriptions.de: Mit Nerven aus Stahl kann nichts es aus der Ruhe bringen. Es ist agiler und aktiver, als es scheint.
descriptions.es: Con nervios de acero, nada puede perturbarlo. Es más ágil y activo de lo que parece.
descriptions.it: Con nervi d'acciaio, niente può turbarlo. È più agile e attivo di quanto sembri.
descriptions.ja: 鋼の精神を持つため何事にも動じない。見た目よりも素早く活動的だ。
descriptions.ko: 강철의 정신을 가졌기 때문에 어떤 일에도 동요하지 않는다. 겉모습보다 민첩하고 활동적이다.

name: bibarel
description: It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker.
appearance: Bibarel is a bipedal, dark brown beaver-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly and muzzle, dark brown hands and feet, and a broad, wavy tail.

descriptions.fr: Il construit son nid en barrant les cours d'eau avec de l'écorce et de la boue. Il est réputé pour son travail acharné.
descriptions.de: Es baut sein Nest, indem es Bäche mit Rinde und Schlamm staut. Es ist als fleißiger Arbeiter bekannt.
descriptions.es: Construye su nido represando arroyos con corteza y barro. Es conocido como un trabajador incansable.
descriptions.it: Costruisce il nido arginando i corsi d'acqua con corteccia e fango. È noto come un lavoratore instancabile.
descriptions.ja: 小川を木の皮や泥でせき止めて巣を作る。働き者で有名。
descriptions.ko: 시냇물을 나뭇껍질이나 진흙으로 막아 둥지를 만든다. 부지런한 일꾼으로 유명하다.

name: kricketot
description: It shakes its head back to front, causing its antennae to hit each other and sound like a xylophone.
appearance: Kricketot is a small, round bug with a red body, a large black head shaped like a musical note, a yellow collar-like marking around its neck, and two yellow dots on its back.

descriptions.fr: Il secoue sa tête d'avant en arrière, faisant s'entrechoquer ses antennes pour produire un son de xylophone.
descriptions.de: Es schüttelt seinen Kopf vor und zurück, wodurch seine Fühler aneinanderstoßen und wie ein Xylofon klingen.
descriptions.es: Mueve la cabeza de un lado a otro, lo que hace que sus antenas choquen entre sí y suenen como un xilófono.
descriptions.it: Scuote la testa avanti e indietro, facendo urtare le sue antenne tra loro e producendo un suono simile a quello di un xilofono.
descriptions.ja: 頭を 前後に 振って 触角を 打ち合わせ シロフォンに 似た音を 奏でる。
descriptions.ko: 머리를 흔들어 더듬이를 서로 부딪치게 해 실로폰 같은 소리를 낸다.

name: kricketune
description: It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. It can compose melodies ad lib.
appearance: Kricketune is a bipedal, red cricket-like Pokémon with a dark brown abdomen, yellow markings across its chest and head, and two prominent black, musical note-shaped antennae extending from its head that serve as arms.

descriptions.fr: Il croise ses bras en forme de lames devant sa poitrine lorsqu'il crie. Il peut composer des mélodies ad lib.
descriptions.de: Es kreuzt seine messerartigen Arme vor der Brust, wenn es weint. Es kann Melodien ad lib komponieren.
descriptions.es: Cruza sus brazos afilados como cuchillos delante de su pecho cuando llora. Puede componer melodías ad libitum.
descriptions.it: Incrocia le braccia affilate come coltelli davanti al petto quando piange. Può comporre melodie all'improvviso.
descriptions.ja: 鳴くときに 腕を 胸の 前で 交差させる。 即興で メロディを 作曲できる。
descriptions.ko: 울 때 칼날 같은 팔을 가슴 앞에서 교차시킨다. 즉흥적으로 멜로디를 작곡할 수 있다.

name: shinx
description: All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded.
appearance: Shinx is a small, blue feline resembling a lion cub, featuring a black mane around its neck, yellow rings on its front legs, and a black tail tipped with a yellow star-like shape.

descriptions.fr: Sa fourrure scintille entièrement s'il sent un danger. Il s'enfuit pendant que l'ennemi est momentanément aveuglé.
descriptions.de: Sein gesamtes Fell funkelt, wenn es Gefahr wittert. Es flieht, während der Gegner vorübergehend geblendet ist.
descriptions.es: Todo su pelaje deslumbra si siente peligro. Huye mientras el enemigo está momentáneamente cegado.
descriptions.it: Tutta la sua pelliccia risplende se percepisce un pericolo. Fugge mentre il nemico è momentaneamente accecato.
descriptions.ja: 危険を 感じると 全身の 体毛が 輝きだす。 敵が ひるんだ 隙に 逃げる。
descriptions.ko: 위험을 느끼면 온몸의 털이 빛나기 시작한다. 적이 움찔한 틈에 도망친다.

name: luxio
description: Its claws loose electricity with enough amperage to cause fainting. They live in small groups.
appearance: Luxio is a blue feline with a black mane extending from its head down its back, yellow rings on its front legs, transparent blue ear tips, and a black tail tipped with a yellow star-like shape.

descriptions.fr: Ses griffes libèrent de l'électricité avec suffisamment d'ampérage pour provoquer l'évanouissement. Ils vivent en petits groupes.
descriptions.de: Seine Klauen setzen Elektrizität mit genügend Stromstärke frei, um Ohnmacht zu verursachen. Sie leben in kleinen Gruppen.
descriptions.es: Sus garras sueltan electricidad con la suficiente intensidad como para causar desmayos. Viven en pequeños grupos.
descriptions.it: I suoi artigli rilasciano elettricità con un amperaggio sufficiente a causare svenimenti. Vivono in piccoli gruppi.
descriptions.ja: 爪から 気絶させるほどの 電流を 流す。 小さな 群れを 作って 暮らす。
descriptions.ko: 발톱에서 기절할 정도의 전류를 흘려보낸다. 작은 무리를 지어 산다.

name: luxray
description: It has eyes that can see through anything. It spots and captures prey hiding behind objects.
appearance: Luxray is a large, muscular blue lion-like feline covered in a massive black mane, featuring golden rings on its legs, transparent blue ear tips, and a black tail that ends in a prominent gold star.

descriptions.fr: Il a des yeux capables de voir à travers tout. Il repère et capture les proies cachées derrière des objets.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt Augen, die durch alles hindurchsehen können. Es erspäht und fängt Beute, die sich hinter Objekten versteckt.
descriptions.es: Tiene ojos que pueden ver a través de cualquier cosa. Localiza y captura presas escondidas detrás de objetos.
descriptions.it: Ha occhi che possono vedere attraverso qualsiasi cosa. Individua e cattura le prede nascoste dietro agli oggetti.
descriptions.ja: あらゆるものを 透視する 目を 持つ。 物陰に 隠れた 獲物を 見つけて 捕らえる。
descriptions.ko: 모든 것을 꿰뚫어 보는 눈을 가졌다. 물건 뒤에 숨은 먹잇감을 찾아낸 뒤 잡는다.

name: budew
description: Over the winter, it closes its bud and endures the cold. In spring, the bud opens and releases pollen.
appearance: Budew is a small, spherical green plant bud with two large red eyes, a yellow collar resembling a partially unfurled leaf, and two small green vines extending from its sides.

descriptions.fr: Pendant l'hiver, il referme son bourgeon et endure le froid. Au printemps, le bourgeon s'ouvre et libère du pollen.
descriptions.de: Im Winter schließt es seine Knospe und erträgt die Kälte. Im Frühling öffnet sich die Knospe und setzt Pollen frei.
descriptions.es: Durante el invierno, cierra su capullo y soporta el frío. En primavera, el capullo se abre y libera polen.
descriptions.it: Durante l'inverno, chiude il suo bocciolo e sopporta il freddo. In primavera, il bocciolo si apre e rilascia polline.
descriptions.ja: 冬の間は つぼみを 閉じて 寒さに 耐える。 春になると つぼみが 開き 花粉を 飛ばす。
descriptions.ko: 겨울 동안에는 꽃봉오리를 닫아 추위를 견딘다. 봄이 되면 꽃봉오리가 열려 꽃가루를 날린다.

name: roserade
description: It attracts prey with a sweet aroma, then downs it with thorny whips hidden in its arms.
appearance: Roserade is an elegant bipedal plant-like Pokémon with a green body, a black mask-like marking around its red eyes, a white collar, and two thorny vine-like arms, each tipped with a red rose on the right and a blue rose on the left.

descriptions.fr: Il attire ses proies avec un doux parfum, puis les terrasse avec des fouets épineux cachés dans ses bras.
descriptions.de: Es lockt Beute mit einem süßen Aroma an und überwältigt sie dann mit dornigen Peitschen, die in seinen Armen verborgen sind.
descriptions.es: Atrae a sus presas con un dulce aroma y luego las derriba con látigos espinosos ocultos en sus brazos.
descriptions.it: Attira le prede con un dolce aroma, poi le abbatte con fruste spinose nascoste nelle sue braccia.
descriptions.ja: 甘い 香りで 獲物を 誘い込み 腕に 隠した トゲの ムチで 仕留める。
descriptions.ko: 달콤한 향기로 먹잇감을 유인한 다음 팔에 숨겨진 가시 채찍으로 쓰러뜨린다.

name: cranidos
description: It lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its skull is as hard as iron.
appearance: Cranidos is a small, stocky dinosaur-like Pokémon with a blue body, a gray belly and feet, and a prominent, smooth, dark red dome-shaped head.

descriptions.fr: Il vivait dans les jungles il y a environ 100 millions d'années. Son crâne est aussi dur que le fer.
descriptions.de: Es lebte vor etwa 100 Millionen Jahren in Dschungeln. Sein Schädel ist so hart wie Eisen.
descriptions.es: Vivió en las selvas hace unos 100 millones de años. Su cráneo es tan duro como el hierro.
descriptions.it: Viveva nelle giungle circa 100 milioni di anni fa. Il suo cranio è duro come il ferro.
descriptions.ja: およそ １億年前に ジャングルに 生息していた。 頭の 骨は 鉄のように 硬い。
descriptions.ko: 약 1억 년 전에 정글에 서식했다. 머리뼈는 철처럼 단단하다.

name: rampardos
description: Its powerful head butt has enough power to shatter even the most durable things upon impact.
appearance: Rampardos is a large, bipedal dinosaur-like Pokémon with a blue body, a gray belly and tail, and a massive, spiky, dark red dome-shaped head marked with black stripes.

descriptions.fr: Son puissant coup de tête a suffisamment de force pour briser les choses les plus résistantes à l'impact.
descriptions.de: Sein mächtiger Kopfnuss hat genug Kraft, um selbst die haltbarsten Dinge beim Aufprall zu zertrümmern.
descriptions.es: Su poderoso cabezazo tiene la fuerza suficiente para hacer añicos incluso las cosas más duraderas al impactar.
descriptions.it: La sua potente testata ha abbastanza forza da frantumare anche le cose più dure all'impatto.
descriptions.ja: 強烈な 頭突きは ぶつかるもの 全てを 粉砕する ほどの 破壊力を 持つ。
descriptions.ko: 강렬한 박치기는 부딪히는 모든 것을 분쇄할 정도의 파괴력을 지닌다.

name: shieldon
description: A Pokémon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard.
appearance: Shieldon is a small, quadrupedal dinosaur-like Pokémon with a blue body, a black back and legs, and a large, metallic, yellow and gray shield covering its face, featuring four prominent yellow dots on its black back.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon qui vivait dans les jungles il y a environ 100 millions d'années. Sa peau faciale est extrêmement dure.
descriptions.de: Ein Pokémon, das vor etwa 100 Millionen Jahren in Dschungeln lebte. Seine Gesichtshaut ist extrem hart.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon que vivió en las selvas hace unos 100 millones de años. Su piel facial es extremadamente dura.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon che viveva nelle giungle circa 100 milioni di anni fa. La sua pelle facciale è estremamente dura.
descriptions.ja: およそ １億年前に ジャングルに 生息していた ポケモン。 顔の 皮膚は とても 硬い。
descriptions.ko: 약 1억 년 전에 정글에 서식했던 포켓몬. 얼굴의 피부는 매우 단단하다.

name: bastiodon
description: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.
appearance: Bastiodon is a large, quadrupedal dinosaur-like Pokémon with a blue body and black back, featuring a massive, fortress-like, yellow, gray, and black shield covering its entire face, topped with two prominent yellow horns.

descriptions.fr: Toute attaque frontale est repoussée. C'est un Pokémon docile qui se nourrit d'herbe et de baies.
descriptions.de: Frontale Angriffe werden abgewehrt. Es ist ein zahmes Pokémon, das sich von Gras und Beeren ernährt.
descriptions.es: Repele cualquier ataque frontal. Es un Pokémon dócil que se alimenta de hierba y bayas.
descriptions.it: Respinge qualsiasi attacco frontale. È un Pokémon docile che si nutre di erba e bacche.
descriptions.ja: 正面からの攻撃はすべて跳ね返す。おとなしい性格で、草や木の実を食べる。
descriptions.ko: 정면에서의 모든 공격을 튕겨낸다. 온순한 성격으로 풀과 열매를 먹는다.

name: burmy
description: To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves.
appearance: Burmy is a small, worm-like Pokémon largely concealed within a cloak made of various materials, appearing with either a green leafy cloak, a tan sandy cloak, or a gray trashy cloak, with only its black eyes visible.

descriptions.fr: Pour se protéger des vents froids et hivernaux, il se recouvre d'un manteau fait de brindilles et de feuilles.
descriptions.de: Um sich vor kalten Winterwinden zu schützen, bedeckt es sich mit einem Mantel aus Zweigen und Blättern.
descriptions.es: Para resguardarse de los fríos vientos invernales, se cubre con un manto hecho de ramitas y hojas.
descriptions.it: Per ripararsi dai freddi venti invernali, si copre con un mantello fatto di ramoscelli e foglie.
descriptions.ja: 寒い冬の風から身を守るため、小枝や葉っぱでできたマントを身につけている。
descriptions.ko: 차가운 겨울 바람으로부터 몸을 지키기 위해 나뭇가지와 잎으로 만든 망토를 걸치고 있다.

name: wormadam-plant
description: When BURMY evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.
appearance: Wormadam (Plant Cloak) is a bipedal, moth-like Pokémon entirely covered in a green cloak resembling gathered leaves, with visible pink eyes and pink accents on its inner body and small leaf-like antennae.

descriptions.fr: Quand CHENIPOT évolue, son manteau fait désormais partie de son corps. Il ne le perd jamais.
descriptions.de: Als BURMY sich entwickelte, wurde sein Mantel ein Teil des Körpers dieses Pokémon. Der Mantel wird nie abgeworfen.
descriptions.es: Al evolucionar de BURMY, su capa se convirtió en parte de su cuerpo. Nunca se desprende de ella.
descriptions.it: Quando BURMY si evolve, il suo mantello diventa parte del suo corpo. Non lo abbandona mai.
descriptions.ja: ミノムッチから進化した時、マントがこのポケモンの体の一部になった。マントが落ちることはない。
descriptions.ko: 도롱충이가 진화했을 때 망토가 이 포켓몬의 몸 일부가 되었다. 망토가 떨어지는 일은 없다.

display_names.ja: ガーメイル くさきのミノ

name: mothim
description: It loves the honey of flowers and steals honey collected by COMBEE.
appearance: Mothim is a brown moth-like Pokémon with a segmented body, large wings patterned with yellow and orange stripes, and red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il adore le miel des fleurs et vole celui que les APITRINI ont récolté.
descriptions.de: Es liebt Blumenhonig und stiehlt den von COMBEE gesammelten Honig.
descriptions.es: Le encanta la miel de las flores y roba la que han recolectado los COMBEE.
descriptions.it: Ama il miele dei fiori e ruba quello raccolto dai COMBEE.
descriptions.ja: 花の蜜が大好きで、ミツハニーが集めた蜜を盗んでしまう。
descriptions.ko: 꽃의 꿀을 아주 좋아해서 세꿀버리가 모은 꿀을 훔쳐버린다.

name: combee
description: A Pokémon formed by three others. It busily carries sweet floral honey to VESPIQUEN.
appearance: Combee is a small, flat Pokémon composed of three hexagonal yellow segments, each with a black dot and a red eye, and two pairs of translucent wings.

descriptions.fr: Pokémon formé de trois autres. Il transporte activement le doux miel floral à la REINONILLE.
descriptions.de: Ein aus drei anderen Pokémon geformtes Pokémon. Es trägt emsig süßen Blütenhonig zu VESPIQUEN.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon formado por tres. Lleva afanosamente dulce miel floral a VESPIQUEN.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon formato da tre altri. Trasporta con operosità il dolce miele dei fiori a VESPIQUEN.
descriptions.ja: ３匹で１つのポケモン。甘い花の蜜をせっせとビークインに運ぶ。
descriptions.ko: 3마리로 1마리가 된 포켓몬. 달콤한 꽃의 꿀을 바쁘게 비퀸에게 운반한다.

name: vespiquen
description: Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by COMBEE.
appearance: Vespiquen is a large, regal queen bee-like Pokémon with a yellow head, red eyes, and a prominent black and yellow striped thorax resembling a dress, ending in a segmented orange abdomen at its base, supported by two large translucent wings.

descriptions.fr: Son abdomen est une ruche pour ses larves. Elle élève ses larves avec le miel collecté par les APITRINI.
descriptions.de: Ihr Hinterleib ist eine Honigwabe für Larven. Sie zieht ihre Larven mit dem von COMBEE gesammelten Honig auf.
descriptions.es: Su abdomen es un panal para sus larvas. Cría a sus larvas con la miel recolectada por los COMBEE.
descriptions.it: Il suo addome è un alveare per le larve. Le alleva con il miele raccolto dai COMBEE.
descriptions.ja: お腹は幼虫のハチの巣。ミツハニーが集めた蜜で幼虫を育てる。
descriptions.ko: 배는 애벌레의 벌집. 세꿀버리가 모은 꿀로 애벌레를 기른다.

name: pachirisu
description: It makes fur balls that crackle with static electricity. It stores them with berries in tree holes.
appearance: Pachirisu is a small, fluffy white squirrel with two light blue stripes on its back, pink circular cheek pouches, and a large, bushy white tail with a light blue stripe running down its center.

descriptions.fr: Il fait des boules de fourrure qui crépitent d'électricité statique. Il les stocke avec des baies dans les trous d'arbres.
descriptions.de: Es stellt Fellbälle her, die mit statischer Elektrizität knistern. Diese lagert es zusammen mit Beeren in Baumhöhlen.
descriptions.es: Hace bolas de pelo que crepitan con electricidad estática. Las almacena junto con bayas en los huecos de los árboles.
descriptions.it: Crea palle di pelo che crepitano di elettricità statica. Le conserva con le bacche nei buchi degli alberi.
descriptions.ja: 静電気を帯びてパチパチはじける毛玉を作る。木の実と一緒に木の穴に貯蔵する。
descriptions.ko: 정전기를 띠고 지지직거리는 털뭉치를 만든다. 나무 열매와 함께 나무 구멍에 저장한다.

name: buizel
description: It has a flotation sac that is like an inflatable collar. It floats on water with its head out.
appearance: Buizel is a sleek, orange otter-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, an inflatable cream flotation sac around its neck, two cream spots on its back, blue fin-like appendages on its forearms, and a split blue tail.

descriptions.fr: Il possède une poche de flottaison en forme de collier gonflable. Il flotte sur l'eau la tête hors de l'eau.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt eine Schwimmboje, die wie ein aufblasbarer Kragen aussieht. Es schwimmt mit dem Kopf aus dem Wasser.
descriptions.es: Tiene un saco de flotación que parece un collar inflable. Flota en el agua con la cabeza fuera.
descriptions.it: Possiede una sacca di galleggiamento simile a un collare gonfiabile. Galleggia sull'acqua con la testa fuori.
descriptions.ja: 浮き袋は浮き輪状になっている。水面に浮き、頭だけを出して漂う。
descriptions.ko: 튜브 같은 부레 주머니가 있다. 수면에 뜨면 머리만 내놓고 떠다닌다.

name: floatzel
description: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.
appearance: Floatzel is a larger, sleek orange otter-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, a large, cream-colored inflatable flotation sac around its neck, prominent blue fins on its forearms, and a cream-colored tail with a blue propeller-like marking at its tip.

descriptions.fr: Il flotte grâce à sa poche de flottaison bien développée. Il participe aux sauvetages des personnes qui se noient.
descriptions.de: Es schwimmt mit seinem gut entwickelten Schwimmsack. Es hilft bei der Rettung ertrinkender Menschen.
descriptions.es: Flota usando su saco de flotación bien desarrollado. Ayuda en el rescate de personas que se ahogan.
descriptions.it: Galleggia usando la sua sacca di galleggiamento ben sviluppata. Assiste nel salvataggio di persone che affogano.
descriptions.ja: 発達した浮き袋で水面に浮かぶ。溺れている人を救助する手助けをする。
descriptions.ko: 잘 발달한 부레 주머니로 수면에 뜬다. 물에 빠진 사람을 구조하는 것을 돕는다.

name: cherubi
description: The small ball holds the nutrients needed for evolution. Apparently, it is very sweet and tasty.
appearance: Cherubi is a small, spherical Pokémon resembling a cherry, with a red main body, a short green stem and two green leaves on top, and a smaller, pale red sphere attached to its side by a tiny stem.

descriptions.fr: La petite boule contient les nutriments nécessaires à l'évolution. Apparemment, elle est très douce et savoureuse.
descriptions.de: Die kleine Kugel enthält die für die Entwicklung nötigen Nährstoffe. Offenbar ist sie sehr süß und lecker.
descriptions.es: La pequeña esfera contiene los nutrientes necesarios para la evolución. Al parecer, es muy dulce y sabrosa.
descriptions.it: La piccola sfera contiene i nutrienti necessari per l'evoluzione. A quanto pare, è molto dolce e saporita.
descriptions.ja: 小さな玉に進化に必要な栄養が詰まっている。とても甘くておいしいらしい。
descriptions.ko: 작은 구슬에 진화에 필요한 영양분이 가득하다. 아주 달고 맛있다고 한다.

name: cherrim
description: It blooms during times of strong sunlight. It tries to make up for everything it endured as a bud.
appearance: Cherrim (Sunshine Form) is a small, pink, five-petaled flower-like Pokémon with a yellow center displaying a white face, two small green leaves emerging from its back, and a short green stem.

descriptions.fr: Il fleurit sous un soleil intense. Il tente de compenser tout ce qu'il a enduré en tant que bourgeon.
descriptions.de: Es blüht bei starkem Sonnenschein. Es versucht, alles zu kompensieren, was es als Knospe ertragen musste.
descriptions.es: Florece bajo la luz intensa del sol. Intenta compensar todo lo que soportó siendo un capullo.
descriptions.it: Fiorisce durante l'intensa luce solare. Cerca di compensare tutto ciò che ha sopportato come bocciolo.
descriptions.ja: 強い日差しの時に開花する。つぼみだったころの我慢をすべて取り戻そうとしている。
descriptions.ko: 강한 햇볕을 받으면 개화한다. 봉오리 시절의 고통을 모두 되찾으려 한다.

name: shellos
description: Its colors and shapes differ from region to region. In the Sinnoh region, two types are confirmed.
appearance: Shellos (West Sea form) is a small pink slug-like Pokémon with a white underside, a rounded white head frill, two small yellow horns, and a wavy yellow frill running down its back.

descriptions.fr: Ses couleurs et formes varient selon les régions. Dans la région de Sinnoh, deux types sont confirmés.
descriptions.de: Seine Farben und Formen unterscheiden sich von Region zu Region. In der Sinnoh-Region sind zwei Typen bestätigt.
descriptions.es: Sus colores y formas varían según la región. En la región de Sinnoh, se han confirmado dos tipos.
descriptions.it: I suoi colori e le sue forme variano da regione a regione. Nella regione di Sinnoh, sono stati confermati due tipi.
descriptions.ja: 地域によって色や形が異なる。シンオウ地方では2種類のタイプが確認されている。
descriptions.ko: 지역에 따라 색과 형태가 다르다. 신오지방에서는 2종류의 타입이 확인되었다.

name: gastrodon
description: It has a pliable body without any bones. If any part of its body is torn off, it grows right back.
appearance: Gastrodon (West Sea form) is a large pink slug-like Pokémon with a brown underside, a flat brown head featuring two dark brown eyes, and a wavy brown mantle that extends down its back.

descriptions.fr: Il possède un corps souple et sans os. Si une partie de son corps est arrachée, elle repousse immédiatement.
descriptions.de: Es hat einen biegsamen Körper ohne Knochen. Wenn ein Teil seines Körpers abgerissen wird, wächst er sofort nach.
descriptions.es: Posee un cuerpo flexible y sin huesos. Si se le arranca alguna parte del cuerpo, esta vuelve a crecer.
descriptions.it: Ha un corpo flessibile e privo di ossa. Se una parte del suo corpo viene strappata, ricresce subito.
descriptions.ja: 骨のないしなやかな体を持つ。体の一部がちぎれてもすぐに再生する。
descriptions.ko: 뼈가 없는 유연한 몸을 가졌다. 몸의 일부가 떨어져 나가도 금방 다시 자란다.

name: ambipom
description: To eat, it deftly shucks nuts with its two tails. It rarely uses its arms now.
appearance: Ambipom is a purple primate-like Pokémon with a cream-colored face and belly, large pointed ears, and two long, prehensile tails, each tipped with a three-fingered hand.

descriptions.fr: Pour manger, il décortique habilement les noix avec ses deux queues. Il utilise rarement ses bras désormais.
descriptions.de: Zum Fressen schält es geschickt Nüsse mit seinen zwei Schweifen. Es benutzt seine Arme nur noch selten.
descriptions.es: Para comer, saca hábilmente las nueces de sus cáscaras con sus dos colas. Rara vez usa sus brazos ya.
descriptions.it: Per mangiare, sbuccia abilmente le noci con le sue due code. Ora usa raramente le sue braccia.
descriptions.ja: 2本の尻尾で器用に木の実をむいて食べる。腕を使うことはほとんどない。
descriptions.ko: 2개의 꼬리로 능숙하게 열매를 까서 먹는다. 팔을 사용하는 일은 거의 없다.

name: drifloon
description: A Pokémon formed by the spirits of people and Pokémon. It loves damp, humid seasons.
appearance: Drifloon is a small, round, purple balloon-like Pokémon with two yellow heart-shaped hands, white wispy clouds at its base, and a white, band-aid shaped marking on its face with two small red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon formé par les esprits de personnes et de Pokémon. Il aime les saisons humides et moites.
descriptions.de: Ein Pokémon, das aus den Geistern von Menschen und Pokémon entstanden ist. Es liebt feuchte, schwüle Jahreszeiten.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon formado por los espíritus de personas y Pokémon. Le encantan las estaciones húmedas y mojadas.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon formato dagli spiriti di persone e Pokémon. Ama le stagioni umide e bagnate.
descriptions.ja: 人とポケモンの魂が集まって生まれたポケモン。じめじめして湿度の高い季節を好む。
descriptions.ko: 사람과 포켓몬의 영혼이 모여 태어난 포켓몬. 축축하고 습한 계절을 좋아한다.

name: drifblim
description: At dusk, swarms of them are carried aloft on winds. When noticed, they suddenly vanish.
appearance: Drifblim is a large, ovoid, purple balloon-like Pokémon with a dark purple cloud-like fringe around its lower body, four dark purple tentacle-like appendages hanging from its underside, and a white star-shaped marking on its face with two small red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Au crépuscule, des essaims sont portés par le vent. Quand on les remarque, ils disparaissent soudainement.
descriptions.de: In der Dämmerung werden Schwärme von ihnen vom Wind in die Höhe getragen. Wenn sie bemerkt werden, verschwinden sie plötzlich.
descriptions.es: Al anochecer, grandes bandadas son arrastradas por el viento. Si se les ve, desaparecen de repente.
descriptions.it: Al crepuscolo, sciami di loro vengono trasportati in alto dal vento. Quando vengono notati, spariscono improvvisamente.
descriptions.ja: 夕暮れ時に群れで風に乗って運ばれる。気がつくといつの間にか姿を消している。
descriptions.ko: 해 질 녘에 무리 지어 바람을 타고 날려간다. 알아차렸을 때는 어느새 모습을 감추고 있다.

name: buneary
description: It slams foes by sharply uncoiling its rolled ears. It stings enough to make a grown-up cry in pain.
appearance: Buneary is a small, brown rabbit-like Pokémon with a cream-colored muzzle, ear interiors, belly, and feet, featuring very long brown ears that are typically rolled up into spirals.

descriptions.fr: Il frappe ses adversaires en déroulant brusquement ses oreilles. La douleur est telle qu'elle fait crier un adulte.
descriptions.de: Es rammt Gegner, indem es seine gerollten Ohren scharf entrollt. Der Schmerz ist so groß, dass ein Erwachsener vor Schmerz schreit.
descriptions.es: Golpea a los enemigos desenrollando bruscamente sus orejas. El dolor es tan intenso que hace llorar a un adulto.
descriptions.it: Sbatte i nemici srotolando bruscamente le sue orecchie arrotolate. Il dolore è abbastanza forte da far piangere un adulto.
descriptions.ja: 巻き上げた耳を勢いよく伸ばして相手を叩く。大人が痛みに泣き出すほど強烈。
descriptions.ko: 말아 올린 귀를 세차게 뻗어 상대를 때린다. 어른이 아픔에 울음을 터뜨릴 정도로 강렬하다.

name: lopunny
description: An extremely cautious Pokémon. It cloaks its body with its fluffy ear fur when it senses danger.
appearance: Lopunny is a tall, slender, light brown bipedal rabbit-like Pokémon with long, droopy ears tipped with cream-colored fur, fluffy cream-colored fur around its neck, chest, and thighs, and cream-colored paw-like feet.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon extrêmement prudent. Il recouvre son corps de la fourrure soyeuse de ses oreilles lorsqu'il sent un danger.
descriptions.de: Ein extrem vorsichtiges Pokémon. Es umhüllt seinen Körper mit seinem flauschigen Ohrfell, wenn es Gefahr wittert.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon extremadamente cauteloso. Cubre su cuerpo con el pelaje esponjoso de sus orejas cuando siente peligro.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon estremamente cauto. Copre il suo corpo con la soffice pelliccia delle orecchie quando percepisce un pericolo.
descriptions.ja: 警戒心が非常に強いポケモン。危険を察知するとフワフワの耳の毛で体を包む。
descriptions.ko: 경계심이 매우 강한 포켓몬. 위험을 감지하면 폭신폭신한 귀 털로 몸을 감싼다.

name: mismagius
description: Its cries sound like incantations. Those hearing it are tormented by headaches and hallucinations.
appearance: Mismagius is a ghostly purple Pokémon with a bell-shaped body that trails off into a tattered skirt-like bottom, a pointed, witch-hat-like head with two ear-like protrusions, and three red gem-like spheres forming a necklace around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Ses cris ressemblent à des incantations. Ceux qui les entendent sont tourmentés par des maux de tête et des hallucinations.
descriptions.de: Seine Schreie klingen wie Beschwörungen. Wer sie hört, wird von Kopfschmerzen und Halluzinationen geplagt.
descriptions.es: Sus gritos suenan como conjuros. Quienes los escuchan son atormentados por dolores de cabeza y alucinaciones.
descriptions.it: Le sue grida sembrano incantesimi. Chi le sente è tormentato da mal di testa e allucinazioni.
descriptions.ja: 鳴き声は呪文のよう。聞いた者は頭痛や幻覚に苛まれる。
descriptions.ko: 울음소리는 주술과 같다. 들은 자는 두통과 환각에 시달린다.

name: honchkrow
description: Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous MURKROW in tow.
appearance: Honchkrow is a large, dark blue, crow-like Pokémon with a white crescent-shaped chest marking, a red feather crest on its head resembling a fedora, and white wingtips that extend like hands.

descriptions.fr: Devenant actif la nuit, il est connu pour se déplacer en groupe avec de nombreux CORBOSS à sa suite.
descriptions.de: Nachts aktiv werdend, ist bekannt, dass es mit zahlreichen KRANAS im Schlepptau schwärmt.
descriptions.es: Se activa de noche y se sabe que se mueve en bandadas con numerosos MURKROW a su paso.
descriptions.it: Diventa attivo di notte ed è noto per sciamare con numerosi MURKROW al seguito.
descriptions.ja: 夜行性になり、多くのヤミカラスを引き連れて群れることで知られる。
descriptions.ko: 야행성이 되어 수많은 깜까미를 거느리고 무리 짓는 것으로 알려져 있다.

name: glameow
description: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some.
appearance: Glameow is a slender, light gray cat-like Pokémon with a distinct curled, spring-shaped tail, a white muzzle, light gray ear insides, and large yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il griffe s'il est mécontent et ronronne quand il est affectueux. Son caractère capricieux est très apprécié par certains.
descriptions.de: Es kratzt, wenn es unzufrieden ist, und schnurrt, wenn es Zuneigung zeigt. Seine Wankelmütigkeit ist bei manchen sehr beliebt.
descriptions.es: Araña si está disgustado y ronronea cuando se siente afectuoso. Su inconstancia es muy apreciada por algunos.
descriptions.it: Graffia se scontento e fa le fusa quando è affettuoso. La sua volubilità è molto apprezzata da alcuni.
descriptions.ja: 不機嫌だとひっかくが、甘えるとゴロゴロと喉を鳴らす。その気まぐれな性格が一部の人にはたまらない。
descriptions.ko: 기분 나쁘면 할퀴고 애교 부릴 때는 골골거린다. 제멋대로인 성격이 일부 사람들에게는 매우 인기가 있다.

name: purugly
description: It is a brazen brute that barges its way into another Pokémon’s nest and claims it as its own.
appearance: Purugly is a large, stout, gray cat-like Pokémon with a large white muzzle, prominent white fur tufts on its cheeks and chest, and a thick, striped tail that is typically wrapped tightly around its midsection.

descriptions.fr: C'est une brute effrontée qui s'introduit de force dans le nid d'un autre Pokémon et le revendique comme le sien.
descriptions.de: Es ist ein dreister Rüpel, der sich gewaltsam in das Nest eines anderen Pokémon drängt und es für sich beansprucht.
descriptions.es: Es un bruto descarado que se cuela a la fuerza en el nido de otro Pokémon y lo reclama como suyo.
descriptions.it: È un bruto sfacciato che si intrufola con la forza nel nido di un altro Pokémon e se lo appropria.
descriptions.ja: ほかのポケモンの巣に図々しく居座り、自分のものにしてしまう、ずうずうしいポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 다른 포켓몬의 둥지에 뻔뻔하게 들어앉아 자기 것으로 만들어버리는 뻔뻔한 포켓몬이다.

name: chingling
description: It emits cries by agitating an orb at the back of its throat. It moves with flouncing hops.
appearance: Chingling is a small, round, yellow bell-like Pokémon with a white oval face, a red clapper-like protrusion extending from its mouth, and a single small yellow sphere on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il émet des cris en agitant une orbe au fond de sa gorge. Il se déplace en faisant des bonds désinvoltes.
descriptions.de: Es stößt Schreie aus, indem es eine Kugel im Rachen reibt. Es bewegt sich mit aufgeweckten Sprüngen.
descriptions.es: Emite gritos agitando una esfera en la parte posterior de su garganta. Se mueve dando saltos vivaces.
descriptions.it: Emette grida agitando una sfera sul fondo della gola. Si muove con saltelli vivaci.
descriptions.ja: 喉の奥にある玉を揺らして鳴き声を出す。ぴょんぴょんと飛び跳ねるように動く。
descriptions.ko: 목구멍 안쪽에 있는 구슬을 흔들어서 울음소리를 낸다. 팔짝팔짝 뛰어다닌다.

name: stunky
description: It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.
appearance: Stunky is a small, purple skunk-like Pokémon with a white stripe running from its head down its back, a white tuft of fur on its forehead, and a large, flat purple and pink-ringed tail.

descriptions.fr: Il se protège en pulvérisant un fluide nocif depuis son derrière. La puanteur persiste pendant 24 heures.
descriptions.de: Es schützt sich, indem es eine schädliche Flüssigkeit aus seinem Hinterteil sprüht. Der Gestank hält 24 Stunden lang an.
descriptions.es: Se protege rociando un fluido nocivo desde su trasero. El hedor persiste durante 24 horas.
descriptions.it: Si protegge spruzzando un fluido nocivo dalla parte posteriore. La puzza persiste per 24 ore.
descriptions.ja: お尻から悪臭の液体を噴射して身を守る。においは２４時間消えない。
descriptions.ko: 엉덩이에서 악취 액체를 분사해서 몸을 지킨다. 악취는 24시간 동안 사라지지 않는다.

name: skuntank
description: It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet.
appearance: Skuntank is a long, purple skunk-like Pokémon with a broad white facial marking, two small red eyes, and a large, flat tail that is predominantly purple with a pink stripe, forming a significant portion of its elongated body.

descriptions.fr: Il pulvérise un fluide nauséabond depuis le bout de sa queue pour attaquer. Sa portée est de plus de 50 mètres.
descriptions.de: Es sprüht eine übelriechende Flüssigkeit von seiner Schwanzspitze, um anzugreifen. Seine Reichweite beträgt über 50 Meter.
descriptions.es: Rocía un fluido de olor repugnante desde la punta de su cola para atacar. Su alcance supera los 50 metros.
descriptions.it: Spruzza un fluido dall'odore nauseabondo dalla punta della coda per attaccare. La sua gittata supera i 50 metri.
descriptions.ja: 尻尾の先から強烈な悪臭の液体を噴射して攻撃する。射程距離は５０メートル以上だ。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리 끝에서 강력한 악취 액체를 분사해서 공격한다. 사정거리는 50미터 이상이다.

name: bronzor
description: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.
appearance: Bronzor is a flat, bronze-colored disc-shaped Pokémon with two blue eyes and an embossed pattern of concentric green and yellow rings on its front surface.

descriptions.fr: Des objets de sa forme ont été découverts dans d'anciennes tombes. On ignore s'il y a un lien.
descriptions.de: Werkzeuge in seiner Form wurden in alten Gräbern entdeckt. Es ist unbekannt, ob sie verwandt sind.
descriptions.es: Se descubrieron objetos con su forma en tumbas antiguas. Se desconoce si están relacionados.
descriptions.it: Utensili con la sua forma sono stati scoperti in antiche tombe. Non si sa se siano correlati.
descriptions.ja: 昔の古墳からこのポケモンに似た道具が見つかった。関係があるかはわかっていない。
descriptions.ko: 옛날 고분에서 이 포켓몬과 닮은 도구가 발견되었다. 관계가 있는지는 밝혀지지 않았다.

name: bronzong
description: One caused a news sensation when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2,000-year sleep.
appearance: Bronzong is a large, bronze-colored bell-shaped Pokémon with a broad, flat base, two red eyes, and an embossed pattern of concentric green and yellow rings on its front surface.

descriptions.fr: L'un d'eux a fait la une des journaux après avoir été déterré sur un chantier de construction, après 2 000 ans de sommeil.
descriptions.de: Eines sorgte für Aufsehen, als es nach 2 000 Jahren Schlaf an einer Baustelle ausgegraben wurde.
descriptions.es: Uno de ellos causó sensación cuando fue desenterrado en una obra tras dormir durante 2.000 años.
descriptions.it: Un esemplare ha fatto scalpore quando è stato dissotterrato in un cantiere dopo un sonno di 2 000 anni.
descriptions.ja: ２０００年の眠りから覚め、工事現場から掘り起こされた時はニュースになった。
descriptions.ko: 2000년간 잠들어 있다가 공사 현장에서 발굴되었을 때 뉴스에 보도되었다.

name: bonsly
description: It looks as if it is always crying. It is actually adjusting its body’s fluid levels by eliminating excess.
appearance: Bonsly is a small, brown, rock-like Pokémon with a green, rounded head resembling a leaf cluster, three dark brown prong-like branches extending from its head, and a cream-colored belly with three small circular holes.

descriptions.fr: Il a l'air de pleurer en permanence. En fait, il ajuste les niveaux de fluides de son corps en éliminant l'excès.
descriptions.de: Es sieht aus, als würde es immer weinen. Tatsächlich gleicht es den Flüssigkeitshaushalt seines Körpers aus, indem es Überschüssiges ausscheidet.
descriptions.es: Parece que siempre está llorando. En realidad, ajusta los niveles de líquidos de su cuerpo eliminando el exceso.
descriptions.it: Sembra che pianga sempre. In realtà, regola i livelli dei liquidi corporei eliminando l'eccesso.
descriptions.ja: いつも泣いているように見えるが、実は体内の余分な水分を排出して調節しているのだ。
descriptions.ko: 늘 울고 있는 것처럼 보이지만 실은 몸속의 여분의 수분을 배출하여 조절하고 있는 것이다.

name: mime-jr
description: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.
appearance: Mime Jr. is a small, bipedal Pokémon with a pink spherical head, a white face with two small blue eyes and pink cheeks, a white frill around its neck, and a red dot on its white belly.

descriptions.fr: Il imite habituellement ses adversaires. Une fois imité, l'adversaire ne peut plus quitter ce Pokémon des yeux.
descriptions.de: Es ahmt gewohnheitsmäßig Gegner nach. Einmal nachgeahmt, kann der Gegner seine Augen nicht mehr von diesem Pokémon lassen.
descriptions.es: Habita imitar a sus adversarios. Una vez imitado, el adversario no puede apartar la vista de este Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Imita abitualmente i nemici. Una volta imitato, il nemico non riesce più a staccare gli occhi da questo Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 相手のまねをする習性がある。まねされた相手はミミロルから目が離せなくなる。
descriptions.ko: 상대방의 흉내를 내는 습성이 있다. 흉내낸 상대는 이 포켓몬에게서 눈을 뗄 수 없게 된다.

name: happiny
description: It loves round white things. It carries an egg-shaped rock in imitation of CHANSEY.
appearance: Happiny is a small, pink, egg-shaped Pokémon with a large, curly light pink tuft of hair on its head, a white lower body, and a red egg-shaped stone carried in a pouch on its white belly.

descriptions.fr: Il adore les choses rondes et blanches. Il transporte un galet en forme d'œuf pour imiter LEVEINARD.
descriptions.de: Es liebt runde, weiße Dinge. Es trägt einen eiförmigen Stein, um HEITEIRA nachzuahmen.
descriptions.es: Le encantan las cosas redondas y blancas. Lleva una roca con forma de huevo imitando a CHANSEY.
descriptions.it: Adora le cose rotonde e bianche. Trasporta una roccia a forma di uovo imitando CHANSEY.
descriptions.ja: 丸くて白いものが大好き。ラッキーのマネをして卵に似た石を持ち歩く。
descriptions.ko: 둥글고 하얀 것을 아주 좋아한다. 럭키를 흉내 내어 알 형태의 돌을 가지고 다닌다.

name: chatot
description: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.
appearance: Chatot is a colorful parrot-like Pokémon with a black, note-shaped head, a blue body, green wings, a red tail feather, and a white collar-like marking around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Il peut apprendre et prononcer des mots humains. Quand ils se rassemblent, ils apprennent tous la même expression.
descriptions.de: Es kann menschliche Worte lernen und nachsprechen. Wenn sie sich versammeln, lernen sie alle denselben Satz.
descriptions.es: Puede aprender y hablar palabras humanas. Si se juntan, todos aprenden la misma frase.
descriptions.it: Può imparare e pronunciare parole umane. Se si raggruppano, imparano tutti la stessa espressione.
descriptions.ja: 人間の言葉を覚えて話せる。 集まるとみんな同じセリフを覚える。
descriptions.ko: 사람의 말을 배우고 말할 수 있다. 무리를 지으면 모두 같은 말을 배운다.

name: spiritomb
description: A Pokémon that was formed by 108 spirits. It is bound to a fissure in an odd keystone.
appearance: Spiritomb is a ghostly purple orb with two glowing yellow eyes and a fanged mouth, enveloped by a swirling mass of green mist-like tendrils that connect it to a jagged gray rock.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon formé par 108 esprits. Il est lié à une fissure dans une Clé de Voûte étrange.
descriptions.de: Ein Pokémon, das aus 108 Geistern entstand. Es ist an einen Riss in einem unheimlichen Felsbrocken gebunden.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon formado por 108 espíritus. Está ligado a una fisura en una Rocalunar peculiar.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon formato da 108 spiriti. È legato a una fessura in una Bizzarroperla.
descriptions.ja: 108個の魂が集まってできたポケモン。 珍しい要石のヒビに縛られている。
descriptions.ko: 108개의 혼이 모여 생긴 포켓몬. 특이한 미혹의 바위에 틈새로 묶여 있다.

name: gible
description: It nests in small, horizontal holes in cave walls. It pounces to catch prey that stray too close.
appearance: Gible is a small, blue, bipedal shark-like Pokémon with a broad, flat head resembling an airplane wing, a red belly, and a single blue dorsal fin.

descriptions.fr: Il niche dans de petits trous horizontaux dans les murs des grottes. Il bondit pour attraper les proies qui s'approchent trop.
descriptions.de: Es nistet in kleinen, horizontalen Höhlenlöchern. Es stürzt sich auf Beute, die zu nah kommt.
descriptions.es: Anida en pequeños agujeros horizontales en las paredes de las cuevas. Ataca a las presas que se acercan demasiado.
descriptions.it: Nidifica in piccoli buchi orizzontali nelle pareti delle caverne. Si avventa per catturare le prede che si avvicinano troppo.
descriptions.ja: 洞窟の壁にある小さな横穴に巣を作る。 近づきすぎた獲物を飛びかかって捕らえる。
descriptions.ko: 동굴 벽의 작은 가로 구멍에 둥지를 튼다. 너무 가까이 온 먹이를 덮쳐 잡는다.

name: gabite
description: There is a long-held belief that medicine made from its scales will heal even incurable illnesses.
appearance: Gabite is a larger, blue, bipedal shark-like Pokémon with a ridged head, a red belly, two small white claws on each hand and foot, and a single blue dorsal fin.

descriptions.fr: On croit depuis longtemps que la médecine fabriquée à partir de ses écailles peut guérir même les maladies incurables.
descriptions.de: Es wird seit langem geglaubt, dass Medizin aus seinen Schuppen selbst unheilbare Krankheiten heilt.
descriptions.es: Existe la creencia de que la medicina hecha con sus escamas curará incluso las enfermedades incurables.
descriptions.it: Si crede da tempo che la medicina ricavata dalle sue squame possa curare anche le malattie incurabili.
descriptions.ja: そのウロコから作られた薬は、不治の病をも治すという言い伝えがある。
descriptions.ko: 비늘로 만든 약은 불치병도 고친다는 오랜 전설이 있다.

name: garchomp
description: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.
appearance: Garchomp is a large, sleek, blue, bipedal dragon-shark-like Pokémon with a red underbelly, prominent scythe-like claws on its forearms, and two large, flat fins on its head that resemble jet engines.

descriptions.fr: Quand il replie son corps et déploie ses ailes, il ressemble à un avion à réaction. Il vole à une vitesse supersonique.
descriptions.de: Wenn es seinen Körper zusammenfaltet und seine Flügel ausbreitet, sieht es aus wie ein Düsenflugzeug. Es fliegt mit Schallgeschwindigkeit.
descriptions.es: Cuando pliega su cuerpo y extiende sus alas, parece un avión a reacción. Vuela a velocidad sónica.
descriptions.it: Quando ripiega il corpo ed estende le ali, sembra un jet. Vola a velocità sonica.
descriptions.ja: 体を折りたたみ羽を広げるとジェット機のような姿になる。 音速で空を飛ぶ。
descriptions.ko: 몸을 접고 날개를 펼치면 제트기 같은 모습이 된다. 음속으로 하늘을 난다.

name: munchlax
description: It wolfs down its weight in food once a day, swallowing food whole with almost no chewing.
appearance: Munchlax is a stout, blue, bear-like Pokémon with a cream-colored belly, two small fangs protruding from its upper jaw, and short, round ears.

descriptions.fr: Il avale son poids en nourriture une fois par jour, engloutissant les aliments entiers sans presque mâcher.
descriptions.de: Es verschlingt einmal täglich sein Körpergewicht an Nahrung, wobei es diese fast ohne zu kauen ganz hinunterschluckt.
descriptions.es: Devora su peso en comida una vez al día, tragando el alimento entero casi sin masticar.
descriptions.it: Divora il suo peso in cibo una volta al giorno, inghiottendo il cibo intero quasi senza masticare.
descriptions.ja: １日１度自分の体重と同じ量の食べ物を食べる。 ほとんど噛まずに丸呑みする。
descriptions.ko: 하루에 한 번 자기 몸무게와 같은 양의 음식을 먹는다. 거의 씹지 않고 통째로 삼킨다.

name: riolu
description: The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad.
appearance: Riolu is a small, bipedal, blue canine-like Pokémon with a black muzzle, black markings resembling a mask around its red eyes, a black collar-like marking on its chest, and two black ear-like appendages on its head.

descriptions.fr: L'aura qui émane de son corps s'intensifie pour alerter les autres s'il a peur ou est triste.
descriptions.de: Die Aura, die von seinem Körper ausgeht, intensiviert sich, um andere zu warnen, wenn es ängstlich oder traurig ist.
descriptions.es: El aura que emana de su cuerpo se intensifica para alertar a los demás si tiene miedo o está triste.
descriptions.it: L'aura che emana dal suo corpo si intensifica per avvertire gli altri se ha paura o è triste.
descriptions.ja: 体から発する波導は、不安や悲しさを感じると強まり、周りに知らせる。
descriptions.ko: 몸에서 발산하는 파동은 불안이나 슬픔을 느끼면 강해져 주변에 알린다.

name: lucario
description: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.
appearance: Lucario is a sleek, bipedal, blue and black canine-like Pokémon with red eyes, a pointed muzzle, four black spikes on its chest and wrists, and two long black ear-like appendages.

descriptions.fr: Il a la capacité de percevoir les auras de toutes choses. Il comprend la parole humaine.
descriptions.de: Es hat die Fähigkeit, die Auren aller Dinge wahrzunehmen. Es versteht menschliche Sprache.
descriptions.es: Tiene la habilidad de sentir las auras de todas las cosas. Entiende el habla humana.
descriptions.it: Ha la capacità di percepire le aure di tutte le cose. Comprende il linguaggio umano.
descriptions.ja: すべてのものの波導を感知する能力を持つ。 人間の言葉を理解する。
descriptions.ko: 모든 것의 파동을 감지하는 능력을 가졌다. 인간의 말을 이해한다.

name: hippopotas
description: It lives in arid places. Instead of perspiration, it expels grainy sand from its body.
appearance: Hippopotas is a small, light tan hippopotamus-like Pokémon with irregular dark brown markings covering its body, resembling camouflage.

descriptions.fr: Il vit dans les endroits arides. Au lieu de transpirer, il expulse du sable granuleux de son corps.
descriptions.de: Es lebt an trockenen Orten. Statt Schweiß stößt es körnigen Sand aus seinem Körper aus.
descriptions.es: Vive en lugares áridos. En lugar de sudar, expulsa arena granulada de su cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Vive in luoghi aridi. Invece di sudare, espelle sabbia granulosa dal suo corpo.
descriptions.ja: 乾燥した場所に生息。 汗ではなく砂粒を体から排出する。
descriptions.ko: 건조한 장소에 서식한다. 땀 대신 모래 알갱이를 몸에서 배출한다.

name: hippowdon
description: It blasts internally stored sand from ports on its body to create a towering twister for attack.
appearance: Hippowdon is a large, tan hippopotamus-like Pokémon with a broad, gray snout, large black nostrils, and irregular dark brown markings on its back and sides, featuring four cannon-like structures on its back.

descriptions.fr: Il projette du sable stocké en interne depuis des orifices sur son corps pour créer une tornade imposante pour attaquer.
descriptions.de: Es schleudert intern gespeicherten Sand aus Öffnungen an seinem Körper, um einen gewaltigen Sandwirbel zum Angriff zu erzeugen.
descriptions.es: Expulsa arena almacenada internamente desde puertos en su cuerpo para crear un imponente torbellino para atacar.
descriptions.it: Esplode sabbia immagazzinata internamente da aperture sul suo corpo per creare un'imponente tempesta di sabbia per attaccare.
descriptions.ja: 体内に蓄えた砂を体中の穴から噴き出し、巨大な砂竜巻を発生させて攻撃する。
descriptions.ko: 몸 안에 저장한 모래를 몸의 구멍에서 분출하여 거대한 모래폭풍을 일으켜 공격한다.

name: skorupi
description: It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.
appearance: Purple scorpion-like Pokémon with a rounded body, two large pincers, and a segmented tail ending in a stinger, all accented by its yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il agrippe sa proie avec les pinces de sa queue et lui injecte du poison. Il s'accroche tenacement jusqu'à ce que le poison fasse effet.
descriptions.de: Es packt Beute mit seinen Schwanzklauen und injiziert Gift. Es hält beharrlich fest, bis das Gift wirkt.
descriptions.es: Atrapa a sus presas con las pinzas de su cola y les inyecta veneno. Se aferra con tenacidad hasta que el veneno hace efecto.
descriptions.it: Afferra la preda con le chele della coda e inietta il veleno. Non molla la presa finché il veleno non fa effetto.
descriptions.ja: 獲物を 尻尾の ハサミで 捕らえ 毒を 注入。 毒が 効くまで しつこく しがみつく。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리의 집게로 먹이를 잡아 독을 주입한다. 독이 퍼질 때까지 끈질기게 달라붙는다.

name: drapion
description: It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.
appearance: Large, dark purple scorpion-like Pokémon with an upright posture, four legs, two massive pincers, a segmented tail ending in a sharp stinger, and a black armored chest plate with yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: La puissance de ses bras dotés de pinces lui permet de réduire une voiture en miettes. Le bout de ses griffes relâche du poison.
descriptions.de: Die Kraft seiner Klauenarme reicht aus, um ein Auto zu zerlegen. Die Spitzen seiner Klauen setzen Gift frei.
descriptions.es: La fuerza de sus brazos con garras es capaz de convertir un coche en chatarra. Las puntas de sus garras liberan veneno.
descriptions.it: Con la forza delle sue chele può ridurre un’auto in rottami. Le punte delle sue chele secernono veleno.
descriptions.ja: 腕の ハサミは 車を スクラップに するほどの 威力。 爪の 先からは 毒液が 噴き出る。
descriptions.ko: 팔의 집게는 자동차를 폐차로 만들 정도의 위력을 가졌다. 손톱 끝에서 독액이 뿜어져 나온다.

name: croagunk
description: Its cheeks hold poison sacs. It tries to catch foes off guard to jab them with toxic fingers.
appearance: Small blue frog-like Pokémon with a hunched posture, a black mask-like marking around its yellow eyes, a white zigzag pattern on its belly, and two large, fingerless hands with a single black stripe on each.

descriptions.fr: Ses joues contiennent des sacs de poison. Il essaie de prendre ses adversaires par surprise pour les piquer avec ses doigts toxiques.
descriptions.de: Seine Wangen enthalten Giftsäcke. Es versucht, Gegner zu überraschen, um sie mit giftigen Fingern zu stechen.
descriptions.es: Sus mejillas contienen sacos de veneno. Intenta coger a sus enemigos por sorpresa para clavarles sus dedos tóxicos.
descriptions.it: Le sue guance contengono sacche di veleno. Cerca di cogliere i nemici di sorpresa per colpirli con le dita tossiche.
descriptions.ja: 頬に 毒袋を 持ち 毒の 指で 相手が 油断した 隙を ついて 突く。
descriptions.ko: 뺨에 독주머니를 지니며 독이 있는 손가락으로 상대가 방심한 틈을 노려 찌른다.

name: toxicroak
description: Its knuckle claws secrete a toxin so vile that even a scratch could prove fatal.
appearance: Tall, slender blue-black frog-like Pokémon with a long snout, yellow eyes, a prominent red pouch on its throat, and a white zigzag pattern extending from its belly to its chest, with long arms ending in two-fingered hands with black stripes.

descriptions.fr: Ses griffes articulées sécrètent une toxine si virulente qu'une simple égratignure peut être fatale.
descriptions.de: Seine Knöchelklauen sondern ein so übles Gift ab, dass selbst ein Kratzer tödlich sein könnte.
descriptions.es: Sus garras de los nudillos secretan una toxina tan vil que incluso un rasguño podría ser fatal.
descriptions.it: Le sue chele nocche secernono una tossina così virulenta che persino un graffio può rivelarsi fatale.
descriptions.ja: 拳の 爪から 猛毒を 分泌する。 傷つけられただけで 命取りに なるほど 強い。
descriptions.ko: 주먹의 발톱에서 맹독을 분비한다. 상처 입은 것만으로 치명상이 될 만큼 강력하다.

name: carnivine
description: It attracts prey with its sweet- smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.
appearance: Green, Venus flytrap-like Pokémon with a large, toothed maw featuring red and yellow stripes inside its mouth, two vine-like arms, and a small, segmented body that ends in a root-like tail.

descriptions.fr: Il attire ses proies avec sa salive douce, puis les dévore. Il lui faut une journée entière pour manger une proie.
descriptions.de: Es lockt Beute mit seinem süßlich riechenden Speichel an und schnappt dann zu. Es braucht einen ganzen Tag, um Beute zu fressen.
descriptions.es: Atrae a sus presas con su saliva de olor dulce y luego las devora. Tarda un día entero en comer una presa.
descriptions.it: Attira le prede con la sua saliva dolce e poi le divora. Impiega un giorno intero per mangiare una preda.
descriptions.ja: 甘い 匂いの 唾液で 獲物を 誘い 丸のみする。 １匹の 獲物を 食べるのに 丸１日かかる。
descriptions.ko: 달콤한 냄새의 침으로 먹이를 유인하여 통째로 삼킨다. 먹이 한 마리를 먹는 데 하루가 걸린다.

name: finneon
description: After long exposure to sunlight, the patterns on its tail fins shine vividly when darkness arrives.
appearance: Small, light blue fish-like Pokémon with two large, pink-tipped caudal fins resembling butterfly wings, two smaller pectoral fins, and delicate antennae-like protrusions above its eyes.

descriptions.fr: Après une longue exposition au soleil, les motifs de ses nageoires caudales brillent vivement quand l'obscurité arrive.
descriptions.de: Nach langer Sonneneinstrahlung leuchten die Muster auf seinen Schwanzflossen lebhaft, wenn die Dunkelheit hereinbricht.
descriptions.es: Después de una larga exposición a la luz solar, los patrones de sus aletas caudales brillan intensamente cuando llega la oscuridad.
descriptions.it: Dopo una lunga esposizione al sole, i motivi sulle sue pinne caudali brillano vividamente quando arriva il buio.
descriptions.ja: 長く 日を 浴びた あとに 暗闇に なると 尾びれの 模様が 鮮やかに 発光する。
descriptions.ko: 오랫동안 햇볕을 쬔 뒤 어두워지면 꼬리지느러미의 무늬가 선명하게 발광한다.

name: lumineon
description: It lives on the deep-sea floor. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its four tail fins.
appearance: Larger, elegant dark blue fish-like Pokémon with large, bioluminescent yellow and pink fins resembling butterfly wings, two smaller yellow pectoral fins, and delicate yellow antennae above its eyes, featuring a lighter blue underside.

descriptions.fr: Il vit au fond des mers. Il attire ses proies en faisant clignoter les motifs de ses quatre nageoires caudales.
descriptions.de: Es lebt auf dem Tiefseeboden. Es lockt Beute an, indem es die Muster auf seinen vier Schwanzflossen aufblitzen lässt.
descriptions.es: Vive en el fondo del mar profundo. Atrae a sus presas haciendo destellar los patrones de sus cuatro aletas caudales.
descriptions.it: Vive sul fondale marino. Attira le prede facendo lampeggiare i motivi sulle sue quattro pinne caudali.
descriptions.ja: 深海の 海底に 生息。 ４枚の 尾びれの 模様を 点滅させて 獲物を 誘う。
descriptions.ko: 심해 해저에 서식한다. 4장의 꼬리지느러미의 무늬를 점멸시켜 먹이를 유인한다.

name: mantyke
description: A friendly Pokémon that captures the subtle flows of seawater using its two antennae.
appearance: Small, flat, blue manta ray-like Pokémon with a white underside, two yellow circular spots on its back, and two antenna-like appendages protruding from its head.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon amical qui capte les subtils courants de l'eau de mer grâce à ses deux antennes.
descriptions.de: Ein freundliches Pokémon, das die subtilen Strömungen des Meerwassers mit seinen zwei Antennen einfängt.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon amigable que capta los sutiles flujos del agua de mar usando sus dos antenas.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon amichevole che cattura le sottili correnti marine usando le sue due antenne.
descriptions.ja: ２本の 触角で 海水の 微妙な 流れを キャッチする。 人懐っこい ポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 2개의 촉각으로 해수의 미묘한 흐름을 감지한다. 매우 온순한 포켓몬이다.

name: snover
description: It lives on snowy mountains. Having had little contact with humans, it is boldly inquisitive.
appearance: Small white and brown tree-like Pokémon with a rounded white body, a brown stump-like base, two stubby arms, a pointed white head with a green leaf-like crest, red eyes, and three green leaves on its chest.

descriptions.fr: Il vit sur les montagnes enneigées. Ayant eu peu de contact avec les humains, il est audacieusement curieux.
descriptions.de: Es lebt auf verschneiten Bergen. Da es wenig Kontakt zu Menschen hatte, ist es kühn neugierig.
descriptions.es: Vive en montañas nevadas. Al haber tenido poco contacto con los humanos, es audazmente inquisitivo.
descriptions.it: Vive sulle montagne innevate. Avendo avuto poco contatto con gli umani, è audacemente curioso.
descriptions.ja: 雪山の 生活で 人間との 接触が 少ないため 好奇心が 強く 大胆。
descriptions.ko: 설산에서 생활하여 인간과의 접촉이 적기 때문에 호기심이 강하고 대담하다.

name: abomasnow
description: It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman.
appearance: Large, bipedal yeti-like Pokémon with a shaggy white fur coat, a green tree-like crest on its head, two massive arms with three white claws, green leaf-like markings on its chest and lower back, and red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il provoque des blizzards dans les montagnes toujours enneigées. C'est l'abominable homme des neiges.
descriptions.de: Es erzeugt Schneestürme in Bergen, die immer unter Schnee begraben sind. Es ist der abscheuliche Schneemensch.
descriptions.es: Desata ventiscas en montañas que siempre están cubiertas de nieve. Es el abominable hombre de las nieves.
descriptions.it: Scatena bufere di neve sulle montagne perennemente coperte. È l'abominevole uomo delle nevi.
descriptions.ja: いつも 雪に 埋もれる 山で 吹雪を 起こす。 雪男と 呼ばれる。
descriptions.ko: 항상 눈에 덮인 산에서 눈보라를 일으킨다. 설인으로 불린다.

name: weavile
description: They live in cold regions, forming groups of four or five that hunt prey with impressive coordination.
appearance: Sleek, bipedal dark purple weasel-like Pokémon with a sharp red crest on its head, a red circular marking on its forehead, two long black 'feathers' protruding from its ears, large white claws, and a white collar-like marking on its neck.

descriptions.fr: Il vit dans les régions froides, chassant ses proies en groupes de quatre ou cinq avec une coordination impressionnante.
descriptions.de: Es lebt in kalten Regionen und jagt in Gruppen von vier oder fünf Exemplaren mit beeindruckender Koordination seine Beute.
descriptions.es: Vive en regiones frías, formando grupos de cuatro o cinco para cazar a sus presas con una coordinación impresionante.
descriptions.it: Vive nelle regioni fredde, formando gruppi di quattro o cinque esemplari che cacciano le prede con incredibile coordinazione.
descriptions.ja: 寒い地方に生息し、４、５匹の群れを作り、優れた連携で獲物を狩る。
descriptions.ko: 추운 지방에 서식하며 넷 다섯 마리가 무리를 이뤄 뛰어난 연계로 사냥감을 쫓는다.

name: magnezone
description: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.
appearance: Large, gray, disc-shaped Pokémon with three individual Magnemite-like heads attached to its central body via black magnetic arms, each head having a single large eye, and its main body featuring a red and blue ring pattern and a tall, antenna-like protrusion.

descriptions.fr: Il a évolué après avoir été exposé à un champ magnétique spécial. Trois de ses unités génèrent du magnétisme.
descriptions.de: Es entwickelte sich durch die Einwirkung eines besonderen Magnetfelds. Drei Einheiten erzeugen Magnetismus.
descriptions.es: Evolucionó al exponerse a un campo magnético especial. Tres de sus unidades generan magnetismo.
descriptions.it: Si è evoluto a seguito dell'esposizione a un campo magnetico speciale. Tre delle sue unità generano magnetismo.
descriptions.ja: 特殊な磁場を浴びて進化した。３つのユニットが磁力を発生させる。
descriptions.ko: 특수한 자기장에 노출되어 진화했다. 3개의 유닛이 자력을 발생시킨다.

name: lickilicky
description: It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with drool.
appearance: Large, pink, round Pokémon with a very long, prehensile tongue that is often seen extended, a light yellow belly, and white claws on its three-fingered hands and two-toed feet.

descriptions.fr: Il enroule les choses avec sa langue extensible. Quiconque s'en approche de trop près se retrouve trempé de sa bave.
descriptions.de: Es wickelt Gegenstände mit seiner dehnbaren Zunge ein. Wer ihm zu nahe kommt, wird mit Speichel durchnässt.
descriptions.es: Envuelve las cosas con su lengua extensible. Acercarse demasiado a él te dejará empapado de baba.
descriptions.it: Avvolge le cose con la sua lingua estensibile. Chiunque gli si avvicini troppo si ritrova inzuppato di bava.
descriptions.ja: 伸びる舌で物を巻きつける。近づきすぎるとヨダレでベトベトにされてしまう。
descriptions.ko: 늘어나는 혀로 물건을 감는다. 너무 가까이 가면 침으로 끈적하게 만들어버린다.

name: rhyperior
description: It puts rocks in holes in its palms and uses its muscles to shoot them. GEODUDE are shot at rare times.
appearance: Massive, bipedal gray rock-like Pokémon with orange-red armor plating on its chest, shoulders, and knees, a drill-like horn on its head, and two large, club-like arms with three claws.
