descriptions.fr: Il place des rochers dans les trous de ses paumes et utilise ses muscles pour les projeter. Il lui arrive rarement de projeter des RACAILLOU.
descriptions.de: Es steckt Steine in die Löcher seiner Handflächen und schleudert sie mit seinen Muskeln. Manchmal schleudert es auch KLEINSTEIN.
descriptions.es: Coloca rocas en los orificios de sus palmas y las dispara con sus músculos. En raras ocasiones, dispara GEODUDE.
descriptions.it: Inserisce rocce nei fori dei suoi palmi e le spara usando i suoi muscoli. Raramente scaglia anche GEODUDE.
descriptions.ja: 両手の穴に岩を詰め、筋肉の力で発射する。稀にイシツブテを発射することも。
descriptions.ko: 양손의 구멍에 바위를 채워 근육의 힘으로 발사한다. 드물게는 꼬마돌을 발사할 때도 있다.

name: tangrowth
description: It ensnares prey by extending arms made of vines. Losing arms to predators does not trouble it.
appearance: Large, blue, spherical Pokémon covered entirely in thick, long blue vines that serve as its limbs, obscuring its body, with two yellow eyes peeking out from among the vines and broad, flat vine-like hands.

descriptions.fr: Il piège ses proies en étendant des bras faits de lianes. La perte d'un bras face à un prédateur ne le gêne pas.
descriptions.de: Es fängt Beute, indem es Arme aus Ranken ausstreckt. Der Verlust von Gliedmaßen durch Raubtiere stört es nicht.
descriptions.es: Atrapa a sus presas extendiendo brazos hechos de lianas. La pérdida de brazos por depredadores no le preocupa.
descriptions.it: Intrappola le prede allungando le sue braccia fatte di liane. La perdita di un braccio a causa dei predatori non lo turba.
descriptions.ja: ツタでできた腕を伸ばして獲物を捕らえる。捕食者に腕を奪われても気にする様子はない。
descriptions.ko: 덩굴로 된 팔을 뻗어 사냥감을 잡는다. 포식자에게 팔을 잃어도 개의치 않는다.

name: electivire
description: As its electric charge amplifies, blue sparks begin to crackle between its horns.
appearance: Large, yellow, bipedal ape-like Pokémon with black stripes on its body, two long black tails ending in red electrical plugs, two large black-and-yellow-striped electrical horns on its head, and shoulders adorned with black fur.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque sa charge électrique s'amplifie, des étincelles bleues commencent à crépiter entre ses cornes.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich seine elektrische Ladung verstärkt, beginnen blaue Funken zwischen seinen Hörnern zu knistern.
descriptions.es: A medida que su carga eléctrica se amplifica, chispas azules comienzan a crepitar entre sus cuernos.
descriptions.it: Quando la sua carica elettrica si amplifica, scintille blu iniziano a crepitare tra le sue corna.
descriptions.ja: 電荷が増幅すると、角の間で青い火花がパチパチと音を立て始める。
descriptions.ko: 전하가 증폭되면 뿔 사이에서 파란 불꽃이 튀기 시작한다.

name: magmortar
description: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. It lives in volcanic craters.
appearance: Large, orange, bipedal duck-like Pokémon with two arm cannons resembling open muzzles, a flaming head crest, three yellow spots on its belly, and red and yellow flame patterns on its body and hands that look like open flame jets.

descriptions.fr: Il projette des boules de feu de plus de 2 000 °C depuis le bout de ses bras. Il vit dans les cratères volcaniques.
descriptions.de: Es schleudert Feuerbälle von über 2.000 °C aus den Enden seiner Arme. Es lebt in Vulkankratern.
descriptions.es: Lanza bolas de fuego de más de 2 000 °C desde los extremos de sus brazos. Vive en cráteres volcánicos.
descriptions.it: Spara palle di fuoco a oltre 2 000 °C dalle estremità delle braccia. Vive nei crateri vulcanici.
descriptions.ja: 腕の先から２０００℃以上の火の玉を放つ。火山の火口に生息する。
descriptions.ko: 양팔 끝에서 섭씨 2000도가 넘는 불덩이를 발사한다. 화산 분화구에 서식한다.

name: togekiss
description: It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently.
appearance: Large, white, bird-like Pokémon with an elegant, streamlined body, two large triangular red and blue markings on its belly, two small wings resembling angel wings, and three short protrusions on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il n'apparaîtra jamais là où il y a des conflits. Ses observations sont devenues rares récemment.
descriptions.de: Es wird niemals dort erscheinen, wo es Streit gibt. Seine Sichtungen sind in letzter Zeit selten geworden.
descriptions.es: Nunca aparecerá donde haya conflictos. Sus avistamientos se han vuelto raros recientemente.
descriptions.it: Non apparirà mai dove c'è conflitto. I suoi avvistamenti sono diventati rari di recente.
descriptions.ja: 争いのある場所には決して現れない。最近では、その目撃情報も珍しくなった。
descriptions.ko: 다툼이 있는 곳에는 절대로 나타나지 않는다. 최근에는 목격 정보도 드물어졌다.

name: yanmega
description: By churning its wings, it creates shock waves that inflict critical internal injuries to foes.
appearance: Large, green dragonfly-like Pokémon with a long, segmented body, four large translucent wings with red veins, two large red compound eyes, two large pincers at its mouth, and two sharp stinger-like protrusions on its tail.

descriptions.fr: En agitant ses ailes, il crée des ondes de choc qui infligent des blessures internes critiques à ses adversaires.
descriptions.de: Indem es seine Flügel schlägt, erzeugt es Schockwellen, die Gegnern kritische innere Verletzungen zufügen.
descriptions.es: Al batir sus alas, crea ondas de choque que infligen lesiones internas críticas a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Battendo le ali, crea onde d'urto che infliggono gravi lesioni interne ai nemici.
descriptions.ja: 翅を激しく打ちつけ、衝撃波を発生させる。敵に致命的な内臓損傷を与える。
descriptions.ko: 날개를 크게 퍼덕여 충격파를 발생시킨다. 적에게 치명적인 내장 손상을 입힌다.

name: leafeon
description: Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air.
appearance: Quadrupedal, light brown feline Pokémon with a body primarily covered in green leaf-like fur, particularly on its ears, paws, and tail, which is a large, pointed leaf, and small green leaves growing from its head and legs.

descriptions.fr: Tout comme une plante, il utilise la photosynthèse. En conséquence, il est toujours enveloppé d'air pur.
descriptions.de: Wie eine Pflanze betreibt es Photosynthese. Dadurch ist es stets von klarer Luft umhüllt.
descriptions.es: Al igual que una planta, utiliza la fotosíntesis. Como resultado, siempre está envuelto en aire puro.
descriptions.it: Proprio come una pianta, usa la fotosintesi. Di conseguenza, è sempre avvolto da aria limpida.
descriptions.ja: 植物のように光合成を行う。そのため、常に澄んだ空気に包まれている。
descriptions.ko: 식물처럼 광합성을 한다. 그래서 항상 맑은 공기에 둘러싸여 있다.

name: glaceon
description: As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles.
appearance: Quadrupedal, light blue feline Pokémon with a sleek body, diamond-shaped dark blue markings on its back and tail, two dark blue crests on its head, two long, flowing dark blue ribbons extending from its head, and a white diamond pattern on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: Pour se protéger, il peut geler complètement sa fourrure pour que ses poils se dressent comme des aiguilles.
descriptions.de: Als Schutztechnik kann es sein Fell vollständig einfrieren, sodass seine Haare wie Nadeln abstehen.
descriptions.es: Como técnica defensiva, puede congelar por completo su pelaje para que sus pelos se ericen como agujas.
descriptions.it: Come tecnica di difesa, può congelare completamente la sua pelliccia, facendole rizzare i peli come aghi.
descriptions.ja: 身を守るため、毛を凍らせて硬く尖らせ、針のようにする。
descriptions.ko: 자신을 지키는 기술로 털을 완전히 얼려 털 한 올 한 올을 바늘처럼 뾰족하게 만든다.

name: gliscor
description: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!
appearance: Purple bat-like scorpion Pokémon with large, red, pointed ears, a long tail ending in a stinger, two large, curved pincers, a black marking on its forehead, and two large, translucent wings.

descriptions.fr: Il observe ses proies suspendu la tête en bas aux branches. Quand l'occasion se présente, il fond sur elles !
descriptions.de: Es beobachtet Beute, während es kopfüber an Ästen hängt. Wenn die Gelegenheit günstig ist, stürzt es sich herab!
descriptions.es: Observa a sus presas colgado invertido de las ramas. Cuando se presenta la ocasión, ¡se abalanza!
descriptions.it: Osserva le prede mentre pende a testa in giù dai rami. Appena si presenta l'occasione, si avventa!
descriptions.ja: 枝から逆さまにぶら下がり、獲物を観察する。好機があれば、急降下して襲いかかる。
descriptions.ko: 나뭇가지에 거꾸로 매달려 먹이를 관찰한다. 기회가 오면 급강하하여 덮친다!

name: mamoswine
description: Its impressive tusks are made of ice. The population thinned when it turned warm after the ice age.
appearance: Massive, shaggy brown mammoth-like Pokémon with two large white tusks, two smaller blue tusks, a distinctive blue face mask pattern around its eyes, and a patch of light blue fur on its back.

descriptions.fr: Ses impressionnantes défenses sont faites de glace. Sa population a diminué lorsque la température s'est réchauffée après l'ère glaciaire.
descriptions.de: Seine beeindruckenden Stoßzähne bestehen aus Eis. Seine Population verringerte sich, als es nach der Eiszeit wärmer wurde.
descriptions.es: Sus impresionantes colmillos están hechos de hielo. Su población disminuyó cuando se calentó después de la edad de hielo.
descriptions.it: Le sue impressionanti zanne sono fatte di ghiaccio. La popolazione si è assottigliata quando il clima si è scaldato dopo l'era glaciale.
descriptions.ja: 氷でできた立派なキバを持つ。氷河期後、温暖化すると数が減った。
descriptions.ko: 얼음으로 된 훌륭한 엄니를 가졌다. 빙하기 후 기온이 따뜻해지자 수가 줄었다.

name: porygon-z
description: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokémon. It began acting oddly, however.
appearance: Jagged, pink and blue digital duck-like Pokémon with a head that spins erratically, a blue-and-pink striped body, a dislocated, zigzagging tail, a large yellow eye, and two small, stubby feet.

descriptions.fr: Un logiciel additionnel fut installé pour en faire un meilleur Pokémon. Cependant, il commença à agir étrangement.
descriptions.de: Zusätzliche Software wurde installiert, um es zu einem besseren Pokémon zu machen. Es begann jedoch, sich seltsam zu verhalten.
descriptions.es: Se le instaló software adicional para mejorarlo como Pokémon. Sin embargo, empezó a actuar de forma extraña.
descriptions.it: Software aggiuntivo fu installato per renderlo un Pokémon migliore. Iniziò però a comportarsi stranamente.
descriptions.ja: より良いポケモンにするため、追加のソフトウェアがインストールされたが、奇妙な行動を始めた。
descriptions.ko: 더 좋은 포켓몬으로 만들려고 추가 소프트웨어를 설치했으나 이상한 행동을 하기 시작했다.

name: gallade
description: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.
appearance: Tall, white bipedal Pokémon with a sleek body, green blade-like arms extending from its elbows, a red crest on its head, a green chest, and pointed white 'skirt' appendages around its waist.

descriptions.fr: Maître de la courtoisie et de l'escrime, il combat à l'aide d'épées extensibles sur ses coudes.
descriptions.de: Ein Meister der Höflichkeit und des Schwertkampfs, es kämpft mit ausfahrbaren Klingen an seinen Ellbogen.
descriptions.es: Maestro de la cortesía y la esgrima, lucha usando espadas extensibles en sus codos.
descriptions.it: Maestro di cortesia e scherma, combatte usando lame estensibili sui gomiti.
descriptions.ja: 礼儀と剣術の達人。肘から伸びる剣を使って戦う。
descriptions.ko: 예의와 검술의 달인. 팔꿈치에서 튀어나오는 검을 써서 싸운다.

name: probopass
description: It freely controls three small units called Mini-Noses using magnetic force.
appearance: Large, gray, rock-like Pokémon with a prominent red, magnetic nose and three small, gray 'Mini Noses' that float around it, featuring large, bushy white mustaches and blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il contrôle librement trois petites unités appelées «Mini-Nez» grâce à la force magnétique.
descriptions.de: Es steuert drei kleine Einheiten namens „Mini-Nasen“ mithilfe magnetischer Kraft.
descriptions.es: Controla libremente tres pequeñas unidades llamadas Mini-Narices usando la fuerza magnética.
descriptions.it: Controlla liberamente tre piccole unità chiamate Mini-Nasi usando la forza magnetica.
descriptions.ja: 磁力で「チビノーズ」と呼ばれる３つの小さなユニットを自由に操る。
descriptions.ko: 자력으로 미니코라는 3개의 작은 유닛을 자유자재로 조종한다.

name: dusknoir
description: The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that command it to take people there.
appearance: Large, gray, bipedal ghost-like Pokémon with a single large red eye, a round, spherical body that opens like a mouth on its belly, two large, floating hands, yellow markings on its chest, and a short, antenna-like protrusion on its head.

descriptions.fr: L'antenne sur sa tête capte les ondes radio du monde des esprits qui lui ordonnent d'y emmener les gens.
descriptions.de: Die Antenne auf seinem Kopf empfängt Radiowellen aus der Geisterwelt, die es befehlen, Menschen dorthin zu bringen.
descriptions.es: La antena de su cabeza capta ondas de radio del mundo de los espíritus que le ordenan llevar a la gente allí.
descriptions.it: L'antenna sulla sua testa capta le onde radio dal mondo degli spiriti che gli ordinano di portarvi le persone.
descriptions.ja: 頭のアンテナが霊界からの電波をキャッチし、人々をあの世に誘う命令を受け取る。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 안테나는 영계로부터 전파를 캐치하여 사람들을 저세상으로 데려오라는 명령을 받는다.

name: froslass
description: It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees F. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.
appearance: Elegant, white ghost-like Pokémon with a kimono-like body, two ice crystal-like 'horns' on its head, a red sash-like marking around its waist, a pale blue face, and a body that fades into a translucent, spectral tail.

descriptions.fr: Elle gèle ses ennemis avec un souffle glacial de près de -60 degrés Fahrenheit. Ce qui semble être son corps est en réalité creux.
descriptions.de: Es friert Feinde mit einem eisigen Atem von fast -60 Grad Fahrenheit ein. Was wie sein Körper aussieht, ist tatsächlich hohl.
descriptions.es: Congela a sus enemigos con un aliento helado de casi -60 grados F. Lo que parece ser su cuerpo está realmente hueco.
descriptions.it: Congela i nemici con un alito gelido di quasi -60 gradi Fahrenheit. Ciò che sembra essere il suo corpo è in realtà cavo.
descriptions.ja: 零下６０度近い冷気で敵を凍らせる。その姿に見える部分は、実は空洞である。
descriptions.ko: 영하 60도에 가까운 냉기로 적을 얼린다. 몸처럼 보이는 부분은 사실 텅 비어있다.

name: rotom
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: Small, red, electric ghost-like Pokémon composed of a plasma-like body with two blue, electrical wave-like appendages, a single blue eye, and a distinct white lightbulb shape within its core.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est composé de plasma. Il est connu pour infiltrer les appareils électroniques et y semer la pagaille.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper besteht aus Plasma. Es ist bekannt dafür, elektronische Geräte zu infiltrieren und Chaos zu stiften.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo está compuesto de plasma. Es conocido por infiltrarse en aparatos electrónicos y causar estragos.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo è composto di plasma. È noto per infiltrarsi negli apparecchi elettronici e seminare il caos.
descriptions.ja: 体はプラズマでできている。電化製品に入り込み、いたずらをする。
descriptions.ko: 몸은 플라스마로 되어 있다. 전자기기에 스며들어 장난을 치는 것으로 알려져 있다.

name: uxie
description: Known as “The Being of Knowledge.” It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes.
appearance: Small, yellow, fairy-like Pokémon with a rounded body, two short legs, two long, pointed tails extending from its head like hair, a large round head with a red jewel on its forehead, and two dark, almond-shaped eyes.

descriptions.fr: Connu comme «l'Être du Savoir». On dit qu'il peut effacer la mémoire de ceux qui voient ses yeux.
descriptions.de: Bekannt als „Das Wesen des Wissens“. Es wird gesagt, dass es das Gedächtnis derer auslöschen kann, die seine Augen sehen.
descriptions.es: Conocido como “El Ser del Conocimiento”. Se dice que puede borrar la memoria de aquellos que ven sus ojos.
descriptions.it: Conosciuto come “L'Essere della Conoscenza”. Si dice che possa cancellare la memoria di coloro che vedono i suoi occhi.
descriptions.ja: 「知識の神」として知られる。その目を見た者の記憶を消し去ることができるといわれる。
descriptions.ko: '지식의 신'으로 알려졌다. 그 눈을 본 자의 기억을 지워버릴 수 있다고 전해진다.

name: mesprit
description: Known as “The Being of Emotion.” It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.
appearance: pink humanoid fairy-like creature with two long, flat, yellow tails, a red gem on its forehead, and white-capped ears

descriptions.fr: Connu comme « L'Être de l'Émotion ». Il a enseigné aux humains la noblesse de la tristesse, de la douleur et de la joie.
descriptions.de: Bekannt als „Das Wesen der Emotionen“. Es lehrte die Menschen die Erhabenheit von Trauer, Schmerz und Freude.
descriptions.es: Conocido como «El Ser de la Emoción». Enseñó a los humanos la nobleza de la tristeza, el dolor y la alegría.
descriptions.it: Conosciuto come «L'Essere dell'Emozione». Ha insegnato agli umani la nobiltà del dolore, della pena e della gioia.
descriptions.ja: 「感情の神」として知られる。人間には、悲しみ、痛み、そして喜びの尊さを教えた。
descriptions.ko: 「감정의 신」으로 알려져 있다. 인간에게 슬픔과 고통, 그리고 기쁨의 고귀함을 가르쳤다.

name: azelf
description: Known as “The Being of Willpower.” It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to keep the world in balance.
appearance: blue humanoid fairy-like creature with two long, flat, red tails, a blue gem on its forehead, and two pointed ears

descriptions.fr: Connu comme « L'Être de la Volonté ». Il dort au fond d'un lac pour maintenir l'équilibre du monde.
descriptions.de: Bekannt als „Das Wesen des Willens“. Es schläft am Grund eines Sees, um das Gleichgewicht der Welt zu wahren.
descriptions.es: Conocido como «El Ser de la Voluntad». Duerme en el fondo de un lago para mantener el equilibrio del mundo.
descriptions.it: Conosciuto come «L'Essere della Volontà». Dorme sul fondo di un lago per mantenere l'equilibrio del mondo.
descriptions.ja: 「意思の神」として知られる。世界のバランスを保つため、湖の底で眠り続けている。
descriptions.ko: 「의지의 신」으로 알려져 있다. 세계의 균형을 지키기 위해 호수 바닥에서 잠들어 있다.

name: dialga
description: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.
appearance: large, metallic blue sauropod-like dragon with gray undersides, a diamond-shaped chest plate, and large silver shoulder plates resembling wings, with light blue striped markings on its back

descriptions.fr: Il possède le pouvoir de contrôler le temps. Il apparaît dans les mythes de la région de Sinnoh comme une divinité ancienne.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt die Kraft, die Zeit zu kontrollieren. In den Mythen der Sinnoh-Region erscheint es als eine alte Gottheit.
descriptions.es: Tiene el poder de controlar el tiempo. Aparece en los mitos de la región de Sinnoh como una deidad antigua.
descriptions.it: Ha il potere di controllare il tempo. Appare nei miti della regione di Sinnoh come un'antica divinità.
descriptions.ja: 時間を操る力を持つ。シンオウ地方の神話では、古代の神として登場する。
descriptions.ko: 시간을 조종하는 힘을 지녔다. 신오지방의 신화에선 고대의 신으로 등장한다.

name: palkia
description: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.
appearance: large, purplish-white bipedal dragon with gray undersides, two pearl-like orbs on its shoulders, and wing-like structures extending from its back, marked with dark purple stripes on its chest and arms

descriptions.fr: Il a la capacité de déformer l'espace. Il est décrit comme une divinité dans la mythologie de la région de Sinnoh.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt die Fähigkeit, den Raum zu verzerren. In der Mythologie der Sinnoh-Region wird es als Gottheit beschrieben.
descriptions.es: Tiene la habilidad de distorsionar el espacio. Se le describe como una deidad en la mitología de la región de Sinnoh.
descriptions.it: Ha l'abilità di distorcere lo spazio. È descritto come una divinità nella mitologia della regione di Sinnoh.
descriptions.ja: 空間を歪める能力を持つ。シンオウ地方の神話では、神として記述されている。
descriptions.ko: 공간을 왜곡하는 능력을 지녔다. 신오지방의 신화에서 신으로 묘사된다.

name: heatran
description: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.
appearance: large, four-legged lava-dwelling creature with a metallic orange and gray body, red-orange magma bubbles on its back, iron shackles on its legs, and a prominent orange mask-like feature on its face

descriptions.fr: Il réside dans les grottes volcaniques. Il s'accroche avec ses pieds en forme de croix pour ramper sur les plafonds et les murs.
descriptions.de: Es lebt in vulkanischen Höhlen. Mit seinen kreuzförmigen Füßen krallt es sich an Decken und Wänden fest, um sich fortzubewegen.
descriptions.es: Habita en cuevas volcánicas. Se agarra con sus pies en forma de cruz para arrastrarse por techos y paredes.
descriptions.it: Vive in grotte vulcaniche. Si aggrappa con le sue zampe a croce per arrampicarsi su soffitti e pareti.
descriptions.ja: 火山洞窟に生息する。十字型の足で壁や天井に張り付き、這い回る。
descriptions.ko: 화산 동굴에 서식한다. 십자형 발로 벽과 천장에 들러붙어 기어다닌다.

name: regigigas
description: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.
appearance: massive, white golem-like Pokemon with black stripes on its body, seven colored gems arranged on its chest in a specific pattern, and long, thick arms with large hands, topped by two large, flat projections on its head

descriptions.fr: Une légende persistante raconte que ce Pokémon a tracté des continents avec des cordes.
descriptions.de: Eine alte Legende besagt, dass dieses Pokémon Kontinente mit Seilen geschleppt hat.
descriptions.es: Existe una leyenda perdurable que afirma que este Pokémon remolcó continentes con cuerdas.
descriptions.it: Esiste una leggenda duratura che afferma che questo Pokémon abbia trainato i continenti con delle corde.
descriptions.ja: 大陸をロープで引っ張ったという不朽の伝説があるポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 대륙을 밧줄로 끌었다는 오래된 전설이 있는 포켓몬이다.

name: giratina-altered
description: A Pokémon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.
appearance: large, serpentine dragon with six golden, spiked appendages protruding from its back, a gray body, black stripes, a golden chest plate, and red eyes with a large, toothy mouth

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon qui vivrait dans un monde inversé au nôtre. Il apparaît dans un ancien cimetière.
descriptions.de: Ein Pokémon, das angeblich in einer Spiegelwelt lebt. Es erscheint auf einem alten Friedhof.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon que se dice que vive en un mundo al revés del nuestro. Aparece en un antiguo cementerio.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon che si dice viva in un mondo al rovescio del nostro. Appare in un antico cimitero.
descriptions.ja: 我々の世界の裏側にある世界に住むといわれるポケモン。古代の墓場に現れる。
descriptions.ko: 우리 세계의 뒤편에 있는 세계에 산다고 하는 포켓몬. 고대의 묘지에 나타난다.

display_names.ja: ギラティナ アナザーフォルム

name: cresselia
description: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.
appearance: swan-like bipedal Pokémon with a crescent moon-shaped head crest, a light pink body, yellow ring patterns on its underside, and two large, feathery wings that glow blue, pink, and yellow

descriptions.fr: Des particules brillantes s'échappent de ses ailes comme un voile. Il est dit qu'il représente le croissant de lune.
descriptions.de: Glänzende Partikel lösen sich wie ein Schleier von seinen Flügeln. Es soll den Halbmond repräsentieren.
descriptions.es: Partículas brillantes se liberan de sus alas como un velo. Se dice que representa la luna creciente.
descriptions.it: Particelle brillanti vengono rilasciate dalle sue ali come un velo. Si dice che rappresenti la luna crescente.
descriptions.ja: 翼から輝く粒子をベールのように放つ。三日月を表すといわれている。
descriptions.ko: 날개에서 빛나는 입자를 베일처럼 뿌린다. 초승달을 상징한다고 전해진다.

name: phione
description: It drifts in warm seas. It always returns to where it was born, no matter how far it may have drifted.
appearance: small, light blue marine creature with a round head, a small blue antenna topped with a red sphere, and a collar-like frill around its neck, possessing two small flippers and a translucent body with an inner blue core

descriptions.fr: Il dérive dans les mers chaudes. Il retourne toujours à son lieu de naissance, peu importe la distance parcourue.
descriptions.de: Es treibt in warmen Meeren. Egal wie weit es treibt, es kehrt immer an seinen Geburtsort zurück.
descriptions.es: Se desplaza por los mares cálidos. Siempre regresa a donde nació, sin importar cuánto se haya alejado.
descriptions.it: Si sposta nei mari caldi. Ritorna sempre nel luogo in cui è nato, non importa quanto si sia allontanato.
descriptions.ja: 暖かい海を漂う。どんなに遠くまで流されても、必ず生まれた場所へ戻る。
descriptions.ko: 따뜻한 바다를 떠돈다. 아무리 멀리 흘러가도 반드시 태어난 장소로 돌아온다.

name: manaphy
description: Born on a cold seafloor, it will swim great distances to return to its birthplace.
appearance: small, light blue marine creature with a round head, two long blue antennae topped with yellow spheres, and a large collar-like frill around its neck, possessing two small flippers and an inner blue core visible through its translucent body

descriptions.fr: Né dans un fond marin froid, il nage de grandes distances pour retourner à son lieu de naissance.
descriptions.de: Auf einem kalten Meeresgrund geboren, schwimmt es weite Strecken, um zu seinem Geburtsort zurückzukehren.
descriptions.es: Nacido en un frío fondo marino, nadará grandes distancias para regresar a su lugar de nacimiento.
descriptions.it: Nato in un freddo fondale marino, nuoterà per grandi distanze per ritornare al suo luogo di nascita.
descriptions.ja: 冷たい海底で生まれ、生まれた場所へ戻るため、長距離を泳ぎ続ける。
descriptions.ko: 차가운 해저에서 태어나며 태어난 곳으로 돌아가기 위해 먼 거리를 헤엄친다.

name: darkrai
description: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.
appearance: tall, shadowy, ghost-like figure with a small head, a white tuft of smoke-like hair, a tattered, black cape-like body ending in a red pointed structure, and red eyes with a single white claw-like protrusion on its chest

descriptions.fr: Il peut endormir les gens et leur faire faire des rêves. Il est actif les nuits de nouvelle lune.
descriptions.de: Es kann Menschen in den Schlaf wiegen und ihnen Träume schicken. Es ist in Neumondnächten aktiv.
descriptions.es: Puede adormecer a la gente y hacerles soñar. Está activo durante las noches de luna nueva.
descriptions.it: Può far addormentare le persone e far loro fare sogni. È attivo nelle notti di luna nuova.
descriptions.ja: 人々を眠らせ、夢を見させることができる。新月の夜に活動する。
descriptions.ko: 사람들을 잠들게 하고 꿈을 꾸게 할 수 있다. 초승달이 뜨는 밤에 활동한다.

name: shaymin-land
description: It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant.
appearance: small, white hedgehog-like creature with green grass-like fur on its back, a pink gracidea flower on its head, and two green leaf-like ears

descriptions.fr: Il vit dans les parterres de fleurs et évite d'être détecté en se recroquevillant pour ressembler à une plante fleurie.
descriptions.de: Es lebt in Blumenbeeten und entgeht der Entdeckung, indem es sich zusammenrollt, um wie eine blühende Pflanze auszusehen.
descriptions.es: Vive en campos de flores y evita ser detectado al enroscarse para parecer una planta florecida.
descriptions.it: Vive tra i fiori ed evita di essere individuato raggomitolandosi per assomigliare a una pianta fiorita.
descriptions.ja: 花畑に生息し、花が咲いた植物のように丸まって身を隠す。
descriptions.ko: 꽃밭에 살며 몸을 웅크려 꽃이 피어 있는 식물처럼 보여서 발견되지 않는다.

display_names.ja: シェイミ ランドフォルム

name: arceus
description: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.
appearance: large, equine-like creature with a white body, a golden cross-like wheel structure on its torso, a grey underbelly, green eyes, and golden hooves

descriptions.fr: La mythologie le décrit comme le Pokémon qui a façonné l'univers avec ses 1 000 bras.
descriptions.de: Es wird in der Mythologie als das Pokémon beschrieben, das mit seinen 1 000 Armen das Universum geformt hat.
descriptions.es: En la mitología se le describe como el Pokémon que moldeó el universo con sus 1.000 brazos.
descriptions.it: La mitologia lo descrive come il Pokémon che ha plasmato l'universo con le sue 1 000 braccia.
descriptions.ja: 神話では、1,000本の腕で宇宙を形作ったポケモンとされている。
descriptions.ko: 신화에 의하면 1,000개의 팔로 우주를 만들었다고 전해지는 포켓몬이다.

name: victini
description: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.
appearance: small, white rabbit-like creature with large blue eyes, two large pointed ears resembling the letter 'V', orange-tipped appendages on its head, and small orange wings on its back

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon apporte la victoire. On dit que les Dresseurs qui ont Victini gagnent toujours, quel que soit le type de rencontre.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon bringt den Sieg. Es wird gesagt, dass Trainer mit Victini immer gewinnen, unabhängig von der Art der Begegnung.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon trae la victoria. Se dice que los Entrenadores con Victini siempre ganan, sin importar el tipo de encuentro.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon porta la vittoria. Si dice che gli Allenatori con Victini vincano sempre, indipendentemente dal tipo di incontro.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは勝利をもたらす。ビクティニを持つトレーナーは、どんな相手でも必ず勝つと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 승리를 가져온다. 비크티니를 가진 트레이너는 어떤 상황에서도 반드시 이긴다고 전해진다.

name: snivy
description: It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter.
appearance: small, green bipedal snake-like Pokémon with a large, flat, leaf-shaped tail, a yellow collar-like marking around its neck, and yellow markings around its eyes

descriptions.fr: Il est très intelligent et calme. Être exposé à beaucoup de soleil rend ses mouvements plus rapides.
descriptions.de: Es ist sehr intelligent und ruhig. Viel Sonnenlicht macht seine Bewegungen schneller.
descriptions.es: Es muy inteligente y tranquilo. Estar expuesto a mucha luz solar hace que sus movimientos sean más rápidos.
descriptions.it: È molto intelligente e calmo. L'esposizione a molta luce solare rende i suoi movimenti più veloci.
descriptions.ja: とても賢く、落ち着いている。多くの日光を浴びると、動きがより素早くなる。
descriptions.ko: 매우 영리하고 침착하다. 햇빛을 많이 쬐면 움직임이 더욱 민첩해진다.

name: servine
description: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip.
appearance: slender, green bipedal snake-like Pokémon with short arms, two large leaf-like structures on its back, and a large, curled leaf-shaped tail, featuring yellow markings around its eyes and a yellow collar-like band

descriptions.fr: Il se déplace sur le sol comme s'il glissait. Ses mouvements rapides déroutent ses ennemis, et il attaque ensuite avec Fouet Lianes.
descriptions.de: Es gleitet über den Boden. Seine schnellen Bewegungen verwirren seine Feinde, und dann greift es mit Rankenhieb an.
descriptions.es: Se mueve por el suelo como si se deslizara. Sus movimientos rápidos confunden a sus enemigos, y luego ataca con Látigo Cepa.
descriptions.it: Si muove sul terreno come se scivolasse. I suoi movimenti rapidi confondono i suoi nemici, e poi attacca con Frustata.
descriptions.ja: 地面を滑るように移動する。その素早い動きで敵を惑わせ、その後つるのムチで攻撃する。
descriptions.ko: 땅 위를 미끄러지듯이 움직인다. 민첩한 움직임으로 적을 혼란시키고 덩굴채찍으로 공격한다.

name: serperior
description: It can stop its opponents’ movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.
appearance: long, green serpentine Pokémon with two small arms, a large, ornate collar-like structure around its neck, and a very long tail ending in a three-pointed leaf shape, with yellow markings around its eyes and intricate yellow patterns on its back

descriptions.fr: Il peut arrêter les mouvements de ses adversaires d'un simple regard. Il absorbe l'énergie solaire et l'augmente en interne.
descriptions.de: Es kann die Bewegungen seiner Gegner mit nur einem Blick stoppen. Es nimmt Sonnenenergie auf und verstärkt sie intern.
descriptions.es: Puede detener los movimientos de sus oponentes con solo una mirada. Absorbe energía solar y la potencia internamente.
descriptions.it: Può bloccare i movimenti dei suoi avversari con un solo sguardo. Assorbe energia solare e la potenzia internamente.
descriptions.ja: 睨むだけで相手の動きを止めることができる。太陽エネルギーを取り込み、体内で増幅させる。
descriptions.ko: 노려보는 것만으로도 상대의 움직임을 멈출 수 있다. 태양 에너지를 받아들여 체내에서 증폭시킨다.

name: tepig
description: It can deftly dodge its foe’s attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.
appearance: four-legged piglet-like Pokémon with an orange body, a black snout, black ears, and a red tuft on its tail, featuring yellow markings around its eyes and black hooves

descriptions.fr: Il peut habilement esquiver les attaques de son ennemi tout en tirant des boules de feu par le nez. Il fait rôtir les baies avant de les manger.
descriptions.de: Es kann den Angriffen seiner Feinde geschickt ausweichen, während es Feuerbälle aus seiner Nase schießt. Es röstet Beeren, bevor es sie isst.
descriptions.es: Puede esquivar hábilmente los ataques de su enemigo mientras lanza bolas de fuego por la nariz. Asa las bayas antes de comerlas.
descriptions.it: Può schivare abilmente gli attacchi del nemico mentre spara palle di fuoco dal naso. Arroste le bacche prima di mangiarle.
descriptions.ja: 鼻から火の玉を撃ちながら、敵の攻撃を巧みにかわす。木の実を焼いてから食べる。
descriptions.ko: 코에서 불덩이를 쏘면서 적의 공격을 재빠르게 피한다. 나무열매는 구워서 먹는다.

name: pignite
description: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.
appearance: bipedal pig-like Pokémon with an orange and black body, a pointed red snout, a fiery collar of orange and yellow around its neck, and black markings on its limbs

descriptions.fr: Lorsque son feu interne s'embrase, ses mouvements deviennent plus nets et plus rapides. En cas de problème, il émet de la fumée.
descriptions.de: Wenn sein inneres Feuer aufflammt, werden seine Bewegungen schärfer und schneller. Wenn es in Schwierigkeiten ist, stößt es Rauch aus.
descriptions.es: Cuando su fuego interno se aviva, sus movimientos se vuelven más nítidos y rápidos. Cuando está en problemas, emite humo.
descriptions.it: Quando il suo fuoco interno si accende, i suoi movimenti diventano più acuti e veloci. In caso di problemi, emette fumo.
descriptions.ja: 体内の炎が燃え上がると、動きがより鋭く速くなる。困ったときは煙を出す。
descriptions.ko: 몸 안의 불꽃이 타오르면 움직임이 더 날카로워지고 빨라진다. 곤란할 때는 연기를 뿜는다.

name: emboar
description: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.
appearance: large, bipedal pig-like Pokémon with a fiery beard, a red and black body with golden armor-like markings, and burning flames on its shoulders, possessing large and powerful arms

descriptions.fr: Il peut lancer un poing de feu en enflammant ses poings avec son menton ardent. Il tient profondément à ses amis.
descriptions.de: Es kann einen Feuerstoß werfen, indem es seine Fäuste mit seinem feurigen Kinn entzündet. Es kümmert sich zutiefst um seine Freunde.
descriptions.es: Puede lanzar un puñetazo de fuego prendiendo sus puños con su barbilla ardiente. Se preocupa profundamente por sus amigos.
descriptions.it: Può lanciare un Pugno di Fuoco infiammando i suoi pugni con il suo mento ardente. Tiene molto ai suoi amici.
descriptions.ja: 炎のあごで拳を燃やし、炎のパンチを繰り出す。仲間を深く大切にする。
descriptions.ko: 불꽃 턱으로 주먹을 태워 불꽃펀치를 날린다. 동료를 깊이 생각한다.

name: oshawott
description: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.
appearance: small, bipedal otter-like Pokémon with a white body, a dark blue head, a light blue shell on its belly, a small dark blue nose, and two small buck teeth

descriptions.fr: Il combat avec le couteau-coquille sur son ventre. En réponse à une attaque, il riposte immédiatement en tranchant.
descriptions.de: Es kämpft mit der Muschel auf seinem Bauch. Auf Angriffe reagiert es mit sofortigen Schnitten.
descriptions.es: Lucha con la vieira de su vientre. Cuando es atacado, contraataca de inmediato con un tajo.
descriptions.it: Combatte usando la conchiglia sul suo stomaco. In risposta a un attacco, contrattacca immediatamente.
descriptions.ja: お腹のホタチで戦う。攻撃されると、すぐにホタチを抜いて反撃する。
descriptions.ko: 배의 가리비칼로 싸운다. 공격을 받으면 곧바로 가리비칼을 뽑아 반격한다.

name: dewott
description: Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique.
appearance: bipedal otter-like Pokémon with a dark blue and white body, two scalchops (shells) on its thighs, and a distinctive dark blue shell on its chest, with a dark blue head featuring a pointed crest

descriptions.fr: C'est par un entraînement rigoureux qu'il apprend sa technique fluide du double couteau-coquille.
descriptions.de: Durch strenges Training erlernt es seine fließende Doppel-Muschelschlag-Technik.
descriptions.es: A base de un entrenamiento estricto, aprende su fluida técnica de doble vieira.
descriptions.it: È tramite un rigoroso allenamento che apprende la sua fluida tecnica del doppio guscio.
descriptions.ja: 厳しい鍛錬によって流れるようなダブルホタチ捌きを習得する。
descriptions.ko: 엄격한 훈련으로 유려한 더블 가리비칼 기술을 터득한다.

name: samurott
description: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.
appearance: large, quadrupedal sea lion-like Pokémon with a dark blue body, a large yellow shell on its head forming a horn, and two large, curved scalchops on its front legs, possessing a white underbelly and a dark blue beard-like feature

descriptions.fr: Un seul coup de l'épée incorporée à son armure peut terrasser un adversaire. Un simple regard de sa part calme tout le monde.
descriptions.de: Ein einziger Schwerthieb aus seiner Rüstung kann einen Gegner besiegen. Ein einfacher Blick von ihm beruhigt jeden.
descriptions.es: Un solo golpe de la espada que incorpora su armadura puede derribar a un oponente. Una simple mirada suya silencia a todos.
descriptions.it: Un singolo colpo della spada incorporata nella sua armatura può abbattere un avversario. Un suo semplice sguardo zittisce tutti.
descriptions.ja: 甲冑に仕込まれた刀の一振りで敵を打ち倒す。威厳ある眼光で、誰もが静まり返る。
descriptions.ko: 갑옷에 숨겨진 칼 한 번 휘둘러 적을 쓰러뜨린다. 위엄 있는 눈빛으로 모두를 침묵하게 만든다.

name: patrat
description: Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watch for days. They use their tails to communicate with others.
appearance: small, brown chipmunk-like Pokémon with large, round eyes, a bushy tail, and a prominent red and white striped pattern on its face resembling goggles, featuring a large white front tooth

descriptions.fr: Grâce à la nourriture stockée dans leurs abajoues, ils peuvent surveiller pendant des jours. Ils utilisent leur queue pour communiquer.
descriptions.de: Mit in den Backentaschen gelagerten Nahrungsmitteln können sie tagelang Wache halten. Sie benutzen ihre Schwänze, um mit anderen zu kommunizieren.
descriptions.es: Con la comida que guardan en sus mofletes, pueden vigilar durante días. Usan sus colas para comunicarse.
descriptions.it: Grazie al cibo immagazzinato nelle guance, possono vegliare per giorni. Usano la coda per comunicare con gli altri.
descriptions.ja: 頬袋にためたエサで数日間見張りができる。尻尾を使って仲間とコミュニケーションをとる。
descriptions.ko: 볼주머니에 저장한 먹이로 며칠 동안 망을 볼 수 있다. 꼬리를 사용하여 동료들과 의사소통한다.

name: watchog
description: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.
appearance: bipedal meerkat-like Pokémon with a light brown body, two large yellow-and-red striped circular markings on its chest, and large black eyes with white pupils, possessing a bushy tail and glowing red-and-yellow striped patterns on its arms and head

descriptions.fr: Quand ils voient un ennemi, leurs queues se dressent, et ils crachent les graines de baies stockées dans leurs abajoues.
descriptions.de: Wenn sie einen Feind sehen, richten sich ihre Schwänze auf und sie spucken die in ihren Backentaschen gelagerten Beerensamen aus.
descriptions.es: Cuando ven a un enemigo, levantan la cola y escupen las semillas de las bayas que guardan en sus mofletes.
descriptions.it: Quando vedono un nemico, le loro code si alzano e sputano i semi delle bacche immagazzinate nelle guance.
descriptions.ja: 敵を見つけると尻尾を高く立て、頬袋にためたきのみのタネを吐き出す。
descriptions.ko: 적을 발견하면 꼬리를 높이 세우고 볼주머니에 저장한 나무열매 씨앗을 뱉어낸다.

name: lillipup
description: It faces strong opponents with great courage. But, when at a disadvantage in a fight, this intelligent Pokémon flees.
appearance: small, brown quadrupedal puppy-like Pokémon with a large white fur collar, a dark brown snout, and floppy brown ears

descriptions.fr: Il affronte les adversaires puissants avec grand courage. Mais, lorsqu'il est désavantagé au combat, ce Pokémon intelligent s'enfuit.
descriptions.de: Es stellt sich starken Gegnern mit großem Mut. Doch wenn es im Kampf im Nachteil ist, flieht dieses intelligente Pokémon.
descriptions.es: Se enfrenta a oponentes fuertes con gran coraje. Pero, si se encuentra en desventaja, este inteligente Pokémon huye.
descriptions.it: Affronta avversari potenti con grande coraggio. Ma, quando è in svantaggio in un combattimento, questo intelligente Pokémon fugge.
descriptions.ja: 強い相手には勇敢に立ち向かう。しかし不利と見ると、この賢いポケモンは逃げ出す。
descriptions.ko: 강한 상대를 용감하게 마주한다. 하지만 불리하다고 판단하면 이 영리한 포켓몬은 도망친다.

name: herdier
description: It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.
appearance: medium-sized, blue-gray quadrupedal dog-like Pokémon with a long, thick black beard and mustache, dark blue fur on its head, a white fur collar, and lighter blue-gray paws

descriptions.fr: Il possède une fourrure noire, semblable à une cape, très dure qui diminue les dégâts qu'il reçoit.
descriptions.de: Es hat schwarzes, umhangartiges Fell, das sehr hart ist und den erlittenen Schaden verringert.
descriptions.es: Tiene un pelaje negro en forma de capa que es muy duro y disminuye el daño que recibe.
descriptions.it: Ha una pelliccia nera, simile a un mantello, molto dura che diminuisce i danni che riceve.
descriptions.ja: 黒いマントのような体毛はとても硬く、受けるダメージを軽減する。
descriptions.ko: 검은 망토 같은 털은 매우 단단하며 받는 피해를 줄여준다.

name: stoutland
description: It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.
appearance: large, golden-brown quadrupedal dog-like Pokémon with a very long, thick white mustache that covers its mouth, long brown fur, and light brown paws, featuring a blue snout and blue fur on its head

descriptions.fr: Il sauve les gens bloqués par les blizzards dans les montagnes. Sa fourrure hirsute le protège du froid.
descriptions.de: Es rettet Menschen, die in den Bergen von Schneestürmen eingeschlossen sind. Sein zotteliges Fell schützt es vor Kälte.
descriptions.es: Rescata a las personas atrapadas por las ventiscas en las montañas. Su pelaje desgreñado lo protege del frío.
descriptions.it: Salva le persone bloccate dalle bufere di neve in montagna. La sua pelliccia irsuta lo protegge dal freddo.
descriptions.ja: 山で吹雪に遭難した人々を救助する。ボサボサの毛は、寒さから身を守る。
descriptions.ko: 산에서 눈보라에 조난당한 사람들을 구조한다. 텁수룩한 털이 추위로부터 몸을 지켜준다.

name: purrloin
description: They steal from people for fun, but their victims can’t help but forgive them. Their deceptively cute act is perfect.
appearance: small, bipedal cat-like Pokémon with a mostly purple body, cream-colored markings on its face and chest, and dark purple ear tips and tail tip, with its tail curling upwards

descriptions.fr: Ils volent des gens pour le plaisir, mais leurs victimes ne peuvent s'empêcher de les pardonner. Leur numéro de mignonnerie trompeuse est parfait.
descriptions.de: Sie stehlen zum Spaß von Menschen, aber ihre Opfer können nicht anders, als ihnen zu verzeihen. Ihr täuschend niedliches Auftreten ist perfekt.
descriptions.es: Roban a la gente por diversión, pero sus víctimas no pueden evitar perdonarlos. Su acto engañosamente adorable es perfecto.
descriptions.it: Rubano alle persone per divertimento, ma le loro vittime non possono fare a meno di perdonarli. Il loro atto ingannevolmente carino è perfetto.
descriptions.ja: 人から物を盗むのが楽しいらしいが、被害者はつい許してしまう。欺くような可愛い仕草が絶妙。
descriptions.ko: 사람의 물건을 훔치는 걸 즐기지만, 피해자들은 그만 용서해 버린다. 속이는 듯한 귀여운 행동이 절묘하다.

name: liepard
description: These Pokémon vanish and appear unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful form and fur.
appearance: sleek, quadrupedal leopard-like Pokémon with a purple body covered in dark purple spots, green eyes, and a cream-colored muzzle and underbelly, possessing a long, elegant tail

descriptions.fr: Ces Pokémon apparaissent et disparaissent de manière inattendue. De nombreux Dresseurs sont attirés par leur belle forme et leur fourrure.
descriptions.de: Diese Pokémon verschwinden und erscheinen unerwartet. Viele Trainer fühlen sich von ihrer schönen Form und ihrem Fell angezogen.
descriptions.es: Estos Pokémon aparecen y desaparecen inesperadamente. Muchos Entrenadores se sienten atraídos por su hermosa forma y pelaje.
descriptions.it: Questi Pokémon appaiono e scompaiono inaspettatamente. Molti Allenatori sono attratti dalla loro splendida forma e pelliccia.
descriptions.ja: 姿を消したり現したりと神出鬼没。その美しい姿と体毛に多くのトレーナーが魅了される。
descriptions.ko: 모습을 감추거나 나타나는 신출귀몰한 포켓몬이다. 그 아름다운 모습과 털에 많은 트레이너가 매료된다.

name: pansage
description: This Pokémon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic.
appearance: Small, bipedal green monkey with a cream-colored face and chest, large red eyes, and a dark green, broccoli-like leaf tuft on top of its head and at the end of its tail.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon vit au plus profond de la forêt. Manger une feuille de sa tête fait disparaître la fatigue comme par magie.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon lebt tief im Wald. Ein Blatt von seinem Kopf zu essen, lässt die Müdigkeit wie von Zauberhand verschwinden.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon vive en lo profundo del bosque. Comer una hoja de su cabeza hace desaparecer el cansancio como por arte de magia.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon vive nel profondo della foresta. Mangiare una foglia dalla sua testa fa svanire la stanchezza come per magia.
descriptions.ja: 森林の奥深くに生息。頭の葉っぱを食べると、不思議と疲れが吹き飛ぶ。
descriptions.ko: 숲속 깊은 곳에 산다. 머리의 잎을 먹으면 신기하게도 피로가 사라진다.

name: simisage
description: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.
appearance: Tall, bipedal green monkey with a large, spiky dark green leaf crest forming a 'hairdo' on its head, a cream-colored face and torso, large red eyes, and a long tail ending in a large, flat green leaf.

descriptions.fr: De mauvaise humeur, il combat en agitant violemment sa queue barbelée. La feuille sur sa tête est très amère.
descriptions.de: Es ist jähzornig und kämpft, indem es seinen stacheligen Schwanz wild umherschwingt. Das Blatt auf seinem Kopf ist sehr bitter.
descriptions.es: Malhumorado, lucha balanceando su cola de púas salvajemente. La hoja que le crece en la cabeza es muy amarga.
descriptions.it: Di cattivo umore, combatte sferzando selvaggiamente la coda spinata. La foglia che gli cresce sulla testa è molto amara.
descriptions.ja: 短気な性格で、トゲつきの尻尾を振り回して戦う。頭の葉っぱはとても苦い。
descriptions.ko: 성질이 급해서 가시 돋친 꼬리를 휘둘러 싸운다. 머리 위의 잎은 무척 쓰다.

name: pansear
description: When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries.
appearance: Small, bipedal red monkey with a cream-colored face and chest, large black eyes, and a bright red, flame-like tuft of fur on top of its head and a smaller one on its tail.

descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'il est en colère, la touffe sur sa tête atteint 600 °F. Il l'utilise pour faire rôtir des baies.
descriptions.de: Wenn es wütend ist, erreicht die Temperatur seiner Kopffrisur 600° F. Es benutzt sie, um Beeren zu rösten.
descriptions.es: Cuando se enfada, la temperatura de su copete alcanza los 600° F. Usa su copete para asar bayas.
descriptions.it: Quando è arrabbiato, la temperatura del ciuffo sulla sua testa raggiunge i 600° F. Lo usa per arrostire bacche.
descriptions.ja: 怒ると頭の毛の温度が315℃になる。その毛で木の実を焼いて食べる。
descriptions.ko: 화가 나면 머리털의 온도가 315℃가 된다. 머리털로 나무열매를 구워 먹는다.

name: simisear
description: It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body.
appearance: Tall, bipedal red monkey with a large, spiky yellow and red flame-like crest forming a 'hairdo' on its head, a cream-colored face and torso, large black eyes, and a long tail ending in a large, flame-shaped tuft.

descriptions.fr: Il adore les sucreries car elles deviennent l'énergie du feu qui brûle dans son corps.
descriptions.de: Es liebt Süßigkeiten, da diese zur Energie für das Feuer in seinem Körper werden.
descriptions.es: Adora los dulces porque se convierten en energía para el fuego que arde en su interior.
descriptions.it: Adora i dolci perché diventano energia per il fuoco che arde nel suo corpo.
descriptions.ja: 甘いものが大好き。甘いものは体内で燃える炎のエネルギーになる。
descriptions.ko: 단 것을 좋아한다. 단 것이 몸속에서 타오르는 불꽃의 에너지가 된다.

name: panpour
description: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.
appearance: Small, bipedal blue monkey with a cream-colored face and chest, large black eyes, and a light blue, water droplet-shaped tuft of fur on top of its head and a smaller one on its tail.

descriptions.fr: L'eau stockée dans la touffe sur sa tête est pleine de nutriments. Les plantes qui reçoivent son eau poussent beaucoup.
descriptions.de: Das in seiner Kopffrisur gespeicherte Wasser ist voller Nährstoffe. Pflanzen, die sein Wasser erhalten, wachsen groß.
descriptions.es: El agua almacenada en el copete de su cabeza está llena de nutrientes. Las plantas que reciben su agua crecen mucho.
descriptions.it: L'acqua immagazzinata nel ciuffo sulla sua testa è ricca di nutrienti. Le piante che ricevono la sua acqua crescono molto.
descriptions.ja: 頭の毛の中に貯められた水は栄養豊富。その水を浴びた植物は大きく育つ。
descriptions.ko: 머리털에 모인 물은 영양분이 풍부하다. 물을 맞은 식물은 크게 자란다.

name: simipour
description: The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.
appearance: Tall, bipedal blue monkey with a large, light blue, wave-like crest forming a 'hairdo' on its head, a cream-colored face and torso, large black eyes, and a long tail ending in a large, fan-like blue fin.

descriptions.fr: La touffe sur sa tête contient de l'eau. Quand le niveau baisse, il la remplit en aspirant l'eau avec sa queue.
descriptions.de: Die Kopffrisur hält Wasser. Wenn der Pegel sinkt, füllt es die Frisur auf, indem es Wasser mit dem Schwanz aufsaugt.
descriptions.es: El copete de su cabeza retiene agua. Cuando el nivel baja, lo repone absorbiendo agua con su cola.
descriptions.it: Il ciuffo sulla sua testa contiene acqua. Quando il livello si abbassa, lo rifornisce aspirando acqua con la coda.
descriptions.ja: 頭の毛に水をためている。水が少なくなると尻尾で水を吸い上げて補充する。
descriptions.ko: 머리털에 물을 담고 있다. 물이 부족해지면 꼬리로 물을 빨아들여 보충한다.

name: munna
description: Munna always float in the air. People whose dreams are eaten by them forget what the dreams had been about.
appearance: Small, plump, light pink, tapir-like Pokemon with dark purple floral patterns adorning its body, four short legs, a small snout, and large, drooping ears.

descriptions.fr: Munna flotte toujours dans les airs. Les gens dont les rêves sont mangés par lui oublient ce dont ils avaient rêvé.
descriptions.de: Munna schwebt immer in der Luft. Menschen, deren Träume es gefressen hat, vergessen, worum es in den Träumen ging.
descriptions.es: Munna siempre flota en el aire. Las personas cuyos sueños son devorados por él olvidan de qué trataban.
descriptions.it: Munna galleggia sempre nell'aria. Le persone i cui sogni vengono mangiati da esso dimenticano di cosa trattavano.
descriptions.ja: いつも空中に浮かんでいる。人から食べた夢の内容を忘れさせる能力を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 항상 공중에 떠다닌다. 꿈을 먹힌 사람은 그 꿈이 어떤 내용이었는지 잊어버린다.

name: musharna
description: The mist emanating from their foreheads is packed with the dreams of people and Pokémon.
appearance: Larger, plump, light pink, tapir-like Pokemon with dark purple floral patterns adorning its body, a large, stylized dark pink 'M' marking on its forehead, and often depicted with pink mist emanating from a hole on its head.

descriptions.fr: La brume émanant de leur front est remplie des rêves des gens et des Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Der Nebel, der von ihrer Stirn ausgeht, ist vollgepackt mit den Träumen von Menschen und Pokémon.
descriptions.es: La niebla que emana de su frente está repleta de los sueños de personas y Pokémon.
descriptions.it: La nebbia che emana dalla loro fronte è densa dei sogni di persone e Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 額から立ち上る煙には人やポケモンが見た夢が詰まっている。
descriptions.ko: 이마에서 피어오르는 연기 속에는 사람과 포켓몬의 꿈이 가득 들어 있다.

name: pidove
description: Each follows its Trainer’s orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands.
appearance: Small, plump, gray bird with a lighter gray underside, two small black eyes with a white ring, and a distinctive heart-shaped marking on its chest.

descriptions.fr: Chacun suit les ordres de son Dresseur du mieux qu'il peut, mais ils échouent parfois à comprendre les commandes compliquées.
descriptions.de: Jeder folgt den Befehlen seines Trainers so gut er kann, aber manchmal verstehen sie komplizierte Befehle nicht.
descriptions.es: Cada uno sigue las órdenes de su Entrenador lo mejor que puede, pero a veces no logran entender comandos complicados.
descriptions.it: Ognuno segue gli ordini del proprio Allenatore al meglio, ma a volte non riescono a capire comandi complicati.
descriptions.ja: トレーナーの命令は一生懸命聞くが、複雑な指示はうまく理解できないことも。
descriptions.ko: 트레이너의 명령은 열심히 따르지만 복잡한 지시는 잘 이해하지 못할 때도 있다.

name: tranquill
description: It can return to its Trainer’s location regardless of the distance separating them.
appearance: Medium-sized, blue-gray bird with a cream-colored chest and belly, a dark blue feathered crest on its head, two small black eyes with a white ring, and two long black tail feathers with white tips.

descriptions.fr: Il peut retourner à l'emplacement de son Dresseur, quelle que soit la distance qui les sépare.
descriptions.de: Es kann zum Standort seines Trainers zurückkehren, unabhängig von der Entfernung, die sie trennt.
descriptions.es: Puede regresar a la ubicación de su Entrenador, sin importar la distancia que los separe.
descriptions.it: Può tornare alla posizione del suo Allenatore, indipendentemente dalla distanza che li separa.
descriptions.ja: どれだけ離れていてもトレーナーの居場所を感知し戻ってくることができる。
descriptions.ko: 아무리 멀리 떨어져 있어도 트레이너의 위치를 감지해서 돌아올 수 있다.

name: unfezant
description: Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females’ flying abilities surpass those of the males.
appearance: Large, slender bird with a predominantly dark green and gray body, a white underside, long tail feathers, and notably, males have an elaborate dark green fan-like crest on their head and a distinct pink mask pattern around their eyes.

descriptions.fr: Les mâles agitent la houppe de leur tête pour intimider leurs adversaires. Les femelles ont de meilleures capacités de vol que les mâles.
descriptions.de: Männchen schwingen ihren Kopfschmuck, um Gegner einzuschüchtern. Weibchen besitzen überlegene Flugfähigkeiten.
descriptions.es: Los machos agitan las plumas de su cabeza para amenazar a sus rivales. Las hembras tienen una habilidad de vuelo superior a la de los machos.
descriptions.it: I maschi agitano il piumaggio sulla testa per minacciare gli avversari. Le femmine hanno capacità di volo superiori a quelle dei maschi.
descriptions.ja: オスは 頭の 羽飾りを 振って 相手を 威嚇する。 メスは オスより 高い 飛行能力を 持つ。
descriptions.ko: 수컷은 머리의 깃털 장식을 휘둘러 상대를 위협한다. 암컷은 수컷보다 높은 비행 능력을 지닌다.

name: blitzle
description: When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.
appearance: Small, black and white striped zebra foal with spiky white fur forming a mane and tail tuft, a lightning bolt-shaped white marking on its forehead, and large dark eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il apparaît lorsque les orages assombrissent le ciel. Il peut capturer la foudre avec sa crinière et stocker l’électricité.
descriptions.de: Es erscheint, wenn Gewitterwolken den Himmel bedecken. Es kann Blitze mit seiner Mähne fangen und die Elektrizität speichern.
descriptions.es: Aparece cuando nubes de tormenta cubren el cielo. Puede capturar rayos con su crin y almacenar la electricidad.
descriptions.it: Appare quando il cielo è coperto da nubi temporalesche. Cattura i fulmini con la sua criniera e immagazzina l’elettricità.
descriptions.ja: 雷雲が 空を 覆うと 現れる。 たてがみで 雷を 捕らえ 電気を 貯めることが できる。
descriptions.ko: 먹구름이 하늘을 뒤덮으면 나타난다. 갈기로 번개를 붙잡아 전기를 모을 수 있다.

name: zebstrika
description: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.
appearance: Large, black and white striped zebra with a spiky, lightning bolt-shaped white mane running down its neck, black and white striped legs, and a distinctive white lightning bolt pattern on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: Ses mouvements sont rapides comme l’éclair. Quand Zéblitz court à toute vitesse, le son du tonnerre résonne.
descriptions.de: Es bewegt sich blitzschnell. Wenn Zebritz mit voller Geschwindigkeit rennt, hallt der Donner wider.
descriptions.es: Posee movimientos rápidos como el rayo. Cuando Zebstrika corre a toda velocidad, el sonido del trueno retumba.
descriptions.it: Si muove con la velocità di un fulmine. Quando Zebstrika corre a tutta velocità, il suono del tuono riecheggia.
descriptions.ja: 雷のような 素早い動きを する。 ゼブライカが 全速力で 走ると 雷鳴が とどろく。
descriptions.ko: 번개 같은 움직임을 보인다. 제브라이카가 전속력으로 달리면 천둥소리가 울려 퍼진다.

name: roggenrola
description: Its ear is hexagonal in shape. Compressed underground, its body is as hard as steel.
appearance: Small, round, dark gray rock-like Pokemon with a single orange, hexagonal crystal eye set into its body, and several hexagonal indentations across its surface.

descriptions.fr: Son oreille est de forme hexagonale. Compressé sous terre, son corps est aussi dur que l’acier.
descriptions.de: Sein Ohr ist sechseckig geformt. Unterirdisch komprimiert, ist sein Körper hart wie Stahl.
descriptions.es: Su oreja tiene forma hexagonal. Comprimido bajo tierra, su cuerpo es tan duro como el acero.
descriptions.it: Il suo orecchio è di forma esagonale. Compresso sottoterra, il suo corpo è duro come l’acciaio.
descriptions.ja: 耳は 六角形を している。 地下で 圧縮された 体は 鋼鉄のように 硬い。
descriptions.ko: 귀는 육각형을 하고 있다. 지하에서 압축된 몸은 강철처럼 단단하다.

name: boldore
description: When it overflows with power, the orange crystal on its body glows. It looks for underground water in caves.
appearance: Medium-sized, dark gray rock-like Pokemon with a large, bright orange crystal protruding from its top, smaller blue crystals forming legs, and a single blue hexagonal eye.

descriptions.fr: Quand il déborde de puissance, le cristal orange sur son corps luit. Il cherche de l’eau souterraine dans les grottes.
descriptions.de: Wenn es vor Kraft überfließt, leuchtet der orangefarbene Kristall an seinem Körper. Es sucht in Höhlen nach unterirdischem Wasser.
descriptions.es: Cuando rebosa de poder, el cristal naranja de su cuerpo brilla. Busca agua subterránea en las cuevas.
descriptions.it: Quando è pieno di energia, il cristallo arancione sul suo corpo brilla. Nelle grotte cerca acqua sotterranea.
descriptions.ja: パワーが あふれると 体に ある オレンジ色の 結晶が 光る。 洞窟で 地下水を 探す。
descriptions.ko: 파워가 넘쳐흐르면 몸의 오렌지색 결정이 빛난다. 동굴에서 지하수를 찾는다.

name: gigalith
description: Compressing the energy from its internal core lets it fire off an attack capable of blowing away a mountain.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal dark gray rock-like Pokemon with numerous prominent red crystals protruding from its body, forming spike-like structures on its back, head, and legs, and featuring two glowing red eyes.

descriptions.fr: En compressant l’énergie de son noyau interne, il peut lancer une attaque capable de faire disparaître une montagne.
descriptions.de: Die Energie seines inneren Kerns zu komprimieren, ermöglicht ihm, einen Angriff abzufeuern, der einen Berg wegsprengen kann.
descriptions.es: Comprimiendo la energía de su núcleo interno, puede lanzar un ataque capaz de pulverizar una montaña.
descriptions.it: Comprimendo l’energia del suo nucleo interno, può scagliare un attacco in grado di spazzare via una montagna.
descriptions.ja: 体内の コアから エネルギーを 圧縮し 山をも 吹き飛ばす 攻撃を 放つことが できる。
descriptions.ko: 몸 안의 코어에서 에너지를 압축하여 산도 날려버릴 공격을 발사할 수 있다.

name: woobat
description: Its habitat is dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings.
appearance: Small, round, blue bat with large, pointed ears, two small fangs protruding from its mouth, and a distinctive pink heart-shaped nose.

descriptions.fr: Il vit dans les forêts sombres et les grottes. Il émet des ultrasons par le nez pour percevoir son environnement.
descriptions.de: Sein Lebensraum sind dunkle Wälder und Höhlen. Es sendet Ultraschallwellen aus seiner Nase aus, um seine Umgebung zu erkunden.
descriptions.es: Su hábitat son los bosques oscuros y las cuevas. Emite ondas ultrasónicas por la nariz para conocer su entorno.
descriptions.it: Il suo habitat sono foreste oscure e caverne. Emette ultrasuoni dal naso per conoscere l’ambiente circostante.
descriptions.ja: 暗い森や 洞窟が 生息地。 鼻から 超音波を 出して 周囲の 様子を 探る。
descriptions.ko: 어두운 숲이나 동굴이 서식지다. 코에서 초음파를 내보내 주변의 상태를 살핀다.

name: swoobat
description: It emits sound waves of various frequencies from its nose, including some powerful enough to destroy rocks.
appearance: Larger, furry blue bat with large, pointed ears, a white fluffy ruff around its neck, a long, thin tail ending in a swirled tuft, and a prominent pink swirl-shaped nose.

descriptions.fr: Il émet des ondes sonores de diverses fréquences par le nez, dont certaines sont assez puissantes pour détruire des roches.
descriptions.de: Es sendet Schallwellen verschiedener Frequenzen aus seiner Nase aus, darunter auch solche, die stark genug sind, um Felsen zu zerstören.
descriptions.es: Emite ondas sonoras de diversas frecuencias por la nariz, incluidas algunas lo suficientemente potentes como para destruir rocas.
descriptions.it: Emette onde sonore di varie frequenze dal naso, alcune delle quali abbastanza potenti da distruggere le rocce.
descriptions.ja: 鼻から さまざまな 周波数の 音波を 出す。 岩石を 破壊するほどの 威力を持つ ものも ある。
descriptions.ko: 코에서 다양한 주파수의 음파를 낸다. 암석을 파괴할 정도의 위력을 가진 것도 있다.

name: drilbur
description: It can dig through the ground at a speed of 30 mph. It could give a car running aboveground a good race.
appearance: Small, light brown mole-like Pokemon with large, gray, shovel-like claws on its forepaws, a prominent red nose, and a large gray drill-shaped crest on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il peut creuser le sol à une vitesse de 50 km/h. Il pourrait rivaliser avec une voiture roulant en surface.
descriptions.de: Es kann mit einer Geschwindigkeit von 48 km/h durch den Boden graben. Es könnte einem Auto, das über der Erde fährt, ein gutes Rennen liefern.
descriptions.es: Puede cavar a través del suelo a una velocidad de 48 km/h. Podría competir bien con un coche que circula por la superficie.
descriptions.it: Può scavare attraverso il terreno a una velocità di 48 km/h. Potrebbe tenere testa a un’auto che viaggia in superficie.
descriptions.ja: 時速５０キロで 地面を 掘り進む。 地上を 走る 車と いい勝負を できるだろう。
descriptions.ko: 시속 50km로 땅을 파고든다. 지상을 달리는 자동차와 좋은 승부를 벌일 수 있을 것이다.

name: excadrill
description: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates.
appearance: Large, bipedal mole-like Pokemon with a predominantly dark gray and red body, featuring large, gray, sharp drills on its head, forepaws, and back, and a broad, yellow-striped chest.

descriptions.fr: Il peut aider à la construction de tunnels. Sa foreuse a évolué en un acier assez solide pour percer des plaques de fer.
descriptions.de: Es kann beim Tunnelbau helfen. Sein Bohrer hat sich zu Stahl entwickelt, der stark genug ist, um Eisenplatten zu durchbohren.
descriptions.es: Puede ayudar en la construcción de túneles. Su taladro ha evolucionado a un acero lo suficientemente fuerte como para perforar placas de hierro.
descriptions.it: Può aiutare nella costruzione di tunnel. La sua trivella si è evoluta in acciaio, abbastanza forte da perforare piastre di ferro.
descriptions.ja: トンネル工事に 活躍できる。 ドリルは 鉄板も 貫通する 鋼に 進化した。
descriptions.ko: 터널 공사에서 활약할 수 있다. 드릴은 철판도 뚫는 강철로 진화했다.

name: audino
description: It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.
appearance: Medium-sized, predominantly white, bipedal rabbit-like Pokemon with pink accents, two long, floppy pink and white ears ending in a curly tuft, a small pink tuft of fur on its chest, and small dark eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il touche les autres avec les palpeurs de ses oreilles, utilisant le son de leurs battements de cœur pour déterminer leurs émotions.
descriptions.de: Es berührt andere mit den Fühlern an seinen Ohren und nutzt den Klang ihrer Herzschläge, um ihre Gefühle zu erkennen.
descriptions.es: Toca a los demás con los palpadores de sus orejas, usando el sonido de sus latidos para saber cómo se sienten.
descriptions.it: Tocca gli altri con i sensori sulle orecchie, usando il suono del loro battito cardiaco per capire i loro sentimenti.
descriptions.ja: 耳の触角で触れたものの心音を聞き分け、そのときの気持ちを判断する。
descriptions.ko: 귀의 촉수로 상대를 만져 심장 박동 소리로 기분을 알아낸다.

name: timburr
description: It fights by swinging a piece of lumber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty.
appearance: Small, gray, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with pink balloon-like veins on its head and limbs, a light gray nose, and constantly carries a square-cut wooden beam.

descriptions.fr: Il se bat en brandissant une pièce de bois. Il est proche d'évoluer lorsqu'il peut manier le bois sans difficulté.
descriptions.de: Es kämpft, indem es einen Holzklotz herumschwingt. Es steht kurz vor der Entwicklung, wenn es das Holz ohne Schwierigkeiten handhaben kann.
descriptions.es: Lucha blandiendo un trozo de madera. Está cerca de evolucionar cuando puede manejar la madera sin dificultad.
descriptions.it: Combatte brandendo un pezzo di legname. È prossimo all'evoluzione quando riesce a maneggiarlo senza difficoltà.
descriptions.ja: 木材を振り回して戦う。木材を軽々と扱えるようになると進化が近い。
descriptions.ko: 통나무를 휘둘러 싸운다. 통나무를 가볍게 다룰 수 있게 되면 진화가 가깝다고 한다.

name: gurdurr
description: This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.
appearance: Medium-sized, gray, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with prominent pink balloon-like veins on its head, limbs, and torso, a light gray nose, and constantly carries two I-beams.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est si musclé et solidement bâti qu'un groupe de catcheurs ne pourrait pas le faire bouger d'un pouce.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ist so muskulös und kräftig gebaut, dass selbst eine Gruppe von Wrestlern es keinen Zentimeter bewegen könnte.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon es tan musculoso y fuerte que ni un grupo de luchadores podría moverlo un centímetro.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è così muscoloso e robusto che nemmeno un gruppo di lottatori riuscirebbe a spostarlo di un millimetro.
descriptions.ja: 筋肉の塊のような体を持つので、力自慢のレスラーたちが束になってもビクともしない。
descriptions.ko: 근육 덩어리 같은 몸을 지녀 자칭 힘이 세다고 하는 레슬러들이 덤벼도 끄떡없다.

name: conkeldurr
description: It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.
appearance: Large, gray, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with prominent pink balloon-like veins on its head, limbs, and torso, a light gray nose, and constantly carries two large, tapering concrete pillars.

descriptions.fr: On pense que Conkeldurr a enseigné aux humains comment fabriquer le béton il y a plus de 2000 ans.
descriptions.de: Es wird vermutet, dass Conkeldurr den Menschen vor über 2.000 Jahren beigebracht hat, wie man Beton herstellt.
descriptions.es: Se cree que Conkeldurr enseñó a los humanos a fabricar hormigón hace más de 2000 años.
descriptions.it: Si pensa che Conkeldurr abbia insegnato agli umani come fabbricare il cemento più di 2000 anni fa.
descriptions.ja: 2000年以上前、人間がコンクリートの作り方を覚えたのはローブシンのおかげだと考えられている。
descriptions.ko: 2000년 이상 전 인간이 콘크리트 제조법을 배운 것은 노보청 덕분이라고 여겨진다.

name: tympole
description: They warn others of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound.
appearance: Small, black tadpole-like Pokemon with a light blue underside, a flat, crescent-shaped tail, and two prominent blue, spherical bumps on its head resembling speakers.

descriptions.fr: Ils avertissent les autres du danger en faisant vibrer leurs joues pour créer un son aigu.
descriptions.de: Sie warnen andere vor Gefahr, indem sie ihre Wangen vibrieren lassen, um einen hohen Ton zu erzeugen.
descriptions.es: Advierten a otros del peligro vibrando sus mejillas para crear un sonido agudo.
descriptions.it: Avvertono gli altri del pericolo facendo vibrare le guance per creare un suono acuto.
descriptions.ja: 頬を震わせて甲高い音を出し、仲間たちに危険を知らせる。
descriptions.ko: 뺨을 떨어서 높은 소리를 내 동료들에게 위험을 알린다.

name: palpitoad
description: When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.
appearance: Medium-sized, dark blue frog-like Pokemon with a lighter blue underside, several prominent light blue bumps covering its head and back, and large yellow eyes with black pupils.

descriptions.fr: Quand ils font vibrer les bosses sur leur tête, ils peuvent créer des vagues dans l'eau ou des vibrations sismiques sur terre.
descriptions.de: Wenn sie die Beulen auf ihren Köpfen vibrieren lassen, können sie Wellen im Wasser oder erdbebenartige Vibrationen an Land erzeugen.
descriptions.es: Cuando vibran los bultos de sus cabezas, pueden crear olas en el agua o vibraciones sísmicas en tierra.
descriptions.it: Quando fanno vibrare le protuberanze sulla testa, possono creare onde nell'acqua o vibrazioni simili a terremoti sulla terraferma.
descriptions.ja: 頭のコブを振動させると水面に波を起こし、陸では地震のような振動を生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 혹을 진동시키면 수면에 파도를 일으키고 육상에서는 지진 같은 진동을 일으킨다.

name: seismitoad
description: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.
appearance: Large, bipedal dark blue frog-like Pokemon with a lighter blue underside, numerous large light blue bumps covering its head, back, and arms, and two large light blue protrusions on its forearms that resemble speakers.

descriptions.fr: Ils projettent un liquide paralysant depuis les bosses de leur tête. Ils utilisent les vibrations pour blesser leurs adversaires.
descriptions.de: Sie schießen eine lähmende Flüssigkeit aus ihren Kopfwülsten. Sie nutzen Vibrationen, um ihre Gegner zu verletzen.
descriptions.es: Lanzan un líquido paralizante desde los bultos de su cabeza. Usan vibraciones para herir a sus oponentes.
descriptions.it: Sparano un liquido paralizzante dalle protuberanze della testa. Usano le vibrazioni per ferire gli avversari.
descriptions.ja: 頭のコブから麻痺させる液体を撃ち出す。振動を使い相手を傷つける。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 혹에서 마비액을 발사한다. 진동을 사용해 상대를 다치게 한다.

name: throh
description: When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.
appearance: Stocky, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with a predominantly red body resembling a judo practitioner, dressed in a thick white gi, with a black belt, and a distinct five-fingered white hand-like mark on its face.

descriptions.fr: Quand il serre sa ceinture, il devient plus fort. Les Throh sauvages tissent leurs propres ceintures avec des lianes.
descriptions.de: Wenn es seinen Gürtel strafft, wird es stärker. Wilde Karadonis flechten ihre eigenen Gürtel aus Lianen.
descriptions.es: Cuando se aprieta el cinturón, se vuelve más fuerte. Los Throh salvajes usan lianas para tejer sus propios cinturones.
descriptions.it: Quando stringe la cintura, diventa più forte. I Throh selvatici tessono le loro cinture con le liane.
descriptions.ja: 帯を締めると強くなる。野生のナゲキはツタで自分の帯を編む。
descriptions.ko: 띠를 조이면 강해진다. 야생의 던지미는 덩굴로 자기 띠를 엮어 만든다.

name: sawk
description: The sound of Sawk punching boulders and trees can be heard all the way from the mountains where they train.
appearance: Lean, bipedal humanoid Pokemon with a predominantly blue body resembling a karate practitioner, dressed in a torn black gi, with a white belt, and prominent black eyebrow-like markings over its eyes.

descriptions.fr: Le son des Sawk frappant des rochers et des arbres peut être entendu depuis les montagnes où ils s'entraînent.
descriptions.de: Das Geräusch, wenn Legian Felsbrocken und Bäume schlägt, ist bis aus den Bergen zu hören, wo sie trainieren.
descriptions.es: El sonido de Sawk golpeando rocas y árboles se puede escuchar desde las montañas donde entrenan.
descriptions.it: Il suono dei Sawk che colpiscono massi e alberi può essere udito dalle montagne dove si allenano.
descriptions.ja: 厳しい修行のため、岩や木を拳で砕く音が修行をしている山奥から響いてくる。
descriptions.ko: 수련을 하는 산속에서는 바위나 나무를 주먹으로 부수는 타격 소리가 울려 퍼진다.

name: sewaddle
description: Leavanny dress it in clothes they made for it when it hatched. It hides its head in its hood while it is sleeping.
appearance: Small, light green bug body with a darker green leaf hood covering its head and back, featuring a distinctive single white dot on each eye and a light brown collar.

descriptions.fr: Les Manternel l'habillent de vêtements qu'elles lui ont fabriqués à l'éclosion. Il cache sa tête dans sa capuche quand il dort.
descriptions.de: Folikon kleiden es in Kleider, die sie für es bei der Geburt hergestellt haben. Es verbirgt seinen Kopf in seiner Kapuze, während es schläft.
descriptions.es: Las Leavanny lo visten con ropa que hicieron para él cuando eclosionó. Esconde su cabeza en su capucha mientras duerme.
descriptions.it: Le Leavanny lo vestono con abiti che gli hanno confezionato quando è nato. Nasconde la testa nel cappuccio mentre dorme.
descriptions.ja: ハハコモリが生まれたときに着せてくれた服をまとい、眠るときは頭をフードに隠す。
descriptions.ko: 모아머가 태어났을 때 만들어준 옷을 입고 있다. 잠잘 때는 머리를 후드에 숨긴다.

name: swadloon
description: Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.
appearance: A grub-like Pokemon encased in two large, folded, olive green leaves held together by a thin brown vine, with only its small, dark brown, four-legged body and tiny black eyes peeking out.

descriptions.fr: Les forêts habitées par les Manternel ont un feuillage magnifique, car les nutriments qu'ils produisent à partir des feuilles mortes nourrissent la végétation.
descriptions.de: Wälder, in denen Maracamba leben, haben ein prächtiges Laub, da die Nährstoffe, die sie aus abgefallenen Blättern gewinnen, die Pflanzenwelt ernähren.
descriptions.es: Los bosques donde viven Swadloon tienen un follaje excelente, ya que los nutrientes que producen a partir de las hojas caídas nutren la vida vegetal.
descriptions.it: Le foreste abitate da Swadloon hanno un fogliame superbo, poiché i nutrienti che producono dalle foglie cadute nutrono la vita vegetale.
descriptions.ja: クルマユが　住む森は　木々の葉が　美しい。落ち葉から　作り出した　栄養が　植物を　育てるからだ。
descriptions.ko: 두르쿤이 사는 숲은 나무의 잎이 아름답다. 떨어진 나뭇잎으로 만들어낸 영양분이 식물을 키우기 때문이다.

name: leavanny
description: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.
appearance: A bipedal, slender, pale yellow insectoid with a large, pointed, dark green leaf covering its head like a hood, two large light green leaf-like arms, and two smaller leaves for wings on its back.

descriptions.fr: En rencontrant un petit Pokémon, il lui tisse des vêtements à partir de feuilles, utilisant les lames de ses bras et sa soie collante.
descriptions.de: Findet es ein kleines Pokémon, webt es ihm Kleidung aus Blättern, wobei es die Klingen an seinen Armen und seine klebrige Seide benutzt.
descriptions.es: Cuando encuentra un Pokémon pequeño, le teje ropa con hojas, usando los cortadores de sus brazos y su seda pegajosa.
descriptions.it: Quando trova un piccolo Pokémon, gli tesse vestiti con le foglie, usando le sue braccia taglienti e la sua seta appiccicosa.
descriptions.ja: 小さな　ポケモンを　見つけると　腕の　カッターと　粘り気のある　糸を　使って　葉っぱで　服を　作ってあげる。
descriptions.ko: 작은 포켓몬을 발견하면 팔의 커터와 끈적이는 실을 사용해 나뭇잎으로 옷을 만들어 준다.

name: venipede
description: Its bite injects a potent poison, enough to paralyze large bird Pokémon that try to prey on it.
appearance: A small, segmented, reddish-purple centipede with a rounded, darker purple head, two prominent light pink antennae, and two short, light pink spikes on its tail end.

descriptions.fr: Sa morsure injecte un poison puissant, suffisant pour paralyser les grands Pokémon oiseaux qui tentent de le chasser.
descriptions.de: Sein Biss injiziert ein starkes Gift, das ausreicht, um große Vogel-Pokémon zu lähmen, die versuchen, es zu jagen.
descriptions.es: Su mordisco inyecta un potente veneno, suficiente para paralizar a grandes Pokémon pájaro que intentan cazarlo.
descriptions.it: Il suo morso inietta un potente veleno, sufficiente a paralizzare grandi Pokémon uccello che cercano di predarlo.
descriptions.ja: 獲物として　襲いかかる　大きな　鳥ポケモンを　麻痺させるほど　強力な　毒を　噛みついて　注入する。
descriptions.ko: 사냥감으로 덮쳐오는 커다란 새 포켓몬을 마비시킬 정도로 강력한 독을 물어 주입한다.

name: whirlipede
description: Protected by a hard shell, it spins its body like a wheel and crashes furiously into its enemies.
appearance: A dark purple, armored, segmented bug curled into a rigid sphere, with two light pink horn-like antennae protruding from the top and two short, light pink spikes on its rear.

descriptions.fr: Protégé par une carapace dure, il fait tourner son corps comme une roue et fonce furieusement sur ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Von einem harten Panzer geschützt, dreht es seinen Körper wie ein Rad und rast wütend auf seine Feinde zu.
descriptions.es: Protegido por una dura concha, gira su cuerpo como una rueda y embiste furiosamente a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Protetto da un guscio duro, fa girare il suo corpo come una ruota e si schianta furiosamente contro i nemici.
descriptions.ja: 硬い　殻で　守られている。体を　車輪のように　回転させ　猛烈な　勢いで　敵に　ぶつかる。
descriptions.ko: 단단한 껍데기로 보호받는다. 몸을 바퀴처럼 회전시켜 맹렬한 기세로 적에게 부딪친다.

name: scolipede
description: With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails.
appearance: A large, dark purple centipede with a segmented body, a prominent reddish-purple head featuring a large, pointed light pink horn, and multiple light pink spike-like limbs along its sides and a short tail.

descriptions.fr: Avec des mouvements rapides, il poursuit ses ennemis, attaquant sans relâche avec ses cornes jusqu'à ce qu'il l'emporte.
descriptions.de: Mit schnellen Bewegungen jagt es seine Feinde und greift sie unerbittlich mit seinen Hörnern an, bis es siegt.
descriptions.es: Con movimientos rápidos, persigue a sus enemigos, atacando sin descanso con sus cuernos hasta que prevalece.
descriptions.it: Con movimenti rapidi, insegue i suoi nemici, attaccando incessantemente con le sue corna finché non prevale.
descriptions.ja: 素早い　動きで　敵を　追い詰め　角で　ひたすら　攻撃する。勝つまで　やめることは　ない。
descriptions.ko: 재빠른 움직임으로 적을 몰아붙여 뿔로 줄기차게 공격한다. 이길 때까지 멈추지 않는다.

name: cottonee
description: When attacked, it escapes by shooting cotton from its body. The cotton serves as a decoy to distract the attacker.
appearance: A small, white, spherical Pokemon resembling a cotton ball, with two small green leaves on its head and two tiny black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Attaqué, il s'échappe en projetant du coton de son corps. Le coton sert de leurre pour distraire l'attaquant.
descriptions.de: Wenn es angegriffen wird, entkommt es, indem es Watte aus seinem Körper schießt. Die Watte dient als Ablenkung, um den Angreifer zu täuschen.
descriptions.es: Cuando es atacado, escapa disparando algodón de su cuerpo. El algodón sirve como señuelo para distraer al atacante.
descriptions.it: Quando attaccato, fugge sparando cotone dal suo corpo. Il cotone serve da esca per distrarre l'attaccante.
descriptions.ja: 襲われると　体から　綿を　飛ばして　逃げる。綿は　デコイとなって　敵の　目を　欺く。
descriptions.ko: 습격당하면 몸에서 솜을 날려 도망친다. 솜은 미끼가 되어 적의 눈을 속인다.

name: whimsicott
description: Like the wind, it can slip through any gap, no matter how small. It leaves balls of white fluff behind.
