appearance: A bipedal, light brown sheep-like Pokemon with a large, puffy white cloud of cotton for a body, two large green leaves on its head resembling horns, and a small green tuft for a tail.

descriptions.fr: Tel le vent, il peut se glisser à travers n'importe quelle fissure, aussi petite soit-elle. Il laisse derrière lui des boules de duvet blanc.
descriptions.de: Wie der Wind kann es durch jede noch so kleine Lücke schlüpfen. Es hinterlässt weiße Flauschbälle.
descriptions.es: Como el viento, puede deslizarse por cualquier hueco, por pequeño que sea. Deja tras de sí bolas de pelusa blanca.
descriptions.it: Come il vento, può scivolare attraverso qualsiasi fessura, non importa quanto piccola. Lascia dietro di sé palle di soffice lanugine bianca.
descriptions.ja: 風のように　どんなに　狭い　隙間でも　通り抜ける。白い　綿毛を　残していく。
descriptions.ko: 바람처럼 아무리 좁은 틈새도 빠져나간다. 하얀 솜털을 남긴다.

name: petilil
description: The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.
appearance: A small, light green plant-like Pokemon with a bulbous body, a large, dark green leaf-like cap on its head, and three small, light brown roots for feet.

descriptions.fr: Les feuilles sur sa tête sont très amères. On dit qu'en manger une rafraîchit un corps fatigué.
descriptions.de: Die Blätter auf seinem Kopf sind sehr bitter. Es heißt, eines dieser Blätter zu essen, erfrische einen müden Körper.
descriptions.es: Las hojas de su cabeza son muy amargas. Se sabe que comer una de estas hojas refresca un cuerpo cansado.
descriptions.it: Le foglie sulla sua testa sono molto amare. Si dice che mangiarne una rinfreschi un corpo stanco.
descriptions.ja: 頭の葉っぱは　とても　苦い。この葉を　食べると　疲れた　体が　リフレッシュすると　言われている。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 잎은 매우 쓰다. 이 잎을 먹으면 지친 몸이 상쾌해진다고 알려져 있다.

name: lilligant
description: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.
appearance: An elegant, bipedal, light green plant-like Pokemon with a large pink flower on its head adorned with three white stamens and dark green leaves, and two smaller dark green leaf-like arms.

descriptions.fr: Même les Dresseurs expérimentés peinent à faire éclore sa magnifique fleur. Ce Pokémon est populaire auprès des célébrités.
descriptions.de: Selbst erfahrene Trainer haben Mühe, seine wunderschöne Blume zum Blühen zu bringen. Dieses Pokémon ist bei Berühmtheiten beliebt.
descriptions.es: Incluso los Entrenadores veteranos encuentran un desafío en conseguir que su hermosa flor florezca. Este Pokémon es popular entre las celebridades.
descriptions.it: Anche gli Allenatori veterani trovano difficile far sbocciare il suo bellissimo fiore. Questo Pokémon è popolare tra le celebrità.
descriptions.ja: ベテラントレーナーでも　綺麗な花を　咲かせられず　困る。芸能人に　人気の　ポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 베테랑 트레이너도 아름다운 꽃을 피우게 하지 못해서 곤란해한다. 연예인들에게 인기 있는 포켓몬이다.

name: basculin-red-striped
description: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they’ll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.
appearance: A streamlined fish with a predominantly white body, a jagged red stripe running down its side, red fins, and a prominent red lower jaw.

descriptions.fr: Les Bargantua rouges et bleus s'entendent si mal qu'ils commencent à se battre instantanément. Ces Pokémon sont très hostiles.
descriptions.de: Rote und blaue Barschuft verstehen sich so schlecht, dass sie sofort anfangen zu kämpfen. Diese Pokémon sind sehr feindselig.
descriptions.es: Los Basculin rojos y azules se llevan tan mal que empezarán a luchar al instante. Estos Pokémon son muy hostiles.
descriptions.it: I Basculin rossi e blu vanno così poco d'accordo che inizieranno a lottare all'istante. Questi Pokémon sono molto ostili.
descriptions.ja: 赤い　バスラオと　青い　バスラオは　すぐに　喧嘩を　始めるほど　仲が　悪い。非常に　好戦的な　ポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 붉은색 배쓰나이와 푸른색 배쓰나이는 곧바로 싸움을 시작할 정도로 사이가 안 좋다. 매우 호전적인 포켓몬이다.

display_names.ja: バスラオ あかすじのすがた

name: sandile
description: They live buried in the sands of the desert. The sun-warmed sands prevent their body temperature from dropping.
appearance: A small, dark brown crocodile-like Pokemon with black stripes around its eyes and snout, and a distinctive black mask-like marking over its eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ils vivent enfouis dans le sable du désert. Le sable chauffé par le soleil empêche leur température corporelle de chuter.
descriptions.de: Sie leben im Wüstensand vergraben. Der von der Sonne erwärmte Sand verhindert, dass ihre Körpertemperatur sinkt.
descriptions.es: Viven enterrados en la arena del desierto. La arena calentada por el sol impide que su temperatura corporal descienda.
descriptions.it: Vivono sepolti nelle sabbie del deserto. La sabbia riscaldata dal sole impedisce alla loro temperatura corporea di diminuire.
descriptions.ja: 砂漠の砂に埋もれて暮らす。太陽に温められた砂が体温の低下を防ぐ。
descriptions.ko: 사막의 모래에 파묻혀 산다. 태양에 데워진 모래가 체온이 내려가는 것을 막아준다.

name: krokorok
description: They live in groups of a few individuals. Protective membranes shield their eyes from sandstorms.
appearance: A bipedal, reddish-brown crocodile-like Pokemon with a black stripe extending from its snout to its tail, a black mask over its eyes, and short, dark brown legs.

descriptions.fr: Ils vivent en petits groupes. Des membranes protectrices protègent leurs yeux des tempêtes de sable.
descriptions.de: Sie leben in kleinen Gruppen. Schützende Membranen bewahren ihre Augen vor Sandstürmen.
descriptions.es: Viven en grupos de pocos individuos. Sus ojos están protegidos por membranas contra las tormentas de arena.
descriptions.it: Vivono in gruppi di pochi individui. Membrane protettive proteggono i loro occhi dalle tempeste di sabbia.
descriptions.ja: 数匹の群れで暮らす。保護膜が砂嵐から目を守る。
descriptions.ko: 몇 마리가 무리를 지어 산다. 보호막이 모래폭풍으로부터 눈을 지켜준다.

name: krookodile
description: They never allow prey to escape. Their jaws are so powerful, they can crush the body of an automobile.
appearance: A large, bipedal, dark reddish-brown crocodile-like Pokemon with a black stripe extending across its body, a prominent black mask over its eyes, and short, thick arms with three claws.

descriptions.fr: Ils ne laissent jamais leur proie s'échapper. Leurs mâchoires sont si puissantes qu'elles peuvent broyer la carrosserie d'une automobile.
descriptions.de: Sie lassen keine Beute entkommen. Ihre Kiefer sind so kräftig, dass sie die Karosserie eines Autos zerquetschen können.
descriptions.es: Nunca permiten que la presa escape. Sus mandíbulas son tan potentes que pueden aplastar la carrocería de un automóvil.
descriptions.it: Non lasciano mai fuggire la preda. Le loro mascelle sono così potenti da poter schiacciare la carrozzeria di un'automobile.
descriptions.ja: 獲物を決して逃がさない。自動車のボディを潰せるほどの強力な顎を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 절대로 먹이를 놓치지 않는다. 자동차 차체를 찌그러뜨릴 정도의 강력한 턱을 가졌다.

name: darumaka
description: When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.
appearance: A small, round, red, ape-like Pokemon with a large, white, rounded belly, thick, dark brown eyebrows, and a flame-like tuft on its head.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque son feu interne brûle, il ne peut pas se calmer et court partout. Quand le feu diminue, il s'endort.
descriptions.de: Wenn sein inneres Feuer brennt, kann es sich nicht beruhigen und rennt umher. Wenn das Feuer nachlässt, schläft es ein.
descriptions.es: Cuando su fuego interno arde, no puede calmarse y corre sin parar. Cuando el fuego disminuye, se queda dormido.
descriptions.it: Quando il suo fuoco interno brucia, non riesce a calmarsi e corre in giro. Quando il fuoco diminuisce, si addormenta.
descriptions.ja: 体の内なる炎が燃えている間は興奮して走り回る。炎が弱まると眠ってしまう。
descriptions.ko: 몸 안의 불꽃이 타오르면 흥분해서 날뛴다. 불꽃이 약해지면 잠들어버린다.

name: darmanitan-standard
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
appearance: A large, red, ape-like Pokemon with a distinctive white chest and belly, large, bushy dark brown eyebrows, and golden flame-like tufts on its head and shoulders.

descriptions.fr: Son feu interne brûle à 1370 °C, générant assez de puissance pour détruire un camion-benne d'un seul coup de poing.
descriptions.de: Sein inneres Feuer brennt bei 1370 °C und erzeugt genug Kraft, um einen Kipplaster mit einem Schlag zu zerstören.
descriptions.es: Su fuego interno arde a 1370 °C, generando la suficiente potencia como para destruir un camión de volteo de un solo puñetazo.
descriptions.it: Il suo fuoco interno brucia a 1370 °C, generando una potenza tale da poter distruggere un autocarro a cassone ribaltabile con un solo pugno.
descriptions.ja: 体の内なる炎は1370℃で燃え盛り、ダンプカーをパンチ一発で破壊するほどのパワーを生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 몸 안의 불꽃은 1370℃로 타올라, 덤프트럭을 한방에 파괴할 정도의 파워를 만들어낸다.

display_names.ja: ヒヒダルマ ノーマルモード

name: maractus
description: It uses an up-tempo song and dance to drive away the bird Pokémon that prey on its flower seeds.
appearance: A green, bipedal cactus-like Pokemon with large yellow flowers on its head and arms, light green frills on its body, and two small black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise un chant et une danse rythmés pour chasser les Pokémon oiseaux qui s'attaquent à ses graines de fleurs.
descriptions.de: Es vertreibt Vogel-Pokémon, die seine Blumensamen fressen, mit einem schnellen Gesang und Tanz.
descriptions.es: Usa una canción y un baile enérgicos para ahuyentar a los Pokémon pájaro que se alimentan de sus semillas florales.
descriptions.it: Usa un canto e un ballo vivaci per scacciare i Pokémon uccello che predano i suoi semi floreali.
descriptions.ja: アップテンポな歌と踊りで花のタネを狙う鳥ポケモンを追い払う。
descriptions.ko: 빠른 템포의 노래와 춤으로 꽃씨를 노리는 새포켓몬을 쫓아버린다.

name: dwebble
description: This Pokémon can easily melt holes in hard rocks with a liquid secreted from its mouth.
appearance: A small, brown crab-like Pokemon carrying a beige rock on its back, with two small green antennae protruding from its head and two small black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon peut facilement percer des trous dans les roches dures grâce à un liquide qu'il sécrète de sa bouche.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon kann mit einer aus seinem Mund abgesonderten Flüssigkeit leicht Löcher in harte Felsen schmelzen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon puede fundir fácilmente agujeros en rocas duras con un líquido que secreta por la boca.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon può facilmente sciogliere buchi nelle rocce dure con un liquido secreto dalla sua bocca.
descriptions.ja: 口から分泌する液体で硬い岩石に容易く穴を溶かすことができる。
descriptions.ko: 입에서 분비하는 액체로 단단한 바위에 간단히 구멍을 녹여낼 수 있다.

name: crustle
description: Competing for territory, Crustle fight viciously. The one whose boulder is broken is the loser of the battle.
appearance: A large, brown, multi-legged crab-like Pokemon carrying a segmented, brown and beige rock formation on its back, with two long green antennae and small black eyes.

descriptions.fr: S'affrontant pour le territoire, les Crabaraque se battent férocement. Celui dont le rocher est brisé est le perdant du combat.
descriptions.de: Krarmorack kämpfen erbittert um ihr Revier. Wer seinen Felsen zerbricht, verliert den Kampf.
descriptions.es: Compitiendo por el territorio, los Crustle luchan con ferocidad. Aquel cuya roca se rompe es el perdedor de la batalla.
descriptions.it: I Crustle combattono ferocemente per il territorio. Quello il cui masso viene rotto è lo sconfitto della battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 縄張り争いをするイワパレスたちは激しく戦う。背中の岩を砕かれた方が勝負に負ける。
descriptions.ko: 영역 다툼을 하는 돌헨진들은 맹렬하게 싸운다. 등에 짊어진 바위가 부서진 쪽이 싸움에서 진다.

name: scraggy
description: Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck.
appearance: A small, bipedal, yellow lizard-like Pokemon with a baggy, sagging pair of dark orange scales resembling pants around its waist, and a black crest on its head.

descriptions.fr: Sa peau possède une élasticité caoutchouteuse, ce qui lui permet de réduire les dégâts en la remontant défensivement jusqu'à son cou.
descriptions.de: Seine Haut hat eine gummiartige Elastizität, sodass es Schaden reduzieren kann, indem es seine Haut schützend bis zum Hals hochzieht.
descriptions.es: Su piel posee una elasticidad gomosa, por lo que puede reducir el daño tirando defensivamente de su piel hasta el cuello.
descriptions.it: La sua pelle ha un'elasticità gommosa, così può ridurre i danni tirandola difensivamente fino al collo.
descriptions.ja: 皮膚にはゴムのような弾力があり、防御のために首まで皮膚を引っ張り上げてダメージを減らすことができる。
descriptions.ko: 피부에 고무 같은 탄력이 있어, 방어적으로 피부를 목까지 끌어올려 피해를 줄일 수 있다.

name: scrafty
description: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.
appearance: A bipedal, yellow lizard-like Pokemon with a long, scaly, dark orange tail, and a large, baggy dark orange skin fold around its waist that it can pull up to cover its neck.

descriptions.fr: Des groupes d'entre eux frappent tout ce qui entre dans leur territoire. Chacun peut cracher un liquide acide de sa bouche.
descriptions.de: Gruppen von ihnen verprügeln alles, was in ihr Territorium eindringt. Jeder kann saure Flüssigkeit aus seinem Maul spucken.
descriptions.es: Grupos de ellos golpean todo lo que entra en su territorio. Cada uno puede escupir líquido ácido por la boca.
descriptions.it: Gruppi di essi picchiano chiunque entri nel loro territorio. Ognuno può sputare un liquido acido dalla sua bocca.
descriptions.ja: 縄張りに入ってきた者には群れで襲いかかる。口から酸性の液体を吐き出すことができる。
descriptions.ko: 영역에 들어온 것은 무리를 지어 때려눕힌다. 각각 입에서 산성 액체를 뱉을 수 있다.

name: sigilyph
description: They never vary the route they fly, because their memories of guarding an ancient city remain steadfast.
appearance: A spherical, black-bodied Pokemon with two prominent blue eyes, a large, multicolored 'eye' pattern on its back, and two large, blue, wing-like appendages with yellow tips.

descriptions.fr: Ils ne varient jamais leur route de vol, car leurs souvenirs de la garde d'une cité antique restent inébranlables.
descriptions.de: Sie ändern nie ihre Flugroute, denn ihre Erinnerungen an die Bewachung einer antiken Stadt bleiben standhaft.
descriptions.es: Nunca varían su ruta de vuelo, pues sus recuerdos de haber custodiado una ciudad antigua permanecen inalterables.
descriptions.it: Non cambiano mai la loro rotta di volo, poiché i loro ricordi di aver sorvegliato un'antica città rimangono saldi.
descriptions.ja: 飛行ルートを変えることはなく、古代都市を守っていた記憶が揺るぎないからだ。
descriptions.ko: 비행 경로를 바꾸지 않는다. 고대 도시를 지키던 기억이 굳건히 남아있기 때문이다.

name: yamask
description: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.
appearance: A small, black, ghostly Pokemon with two small red eyes and two slender arms, carrying a golden mask with two black eyeholes and a small black mouth-like opening.

descriptions.fr: Chacun porte un masque qui était son visage quand il était humain. Parfois, il le regarde et pleure.
descriptions.de: Jedes von ihnen trägt eine Maske, die einst sein menschliches Gesicht war. Manchmal schauen sie sie an und weinen.
descriptions.es: Cada uno lleva una máscara que era su rostro cuando era humano. A veces la miran y lloran.
descriptions.it: Ognuno porta una maschera che un tempo era il suo volto umano. A volte la guardano e piangono.
descriptions.ja: 人間だった頃の顔を模した仮面を常に持ち歩いている。時にそれを見つめて涙を流す。
descriptions.ko: 인간이었을 적 얼굴을 본뜬 가면을 항상 가지고 다닌다. 가끔씩 그걸 바라보며 눈물을 흘린다.

name: cofagrigus
description: It has been said that they swallow those who get too close and turn them into mummies. They like to eat gold nuggets.
appearance: A large, blue-and-gold striped sarcophagus-like Pokemon with four long, slender, ghost-like arms, a red gem on its head, and two prominent red eyes.

descriptions.fr: On dit qu'il avale ceux qui s'approchent trop et les transforme en momies. Il aime manger des pépites d'or.
descriptions.de: Es heißt, es verschlingt jeden, der ihm zu nahe kommt, und verwandelt ihn in eine Mumie. Es frisst gerne Goldklumpen.
descriptions.es: Se dice que traga a quienes se acercan demasiado y los convierte en momias. Le gusta comer pepitas de oro.
descriptions.it: Si dice che inghiottano chi si avvicina troppo e li trasformino in mummie. Amano mangiare pepite d'oro.
descriptions.ja: 近づくものを飲み込みミイラに変えるといわれる。金色の塊が大好物。
descriptions.ko: 가까이 오는 자를 삼켜 미라로 만든다고 전해진다. 금덩어리를 좋아한다.

name: tirtouga
description: Restored from a fossil, this Pokémon can dive to depths beyond half a mile.
appearance: A small, blue, turtle-like Pokemon with a dark blue, armored shell on its back, two large black eyes, and a light blue underside.

descriptions.fr: Restauré à partir d'un fossile, ce Pokémon peut plonger à des profondeurs dépassant 800 mètres.
descriptions.de: Aus einem Fossil wiederhergestellt, kann dieses Pokémon über 800 Meter tief tauchen.
descriptions.es: Restaurado a partir de un fósil, este Pokémon puede sumergirse a profundidades de más de 800 metros.
descriptions.it: Restaurato da un fossile, questo Pokémon può immergersi a profondità che superano gli 800 metri.
descriptions.ja: 化石から復元されたポケモン。800メートル以上の深海まで潜ることができる。
descriptions.ko: 화석에서 복원된 포켓몬. 800미터 이상 깊은 바닷속까지 잠수할 수 있다.

name: carracosta
description: They can live both in the ocean and on land. A slap from one of them is enough to open a hole in the bottom of a tanker.
appearance: A large, bipedal, blue turtle-like Pokemon with a thick, dark blue armored shell on its back, white fin-like appendages on its arms, and two prominent white tusks on its lower jaw.

descriptions.fr: Il peut vivre aussi bien dans l'océan que sur terre. Une gifle de sa part suffit à percer la coque d'un pétrolier.
descriptions.de: Sie können sowohl im Ozean als auch an Land leben. Ein Schlag von ihnen reicht aus, um ein Loch in den Boden eines Tankers zu schlagen.
descriptions.es: Puede vivir tanto en el océano como en tierra. Una bofetada suya basta para abrir un agujero en el fondo de un buque cisterna.
descriptions.it: Possono vivere sia nell'oceano che sulla terraferma. Un loro colpo è sufficiente per aprire un buco nello scafo di una petroliera.
descriptions.ja: 海と陸の両方で暮らすことができる。タンカーの底に穴を開けるほどの力強い平手打ちを繰り出す。
descriptions.ko: 바다와 육지 양쪽에서 살 수 있다. 한 번의 후려치기로 유조선 바닥에 구멍을 낼 정도다.

name: archen
description: Said to be an ancestor of bird Pokémon, they were unable to fly and moved about by hopping from one branch to another.
appearance: A small, blue feathered dinosaur-like Pokemon with yellow plumage on its head and tail, and two small, red wing-like appendages.

descriptions.fr: Prétendu ancêtre des Pokémon oiseaux, il était incapable de voler et se déplaçait en sautant de branche en branche.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, es sei ein Vorfahre der Vogel-Pokémon. Es konnte nicht fliegen und bewegte sich hüpfend von Ast zu Ast fort.
descriptions.es: Se dice que es un ancestro de los Pokémon pájaro. No podía volar y se movía saltando de rama en rama.
descriptions.it: Si dice che sia un antenato dei Pokémon Volanti. Non era in grado di volare e si muoveva saltando da un ramo all'altro.
descriptions.ja: とりポケモンの祖先といわれ、飛べない代わりに枝から枝へ飛び移って移動していた。
descriptions.ko: 새포켓몬의 조상이라고 불리며 날지 못하는 대신 나뭇가지에서 나뭇가지로 뛰어넘으며 이동했다.

name: archeops
description: They are intelligent and will cooperate to catch prey. From the ground, they use a running start to take flight.
appearance: A large, bipedal, brightly colored feathered dinosaur-like Pokemon with a long neck, predominantly blue and yellow plumage, and large, red, wing-like arms.

descriptions.fr: Intelligents, ils coopèrent pour chasser leurs proies. Depuis le sol, ils prennent leur élan pour s'envoler.
descriptions.de: Sie sind intelligent und kooperieren bei der Jagd. Vom Boden aus nehmen sie Anlauf, um in die Luft zu gehen.
descriptions.es: Son inteligentes y cooperan para cazar presas. Desde el suelo, toman carrerilla para alzar el vuelo.
descriptions.it: Sono intelligenti e cooperano per cacciare le prede. Da terra, prendono la rincorsa per spiccare il volo.
descriptions.ja: 知能が高く、協力して獲物を捕らえる。地上からは、助走をつけて飛び立つ。
descriptions.ko: 지능이 높고 협력하여 먹이를 잡는다. 지상에서는 도움닫기를 하여 날아오른다.

name: trubbish
description: Inhaling the gas they belch will make you sleep for a week. They prefer unsanitary places.
appearance: A small, green, trash bag-like Pokemon with two small white-and-black eyes, two short arm-like appendages made of twisted plastic, and a dark grey, crumpled mouth.

descriptions.fr: Inhaler le gaz qu'il rote vous fera dormir pendant une semaine. Il préfère les endroits insalubres.
descriptions.de: Das Einatmen des Gases, das sie rülpsen, lässt dich eine Woche lang schlafen. Sie bevorzugen unhygienische Orte.
descriptions.es: Inhalar el gas que eructan te hará dormir durante una semana. Prefieren los lugares insalubres.
descriptions.it: Inalare il gas che eruttano ti farà dormire per una settimana. Preferiscono i luoghi insalubri.
descriptions.ja: 吐き出すガスを吸い込むと１週間眠り続ける。不衛生な場所を好む。
descriptions.ko: 토해내는 가스를 들이마시면 1주일 동안 잠든다. 불결한 장소를 좋아한다.

name: garbodor
description: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth.
appearance: A large, lumpy, green, trash pile-like Pokemon with two small yellow eyes, a prominent white-and-black mouth, and various pieces of refuse protruding from its body, including a broken tire and a banana peel.

descriptions.fr: Il serre ses adversaires avec son bras gauche et les achève avec le gaz empoisonné malodorant qu'il rote de sa bouche.
descriptions.de: Es packt Gegner mit seinem linken Arm und erledigt sie mit übelriechendem Giftgas, das es aus seinem Maul rülpst.
descriptions.es: Aprieta a sus oponentes con su brazo izquierdo y los remata con el gas venenoso maloliente que eructa por la boca.
descriptions.it: Afferra gli avversari con il braccio sinistro e li finisce con il gas velenoso maleodorante che erutta dalla bocca.
descriptions.ja: 左腕で相手を締め付け、口から吐き出す悪臭の毒ガスでとどめを刺す。
descriptions.ko: 왼팔로 상대를 조이고 입에서 뿜어내는 악취의 독가스로 끝장낸다.

name: zorua
description: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.
appearance: A small, dark gray fox-like Pokémon with a shaggy collar of red and black fur around its neck, red accents around its eyes, and a single tuft of red fur on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il change de forme pour surprendre les autres. Apparemment, il se transforme souvent en un enfant silencieux.
descriptions.de: Es nimmt die Formen anderer an, um sie zu überraschen. Anscheinend verwandelt es sich oft in ein stilles Kind.
descriptions.es: Cambia a la forma de otros para sorprenderlos. Aparentemente, a menudo se transforma en un niño silencioso.
descriptions.it: Si trasforma nelle sembianze altrui per sorprenderli. A quanto pare, si trasforma spesso in un bambino silenzioso.
descriptions.ja: 他の姿に変身して相手を驚かせる。どうやら無口な子どもによく化けるらしい。
descriptions.ko: 다른 모습으로 변신하여 상대를 놀라게 한다. 말없는 아이로 자주 변신하는 듯하다.

name: zoroark
description: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.
appearance: Sleek, bipedal, dark gray fox-like creature with a large, spiky red mane resembling a ponytail, red highlights around its eyes, and sharp claws.

descriptions.fr: Les liens entre ces Pokémon sont très forts. Il protège la sécurité de sa meute en trompant ses adversaires.
descriptions.de: Die Bindungen zwischen diesen Pokémon sind sehr stark. Es schützt die Sicherheit seines Rudels, indem es seine Gegner austrickst.
descriptions.es: Los lazos entre estos Pokémon son muy fuertes. Protege la seguridad de su manada engañando a sus oponentes.
descriptions.it: I legami tra questi Pokémon sono molto forti. Protegge la sicurezza del suo branco ingannando gli avversari.
descriptions.ja: 仲間との絆が非常に強い。相手をだまして群れの安全を守るのだ。
descriptions.ko: 동료와의 유대가 아주 강하다. 상대를 속여 무리의 안전을 지킨다.

name: minccino
description: They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.
appearance: Small, light gray chinchilla-like Pokemon with large ears, a fluffy white collar, and a bushy, light gray tail tipped with white.

descriptions.fr: Ils se saluent en se frottant avec leurs queues, toujours impeccablement soignées et propres.
descriptions.de: Sie begrüßen einander, indem sie sich mit ihren stets gut gepflegten und sauberen Schwänzen reiben.
descriptions.es: Se saludan frotándose con sus colas, que siempre mantienen bien arregladas y limpias.
descriptions.it: Si salutano strofinandosi con le loro code, sempre ben curate e pulite.
descriptions.ja: 綺麗好きで手入れされた尻尾をこすりつけ合って仲間と挨拶を交わす。
descriptions.ko: 깔끔한 성격으로 잘 손질된 꼬리를 서로 문지르며 동료와 인사를 나눈다.

name: cinccino
description: Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.
appearance: Elegant, elongated light gray chinchilla-like Pokemon with a long, white, silky scarf-like fur around its neck and shoulders, long white tufts from its ears, and a large, fluffy light gray tail.

descriptions.fr: Leur fourrure blanche est recouverte d'une huile spéciale qui leur permet de dévier facilement les attaques.
descriptions.de: Ihr weißes Fell ist mit einem speziellen Öl überzogen, das es ihnen leicht macht, Angriffe abzuwehren.
descriptions.es: Su pelaje blanco está cubierto de un aceite especial que les permite desviar los ataques con facilidad.
descriptions.it: La sua pelliccia bianca è ricoperta di uno speciale olio che le consente di deviare facilmente gli attacchi.
descriptions.ja: 白い毛は特殊な油でコーティングされているため攻撃を簡単に受け流せる。
descriptions.ko: 하얀 털은 특수한 기름으로 코팅되어 공격을 간단히 받아넘길 수 있다.

name: gothita
description: Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something.
appearance: Small, black humanoid with a large head, a white bow-like ribbon on its head, white bow-shaped patterns on its chest, and large, dark purple eyes with long white eyelashes.

descriptions.fr: Leurs rubans capteurs augmentent leur puissance psychique. Ils fixent toujours quelque chose du regard.
descriptions.de: Ihre bandähnlichen Fühler erhöhen ihre Psycho-Kraft. Sie starren immer etwas an.
descriptions.es: Sus apéndices en forma de cinta aumentan su poder psíquico. Siempre están mirando fijamente algo.
descriptions.it: I suoi nastri sensoriali aumentano il suo potere psichico. Fissa sempre qualcosa.
descriptions.ja: リボン状の触覚がサイコパワーを高める。いつも何かをじっと見つめている。
descriptions.ko: 리본 형태의 촉각이 에스퍼 파워를 높인다. 언제나 무언가를 빤히 응시한다.

name: gothorita
description: They use hypnosis to control people and Pokémon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner.
appearance: Black humanoid with a flowing skirt-like lower body, a large white bow-like ribbon on its head, two more white bows on its chest, and large, dark purple eyes with long white eyelashes.

descriptions.fr: Ils utilisent l'hypnose pour contrôler les gens et les Pokémon. Les récits de Gothorita égarant les gens sont racontés partout.
descriptions.de: Sie nutzen Hypnose, um Menschen und Pokémon zu kontrollieren. Geschichten von Gothorita, die Leute in die Irre führen, werden überall erzählt.
descriptions.es: Usan hipnosis para controlar a personas y Pokémon. Por todas partes se cuentan historias de Gothorita que guían a la gente por el mal camino.
descriptions.it: Usa l'ipnosi per controllare persone e Pokémon. Si raccontano storie di Gothorita che sviano le persone in ogni dove.
descriptions.ja: 催眠術で人やポケモンを操る。ゴチミルに惑わされたという話はいたるところで聞かれる。
descriptions.ko: 최면술로 사람이나 포켓몬을 조종한다. 고디탱에게 현혹되었다는 이야기는 곳곳에서 들린다.

name: gothitelle
description: Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power.
appearance: Tall, black humanoid with a flowing, wide lower body, intricate white bow-shaped patterns on its chest and arms, white rings around its wrists, and large, dark purple eyes with long white eyelashes.

descriptions.fr: Des cieux étoilés à des milliers d'années-lumière sont visibles dans l'espace déformé par leur intense puissance psychique.
descriptions.de: Sternenklare Himmel, Tausende von Lichtjahren entfernt, sind in dem Raum sichtbar, der durch ihre intensive Psycho-Kraft verzerrt wird.
descriptions.es: Cielos estrellados a miles de años luz son visibles en el espacio distorsionado por su intenso poder psíquico.
descriptions.it: Cieli stellati a migliaia di anni luce di distanza sono visibili nello spazio distorto dal suo intenso potere psichico.
descriptions.ja: 強力なサイコパワーでゆがめた空間には何千光年も先の星空が映し出される。
descriptions.ko: 강력한 에스퍼 파워로 일그러뜨린 공간에는 수천 광년 떨어진 별하늘이 비친다.

name: solosis
description: They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others.
appearance: Small, green, gelatinous, sphere-shaped Pokemon with a large, round head, a dark green core, and small, dark green eyes, floating within a translucent, light green aura.

descriptions.fr: Ils repoussent les attaquants en libérant une puissance psychique. Ils peuvent utiliser la télépathie pour parler aux autres.
descriptions.de: Sie vertreiben Angreifer, indem sie Psycho-Kraft entfesseln. Sie können Telepathie nutzen, um mit anderen zu sprechen.
descriptions.es: Ahuyentan a los atacantes liberando poder psíquico. Pueden usar la telepatía para hablar con otros.
descriptions.it: Respinge gli attaccanti sprigionando un potere psichico. Può usare la telepatia per parlare con gli altri.
descriptions.ja: サイコパワーを放出して襲いかかる敵を撃退する。テレパシーで仲間と話す。
descriptions.ko: 에스퍼 파워를 방출해 덤벼드는 적을 물리친다. 텔레파시로 동료와 이야기한다.

name: duosion
description: Since they have two divided brains, at times they suddenly try to take two different actions at once.
appearance: Two green gelatinous spheres fused together, each with a small dark green eye, surrounded by a larger, translucent light green aura that forms arm-like appendages.

descriptions.fr: Puisqu'ils ont deux cerveaux divisés, ils essaient parfois soudainement d'entreprendre deux actions différentes à la fois.
descriptions.de: Da sie zwei geteilte Gehirne haben, versuchen sie manchmal plötzlich, zwei verschiedene Aktionen gleichzeitig auszuführen.
descriptions.es: Dado que tienen dos cerebros divididos, a veces intentan repentinamente realizar dos acciones diferentes a la vez.
descriptions.it: Avendo due cervelli divisi, a volte tentano improvvisamente di compiere due azioni diverse contemporaneamente.
descriptions.ja: ２つに分かれた脳みそを持つため時々突然別々の行動を取りだすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 2개로 나뉜 뇌를 가지고 있어 때때로 갑자기 제각각 다른 행동을 취할 때가 있다.

name: reuniclus
description: When Reuniclus shake hands, a network forms between their brains, increasing their psychic power.
appearance: Large, green, gelatinous humanoid with four short, thick limbs, a dark green head, dark green eyes, and a single, large dark green internal sphere, all contained within a translucent light green aura.

descriptions.fr: Quand les Reuniclus se serrent la main, un réseau se forme entre leurs cerveaux, augmentant leur puissance psychique.
descriptions.de: Wenn Reuniclus sich die Hände schütteln, bildet sich ein Netzwerk zwischen ihren Gehirnen, das ihre Psycho-Kraft erhöht.
descriptions.es: Cuando los Reuniclus se dan la mano, se forma una red entre sus cerebros, aumentando su poder psíquico.
descriptions.it: Quando i Reuniclus si stringono la mano, si forma una rete tra i loro cervelli, aumentando il loro potere psichico.
descriptions.ja: ランクルス同士が握手すると脳みそ同士でネットワークが組まれサイコパワーがアップする。
descriptions.ko: 란쿨루스끼리 악수하면 뇌끼리 네트워크가 형성되어 에스퍼 파워가 증폭한다.

name: ducklett
description: These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss.
appearance: Small, light blue duckling with a fluffy white ruff around its neck, a small yellow beak, and webbed blue feet.

descriptions.fr: Ces Pokémon oiseaux sont d'excellents plongeurs. Ils nagent dans l'eau en mangeant leur nourriture préférée : la tourbe.
descriptions.de: Diese Vogel-Pokémon sind ausgezeichnete Taucher. Sie schwimmen im Wasser umher und fressen ihre Lieblingsspeise – Torfmoos.
descriptions.es: Estos Pokémon pájaro son excelentes buceadores. Nadan en el agua comiendo su alimento favorito: el musgo de turba.
descriptions.it: Questi Pokémon uccello sono eccellenti tuffatori. Nuotano nell'acqua mangiando il loro cibo preferito: il muschio di torba.
descriptions.ja: 水鳥ポケモン。水の中にもぐって好物の泥炭のコケを食べる。
descriptions.ko: 물새포켓몬. 물속에 잠수하여 좋아하는 이탄의 이끼를 먹는다.

name: swanna
description: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.
appearance: Elegant, white swan with a long, graceful neck, black wingtips, a large black crest on its head, and a yellow beak.

descriptions.fr: Les Lakmécygne commencent à danser au crépuscule. Celui qui danse au milieu est le chef du groupe.
descriptions.de: Swaroness beginnen bei Dämmerung zu tanzen. Das in der Mitte Tanzende ist der Anführer der Gruppe.
descriptions.es: Swanna empieza a bailar al anochecer. El que baila en el centro es el líder de la bandada.
descriptions.it: Gli Swanna cominciano a danzare al crepuscolo. Quello che balla al centro è il capo dello stormo.
descriptions.ja: スワンナは 夕暮れになると 踊り始める。 中央で 踊る 個体が 群れの リーダーだ。
descriptions.ko: 스완나는 해 질 녘부터 춤을 추기 시작한다. 무리 중앙에서 춤추는 개체가 무리의 리더이다.

name: vanillite
description: The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas around them.
appearance: Small, white, ice cream cone-shaped Pokemon with a swirly white body, a light blue ice crystal on its head, and small black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Leur souffle atteint -50 °C. Ils créent des cristaux de neige et font tomber la neige autour d'eux.
descriptions.de: Die Temperatur ihres Atems beträgt -50 °C. Sie erzeugen Schneekristalle und lassen Schnee in ihrer Umgebung fallen.
descriptions.es: La temperatura de su aliento es de -50 °C. Crean cristales de nieve y hacen nevar en las zonas a su alrededor.
descriptions.it: La temperatura del loro alito è di -50 °C. Creano cristalli di neve e fanno nevicare nelle zone circostanti.
descriptions.ja: 息の温度は マイナス５０℃。 氷の結晶を 生み出し 周囲に 雪を 降らせる。
descriptions.ko: 숨결의 온도는 영하 50°C다. 얼음 결정을 만들어 주변에 눈을 내리게 한다.

name: vanillish
description: Snowy mountains are this Pokémon’s habitat. During an ancient ice age, they moved to southern areas.
appearance: Medium-sized, double-scoop ice cream cone-shaped Pokemon with two swirly white bodies stacked, a light blue ice crystal between them and one on top, and small black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon vit dans les montagnes enneigées. Durant une ancienne ère glaciaire, il a migré vers les régions du sud.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon lebt in schneebedeckten Bergen. Während einer eiszeitlichen Epoche zogen sie in südlichere Gebiete.
descriptions.es: Las montañas nevadas son el hábitat de este Pokémon. Durante una antigua era glacial, se desplazaron a zonas del sur.
descriptions.it: Le montagne innevate sono l'habitat di questo Pokémon. Durante un'antica era glaciale, si spostarono verso le regioni meridionali.
descriptions.ja: 雪山が 生息地だ。 太古の 氷河期に 南の 地域へと 移動してきた。
descriptions.ko: 눈 덮인 산이 서식지다. 태고의 빙하기에 남쪽 지역으로 이동해왔다.

name: vanilluxe
description: Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and attack their foes with violent blizzards.
appearance: Large, triple-scoop ice cream cone-shaped Pokemon with three swirly white bodies, two light blue ice crystals on its 'hands,' and a large light blue crystal forming a 'straw' on its head, with small black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ils avalent de grandes quantités d'eau pour créer des nuages de neige dans leur corps et attaquer leurs ennemis avec de violentes tempêtes.
descriptions.de: Sie schlucken große Mengen Wasser, um in ihrem Körper Schneewolken zu bilden und ihre Gegner mit heftigen Schneestürmen anzugreifen.
descriptions.es: Tragan grandes cantidades de agua para crear nubes de nieve dentro de su cuerpo y atacar a sus enemigos con violentas ventiscas.
descriptions.it: Ingurgitano grandi quantità d'acqua, creano nuvole di neve nel corpo e attaccano i nemici con violente bufere.
descriptions.ja: 大量の水を 飲み込み 体内で 雪雲を 作りだし 猛吹雪で 敵を 攻撃する。
descriptions.ko: 대량의 물을 삼켜 몸 안에 눈구름을 만들고 맹렬한 눈보라로 적을 공격한다.

name: deerling
description: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.
appearance: Small, fawn-like Pokemon with a light brown body, cream-colored underside, and a flower-like tuft of fur on its head whose color changes with the season.

descriptions.fr: La couleur et l'odeur de sa fourrure changent pour s'accorder à l'herbe des montagnes. S'il perçoit de l'hostilité, il se cache dans l'herbe.
descriptions.de: Farbe und Geruch seines Fells passen sich dem Gras in den Bergen an. Bei Feindseligkeit versteckt es sich im Gras.
descriptions.es: El color y el aroma de su pelaje cambian para igualarse a la hierba de la montaña. Cuando perciben hostilidad, se esconden entre la hierba.
descriptions.it: Il colore e il profumo della sua pelliccia cambiano per adattarsi all'erba di montagna. Quando percepisce ostilità, si nasconde nell'erba.
descriptions.ja: 毛の 色と においが 山野の 草木と 同じに 変わる。 敵意を 感じると 草むらに 身を 隠す。
descriptions.ko: 털 색과 냄새가 산과 들의 풀과 같게 변한다. 적의를 감지하면 풀숲에 몸을 숨긴다.

name: sawsbuck
description: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck’s horns.
appearance: Large, stag-like Pokemon with a light brown body, cream-colored underside, and large, ornate antlers that change shape and sprout seasonal foliage.

descriptions.fr: Ils migrent selon les saisons. On peut connaître la saison en observant les bois de Haydaim.
descriptions.de: Sie wandern je nach Jahreszeit. An den Hörnern von Kronjuwild kann man die Jahreszeit erkennen.
descriptions.es: Migran según las estaciones. La gente puede saber la estación observando los cuernos de Sawsbuck.
descriptions.it: Migrano in base alle stagioni. Dalle corna di Sawsbuck si può capire che stagione è.
descriptions.ja: 季節によって 移動する。 メブキジカの 角を 見れば 季節が わかる。
descriptions.ko: 계절에 따라 이동한다. 바라철록의 뿔을 보면 계절을 알 수 있다.

name: emolga
description: The energy made in its cheeks’ electric pouches is stored inside its membrane and released while it is gliding.
appearance: Small, white flying squirrel with a black face, large black eyes, large yellow circular cheek pouches, yellow patagium (wing membranes), and a black tail with a white tip.

descriptions.fr: L'énergie produite dans les poches électriques de ses joues est stockée dans sa membrane et libérée lorsqu'il plane.
descriptions.de: Die in den Backentaschen erzeugte elektrische Energie wird in seinen Flugmembranen gespeichert und beim Gleiten freigesetzt.
descriptions.es: La energía generada en sus bolsas eléctricas de las mejillas se almacena en su membrana y se libera mientras planea.
descriptions.it: L'energia prodotta nelle sacche elettriche delle sue guance viene immagazzinata nella sua membrana e rilasciata quando plana.
descriptions.ja: ほっぺの 電気袋で 作った エネルギーは 飛膜に 貯蔵され 滑空中に 放たれる。
descriptions.ko: 볼의 전기주머니에서 만든 에너지는 비막에 저장되고 활공 중에 방출된다.

name: karrablast
description: These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.
appearance: Small, blue insectoid larva with a light blue segmented body, a large yellow helmet-like shell covering its head, and a pointed blue horn.

descriptions.fr: Ces mystérieux Pokémon évoluent quand ils reçoivent une stimulation électrique alors qu'ils sont au même endroit que Escargaume.
descriptions.de: Diese geheimnisvollen Pokémon entwickeln sich, wenn sie an derselben Stelle wie Schnuthelm elektrische Reize erhalten.
descriptions.es: Estos misteriosos Pokémon evolucionan cuando reciben estimulación eléctrica mientras están en el mismo lugar que Shelmet.
descriptions.it: Questi misteriosi Pokémon si evolvono quando ricevono una stimolazione elettrica mentre si trovano nello stesso luogo di Shelmet.
descriptions.ja: シェルミーと 同じ場所に いて 電気の 刺激を 受けると 進化する 謎の ポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 쪼마리와 같은 장소에 있을 때 전기 자극을 받으면 진화하는 수수께끼의 포켓몬.

name: escavalier
description: They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely.
appearance: Armored knight-like insect with a silver body, red accents, a large red lance on its right arm, a silver shield on its left arm, and a distinct red crest on its head.

descriptions.fr: Ils volent à grande vitesse, attaquant avec leurs lances pointues. Même en difficulté, ils affrontent leurs adversaires courageusement.
descriptions.de: Sie fliegen mit hoher Geschwindigkeit umher und greifen mit ihren spitzen Speeren an. Selbst in Schwierigkeiten stellen sie sich ihren Gegnern mutig.
descriptions.es: Vuelan a gran velocidad, golpeando con sus lanzas puntiagudas. Incluso en apuros, se enfrentan a sus oponentes con valentía.
descriptions.it: Volano ad alta velocità, attaccando con le loro lance appuntite. Anche in difficoltà, affrontano gli avversari con coraggio.
descriptions.ja: 高速で 飛び回り 鋭い 槍で 突きかかる。 危機に 瀕しても 勇敢に 敵と 向き合う。
descriptions.ko: 고속으로 날아다니며 날카로운 창으로 들이받는다. 위기에 처해도 용감하게 적과 맞선다.

name: foongus
description: It lures people in with its Poké Ball pattern, then releases poison spores. Why it resembles a Poké Ball is unknown.
appearance: Small, mushroom-shaped Pokemon with a red cap patterned with white Poké Ball-like spots, a brown stem, and a small, black, oval mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il attire les gens avec son motif de Poké Ball, puis libère des spores empoisonnées. La raison pour laquelle il ressemble à une Poké Ball est inconnue.
descriptions.de: Es lockt Menschen mit seinem Pokéball-Muster an und setzt dann giftige Sporen frei. Warum es einem Pokéball ähnelt, ist unbekannt.
descriptions.es: Atrae a la gente con su patrón de Poké Ball, luego libera esporas venenosas. Se desconoce por qué se parece a una Poké Ball.
descriptions.it: Attira le persone con il suo motivo a Poké Ball, poi rilascia spore velenose. Il motivo per cui assomiglia a una Poké Ball è sconosciuto.
descriptions.ja: モンスターボールに 似た 模様で 人を 誘い 毒の 胞子を 吐き出す。 なぜ モンスターボールに 似るのか 不明。
descriptions.ko: 몬스터볼과 비슷한 무늬로 사람을 유인한 뒤 독가루를 내뿜는다. 왜 몬스터볼과 닮았는지는 불명이다.

name: amoonguss
description: It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poké Balls, in a swaying motion.
appearance: Large, mushroom-shaped Pokemon with a red cap patterned with three white Poké Ball-like spots, two brown arm-like growths ending in similar Poké Ball patterns, and a large, black, oval mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il attire ses proies en dansant et en agitant ses bras en forme de Poké Balls d'un mouvement balancier.
descriptions.de: Es lockt Beute an, indem es tanzt und seine Armpilzhüte, die Pokéballen ähneln, schwingend bewegt.
descriptions.es: Atrae a sus presas danzando y agitando sus brazos, que recuerdan a Poké Balls, con un movimiento oscilante.
descriptions.it: Attira le prede danzando e agitando le braccia, che ricordano delle Poké Ball, con un movimento oscillante.
descriptions.ja: モンスターボールに似た腕の傘を揺らしながら踊り、獲物をおびき寄せる。
descriptions.ko: 몬스터볼을 닮은 팔의 갓을 흔들며 춤춰서 먹이를 유인한다.

name: frillish
description: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.
appearance: Translucent jellyfish-like Pokemon (blue for male, pink for female) with a large, frilly bell, a ruffled collar, two large, dark eyes, and two long, ribbon-like tentacles.

descriptions.fr: Il enserre son adversaire avec ses fins bras en forme de voile et l'entraîne au fond de l'océan.
descriptions.de: Es umschlingt seinen Gegner mit seinen dünnen, schleierartigen Armen und zieht ihn auf den Meeresgrund.
descriptions.es: Envuelve a su oponente con sus finos brazos, parecidos a un velo, y lo arrastra al fondo del océano.
descriptions.it: Avvolge l'avversario con le sue sottili braccia a velo e lo trascina sul fondo dell'oceano.
descriptions.ja: 薄いベールのような腕で相手の体を巻きつけ、深海の底へと引きずり込む。
descriptions.ko: 얇은 베일 같은 팔로 상대의 몸을 감아 심해 바닥으로 끌고 내려간다.

name: frillish-male
description: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.
appearance: A bell-shaped jellyfish-like Pokemon with a light blue upper body, a white frilly collar, two large white eyes with black pupils, a wavy mouth, and five short, light blue tentacles below.

descriptions.fr: Il enserre son adversaire avec ses fins bras en forme de voile et l'entraîne au fond de l'océan.
descriptions.de: Es umschlingt seinen Gegner mit seinen dünnen, schleierartigen Armen und zieht ihn auf den Meeresgrund.
descriptions.es: Envuelve a su oponente con sus finos brazos, parecidos a un velo, y lo arrastra al fondo del océano.
descriptions.it: Avvolge l'avversario con le sue sottili braccia a velo e lo trascina sul fondo dell'oceano.
descriptions.ja: 薄いベールのような腕で相手の体を巻きつけ、深海の底へと引きずり込む。
descriptions.ko: 얇은 베일 같은 팔로 상대의 몸을 감아 심해 바닥으로 끌고 내려간다.

name: jellicent
description: The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicent’s habitat: all sunken, all lost, all vanished.
appearance: Large, regal, translucent jellyfish-like Pokemon (blue for male, pink for female) with a crown-like frill, a prominent mouth with teeth, large, dark eyes, and long, thick tentacles extending from its bell.

descriptions.fr: Les navires et leurs équipages qui s'aventurent dans son habitat sont tous coulés, tous perdus, tous disparus.
descriptions.de: Schiffe und ihre Besatzungen, die in Quabbels Lebensraum vordringen, sind alle gesunken, alle verloren, alle verschwunden.
descriptions.es: Los barcos y las tripulaciones que se adentran en su hábitat sufren el mismo destino: todos hundidos, todos perdidos, todos desaparecidos.
descriptions.it: Navi ed equipaggi che si spingono nel suo habitat finiscono tutti affondati, tutti dispersi, tutti scomparsi.
descriptions.ja: ブルンゲルの生息地に迷い込んだ船や乗組員の運命は、すべて沈没、すべて遭難、すべて消滅だ。
descriptions.ko: 탱탱겔의 서식지에 발을 들인 배와 선원들의 운명은 모두 침몰, 모두 실종, 모두 소멸이다.

name: jellicent-male
description: The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicent’s habitat: all sunken, all lost, all vanished.
appearance: A large, blue jellyfish-like Pokemon with a wide white frilly collar, a large white mustache-like tentacle over a small mouth, white pupils on prominent black eyes, and three thick, blue tentacles trailing below.

descriptions.fr: Les navires et leurs équipages qui s'aventurent dans son habitat sont tous coulés, tous perdus, tous disparus.
descriptions.de: Schiffe und ihre Besatzungen, die in Quabbels Lebensraum vordringen, sind alle gesunken, alle verloren, alle verschwunden.
descriptions.es: Los barcos y las tripulaciones que se adentran en su hábitat sufren el mismo destino: todos hundidos, todos perdidos, todos desaparecidos.
descriptions.it: Navi ed equipaggi che si spingono nel suo habitat finiscono tutti affondati, tutti dispersi, tutti scomparsi.
descriptions.ja: ブルンゲルの生息地に迷い込んだ船や乗組員の運命は、すべて沈没、すべて遭難、すべて消滅だ。
descriptions.ko: 탱탱겔의 서식지에 발을 들인 배와 선원들의 운명은 모두 침몰, 모두 실종, 모두 소멸이다.

name: alomomola
description: The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds.
appearance: Pink, heart-shaped fish with a large, rounded body, a lighter pink underside, small yellow fins, and a yellow fin on its back, resembling a large ocean sunfish.

descriptions.fr: La membrane spéciale qui enveloppe Viskuse a la capacité de soigner les blessures.
descriptions.de: Die spezielle Membran, die Mamolida umgibt, besitzt die Fähigkeit, Wunden zu heilen.
descriptions.es: La membrana especial que envuelve a Alomomola tiene la habilidad de curar heridas.
descriptions.it: La speciale membrana che avvolge Alomomola ha la capacità di curare le ferite.
descriptions.ja: ママンボウを包む特殊な膜は、傷を癒す能力を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 맘복치를 감싸는 특수한 막은 상처를 치유하는 능력이 있다.

name: joltik
description: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses.
appearance: Tiny, yellow and blue tick-like spider with four stubby legs, two large black eyes, and blue fur patches on its back and head.

descriptions.fr: Les Statitik des villes ont appris à aspirer l'électricité des prises des maisons.
descriptions.de: In Städten lebende Wattzapf haben gelernt, Elektrizität aus Steckdosen in Häusern zu saugen.
descriptions.es: Los Joltik que viven en las ciudades han aprendido una técnica para absorber electricidad de los enchufes de las casas.
descriptions.it: I Joltik che vivono in città hanno imparato la tecnica per succhiare elettricità dalle prese delle case.
descriptions.ja: 街に棲むバチュルは、家のコンセントから電気を吸い取る術を覚えた。
descriptions.ko: 도시에 사는 저리더프는 집 콘센트에서 전기를 빨아들이는 기술을 익혔다.

name: galvantula
description: When attacked, they create an electric barrier by spitting out many electrically charged threads.
appearance: Large, yellow and blue tarantula-like spider with long, segmented legs, a furry yellow abdomen, blue patterns on its back, and large black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Attaqués, ils créent une barrière électrique en crachant de nombreux fils chargés d'électricité.
descriptions.de: Bei Angriffen erzeugen sie eine elektrische Barriere, indem sie viele elektrisch geladene Fäden spucken.
descriptions.es: Cuando son atacados, crean una barrera eléctrica escupiendo muchos hilos cargados de electricidad.
descriptions.it: Se attaccati, creano una barriera elettrica sputando numerosi fili carichi di elettricità.
descriptions.ja: 襲われると、電気を帯びた糸を大量に吐き出し、電気のバリアを作る。
descriptions.ko: 습격당하면 전기를 띤 실을 대량으로 내뿜어 전기 배리어를 만든다.

name: ferroseed
description: When threatened, it attacks by shooting a barrage of spikes, which gives it a chance to escape by rolling away.
appearance: Small, gray, spiky seed-like Pokemon covered in numerous sharp, green metallic thorns, with two prominent dark green eyes.

descriptions.fr: Menacé, il attaque en tirant une volée de piques, ce qui lui donne une chance de s'échapper en roulant.
descriptions.de: Bei Bedrohung greift es an, indem es einen Stachelhagel verschießt, was ihm eine Chance gibt, wegzukugeln.
descriptions.es: Cuando se siente amenazado, ataca disparando una andanada de púas, lo que le permite escapar rodando.
descriptions.it: Se minacciato, attacca sparando una raffica di spine, il che gli dà la possibilità di fuggire rotolando via.
descriptions.ja: 脅かされると、無数のトゲを発射して攻撃し、その隙に転がって逃げる。
descriptions.ko: 위협을 느끼면 수많은 가시를 발사해서 공격하고 그 틈에 굴러서 도망친다.

name: ferrothorn
description: It fights by swinging around its three spiky feelers. A hit from these steel spikes can reduce a boulder to rubble.
appearance: Large, gray, plant-like creature resembling a flail, with a central body covered in green metallic spikes and three long, spiked metallic vines ending in spiky mace-like balls.

descriptions.fr: Il se bat en faisant tournoyer ses trois vrilles épineuses. Un coup de ces pointes d'acier peut réduire un rocher en miettes.
descriptions.de: Es kämpft, indem es seine drei stacheligen Fühler herumschwingt. Ein Schlag dieser Stahlstacheln kann einen Felsbrocken zu Schutt zerkleinern.
descriptions.es: Lucha haciendo girar sus tres tentáculos espinosos. Un golpe de estas púas de acero puede reducir una roca a escombros.
descriptions.it: Combatte agitando i suoi tre tentacoli spinosi. Un colpo di queste spine d'acciaio può ridurre un masso in macerie.
descriptions.ja: ３本のトゲだらけの触角を振り回して戦う。鋼のトゲの一撃は、岩をも粉砕する。
descriptions.ko: 가시투성이 촉수 3개를 휘둘러 싸운다. 강철 가시의 일격은 바위마저 분쇄한다.

name: klink
description: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.
appearance: Two interlocking gray gears, one larger than the other, with smaller black gear teeth, rotating around a central red core.

descriptions.fr: Les deux mini-engrenages qui s'assemblent sont prédéterminés. Chacun rebondit sur d'autres sans s'emboîter.
descriptions.de: Die beiden sich ineinandergreifenden Minizahnräder sind vorbestimmt. Jedes prallt von anderen Minizahnrädern ab, ohne sich zu verbinden.
descriptions.es: Los dos miniengranajes que se acoplan están predeterminados. Cada uno rebotará en otros miniengranajes sin encajar.
descriptions.it: I due miniingranaggi che si uniscono sono predeterminati. Ognuno rimbalza contro gli altri miniingranaggi senza incastrarsi.
descriptions.ja: ２つの ミニギアは かみあう 相手が 決まっている。 それ以外の ミニギアとは 弾き合う。
descriptions.ko: 2개의 미니 기어는 맞물리는 상대가 정해져 있다. 그 외의 미니 기어와는 서로 튕겨낸다.

name: klang
description: By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.
appearance: Three interlocking gray gears: two small ones connected to a larger central one, all with smaller black gear teeth, rotating around two central red cores.

descriptions.fr: Il communique ses émotions en changeant son sens de rotation. Quand il est en colère, il tourne plus vite.
descriptions.de: Indem es seine Rotationsrichtung ändert, teilt es seine Gefühle mit. Wenn es wütend ist, dreht es sich schneller.
descriptions.es: Comunica sus sentimientos cambiando la dirección de su rotación. Cuando está enfadado, gira más rápido.
descriptions.it: Comunica i suoi sentimenti cambiando la direzione della sua rotazione. Quando è arrabbiato, gira più velocemente.
descriptions.ja: 回る 方向を 変えて 気持ちを 伝える。 怒ると 回転スピードが 上がる。
descriptions.ko: 회전 방향을 바꿔 기분을 전한다. 화가 나면 회전 스피드가 빨라진다.

name: klinklang
description: The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.
appearance: Klinklang is a system of three main interlocking gears: a large grey central gear, a smaller black front gear with a yellow inner rim, and a rear black gear with a red inner rim, all connected by a yellow bar, with a spiky, red-cored black gear rotating on top.

descriptions.fr: L'engrenage au cœur rouge tourne à grande vitesse pour une rapide recharge d'énergie.
descriptions.de: Das Zahnrad mit dem roten Kern wird mit hoher Geschwindigkeit gedreht, um schnell Energie aufzuladen.
descriptions.es: El engranaje con el núcleo rojo gira a gran velocidad para una rápida carga de energía.
descriptions.it: L'ingranaggio con il nucleo rosso ruota ad alta velocità per una rapida ricarica di energia.
descriptions.ja: 赤い コアを 持つ ギアを 高速で 回転させ 急速に エネルギーを チャージする。
descriptions.ko: 붉은 코어를 가진 기어를 고속으로 회전시켜 빠르게 에너지를 충전한다.

name: tynamo
description: While one alone doesn’t have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.
appearance: Tynamo is a small, plain white, eel-like creature with a small, round black mouth and two flat, yellow, paddle-shaped fins protruding from its sides.

descriptions.fr: Un seul n'a pas beaucoup de puissance, mais une chaîne de nombreux Tynamo peut être aussi puissante que la foudre.
descriptions.de: Allein besitzt es nicht viel Kraft, doch eine Kette vieler Zapplardin kann so stark wie ein Blitz sein.
descriptions.es: Aunque uno solo no tiene mucho poder, una cadena de muchos Tynamo puede ser tan poderosa como un rayo.
descriptions.it: Da solo non ha molta potenza, ma una catena di molti Tynamo può essere potente quanto un fulmine.
descriptions.ja: １匹では たいした 力は ないが 何匹も 連なると 雷並みの パワーを 発揮する。
descriptions.ko: 한 마리로는 별 힘이 없지만 여러 마리가 이어지면 번개만큼 강한 파워를 발휘한다.

name: eelektrik
description: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.
appearance: Eelektrik is a dark blue, eel-like Pokemon with a light yellow underbelly, two prominent red circular markings on each side of its body near its head, a large round sucker mouth, and small, clear side fins.

descriptions.fr: Ils s'enroulent autour de leurs ennemis et les électrocutent avec des organes générateurs d'électricité qui ressemblent à de simples motifs circulaires.
descriptions.de: Sie winden sich um Gegner und schockieren sie mit stromerzeugenden Organen, die wie einfache Kreismuster aussehen.
descriptions.es: Se enroscan alrededor de los enemigos y los electrocutan con órganos generadores de electricidad que parecen simples patrones circulares.
descriptions.it: Si avvolgono attorno ai nemici e li folgorano con organi generatori di elettricità che sembrano semplici motivi circolari.
descriptions.ja: 敵に巻きつき、ただの丸い模様に見える発電器官で電気ショックを与える。
descriptions.ko: 적에게 휘감겨 단순한 원형 패턴처럼 보이는 발전 기관으로 전기를 흘려 감전시킨다.

name: eelektross
description: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.
appearance: Eelektross is a large, dark blue, lamprey-like creature with a beige underside, small black eyes, two prominent green-yellow arm-fins tipped with red suckers, and a large, wide fan-like tail fin.

descriptions.fr: Ils rampent hors de l'océan en utilisant leurs bras. Ils attaquent leurs proies sur le rivage et les traînent immédiatement dans l'océan.
descriptions.de: Sie kriechen mit ihren Armen aus dem Ozean. Sie greifen Beute an Land an und ziehen sie sofort ins Meer.
descriptions.es: Salen del océano arrastrándose con sus brazos. Atacan a sus presas en tierra y las arrastran inmediatamente al océano.
descriptions.it: Escono dall'oceano strisciando con le loro braccia. Attaccano le prede a terra e le trascinano immediatamente nell'oceano.
descriptions.ja: 腕を使って海から這い上がる。陸上の獲物を襲い、すぐに海中に引きずり込む。
descriptions.ko: 팔을 사용하여 바다 밖으로 기어 나온다. 육상의 먹이를 공격하여 즉시 바다로 끌고 들어간다.

name: elgyem
description: It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its opponent’s brain, causing unendurable headaches.
appearance: Elgyem is a small, grey, humanoid alien-like creature with a large, light blue, dome-shaped head, black eyes encased in a green oval, and small blue dots on its grey, stubby limbs and torso.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise sa puissante force psychique pour comprimer le cerveau de son adversaire, causant des maux de tête insupportables.
descriptions.de: Es nutzt seine starke Psycho-Kraft, um das Gehirn des Gegners zu quetschen, was unerträgliche Kopfschmerzen verursacht.
descriptions.es: Utiliza su fuerte poder psíquico para oprimir el cerebro de su oponente, causando dolores de cabeza insoportables.
descriptions.it: Usa il suo potente potere psichico per comprimere il cervello dell'avversario, causando emicranie insopportabili.
descriptions.ja: 強力な サイコパワーで 相手の 脳を 締めつけ 耐えがたい 頭痛を 引き起こす。
descriptions.ko: 강력한 사이코파워로 상대의 뇌를 압박해 참기 힘든 두통을 일으킨다.

name: beheeyem
description: It can manipulate an opponent’s memory. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three different-colored fingers.
appearance: Beheeyem is a taller, grey, humanoid alien-like creature with a flat-topped, ridged light blue head, three black eyes within a green oval visor, and a chest adorned with three circular button-like markings in red, yellow, and green.

descriptions.fr: Il peut manipuler la mémoire d'un adversaire. Apparemment, il communique en faisant clignoter ses trois doigts de couleurs différentes.
descriptions.de: Es kann die Erinnerung eines Gegners manipulieren. Offenbar kommuniziert es, indem es seine drei verschiedenfarbigen Finger blinken lässt.
descriptions.es: Puede manipular la memoria de un oponente. Al parecer, se comunica parpadeando sus tres dedos de diferentes colores.
descriptions.it: Può manipolare la memoria di un avversario. A quanto pare, comunica lampeggiando le sue tre dita di colore diverso.
descriptions.ja: 相手の 記憶を 操ることが できる。 ３色の 指を 点滅させて 会話しているらしい。
descriptions.ko: 상대의 기억을 조종할 수 있다. 3색의 손가락을 점멸시켜 대화하는 듯하다.

name: litwick
description: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.
appearance: Litwick is a small, white, ghost-like candle with a large, round yellow eye, a purple flame atop its head, and dark blue wax dripping from its body.

descriptions.fr: Funécire émet une lumière qui absorbe l'énergie vitale des gens et des Pokémon, laquelle devient le carburant qu'il brûle.
descriptions.de: Lichtel strahlt ein Licht aus, das die Lebensenergie von Menschen und Pokémon absorbiert und zu seinem Brennstoff wird.
descriptions.es: Litwick emite una luz que absorbe la energía vital de personas y Pokémon, la cual se convierte en el combustible que quema.
descriptions.it: Litwick emette una luce che assorbe l'energia vitale di persone e Pokémon, che diventa il combustibile che brucia.
descriptions.ja: 人や ポケモンの 生命エネルギーを 吸いとる 光を 放ち それが 炎の 燃料になる。
descriptions.ko: 사람이나 포켓몬의 생명 에너지를 빨아들이는 빛을 발하며 그것이 불꽃의 연료가 된다.

name: lampent
description: This ominous Pokémon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen.
appearance: Lampent is a floating purple lamp with a white base, two bright yellow eyes, a small purple flame on top, and two spectral, wavy arms extending from its sides.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon de mauvais augure est craint. Il erre à travers les villes, à la recherche des esprits des défunts.
descriptions.de: Dieses unheimliche Pokémon wird gefürchtet. Es wandert durch Städte und sucht nach den Geistern der Gefallenen.
descriptions.es: Este siniestro Pokémon es temido. Vaga por las ciudades, buscando los espíritus de los caídos.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon sinistro è temuto. Vaga per le città, cercando gli spiriti dei caduti.
descriptions.ja: 不吉な ポケモンと 恐れられる。 街中を さまよい 倒れた ものの 魂を 探す。
descriptions.ko: 불길한 포켓몬으로 두려움의 대상이다. 도시를 헤매며 쓰러진 자의 영혼을 찾는다.

name: chandelure
description: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.
appearance: Chandelure is an ornate purple and white chandelier with several candle-like arms, each bearing a small purple flame, and two large, glowing yellow eyes on its central, spherical body.

descriptions.fr: Il absorbe un esprit qu'il consume. En agitant les flammes sur ses bras, il plonge ses ennemis dans une transe hypnotique.
descriptions.de: Es absorbiert Geister und verbrennt sie. Durch das Schwenken der Flammen an seinen Armen versetzt es seine Feinde in einen hypnotischen Trancezustand.
descriptions.es: Absorbe espíritus y luego los quema. Al agitar las llamas de sus brazos, sumerge a sus oponentes en un trance hipnótico.
descriptions.it: Assorbe gli spiriti e li incenerisce. Agitando le fiamme sulle sue braccia, induce i nemici in uno stato di trance ipnotica.
descriptions.ja: 霊魂を吸い込み、燃やしてしまう。腕の炎を揺らして相手を催眠状態に陥らせる。
descriptions.ko: 영혼을 흡수해서 불태운다. 팔의 불꽃을 흔들어서 상대를 최면 상태에 빠트린다.

name: axew
description: They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks strong and sharp.
appearance: Axew is a small, light green, bipedal dragon with a dark green face and belly, two large white tusks extending from its cheeks, and small dark green claws on its feet.

descriptions.fr: Ils utilisent leurs défenses pour écraser les baies qu'ils mangent. Leur repousse répétée les rend fortes et aiguisées.
descriptions.de: Es zerquetscht mit seinen Hauern die Beeren, die es frisst. Durch wiederholtes Nachwachsen werden seine Hauer stark und scharf.
descriptions.es: Usan sus colmillos para triturar las bayas que comen. Su crecimiento repetido hace que sus colmillos sean fuertes y afilados.
descriptions.it: Usa le sue zanne per schiacciare le bacche di cui si nutre. La continua ricrescita le rende forti e affilate.
descriptions.ja: 牙を使って食べるきのみを砕く。何度でも生え替わることで、牙は強く鋭くなる。
descriptions.ko: 송곳니로 먹는 나무열매를 으깬다. 몇 번이고 다시 자라나는 탓에 송곳니가 튼튼하고 날카롭다.

name: fraxure
description: Since a broken tusk will not grow back, they diligently sharpen their tusks on river rocks after they’ve been fighting.
appearance: Fraxure is a bipedal, grey-green dragon with dark green undersides, two sharp black tusks protruding from its lower jaw, and a prominent dark green ridge cresting its head.

descriptions.fr: Une défense brisée ne repousse pas, c'est pourquoi ils aiguisent assidûment les leurs sur les rochers des rivières après un combat.
descriptions.de: Da ein abgebrochener Hauer nicht nachwächst, wetzen sie ihre Hauer nach Kämpfen fleißig an Flusssteinen.
descriptions.es: Como un colmillo roto no vuelve a crecer, afilan diligentemente sus colmillos en las rocas de los ríos después de luchar.
descriptions.it: Poiché una zanna rotta non ricresce, affila diligentemente le sue zanne sulle rocce dei fiumi dopo aver combattuto.
descriptions.ja: 折れた牙は二度と生えてこないため、戦いの後は川辺の岩で丹念に牙を研ぐ。
descriptions.ko: 부러진 송곳니는 다시 자라나지 않기 때문에 싸움 후에는 강가 바위에서 정성껏 송곳니를 간다.

name: haxorus
description: They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel.
appearance: Haxorus is a large, dark green, bipedal dragon with a grey underside, massive black axe-like tusks flaring from its cheeks, and red sclera surrounding its yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ils sont bienveillants mais peuvent être impitoyables en défendant leur territoire. Ils défient leurs ennemis avec des défenses capables de couper l'acier.
descriptions.de: Sie sind freundlich, können aber unerbittlich sein, wenn sie ihr Revier verteidigen. Sie fordern Feinde mit Hauern heraus, die Stahl schneiden können.
descriptions.es: Son amables, pero pueden ser implacables al defender su territorio. Desafían a sus oponentes con colmillos capaces de cortar acero.
descriptions.it: È gentile, ma può essere implacabile quando difende il suo territorio. Sfida i nemici con zanne che possono tagliare l'acciaio.
descriptions.ja: 心優しいが縄張りを荒らされると容赦ない。鋼鉄をも切り裂く牙で相手に立ち向かう。
descriptions.ko: 마음은 착하지만 영역이 침범당하면 용서 없다. 강철도 자를 수 있는 송곳니로 상대를 맞선다.

name: cubchoo
description: When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.
appearance: Cubchoo is a small, white, bipedal bear cub with a perpetually dripping light blue snot bubble from its nose, a fluffy white collar, and a blue tuft of fur on its head.

descriptions.fr: Quand il ne se sent pas bien, son mucus devient liquide et la puissance de ses capacités de type Glace diminue.
descriptions.de: Wenn es sich unwohl fühlt, wird sein Schleim wässrig und die Kraft seiner Eis-Attacken nimmt ab.
descriptions.es: Cuando no se siente bien, su mucosidad se vuelve líquida y el poder de sus movimientos de tipo Hielo disminuye.
descriptions.it: Quando non si sente bene, il suo muco diventa liquido e la potenza delle sue mosse di tipo Ghiaccio diminuisce.
descriptions.ja: 体調が悪いと鼻水が水っぽくなり、こおりタイプの技の威力が落ちる。
descriptions.ko: 몸 상태가 안 좋으면 콧물이 물처럼 변하고 얼음 타입 기술의 위력이 떨어진다.

name: beartic
description: It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.
appearance: Beartic is a large, white, bipedal polar bear with a formidable light blue icicle beard, three dark blue claws on each hand, and a shaggy blue ridge of fur extending down its back.

descriptions.fr: Il peut geler son souffle à volonté. Très habile dans l'eau, il nage dans les mers du Nord et y attrape ses proies.
descriptions.de: Es kann seinen Atem nach Belieben gefrieren lassen. Im Wasser ist es sehr geschickt, schwimmt in nördlichen Meeren und fängt Beute.
descriptions.es: Puede congelar su aliento a voluntad. Muy hábil en el agua, nada por los mares del norte y atrapa a sus presas.
descriptions.it: Può congelare il suo alito a piacimento. Molto abile in acqua, nuota nei mari del nord e cattura le prede.
descriptions.ja: 息を自由自在に凍らせられる。水中での動きも得意で、北の海を泳ぎまわり獲物を捕らえる。
descriptions.ko: 숨을 자유자재로 얼릴 수 있다. 물속에서의 움직임도 특기여서 북쪽 바다를 헤엄쳐 다니며 먹이를 잡는다.

name: cryogonal
description: When its body temperature goes up, it turns into steam and vanishes. When its temperature lowers, it returns to ice.
appearance: Cryogonal is a large, grey, snowflake-shaped Pokémon with a circular red eye at its center, a prominent ridged mouth, and four dark blue chain-like appendages extending from its body.

descriptions.fr: Quand sa température corporelle augmente, il se transforme en vapeur et disparaît. Quand sa température baisse, il redevient de la glace.
descriptions.de: Wenn seine Körpertemperatur steigt, verwandelt es sich in Dampf und verschwindet. Wenn seine Temperatur sinkt, kehrt es zu Eis zurück.
descriptions.es: Cuando su temperatura corporal sube, se convierte en vapor y desaparece. Cuando su temperatura baja, vuelve a ser hielo.
descriptions.it: Quando la sua temperatura corporea sale, si trasforma in vapore e svanisce. Quando la sua temperatura si abbassa, torna a essere ghiaccio.
descriptions.ja: 体温が上がると水蒸気になって消える。体温が下がるとまた氷の姿に戻る。
descriptions.ko: 체온이 오르면 수증기로 변해서 사라진다. 체온이 내려가면 다시 얼음의 모습으로 돌아간다.

name: shelmet
description: When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.
appearance: Shelmet is a small, grey, snail-like creature protected by a large, round, grey helmet-shell with a prominent yellow stripe down its front and two small yellow eyes on stalks.

descriptions.fr: Attaqué, il se défend en fermant le couvercle de sa coquille. Il peut cracher un liquide collant et empoisonné.
descriptions.de: Bei einem Angriff verteidigt es sich, indem es den Deckel seiner Schale schließt. Es kann eine klebrige, giftige Flüssigkeit spucken.
descriptions.es: Cuando es atacado, se defiende cerrando la tapa de su caparazón. Puede escupir un líquido pegajoso y venenoso.
descriptions.it: Se attaccato, si difende chiudendo il coperchio del suo guscio. Può sputare un liquido appiccicoso e velenoso.
descriptions.ja: 攻撃されると殻のフタを閉めて身を守る。粘り気のある毒液を吐き出す。
descriptions.ko: 공격당하면 껍질의 뚜껑을 닫고 몸을 지킨다. 끈적이는 독액을 토해낸다.

name: accelgor
description: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.
appearance: Accelgor is a lean, red, humanoid ninja-like creature with a large, white, turban-like head covering, black eyes, a small mouth, and green striped markings on its red limbs.

descriptions.fr: Quand son corps se dessèche, il s'affaiblit. Pour éviter la déshydratation, il s'enveloppe de plusieurs couches d'une fine membrane.
descriptions.de: Wenn sein Körper austrocknet, wird es schwach. Um eine Dehydrierung zu verhindern, hüllt es sich in viele Schichten einer dünnen Membran.
descriptions.es: Cuando su cuerpo se seca, se debilita. Para evitar la deshidratación, se envuelve en muchas capas de una membrana fina.
descriptions.it: Quando il suo corpo si secca, si indebolisce. Per prevenire la disidratazione, si avvolge in molti strati di una sottile membrana.
descriptions.ja: 体が乾燥すると弱ってしまう。脱水を防ぐため薄い膜を何枚も体に巻きつけている。
descriptions.ko: 몸이 마르면 약해진다. 탈수를 막기 위해 얇은 막을 여러 겹 몸에 감고 있다.

name: stunfisk
description: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.
appearance: Stunfisk is a flat, brown, flounder-like fish with a yellow zigzag pattern across its back, two small black eyes on top, and a wide, red-lipped mouth.

descriptions.fr: Sa peau est très dure, il reste donc indemne même si des lutteurs de sumo lui marchent dessus. Il sourit quand il transmet de l'électricité.
descriptions.de: Seine Haut ist sehr hart, sodass es selbst dann unversehrt bleibt, wenn Sumoringer darauf treten. Es lächelt, wenn es Elektrizität überträgt.
descriptions.es: Su piel es muy dura, por lo que no sufre daños incluso si los luchadores de sumo lo pisan. Sonríe cuando transmite electricidad.
descriptions.it: La sua pelle è molto dura, quindi non subisce danni anche se calpestato dai lottatori di sumo. Sorride quando trasmette elettricità.
descriptions.ja: 皮膚がとても硬いので、力士に踏まれても平気。電気を流すときには笑顔になる。
descriptions.ko: 피부가 매우 단단해서 스모선수가 밟아도 끄떡없다. 전기를 흘려보낼 때 미소를 짓는다.

name: mienfoo
description: In fights, they dominate with onslaughts of flowing, continuous attacks. With their sharp claws, they cut enemies.
appearance: Mienfoo is a slender, bipedal, yellow weasel-like creature with red fur cuffs on its wrists and ankles, and long, thin red whiskers extending from its snout.

descriptions.fr: En combat, il domine avec des assauts d'attaques fluides et continues. Ses griffes acérées lui permettent de taillader ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Im Kampf dominiert es mit einer Flut fließender, ununterbrochener Attacken. Mit seinen scharfen Krallen schneidet es Feinde.
descriptions.es: En los combates, domina con una avalancha de ataques fluidos y continuos. Sus afiladas garras le permiten cortar a los enemigos.
descriptions.it: Nei combattimenti, domina con una valanga di attacchi fluidi e continui. Con i suoi artigli affilati taglia i nemici.
descriptions.ja: 戦いでは、流れるような連続攻撃で圧倒する。鋭い爪で敵を切り裂く。
descriptions.ko: 싸움에서는 물 흐르듯이 연속되는 공격으로 압도한다. 날카로운 발톱으로 적을 베어낸다.

name: mienshao
description: It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen.
appearance: Mienshao is an elegant, bipedal, purple weasel-like creature with long, flowing fur sleeves that extend past its paws, and two long, thin purple whiskers.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise la fourrure de ses bras comme un fouet. Ses attaques sont si rapides qu'elles en sont invisibles.
descriptions.de: Es schwingt das Fell an seinen Armen wie eine Peitsche. Seine Armattacken sind so schnell, dass sie nicht einmal gesehen werden können.
descriptions.es: Agita el pelo de sus brazos como si fuera un látigo. Sus ataques de brazo son tan rápidos que no pueden ni verse.
descriptions.it: Usa il pelo delle braccia come una frusta. I suoi attacchi sono così rapidi che non si riescono neanche a vedere.
descriptions.ja: 腕の毛をムチのように振り回す。その腕攻撃は、あまりの速さに見ることさえできない。
descriptions.ko: 팔의 털을 채찍처럼 휘두른다. 팔 공격은 너무 빨라서 보이지도 않는다.

name: druddigon
description: It warms its body by absorbing sunlight with its wings. When its body temperature falls, it can no longer move.
appearance: Druddigon is a robust, red, bipedal dragon with a rough, rock-like blue-black face adorned with several prominent red spikes, and blue-black claws and wing-like protrusions on its back.

descriptions.fr: Il se réchauffe en absorbant la lumière du soleil avec ses ailes. Quand sa température corporelle baisse, il ne peut plus bouger.
descriptions.de: Es wärmt seinen Körper, indem es Sonnenlicht mit seinen Flügeln absorbiert. Fällt seine Körpertemperatur, kann es sich nicht mehr bewegen.
descriptions.es: Calienta su cuerpo absorbiendo la luz solar con sus alas. Cuando su temperatura corporal baja, ya no puede moverse.
descriptions.it: Scalda il suo corpo assorbendo la luce solare con le ali. Quando la sua temperatura corporea si abbassa, non può più muoversi.
descriptions.ja: 翼で太陽光を吸収して体を温める。体温が下がると動けなくなってしまう。
descriptions.ko: 날개로 태양빛을 흡수하여 몸을 따뜻하게 한다. 체온이 떨어지면 움직일 수 없게 된다.

name: golett
description: The energy that burns inside it enables it to move, but no one has yet been able to identify this energy.
appearance: Golett is a small, grey, golem-like automaton with a prominent crack across its chest, glowing light blue eyes, and a single light blue marking on its torso.

descriptions.fr: L'énergie qui brûle en lui lui permet de bouger, mais personne n'a encore pu l'identifier.
descriptions.de: Die Energie, die in ihm brennt, ermöglicht ihm Bewegung, doch niemand konnte diese Energie bisher identifizieren.
descriptions.es: La energía que arde en su interior le permite moverse, pero nadie ha logrado identificarla todavía.
descriptions.it: L'energia che brucia al suo interno gli consente di muoversi, ma nessuno è ancora riuscito a identificarla.
descriptions.ja: 体内で燃え盛るエネルギーによって動くが、そのエネルギーの正体は誰も突き止めていない。
descriptions.ko: 몸속에서 타오르는 에너지로 움직이지만 그 에너지의 정체는 아무도 밝혀내지 못했다.

name: golurk
description: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.
appearance: Golurk is a large, grey, golem-like automaton with glowing yellow eyes, large cracks across its chest and limbs, and light blue geometric markings on its arms and legs.

descriptions.fr: Il traverse le ciel à des vitesses Mach. Retirer le sceau sur sa poitrine rend son énergie interne incontrôlable.
descriptions.de: Es fliegt mit Mach-Geschwindigkeit durch den Himmel. Entfernt man das Siegel auf seiner Brust, gerät seine innere Energie außer Kontrolle.
descriptions.es: Vuela por el cielo a velocidades Mach. Quitar el sello de su pecho hace que su energía interna se descontrole.
descriptions.it: Vola attraverso il cielo a velocità Mach. Rimuovere il sigillo sul suo petto fa sì che la sua energia interna vada fuori controllo.
descriptions.ja: マッハの速度で空を横断する。胸の封印を解くと、体内のエネルギーが暴走する。
descriptions.ko: 마하의 속도로 하늘을 가로지른다. 가슴의 봉인을 풀면 내부 에너지가 폭주한다.

name: pawniard
description: Blades comprise this Pokémon’s entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.
appearance: Pawniard is a small, red and black bipedal creature resembling a chess pawn, featuring yellow eyes and multiple sharp, blade-like protrusions on its head, arms, and knees.

descriptions.fr: Tout le corps de ce Pokémon est fait de lames. Si les combats les émoussent, il les aiguise sur les pierres au bord de la rivière.
descriptions.de: Klingen bilden den gesamten Körper dieses Pokémon. Wenn Kämpfe die Klingen stumpf machen, schärft es sie an Steinen am Fluss.
descriptions.es: El cuerpo de este Pokémon está formado por hojas. Si las batallas las desafilan, las afila en las piedras de la orilla del río.
descriptions.it: Il corpo di questo Pokémon è costituito interamente da lame. Se i combattimenti le rendono smussate, le affila sulle pietre del fiume.
descriptions.ja: 体のすべてが刃でできているポケモン。戦いで刃がなまると、川辺の石で研ぎ澄ます。
descriptions.ko: 몸 전체가 칼날로 이루어진 포켓몬. 싸움으로 칼날이 무뎌지면 강가 돌멩이에 갈아 날을 세운다.

name: bisharp
description: It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the boss, but will be driven from the group if it loses.
appearance: Bisharp is a tall, bipedal, red and black humanoid creature with a prominent axe-blade crest on its head, multiple sharp blade-like appendages on its arms and knees, and yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il dirige un groupe de Scalpion. Il se bat pour devenir le chef, mais sera chassé du groupe s'il perd.
descriptions.de: Es führt eine Gruppe Geronimatz an. Es kämpft, um der Anführer zu werden, wird aber aus der Gruppe vertrieben, wenn es verliert.
descriptions.es: Lidera un grupo de Pawniard. Lucha para convertirse en el jefe, pero será expulsado del grupo si pierde.
descriptions.it: Guida un gruppo di Pawniard. Combatte per diventare il capo, ma viene cacciato dal gruppo se perde.
descriptions.ja: コマタナの群れを率いる。ボスになるため戦うが、敗れると群れから追放される。
descriptions.ko: 자망칼 무리를 이끈다. 보스가 되기 위해 싸우지만 패배하면 무리에서 쫓겨난다.

name: bouffalant
description: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.
appearance: Bouffalant is a large, brown, bovine creature characterized by a massive, dark brown, afro-like mane that obscures its eyes, and two sharp, golden horns that curve outwards from its head.

descriptions.fr: Leur fourrure duveteuse absorbe les dégâts, même s'ils frappent leurs ennemis avec un féroce coup de tête.
descriptions.de: Ihr flauschiges Fell absorbiert Schaden, selbst wenn sie Feinde mit einem heftigen Kopfstoß angreifen.
descriptions.es: Su pelaje esponjoso absorbe el daño, incluso si golpean a sus enemigos con un fiero cabezazo.
descriptions.it: La loro soffice pelliccia assorbe i danni, anche se colpiscono i nemici con una feroce testata.
descriptions.ja: ふかふかの体毛は、強烈な頭突きを繰り出してもダメージを吸収する。
descriptions.ko: 복슬복슬한 털은 강력한 박치기를 날려도 대미지를 흡수한다.

name: rufflet
description: They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.
appearance: Rufflet is a small, bipedal, white bird with a large, fluffy white head, a light blue crest, a small pointed yellow beak, and blue tail feathers.

descriptions.fr: Il écrase les baies avec ses serres. Il affronte bravement n'importe quel adversaire, quelle que soit sa force.
descriptions.de: Sie zerquetschen Beeren mit ihren Klauen. Sie stellen sich tapfer jedem Gegner, egal wie stark er ist.
descriptions.es: Aplasta las bayas con sus garras. Se enfrenta valientemente a cualquier oponente, por fuerte que sea.
descriptions.it: Schiaccia le bacche con i suoi artigli. Affronta con coraggio qualsiasi avversario, non importa quanto sia forte.
descriptions.ja: 爪で木の実を砕く。どんなに強い相手にも勇敢に立ち向かう。
descriptions.ko: 발톱으로 나무열매를 으깬다. 아무리 강한 상대라도 용감하게 맞선다.

name: braviary
description: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.
