appearance: Braviary is a large, bipedal, red bird with a prominent white head, a vibrant red and blue feathered crest, a hooked yellow beak, and white tail feathers tipped with red.

descriptions.fr: Ils se battent pour leurs amis sans penser au danger pour eux-mêmes. Un seul peut porter une voiture en volant.
descriptions.de: Sie kämpfen für ihre Freunde, ohne an die Gefahr für sich selbst zu denken. Einer kann ein Auto fliegend tragen.
descriptions.es: Luchan por sus amigos sin pensar en el peligro para sí mismos. Uno solo puede llevar un coche mientras vuela.
descriptions.it: Combattono per i loro amici senza pensare al pericolo per se stessi. Uno solo può trasportare un'auto mentre vola.
descriptions.ja: 仲間のためなら、自分の危険も顧みず戦う。空を飛びながら車一台を持ち上げられる。
descriptions.ko: 동료를 위해서는 자기 몸의 위험도 아랑곳 않고 싸운다. 하늘을 날면서 자동차 한 대를 들 수 있다.

name: vullaby
description: Their wings are too tiny to allow them to fly. They guard their posteriors with bones that were gathered by Mandibuzz.
appearance: Vullaby is a small, black, bipedal bird resembling a vulture chick, characterized by a prominent diaper-like white skull covering its lower body and a tuft of grey-white fluff on its head.

descriptions.fr: Leurs ailes sont trop petites pour leur permettre de voler. Elles protègent leur arrière avec des os collectés par Vaututrice.
descriptions.de: Ihre Flügel sind zu winzig, um ihnen das Fliegen zu ermöglichen. Sie schützen ihr Hinterteil mit Knochen, die von Mandibuzz gesammelt wurden.
descriptions.es: Sus alas son demasiado pequeñas para permitirles volar. Protegen sus posaderas con huesos recolectados por Mandibuzz.
descriptions.it: Le loro ali sono troppo piccole per permettere loro di volare. Proteggono il loro posteriore con ossa raccolte da Mandibuzz.
descriptions.ja: 翼が小さすぎて飛ぶことができない。バルジーナが集めた骨で自分のお尻を守っている。
descriptions.ko: 날개가 너무 작아 날 수 없다. 버랜지나가 모은 뼈로 엉덩이를 지킨다.

name: mandibuzz
description: It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.
appearance: Mandibuzz is a large, black, bipedal vulture-like bird with a bone-like white facial mask, a prominent white skull covering its lower body adorned with red and pink feathers, and grey wings.

descriptions.fr: Il construit son nid avec les os qu'il trouve. Il s'empare des proies affaiblies avec ses serres et les transporte jusqu'à son nid d'os.
descriptions.de: Es baut ein Nest aus gefundenen Knochen. Geschwächte Beute packt es mit seinen Krallen und schleppt sie zu seinem Knochennest.
descriptions.es: Construye su nido con los huesos que encuentra. Atrapa presas debilitadas con sus garras y las arrastra hasta su nido de huesos.
descriptions.it: Costruisce un nido con le ossa che trova. Afferra le prede indebolite con i suoi artigli e le trascina al suo nido di ossa.
descriptions.ja: 見つけた骨で巣を作る。弱った獲物を爪で捕まえ、骨の巣まで運ぶ。
descriptions.ko: 찾은 뼈로 둥지를 만든다. 약해진 먹이를 발톱으로 붙잡아 뼈 둥지로 끌고 간다.

name: heatmor
description: It breathes through a hole in its tail while it burns with an internal fire. Durant is its prey.
appearance: Red-orange anteater-like creature with a grey-brown belly, metallic snout, and yellow flame-like markings on its forearms, chest, and tail tip.

descriptions.fr: Il respire par un trou dans sa queue tandis qu'il brûle d'un feu interne. Fermite est sa proie.
descriptions.de: Es atmet durch ein Loch in seinem Schwanz, während es mit einem inneren Feuer brennt. Fermicula ist seine Beute.
descriptions.es: Respira por un agujero en su cola mientras arde con un fuego interno. Durant es su presa.
descriptions.it: Respira attraverso un foro nella coda mentre brucia con un fuoco interno. Durant è la sua preda.
descriptions.ja: 尻尾の穴から呼吸しながら体内で火を燃やす。アイアントが好物。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리 구멍으로 숨을 쉬면서 체내에서 불을 태운다. 아이앤트가 먹잇감이다.

name: durant
description: They attack in groups, covering themselves in steel armor to protect themselves from Heatmor.
appearance: Grey metallic ant-like creature with a segmented black abdomen, large red pincers on its head, black segmented legs, and yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ils attaquent en groupes, se couvrant d'une armure d'acier pour se protéger d'Aflamanoir.
descriptions.de: Sie greifen in Gruppen an und hüllen sich in Stahlrüstung, um sich vor Furnifraß zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Atacan en grupos, cubriéndose con una armadura de acero para protegerse de Heatmor.
descriptions.it: Attaccano in gruppo, coprendosi con un'armatura d'acciaio per proteggersi da Heatmor.
descriptions.ja: 群れで襲いかかり、鋼の鎧で体を覆い、クイタランから身を守る。
descriptions.ko: 무리를 지어 공격하며, 강철 갑옷으로 몸을 감싸 앤티골로부터 몸을 보호한다.

name: deino
description: It tends to bite everything, and it is not a picky eater. Approaching it carelessly is dangerous.
appearance: Small, dark blue reptilian creature covered in shaggy fur, with a black bowl-cut mane completely covering its eyes, and a short tail ending in a tuft of black fur.

descriptions.fr: Il a tendance à mordre tout ce qui bouge et n'est pas difficile sur la nourriture. L'approcher imprudemment est dangereux.
descriptions.de: Es neigt dazu, alles zu beißen und ist kein wählerischer Esser. Sich ihm unvorsichtig zu nähern, ist gefährlich.
descriptions.es: Tiende a morderlo todo y no es un comedor exigente. Acercarse a él sin cuidado es peligroso.
descriptions.it: Tende a mordere ogni cosa e non è schizzinoso con il cibo. Avvicinarlo con noncuranza è pericoloso.
descriptions.ja: 何でも噛みつく傾向があり、食事に好き嫌いがない。不用意に近づくのは危険だ。
descriptions.ko: 뭐든지 물어뜯는 경향이 있으며, 음식을 가리지 않는다. 조심성 없이 다가가는 것은 위험하다.

name: zweilous
description: After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.
appearance: Dark blue, two-headed serpentine creature covered in shaggy fur, with each head having a black mane covering its eyes, and two stubby purple-black wings on its back.

descriptions.fr: Après avoir mangé toute la nourriture de son territoire, il se déplace vers une autre zone. Ses deux têtes ne s'entendent pas.
descriptions.de: Nachdem es alle Nahrung in seinem Territorium aufgefressen hat, zieht es in ein anderes Gebiet. Seine zwei Köpfe vertragen sich nicht.
descriptions.es: Después de haber comido toda la comida de su territorio, se traslada a otra zona. Sus dos cabezas no se llevan bien.
descriptions.it: Dopo aver mangiato tutto il cibo nel suo territorio, si sposta in un'altra zona. Le sue due teste non vanno d'accordo.
descriptions.ja: 自分の縄張りの食べ物をすべて食べ尽くすと、別の場所へ移動する。２つの頭は仲が悪い。
descriptions.ko: 자신의 영역에 있는 먹이를 전부 먹어 치우면 다른 지역으로 이동한다. 두 개의 머리는 사이가 좋지 않다.

name: hydreigon
description: This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.
appearance: Dark blue draconic creature with a large central head and two smaller arm-heads, all three featuring fuchsia frills and black manes covering their eyes, and six purple-black wings.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon brutal parcourt les cieux sur ses six ailes. Tout ce qui bouge lui semble être un ennemi, déclenchant son attaque.
descriptions.de: Dieses brutale Pokémon fliegt mit seinen sechs Flügeln durch die Lüfte. Alles, was sich bewegt, scheint ihm ein Feind zu sein und löst seinen Angriff aus.
descriptions.es: Este brutal Pokémon viaja por los cielos con sus seis alas. Cualquier cosa que se mueva le parece un enemigo, lo que desencadena su ataque.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon brutale viaggia nei cieli con le sue sei ali. Tutto ciò che si muove gli sembra un nemico, scatenando il suo attacco.
descriptions.ja: ６つの翼で空を飛び回る凶暴なポケモン。動くものすべてを敵とみなし、襲いかかる。
descriptions.ko: 6개의 날개로 하늘을 날아다니는 흉포한 포켓몬. 움직이는 것은 무엇이든 적이라고 생각하여 공격한다.

name: larvesta
description: This Pokémon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.
appearance: Small white segmented larva with five red-orange horns tipped with black on its head, and four pairs of small black legs along its body.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon aurait été né du soleil. Quand il évolue, son corps entier est englouti par les flammes.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon soll aus der Sonne geboren worden sein. Wenn es sich entwickelt, wird sein ganzer Körper von Flammen verschlungen.
descriptions.es: Se creía que este Pokémon había nacido del sol. Cuando evoluciona, todo su cuerpo se envuelve en llamas.
descriptions.it: Si credeva che questo Pokémon fosse nato dal sole. Quando si evolve, il suo intero corpo viene avvolto dalle fiamme.
descriptions.ja: 太陽から生まれたと信じられていたポケモン。進化するとき、全身が炎に包まれる。
descriptions.ko: 태양으로부터 태어났다고 믿어졌던 포켓몬. 진화할 때 전신이 불꽃에 휩싸인다.

name: volcarona
description: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona’s fire provided a replacement for the sun.
appearance: Large white moth-like creature with six fiery orange-red wings featuring black spots, a blue body with a black segmented pattern, and red antennae with black tips.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque les cendres volcaniques obscurcissaient l'atmosphère, on dit que le feu de Pyrax remplaçait le soleil.
descriptions.de: Als Vulkanasche die Atmosphäre verdunkelte, soll das Feuer von Ramoth die Sonne ersetzt haben.
descriptions.es: Se dice que cuando las cenizas volcánicas oscurecieron la atmósfera, el fuego de Volcarona proporcionó un reemplazo para el sol.
descriptions.it: Si dice che quando la cenere vulcanica oscurò l'atmosfera, il fuoco di Volcarona fornì un sostituto per il sole.
descriptions.ja: 火山灰が大気を覆い隠したとき、ウルガモスの炎が太陽の代わりを務めたと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 화산재가 대기를 어둡게 뒤덮었을 때, 불카모스의 불꽃이 태양을 대신했다고 전해진다.

name: cobalion
description: This legendary Pokémon battled against humans to protect Pokémon. Its personality is calm and composed.
appearance: Steel-blue deer-like creature with a yellow mohawk, white chest fur, brown lower legs, and a single pointed golden horn on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon légendaire a combattu les humains pour protéger les Pokémon. Sa personnalité est calme et posée.
descriptions.de: Dieses legendäre Pokémon kämpfte gegen Menschen, um Pokémon zu schützen. Seine Persönlichkeit ist ruhig und gefasst.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon legendario luchó contra los humanos para proteger a los Pokémon. Su personalidad es tranquila y serena.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon leggendario ha combattuto contro gli umani per proteggere i Pokémon. La sua personalità è calma e composta.
descriptions.ja: この伝説のポケモンは、ポケモンを守るため人間と戦った。その性格は冷静沈着だ。
descriptions.ko: 이 전설의 포켓몬은 포켓몬을 지키기 위해 인간과 싸웠다. 성격은 침착하고 차분하다.

name: terrakion
description: This Pokémon came to the defense of Pokémon that had lost their homes in a war among humans.
appearance: Large brown bull-like creature with grey rock-like plates on its back and shoulders, a white mane, and two long, curved grey horns.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est venu à la défense des Pokémon qui avaient perdu leurs foyers lors d'une guerre entre humains.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon kam Pokémon zu Hilfe, die in einem Krieg zwischen Menschen ihr Zuhause verloren hatten.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon salió en defensa de los Pokémon que habían perdido sus hogares en una guerra entre humanos.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon andò in difesa di altri Pokémon che avevano perso la casa in una guerra tra umani.
descriptions.ja: 人間同士の戦いで住む場所を失ったポケモンたちを、身を挺して守ったといわれる。
descriptions.ko: 인간들 간의 전쟁에서 보금자리를 잃은 포켓몬들을 지키기 위해 나섰다.

name: virizion
description: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.
appearance: Green deer-like creature with long pink pointed horns, a white mane on its chest, and distinct pink flower-like markings on its shoulders and legs.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon a combattu les humains pour protéger ses amis. Les légendes à son sujet continuent d'être transmises.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon kämpfte gegen Menschen, um seine Freunde zu schützen. Legenden über es werden weiterhin überliefert.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon luchó contra los humanos para proteger a sus amigos. Las leyendas sobre él siguen pasándose de generación en generación.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon ha combattuto contro gli umani per proteggere i suoi amici. Le leggende su di esso continuano a essere tramandate.
descriptions.ja: 仲間を守るため人間と戦ったといわれる。今もなお、その伝説は語り継がれている。
descriptions.ko: 친구들을 지키기 위해 인간과 싸웠다. 그것에 관한 전설이 계속해서 전해지고 있다.

name: tornadus-incarnate
description: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.
appearance: Green muscular genie-like humanoid with a long purple cloud-like lower body, white curly hair, and two red horn-like protrusions on its head.

descriptions.fr: La moitié inférieure de son corps est enveloppée d'un nuage d'énergie. Il traverse le ciel à 320 km/h.
descriptions.de: Die untere Hälfte seines Körpers ist in eine Energiwolke gehüllt. Es rast mit 320 km/h durch den Himmel.
descriptions.es: La mitad inferior de su cuerpo está envuelta en una nube de energía. Recorre el cielo a 320 km/h.
descriptions.it: La metà inferiore del suo corpo è avvolta in una nuvola di energia. Sfreccia nel cielo a 320 km/h.
descriptions.ja: 下半身はエネルギーの雲に包まれている。時速３２０キロで空を駆け巡る。
descriptions.ko: 몸의 하반신은 에너지 구름에 싸여 있다. 시속 320km로 하늘을 누빈다.

display_names.ja: トルネロス けしんフォルム

name: thundurus-incarnate
description: Countless charred remains mar the landscape of places through which Thundurus has passed.
appearance: Blue muscular genie-like humanoid with a long purple cloud-like lower body, spiky white hair, and two prominent yellow horn-like protrusions on its head.

descriptions.fr: D'innombrables vestiges calcinés défigurent le paysage des lieux où Thundurus est passé.
descriptions.de: Unzählige verkohlte Überreste verunstalten die Landschaften, die Thundurus durchquert hat.
descriptions.es: Incontables restos carbonizados desfiguran el paisaje de los lugares por donde ha pasado Thundurus.
descriptions.it: Innumerevoli resti carbonizzati deturpano il paesaggio dei luoghi attraversati da Thundurus.
descriptions.ja: ボルトロスが通り過ぎた場所には、数えきれないほどの焦げ跡が残される。
descriptions.ko: 볼트로스가 지나간 장소에는 수많은 그을린 흔적이 남아 경관을 훼손한다.

display_names.ja: ボルトロス けしんフォルム

name: reshiram
description: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.
appearance: White bipedal dragon with long, feathery wings and tail, a fluffy white neck ruff, and a grey ring with red markings on its tail.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon apparaît dans les légendes. Il envoie des flammes dans les airs depuis sa queue, consumant tout autour de lui.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon erscheint in Legenden. Es schickt Flammen aus seinem Schweif in die Luft und verbrennt alles um sich herum.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon aparece en las leyendas. Envía llamas al aire desde su cola, quemando todo a su alrededor.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon appare nelle leggende. Emette fiamme dalla coda verso l'alto, bruciando tutto ciò che lo circonda.
descriptions.ja: 伝説に登場するポケモン。尻尾から炎を吹き上げて周囲を焼き尽くす。
descriptions.ko: 전설에 등장하는 포켓몬. 꼬리에서 불꽃을 뿜어내 주변을 불태운다.

name: zekrom
description: Concealing itself in lightning clouds, it flies throughout the Unova region. It creates electricity in its tail.
appearance: Black bipedal dragon with large grey armored wings, a grey generator-like tail, and glowing blue eyes with matching electrical accents on its body.

descriptions.fr: Se cachant dans les nuages d'orage, il vole à travers la région d'Unys. Il génère de l'électricité dans sa queue.
descriptions.de: Es verbirgt sich in Blitzwolken und fliegt durch die Einall-Region. Es erzeugt Elektrizität in seinem Schweif.
descriptions.es: Ocultándose en nubes de relámpagos, vuela por toda la región de Teselia. Genera electricidad en su cola.
descriptions.it: Celato in nubi di fulmini, vola per la regione di Unima. Genera elettricità nella sua coda.
descriptions.ja: 雷雲に身を隠し、イッシュ地方を飛び回る。尻尾で電気を作り出す。
descriptions.ko: 뇌운에 몸을 감추고 하나지방을 날아다닌다. 꼬리로 전기를 만들어낸다.

name: landorus-incarnate
description: Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as “The Guardian of the Fields.”
appearance: Orange muscular genie-like humanoid with a long brown cloud-like lower body, a white beard, and two large brown, ridged horns on its head.

descriptions.fr: Les terres visitées par Landorus donnent des récoltes si abondantes qu'il a été salué comme « Le Gardien des Champs ».
descriptions.de: Von Demeteros besuchte Länder bringen so reiche Ernten, dass es als „Der Wächter der Felder“ gefeiert wird.
descriptions.es: Las tierras visitadas por Landorus otorgan cosechas tan abundantes que ha sido aclamado como "El Guardián de los Campos".
descriptions.it: Le terre visitate da Landorus danno raccolti così abbondanti da essere stato acclamato come "Il Guardiano dei Campi".
descriptions.ja: ランドロスが訪れた土地は、豊かな作物が実るため「畑の守り神」と称えられている。
descriptions.ko: 랜드로스가 방문한 땅은 풍년이 들어 「밭의 수호신」이라고 칭송받는다.

display_names.ja: ランドロス けしんフォルム

name: kyurem
description: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.
appearance: Large grey bipedal dragon with asymmetrical, jagged ice-like wings, a fractured head crest, and a prominent yellow core on its chest.

descriptions.fr: Il génère une énergie puissante et gelée en lui-même, mais son corps s'est figé lorsque cette énergie s'est échappée.
descriptions.de: Es erzeugt eine mächtige, eisige Energie in seinem Inneren, aber sein Körper erstarrte, als diese Energie austrat.
descriptions.es: Genera una energía poderosa y congelante en su interior, pero su cuerpo se congeló cuando la energía se filtró.
descriptions.it: Genera una potente energia congelante al suo interno, ma il suo corpo si è congelato quando l'energia è fuoriuscita.
descriptions.ja: 強力な氷結エネルギーを体内で生成するが、エネルギーが漏れ出した際、その身も凍ってしまった。
descriptions.ko: 강력한 빙결 에너지를 체내에서 생성하지만 에너지가 새어 나왔을 때 그 몸도 얼어붙었다.

name: keldeo-ordinary
description: By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It excels at using leg moves while battling.
appearance: Small white equine creature with a long blue mane, a small red horn on its forehead, and orange-red tufts of hair on its lower legs.

descriptions.fr: En projetant de l'eau depuis ses sabots, il peut glisser sur l'eau. Il excelle dans l'utilisation de mouvements de jambe au combat.
descriptions.de: Indem es Wasser aus seinen Hufen schießt, kann es über Wasser gleiten. Es beherrscht Bein-Attacken im Kampf meisterhaft.
descriptions.es: Al expulsar agua de sus pezuñas, puede deslizarse sobre el agua. Sobresale en el uso de movimientos de patada durante la batalla.
descriptions.it: Sparando acqua dai suoi zoccoli, può scivolare sull'acqua. Eccelle nell'usare mosse che coinvolgono le zampe in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 蹄から水を噴射し水面を滑る。バトルでは脚を使った技が得意だ。
descriptions.ko: 발굽에서 물을 분사하여 수면을 미끄러지듯이 이동한다. 배틀에서는 다리를 사용한 기술이 특기다.

display_names.ja: ケルディオ いつものすがた

name: meloetta-aria
description: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.
appearance: Slender white humanoid with long green hair, a black musical note headpiece, and a white dress adorned with black musical note patterns.

descriptions.fr: Ses mélodies sont chantées avec une méthode de vocalisation spéciale qui peut contrôler les sentiments de ceux qui l'entendent.
descriptions.de: Seine Melodien werden mit einer speziellen Vokalisierungsmethode gesungen, die die Gefühle der Zuhörer kontrollieren kann.
descriptions.es: Sus melodías se cantan con un método de vocalización especial que puede controlar los sentimientos de quienes las escuchan.
descriptions.it: Le sue melodie sono cantate con un metodo di vocalizzazione speciale che può controllare i sentimenti di chi le ascolta.
descriptions.ja: 特殊な発声法で歌うメロディは、聞く者の感情をコントロールする。
descriptions.ko: 특수한 발성법으로 부르는 멜로디는 듣는 자의 감정을 조종한다.

display_names.ja: メロエッタ ボイスフォルム

name: genesect
description: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.
appearance: Purple insectoid creature with a metallic grey cannon on its back, glowing red eyes, and a sharp grey head crest.

descriptions.fr: Il y a plus de 300 millions d'années, il était craint comme le plus puissant des chasseurs. Il a été modifié par la Team Plasma.
descriptions.de: Vor über 300 Millionen Jahren wurde es als der stärkste Jäger gefürchtet. Es wurde von Team Plasma modifiziert.
descriptions.es: Hace más de 300 millones de años, era temido como el cazador más fuerte. Ha sido modificado por el Team Plasma.
descriptions.it: Oltre 300 milioni di anni fa, era temuto come il più forte dei cacciatori. È stato modificato dal Team Plasma.
descriptions.ja: 3億年以上前、最強のハンターとして恐れられていた。プラズマ団によって改造された。
descriptions.ko: 3억 년 이상 전에는 최강의 사냥꾼으로 두려움의 대상이었다. 플라스마단에 의해 개조되었다.

name: chespin
description: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.
appearance: Small bipedal light brown rodent-like creature with a spiky green shell covering its head and back, and a light yellow face.

descriptions.fr: Ses piquants sur la tête sont généralement doux. Quand il les contracte, leurs pointes deviennent si dures et acérées qu'elles peuvent transpercer la roche.
descriptions.de: Die Stacheln auf seinem Kopf sind normalerweise weich. Wenn es sie anspannt, werden die Spitzen so hart und scharf, dass sie Felsen durchdringen können.
descriptions.es: Las púas de su cabeza son normalmente suaves. Al tensarlas, las puntas se vuelven tan duras y afiladas que pueden perforar rocas.
descriptions.it: Gli aculei sulla sua testa sono solitamente morbidi. Quando li flette, le punte diventano così dure e affilate da poter perforare la roccia.
descriptions.ja: 頭のトゲは普段は柔らかい。力を込めると岩をも貫くほど鋭く硬くなる。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 가시는 평소에는 부드럽다. 힘을 주면 바위도 꿰뚫을 만큼 날카롭고 단단해진다.

name: quilladin
description: It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect predators’ attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills.
appearance: Bipedal brown armadillo-like creature with a large, spiky green shell covering its entire back and head, and two dark green stripes on its belly.

descriptions.fr: Il se fie à sa carapace robuste pour dévier les attaques de ses prédateurs. Il contre-attaque avec ses piquants acérés.
descriptions.de: Es verlässt sich auf seinen robusten Panzer, um Angriffe von Raubtieren abzuwehren. Mit seinen scharfen Stacheln schlägt es zurück.
descriptions.es: Confía en su resistente caparazón para desviar los ataques de los depredadores. Contraataca con sus afiladas púas.
descriptions.it: Si affida alla sua robusta corazza per deviare gli attacchi dei predatori. Controattacca con i suoi aculei affilati.
descriptions.ja: 頑丈な殻で敵の攻撃を弾く。鋭いトゲで反撃する。
descriptions.ko: 튼튼한 껍질로 적의 공격을 튕겨낸다. 날카로운 가시로 반격한다.

name: chesnaught
description: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.
appearance: Large bipedal armored brown armadillo-like creature with a green spiked shell, green forearms resembling gauntlets, and a prominent green beard.

descriptions.fr: Son Charge est assez puissant pour retourner un char de 50 tonnes. Il protège ses alliés du danger avec son propre corps.
descriptions.de: Sein Tackle ist stark genug, um einen 50 Tonnen schweren Panzer umzuwerfen. Es schützt seine Verbündeten mit seinem eigenen Körper vor Gefahren.
descriptions.es: Su Placaje es lo suficientemente potente como para volcar un tanque de 50 toneladas. Protege a sus aliados del peligro con su propio cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Il suo Azione è abbastanza potente da ribaltare un carro armato da 50 tonnellate. Protegge i suoi alleati dal pericolo con il proprio corpo.
descriptions.ja: 50トンの戦車をもひっくり返すほどのタックル。身を挺して仲間を危険から守る。
descriptions.ko: 50톤짜리 탱크도 뒤집을 정도의 태클을 가한다. 자신의 몸으로 동료들을 위험으로부터 지켜낸다.

name: fennekin
description: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.
appearance: Small orange fox with large ears featuring vibrant red-orange tufts, a white muzzle, and slender legs.

descriptions.fr: Manger une brindille le remplit d'énergie. Ses grandes oreilles libèrent de l'air à plus de 200 degrés Celsius.
descriptions.de: Das Fressen eines Zweiges füllt es mit Energie, und seine geräumigen Ohren lassen Luft entweichen, die heißer als 200 Grad Celsius ist.
descriptions.es: Comer una ramita lo llena de energía, y sus espaciosas orejas liberan aire a más de 200 grados Celsius.
descriptions.it: Mangiare un ramoscello lo riempie di energia, e le sue ampie orecchie sfogano aria più calda di 200 gradi Celsius.
descriptions.ja: 小枝を食べると元気が湧き、広い耳からは200℃を超える熱風が吹き出す。
descriptions.ko: 작은 나뭇가지를 먹으면 기운이 솟아나고 넓은 귀에서는 200℃가 넘는 뜨거운 바람을 내뿜는다.

name: braixen
description: It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and launches into battle.
appearance: Bipedal orange fox-like creature with a black skirt-like fur on its lower body, white ear tufts, and a brown stick tucked into its bushy orange tail.

descriptions.fr: Il a une brindille coincée dans sa queue. Grâce à la friction de sa fourrure caudale, il enflamme la brindille et se lance au combat.
descriptions.de: Es hat einen Zweig in seinem Schwanz stecken. Durch Reibung seiner Schwanzbehaarung setzt es den Zweig in Brand und stürzt sich in den Kampf.
descriptions.es: Tiene una ramita atascada en su cola. Con la fricción de su pelaje, prende fuego a la ramita y se lanza a la batalla.
descriptions.it: Ha un ramoscello incastrato nella coda. Con la frizione della sua pelliccia caudale, incendia il ramoscello e si lancia in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 尻尾に挟んだ小枝を尻尾の毛との摩擦で燃やし、戦闘に突入する。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리에 끼워둔 나뭇가지를 꼬리털과의 마찰로 불붙여 전투에 돌입한다.

name: delphox
description: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.
appearance: Bipedal dark orange fox-like creature with long white hair flowing from its ears, a dark red wizard-like robe covering its body, and a magical stick clutched within its fur.

descriptions.fr: Il contemple la flamme au bout de sa branche pour atteindre un état de concentration qui lui permet de voir l'avenir.
descriptions.de: Es blickt in die Flamme an der Spitze seines Astes, um einen konzentrierten Zustand zu erreichen, der es ihm ermöglicht, in die Zukunft zu sehen.
descriptions.es: Contempla la llama en la punta de su rama para alcanzar un estado de concentración que le permite ver el futuro.
descriptions.it: Fissa la fiamma sulla punta del suo ramo per raggiungere uno stato di concentrazione che gli permette di vedere il futuro.
descriptions.ja: 枝の炎を見つめて集中状態に入り、未来を予知する。
descriptions.ko: 가지 끝의 불꽃을 응시하여 집중 상태에 들어가면 미래를 예지할 수 있다.

name: froakie
description: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.
appearance: Small light blue frog with a prominent white bubble-like ruff around its neck and back, and large yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il sécrète des bulles flexibles de sa poitrine et de son dos. Ces bulles réduisent les dégâts qu'il subirait autrement lors d'une attaque.
descriptions.de: Es sondert flexible Blasen aus Brust und Rücken ab. Die Blasen reduzieren den Schaden, den es bei Angriffen erleiden würde.
descriptions.es: Secreta burbujas flexibles de su pecho y espalda. Las burbujas reducen el daño que sufriría al ser atacado.
descriptions.it: Secerne bolle flessibili dal petto e dalla schiena. Le bolle riducono i danni che subirebbe altrimenti quando viene attaccato.
descriptions.ja: 胸と背中から粘着性のある泡を分泌する。その泡で攻撃されたときのダメージを減らす。
descriptions.ko: 가슴과 등에서 유연한 거품을 분비한다. 이 거품은 공격받았을 때 받는 피해를 줄여준다.

name: frogadier
description: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.
appearance: Slender dark blue frog with a light blue belly, dark blue bubbles on its knees, and a white bubble-like ruff around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Il peut lancer des galets recouverts de bulles avec une précision remarquable, atteignant des canettes vides jusqu'à trente mètres de distance.
descriptions.de: Es kann mit präziser Kontrolle mit Blasen bedeckte Kieselsteine werfen und leere Dosen bis zu dreißig Meter weit treffen.
descriptions.es: Puede lanzar guijarros cubiertos de burbujas con un control preciso, alcanzando latas vacías hasta a treinta metros de distancia.
descriptions.it: Può lanciare sassolini ricoperti di bolle con controllo preciso, colpendo lattine vuote fino a trenta metri di distanza.
descriptions.ja: 泡をまとった小石を正確に投げつけ、100フィート離れた空き缶にも命中させる。
descriptions.ko: 거품을 묻힌 작은 돌을 정확하게 던져 100피트 떨어진 빈 캔에도 명중시킨다.

name: greninja
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.
appearance: Tall dark blue ninja frog with a long pink tongue wrapped like a scarf around its neck, white bubbles on its knees, and large yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il crée des shurikens à partir d'eau comprimée. Quand il les fait tournoyer et les lance à grande vitesse, ces shurikens peuvent fendre le métal en deux.
descriptions.de: Es erzeugt Wurfsterne aus komprimiertem Wasser. Wenn es sie wirbelt und mit hoher Geschwindigkeit wirft, können diese Sterne Metall spalten.
descriptions.es: Crea estrellas ninja de agua comprimida. Cuando las hace girar y las lanza a gran velocidad, estas estrellas pueden partir el metal por la mitad.
descriptions.it: Crea stelle ninja da acqua compressa. Quando le fa girare e le lancia ad alta velocità, queste stelle possono tagliare il metallo in due.
descriptions.ja: 圧縮した水で手裏剣を作り出す。高速で回転させて投げつけると金属をも真っ二つにする。
descriptions.ko: 압축한 물로 수리검을 만든다. 고속으로 회전시켜 던지면 금속조차도 두 동강 낸다.

name: bunnelby
description: They use their large ears to dig burrows. They will dig the whole night through.
appearance: Small grey rabbit with large brown-tipped ears resembling digging tools, a white belly, and a small pink nose.

descriptions.fr: Ils utilisent leurs grandes oreilles pour creuser des terriers. Ils creusent toute la nuit.
descriptions.de: Es gräbt mithilfe seiner großen Ohren Baue und ist die ganze Nacht hindurch damit beschäftigt.
descriptions.es: Excava madrigueras con sus grandes orejas. Pasa toda la noche excavando.
descriptions.it: Con le sue grandi orecchie scava tane nel terreno e continua a scavare per tutta la notte.
descriptions.ja: 大きな耳を使って 地面に穴を掘る。 一晩中 掘り続ける。
descriptions.ko: 큰 귀를 이용해 땅에 굴을 판다. 밤새도록 굴을 파고 또 판다.

name: diggersby
description: With their powerful ears, they can heft boulders of a ton or more with ease. They can be a big help at construction sites.
appearance: Large brown rabbit with powerful brown-tipped ears resembling excavation tools, a white belly, and a patch of grey fur on its chest.

descriptions.fr: Grâce à ses oreilles puissantes, il peut soulever sans effort des rochers d'une tonne ou plus. Il est très utile sur les chantiers.
descriptions.de: Mit seinen kräftigen Ohren kann es Felsbrocken von einer Tonne oder mehr mit Leichtigkeit anheben. Es ist auf Baustellen eine große Hilfe.
descriptions.es: Con sus potentes orejas, puede levantar rocas de una tonelada o más con facilidad. Es de gran ayuda en las obras.
descriptions.it: Con le sue potenti orecchie può sollevare senza sforzo massi di una tonnellata o più. È di grande aiuto nei cantieri.
descriptions.ja: 強力な耳で １トン以上の岩を 軽々と持ち上げる。 工事現場では 大活躍だ。
descriptions.ko: 강력한 귀로 1톤이 넘는 바위를 가볍게 들어 올린다. 공사 현장에서는 큰 도움이 된다.

name: fletchling
description: These friendly Pokémon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements.
appearance: A small, robin-like bird with a gray back, a bright red chest and belly, black tail feathers tipped with white, and an orange beak and feet.

descriptions.fr: Ces Pokémon amicaux s'envoient des signaux avec de magnifiques chants et des mouvements de queue.
descriptions.de: Diese freundlichen Pokémon senden sich gegenseitig Signale mit wunderschönen Zwitschern und Schwanzfederschlägen.
descriptions.es: Estos amigables Pokémon se envían señales unos a otros con preciosos gorjeos y movimientos de cola.
descriptions.it: Questi amichevoli Pokémon si scambiano segnali con meravigliosi cinguettii e movimenti delle piume della coda.
descriptions.ja: 仲間同士 美しい鳴き声と しっぽの動きで 合図を送りあう 人懐こいポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 동료끼리 아름다운 울음소리와 꼬리털의 움직임으로 신호를 주고받는 다정한 포켓몬.

name: fletchinder
description: From its beak, it expels embers that set the tall grass on fire. Then it pounces on the bewildered prey that pop out of the grass.
appearance: A medium-sized bird with an orange-red head, chest, and undersides, a black back, wings, and tail, yellow beak and talons, and orange markings around its eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il crache des braises de son bec qui mettent le feu aux herbes hautes. Il fond ensuite sur les proies affolées qui en sortent.
descriptions.de: Es speit Glut aus seinem Schnabel, die hohes Gras in Brand setzt. Dann stürzt es sich auf die verwirrte Beute, die aus dem Gras springt.
descriptions.es: De su pico expulsa ascuas que prenden fuego a la hierba alta. Luego, se abalanza sobre la presa aturdida que emerge de la hierba.
descriptions.it: Dal becco espelle braci che incendiano l'erba alta. Poi si avventa sulla preda confusa che salta fuori dall'erba.
descriptions.ja: くちばしから 燃えカスを吐き 丈の高い草に 火を放つ。 慌てて飛び出す獲物に 襲いかかる。
descriptions.ko: 부리에서 타다 남은 불씨를 뱉어내 키 큰 풀에 불을 지른다. 당황하여 튀어나오는 먹이를 덮친다.

name: talonflame
description: In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air.
appearance: A large, hawk-like bird with a fiery red head, back, and undersides, dark black wings and tail tipped with orange-yellow flames, and a yellow beak and talons.

descriptions.fr: Dans l'ardeur d'un combat excitant, il fait pleuvoir des braises entre ses plumes et s'envole.
descriptions.de: Im Eifer eines aufregenden Kampfes lässt es Glut aus den Lücken zwischen seinen Federn regnen und erhebt sich in die Luft.
descriptions.es: En el fervor de una emocionante batalla, lanza ascuas desde los huecos de sus plumas y alza el vuelo.
descriptions.it: Nel fervore di una battaglia eccitante, sparge braci dalle fessure tra le sue piume e si lancia in aria.
descriptions.ja: 激しい戦いに 興奮すると 羽毛の隙間から 燃えカスを散らして 空中へ飛び立つ。
descriptions.ko: 격렬한 싸움에 흥분하면 깃털 사이에서 타다 남은 불씨를 흩뿌리며 공중으로 날아오른다.

name: scatterbug
description: When under attack from bird Pokémon, it spews a poisonous black powder that causes paralysis on contact.
appearance: A small, caterpillar-like insect with a round, segmented black body almost entirely covered in thick white fur, large green eyes, and two small white protrusions on its head.

descriptions.fr: Attaqué par des Pokémon oiseaux, il crache une poudre noire empoisonnée qui provoque la paralysie au contact.
descriptions.de: Wird es von Vogel-Pokémon angegriffen, speit es ein giftiges schwarzes Pulver, das bei Kontakt Lähmung verursacht.
descriptions.es: Cuando es atacado por Pokémon pájaro, escupe un polvo negro venenoso que causa parálisis al contacto.
descriptions.it: Quando è attaccato da Pokémon uccello, sputa una polvere nera velenosa che causa paralisi al contatto.
descriptions.ja: 鳥ポケモンに 襲われると 触ると麻痺する 毒の黒い粉を 吐き出して 身を守る。
descriptions.ko: 새포켓몬에게 습격당하면 닿으면 마비되는 독의 검은 가루를 내뿜어 몸을 지킨다.

name: spewpa
description: It lives hidden within thicket shadows. When predators attack, it quickly bristles the fur covering its body in an effort to threaten them.
appearance: An oval, pupa-like Pokemon with a gray-black body covered in white fur, prominent yellow eyes, and two short, yellow antennae.

descriptions.fr: Il vit caché dans l'ombre des fourrés. Quand des prédateurs l'attaquent, il hérisse rapidement la fourrure qui recouvre son corps pour les menacer.
descriptions.de: Es lebt versteckt im Schatten dichter Büsche. Wenn Raubtiere angreifen, sträubt es schnell das Fell, das seinen Körper bedeckt, um sie zu bedrohen.
descriptions.es: Vive escondido entre las sombras de la maleza. Cuando los depredadores atacan, eriza rápidamente el pelaje que cubre su cuerpo para amenazarlos.
descriptions.it: Vive nascosto nell'ombra dei cespugli. Quando i predatori attaccano, rizza rapidamente la pelliccia che copre il suo corpo nel tentativo di minacciarli.
descriptions.ja: やぶの影に 隠れ住む。 敵に襲われると 体中の毛を 素早く逆立てて 威嚇する。
descriptions.ko: 덤불 그림자에 숨어 산다. 적에게 습격당하면 온몸의 털을 빠르게 곤두세워 위협한다.

name: vivillon
description: Vivillon with many different patterns are found all over the world. These patterns are affected by the climate of their habitat.
appearance: A butterfly Pokemon with a slender black body and head, two short black antennae, and large, rounded wings patterned with a green and yellow base, bordered by black with scattered white spots.

descriptions.fr: On trouve des Prismillon avec de nombreux motifs différents partout dans le monde. Ces motifs sont influencés par le climat de leur habitat.
descriptions.de: Vivillon mit vielen verschiedenen Mustern sind auf der ganzen Welt zu finden. Diese Muster werden vom Klima ihres Lebensraums beeinflusst.
descriptions.es: Vivillon con muchos patrones diferentes se encuentran en todo el mundo. Estos patrones se ven afectados por el clima de su hábitat.
descriptions.it: Vivillon con molti motivi diversi si trovano in tutto il mondo. Questi motivi sono influenzati dal clima del loro habitat.
descriptions.ja: 世界中に たくさんの模様の ビビヨンが生息している。生息地の気候で 模様が変わる。
descriptions.ko: 전 세계에 수많은 무늬의 비비용이 서식하고 있다. 서식지의 기후에 따라 무늬가 바뀐다.

name: litleo
description: The stronger the opponent it faces, the more heat surges from its mane and the more power flows through its body.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal lion cub with a light brown body, a large tuft of red-orange fur on its head, black paws and tail tip, and large, dark eyes.

descriptions.fr: Plus l'adversaire qu'il affronte est fort, plus la chaleur émane de sa crinière et plus la puissance circule dans son corps.
descriptions.de: Je stärker der Gegner, dem es gegenübersteht, desto mehr Hitze strömt aus seiner Mähne und desto mehr Kraft fließt durch seinen Körper.
descriptions.es: Cuanto más fuerte es el oponente al que se enfrenta, más calor emana de su melena y más poder fluye por su cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Più è forte l'avversario che affronta, più calore fuoriesce dalla sua criniera e più energia scorre nel suo corpo.
descriptions.ja: 強い相手ほど たてがみから あふれる熱量と 体にみなぎるパワーが 増していく。
descriptions.ko: 강한 상대일수록 갈기에서 뿜어져 나오는 열량과 몸에 넘쳐흐르는 파워가 증가한다.

name: pyroar
description: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal lion with a mostly brown body; males feature a fiery red-orange mane covering their head and extending down their back, while females have a long, flowing yellow mane.

descriptions.fr: Le mâle avec la plus grande crinière de feu est le chef de la troupe.
descriptions.de: Das Männchen mit der größten Flammenmähne ist der Anführer des Rudels.
descriptions.es: El macho con la melena de fuego más grande es el líder de la manada.
descriptions.it: Il maschio con la criniera di fuoco più grande è il capobranco.
descriptions.ja: 炎のたてがみが 一番大きいオスが 群れのリーダーなのだ。
descriptions.ko: 불꽃 갈기가 가장 큰 수컷이 무리의 리더가 된다.

name: pyroar-male
description: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal lion-like Pokemon with a predominantly brown body, a large, fiery red-orange mane with yellow highlights that extends down its back, and a powerful build with four sturdy legs.

descriptions.fr: Le mâle avec la crinière de feu la plus imposante est le chef de la horde.
descriptions.de: Das Männchen mit der größten Flammenmähne ist der Anführer des Rudels.
descriptions.es: El macho con la melena de fuego más grande es el líder de la manada.
descriptions.it: Il maschio con la criniera di fuoco più grande è il capo del branco.
descriptions.ja: 最も大きな炎のたてがみを持つオスが、群れのリーダーとなる。
descriptions.ko: 가장 큰 불꽃 갈기를 가진 수컷이 무리의 리더가 된다.

name: flabebe
description: It draws out and controls the hidden power of flowers. The flower Flabébé holds is most likely part of its body.
appearance: A tiny, white, humanoid-shaped fairy with a green stem-like appendage on its head, typically found holding a single large flower whose color varies.

descriptions.fr: Il tire et contrôle le pouvoir caché des fleurs. La fleur que tient Flabébé fait probablement partie de son corps.
descriptions.de: Es entzieht Blumen ihre verborgene Kraft und kontrolliert diese. Die Blume, die Flabébé hält, ist höchstwahrscheinlich ein Teil seines Körpers.
descriptions.es: Extrae y controla el poder oculto de las flores. La flor que sostiene Flabébé es, muy probablemente, parte de su cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Estrae e controlla il potere nascosto dei fiori. Il fiore che Flabébé tiene è molto probabilmente parte del suo corpo.
descriptions.ja: 花の隠れた力を引き出し、それを操る。フラベベが持っている花は、おそらく体の一部である。
descriptions.ko: 꽃의 숨겨진 힘을 끌어내어 조종한다. 플라베베가 지닌 꽃은 아마도 몸의 일부일 것이다.

name: floette
description: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.
appearance: A small, white, humanoid-shaped fairy with a green stem-like appendage on its head, floating and holding a large, five-petaled flower whose color matches its stem.

descriptions.fr: Il volette autour des champs de fleurs et prend soin des fleurs qui commencent à faner. Il tire le pouvoir caché des fleurs pour le combat.
descriptions.de: Es flattert über Blumenfelder und pflegt verwelkende Blumen. Es nutzt die verborgene Kraft der Blumen im Kampf.
descriptions.es: Revolotea por los campos de flores y cuida de las que empiezan a marchitarse. Extrae el poder oculto de las flores para luchar.
descriptions.it: Vola intorno ai campi di fiori e si prende cura dei fiori che stanno per appassire. Estrae il potere nascosto dei fiori per lottare.
descriptions.ja: 花畑をひらひらと舞い、しおれ始めた花を世話する。花の隠れた力を引き出して戦う。
descriptions.ko: 꽃밭을 팔랑이며 날아다니고 시들기 시작한 꽃들을 돌본다. 꽃의 숨겨진 힘을 끌어내어 싸운다.

name: florges
description: It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants.
appearance: A graceful, white, humanoid-shaped fairy with a green, stem-like growth forming its hair, and a large, flowing, five-petaled floral 'dress' whose color varies.

descriptions.fr: Il revendique de magnifiques jardins de fleurs comme territoire et tire sa puissance en s'imprégnant de l'énergie émise par les plantes à fleurs.
descriptions.de: Es beansprucht exquisite Blumengärten als sein Territorium und bezieht seine Kraft aus der Energie, die von blühenden Pflanzen ausgestrahlt wird.
descriptions.es: Reclama exquisitos jardines de flores como su territorio y obtiene poder al bañarse en la energía que emiten las plantas con flores.
descriptions.it: Rivendica giardini fioriti squisiti come suo territorio e ottiene potere assorbendo l'energia emessa dalle piante fiorite.
descriptions.ja: 華麗な花園を縄張りとし、開花した植物が放つエネルギーを浴びて力を得る。
descriptions.ko: 화려한 화원을 자신의 영역으로 삼고 꽃피운 식물이 내뿜는 에너지를 쬐어 힘을 얻는다.

name: skiddo
description: Thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal goat with a light green body, a brown muzzle and belly, small brown horns, and a short, leafy tail.

descriptions.fr: On pense qu'il est l'un des premiers Pokémon à avoir vécu en harmonie avec les humains, et il a un tempérament placide.
descriptions.de: Es gilt als eines der ersten Pokémon, das in Harmonie mit Menschen lebte, und hat ein sanftmütiges Wesen.
descriptions.es: Se cree que fue uno de los primeros Pokémon en vivir en armonía con los humanos, y tiene un carácter apacible.
descriptions.it: Ritenuto uno dei primi Pokémon a vivere in armonia con gli umani, ha un carattere placido.
descriptions.ja: 人間と共生した最初のポケモンの一種と考えられており、穏やかな性格をしている。
descriptions.ko: 인간과 공생한 최초의 포켓몬 중 하나로 생각되며 온화한 성격을 가지고 있다.

name: gogoat
description: It can tell how its Trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathic sense lets them run as if one being.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal goat with a mostly dark green body, large brown curving horns adorned with green leaves, and a white muzzle and beard-like tuft of fur.

descriptions.fr: Il peut ressentir les émotions de son Dresseur par de subtiles variations de la prise sur ses cornes. Ce sens empathique leur permet de courir comme une seule entité.
descriptions.de: Es kann die Gefühle seines Trainers an subtilen Veränderungen im Griff seiner Hörner erkennen. Dieser empathische Sinn lässt sie wie ein Wesen laufen.
descriptions.es: Puede saber cómo se siente su Entrenador por los sutiles cambios en el agarre de sus cuernos. Este sentido empático les permite correr como si fueran uno solo.
descriptions.it: Riesce a percepire i sentimenti del suo Allenatore dai sottili cambiamenti nella presa sulle sue corna. Questo senso empatico permette loro di correre come un tutt'uno.
descriptions.ja: トレーナーが角を握る手の微かな変化から、その気持ちを読み取ることができる。この共感能力により、一心同体となって走る。
descriptions.ko: 트레이너가 뿔을 쥐는 손의 미묘한 변화로부터 기분을 알아챌 수 있다. 이 공감 능력으로 일심동체가 되어 달린다.

name: pancham
description: It does its best to be taken seriously by its enemies, but its glare is not sufficiently intimidating. Chewing on a leaf is its trademark.
appearance: A small, bipedal panda cub with a white head and face, black ears, eye patches, and body, and a green leaf perpetually held in its mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il fait de son mieux pour être pris au sérieux par ses ennemis, mais son regard n'est pas suffisamment intimidant. Mâcher une feuille est sa marque de fabrique.
descriptions.de: Es versucht sein Bestes, von seinen Feinden ernst genommen zu werden, aber sein Blick ist nicht einschüchternd genug. Das Kauen eines Blattes ist sein Markenzeichen.
descriptions.es: Se esfuerza por ser tomado en serio por sus enemigos, pero su mirada no es lo suficientemente intimidante. Masticar una hoja es su distintivo.
descriptions.it: Fa del suo meglio per essere preso sul serio dai suoi nemici, ma il suo sguardo non è abbastanza intimidatorio. Masticare una foglia è il suo tratto distintivo.
descriptions.ja: 敵にナメられないよう一生懸命威嚇するが、眼光はあまり鋭くない。葉っぱをくわえているのがトレードマーク。
descriptions.ko: 적에게 얕보이지 않도록 열심히 위협하지만 눈빛은 그다지 날카롭지 않다. 나뭇잎을 물고 있는 것이 트레이드마크.

name: pangoro
description: Although it possesses a violent temperament, it won’t put up with bullying. It uses the leaf in its mouth to sense the movements of its enemies.
appearance: A large, bipedal panda with a predominantly black body and limbs, a white face and belly, a dark red, tattered scarf-like patch of fur around its neck, and a green leaf held in its mouth.

descriptions.fr: Bien qu'il possède un tempérament violent, il ne tolère pas l'intimidation. Il utilise la feuille dans sa bouche pour sentir les mouvements de ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Obwohl es ein gewalttätiges Temperament besitzt, duldet es kein Mobbing. Es nutzt das Blatt in seinem Mund, um die Bewegungen seiner Feinde zu erspüren.
descriptions.es: Aunque posee un temperamento violento, no tolera el acoso. Utiliza la hoja en su boca para detectar los movimientos de sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Sebbene abbia un temperamento violento, non tollera i soprusi. Usa la foglia in bocca per percepire i movimenti dei suoi nemici.
descriptions.ja: 乱暴な気質を持つが、弱い者いじめは許さない。口に咥えた葉っぱで敵の動きを察知する。
descriptions.ko: 난폭한 기질을 가지고 있지만 약한 자를 괴롭히는 일은 용서하지 않는다. 입에 문 나뭇잎으로 적의 움직임을 감지한다.

name: furfrou
description: Trimming its fluffy fur not only makes it more elegant but also increases the swiftness of its movements.
appearance: A white, poodle-like dog with a fluffy, curly coat of fur, dark blue eyes, and black paw pads, capable of being styled into various decorative trims.

descriptions.fr: Tailler sa fourrure duveteuse ne le rend pas seulement plus élégant, mais augmente aussi la rapidité de ses mouvements.
descriptions.de: Das Trimmen seines flauschigen Fells macht es nicht nur eleganter, sondern erhöht auch die Schnelligkeit seiner Bewegungen.
descriptions.es: Recortar su pelaje esponjoso no solo lo hace más elegante, sino que también aumenta la rapidez de sus movimientos.
descriptions.it: Tagliare il suo soffice pelo non solo lo rende più elegante, ma aumenta anche la rapidità dei suoi movimenti.
descriptions.ja: ふわふわの毛をトリミングすると、見た目がエレガントになるだけでなく、動きが素早くなる。
descriptions.ko: 복슬복슬한 털을 손질하면 더욱 우아해질 뿐만 아니라 움직임의 민첩성도 올라간다.

name: espurr
description: The organ that emits its intense psychic power is sheltered by its ears to keep power from leaking out.
appearance: A small, bipedal cat with light gray fur, large dark purple eyes that appear to glow, pink paw pads, and a small pink nose.

descriptions.fr: L'organe qui émet son intense pouvoir psychique est protégé par ses oreilles pour empêcher le pouvoir de s'échapper.
descriptions.de: Das Organ, das seine intensive Psycho-Kraft aussendet, wird von seinen Ohren geschützt, um zu verhindern, dass Kraft entweicht.
descriptions.es: El órgano que emite su intenso poder psíquico está resguardado por sus orejas para evitar que el poder se escape.
descriptions.it: L'organo che emette il suo intenso potere psichico è protetto dalle sue orecchie per evitare che il potere fuoriesca.
descriptions.ja: けたたましいエスパーパワーを発する器官は、力が漏れ出さないように耳で覆われている。
descriptions.ko: 엄청난 에스퍼 파워를 방출하는 기관은 힘이 새어나가지 않도록 귀로 덮여 있다.

name: meowstic-male
description: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust.
appearance: A bipedal cat with a sleek dark blue body, white fur on its face and chest, large white-rimmed blue ears with a darker blue interior, and a blue tuft of fur resembling a collar.

descriptions.fr: En cas de danger, il dresse ses oreilles et libère une puissance psychique suffisante pour réduire un camion de 10 tonnes en poussière.
descriptions.de: In Gefahr stellt es seine Ohren auf und entfesselt genügend Psycho-Kraft, um einen 10 Tonnen schweren Lkw zu Staub zu zermalmen.
descriptions.es: Cuando está en peligro, eriza sus orejas y libera una fuerza psíquica tan poderosa que podría reducir a polvo un camión de 10 toneladas.
descriptions.it: Quando è in pericolo, drizza le orecchie e sprigiona una potenza psichica sufficiente a ridurre in polvere un camion da 10 tonnellate.
descriptions.ja: 危険が迫ると　耳を立てる。　１０トンを　超える　トラックを　粉砕するほどの　サイコパワーを　放つ。
descriptions.ko: 위험이 닥치면 귀를 세운다. 10톤이 넘는 트럭을 부술 정도의 에스퍼파워를 뿜어낸다.

name: honedge
description: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.
appearance: A floating, ancient-looking sword with a blue blade, a brown hilt, a single purple eye set within its gold-colored hand guard, and a long blue cloth emanating from its pommel.

descriptions.fr: Il semblerait que ce Pokémon naisse lorsqu'un esprit défunt habite une épée. Il s'attache aux gens et boit leur énergie vitale.
descriptions.de: Angeblich entsteht dieses Pokémon, wenn der Geist eines Verstorbenen ein Schwert bewohnt. Es heftet sich an Menschen und saugt deren Lebenskraft.
descriptions.es: Al parecer, este Pokémon nace cuando un espíritu errante habita una espada. Se adhiere a la gente y bebe su fuerza vital.
descriptions.it: Sembra che questo Pokémon nasca quando uno spirito defunto si impossessa di una spada. Si attacca alle persone e ne assorbe la forza vitale.
descriptions.ja: 死んだ人間の　魂が　古い剣に　宿って　ポケモンに　なったと　言われている。　人間に　取りつき　生気を　吸い取る。
descriptions.ko: 죽은 사람의 혼이 오래된 검에 깃들어 포켓몬이 되었다고 전해진다. 사람에게 들러붙어 생기를 빨아들인다.

name: doublade
description: When Honedge evolves, it divides into two swords, which cooperate via telepathy to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons.
appearance: Two floating, blue-bladed swords, each with a brown hilt and a single purple eye in its gold hand guard, joined together by a single long, blue cloth.

descriptions.fr: En évoluant, Monorpale se divise en deux épées qui coopèrent par télépathie pour coordonner leurs attaques et tailler leurs ennemis en pièces.
descriptions.de: Nach seiner Entwicklung teilt sich Gramokles in zwei Schwerter, die telepathisch zusammenarbeiten, um Angriffe zu koordinieren und Feinde in Streifen zu schneiden.
descriptions.es: Al evolucionar, Honedge se divide en dos espadas que cooperan telepáticamente para coordinar sus ataques y hacer pedazos a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Quando Honedge si evolve, si divide in due spade che cooperano tramite telepatia per coordinare gli attacchi e ridurre i nemici a brandelli.
descriptions.ja: 進化すると　２本の剣に　分かれる。　テレパシーで　連携し　敵を　切り刻む　コンビネーションアタックが　得意。
descriptions.ko: 진화하면 2개의 검으로 나뉜다. 텔레파시로 연계하여 적을 베는 콤비네이션 공격에 능숙하다.

name: aegislash-shield
description: Generations of kings were attended by these Pokémon, which used their spectral power to manipulate and control people and Pokémon.
appearance: A floating blue-bladed sword with a brown hilt and a purple eye set in its gold hand guard, paired with a round gold shield adorned with a purple central marking and trim.

descriptions.fr: Des générations de rois furent servies par ces Pokémon, qui utilisèrent leur pouvoir spectral pour manipuler et contrôler les gens et les Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Generationen von Königen wurden von diesem Pokémon begleitet, das seine Spektralkraft nutzte, um Menschen und Pokémon zu manipulieren und zu kontrollieren.
descriptions.es: Generaciones de reyes tuvieron a estos Pokémon a su servicio, quienes usaron su poder espectral para manipular y controlar a personas y Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Intere generazioni di re ebbero questi Pokémon al loro servizio, i quali usavano il loro potere spettrale per manipolare e controllare persone e Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 代々の王に　仕えた　ポケモン。　その　ゴーストパワーで　人や　ポケモンを　操り　思いのままに　したという。
descriptions.ko: 대대로 왕을 섬기던 포켓몬. 그 고스트파워로 사람과 포켓몬을 조종하여 마음대로 부렸다고 한다.

display_names.ja: ギルガルド (シールドフォルム)

name: spritzee
description: It emits a scent that enraptures those who smell it. This fragrance changes depending on what it has eaten.
appearance: A small, bird-like fairy with a round, fluffy pink body, a small yellow beak, and thin purple legs.

descriptions.fr: Il émet un parfum qui envoûte ceux qui le sentent. Cette fragrance change en fonction de ce qu'il a mangé.
descriptions.de: Es verströmt einen Duft, der jeden verzaubert, der ihn riecht. Dieses Aroma ändert sich je nachdem, was es gefressen hat.
descriptions.es: Emite un aroma que embriaga a quienes lo huelen. Esta fragancia cambia dependiendo de lo que haya comido.
descriptions.it: Emana un profumo che incanta chiunque lo annusi. Questa fragranza cambia a seconda di ciò che ha mangiato.
descriptions.ja: 嗅いだ者を　うっとりさせる　香りを　放つ。　食べたものによって　香りが　変わる。
descriptions.ko: 맡은 이를 몽롱하게 만드는 향기를 뿜어낸다. 먹은 것에 따라 향기가 달라진다.

name: aromatisse
description: It devises various scents, pleasant and unpleasant, and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle.
appearance: A plump, pink avian Pokémon resembling a flapper, with a ruffled white skirt, a white mask-like face, and a pink plume on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il élabore des senteurs variées, agréables et désagréables, et émet celles que ses ennemis n'apprécient pas pour prendre l'avantage en combat.
descriptions.de: Es entwickelt verschiedene Düfte, angenehme und unangenehme, und verströmt jene, die seine Gegner nicht mögen, um im Kampf einen Vorteil zu erlangen.
descriptions.es: Idea varios aromas, agradables y desagradables, y emite los que sus enemigos detestan para obtener ventaja en combate.
descriptions.it: Crea vari profumi, gradevoli e sgradevoli, ed emette quelli che i suoi nemici non sopportano per ottenere un vantaggio in lotta.
descriptions.ja: いろいろな　香りを　調合する。　敵の　嫌がる　香りを　振りまき　バトルを　有利に　進めるのだ。
descriptions.ko: 다양한 향기를 조합한다. 적이 싫어하는 향기를 풍겨서 배틀을 유리하게 이끈다.

name: swirlix
description: To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and sticky as cotton candy.
appearance: A small, white, spherical Pokemon resembling a puff of cotton candy, with two small yellow eyes and a pink tongue constantly peeking out.

descriptions.fr: Pour piéger ses adversaires au combat, il extrude des fils blancs aussi doux et collants que de la barbe à papa.
descriptions.de: Um Gegner im Kampf zu verstricken, sondert es weiße Fäden ab, die so süß und klebrig wie Zuckerwatte sind.
descriptions.es: Para enredar a sus oponentes en combate, extrude hilos blancos tan dulces y pegajosos como el algodón de azúcar.
descriptions.it: Per intrappolare gli avversari in lotta, produce fili bianchi dolci e appiccicosi come lo zucchero filato.
descriptions.ja: バトルで　相手を　絡め取るために　綿あめのように　甘くて　ベトベトする　白い糸を　吐き出す。
descriptions.ko: 배틀에서 상대를 얽어매기 위해 솜사탕처럼 달콤하고 끈적이는 흰 실을 뿜어낸다.

name: slurpuff
description: It can distinguish the faintest of scents. It puts its sensitive sense of smell to use by helping pastry chefs in their work.
appearance: A round, white bipedal Pokemon resembling a fluffy cake, with a pink frosting-like swirl on its head, pink ear-like appendages, a small pink nose, and a long pink tongue.

descriptions.fr: Il peut distinguer les senteurs les plus subtiles. Il met son odorat sensible à profit en aidant les pâtissiers dans leur travail.
descriptions.de: Es kann die feinsten Düfte unterscheiden. Seinen empfindlichen Geruchssinn setzt es ein, indem es Konditoren bei ihrer Arbeit hilft.
descriptions.es: Puede distinguir los aromas más sutiles. Pone su sensible sentido del olfato a buen uso, ayudando a los pasteleros en su trabajo.
descriptions.it: È in grado di distinguere anche l'odore più flebile. Usa il suo raffinato olfatto per aiutare i pasticceri nel loro lavoro.
descriptions.ja: どんなに　かすかな　匂いも　嗅ぎ分けられる。　敏感な　嗅覚を　活かして　パティシエの　仕事の　手伝いもする。
descriptions.ko: 아무리 희미한 냄새도 구별해낸다. 민감한 후각을 살려 제과사의 일을 돕기도 한다.

name: inkay
description: Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.
appearance: A small, inverted-looking squid with a round, dark blue head featuring two yellow eyes and a blue fin, and a pink underbelly with several small, dark blue tentacles.

descriptions.fr: Les adversaires qui fixent les flashs des points lumineux sur son corps sont hébétés et perdent toute envie de se battre.
descriptions.de: Gegner, die auf das Blinken der Leuchtpunkte an seinem Körper starren, werden benommen und verlieren ihren Kampfwillen.
descriptions.es: Los oponentes que miran fijamente el destello de los puntos luminosos de su cuerpo quedan aturdidos y pierden su voluntad de luchar.
descriptions.it: Gli avversari che fissano i lampi dei punti luminosi sul suo corpo rimangono intontiti e perdono la voglia di lottare.
descriptions.ja: 発光器官が　放つ　まばゆい　光を　見つめた　相手は　戦う気が　失せて　無気力に　なってしまう。
descriptions.ko: 발광기관이 뿜어내는 눈부신 빛을 쳐다본 상대는 싸울 의욕을 잃고 무기력해진다.

name: malamar
description: It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it forces others to do whatever it wants.
appearance: A large, inverted squid-like Pokemon with a mostly dark purple body, a black underbelly, two large yellow eyes, and a crown-like head made of dark purple fin-like protrusions.

descriptions.fr: Il possède les pouvoirs hypnotiques les plus puissants de tous les Pokémon et il force les autres à faire tout ce qu'il veut.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt die fesselndsten hypnotischen Kräfte aller Pokémon und zwingt andere, alles zu tun, was es will.
descriptions.es: Posee los poderes hipnóticos más convincentes de cualquier Pokémon, y obliga a otros a hacer lo que le plazca.
descriptions.it: Possiede i poteri ipnotici più efficaci di qualsiasi altro Pokémon e costringe gli altri a fare tutto ciò che vuole.
descriptions.ja: ポケモンの　中でも　最も　強力な　催眠術を　操り　相手を　意のままに　操ってしまう。
descriptions.ko: 포켓몬 중에서도 가장 강력한 최면술을 부리며 상대를 마음대로 조종한다.

name: binacle
description: Two Binacle live together on one rock. When they fight, one of them will move to a different rock.
appearance: A Pokemon composed of two separate brown rock-like bodies, each with a white hand-like appendage and a single yellow eye, connected by a central black 'arm' attached to a larger brown rock.

descriptions.fr: Deux Binacle vivent ensemble sur un rocher. Quand ils se battent, l'un d'eux déménage sur un autre rocher.
descriptions.de: Zwei Binacle leben gemeinsam auf einem Felsen. Wenn sie sich streiten, zieht einer von ihnen auf einen anderen Felsen um.
descriptions.es: Dos Binacle viven juntos en una roca. Cuando pelean, uno de ellos se muda a otra roca.
descriptions.it: Due Binacle vivono insieme sulla stessa roccia. Quando litigano, uno dei due si sposta su un'altra roccia.
descriptions.ja: ２匹が１つの岩に暮らす。ケンカすると片方が別の岩に引っ越す。
descriptions.ko: 두 마리가 한 바위에 산다. 싸우면 한 마리가 다른 바위로 이사한다.

name: barbaracle
description: When they evolve, two Binacle multiply into seven. They fight with the power of seven Binacle.
appearance: A large, multi-limbed Pokemon resembling a cluster of barnacles, with a black body supporting several brown rock-like appendages, each ending in a distinct head with an orange-red hand-like protrusion and a single yellow eye.

descriptions.fr: En évoluant, deux Binacle se multiplient en sept. Ils combattent avec la puissance de sept Binacle.
descriptions.de: Wenn sie sich entwickeln, vervielfachen sich zwei Binacle zu sieben. Sie kämpfen mit der Kraft von sieben Binacle.
descriptions.es: Al evolucionar, dos Binacle se multiplican en siete. Luchan con el poder de siete Binacle.
descriptions.it: Quando si evolvono, due Binacle si moltiplicano in sette. Combattono con la forza di sette Binacle.
descriptions.ja: 進化すると２匹のビナクルが７匹に増える。７匹のパワーで戦う。
descriptions.ko: 진화하면 두 마리의 빈나클이 일곱 마리로 늘어난다. 일곱 마리의 파워로 싸운다.

name: skrelp
description: Camouflaged as rotten kelp, they spray liquid poison on prey that approaches unawares and then finish it off.
appearance: A small, seahorse-like dragon with a predominantly brown body resembling decaying seaweed, a small orange eye, and delicate purple fin-like growths on its head and back.

descriptions.fr: Camouflés en algues pourries, ils aspergent de poison liquide les proies qui s'approchent sans méfiance, puis les achèvent.
descriptions.de: Als verrotteter Seetang getarnt, besprühen sie ahnungslose Beute mit flüssigem Gift und erledigen sie dann.
descriptions.es: Camuflados como algas podridas, rocían veneno líquido sobre la presa que se acerca desprevenida y luego la rematan.
descriptions.it: Camuffati da alghe marce, spruzzano veleno liquido sulle prede che si avvicinano ignare, per poi finirle.
descriptions.ja: 腐った海藻に擬態し、気づかず近づいてきた獲物に毒液を吹きかけとどめを刺す。
descriptions.ko: 썩은 해조류로 위장하여, 눈치채지 못하고 다가온 먹이에게 독액을 뿜어 마무리한다.

name: dragalge
description: Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker, and they spit it indiscriminately at anything that enters their territory.
appearance: A seahorse-like dragon with a purplish-brown body covered in reddish-brown seaweed-like frills and prominent yellow eyes, featuring a long, tapering tail and a distinct crest on its head.

descriptions.fr: Leur poison est assez puissant pour percer la coque d'un pétrolier, et ils le crachent sans discernement sur tout ce qui pénètre leur territoire.
descriptions.de: Ihr Gift ist stark genug, um den Rumpf eines Tankers zu zerfressen, und sie spucken es wahllos auf alles, was ihr Territorium betritt.
descriptions.es: Su veneno es lo suficientemente potente como para corroer el casco de un petrolero, y lo escupen indiscriminadamente a todo lo que entra en su territorio.
descriptions.it: Il loro veleno è così potente da sciogliere lo scafo di una petroliera e lo sputano indiscriminatamente su chiunque entri nel loro territorio.
descriptions.ja: タンカーの船底を溶かすほどの猛毒を持ち、縄張りに侵入した物には無差別に毒を吐き出す。
descriptions.ko: 유조선의 선체를 녹일 정도의 맹독을 지녔으며, 영역에 침입한 것에게는 무차별적으로 독을 뱉는다.

name: clauncher
description: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.
appearance: A small blue aquatic crustacean with an oversized, bright red right claw, a smaller blue left claw, and a light blue underside.

descriptions.fr: Ils abattent les proies volantes en tirant de l'eau compressée depuis leurs pinces massives, comme avec un pistolet.
descriptions.de: Sie schießen fliegende Beute ab, indem sie komprimiertes Wasser aus ihren massiven Scheren abfeuern, wie mit einer Pistole.
descriptions.es: Derriban presas voladoras disparando agua comprimida desde sus enormes pinzas, como si de una pistola se tratara.
descriptions.it: Abbatteranno prede volanti sparando acqua compressa dalle loro enormi chele, come con una pistola.
descriptions.ja: 巨大なハサミから圧縮した水をピストルのように発射して空を飛ぶ獲物を撃ち落とす。
descriptions.ko: 거대한 집게에서 압축한 물을 권총처럼 발사하여 하늘을 나는 먹이를 쏘아 떨어뜨린다.

name: clawitzer
description: Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.
appearance: A larger, more robust blue aquatic crustacean with an even larger, bright blue right claw featuring a yellow tip and circular patterns, a smaller blue left claw, and a light blue underside.

descriptions.fr: Leurs énormes pinces lancent des boulets de canon d'eau assez puissants pour percer les coques des pétroliers.
descriptions.de: Ihre riesigen Scheren feuern Wasserkanonenkugeln ab, die stark genug sind, um Tankerrümpfe zu durchbohren.
descriptions.es: Sus enormes pinzas lanzan balas de cañón de agua lo suficientemente potentes como para perforar los cascos de los petroleros.
descriptions.it: Le loro enormi chele lanciano proiettili d'acqua abbastanza potenti da perforare lo scafo delle petroliere.
descriptions.ja: 巨大なハサミから発射する水の砲弾はタンカーの船底を貫くほどの威力だ。
descriptions.ko: 거대한 집게에서 발사하는 물의 포탄은 유조선의 선체를 꿰뚫을 정도의 위력이다.

name: helioptile
description: They make their home in deserts. They can generate their energy from basking in the sun, so eating food is not a requirement.
appearance: A small, bipedal yellow lizard with a black belly, large frilled ears that resemble solar panels, and a short black tail.

descriptions.fr: Ils élisent domicile dans les déserts. Ils peuvent générer leur énergie en se prélassant au soleil, il n'est donc pas nécessaire de manger.
descriptions.de: Sie leben in Wüsten. Sie können ihre Energie durch Sonnenbaden erzeugen, daher ist die Nahrungsaufnahme keine Notwendigkeit.
descriptions.es: Hacen su hogar en los desiertos. Pueden generar su energía tomando el sol, por lo que no es un requisito comer.
descriptions.it: Vivono nei deserti. Possono generare energia crogiolandosi al sole, quindi non hanno bisogno di mangiare.
descriptions.ja: 砂漠に住む。日光浴でエネルギーを作るので食事はしなくていい。
descriptions.ko: 사막에 산다. 일광욕으로 에너지를 만들기에 식사는 필요 없다.

name: heliolisk
description: They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper.
appearance: A larger, bipedal yellow lizard with a black belly, long black-tipped frills on its neck that resemble solar panels, and a long black-tipped tail.

descriptions.fr: Ils déploient leurs collerettes et génèrent de l'énergie. Un seul Iguolta peut générer suffisamment d'électricité pour alimenter un gratte-ciel.
descriptions.de: Sie spreizen ihre Kragen und erzeugen Energie. Ein einzelnes Heliolisk kann genug Elektrizität erzeugen, um einen Wolkenkratzer zu versorgen.
descriptions.es: Despliegan sus volantes y generan energía. Un solo Heliolisk puede generar suficiente electricidad para alimentar un rascacielos.
descriptions.it: Disp_iegano le loro gorgiere e generano energia. Un singolo Heliolisk può generare elettricità sufficiente per alimentare un grattacielo.
descriptions.ja: フリルを広げて発電する。１匹で超高層ビルを１棟まかなえるほどの電力を生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 프릴을 펼쳐 발전한다. 한 마리로 초고층 빌딩 한 채를 충당할 만큼의 전력을 생산한다.

name: tyrunt
description: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. If something happens that it doesn’t like, it throws a tantrum and runs wild.
appearance: A small, bipedal T-rex-like dinosaur with a reddish-brown body, a white belly, a large head with a crown-like white frill, and short forelegs.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon a été restauré à partir d'un fossile. Si quelque chose ne lui plaît pas, il fait une crise de colère et devient incontrôlable.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon wurde aus einem Fossil wiederhergestellt. Wenn etwas passiert, das ihm nicht gefällt, wirft es einen Wutanfall und läuft Amok.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon fue restaurado a partir de un fósil. Si algo no le gusta, monta un berrinche y se descontrola.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è stato ripristinato da un fossile. Se gli capita qualcosa che non gli piace, fa i capricci e si scatena.
descriptions.ja: 化石から復元されたポケモン。気に入らないことがあるとわがままを言って暴れ出す。
descriptions.ko: 화석에서 복원된 포켓몬. 마음에 들지 않는 일이 생기면 투정을 부리고 날뛰기 시작한다.

name: tyrantrum
description: Thanks to its gargantuan jaws, which could shred thick metal plates as if they were paper, it was invincible in the ancient world it once inhabited.
appearance: A large, bipedal T-rex-like dinosaur with a reddish-brown body, a white belly, a prominent white fluffy neck ruff, and a massive lower jaw.

descriptions.fr: Grâce à ses mâchoires gargantuesques, capables de déchiqueter d'épaisses plaques de métal comme du papier, il était invincible dans le monde antique qu'il habitait autrefois.
descriptions.de: Dank seiner gigantischen Kiefer, die dicke Metallplatten wie Papier zerreißen konnten, war es in der antiken Welt, die es einst bewohnte, unbesiegbar.
descriptions.es: Gracias a sus mandíbulas gargantuescas, que podían triturar gruesas placas de metal como si fueran papel, era invencible en el mundo antiguo que habitó.
descriptions.it: Grazie alle sue fauci gigantesche, capaci di sminuzzare spesse lastre di metallo come fossero carta, era invincibile nel mondo antico che abitava.
descriptions.ja: 厚い鉄板も紙のように食い破る巨大な顎のおかげでかつて住んでいた古代世界では無敵だった。
descriptions.ko: 두꺼운 철판도 종이처럼 찢어버릴 수 있는 거대한 턱 덕분에 한때 살았던 고대 세계에서는 무적이었다.

name: amaura
description: This ancient Pokémon was restored from part of its body that had been frozen in ice for over 100 million years.
appearance: A light blue sauropod dinosaur with a white belly, a diamond-shaped ice crystal on its head, and two iridescent sail-like structures on its neck that shimmer with multiple colors.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon antique a été restauré à partir d'une partie de son corps restée congelée dans la glace pendant plus de 100 millions d'années.
descriptions.de: Dieses alte Pokémon wurde aus einem Körperteil wiederhergestellt, das über 100 Millionen Jahre lang im Eis eingefroren war.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon ancestral fue restaurado a partir de una parte de su cuerpo que permaneció congelada en el hielo durante más de 100 millones de años.
descriptions.it: Questo antico Pokémon è stato ripristinato da una parte del suo corpo rimasta congelata nel ghiaccio per oltre 100 milioni di anni.
descriptions.ja: １億年以上も氷漬けになっていた体の一部から復元された古代のポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 1억 년 이상 얼음에 갇혀 있던 몸의 일부에서 복원된 고대 포켓몬.

name: aurorus
description: The diamond-shaped crystals on its body expel air as cold as -240 degrees Fahrenheit, surrounding its enemies and encasing them in ice.
appearance: A large, light blue sauropod dinosaur with a white belly, a long neck, two large iridescent sail-like structures extending from its head and neck, and diamond-shaped ice crystals on its sides.

descriptions.fr: Les cristaux en forme de losange sur son corps expulsent de l'air aussi froid que -151 °C, enveloppant ses ennemis et les figeant dans la glace.
descriptions.de: Die rautenförmigen Kristalle an seinem Körper stoßen Luft von -151 °C aus, um Gegner einzuhüllen und sie in Eis zu fangen.
descriptions.es: Los cristales con forma de diamante de su cuerpo expulsan aire tan frío como -151 °C, rodeando a sus enemigos y cubriéndolos de hielo.
descriptions.it: I cristalli a forma di diamante sul suo corpo espellono aria fredda fino a -151 °C, avvolgendo i nemici e imprigionandoli nel ghiaccio.
descriptions.ja: 体のひし形結晶から零下１５１℃の冷気を放ち、敵を氷の中に閉じ込める。
descriptions.ko: 몸의 다이아몬드형 결정에서 영하 151도의 냉기를 내뿜어 적을 얼음에 가둔다.

name: sylveon
description: It sends a soothing aura from its ribbonlike feelers to calm fights.
appearance: A quadrupedal cream-colored fox-like creature with long ear flaps, two large bows with two trailing ribbons each (one light pink, one light blue) on its neck and left ear, and large light blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il envoie une aura apaisante depuis ses rubans sensitifs pour calmer les combats.
descriptions.de: Es sendet eine beruhigende Aura von seinen bandartigen Fühlern aus, um Kämpfe zu besänftigen.
descriptions.es: Envía un aura tranquilizadora desde sus apéndices de cinta para calmar los combates.
descriptions.it: Emette un'aura calmante dai suoi nastri per placare le lotte.
descriptions.ja: リボン状の触覚からなだめるオーラを送り、争いごとを静める。
descriptions.ko: 리본 같은 더듬이에서 진정시키는 오라를 보내 싸움을 잠재운다.

name: hawlucha
description: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama.
appearance: A bipedal bird-like luchador with a primarily white body, a red feathered mask, a green cape-like wing structure on its back, and yellow talons.

descriptions.fr: Bien que son corps soit petit, ses compétences de combat habiles lui permettent de rivaliser avec de grands costauds comme Mackogneur et Hariyama.
descriptions.de: Obwohl sein Körper klein ist, kann es dank seiner Kampfkunst mit großen Muskelprotzen wie Machomei und Hariyama mithalten.
descriptions.es: Aunque su cuerpo es pequeño, sus habilidades de lucha expertas le permiten enfrentarse a grandes brutos como Machamp y Hariyama.
descriptions.it: Sebbene il suo corpo sia piccolo, le sue abili tecniche di lotta gli consentono di tenere testa a grossi picchiatori come Machamp e Hariyama.
descriptions.ja: 小さい体だが、カイリキーやハリテヤマのような巨体ポケモンとも渡り合えるほどの格闘技術を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 몸집은 작지만, 그 뛰어난 격투술로 괴력몬이나 하리뭉 같은 큰 포켓몬과도 대등하게 싸울 수 있다.

name: dedenne
description: Its whiskers serve as antennas. By sending and receiving electrical waves, it can communicate with others over vast distances.
appearance: A small, round orange mouse with a black tail, long black whiskers, and prominent circular yellow cheek pouches.

descriptions.fr: Ses moustaches servent d'antennes. En envoyant et recevant des ondes électriques, il peut communiquer avec d'autres sur de vastes distances.
descriptions.de: Seine Schnurrhaare dienen als Antennen. Durch das Senden und Empfangen elektrischer Wellen kann es über große Entfernungen mit anderen kommunizieren.
descriptions.es: Sus bigotes sirven como antenas. Al enviar y recibir ondas eléctricas, puede comunicarse con otros a grandes distancias.
descriptions.it: I suoi baffi fungono da antenne. Inviando e ricevendo onde elettriche, può comunicare con altri a grandi distanze.
descriptions.ja: ヒゲはアンテナの役割。電波を送ったり受け取ったりして遠くの仲間と交信する。
descriptions.ko: 수염은 안테나 역할. 전파를 주고받아 멀리 있는 동료와 통신한다.

name: carbink
description: Born from the temperatures and pressures deep underground, it fires beams from the stone in its head.
appearance: A small, gray, floating rock-like creature with a diamond embedded in its head, a white fluffy ruff, and small blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Né des températures et pressions intenses des profondeurs souterraines, il tire des rayons de la pierre sur sa tête.
descriptions.de: Aus den Temperaturen und Drücken tief unter der Erde geboren, verschießt es Strahlen aus dem Stein in seinem Kopf.
descriptions.es: Nace de las temperaturas y presiones de las profundidades subterráneas y dispara rayos desde la piedra de su cabeza.
descriptions.it: Nato dalle temperature e pressioni profonde del sottosuolo, spara raggi dalla pietra sulla sua testa.
descriptions.ja: 地底奥深くの熱と圧力で生まれる。頭の宝石からビームを発射する。
descriptions.ko: 땅속 깊숙한 곳의 열과 압력으로 태어난다. 머리의 보석에서 빔을 발사한다.

name: goomy
description: The weakest Dragon-type Pokémon, it lives in damp, shady places, so its body doesn’t dry out.
appearance: A small, purple, slug-like creature with two green eyes, two antennae, and a gooey, gelatinous body.

descriptions.fr: Le Pokémon de type Dragon le plus faible, il vit dans les endroits humides et ombragés afin que son corps ne se dessèche pas.
descriptions.de: Als schwächstes Drachen-Pokémon lebt es an feuchten, schattigen Orten, damit sein Körper nicht austrocknet.
descriptions.es: El Pokémon de tipo Dragón más débil, vive en lugares húmedos y sombríos para que su cuerpo no se seque.
descriptions.it: Il Pokémon di tipo Drago più debole. Vive in luoghi umidi e ombreggiati, in modo che il suo corpo non si secchi.
descriptions.ja: 最弱のドラゴンポケモン。体が乾かないよう湿気の多い日陰に生息する。
descriptions.ko: 가장 약한 드래곤타입 포켓몬. 몸이 마르지 않도록 습하고 그늘진 곳에서 산다.

name: sliggoo
description: It drives away opponents by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes devolved, so it can’t see anything.
appearance: A larger, purple, slug-like creature with a yellow belly, two large green eyes on stalks, and a gooey body covered in slime.

descriptions.fr: Il repousse ses adversaires en sécrétant un liquide collant capable de dissoudre n'importe quoi. Ses yeux ont dégénéré, il ne peut donc rien voir.
descriptions.de: Es vertreibt Gegner, indem es eine klebrige Flüssigkeit absondert, die alles auflösen kann. Seine Augen sind zurückentwickelt, weshalb es nichts sehen kann.
descriptions.es: Ahuyenta a los oponentes excretando un líquido pegajoso que puede disolver cualquier cosa. Sus ojos han involucionado, por lo que no puede ver nada.
descriptions.it: Allontana gli avversari secernendo un liquido appiccicoso che può dissolvere qualsiasi cosa. I suoi occhi si sono atrofizzati, quindi non può vedere nulla.
descriptions.ja: あらゆるものを溶かす粘液を出して敵を追い払う。目は退化して何も見えない。
descriptions.ko: 모든 것을 녹이는 끈적이는 액체를 분비해 적을 쫓아낸다. 눈은 퇴화해서 아무것도 볼 수 없다.

name: goodra
description: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokémon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime.
appearance: A large, bipedal purple dragon with a yellow belly, green eyes, two long purple antennae with green tips, and a gooey, slimy texture.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon de type Dragon très amical étreint son Dresseur adoré, le laissant couvert de bave collante.
descriptions.de: Dieses sehr freundliche Drachen-Pokémon umarmt seinen geliebten Trainer und hinterlässt ihn mit klebrigem Schleim bedeckt.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon de tipo Dragón tan amigable abrazará a su querido Entrenador, dejándolo cubierto de una baba pegajosa.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon di tipo Drago molto amichevole abbraccia il suo amato Allenatore, lasciandolo coperto di melma appiccicosa.
descriptions.ja: とても人懐っこいドラゴンポケモン。大好きなトレーナーに抱きついてヌルヌルの体液だらけにする。
descriptions.ko: 매우 상냥한 드래곤타입 포켓몬. 가장 좋아하는 트레이너에게 안겨 끈적이는 액체투성이로 만든다.

name: klefki
description: These key collectors threaten any attackers by fiercely jingling their keys at them.
appearance: A small, floating silver keychain-like creature with two silver keys attached to its 'head' and two small light blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ces collectionneurs de clés menacent tout attaquant en faisant tinter leurs clés avec fureur.
descriptions.de: Diese Schlüssel-Sammler bedrohen Angreifer, indem sie ihre Schlüssel wild klimpern lassen.
descriptions.es: Estos coleccionistas de llaves amenazan a cualquier atacante haciendo sonar sus llaves con ferocidad.
descriptions.it: Questi collezionisti di chiavi minacciano gli aggressori facendo tintinnare con ferocia le loro chiavi.
descriptions.ja: キーコレクター。じゃらじゃらと鍵を鳴らして襲いかかってくる相手を威嚇する。
descriptions.ko: 열쇠 수집가. 열쇠를 짤랑짤랑 울려 공격해오는 상대를 위협한다.

name: phantump
description: These Pokémon are created when spirits possess rotten tree stumps. They prefer to live in abandoned forests.
appearance: A small, brown, ghost-like tree stump creature with a small white branch on its head, an orange eye, and two small twig-like arms.

descriptions.fr: Ces Pokémon naissent quand des esprits s'emparent de souches d'arbres pourries. Ils préfèrent vivre dans les forêts abandonnées.
descriptions.de: Diese Pokémon entstehen, wenn Geister morsches Baumstumpfholz besetzen. Sie bevorzugen es, in verlassenen Wäldern zu leben.
descriptions.es: Estos Pokémon nacen cuando espíritus poseen tocones de árboles podridos. Prefieren vivir en bosques abandonados.
