descriptions.it: Questi Pokémon nascono quando gli spiriti possiedono vecchi ceppi d'albero marci. Preferiscono vivere nelle foreste abbandonate.
descriptions.ja: 朽ちた木の切り株に魂が宿って生まれる。廃れた森を好み生息している。
descriptions.ko: 썩은 나무 그루터기에 영혼이 깃들어서 태어난다. 버려진 숲에서 사는 것을 좋아한다.

name: trevenant
description: It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave.
appearance: A larger, gnarled brown tree-like ghost with a gnarled branch as a left arm, a smaller twig-like right arm, a single red eye, and several white roots for legs.

descriptions.fr: Il peut contrôler les arbres à volonté. Il piège ceux qui blessent la forêt, de sorte qu'ils ne puissent jamais en partir.
descriptions.de: Es kann Bäume nach Belieben kontrollieren. Es fängt Menschen ein, die dem Wald schaden, sodass sie ihn nie wieder verlassen können.
descriptions.es: Puede controlar los árboles a voluntad. Atrapa a las personas que dañan el bosque para que nunca puedan irse.
descriptions.it: Può controllare gli alberi a piacimento. Intrappola le persone che danneggiano la foresta, impedendo loro di andarsene.
descriptions.ja: 自由に木々を操れる。森を荒らす者を捕まえ、二度と出られないようにする。
descriptions.ko: 자유자재로 나무를 조종한다. 숲을 해치는 자를 붙잡아 다시는 숲을 나갈 수 없게 만든다.

name: pumpkaboo-average
description: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
appearance: A small, round orange pumpkin with a carved black face, green stem, and a small black ghost-like wisp emerging from its top.

descriptions.fr: Son corps de citrouille est habité par un esprit piégé dans ce monde. Au coucher du soleil, il devient agité et actif.
descriptions.de: Sein Kürbiskörper wird von einem in dieser Welt gefangenen Geist bewohnt. Wenn die Sonne untergeht, wird es unruhig und aktiv.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo de calabaza está habitado por un espíritu atrapado en este mundo. Al atardecer, se vuelve inquieto y activo.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo a forma di zucca è abitato da uno spirito intrappolato in questo mondo. Al tramonto, diventa irrequieto e attivo.
descriptions.ja: この世に捕らわれた魂がカボチャに宿った。夕暮れになるとそわそわし出し活発になる。
descriptions.ko: 이 세상에 붙잡힌 영혼이 호박에 깃들었다. 해가 지면 불안해하며 활발해진다.

display_names.ja: バケッチャ (ふつうのサイズ)

name: gourgeist-average
description: Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
appearance: A larger, slender orange pumpkin with a carved black face, a prominent purple wig-like top, and two small white ghost-like tendrils.

descriptions.fr: Chantant d'étranges voix, ils errent dans les rues des villes la nuit de la nouvelle lune. Quiconque entend leur chant est maudit.
descriptions.de: Mit unheimlichen Stimmen singend, streifen sie in Neumondnächten durch die Straßen der Stadt. Wer ihren Gesang hört, wird verflucht.
descriptions.es: Cantando con voces espeluznantes, deambulan por las calles de la ciudad la noche de luna nueva. Cualquiera que escuche su canto es maldecido.
descriptions.it: Cantando con voci inquietanti, vagano per le strade delle città nella notte di luna nuova. Chiunque senta il loro canto è maledetto.
descriptions.ja: 新月の夜に不気味な声で歌いながら町をさまよう。その歌を聞いた者は呪われる。
descriptions.ko: 초승달 밤에 기분 나쁜 목소리로 노래하며 마을을 떠돈다. 그 노래를 들은 자는 저주받는다.

display_names.ja: パンプジン (ふつうのサイズ)

name: bergmite
description: It blocks opponents’ attacks with the ice that shields its body. It uses cold air to repair any cracks with new ice.
appearance: A small, light blue, blocky ice crystal creature with two small ice shards for feet and two small white eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il bloque les attaques adverses avec la glace qui protège son corps. Il utilise l'air froid pour réparer toute fissure avec de la nouvelle glace.
descriptions.de: Es blockt gegnerische Angriffe mit dem Eis, das seinen Körper schützt. Mit kalter Luft repariert es Risse mit neuem Eis.
descriptions.es: Bloquea los ataques de los oponentes con el hielo que protege su cuerpo. Usa aire frío para reparar cualquier grieta con hielo nuevo.
descriptions.it: Blocca gli attacchi avversari con il ghiaccio che protegge il suo corpo. Utilizza l'aria fredda per riparare le crepe con nuovo ghiaccio.
descriptions.ja: 体を覆う氷で相手の攻撃を受け止める。冷気を放ってヒビを直し新しい氷を作る。
descriptions.ko: 몸을 감싼 얼음으로 상대의 공격을 막는다. 냉기를 뿜어 금간 곳을 새 얼음으로 메운다.

name: avalugg
description: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.
appearance: A large, flat, battleship-like ice crystal creature with a flat top, four blocky legs, and two small white eyes.

descriptions.fr: Son corps couvert de glace est dur comme l'acier. Sa masse imposante écrase tout ce qui se dresse sur son chemin.
descriptions.de: Sein eisbedeckter Körper ist hart wie Stahl. Sein schwerfälliger Körperbau zermalmt alles, was ihm im Weg steht.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo cubierto de hielo es tan duro como el acero. Su voluminoso cuerpo aplasta cualquier cosa que se interponga en su camino.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo ricoperto di ghiaccio è duro come l'acciaio. La sua mole ingombrante schiaccia qualsiasi cosa gli si pari davanti.
descriptions.ja: 氷に覆われた体は鋼鉄の硬さ。その巨体で進路を邪魔するものを押しつぶす。
descriptions.ko: 얼음으로 뒤덮인 몸은 강철만큼 단단하다. 거대한 몸으로 앞을 가로막는 것을 부숴버린다.

name: noibat
description: They live in pitch-black caves. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves of 200,000 hertz.
appearance: A small, purple bat with large, green-ringed black ears, a furry white chest, and a small pink snout.

descriptions.fr: Ils vivent dans des grottes d'un noir absolu. Leurs énormes oreilles peuvent émettre des ondes ultrasoniques de 200 000 hertz.
descriptions.de: Sie leben in pechschwarzen Höhlen. Ihre riesigen Ohren können Ultraschallwellen von 200.000 Hertz aussenden.
descriptions.es: Viven en cuevas totalmente oscuras. Sus enormes orejas pueden emitir ondas ultrasónicas de 200.000 hercios.
descriptions.it: Vivono in caverne buie come la pece. Le loro enormi orecchie possono emettere onde ultrasoniche di 200.000 hertz.
descriptions.ja: 真っ暗な洞窟に生息する。巨大な耳から20万ヘルツの超音波を出す。
descriptions.ko: 칠흑같이 어두운 동굴에 서식한다. 거대한 귀로 20만 헤르츠의 초음파를 낸다.

name: noivern
description: They fly around on moonless nights and attack careless prey. Nothing can beat them in a battle in the dark.
appearance: A large, purple bat-like dragon with large, green-ringed black ears, a furry white chest and neck, and red internal membranes on its wings.

descriptions.fr: Ils volent les nuits sans lune et attaquent les proies imprudentes. Rien ne peut les battre dans un combat dans l'obscurité.
descriptions.de: Sie fliegen in mondlosen Nächten herum und greifen unvorsichtige Beute an. Niemand kann sie in einem Kampf im Dunkeln besiegen.
descriptions.es: Vuelan en noches sin luna y atacan a presas descuidadas. Nada puede vencerlos en una batalla en la oscuridad.
descriptions.it: Volano nelle notti senza luna e attaccano le prede imprudenti. Nessuno può batterli in una battaglia al buio.
descriptions.ja: 月のない夜に飛び回り油断した獲物を襲う。暗闇でのバトルでは無敵。
descriptions.ko: 달 없는 밤에 날아다니며 방심한 먹이를 덮친다. 어둠 속 전투에서는 무적이다.

name: xerneas
description: Legends say it can share eternal life. It slept for a thousand years in the form of a tree before its revival.
appearance: A quadrupedal deer-like creature with a dark blue body, a large, black-antlered rack that glows with a rainbow of colors, and black fur on its chest and legs.

descriptions.fr: Les légendes disent qu'il peut partager la vie éternelle. Il a dormi mille ans sous la forme d'un arbre avant sa résurrection.
descriptions.de: Legenden besagen, dass es ewiges Leben teilen kann. Es schlief tausend Jahre lang in Form eines Baumes, bevor es wiedererweckt wurde.
descriptions.es: Las leyendas dicen que puede compartir la vida eterna. Durmió mil años en forma de árbol antes de su renacimiento.
descriptions.it: Le leggende narrano che possa condividere la vita eterna. Ha dormito per mille anni sotto forma di albero prima del suo risveglio.
descriptions.ja: 永遠の命を分け与えるという伝説のポケモン。千年の眠りから木のような姿で復活する。
descriptions.ko: 영원한 생명을 나눠준다고 하는 전설의 포켓몬. 나무와 같은 모습으로 천 년의 잠에서 깨어난다.

name: yveltal
description: When this legendary Pokémon’s wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.
appearance: A large, Y-shaped, dark red and black bird-like creature with sharp talons, a feathered collar, and a long tail plume.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque les ailes et les plumes de sa queue de ce Pokémon légendaire s'étendent et brillent en rouge, il absorbe la force vitale des créatures vivantes.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich die Flügel und Schwanzfedern dieses legendären Pokémon weit ausbreiten und rot leuchten, absorbiert es die Lebensenergie lebender Kreaturen.
descriptions.es: Cuando las alas y las plumas de la cola de este Pokémon legendario se extienden y brillan en rojo, absorbe la fuerza vital de las criaturas vivientes.
descriptions.it: Quando le ali e le piume della coda di questo Pokémon leggendario si aprono e brillano di rosso, esso assorbe la forza vitale degli esseri viventi.
descriptions.ja: この伝説のポケモンの翼と尾羽が大きく広がり赤く輝くと、生き物の生命力を吸い取る。
descriptions.ko: 이 전설의 포켓몬은 날개와 꼬리 깃털이 넓게 펼쳐져 붉게 빛나면 생물의 생명 에너지를 흡수한다.

name: zygarde-50
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: A large, snake-like creature composed of green, black, and white hexagonal cells, featuring a wing-like structure on its back and a flat, reptilian head.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque l'écosystème de la région de Kalos est menacé, il apparaît et révèle son pouvoir secret.
descriptions.de: Wenn das Ökosystem der Kalos-Region aus dem Gleichgewicht gerät, erscheint es und offenbart seine geheime Kraft.
descriptions.es: Cuando el ecosistema de la región de Kalos cae en el caos, aparece y revela su poder secreto.
descriptions.it: Quando l'ecosistema della regione di Kalos è in pericolo, appare e rivela il suo potere segreto.
descriptions.ja: カロス地方の生態系が乱れると現れ、秘めたる力を解放する。
descriptions.ko: 칼로스지방의 생태계가 교란되면 모습을 나타내 숨겨진 힘을 해방한다.

name: diancie
description: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.
appearance: A small, white, humanoid-like creature with a pink dress-like body, a crystalline crown on its head, and two small pink diamonds on its side 'ears'.

descriptions.fr: Mutation soudaine de Strassie, son corps rose et étincelant est considéré comme le plus beau spectacle du monde.
descriptions.de: Eine plötzliche Metamorphose von Rocara. Sein rosafarbener, schimmernder Körper gilt als der schönste Anblick der Welt.
descriptions.es: Una transformación repentina de Carbink. Su cuerpo rosa y reluciente es considerado la visión más hermosa del mundo entero.
descriptions.it: Una trasformazione improvvisa di Carbink. Il suo corpo rosa e scintillante è considerato la vista più incantevole del mondo intero.
descriptions.ja: メレシーが突然変異した姿。ピンク色に輝く体は、世界で一番美しいといわれる。
descriptions.ko: 멜리시가 돌연변이한 모습. 분홍빛으로 빛나는 몸은 세계에서 가장 아름답다고 전해진다.

name: hoopa
description: This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space.
appearance: A small, mischievous-looking purple genie-like creature with a white and black striped belly, golden rings on its arms and head, and two prominent horns.

descriptions.fr: Ce fauteur de troubles envoie tout et n'importe quoi dans des endroits lointains grâce à son anneau qui peut déformer l'espace.
descriptions.de: Dieser Unruhestifter befördert mit seinen raumverzerrenden Ringen alles Mögliche an weit entfernte Orte.
descriptions.es: Este embaucador envía todo tipo de cosas a lugares lejanos usando su aro, que puede distorsionar el espacio.
descriptions.it: Questo piantagrane spedisce ogni cosa in luoghi lontani usando il suo anello capace di deformare lo spazio.
descriptions.ja: 空間を歪めるリングを使い、あらゆるものを遠く離れた場所へ送り込むいたずら者。
descriptions.ko: 공간을 뒤트는 링을 사용하여 온갖 것을 먼 곳으로 보내버리는 장난꾸러기다.

name: volcanion
description: It lets out billows of steam and disappears into the dense fog. It’s said to live in mountains where humans do not tread.
appearance: Volcanion is a quadrupedal, reddish-brown Pokémon with a white underbelly, yellow accents, and two large, ring-shaped, orange-and-yellow arm cannons on its back connected by a central tube, featuring a small snout and a steam exhaust vent.

descriptions.fr: Il rejette des volutes de vapeur et disparaît dans un épais brouillard. On dit qu'il vit dans des montagnes où les humains ne s'aventurent pas.
descriptions.de: Es stößt Dampfschwaden aus und verschwindet im dichten Nebel. Man sagt, es lebt in Bergen, die kein Mensch betritt.
descriptions.es: Emite columnas de vapor y desaparece en la densa niebla. Se dice que vive en montañas donde los humanos no se aventuran.
descriptions.it: Emette fiumi di vapore e scompare nella fitta nebbia. Si dice che viva in montagne dove gli umani non osano mettere piede.
descriptions.ja: 蒸気を噴き出し、濃い霧の中に姿を消す。人が足を踏み入れない山に棲むといわれる。
descriptions.ko: 증기를 뿜어내 짙은 안개 속으로 사라진다. 사람이 발을 들여놓지 않는 산에 산다고 전해진다.

name: rowlet
description: This wary Pokémon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night.
appearance: Rowlet is a small, spherical, white avian Pokémon with a prominent brown leafy bow tie, two green leaves on its chest, and a green-feathered head featuring large black eyes and a short orange beak.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon prudent utilise la photosynthèse pour stocker de l'énergie le jour et devient actif la nuit.
descriptions.de: Dieses vorsichtige Pokémon speichert tagsüber durch Fotosynthese Energie und wird nachts aktiv.
descriptions.es: Este cauteloso Pokémon usa la fotosíntesis para almacenar energía durante el día y se vuelve activo por la noche.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon diffidente usa la fotosintesi per immagazzinare energia durante il giorno, diventando attivo di notte.
descriptions.ja: 警戒心が強いポケモン。日中は光合成でエネルギーを蓄え、夜に活動する。
descriptions.ko: 경계심이 강한 포켓몬. 낮에는 광합성으로 에너지를 모으고 밤에 활동한다.

name: dartrix
description: A bit of a dandy, it spends its free time preening its wings. Its preoccupation with any dirt on its plumage can leave it unable to battle.
appearance: Dartrix is a bipedal, mostly white avian Pokémon with green feathers forming a cape-like back and swept-back bangs, two dark green leaves on its chest, and a longer, pointed orange beak with a prominent white stripe.

descriptions.fr: Un peu dandy, il passe son temps libre à lisser ses ailes. Sa préoccupation pour la moindre tache sur son plumage peut l'empêcher de combattre.
descriptions.de: Ein kleiner Dandy, der seine Freizeit damit verbringt, seine Flügel zu putzen. Seine Besorgnis über jeden Schmutzfleck auf seinem Gefieder kann es kampfunfähig machen.
descriptions.es: Un poco dandi, pasa su tiempo libre acicalando sus alas. Su preocupación por cualquier suciedad en su plumaje puede dejarlo incapaz de combatir.
descriptions.it: Un po' dandy, passa il suo tempo libero a lisciarsi le ali. La sua preoccupazione per ogni traccia di sporco sul piumaggio può renderlo incapace di lottare.
descriptions.ja: 少し気取り屋で、暇さえあれば羽繕いをしている。羽の汚れを気にしてしまい、バトル不能になることも。
descriptions.ko: 조금 멋쟁이 기질이 있어 틈만 나면 깃털 손질을 한다. 깃털의 얼룩을 신경 쓰다 배틀 불능이 되는 경우도 있다.

name: decidueye
description: It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble at distances over a hundred yards.
appearance: Decidueye is a tall, slender bipedal avian archer Pokémon covered in dark green feathers, featuring a white face with a prominent hood-like marking, red eyes, a small beak, and has feather arrows stored on its wings with a brown leafy bowstring.

descriptions.fr: Il tire des plumes-flèches de ses ailes avec une telle précision qu'elles peuvent transpercer un caillou à plus de cent mètres de distance.
descriptions.de: Es verschießt Federpfeile von seinen Flügeln mit solcher Präzision, dass sie aus über hundert Metern Entfernung einen Kiesel durchbohren können.
descriptions.es: Dispara plumas-flecha desde sus alas con tal precisión que pueden atravesar un guijarro a más de cien metros de distancia.
descriptions.it: Scaglia piume affilate dalle ali con una precisione tale da poter trafiggere un ciottolo a oltre cento metri di distanza.
descriptions.ja: 翼から矢羽を放つ。その精度は高く、１００メートル以上離れた小石を貫くことができる。
descriptions.ko: 날개에서 화살 깃털을 쏜다. 그 정확도는 매우 높아 100m 이상 떨어진 조약돌을 꿰뚫을 수 있다.

name: litten
description: While grooming itself, it builds up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs.
appearance: Litten is a small, sleek black feline Pokémon with distinctive red stripes on its face and legs, tufts of red fur on its cheeks, and large yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: En se toilettant, il accumule des poils dans son estomac. Il les enflamme et crache des attaques de feu, dont la forme varie selon la manière dont il tousse.
descriptions.de: Beim Putzen sammelt es Haare im Magen an. Diese zündet es an und spuckt feurige Attacken aus, deren Form sich je nach Hustenreiz ändert.
descriptions.es: Mientras se acicala, acumula pelo en su estómago. Lo prende fuego y escupe ataques ígneos, que varían según cómo tosa.
descriptions.it: Mentre si pulisce, accumula peli nello stomaco. Li incendia e sputa attacchi di fuoco, la cui forma cambia a seconda di come tossisce.
descriptions.ja: 体を舐めて毛玉を胃にためる。吐き出す炎の毛玉は咳き込み方で変化する。
descriptions.ko: 몸을 핥아 털을 뭉쳐 위 속에 모은다. 뱉어내는 불꽃 털뭉치는 기침하는 방식에 따라 변화한다.

name: torracat
description: At its throat, it bears a bell of fire. The bell rings brightly whenever this Pokémon spits fire.
appearance: Torracat is a bipedal feline Pokémon with a predominantly red and black striped coat, a prominent yellow bell-shaped fire sac at its throat, large gold eyes, and a black mane on its chest.

descriptions.fr: À sa gorge, il porte une clochette de feu. Celle-ci retentit vivement chaque fois que ce Pokémon crache du feu.
descriptions.de: An seinem Hals trägt es eine Feuerglocke. Diese läutet hell, wann immer dieses Pokémon Feuer speit.
descriptions.es: En su garganta, lleva una campana de fuego. La campana suena intensamente cada vez que este Pokémon escupe fuego.
descriptions.it: Alla gola, porta una campana di fuoco. La campana suona vivacemente ogni volta che questo Pokémon sputa fuoco.
descriptions.ja: 喉元に炎の鈴を持つ。ポケモンが炎を吐くたびに鈴が明るく鳴り響く。
descriptions.ko: 목에 불꽃 방울을 지니고 있다. 포켓몬이 불을 뿜을 때마다 방울이 밝게 울린다.

name: incineroar
description: This Pokémon has a violent, selfish disposition. If it’s not in the mood to listen, it will ignore its Trainer’s orders with complete nonchalance.
appearance: Incineroar is a large, bipedal, muscular feline wrestler Pokémon with black and red fur, a prominent fiery red wrestling belt around its waist, yellow eyes, and a distinctive red-and-black muzzle.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon a un caractère violent et égoïste. S'il n'est pas d'humeur à écouter, il ignorera les ordres de son Dresseur avec une indifférence totale.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon hat ein gewalttätiges, egoistisches Gemüt. Wenn es keine Lust hat zuzuhören, ignoriert es die Befehle seines Trainers mit völliger Nonchalance.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon tiene una disposición violenta y egoísta. Si no está de humor para escuchar, ignorará las órdenes de su Entrenador con total indiferencia.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon ha un carattere violento ed egoista. Se non è dell'umore giusto per ascoltare, ignorerà gli ordini del suo Allenatore con completa nonchalance.
descriptions.ja: 荒々しく自己中心的な性格。機嫌が悪いと、トレーナーの命令も気にせず無視する。
descriptions.ko: 난폭하고 자기중심적인 성격. 기분이 좋지 않을 때는 트레이너의 명령도 신경 쓰지 않고 무시한다.

name: popplio
description: This Pokémon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It’s famous for being a hard worker.
appearance: Popplio is a small, light blue pinniped Pokémon with a white snout, a prominent frill of dark blue ruffs around its neck, a small pink nose, and large dark eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon expire des fluides corporels par le nez pour créer des ballons et frapper ses ennemis. Il est réputé pour son travail acharné.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon schnaubt Körperflüssigkeit aus der Nase, um Ballons zu erzeugen, die es auf seine Gegner schleudert. Es ist bekannt für seinen Fleiß.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon exhala fluidos corporales por la nariz para crear globos con los que golpea a sus enemigos. Es famoso por ser muy trabajador.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon espelle fluidi corporei dal naso per creare palloncini con cui colpisce i nemici. È noto per la sua gran laboriosità.
descriptions.ja: 鼻から体液を出し 風船をつくる。 その風船で 敵にぶつかって 攻撃する。 努力家で 有名だ。
descriptions.ko: 코에서 체액을 뿜어내 풍선을 만든다. 그 풍선으로 적에게 부딪쳐 공격한다. 노력가로 유명하다.

name: brionne
description: A skillful dancer, it creates a sequence of water balloons as it dances, and briskly bombards its enemies.
appearance: Brionne is a bipedal, light blue pinniped Pokémon with a dark blue upper body, a white snout, two prominent pink ruffs around its neck and waist, and a dark blue ruffled tail.

descriptions.fr: Danseur habile, il crée une succession de ballons d'eau en dansant et bombarde rapidement ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Als geschickter Tänzer erzeugt es beim Tanzen eine Reihe von Wasserballons, mit denen es seine Gegner eifrig bombardiert.
descriptions.es: Hábil bailarín, crea una secuencia de globos de agua mientras danza y bombardea ágilmente a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Danzatore abile, crea una serie di palloncini d'acqua mentre balla e bombarda agilmente i nemici.
descriptions.ja: 踊りながら 水のバルーンを 次々と 生み出す 踊り子。 素早く 敵に ぶつけて 攻撃する。
descriptions.ko: 춤추면서 물풍선을 계속 만들어내는 댄서다. 재빠르게 적에게 부딪쳐 공격한다.

name: primarina
description: It controls its water balloons with song. The melody is learned from others of its kind and is passed down from one generation to the next.
appearance: Primarina is an elegant bipedal, light blue mermaid-like Pokémon with a long, flowing light blue and white ruffled tail, long light blue hair adorned with white pearls and a pink starfish-like ornament, and large blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il contrôle ses ballons d'eau par le chant. La mélodie est apprise auprès d'autres individus de son espèce et se transmet de génération en génération.
descriptions.de: Es kontrolliert seine Wasserballons mit Gesang. Die Melodie wird von Artgenossen gelernt und von Generation zu Generation weitergegeben.
descriptions.es: Controla sus globos de agua con el canto. La melodía la aprende de otros de su especie y se transmite de una generación a la siguiente.
descriptions.it: Controlla i suoi palloncini d'acqua con il canto. La melodia è appresa da altri Pokémon della sua specie e viene tramandata di generazione in generazione.
descriptions.ja: 歌声で 水のバルーンを操る。 歌は 仲間から 教わり 代々 歌い継がれてきたものだ。
descriptions.ko: 노랫소리로 물풍선을 조종한다. 노래는 동료에게 배워 대대로 불려 내려온 것이다.

name: pikipek
description: It can peck at a rate of 16 times a second to drill holes in trees. It uses the holes for food storage and for nesting.
appearance: Pikipek is a small, black and white woodpecker Pokémon with a long, pointed black beak featuring distinct red, orange, and yellow stripes near the tip, and a clear white chest.

descriptions.fr: Il peut picorer à une vitesse de 16 fois par seconde pour percer des trous dans les arbres. Il utilise ces trous pour stocker de la nourriture et faire son nid.
descriptions.de: Es kann 16-mal pro Sekunde hacken, um Löcher in Bäume zu bohren. Diese Löcher nutzt es zur Nahrungslagerung und zum Nisten.
descriptions.es: Puede picotear 16 veces por segundo para perforar agujeros en los árboles. Usa esos agujeros para almacenar comida y para anidar.
descriptions.it: Becchetta con una frequenza di 16 volte al secondo per praticare fori negli alberi. Usa questi fori per conservare il cibo e per nidificare.
descriptions.ja: １秒間に １６回 木を突くことが できる。 木に開けた 穴に 食べ物を 隠したり 巣穴にする。
descriptions.ko: 1초에 16번 나무를 쪼아 구멍을 낼 수 있다. 나무에 뚫은 구멍에 먹이를 숨기거나 둥지로 삼는다.

name: trumbeak
description: It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies or prey, it fires off all the seeds in a burst.
appearance: Trumbeak is a medium-sized, predominantly black avian Pokémon with a large, vibrant yellow beak bisected by a black stripe, a prominent red throat patch, and a white chest.

descriptions.fr: Il mange des Baies et en stocke les graines dans son bec. Quand il rencontre des ennemis ou des proies, il tire toutes les graines en rafale.
descriptions.de: Es frisst Beeren und lagert deren Samen in seinem Schnabel. Wenn es auf Feinde oder Beute trifft, feuert es alle Samen in einem Schwall ab.
descriptions.es: Come bayas y almacena sus semillas en el pico. Cuando se encuentra con enemigos o presas, dispara todas las semillas en una ráfaga.
descriptions.it: Mangia bacche e ne immagazzina i semi nel becco. Quando incontra nemici o prede, spara tutti i semi in un colpo solo.
descriptions.ja: 木の実を食べて 種をくちばしに 蓄える。 敵や獲物に 出会うと 種を 連続で 撃ち出す。
descriptions.ko: 나무열매를 먹고 씨앗을 부리에 모은다. 적이나 사냥감을 만나면 씨앗을 연속으로 발사한다.

name: toucannon
description: When it battles, its beak heats up. The temperature can easily exceed 212 degrees Fahrenheit, causing severe burns when it hits.
appearance: Toucannon is a large, predominantly black avian Pokémon with a massive, brightly colored beak featuring vibrant red, orange, and yellow sections, a white underbelly, and a prominent red feathery chest tuft.

descriptions.fr: Au combat, son bec s'échauffe. La température peut facilement dépasser les 100 degrés Celsius, provoquant de graves brûlures à l'impact.
descriptions.de: Im Kampf heizt sich sein Schnabel auf. Die Temperatur kann leicht 100 Grad Celsius übersteigen, was bei einem Treffer schwere Verbrennungen verursacht.
descriptions.es: Al combatir, su pico se calienta. La temperatura puede superar fácilmente los 100 grados Celsius, provocando quemaduras graves al impactar.
descriptions.it: In lotta, il suo becco si surriscalda. La temperatura può superare facilmente i 100 gradi Celsius, causando gravi ustioni se colpisce.
descriptions.ja: 戦闘中 くちばしが 高熱化。 触れると １００度を 超える 熱で 大火傷を 負う。
descriptions.ko: 싸우는 동안 부리가 고열화된다. 닿으면 100도를 넘는 뜨거움으로 큰 화상을 입는다.

name: yungoos
description: With its sharp fangs, it will bite anything. It did not originally live in Alola but was imported from another region.
appearance: Yungoos is a small, shaggy brown mongoose-like Pokémon with a long, low-slung body, a prominent tuft of yellow fur on its head, and a perpetually open mouth revealing a pink tongue.

descriptions.fr: Avec ses crocs acérés, il mord n'importe quoi. Il n'est pas originaire d'Alola, mais a été importé d'une autre région.
descriptions.de: Mit seinen scharfen Fangzähnen beißt es alles. Es ist nicht ursprünglich in Alola beheimatet, sondern wurde aus einer anderen Region importiert.
descriptions.es: Con sus afilados colmillos, morderá cualquier cosa. No vivía originalmente en Alola, sino que fue importado de otra región.
descriptions.it: Con le sue zanne affilate, morde qualsiasi cosa. Non viveva originariamente ad Alola, ma fu importato da un'altra regione.
descriptions.ja: 鋭い キバで なんでも 噛みつく。 元々は アローラ地方の ポケモンでは ない。
descriptions.ko: 날카로운 엄니로 뭐든지 문다. 원래는 알로라지방 포켓몬이 아니다.

name: gumshoos
description: When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location...but it’s always snoozing by nightfall.
appearance: Gumshoos is a larger, yellow-brown mongoose-like Pokémon with a long, prominent yellow fur tuft styled like swept-back hair on its head and chest, a white underbelly, and a stern, observant expression.

descriptions.fr: Quand il trouve une trace de sa proie, il surveille patiemment l'endroit... mais il s'assoupit toujours à la tombée de la nuit.
descriptions.de: Findet es eine Spur seiner Beute, lauert es geduldig an der Stelle... doch bei Einbruch der Nacht ist es stets am Dösen.
descriptions.es: Cuando encuentra un rastro de su presa, vigila pacientemente el lugar... pero siempre está dormitando al anochecer.
descriptions.it: Quando trova una traccia della sua preda, sorveglia pazientemente il luogo... ma si appisola sempre al calar della notte.
descriptions.ja: 獲物の 痕跡を 見つけると 辛抱強く その場に 張り込むが 夜になると 必ず 寝ている。
descriptions.ko: 사냥감의 흔적을 발견하면 끈기 있게 그 장소에 잠복한다. 하지만 밤이 되면 반드시 잠들어 있다.

name: grubbin
description: Its strong jaw enables it to scrape trees and slurp out the sap. It normally lives underground.
appearance: Grubbin is a small, white segmented grub-like Pokémon with a large orange head, prominent black pincers, and short yellow antennae.

descriptions.fr: Sa mâchoire puissante lui permet de racler les arbres et de siroter la sève. Il vit normalement sous terre.
descriptions.de: Sein starker Kiefer ermöglicht es ihm, an Bäumen zu schaben und den Saft herauszuschlürfen. Es lebt normalerweise unter der Erde.
descriptions.es: Su fuerte mandíbula le permite raspar árboles y sorber la savia. Normalmente vive bajo tierra.
descriptions.it: La sua forte mascella gli permette di raschiare gli alberi e sorbirne la linfa. Normalmente vive sottoterra.
descriptions.ja: 強靭な 顎で 木を削り 樹液を 吸い上げる。 普段は 地中に 棲んでいる。
descriptions.ko: 강인한 턱으로 나무를 깎아 수액을 빨아올린다. 평소에는 땅속에 서식한다.

name: charjabug
description: Its body is capable of storing electricity. On camping trips, people are grateful to have one around.
appearance: Charjabug is a rectangular, green bug Pokémon resembling a battery, featuring black eyes, short yellow antennae, and small yellow leg nubs.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est capable de stocker de l'électricité. Lors des voyages de camping, les gens sont reconnaissants d'en avoir un à leurs côtés.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper kann Elektrizität speichern. Beim Campen sind die Leute dankbar, eines dabei zu haben.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo es capaz de almacenar electricidad. En los viajes de camping, la gente agradece tener uno cerca.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo è in grado di immagazzinare elettricità. Nelle gite in campeggio, le persone sono grate di averne uno intorno.
descriptions.ja: 体に 電気を 溜める ことが できる。 キャンプなどでは 重宝される。
descriptions.ko: 몸에 전기를 모을 수 있다. 캠핑 등에서 소중히 여겨진다.

name: vikavolt
description: It zips around, on sharp lookout for an opening. It concentrates electrical energy within its large jaws and uses it to zap its enemies.
appearance: Vikavolt is a large, sleek black stag beetle-like Pokémon with long, curved yellow mandibles extending from its head, iridescent blue wings, and prominent yellow markings on its head and abdomen.

descriptions.fr: Il fonce en cherchant la moindre ouverture. Il concentre l'énergie électrique dans ses grandes mâchoires pour électrocuter ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Es saust umher und hält stets Ausschau nach einer Öffnung. Es konzentriert elektrische Energie in seinen großen Kiefern, um seine Feinde damit zu schocken.
descriptions.es: Se mueve a gran velocidad buscando una apertura. Concentra energía eléctrica en sus grandes mandíbulas para electrocutar a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Sfreccia in cerca di un'apertura. Concentra energia elettrica nelle sue grandi fauci e la usa per folgorare i nemici.
descriptions.ja: すばやく 飛び回り 隙を 探す。 大きな アゴに 電気を 溜めて 敵を しびれさせる。
descriptions.ko: 재빠르게 날아다니며 틈을 노린다. 거대한 턱에 전기를 모아 적을 감전시킨다.

name: crabrawler
description: While guarding its weak points with its pincers, it looks for an opening and unleashes punches. When it loses, it foams at the mouth and faints.
appearance: Crabrawler is a purple crustacean Pokémon with large blue boxing claws, yellow eyes, and a prominent yellow protuberance on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il se protège les points faibles avec ses pinces, puis cherche une ouverture pour déchaîner une série de coups de poing. Quand il perd, il écume de rage et s'évanouit.
descriptions.de: Es schützt seine Schwachstellen mit seinen Scheren und sucht nach einer Öffnung, um Schläge zu verteilen. Verliert es, sabbert es und fällt in Ohnmacht.
descriptions.es: Mientras protege sus puntos débiles con las pinzas, busca una apertura para lanzar puñetazos. Si pierde, echa espuma por la boca y se desmaya.
descriptions.it: Protegge i suoi punti deboli con le chele e cerca il momento giusto per sferrare pugni. Se perde, schiuma dalla bocca e sviene.
descriptions.ja: 弱点を ハサミで 守りつつ 隙を 探して パンチを 繰り出す。 負けると 泡を吹いて 気絶する。
descriptions.ko: 약점을 집게로 가리며 틈을 노려 펀치를 날린다. 지면 입에 거품을 물고 기절한다.

name: crabominable
description: It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokémon evolved and grew fur.
appearance: Crabominable is a large, white yeti-crab-like Pokémon with thick blue fur covering its limbs, a prominent red nose-like horn on its face, and massive blue ice-covered boxing claws.

descriptions.fr: Il visait le sommet, mais s'est perdu et a fini sur une montagne enneigée. Forcé d'endurer le froid, ce Pokémon a évolué et a développé de la fourrure.
descriptions.de: Es wollte den Gipfel erklimmen, verirrte sich jedoch und landete auf einem verschneiten Berg. Gezwungen, die Kälte zu ertragen, entwickelte es sich und bekam Fell.
descriptions.es: Iba a por el pico más alto, pero se perdió y acabó en una montaña nevada. Tras resistir el frío, evolucionó y le creció pelaje.
descriptions.it: Voleva scalare la montagna più alta, ma si è perso ed è finito su un monte innevato. Obbligato a sopportare il freddo, si è evoluto e gli è cresciuta la pelliccia.
descriptions.ja: 頂上を 目指すも 遭難し 雪山で 暮らし 寒さに 耐えるうちに 進化して 毛が 生えた。
descriptions.ko: 정상을 노리다 조난당해 설산에서 살게 되었다. 추위를 견디는 동안 진화하여 털이 자랐다.

name: oricorio-baile
description: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.
appearance: Oricorio-Baile is a primarily red avian Pokémon with black dancer-like plumage forming a skirt, headcrest, and tail feathers, featuring white-rimmed eyes and a red flower on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il frotte ses ailes pour produire du feu. Dansant avec grâce, il inonde ses adversaires de flammes intenses.
descriptions.de: Es schlägt seine Flügel zusammen, um Feuer zu erzeugen. Während es die Schritte seines schönen Tanzes ausführt, überzieht es Gegner mit intensiven Flammen.
descriptions.es: Frota sus alas para prender fuego. Al realizar los pasos de su bello baile, cubre a sus adversarios con intensas llamas.
descriptions.it: Sfrega le ali per generare fuoco. Eseguendo i passi della sua splendida danza, travolge gli avversari con fiammate intense.
descriptions.ja: 翼を 打ち鳴らし 火を 生み出す。 華麗な ステップの 舞で 相手を 激しい 炎に 包む。
descriptions.ko: 날개를 서로 비벼 불꽃을 만든다. 화려한 스텝으로 춤추면서 상대를 격렬한 불꽃으로 감싼다.

display_names.ja: オドリドリ (めらめらスタイル)

name: cutiefly
description: It feeds on the nectar and pollen of flowers. Because it’s able to sense auras, it can identify which flowers are about to bloom.
appearance: Cutiefly is a tiny, white, bee-like insect Pokémon with large black eyes, a small proboscis, and delicate yellow-tipped wings.

descriptions.fr: Il se nourrit du nectar et du pollen des fleurs. Grâce à son aptitude à percevoir les auras, il peut identifier les fleurs sur le point d'éclore.
descriptions.de: Es ernährt sich von Nektar und Blütenpollen. Da es Auren spüren kann, weiß es, welche Blumen kurz vor dem Aufblühen stehen.
descriptions.es: Se alimenta del néctar y el polen de las flores. Gracias a su habilidad para percibir auras, puede identificar qué flores están a punto de abrirse.
descriptions.it: Si nutre del nettare e del polline dei fiori. Grazie alla sua capacità di percepire le aure, riesce a individuare i fiori sul punto di sbocciare.
descriptions.ja: 花の 蜜と 花粉を 食料にしている。 オーラを 感じる 能力で どの花が 咲くのか わかる。
descriptions.ko: 꽃의 꿀과 꽃가루를 먹고 산다. 오라를 감지하는 능력으로 어떤 꽃이 필지 알아챈다.

name: ribombee
description: It rolls up pollen into puffs. It makes many different varieties, some used as food and others used in battle.
appearance: Ribombee is a small, yellow and white bee-like insect Pokémon with a large white head, yellow scarf-like fur, black antennae, and four delicate white wings with brown edges.

descriptions.fr: Il roule le pollen pour en faire des petites boules. Il en fabrique de nombreuses variétés, certaines utilisées comme nourriture, d'autres au combat.
descriptions.de: Es rollt Pollen zu kleinen Kugeln. Es stellt viele verschiedene Sorten her, manche als Nahrung, andere für den Kampf.
descriptions.es: Enrolla el polen formando bolitas. Hace muchas variedades diferentes, algunas para comer y otras para usar en combate.
descriptions.it: Trasforma il polline in piccole sfere. Ne produce di diverse varietà, alcune per nutrimento e altre da usare in lotta.
descriptions.ja: 花粉を 丸めて 塊にする。 食料にしたり バトルで 使ったりと いろんな 種類を 作り分ける。
descriptions.ko: 꽃가루를 뭉쳐 덩어리로 만든다. 식량으로 쓰거나 배틀에 쓰는 등 여러 종류를 만들어 구분한다.

name: rockruff
description: It’s considered to be a good Pokémon for beginners because of its friendliness, but its disposition grows rougher as it grows up.
appearance: Rockruff is a small, light brown canine Pokémon with a white muzzle, bright blue eyes, and spiky orange rocks resembling a mane around its neck.

descriptions.fr: On le considère comme un bon Pokémon pour débutants en raison de sa gentillesse, mais son tempérament s'endurcit en grandissant.
descriptions.de: Es gilt wegen seiner Freundlichkeit als gutes Pokémon für Anfänger, doch sein Wesen wird mit zunehmendem Alter rauer.
descriptions.es: Se le considera un buen Pokémon para principiantes por su simpatía, aunque su carácter se vuelve más brusco a medida que crece.
descriptions.it: È considerato un buon Pokémon per principianti grazie alla sua indole amichevole, ma il suo carattere si incattivisce crescendo.
descriptions.ja: 人懐っこいので 初心者向きだと 言われているが 成長すると 性格が 荒くなる。
descriptions.ko: 사람에게 잘 따르기 때문에 초보자에게 알맞다고 알려져 있지만 성장하면 성격이 거칠어진다.

name: lycanroc-midday
description: Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.
appearance: Lycanroc-Midday is a sleek, quadrupedal light brown wolf-like Pokémon with white fur on its chest and muzzle, long pointed ears, green eyes, and a shaggy mane of brown fur around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Ses mouvements rapides déroutent ses ennemis. Bien armé de griffes et de crocs, il utilise également les roches acérées de sa crinière comme armes.
descriptions.de: Seine schnellen Bewegungen verwirren seine Feinde. Gut ausgestattet mit Klauen und Reißzähnen, benutzt es auch die scharfen Felsen in seiner Mähne als Waffen.
descriptions.es: Sus rápidos movimientos confunden a sus enemigos. Armado con garras y colmillos, también usa las rocas afiladas de su melena como armas.
descriptions.it: I suoi rapidi movimenti confondono i nemici. Ben dotato di artigli e zanne, usa come armi anche le rocce appuntite della sua criniera.
descriptions.ja: 素早い 動きで 敵を 翻弄する。 爪と 牙も 鋭いが 鬣の 鋭い 岩も 武器にする。
descriptions.ko: 재빠른 움직임으로 적을 농락한다. 발톱과 이빨도 날카롭지만 갈기의 날카로운 바위도 무기로 삼는다.

display_names.ja: ルガルガン (まひるのすがた)

name: wishiwashi-solo
description: When it’s in trouble, its eyes moisten and begin to shine. The shining light attracts its comrades, and they stand together against their enemies.
appearance: Wishiwashi-Solo is a tiny, silver-blue fish Pokémon with large, teary blue eyes, a small mouth, and delicate fins.

descriptions.fr: Quand il est en difficulté, ses yeux s'humidifient et se mettent à briller. La lumière éclatante attire ses camarades, et ils se tiennent ensemble contre leurs ennemis.
descriptions.de: Ist es in Not, werden seine Augen feucht und beginnen zu leuchten. Das leuchtende Licht lockt seine Kameraden an, die dann gemeinsam den Feinden die Stirn bieten.
descriptions.es: Cuando está en apuros, sus ojos se humedecen y empiezan a brillar. La luz brillante atrae a sus compañeros, y juntos se unen contra sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Quando è in difficoltà, i suoi occhi si inumidiscono e iniziano a brillare. La luce splendente attira i suoi compagni, che si uniscono a lui contro i nemici.
descriptions.ja: 危機に 瀕すると 瞳が 潤み 光りだす。 その光が 仲間を 集め 共に 敵に 立ち向かう。
descriptions.ko: 위기에 처하면 눈동자가 촉촉하게 빛나기 시작한다. 그 빛이 동료들을 불러 모아 함께 적에게 맞선다.

display_names.ja: ヨワシ (たんどくのすがた)

name: mareanie
description: It plunges the poison spike on its head into its prey. When the prey has weakened, Mareanie deals the finishing blow with its 10 tentacles.
appearance: Mareanie is a small, blue starfish-like Pokémon with five pointed arms, a round pink body, and a prominent red eye on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il plante le pic empoisonné de sa tête dans sa proie. Quand la proie est affaiblie, Mareanie lui porte le coup de grâce avec ses 10 tentacules.
descriptions.de: Es rammt den Giftstachel auf seinem Kopf in seine Beute. Ist diese geschwächt, versetzt Mareanie ihr mit seinen 10 Tentakeln den Todesstoß.
descriptions.es: Clava la púa venenosa de su cabeza en la presa. Cuando esta se debilita, Mareanie asesta el golpe final con sus 10 tentáculos.
descriptions.it: Conficca l'aculeo velenoso che ha in testa nella preda. Quando questa è indebolita, Mareanie sferra il colpo di grazia con i suoi 10 tentacoli.
descriptions.ja: 頭の 毒針を 獲物に 突き刺す。 獲物が 弱ると １０本の 触手で とどめを 刺す。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 독침을 먹이에게 꽂는다. 먹이가 약해지면 10개의 촉수로 마무리 일격을 가한다.

name: toxapex
description: Toxapex crawls along the ocean floor on its 12 legs. It leaves a trail of Corsola bits scattered in its wake.
appearance: Toxapex is a large, multi-legged blue starfish-like Pokémon with a spiky purple head crest, fourteen sharp, purple-tipped tentacles, and a prominent yellow core on its underside.

descriptions.fr: Toxapex se déplace sur le plancher océanique à l'aide de ses 12 pattes, laissant des fragments de Corayons derrière lui.
descriptions.de: Toxapex bewegt sich mit seinen zwölf Beinen am Meeresboden entlang und hinterlässt dabei eine Spur aus Korasonna-Fragmenten.
descriptions.es: Toxapex avanza por el lecho marino con sus 12 patas, dejando a su paso restos esparcidos de Corsola.
descriptions.it: Toxapex si muove sul fondale marino usando le sue 12 zampe e lasciando dietro di sé i resti dei Corsola di cui si nutre.
descriptions.ja: 12本の脚で海底を這いずり回り、通ったあとにはサニーゴの残骸が散らばっている。
descriptions.ko: 더시마사는 12개의 다리로 해저를 기어다니며, 코산호 조각들을 뒤에 남긴다.

name: mudbray
description: The mud stuck to Mudbray’s hooves enhances its grip and its powerful running gait.
appearance: Mudbray is a small, light brown equine Pokémon with a dark brown mane and tail, light brown hooves, and prominent floppy ears.

descriptions.fr: La boue collée aux sabots de Tiboudet renforce son adhérence et sa puissante foulée.
descriptions.de: Der Schlamm an Eselous' Hufen verbessert dessen Halt und kräftigen Laufschritt.
descriptions.es: El barro pegado a los cascos de Mudbray le permite mejorar su agarre y su potente carrera.
descriptions.it: Il fango che ricopre gli zoccoli di Mudbray ne potenzia l'aderenza e la possente andatura.
descriptions.ja: ドロバンコのひづめに付着した泥が、グリップ力を高め、力強い走りを可能にする。
descriptions.ko: 머드나기의 발굽에 붙은 진흙은 접지력을 높여주고 강력한 달리기를 가능하게 한다.

name: mudsdale
description: It spits a mud that provides resistance to both wind and rain, so the walls of old houses were often coated with it.
appearance: Mudsdale is a large, robust dark brown equine Pokémon with thick, braided mud-like mane and tail, powerful legs ending in dark brown hooves, and a determined expression.

descriptions.fr: Il crache une boue résistante au vent et à la pluie, souvent utilisée pour enduire les murs des vieilles maisons.
descriptions.de: Es spuckt einen wind- und regenresistenten Schlamm. Früher wurden die Wände alter Häuser oft damit beschichtet.
descriptions.es: Escupe un barro que protege contra el viento y la lluvia, por lo que las paredes de las casas antiguas solían recubrirse con él.
descriptions.it: Sputa un fango che resiste al vento e alla pioggia, usato in passato per rivestire i muri delle case antiche.
descriptions.ja: 風雨に強い泥を吐く。古い家の壁に塗ってあったりする。
descriptions.ko: 바람과 비에 강한 진흙을 뱉어낸다. 오래된 집의 벽에 발라져 있는 경우가 많다.

name: dewpider
description: It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its soft head.
appearance: Small, blue, spherical body with four short, light blue legs, and a prominent clear water bubble covering its head, featuring two large, light blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il rampe sur la terre ferme à la recherche de nourriture. Sa bulle d'eau lui permet de respirer et protège sa tête molle.
descriptions.de: Es kriecht an Land, um Nahrung zu suchen. Seine Wasserblase ermöglicht ihm das Atmen und schützt seinen weichen Kopf.
descriptions.es: Se arrastra por tierra en busca de alimento. Su burbuja de agua le permite respirar y protege su blanda cabeza.
descriptions.it: Si avventura sulla terraferma in cerca di cibo. La sua bolla d'acqua gli permette di respirare e protegge la sua testa molle.
descriptions.ja: 陸に上がってエサを探す。水の泡は呼吸と柔らかい頭部を守る。
descriptions.ko: 육지로 기어 올라와 먹이를 찾는다. 물방울은 숨을 쉬게 하고 부드러운 머리를 보호한다.

name: araquanid
description: It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokémon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown.
appearance: Large, dark blue spider-like body with four long, segmented blue legs and a large, clear water bubble encasing its head and upper torso, revealing two large, yellow eyes and a sharp beak.

descriptions.fr: Il donne des coups de tête avec la bulle d'eau sur sa tête. Les petits Pokémon y sont aspirés et s'y noient.
descriptions.de: Es stößt mit der Wasserblase auf seinem Kopf Kopfnüsse aus. Kleine Pokémon werden in die Blase gesaugt, wo sie ertrinken.
descriptions.es: Golpea con la burbuja de agua de su cabeza. Los Pokémon pequeños son absorbidos por ella y se ahogan.
descriptions.it: Colpisce con la bolla d'acqua sulla testa. I Pokémon più piccoli vengono risucchiati nella bolla e vi annegano.
descriptions.ja: 頭の水の泡で頭突きをする。小さなポケモンは泡に吸い込まれて溺れる。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 물방울로 박치기를 한다. 작은 포켓몬은 물방울에 빨려 들어가 익사한다.

name: fomantis
description: During the day, it sleeps and soaks up light. When night falls, it walks around looking for a safer place to sleep.
appearance: Small, pink praying mantis-like Pokemon with a white-and-pink striped 'hood' over its head, two large green leaf-like forelimbs, and a green abdomen resembling an unopened flower bud.

descriptions.fr: Le jour, il dort et absorbe la lumière. La nuit, il se déplace pour trouver un endroit plus sûr où dormir.
descriptions.de: Tagsüber schläft es und saugt Licht auf. Wenn die Nacht hereinbricht, sucht es sich einen sichereren Schlafplatz.
descriptions.es: Durante el día, duerme y absorbe la luz. Al caer la noche, camina en busca de un lugar más seguro para dormir.
descriptions.it: Durante il giorno dorme e assorbe la luce. Quando cala la notte, si muove in cerca di un luogo più sicuro dove dormire.
descriptions.ja: 昼間は眠って光を浴びる。夜になると安全な場所を求めてさまよう。
descriptions.ko: 낮에는 잠을 자며 빛을 흡수한다. 밤이 되면 더 안전한 잠자리를 찾아 돌아다닌다.

name: lurantis
description: It requires a lot of effort to maintain Lurantis’s vivid coloring, but some collectors enjoy this work and treat it as their hobby.
appearance: Elegant, humanoid praying mantis-like Pokemon, primarily pink and white with a large, dark pink scythe-like forelimb, a smaller light pink scythe-like forelimb, a green and white striped 'skirt' around its waist, and a green head resembling a blooming orchid.

descriptions.fr: Maintenir les couleurs éclatantes de Floramantis demande beaucoup d'efforts, mais certains collectionneurs en font un passe-temps.
descriptions.de: Die prächtige Färbung von Fruyal zu erhalten, ist mit viel Aufwand verbunden, doch manche Sammler betrachten dies als Hobby.
descriptions.es: Mantener el intenso colorido de Lurantis requiere mucho esfuerzo, pero algunos coleccionistas disfrutan de este trabajo como su pasatiempo.
descriptions.it: Mantenere la vivida colorazione di Lurantis richiede un grande impegno, ma alcuni collezionisti amano questo compito e lo considerano un hobby.
descriptions.ja: ラランテスの鮮やかな体色を維持するには多大な労力が必要だが、それを趣味とするコレクターもいる。
descriptions.ko: 라란티스의 선명한 색을 유지하는 데는 많은 노력이 필요하지만, 일부 수집가들은 이 작업을 취미로 즐긴다.

name: morelull
description: It scatters spores that flicker and glow. Anyone seeing these lights falls into a deep slumber.
appearance: Small, mushroom-like creature with a pale purple, spherical head adorned with glowing blue dots, a thin brown stem, and two small, stubby feet.

descriptions.fr: Il disperse des spores scintillantes et lumineuses. Quiconque voit ces lumières tombe dans un profond sommeil.
descriptions.de: Es verstreut Sporen, die flimmern und leuchten. Wer diese Lichter sieht, fällt in einen tiefen Schlaf.
descriptions.es: Esparce esporas que parpadean y brillan. Quien ve estas luces cae en un sueño profundo.
descriptions.it: Spande spore che brillano e pulsano. Chiunque veda queste luci cade in un sonno profondo.
descriptions.ja: チカチカと光る胞子をまき散らす。その光を見た者は深い眠りに落ちる。
descriptions.ko: 깜빡이며 빛나는 포자를 뿌린다. 그 빛을 본 사람은 깊은 잠에 빠진다.

name: shiinotic
description: Forests where Shiinotic live are treacherous to enter at night. People confused by its strange lights can never find their way home again.
appearance: Tall, bipedal mushroom-like Pokemon with a purple body, a large, dark purple mushroom cap adorned with glowing blue dots, and smaller glowing blue dots on its chest and hands.

descriptions.fr: Les forêts où vivent les Lampignon sont dangereuses la nuit. Ceux qui sont désorientés par ses étranges lumières ne retrouvent jamais le chemin de leur maison.
descriptions.de: Wälder, in denen Lamellux leben, sind nachts tückisch. Menschen, die von seinen seltsamen Lichtern verwirrt sind, finden nie wieder nach Hause.
descriptions.es: Los bosques donde viven Shiinotic son peligrosos de noche. Las personas confundidas por sus extrañas luces nunca pueden encontrar el camino de regreso a casa.
descriptions.it: Le foreste in cui vivono gli Shiinotic sono pericolose di notte. Chi viene confuso dalle sue strane luci non riesce più a ritrovare la strada di casa.
descriptions.ja: マシェードの棲む森は夜に入ると危険。奇妙な光に惑わされた者は二度と家に帰れない。
descriptions.ko: 마셰이드가 사는 숲은 밤에 들어가면 위험하다. 이상한 빛에 혼란스러워진 사람은 다시는 집으로 돌아가지 못한다.

name: salandit
description: It burns its bodily fluids to create a poisonous gas. When its enemies become disoriented from inhaling the gas, it attacks them.
appearance: Small, black lizard with a distinctive red-orange blaze marking on its back and tail, a dark gray underbelly, and a mask-like dark gray facial marking around its yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il brûle ses fluides corporels pour créer un gaz toxique. Lorsque ses ennemis sont désorientés par l'inhalation du gaz, il les attaque.
descriptions.de: Es verbrennt seine Körperflüssigkeiten, um ein giftiges Gas zu erzeugen. Wenn seine Gegner durch das Einatmen des Gases desorientiert sind, greift es sie an.
descriptions.es: Quema sus fluidos corporales para crear un gas venenoso. Cuando sus enemigos se desorientan al inhalarlo, los ataca.
descriptions.it: Brucia i suoi fluidi corporei per creare un gas velenoso. Quando i nemici si disorientano inalandolo, li attacca.
descriptions.ja: 体液を燃やして毒ガスを生成する。ガスを吸って混乱した敵を襲う。
descriptions.ko: 체액을 태워 독가스를 생성한다. 가스를 들이마셔 혼란스러워진 적을 공격한다.

name: salazzle
description: For some reason, only females have been found. It creates a reverse harem of male Salandit that it lives with.
appearance: Sleek, bipedal black salamander with a prominent red-orange pattern on its neck, chest, and tail, long, slender limbs, and a pointed head with yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Pour une raison inconnue, seules des femelles ont été découvertes. Elles vivent avec un harem inversé de Salandit mâles.
descriptions.de: Aus unerklärlichen Gründen wurden bisher nur weibliche Exemplare entdeckt. Es lebt mit einem umgekehrten Harem männlicher Molunk zusammen.
descriptions.es: Por alguna razón, solo se han encontrado hembras. Crea un harén inverso de Salandit machos con los que convive.
descriptions.it: Per qualche ragione, sono stati trovati solo esemplari femmina. Crea un harem inverso di Salandit maschi con cui vive.
descriptions.ja: なぜか メスしか 発見されていない。 オスの ヤトウモリを 逆ハーレムに して 生活する。
descriptions.ko: 어째서인지 암컷만 발견되고 있다. 수컷 야도뇽들을 역하렘으로 만들어 생활한다.

name: stufful
description: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.
appearance: Small, pink, bear-like cub with short, stubby limbs, a white face, white belly, and white paw tips, distinguished by a small white tag-like protrusion on its rear.

descriptions.fr: Malgré son adorable apparence, il peut mettre un catcheur professionnel KO s'il s'énerve et se débat.
descriptions.de: Trotz seines niedlichen Aussehens kann es im Zorn mit seinen Armen und Beinen einen Profi-Wrestler zu Boden schicken.
descriptions.es: A pesar de su adorable aspecto, cuando se enfada y patalea, sus brazos y piernas podrían derribar a un luchador profesional.
descriptions.it: Nonostante il suo aspetto adorabile, quando si arrabbia e si agita, le sue braccia e le sue gambe potrebbero stendere un lottatore professionista.
descriptions.ja: 愛らしい 見た目に 反して 怒って 暴れると 手足の 一撃で プロレスラーも 倒してしまう。
descriptions.ko: 귀여운 외모와 달리 화가 나서 날뛰면 팔다리 일격으로 프로레슬러도 쓰러뜨릴 수 있다.

name: bewear
description: This immensely dangerous Pokémon possesses overwhelming physical strength. Its habitat is generally off-limits.
appearance: Large, bipedal pink bear-like Pokemon with powerful black limbs and a black torso, a white muzzle, and a white chest pattern resembling a bib, featuring a small white tag-like protrusion on its rear.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon immensément dangereux possède une force physique écrasante. Son habitat est généralement interdit d'accès.
descriptions.de: Dieses überaus gefährliche Pokémon besitzt überwältigende Körperkraft. Sein Lebensraum ist im Allgemeinen Sperrgebiet.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon inmensamente peligroso posee una fuerza física abrumadora. Su hábitat está generalmente fuera de los límites.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon immensamente pericoloso possiede una forza fisica schiacciante. Il suo habitat è generalmente off-limits.
descriptions.ja: 強大な 身体能力を 秘めた きわめて 危険な ポケモン。 生息地は 立ち入り禁止区域に 指定されている。
descriptions.ko: 막강한 신체 능력을 지닌 매우 위험한 포켓몬. 서식지는 출입 금지 구역으로 지정되어 있다.

name: bounsweet
description: A delectable aroma pours from its body. They are often swallowed whole by Toucannon lured by that wafting deliciousness.
appearance: Small, purple, spherical fruit-like Pokemon with a green calyx of leaves on its head and two tiny pink feet.

descriptions.fr: Une odeur délicieuse émane de son corps. Il est souvent avalé entier par les Toucannon attirés par cette succulente effluve.
descriptions.de: Ein köstliches Aroma strömt aus seinem Körper. Es wird oft von Tukanon ganz verschluckt, die von dieser verlockenden Köstlichkeit angelockt werden.
descriptions.es: Un aroma delicioso emana de su cuerpo. A menudo es tragado entero por Toucannon atraídos por esa deliciosa fragancia.
descriptions.it: Dal suo corpo si sprigiona un aroma delizioso. Spesso viene inghiottito intero da Toucannon, attirati da quell'irresistibile profumo.
descriptions.ja: 体から おいしそうな 香りを 発する。 その 香りに 誘われた ドデカバシに 丸呑みされる ことも 多い。
descriptions.ko: 몸에서 맛있는 향기를 낸다. 그 향기에 이끌린 더시마사리에게 통째로 삼켜지는 일도 많다.

name: steenee
description: The sepals on its head developed to protect its body. These are quite hard, so even if pecked by bird Pokémon, this Pokémon is totally fine.
appearance: Small, purple, bipedal fruit-like Pokemon with a green calyx of leaves forming a 'hat' on its head, short stubby arms, and two slender legs, featuring a prominent white marking on its stomach.

descriptions.fr: Les sépales sur sa tête se sont développés pour protéger son corps. Ils sont très durs, ce qui lui permet d'être totalement indemne même s'il est picoré par des Pokémon oiseaux.
descriptions.de: Die Kelchblätter auf seinem Kopf haben sich zum Schutz seines Körpers entwickelt. Sie sind sehr hart, sodass dieses Pokémon auch von Vogel-Pokémon angepickt völlig unversehrt bleibt.
descriptions.es: Los sépalos de su cabeza se desarrollaron para proteger su cuerpo. Son bastante duros, por lo que incluso si es picoteado por Pokémon pájaro, este Pokémon está totalmente bien.
descriptions.it: I sepali sul suo capo si sono sviluppati per proteggerne il corpo. Sono piuttosto duri, quindi questo Pokémon è totalmente al sicuro anche se beccato da Pokémon uccello.
descriptions.ja: 頭の がくは 体を 守るために 発達した。 とても 硬いので 鳥ポケモンに 突かれても へっちゃらだ。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 꽃받침은 몸을 지키기 위해 발달했다. 매우 단단해서 새포켓몬에게 쪼여도 끄떡없다.

name: tsareena
description: Its long, striking legs aren’t just for show but to be used to kick with skill. In victory, it shows off by kicking the defeated, laughing boisterously.
appearance: Tall, elegant, bipedal fruit-like Pokemon with a purple body, long slender legs, a crown-like green calyx of leaves on its head, and prominent pink 'panties' and white markings on its upper thighs.

descriptions.fr: Ses longues jambes remarquables ne sont pas seulement esthétiques, mais sont utilisées pour donner des coups de pied habiles. En signe de victoire, il se pavane en frappant les vaincus, riant bruyamment.
descriptions.de: Seine langen, auffälligen Beine sind nicht nur zur Zierde, sondern werden geschickt zum Treten eingesetzt. Im Sieg prahlt es, indem es die Besiegten tritt und dabei lauthals lacht.
descriptions.es: Sus largas y llamativas patas no son solo para lucirse, sino para usarlas con habilidad al patear. En la victoria, se jacta pateando a los derrotados, riendo ruidosamente.
descriptions.it: Le sue lunghe e vistose gambe non sono solo estetiche, ma vengono usate per sferrare calci abili. Dopo la vittoria, si vanta colpendo i vinti, ridendo rumorosamente.
descriptions.ja: 見た目の 麗しい 脚は 伊達ではなく 巧みに 蹴りを 繰り出す。 勝利すると 負けた相手を 蹴りつけ 高笑いする。
descriptions.ko: 아름다운 다리는 겉모습만이 아니라 능숙하게 발차기를 날린다. 승리하면 쓰러진 상대를 차면서 큰 소리로 웃는다.

name: comfey
description: It attaches flowers to its highly nutritious vine. This revitalizes the flowers, and they give off an aromatic scent.
appearance: Small, green, fairy-like Pokemon with a wreath of vibrant, colorful flowers encircling its body, typically seen floating.

descriptions.fr: Il attache des fleurs à sa liane très nutritive. Cela revitalise les fleurs, qui dégagent alors un parfum aromatique.
descriptions.de: Es befestigt Blumen an seiner sehr nahrhaften Ranke. Dies revitalisiert die Blumen, die dann einen aromatischen Duft verströmen.
descriptions.es: Atrapa flores con su liana altamente nutritiva. Esto las revitaliza y desprenden un aroma fragante.
descriptions.it: Attacca i fiori alla sua liana altamente nutritiva. Così i fiori si rivitalizzano e sprigionano un profumo aromatico.
descriptions.ja: 栄養満点の ツルに 花を からませる。 花は 元気に なり 香り高い 匂いを 放つ。
descriptions.ko: 영양 만점의 덩굴에 꽃을 엮는다. 꽃은 생기를 되찾아 향기로운 냄새를 풍긴다.

name: oranguru
description: Known for its extreme intelligence, this Pokémon will look down on inexperienced Trainers, so it’s best suited to veteran Trainers.
appearance: Large, bipedal ape-like Pokemon with long, white shaggy fur, purple arms, and a prominent purple leaf-like fan held in one hand, often sitting cross-legged.

descriptions.fr: Connu pour son intelligence extrême, ce Pokémon méprise les Dresseurs inexpérimentés, il est donc mieux adapté aux Dresseurs vétérans.
descriptions.de: Bekannt für seine extreme Intelligenz, schaut dieses Pokémon auf unerfahrene Trainer herab, daher ist es am besten für erfahrene Trainer geeignet.
descriptions.es: Conocido por su extrema inteligencia, este Pokémon despreciará a los Entrenadores inexpertos, por lo que es más adecuado para Entrenadores veteranos.
descriptions.it: Noto per la sua intelligenza estrema, questo Pokémon disprezza gli Allenatori inesperti, quindi è più adatto ad Allenatori veterani.
descriptions.ja: ずば抜けた 知能を 持つ ポケモンとして 知られている。 未熟な トレーナーを 見下すので 熟練者向け。
descriptions.ko: 탁월한 지능을 지닌 포켓몬으로 알려져 있다. 미숙한 트레이너를 무시하기 때문에 숙련자에게 적합하다.

name: passimian
description: They form groups of roughly 20 individuals. Their mutual bond is remarkable—they will never let down a comrade.
appearance: White-furred lemur-like Pokemon with black markings on its face and limbs, a green leaf-like helmet, and a large, striped green and white fruit-like object that it carries and throws.

descriptions.fr: Ils forment des groupes d'environ 20 individus. Leur lien mutuel est remarquable – ils ne laisseront jamais tomber un camarade.
descriptions.de: Sie bilden Gruppen von etwa 20 Individuen. Ihre gegenseitige Bindung ist bemerkenswert – sie werden einen Kameraden niemals im Stich lassen.
descriptions.es: Forman grupos de aproximadamente 20 individuos. Su vínculo mutuo es notable: nunca dejarán de lado a un camarada.
descriptions.it: Formano gruppi di circa 20 individui. Il loro legame reciproco è notevole: non lasceranno mai indietro un compagno.
descriptions.ja: ２０匹程度の 群れで 生活する。 仲間との 絆は 固く どんなときでも 見捨てることは ない。
descriptions.ko: 20마리 정도의 무리를 지어 생활한다. 동료와의 유대는 강하여 어떤 때라도 버리지 않는다.

name: wimpod
description: This Pokémon is a coward. As it desperately dashes off, the flailing of its many legs leaves a sparkling clean path in its wake.
appearance: Small, purple and gray arthropod-like Pokemon with a segmented body, six short legs, two long antennae, and large yellow eyes, resembling a trilobite.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est un lâche. Alors qu'il s'enfuit désespérément, le mouvement de ses nombreuses pattes laisse un chemin étincelant de propreté derrière lui.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ist ein Feigling. Während es verzweifelt davonrast, hinterlässt das Schlagen seiner vielen Beine einen funkelnd sauberen Pfad.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon es un cobarde. Mientras se lanza desesperadamente, el aleteo de sus muchas patas deja un camino brillante y limpio a su paso.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è un codardo. Mentre fugge disperatamente, lo sbatacchiare delle sue numerose zampe lascia una scia scintillante e pulita.
descriptions.ja: とても 臆病な ポケモン。 必死に 逃げ去る 際に 無数の 足が 周りの 掃除をしてしまう。
descriptions.ko: 매우 겁쟁이인 포켓몬. 필사적으로 도망칠 때 수많은 다리로 주변을 청소해 버린다.

name: golisopod
description: With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater—or even air—right in two.
appearance: Large, bipedal gray and purple armored arthropod-like Pokemon with sharp claws, a segmented body, and a prominent crest on its head, resembling a samurai beetle.

descriptions.fr: D'un coup fulgurant de ses gigantesques griffes acérées, il fend l'eau de mer, et même l'air, en deux.
descriptions.de: Mit einem blitzschnellen Schlag seiner riesigen, scharfen Klauen spaltet es Meerwasser – oder sogar die Luft – mühelos in zwei Hälften.
descriptions.es: Con un fulminante tajo de sus gigantescas y afiladas garras, es capaz de partir en dos tanto el agua del mar como el aire.
descriptions.it: Con un fendente fulmineo delle sue gigantesche e affilate falci, può fendere in due l'acqua del mare o persino l'aria.
descriptions.ja: 巨大なカマを閃かせ、海水も大気も、目の前のものを真っ二つに叩き斬る。
descriptions.ko: 거대한 낫을 번뜩여 바닷물도 대기도 눈앞에 있는 것을 두 동강으로 갈라버린다.

name: sandygast
description: Born from a sand mound playfully built by a child, this Pokémon embodies the grudges of the departed.
appearance: Small, ghostly pile of sand with two purple eyes and a shovel sticking out of its head, typically a pale sandy yellow color.

descriptions.fr: Né d'un monticule de sable bâti par un enfant, ce Pokémon incarne les rancœurs des défunts.
descriptions.de: Entstand aus einem von einem Kind spielerisch aufgeschütteten Sandhaufen. Es verkörpert den Groll Verstorbener.
descriptions.es: Nace de un montículo de arena construido por un niño. Encarna el resentimiento de los difuntos.
descriptions.it: Nato da un castello di sabbia costruito per gioco da un bambino, questo Pokémon incarna il rancore dei defunti.
descriptions.ja: 子どもの作った砂山から生まれたポケモン。死者の怨念を宿している。
descriptions.ko: 아이들이 쌓은 모래성에서 태어난 포켓몬. 죽은 자의 원한이 깃들어 있다.

name: palossand
description: Possessed people controlled by this Pokémon transformed its sand mound into a castle. As it evolved, its power to curse grew ever stronger.
appearance: Large, ghostly sandcastle-like Pokemon with two purple eyes and a dark gray, gaping maw, a shovel sticking out of its topmost turret, and various small rocks embedded in its sandy yellow body.

descriptions.fr: Les personnes qu'il possède sont contrôlées par lui et transforment son monticule de sable en château. Son pouvoir de malédiction s'est renforcé en évoluant.
descriptions.de: Die Menschen, die es in Besitz nimmt, kontrolliert es und lässt sie seinen Sandhaufen in eine Burg verwandeln. Seine Fluchkraft ist mit der Entwicklung immer stärker geworden.
descriptions.es: Las personas que posee están bajo su control y transforman su montículo de arena en un castillo. Su poder maldito se fortaleció al evolucionar.
descriptions.it: Le persone che possiede sono controllate da esso e trasformano il suo mucchio di sabbia in un castello. Il suo potere maledetto è diventato sempre più forte con l'evoluzione.
descriptions.ja: 憑りつかれた者は、このポケモンに操られ砂山を城に変える。進化して呪いの力は一層強まった。
descriptions.ko: 빙의된 사람은 이 포켓몬에게 조종당해 모래 언덕을 성으로 바꾼다. 진화하면서 저주의 힘이 더욱 강해졌다.

name: pyukumuku
description: It’s covered in a slime that keeps its skin moist, allowing it to stay on land for days without drying up.
appearance: Small, black, spiny sea cucumber-like Pokemon with a white, star-shaped mouth-like structure on its face and a white tail-like appendage, often covered in clear mucus.

descriptions.fr: Il est recouvert d'une bave qui maintient sa peau humide, ce qui lui permet de rester sur terre pendant des jours sans se dessécher.
descriptions.de: Es ist von einem Schleim bedeckt, der seine Haut feucht hält, wodurch es tagelang an Land bleiben kann, ohne auszutrocknen.
descriptions.es: Está cubierto de un moco que mantiene su piel húmeda, permitiéndole permanecer en tierra durante días sin secarse.
descriptions.it: È ricoperto di una melma che mantiene la sua pelle umida, permettendogli di rimanere sulla terraferma per giorni senza seccarsi.
descriptions.ja: 身体はヌメヌメした粘液に覆われているため、陸に上がっても数日間は乾燥せず活動できる。
descriptions.ko: 몸은 미끌미끌한 점액으로 덮여있기 때문에 육지에 올라와도 며칠간은 마르지 않고 활동할 수 있다.

name: type-null
description: The heavy control mask it wears suppresses its intrinsic capabilities. This Pokémon has some hidden special power.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal chimera-like Pokemon with various armored parts in shades of gray, a distinctive gray helmet completely obscuring its head, and sharp red claws.

descriptions.fr: Le lourd masque de contrôle qu'il porte supprime ses capacités intrinsèques. Ce Pokémon possède un pouvoir spécial caché.
descriptions.de: Die schwere Kontrollmaske unterdrückt seine eigentlichen Fähigkeiten. Es verfügt über eine verborgene Spezialkraft.
descriptions.es: La pesada máscara de control que lleva suprime sus capacidades intrínsecas. Este Pokémon posee un poder especial oculto.
descriptions.it: La pesante maschera di controllo che indossa sopprime le sue capacità intrinseche. Questo Pokémon possiede un potere speciale nascosto.
descriptions.ja: 重い制御用の仮面がその秘めた能力を抑えつけている。隠された特殊な力を持っているポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 무거운 제어용 마스크가 숨겨진 능력을 억누르고 있다. 숨겨진 특별한 힘을 지닌 포켓몬이다.

name: silvally
description: Its trust in its partner is what awakens it. This Pokémon is capable of changing its type, a flexibility that is well displayed in battle.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal chimera-like Pokemon with white fur, a sleek head with a prominent mane, and various silver armored parts on its body, featuring a unique fin-like tail.

descriptions.fr: Sa confiance en son partenaire est ce qui l'éveille. Ce Pokémon est capable de changer de type, une flexibilité bien démontrée au combat.
descriptions.de: Es erwacht durch das Vertrauen zu seinem Partner. Dieses Pokémon kann seinen Typ ändern, eine Flexibilität, die es im Kampf gut unter Beweis stellt.
descriptions.es: La confianza en su compañero es lo que lo despierta. Este Pokémon es capaz de cambiar su tipo, una flexibilidad que se manifiesta bien en el combate.
descriptions.it: La fiducia nel suo partner è ciò che lo risveglia. Questo Pokémon è in grado di cambiare il suo tipo, una flessibilità ben mostrata in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: パートナーへの信頼が目覚めさせる。タイプを変化させることが可能で、バトルでその柔軟性を発揮する。
descriptions.ko: 파트너에 대한 신뢰가 눈뜨게 한다. 타입을 변화시킬 수 있으며 배틀에서 그 유연성을 발휘한다.

name: minior-red-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: Small, spherical, dark red rocky meteor shell with a prominent star-shaped core visible through an opening, featuring a small black eye.

descriptions.fr: Habitant à l'origine dans la couche d'ozone, il tombe au sol lorsque la coquille qui entoure son corps devient trop lourde.
descriptions.de: Ursprünglich in der Ozonschicht beheimatet, stürzt es zur Erde, wenn die Schale, die seinen Körper umschließt, zu schwer wird.
descriptions.es: Originalmente habitando en la capa de ozono, se precipita al suelo cuando la cáscara que encierra su cuerpo se vuelve demasiado pesada.
descriptions.it: Originariamente dimorava nello strato di ozono. Si precipita a terra quando il guscio che racchiude il suo corpo diventa troppo pesante.
descriptions.ja: もともとオゾン層に住んでいたが、体を覆う殻が重くなりすぎると地上へと落下する。
descriptions.ko: 본래 오존층에 살았지만 몸을 덮은 껍질이 너무 무거워지면 지상으로 낙하한다.

display_names.ja: メテノ (メテオフォルム)

name: komala
description: It is born asleep, and it dies asleep. All its movements are apparently no more than the results of it tossing and turning in its dreams.
appearance: Small, white koala-like Pokemon perpetually asleep, clutching a log, with light gray fur on its ears and a faint pink blush on its cheeks.

descriptions.fr: Il naît endormi et meurt endormi. Tous ses mouvements ne sont apparemment que le résultat de ses agitations dans ses rêves.
descriptions.de: Es wird schlafend geboren und stirbt schlafend. Alle seine Bewegungen sind anscheinend nichts weiter als das Ergebnis seines Träumens und Wälzens.
descriptions.es: Nace dormido y muere dormido. Todos sus movimientos son aparentemente el resultado de sus sueños y giros en el sueño.
descriptions.it: Nasce e muore nel sonno. Tutti i suoi movimenti sono apparentemente solo il risultato del suo agitarsi nei sogni.
descriptions.ja: 眠ったまま生まれ、眠ったまま一生を終える。すべての行動は寝言や寝相によるものらしい。
descriptions.ko: 잠든 채 태어나 잠든 채 일생을 마친다. 모든 행동은 잠꼬대나 잠버릇에 의한 것으로 보인다.

name: turtonator
description: The shell on its back is chemically unstable and explodes violently if struck. The hole in its stomach is its weak point.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal tortoise-like Pokemon with a red and orange explosive-looking shell on its back, a gray body, and a long tail.

descriptions.fr: La carapace sur son dos est chimiquement instable et explose violemment si elle est frappée. Le trou dans son ventre est son point faible.
descriptions.de: Der Panzer auf seinem Rücken ist chemisch instabil und explodiert heftig, wenn er getroffen wird. Das Loch in seinem Bauch ist seine Schwachstelle.
descriptions.es: La cáscara de su espalda es químicamente inestable y explota violentamente si es golpeada. El agujero en su estómago es su punto débil.
descriptions.it: Il guscio sulla sua schiena è chimicamente instabile ed esplode violentemente se colpito. Il foro sul suo stomaco è il suo punto debole.
descriptions.ja: 背中の甲羅は化学的に不安定で、衝撃を受けると激しく爆発する。お腹の穴が弱点。
descriptions.ko: 등껍질은 화학적으로 불안정해서 충격을 받으면 격렬하게 폭발한다. 배의 구멍이 약점이다.

name: togedemaru
description: The spiny fur on its back is normally at rest. When this Pokémon becomes agitated, its fur stands on end and stabs into its attackers.
appearance: Small, spherical gray rodent with a white belly, a spiny yellow 'tail' on its back that resembles a lightning bolt, and small, rounded ears.

descriptions.fr: La fourrure épineuse sur son dos est normalement au repos. Lorsque ce Pokémon s'agite, sa fourrure se dresse et poignarde ses agresseurs.
descriptions.de: Das stachelige Fell auf seinem Rücken ruht normalerweise. Wenn dieses Pokémon erregt wird, stellt sich sein Fell auf und sticht in seine Angreifer.
descriptions.es: El pelaje espinoso de su espalda está normalmente en reposo. Cuando este Pokémon se agita, su pelaje se eriza y apuñala a sus atacantes.
descriptions.it: La pelliccia spinosa sulla sua schiena è normalmente a riposo. Quando questo Pokémon si agita, la sua pelliccia si raddrizza e pugnala i suoi aggressori.
descriptions.ja: 背中の針毛は普段は寝ているが、興奮すると逆立ち、襲いかかってきた相手に突き刺さる。
descriptions.ko: 등 뒤의 가시털은 평소에는 누워 있지만 흥분하면 솟아올라 덮쳐든 상대를 꿰뚫는다.

name: mimikyu-disguised
description: Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.
appearance: Small, ghost-like Pokemon concealed under a crudely drawn Pikachu-like disguise, consisting of a brown cloth body, black-tipped ears, and two black eyeholes with a drawn red cheek circle.

descriptions.fr: Son véritable aspect est inconnu. Un chercheur qui a vu ce qui se cachait sous son déguisement a été terrifié et est mort du choc.
descriptions.de: Sein wahres Aussehen ist unbekannt. Ein Forscher, der sah, was sich unter seinem Fetzen verbarg, wurde von Entsetzen überwältigt und starb am Schock.
descriptions.es: Su verdadera apariencia es un misterio. Un investigador que vio lo que se escondía bajo su disfraz murió de terror y shock.
descriptions.it: Il suo vero aspetto è sconosciuto. Uno studioso che vide cosa si celava sotto il suo straccio fu sopraffatto dal terrore e morì per lo shock.
descriptions.ja: その正体は謎に包まれている。布の中を見た学者は恐怖のあまりショック死したと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 실제 모습은 알려져 있지 않다. 천을 들춰 본 학자는 공포에 질려 쇼크사했다고 전해진다.

display_names.ja: ミミッキュ (ばけたすがた)

name: bruxish
description: When it unleashes its psychic power from the protuberance on its head, the grating sound of grinding teeth echoes through the area.
appearance: Colorful fish-like Pokemon with a bright pink and purple striped body, yellow fins, a prominent pink 'flower' on its forehead, and large, white teeth.

descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'il libère son pouvoir psychique depuis l'excroissance sur sa tête, un son de grincement de dents résonne dans la zone.
descriptions.de: Entfesselt es seine Psycho-Kräfte aus dem Auswuchs auf seinem Kopf, hallt ein widerliches Zähneknirschen durch die Gegend.
descriptions.es: Cuando libera su poder psíquico desde la protuberancia de su cabeza, un chirriante sonido de dientes rechina por toda la zona.
descriptions.it: Quando sprigiona il suo potere psichico dalla protuberanza sulla testa, un suono stridente di denti che digrignano risuona nell'area.
descriptions.ja: 頭のコブからサイコパワーを放出するときに響く歯ぎしりのような不快な音は広範囲にわたる。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 돌기에서 사이코 파워를 뿜을 때 이빨을 가는 듯한 불쾌한 소리가 울려 퍼진다.

name: drampa
description: It has a compassionate personality, but if it is angered, it completely destroys its surroundings with its intense breath.
appearance: Large, green serpentine dragon with a long, flowing white beard and eyebrows, a prominent pink nose, and a long tail with a white, cloud-like tip.

descriptions.fr: Il a une personnalité compatissante, mais s'il est en colère, il détruit complètement son environnement avec son souffle intense.
descriptions.de: Es hat eine mitfühlende Persönlichkeit, doch wenn es wütend wird, zerstört es mit seinem intensiven Atemzug die gesamte Umgebung.
descriptions.es: Posee una personalidad compasiva, pero si se enfurece, destruye por completo su entorno con su intenso aliento.
descriptions.it: Ha una personalità compassionevole, ma se si arrabbia, distrugge completamente l'ambiente circostante con il suo respiro intenso.
descriptions.ja: 慈愛に満ちた性格だが、怒らせると激しいブレスで周囲を破壊し尽くす。
descriptions.ko: 자비심이 넘치는 성격이지만 화나게 만들면 맹렬한 브레스로 주변을 완전히 파괴한다.

name: dhelmise
description: Swinging its massive anchor, it can KO Wailord in a single blow. What appears to be green seaweed is actually its body.
appearance: A dark green kelp creature intertwined with a large, dark grey anchor featuring rust-red accents, and a dark brown wooden steering wheel with a bright green central eye.

descriptions.fr: En balançant son ancre massive, il peut mettre KO un Wailord en un seul coup. Ce qui semble être une algue verte est en réalité son corps.
descriptions.de: Schwingt es seinen riesigen Anker, kann es Wailord mit einem einzigen Schlag kampfunfähig machen. Die grüne Seetang-ähnliche Substanz ist sein eigentlicher Körper.
descriptions.es: Balanceando su ancla masiva, puede noquear a Wailord de un solo golpe. Lo que parece ser algas verdes es en realidad su cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Agitando la sua massiccia ancora, può mettere KO un Wailord in un solo colpo. Quella che sembra un'alga verde è in realtà il suo corpo.
descriptions.ja: 巨大なイカリを振り回せばホエルオーも一撃でノックアウト。緑色の海藻に見える部分が本体である。
descriptions.ko: 거대한 닻을 휘두르면 고래왕도 일격에 쓰러뜨린다. 녹색 해초처럼 보이는 부분이 본체다.

name: jangmo-o
description: It expresses its feelings by smacking its scales. Metallic sounds echo through the tall mountains where Jangmo-o lives.
appearance: A small, bipedal, scaly grey dragon with a pale yellow belly, a distinctive gold heart-shaped scale on its forehead, and a white fur ruff around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Il exprime ses sentiments en claquant ses écailles. Des sons métalliques résonnent à travers les hautes montagnes où vit Bébécaille.
descriptions.de: Es drückt seine Gefühle aus, indem es seine Schuppen aneinanderschlägt. Metallische Geräusche hallen durch die hohen Berge, in denen Miniras lebt.
descriptions.es: Expresa sus sentimientos golpeando sus escamas. Sonidos metálicos resuenan por las altas montañas donde vive Jangmo-o.
descriptions.it: Esprime i suoi sentimenti sbattendo le sue squame. Suoni metallici echeggiano tra le alte montagne dove vive Jangmo-o.
descriptions.ja: 鱗を打ち付けて気持ちを表現する。ジャラコが生息する険しい山には金属音が響く。
descriptions.ko: 비늘을 부딪쳐 감정을 표현한다. 짜랑꼬가 서식하는 험한 산에는 금속음이 울려 퍼진다.

name: hakamo-o
description: It leaps at its prey with a courageous shout. Its scaly punches tear its opponents to shreds.
appearance: A larger, bipedal dragon covered in dark grey scales with a lighter grey underbelly, a gold heart-shaped forehead scale, and prominent grey armor-like scales on its limbs, all framed by a spiked white fur collar.

descriptions.fr: Il saute sur sa proie avec un cri courageux. Ses coups de poing écailleux déchirent ses adversaires en lambeaux.
descriptions.de: Es stürzt sich mit einem mutigen Schrei auf seine Beute. Seine schuppigen Schläge zerreißen Gegner in Stücke.
descriptions.es: Se abalanza sobre su presa con un grito valiente. Sus puñetazos escamosos destrozan a sus oponentes.
descriptions.it: Si avventa sulla preda con un grido coraggioso. I suoi pugni squamosi riducono a brandelli gli avversari.
descriptions.ja: 勇敢な雄叫びを上げながら獲物に飛びかかる。鱗に覆われたパンチは相手を粉砕する。
descriptions.ko: 용감한 우렁찬 소리와 함께 먹잇감에게 덤벼든다. 비늘로 뒤덮인 펀치는 상대를 산산조각 낸다.

name: kommo-o
description: When it spots enemies, it threatens them by jingling the scales on its tail. Weak opponents will crack and flee in panic.
appearance: A large, powerfully built bipedal dragon with a dark grey body, light grey underbelly, a prominent gold heart-shaped scale on its forehead, and heavy grey and black armor-like scales on its limbs and tail, complemented by a large, spiked white fur collar.

descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'il repère des ennemis, il les menace en faisant tinter les écailles de sa queue. Les adversaires faibles se fissurent et fuient en panique.
descriptions.de: Erblickt es Feinde, droht es ihnen, indem es die Schuppen seines Schweifes klappern lässt. Schwache Gegner zerbrechen und fliehen in Panik.
descriptions.es: Cuando avista enemigos, los amenaza haciendo tintinear las escamas de su cola. Los oponentes débiles se quiebran y huyen en pánico.
descriptions.it: Quando avvista nemici, li minaccia facendo tintinnare le squame sulla coda. Gli avversari deboli cedono e fuggono nel panico.
descriptions.ja: 敵を見つけると尻尾の鱗を打ち鳴らして威嚇する。臆病な相手は戦意を喪失して逃げ出す。
descriptions.ko: 적을 발견하면 꼬리 비늘을 울려 위협한다. 겁쟁이인 상대는 싸울 의지를 잃고 도망친다.

name: tapu-koko
description: This guardian deity of Melemele is brimming with curiosity. It summons thunderclouds and stores their lightning inside its body.
appearance: An avian-like bipedal guardian deity with a black body, yellow markings, and large yellow shell-like arm structures that form a bird mask when closed, topped with an orange-tipped feathered crest.
