descriptions.fr: Ce dieu gardien de Mele-Mele déborde de curiosité. Il invoque des nuages d'orage et stocke leur foudre à l'intérieur de son corps.
descriptions.de: Dieser Schutzpatron von Mele-Mele ist von Neugier erfüllt. Es beschwört Gewitterwolken und speichert ihren Blitz in seinem Körper.
descriptions.es: Este dios guardián de Melemele rebosa curiosidad. Invoca nubes de tormenta y almacena sus rayos dentro de su cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Questa divinità tutelare di Mele-Mele è piena di curiosità. Evoca nubi temporalesche e immagazzina i fulmini all'interno del suo corpo.
descriptions.ja: メレメレの守り神。好奇心旺盛で雷雲を呼び、その雷を体内に蓄える。
descriptions.ko: 멜레멜레섬의 수호신. 호기심이 왕성하며 천둥구름을 불러 그 번개를 몸에 모은다.

name: tapu-lele
description: This guardian deity of Akala is guilelessly cruel. The fragrant aroma of flowers is the source of its energy.
appearance: A small, pink and white bipedal guardian deity with delicate white arms and a large, intricately patterned pink and white shell that closes to resemble butterfly wings, featuring a pink horn and a white plume on its head.

descriptions.fr: Cette divinité gardienne d'Akala est d'une cruauté innocente. Le parfum aromatique des fleurs est la source de son énergie.
descriptions.de: Dieser Schutzpatron von Akala ist arglos grausam. Der duftende Geruch von Blumen ist die Quelle seiner Energie.
descriptions.es: Esta deidad guardiana de Akala es cruelmente inocente. El fragante aroma de las flores es la fuente de su energía.
descriptions.it: Questa divinità tutelare di Akala è ingenuamente crudele. Il profumo fragrante dei fiori è la fonte della sua energia.
descriptions.ja: アローラ地方の守り神の１匹。無邪気で残酷な性質を持つ。花の香りがエネルギー源。
descriptions.ko: 아칼라섬의 수호신. 순진하고 잔혹한 성질을 가지고 있다. 꽃향기가 에너지의 원천이다.

name: tapu-bulu
description: It pulls large trees up by the roots and swings them around. It causes vegetation to grow, and then it absorbs energy from the growth.
appearance: A large, bovine-like guardian deity with a red body, a white underbelly, and large, carved brown shell-like structures on its arms that form a bull's head mask when closed, finished with a leafy green tail and two golden horn rings.

descriptions.fr: Il déracine de grands arbres et les balance. Il fait pousser la végétation, puis absorbe l'énergie de cette croissance.
descriptions.de: Es reißt große Bäume mitsamt Wurzeln aus und schwingt sie herum. Es lässt Pflanzen wachsen und absorbiert dann die Energie dieses Wachstums.
descriptions.es: Arranca grandes árboles de raíz y los balancea. Hace crecer la vegetación y luego absorbe la energía de ese crecimiento.
descriptions.it: Sradica grandi alberi e li brandisce. Fa crescere la vegetazione e poi assorbe energia da questa crescita.
descriptions.ja: 大木を根っこから引き抜き振り回す。草木を成長させ、その生長した草木のエネルギーを吸収する。
descriptions.ko: 큰 나무를 뿌리째 뽑아 휘두른다. 풀과 나무를 자라게 하여 그 성장에서 에너지를 흡수한다.

name: tapu-fini
description: The dense fog it creates brings the downfall and destruction of its confused enemies. Ocean currents are the source of its energy.
appearance: A mermaid-like guardian deity with a white body, light blue fin-like appendages, and a large, dark blue shell with white wave patterns that forms a fish-like mask when closed, featuring a white, flowing headpiece.

descriptions.fr: La brume dense qu'il crée provoque la chute et la destruction de ses ennemis désorientés. Les courants marins sont la source de son énergie.
descriptions.de: Der dichte Nebel, den es erzeugt, führt zum Niedergang und zur Zerstörung seiner verwirrten Feinde. Meeresströmungen sind die Quelle seiner Energie.
descriptions.es: La densa niebla que crea provoca la caída y destrucción de sus enemigos confundidos. Las corrientes oceánicas son la fuente de su energía.
descriptions.it: La fitta nebbia che crea porta alla rovina e alla distruzione dei suoi nemici confusi. Le correnti oceaniche sono la fonte della sua energia.
descriptions.ja: 発生させた濃い霧が、混乱した敵を破滅へと導く。海の流れがエネルギー源だ。
descriptions.ko: 짙은 안개를 발생시켜 혼란에 빠진 적을 파멸로 이끈다. 해류가 에너지원이다.

name: cosmog
description: Its body is gaseous and frail. It slowly grows as it collects dust from the atmosphere.
appearance: A tiny, nebulous Pokemon resembling a floating blue cloud with gold star-like patterns and two small gold antenna, featuring large, dark blue eyes with white pupils.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est gazeux et fragile. Il grandit lentement en collectant la poussière de l'atmosphère.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper ist gasförmig und zerbrechlich. Es wächst langsam, indem es Staub aus der Atmosphäre sammelt.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo es gaseoso y frágil. Crece lentamente mientras recoge polvo de la atmósfera.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo è gassoso e fragile. Cresce lentamente raccogliendo la polvere dall'atmosfera.
descriptions.ja: 体はガス状でとてももろい。大気中の塵を集めながらゆっくりと成長する。
descriptions.ko: 몸은 가스 형태로 매우 약하다. 대기 중의 먼지를 모으면서 천천히 성장한다.

name: cosmoem
description: Motionless as if dead, its body is faintly warm to the touch. In the distant past, it was called the cocoon of the stars.
appearance: A small, metallic gold, spherical Pokemon encased in a dark blue, ringed shell resembling a celestial body, with several gold spikes and a single large, dark blue eye on its front.

descriptions.fr: Immobile comme mort, son corps est légèrement chaud au toucher. Dans un passé lointain, on l'appelait le cocon des étoiles.
descriptions.de: Regungslos wie tot, ist sein Körper bei Berührung leicht warm. In ferner Vergangenheit wurde es der Kokon der Sterne genannt.
descriptions.es: Inmóvil como si estuviera muerto, su cuerpo es ligeramente cálido al tacto. En el pasado distante, se le llamaba el capullo de las estrellas.
descriptions.it: Immobile come fosse morto, il suo corpo è leggermente caldo al tatto. Nel lontano passato, era chiamato il bozzolo delle stelle.
descriptions.ja: 死んだように動かないが体はほんのり温かい。遠い昔は星の繭と呼ばれていた。
descriptions.ko: 죽은 것처럼 움직이지 않지만 몸은 살짝 따뜻하다. 먼 옛날에는 별의 고치라 불렸다.

name: solgaleo
description: It is said to live in another world. The intense light it radiates from the surface of its body can make the darkest of nights light up like midday.
appearance: A large, leonine Pokemon with a white body, a powerful mane resembling a stylized sun, and a blue celestial pattern on its forehead and paws, accented with gold around its face and feet.

descriptions.fr: On dit qu'il vit dans un autre monde. La lumière intense qu'il rayonne de la surface de son corps peut illuminer les nuits les plus sombres comme en plein jour.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, es lebe in einer anderen Welt. Das intensive Licht, das es von seiner Körperoberfläche ausstrahlt, kann die dunkelste Nacht wie den Mittag erhellen.
descriptions.es: Se dice que vive en otro mundo. La intensa luz que irradia desde la superficie de su cuerpo puede iluminar las noches más oscuras como si fuera mediodía.
descriptions.it: Si dice che viva in un altro mondo. L'intensa luce che irradia dalla superficie del suo corpo può illuminare le notti più buie come fosse mezzogiorno.
descriptions.ja: 別の世界に棲むといわれる。体から放たれるまばゆい光はどんな闇夜も真昼のように照らす。
descriptions.ko: 다른 세계에 산다고 전해진다. 몸에서 내뿜는 눈부신 빛은 어떤 한밤중도 대낮처럼 환히 비춘다.

name: lunala
description: It is said to be a female evolution of Cosmog. When its third eye activates, away it flies to another world.
appearance: A large, skeletal bat-like Pokemon, primarily dark purple with white bone-like structures, glowing yellow eyes, and a large, crescent moon shape on its chest with a flowing, star-filled wing pattern.

descriptions.fr: On dit que c'est une évolution féminine de Cosmog. Lorsque son troisième œil s'active, il s'envole vers un autre monde.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, es sei eine weibliche Entwicklung von Cosmog. Wenn sein drittes Auge aktiviert wird, fliegt es in eine andere Welt.
descriptions.es: Se dice que es una evolución femenina de Cosmog. Cuando su tercer ojo se activa, vuela a otro mundo.
descriptions.it: Si dice che sia un'evoluzione femminile di Cosmog. Quando il suo terzo occhio si attiva, vola via in un altro mondo.
descriptions.ja: コスモッグの雌が進化した姿といわれる。第３の目が開くと別の世界へ飛び去る。
descriptions.ko: 코스모그의 암컷이 진화한 모습이라고 전해진다. 제3의 눈을 뜨면 다른 세계로 날아간다.

name: nihilego
description: One of several mysterious Ultra Beasts. People on the street report observing those infested by it suddenly becoming violent.
appearance: An ethereal, jellyfish-like Ultra Beast with a translucent, bell-shaped head and long, ribbon-like tentacles, all primarily white with light blue and black internal patterns resembling a nebula, and a small, white human-like figure at its core.

descriptions.fr: L'une des mystérieuses Ultra-Chimères. Des gens dans la rue rapportent avoir observé que ceux infestés par lui devenaient soudainement violents.
descriptions.de: Eine der mehreren mysteriösen Ultrabestien. Berichten zufolge werden von ihm befallene Menschen auf der Straße plötzlich gewalttätig.
descriptions.es: Una de varias misteriosas Ultraentes. La gente en la calle reporta haber observado que aquellos infestados por ella se vuelven repentinamente violentos.
descriptions.it: Una delle misteriose Ultracreature. Le persone riferiscono di aver visto coloro che ne sono infestati diventare improvvisamente violenti.
descriptions.ja: 何匹かいる謎のウルトラビーストの１匹。これに寄生された人間が突然凶暴になったと街で騒がれている。
descriptions.ko: 여러 마리 있는 수수께끼의 울트라비스트 중 하나. 이 기생당한 사람이 갑자기 흉포해졌다고 거리에서 소문이 돈다.

name: buzzwole
description: This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear.
appearance: A large, muscular, humanoid insectoid Ultra Beast with a primarily red body, white muscle-like structures, prominent, veiny, red and black arms, and a small black head with two red eyes and a proboscis.

descriptions.fr: Cette Ultra-Chimère est apparue d'un autre monde. Elle exhibe son corps, mais il est incertain si cet étalage est une vantardise ou une menace.
descriptions.de: Diese Ultrabestie erschien aus einer anderen Welt. Es stellt seinen Körper zur Schau, doch ob diese Zurschaustellung eine Prahlerei oder eine Drohung ist, bleibt unklar.
descriptions.es: Esta Ultraente apareció de otro mundo. Muestra su cuerpo, pero no está claro si esa exhibición es una fanfarronada o una amenaza.
descriptions.it: Questa Ultracreatura è apparsa da un altro mondo. Sfoggia il suo corpo, ma non è chiaro se tale esibizione sia una vanteria o una minaccia.
descriptions.ja: 別の世界から現れたウルトラビースト。肉体美を見せびらかしているがそれが威嚇なのか自慢なのかは不明。
descriptions.ko: 다른 세계에서 나타난 울트라비스트. 육체미를 자랑하고 있지만 그게 위협인지 자랑인지는 알 수 없다.

name: pheromosa
description: One of the dangerous Ultra Beasts, it has been spotted running across the land at terrific speeds.
appearance: A slender, elegant, humanoid insectoid Ultra Beast with a delicate, white, porcelain-like body, extremely long limbs, and flowing white antennae and hair-like structures.

descriptions.fr: L'une des dangereuses Ultra-Chimères, elle a été aperçue traversant la terre à des vitesses terrifiantes.
descriptions.de: Eine der gefährlichen Ultrabestien, sie wurde beobachtet, wie sie mit schrecklicher Geschwindigkeit über das Land rannte.
descriptions.es: Una de las peligrosas Ultraentes, ha sido avistada corriendo por la tierra a velocidades terribles.
descriptions.it: Una delle pericolose Ultracreature, è stata avvistata mentre correva sulla terra a velocità terrificanti.
descriptions.ja: 危険なウルトラビーストの１匹。恐ろしい速さで大地を走り抜ける姿が目撃されている。
descriptions.ko: 위험한 울트라비스트 중 하나. 엄청난 속도로 대지를 달려 나가는 모습이 목격된다.

name: xurkitree
description: One of the mysterious life-forms known as Ultra Beasts. Astonishing electric shocks emanate from its entire body, according to witnesses.
appearance: A tall, humanoid Ultra Beast made entirely of black and white electrical cables, resembling a stylized Christmas tree, with a white 'head' featuring a black spike and two yellow star-like 'eyes.'

descriptions.fr: L'une des formes de vie mystérieuses connues sous le nom d'Ultra-Chimères. Des décharges électriques étonnantes émanent de tout son corps, selon des témoins.
descriptions.de: Eine der mysteriösen Lebensformen, bekannt als Ultrabestien. Zeugenberichten zufolge gehen erstaunliche elektrische Schläge von seinem ganzen Körper aus.
descriptions.es: Una de las misteriosas formas de vida conocidas como Ultraentes. Según testigos, sorprendentes descargas eléctricas emanan de todo su cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Una delle misteriose forme di vita conosciute come Ultracreature. Secondo i testimoni, sorprendenti scosse elettriche emanano da tutto il suo corpo.
descriptions.ja: ウルトラビーストと呼ばれる謎の生命体の１匹。目撃者の証言によると全身からすさまじい電撃を発している。
descriptions.ko: 울트라비스트라 불리는 수수께끼의 생명체 중 하나. 목격자의 증언에 따르면 온몸에서 굉장한 전격을 내뿜고 있다.

name: celesteela
description: It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. Witnesses observed it flying across the sky at high speed.
appearance: A massive, humanoid Ultra Beast resembling a rocket, with a tall, grey metallic body, long, segmented arms and legs, large, bamboo-like green structures on its head, and jet thrusters on its lower body.

descriptions.fr: Il est apparu du Ultra-Dimension Zero. Des témoins l'ont observé volant à grande vitesse dans le ciel.
descriptions.de: Es erschien aus dem Ultraloop. Zeugen beobachteten, wie es mit hoher Geschwindigkeit am Himmel flog.
descriptions.es: Apareció del Ultraumbral. Testigos lo observaron volando por el cielo a gran velocidad.
descriptions.it: È apparso dall'Ultravuoto. I testimoni lo hanno osservato volare nel cielo ad alta velocità.
descriptions.ja: ウルトラホールから現れた。目撃者は高速で空を飛ぶ姿を確認している。
descriptions.ko: 울트라홀에서 나타났다. 목격자는 고속으로 하늘을 나는 모습을 확인했다.

name: kartana
description: This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself.
appearance: A small, origami-like Ultra Beast, predominantly white with sharp, yellow-tipped edges, resembling a folded paper figure, with a small, red eye on its central body and sharp, sword-like arms.

descriptions.fr: Cette Ultra-Chimère est apparue par une Ultra-Brèche. Elle ne semble pas attaquer d'elle-même, mais son corps aiguisé est une arme dangereuse en soi.
descriptions.de: Diese Ultrabestie ist durch eine Ultrapforte hierhergelangt. Sie scheint Gegner nicht von selbst anzugreifen, doch ihr scharfer Körper ist bereits eine gefährliche Waffe.
descriptions.es: Esta Ultraente llegó de un Ultraumbral. No parece atacar por sí misma, pero su cuerpo afilado es ya de por sí un arma muy peligrosa.
descriptions.it: Questa Ultracreatura è giunta da un Ultravarco. Non sembra attaccare di propria iniziativa, ma il suo corpo affilato è già di per sé un'arma pericolosa.
descriptions.ja: ウルトラホールから現れたウルトラビースト。自ら攻撃することはないが鋭利な体はそれだけで危険な武器となる。
descriptions.ko: 울트라홀에서 나타난 울트라비스트. 스스로 공격하지 않는 듯하나 예리한 몸 그 자체가 위험한 무기이다.

name: guzzlord
description: It has gobbled mountains and swallowed whole buildings, according to reports. It’s one of the Ultra Beasts.
appearance: A massive, gluttonous Ultra Beast with a mostly black, globular body, a huge mouth lined with several sharp teeth and a 'chin' made of white plates, yellow eyes, a long blue tongue, and small, stumpy grey limbs.

descriptions.fr: Selon les rapports, elle aurait englouti des montagnes et des bâtiments entiers. C'est l'une des Ultra-Chimères.
descriptions.de: Berichten zufolge soll diese Ultrabestie ganze Berge verschlungen und komplette Gebäude hinuntergeschluckt haben.
descriptions.es: Según los informes, ha engullido montañas enteras y edificios. Es una de las Ultraentes.
descriptions.it: Secondo alcuni rapporti, ha ingoiato montagne e interi edifici. È una delle Ultracreature.
descriptions.ja: 報告によると山を丸ごと食べたりビルを飲み込んだりしたという。ウルトラビーストの一種。
descriptions.ko: 보고에 따르면 산을 통째로 먹거나 건물을 삼켰다고 한다. 울트라비스트 중 하나다.

name: necrozma
description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.
appearance: A crystalline, black humanoid Ultra Beast with sharp, angular limbs and a head resembling a dark prism, whose body features glowing multi-colored light patterns within its dark crystal structure and a single large triangular 'eye.'

descriptions.fr: Cette forme de vie, rappelant les Ultra-Chimères, semble dormir sous terre. On pense qu'elle serait venue d'un autre monde dans les temps anciens.
descriptions.de: Dieses Lebenswesen, das an Ultrabestien erinnert und unter der Erde zu schlafen scheint, soll in alten Zeiten aus einer anderen Welt gekommen sein.
descriptions.es: Esta forma de vida, que recuerda a las Ultraentes y parece dormir bajo tierra, se cree que vino de otro mundo en la antigüedad.
descriptions.it: Questa forma di vita, che ricorda le Ultracreature e sembra dormire sottoterra, si pensa sia giunta da un altro mondo in tempi antichi.
descriptions.ja: ウルトラビーストを思わせる生命体。地底で眠っていたらしいが太古の昔、別の世界から来たとされる。
descriptions.ko: 울트라비스트를 떠올리게 하는 생명체. 지하에서 잠들어 있었던 듯하며 태고적 먼 옛날 다른 세계에서 왔다고 여겨진다.

name: magearna
description: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.
appearance: A bipedal, mechanical doll-like Pokemon with a metallic, silver body, a large, round, intricate 'Soul-Heart' core on its chest, a gear-like head with pink ears, a large white frill, and a detailed dress-like lower body with red and gold accents.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon artificiel, construit il y a plus de 500 ans, comprend le langage humain mais ne peut pas parler.
descriptions.de: Dieses vor über 500 Jahren erbaute künstliche Pokémon kann die menschliche Sprache verstehen, aber selbst nicht sprechen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon artificial, construido hace más de 500 años, puede entender el habla humana, pero no puede hablar por sí mismo.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon artificiale, costruito più di 500 anni fa, è in grado di capire il linguaggio umano ma non può parlare.
descriptions.ja: ５００年以上前に造られた人工のポケモン。人の言葉を理解するが自分から話すことはできない。
descriptions.ko: 500년 이상 전에 만들어진 인공 포켓몬. 사람의 말을 이해하지만 스스로는 말할 수 없다.

name: marshadow
description: Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth.
appearance: A small, shadowy, humanoid Pokemon with a dark grey body, green eyes, and fiery green head crests and arm markings that appear when agitated, giving it a slender, wispy appearance.

descriptions.fr: Capable de se dissimuler dans les ombres, il n'apparaît jamais devant les humains, et son existence même relevait du mythe.
descriptions.de: Es kann sich in Schatten verbergen und erscheint nie vor Menschen. Seine Existenz war daher ein Mythos.
descriptions.es: Capaz de ocultarse en las sombras, nunca aparece ante los humanos, por lo que su existencia era solo un mito.
descriptions.it: Capace di celarsi tra le ombre, non appare mai dinanzi agli umani, cosicché la sua stessa esistenza era considerata un mito.
descriptions.ja: 影に潜むことができるため人前に姿を現さない。その存在は神話のたぐいとされてきた。
descriptions.ko: 그림자에 숨을 수 있어 사람들 앞에 나타나지 않는다. 그 존재는 신화 속 이야기로 전해져 왔다.

name: poipole
description: This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.
appearance: A small, purple, alien-like Pokemon with a single large, cyan eye and a head shaped like a syringe, complete with a white needle-like horn, small stubby limbs, and a translucent belly.

descriptions.fr: Cette Ultra-Chimère est si appréciée qu'elle est choisie comme premier partenaire dans son monde.
descriptions.de: Diese Ultrabestie ist in ihrer eigenen Welt so beliebt, dass sie als Erstpartner-Pokémon gewählt wird.
descriptions.es: Esta Ultraente es tan querida que en su mundo natal se la elige como primer compañero.
descriptions.it: Questa Ultracreatura è così benvoluta che nel suo mondo d'origine viene scelta come primo compagno.
descriptions.ja: 自身の世界では最初のパートナーに選ばれるほど人懐っこいウルトラビースト。
descriptions.ko: 자신의 세계에서는 최초의 파트너로 선택될 정도로 붙임성 있는 울트라비스트.

name: naganadel
description: It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It is one of the organisms known as UBs.
appearance: A large, dragon-like Ultra Beast with a primarily purple body, a long, slender neck, large, bat-like wings with purple membranes, a distinctive white and yellow 'needle' horn on its head, and a light grey belly.

descriptions.fr: Elle stocke des centaines de litres de liquide toxique dans son corps. C'est l'un des organismes connus sous le nom d'UC.
descriptions.de: Es speichert Hunderte Liter giftiger Flüssigkeit in seinem Körper. Es ist eine der als UB bekannten Lebensformen.
descriptions.es: Almacena cientos de litros de líquido venenoso en su cuerpo. Es uno de los organismos conocidos como Ultraentes.
descriptions.it: Immagazzina centinaia di litri di liquido velenoso all'interno del suo corpo. È uno degli organismi noti come UC.
descriptions.ja: 体内に数百リットルもの毒液を貯蔵する。ＵＢと総称される生命体の一種。
descriptions.ko: 체내에 수백 리터의 독액을 저장한다. UB라 불리는 생명체 중 하나다.

name: stakataka
description: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other.
appearance: A massive, block-like Ultra Beast composed of multiple grey stone bricks stacked together, featuring four small, glowing blue eyes on its front face, with its limbs also formed from movable brick stacks.

descriptions.fr: Il est apparu par une Ultra-Brèche. Chaque spécimen semble être constitué de plusieurs formes de vie empilées les unes sur les autres.
descriptions.de: Es erschien aus einer Ultrapforte. Jedes Exemplar scheint aus vielen übereinander gestapelten Lebensformen zu bestehen.
descriptions.es: Apareció de un Ultraumbral. Cada uno parece estar compuesto de muchas formas de vida apiladas una encima de otra.
descriptions.it: È apparso da un Ultravarco. Ogni esemplare sembra essere formato da molteplici forme di vita impilate l'una sull'altra.
descriptions.ja: ウルトラホールから現れた。それぞれが複数の生命体が重なり合ってできているようだ。
descriptions.ko: 울트라홀에서 나타났다. 각각의 개체는 여러 생명체가 겹겹이 쌓여 이루어져 있는 듯하다.

name: blacephalon
description: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It’s apparently one kind of Ultra Beast.
appearance: A humanoid Ultra Beast with a slender, white body and long, thin limbs, notable for its large, spherical, multicolored head resembling a disco ball, which displays various bright, vibrant colors.

descriptions.fr: Il se faufile vers les gens. Puis, sans prévenir, il déclenche l'explosion de sa propre tête. C'est apparemment une sorte d'Ultra-Chimère.
descriptions.de: Es gleitet auf Menschen zu und lässt dann ohne Vorwarnung den eigenen Kopf explodieren. Es ist anscheinend eine Art Ultrabestie.
descriptions.es: Se desliza hacia la gente. Luego, sin previo aviso, provoca la explosión de su propia cabeza. Aparentemente es un tipo de Ultraente.
descriptions.it: Striscia verso le persone. Poi, senza preavviso, fa esplodere la propria testa. È apparentemente una specie di Ultracreatura.
descriptions.ja: 人に近づき唐突に自分の頭を爆発させる。ウルトラビーストの一種らしい。
descriptions.ko: 사람에게 다가와 돌연 자신의 머리를 폭발시킨다. 울트라비스트의 일종인 듯하다.

name: zeraora
description: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal, feline-like Pokemon with a yellow body, black stripes, a distinctive black and blue lightning bolt-shaped tail, large pointed ears with blue interiors, and powerful clawed limbs.

descriptions.fr: Il électrifie ses griffes et déchiquette ses adversaires avec. Même s'ils esquivent son attaque, les étincelles volantes les électrocutent.
descriptions.de: Es elektrisiert seine Krallen und zerfetzt Gegner damit. Selbst wenn sie dem Angriff ausweichen, werden sie von den umherfliegenden Funken getroffen.
descriptions.es: Electrifica sus garras y desgarra a sus oponentes con ellas. Aunque esquiven su ataque, serán electrocutados por las chispas voladoras.
descriptions.it: Elettrifica i suoi artigli e con essi fa a pezzi gli avversari. Anche se schivano il suo attacco, vengono fulminati dalle scintille volanti.
descriptions.ja: 爪に電気をまとわせ相手を切り裂く。攻撃を避けても飛び散る火花で感電してしまう。
descriptions.ko: 발톱에 전기를 감아 상대를 찢는다. 공격을 피하더라도 튀는 불꽃에 감전되고 만다.

name: meltan
description: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.
appearance: A small, silvery metallic Pokemon with a hexagonal nut for a head, a dark grey body, a single large, dark blue eye, and a red tail resembling a power cable.

descriptions.fr: Il fait fondre les particules de fer et d'autres métaux trouvés dans le sous-sol, afin de pouvoir les absorber dans son corps d'acier en fusion.
descriptions.de: Es schmilzt Eisen- und andere Metallpartikel, die im Untergrund zu finden sind, und nimmt sie so in seinen Körper aus geschmolzenem Stahl auf.
descriptions.es: Funde partículas de hierro y otros metales que se encuentran en el subsuelo para absorberlas en su cuerpo de acero fundido.
descriptions.it: Fonde particelle di ferro e altri metalli presenti nel sottosuolo per assorbirle nel suo corpo di acciaio fuso.
descriptions.ja: 地中に含まれる鉄や金属の粒子を溶かし、液状化したそれらを液状の鋼でできた体に吸収する。
descriptions.ko: 땅속에 포함된 철과 금속 입자를 녹여 액체 상태의 그것들을 액체 강철로 된 몸에 흡수한다.

name: melmetal
description: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
appearance: A massive, humanoid metallic Pokemon composed of multiple hexagonal nuts bolted together, giving it a powerful, robust physique, with a large, rounded head featuring a central blue eye and broad, muscular limbs.

descriptions.fr: Autrefois vénéré pour sa capacité à créer du fer à partir de rien, il est revenu à la vie après 3 000 ans pour une raison inconnue.
descriptions.de: Einst wurde es für seine Fähigkeit verehrt, Eisen aus dem Nichts zu erschaffen. Nach 3.000 Jahren ist es aus unbekannten Gründen wieder zum Leben erwacht.
descriptions.es: Antaño fue venerado por su capacidad de crear hierro de la nada. Por alguna razón, ha vuelto a la vida tras 3000 años.
descriptions.it: Anticamente venerato per la sua capacità di creare ferro dal nulla, è tornato in vita dopo 3000 anni per qualche ragione.
descriptions.ja: 3000年前に突如として姿を消し、ゼロから鉄を生み出す能力で崇められていた。何らかの理由で再び目覚めた。
descriptions.ko: 3000년 전에 돌연히 사라졌다가 철을 아무것도 없는 곳에서 만들어내는 능력으로 숭배받았다. 어떠한 이유로 다시 깨어났다.

name: grookey
description: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.
appearance: A small, green monkey-like Pokemon with large, round ears, an orange face, a small leaf-like tail, and a stick-like appendage on its head resembling a drumstick.

descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'il frappe un rythme avec son bâton spécial, les ondes sonores produites transmettent une énergie revitalisante aux plantes et aux fleurs de la zone.
descriptions.de: Wenn es mit seinem besonderen Stock einen Rhythmus schlägt, übertragen die erzeugten Schallwellen belebende Energie auf die Pflanzen und Blumen in der Umgebung.
descriptions.es: Cuando usa su rama especial para crear un ritmo, las ondas sonoras producidas transmiten energía revitalizante a las plantas y flores de la zona.
descriptions.it: Quando usa il suo bastone speciale per creare un ritmo, le onde sonore prodotte trasferiscono energia rivitalizzante alle piante e ai fiori nell'area.
descriptions.ja: 特殊なスティックでリズムを刻むと、その音波が周りの草木を活性化させるエネルギーを放つ。
descriptions.ko: 특수한 스틱으로 리듬을 연주하면 그 음파가 주변의 식물들을 활성화시키는 에너지를 방출한다.

name: thwackey
description: The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.
appearance: Green monkey-like Pokemon with brown fur on its chest and face, a green leafy tuft on its head, and two green drumsticks held in its hands which are connected to its head by vines.

descriptions.fr: Plus un Badabouin peut jouer un rythme rapide avec ses deux bâtons, plus il gagne le respect de ses pairs.
descriptions.de: Je schneller ein Meikro seinen Rhythmus mit zwei Stöcken schlagen kann, desto mehr Respekt gewinnt es von seinen Artgenossen.
descriptions.es: Cuanto más rápido Badaboom consiga tocar un ritmo con sus dos baquetas, más respeto ganará de sus compañeros.
descriptions.it: Più un Rillaboom riesce a battere un ritmo veloce con i suoi due bastoni, più rispetto guadagna dai suoi simili.
descriptions.ja: 2本のスティックで速いリズムを刻むほど、仲間から尊敬を集める。
descriptions.ko: 두 개의 스틱으로 빠른 리듬을 연주할수록 동료들에게서 존경을 받는다.

name: rillaboom
description: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.
appearance: Large green gorilla-like Pokemon with thick green fur, brown fur on its chest and face, holding a large log drum, and a prominent red-orange leafy crest on its head and back.

descriptions.fr: En tambourinant, il puise dans la puissance de sa souche d'arbre spéciale. Les racines de la souche suivent ses ordres en combat.
descriptions.de: Durch Trommeln zapft es die Kraft seines besonderen Baumstumpfes an. Die Wurzeln des Stumpfes folgen im Kampf seinen Anweisungen.
descriptions.es: Tamborileando, accede al poder de su tronco de árbol especial. Las raíces del tronco siguen sus órdenes en combate.
descriptions.it: Suonando la batteria, attinge al potere del suo tronco d'albero speciale. Le radici del tronco seguono la sua direzione in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: ドラムを叩くことで、特殊な切り株の力を引き出す。切り株の根は、バトルで彼の指示に従う。
descriptions.ko: 드럼을 연주하여 특별한 나무 그루터기의 힘을 끌어낸다. 그루터기의 뿌리는 배틀에서 그의 지시에 따른다.

name: scorbunny
description: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon’s body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight at full power.
appearance: White rabbit-like Pokemon with orange ear tips, nose, and 'collar' markings, a yellow patch on its forehead, and large red-orange paw pads.

descriptions.fr: En s'échauffant en courant, l'énergie du feu parcourt le corps de ce Pokémon. Une fois cela fait, il est prêt à combattre à pleine puissance.
descriptions.de: Wenn es sich beim Herumrennen aufwärmt, durchströmt Feuerenergie seinen Körper. Danach ist es bereit, mit voller Kraft zu kämpfen.
descriptions.es: Al correr para calentar, la energía de fuego fluye por el cuerpo de este Pokémon. Una vez que esto ocurre, está listo para luchar con todo su poder.
descriptions.it: Un riscaldamento correndo fa scorrere energia di fuoco attraverso il corpo di questo Pokémon. Una volta che ciò accade, è pronto a combattere a piena potenza.
descriptions.ja: 走り回ってウォーミングアップすると、体中に炎のエネルギーが巡り、フルパワーで戦う準備が整う。
descriptions.ko: 뛰어다니며 워밍업을 하면 몸에 불꽃 에너지가 흐르고, 그때부터 전력으로 싸울 준비가 완료된다.

name: raboot
description: Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves.
appearance: Gray rabbit-like Pokemon with dark gray 'shorts' marking, a dark gray mask-like pattern over its eyes, and orange markings on its ears and face that resemble a scarf.

descriptions.fr: Sa fourrure épaisse et moelleuse le protège du froid et lui permet d'utiliser des capacités de feu plus puissantes.
descriptions.de: Sein dickes und flauschiges Fell schützt es vor Kälte und ermöglicht ihm, heißere Feuer-Attacken einzusetzen.
descriptions.es: Su pelaje grueso y esponjoso lo protege del frío y le permite usar movimientos de fuego más potentes.
descriptions.it: La sua pelliccia folta e soffice lo protegge dal freddo e gli permette di usare mosse di tipo Fuoco più potenti.
descriptions.ja: 厚くふわふわな毛は寒さから身を守り、より熱い炎技を繰り出すことを可能にする。
descriptions.ko: 두껍고 푹신한 털은 추위로부터 몸을 보호하며, 더욱 강력한 불꽃 기술을 사용할 수 있게 한다.

name: cinderace
description: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched.
appearance: Bipedal white rabbit-like Pokemon with long orange-red ears, an orange-red 'collar' and arm markings, blue 'shorts' and ankle markings, and a yellow patch on its abdomen.

descriptions.fr: Il jongle avec un petit caillou avec ses pieds, le transformant en un ballon de soccer ardent. Ses tirs frappent durement les adversaires et les laissent brûlés.
descriptions.de: Es jongliert einen Kieselstein mit seinen Füßen und verwandelt ihn in einen brennenden Fußball. Seine Schüsse treffen Gegner hart und hinterlassen sie versengt.
descriptions.es: Malabarea una pequeña piedra con los pies, convirtiéndola en un balón de fútbol ardiente. Sus disparos golpean duramente a los oponentes y los dejan chamuscados.
descriptions.it: Giocola con un sassolino con i piedi, trasformandolo in un pallone da calcio ardente. I suoi tiri colpiscono duramente gli avversari e li lasciano scottati.
descriptions.ja: 小石を足でジャグリングして燃えるサッカーボールに変え、そのシュートは相手を強く打ち付け、焦げ付かせる。
descriptions.ko: 작은 돌멩이를 발로 저글링하여 불타는 축구공으로 만들고, 그 슛은 상대를 강하게 타격하여 불에 그슬리게 한다.

name: sobble
description: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping.
appearance: Light blue lizard-like Pokemon with a teardrop-shaped head crest, a yellow fin on its back, and dark blue spots on its body.

descriptions.fr: Quand il a peur, ce Pokémon pleure. Ses larmes ont la puissance chimique de 100 oignons, et les attaquants ne pourront s'empêcher de pleurer.
descriptions.de: Wenn es Angst hat, weint dieses Pokémon. Seine Tränen haben die chemische Kraft von 100 Zwiebeln, und Angreifer werden nicht widerstehen können zu weinen.
descriptions.es: Cuando se asusta, este Pokémon llora. Sus lágrimas poseen el poder químico de 100 cebollas, y los atacantes no podrán evitar llorar.
descriptions.it: Quando ha paura, questo Pokémon piange. Le sue lacrime hanno il potere chimico di 100 cipolle, e gli attaccanti non potranno resistere dal piangere.
descriptions.ja: 怖がるとこのポケモンは泣き出す。その涙は100個の玉ねぎの化学的な刺激を持ち、攻撃者は涙を抑えられなくなる。
descriptions.ko: 겁먹으면 이 포켓몬은 울음을 터뜨린다. 그 눈물은 양파 100개 분량의 화학적 자극을 가지고 있어, 공격자들은 울음을 참을 수 없게 된다.

name: drizzile
description: A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms.
appearance: Dark blue lizard-like Pokemon with a tall, light blue fin crest on its head, a lighter blue belly, and long, slender limbs.

descriptions.fr: C'est un combattant astucieux, ce Pokémon se bat en utilisant des ballons d'eau créés avec l'humidité sécrétée par ses paumes.
descriptions.de: Ein cleverer Kämpfer, dieses Pokémon kämpft mit Wasserballons, die es mit Feuchtigkeit aus seinen Handflächen erzeugt.
descriptions.es: Un astuto combatiente, este Pokémon lucha usando globos de agua creados con la humedad secretada de sus palmas.
descriptions.it: Un combattente astuto, questo Pokémon lotta usando palloncini d'acqua creati con l'umidità secreta dai suoi palmi.
descriptions.ja: 賢い戦士であるこのポケモンは、手のひらから分泌される水分で作った水風船を使って戦う。
descriptions.ko: 영리한 전투원인 이 포켓몬은 손바닥에서 분비되는 수분으로 만든 물풍선을 사용하여 싸운다.

name: inteleon
description: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.
appearance: Tall, slender blue chameleon-like Pokemon with a light blue belly, a long yellow fin crest on its head, and a pointed tail that resembles a knife.

descriptions.fr: Il possède de nombreuses capacités cachées, comme le bout de ses doigts qui peut projeter de l'eau, ou encore une membrane dorsale lui permettant de planer.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt viele versteckte Fähigkeiten. So kann es mit seinen Fingerspitzen Wasser verschießen und mit der Membran auf seinem Rücken durch die Luft gleiten.
descriptions.es: Posee muchas habilidades ocultas, como lanzar agua a presión por las yemas de sus dedos o planear gracias a la membrana de su espalda.
descriptions.it: Possiede molte abilità nascoste, come la capacità di sparare acqua dalle punte delle dita e una membrana sulla schiena che usa per planare nell'aria.
descriptions.ja: 指先から水を撃ち出したり、背中の膜で滑空するなど、隠された能力を数多く持つ。
descriptions.ko: 손가락 끝에서 물을 쏘거나 등의 막으로 활공하는 등 숨겨진 능력이 많다.

name: skwovet
description: Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries.
appearance: Gray squirrel-like Pokemon with a fluffy, dark gray tail, a cream-colored belly and inner ears, and prominent front teeth.

descriptions.fr: On le trouve dans toute la région de Galar. Il devient agité si ses bajoues sont complètement vides de Baies.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ist in der gesamten Galar-Region zu finden. Es wird unruhig, wenn seine Backenbeutel mal komplett leer sind.
descriptions.es: Abunda en la región de Galar. Se pone nervioso si sus mofletes se quedan sin ninguna baya.
descriptions.it: Presente in tutta la regione di Galar, questo Pokémon si agita se le sue guance sono completamente vuote di Bacche.
descriptions.ja: ガラル地方の至る所に生息する。ホッペにきのみがなくなると落ち着かない。
descriptions.ko: 가라르지방 곳곳에 서식한다. 볼에 나무열매가 없어지면 안절부절못한다.

name: greedent
description: It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss.
appearance: Large, portly gray squirrel-like Pokemon with a fluffy, dark gray tail, a cream-colored belly, and prominent front teeth, often depicted holding a berry.

descriptions.fr: Il stocke tant de Baies dans sa queue qu'il en perd constamment. Mais, étant un peu lent d'esprit, il ne s'en rend pas compte.
descriptions.de: Es hortet so viele Beeren in seinem Schwanz, dass ihm ständig welche herausfallen. Doch dieses Pokémon ist etwas begriffsstutzig und bemerkt den Verlust nicht.
descriptions.es: Almacena tantas bayas en su cola que se le caen sin cesar. Sin embargo, como es un poco torpe, no se da cuenta de la pérdida.
descriptions.it: Accumula così tante Bacche nella sua coda che gli cadono di continuo. Ma essendo un po' lento di comprendonio, non se ne accorge.
descriptions.ja: 尻尾にきのみをため込みすぎてしょっちゅうこぼしてしまう。少し間の抜けた性格なのでその損失には気づかない。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리에 나무열매를 너무 많이 쌓아두는 바람에 늘 흘리고 다닌다. 약간 어리숙한 성격이라 손해를 잘 모른다.

name: rookidee
description: It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit.
appearance: Small, round blue bird-like Pokemon with a yellow beak, black feather tips on its wings and tail, and large, bright yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il défie bravement n'importe quel adversaire, quelle que soit sa puissance. Chaque combat lui est bénéfique, même une défaite le rend un peu plus fort.
descriptions.de: Es fordert mutig jeden Gegner heraus, egal wie stark dieser ist. Jede Schlacht bringt diesem Pokémon einen Vorteil, selbst eine Niederlage stärkt es ein wenig.
descriptions.es: Desafía con valentía a cualquier oponente, por poderoso que sea. Este Pokémon saca provecho de cada combate: incluso una derrota le hace un poco más fuerte.
descriptions.it: Affronta coraggiosamente qualsiasi avversario, non importa quanto sia potente. Ogni lotta lo rafforza, e persino una sconfitta ne aumenta un po' la sua forza.
descriptions.ja: どんなに強い相手にも勇敢に立ち向かう。戦うたびに成長し、負けても少しだけ強くなる。
descriptions.ko: 아무리 강한 상대라도 용감하게 맞선다. 싸울 때마다 성장하고 져도 조금은 강해진다.

name: corvisquire
description: Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.
appearance: Medium-sized blue bird-like Pokemon with black wing and tail feathers, yellow talons, and a prominent yellow feather crest on its head.

descriptions.fr: Assez intelligent pour utiliser des outils au combat, il a été vu ramassant des pierres pour les jeter ou utilisant des cordes pour immobiliser ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ist schlau genug, Werkzeuge im Kampf einzusetzen. Es wurde dabei beobachtet, wie es Steine aufhob und warf oder Seile benutzte, um Feinde zu fesseln.
descriptions.es: Son lo bastante inteligentes como para usar herramientas en combate. Se les ha visto recogiendo y lanzando rocas, o usando cuerdas para inmovilizar a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Abbastanza intelligente da usare strumenti in battaglia, è stato visto raccogliere e lanciare rocce o usare corde per avvolgere i nemici.
descriptions.ja: 戦闘では道具を器用に使いこなし石を拾って投げたり、縄で敵を縛ったりする様子が確認されている。
descriptions.ko: 싸움에서는 도구를 능숙하게 다뤄 돌을 주워 던지거나 밧줄로 적을 묶는 모습이 확인된다.

name: corviknight
description: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.
appearance: Large, imposing black armored raven-like Pokemon with bright red eyes, a sharp yellow beak, and large, powerful wings, resembling a knight in dark plate armor.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon règne en maître dans le ciel de la région de Galar. L'éclat noir de son corps d'acier peut terrifier n'importe quel adversaire.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon beherrscht die Lüfte der Galar-Region. Der schwarze Glanz seines Stahlkörpers könnte jedem Gegner Angst einjagen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon reina en los cielos de Galar. El fulgor oscuro de su cuerpo de acero infunde terror en el corazón de cualquier enemigo.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon regna sovrano nei cieli della regione di Galar. Lo splendore nero del suo corpo d'acciaio può instillare terrore nel cuore di qualsiasi nemico.
descriptions.ja: ガラル地方の空の王者。漆黒に輝く鋼のボディは、どんな敵をも威圧する。
descriptions.ko: 가라르지방 하늘의 왕자. 칠흑같이 빛나는 강철 보디는 어떤 적이라도 위압한다.

name: blipbug
description: A constant collector of information, this Pokémon is very smart. Very strong is what it isn’t.
appearance: Small, purplish-blue insect-like Pokemon with a large head, three yellow antennae, and small yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Toujours en quête d'informations, ce Pokémon est très intelligent. Ce qu'il n'est pas, c'est très fort.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon sammelt ständig Informationen und ist sehr intelligent. Was es nicht ist, ist sehr stark.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon, que está siempre recopilando información, es muy inteligente. Lo que no es, es fuerte.
descriptions.it: È un costante collezionista di informazioni, ed è molto intelligente. Ciò che non è, è molto forte.
descriptions.ja: いつも情報を集めている頭脳派のポケモン。賢いが、力が強いわけではない。
descriptions.ko: 늘 정보를 모으는 두뇌파 포켓몬. 똑똑하지만 강하지는 않다.

name: dottler
description: It barely moves, but it’s still alive. Hiding in its shell without food or water seems to have awakened its psychic powers.
appearance: Spherical, purplish-blue insect-like Pokemon encased in a hardened yellow shell with dark blue markings, and three yellow antennae protruding from the top.

descriptions.fr: Il bouge à peine, mais est bien vivant. Se cacher dans sa coquille sans nourriture ni eau semble avoir éveillé ses pouvoirs psychiques.
descriptions.de: Es bewegt sich kaum, aber es lebt noch. Sich ohne Nahrung und Wasser in seiner Schale zu verstecken, scheint seine Psycho-Kräfte geweckt zu haben.
descriptions.es: Apenas se mueve, pero sigue vivo. Esconderse en su caparazón sin comida ni agua parece haber despertado sus poderes psíquicos.
descriptions.it: Si muove a malapena, ma è ancora vivo. Nascondersi nel suo guscio senza cibo né acqua sembra aver risvegliato i suoi poteri psichici.
descriptions.ja: ほとんど動かないが、ちゃんと生きている。殻にこもって飲まず食わずでいたことで、エスパーパワーが目覚めたようだ。
descriptions.ko: 거의 움직이지 않지만 제대로 살아있다. 껍데기에 틀어박혀 먹지도 마시지도 않았더니 에스퍼 파워가 눈을 뜬 듯하다.

name: orbeetle
description: It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.
appearance: Red ladybug-like Pokemon with a sleek, aerodynamic red shell, black spots, a prominent yellow head with red eyes, and six long, black legs.

descriptions.fr: Il est réputé pour son niveau d'intelligence élevé. La grande taille de son cerveau est la preuve qu'il possède également un immense pouvoir psychique.
descriptions.de: Es ist berühmt für seine hohe Intelligenz, und die große Größe seines Gehirns ist ein Beweis dafür, dass es auch immense Psycho-Kräfte besitzt.
descriptions.es: Es famoso por su alto nivel de inteligencia, y el gran tamaño de su cerebro demuestra que también posee un inmenso poder psíquico.
descriptions.it: È famoso per il suo alto livello di intelligenza, e le grandi dimensioni del suo cervello sono la prova che possiede anche un immenso potere psichico.
descriptions.ja: 非常に高い知能を持つことで有名。巨大な脳は、同時に強大なエスパーパワーの証でもある。
descriptions.ko: 매우 높은 지능을 가진 것으로 유명하다. 거대한 뇌는 동시에 강력한 에스퍼 파워의 증거이기도 하다.

name: nickit
description: Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokémon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains.
appearance: Orange fox-like Pokemon with a dark gray mask-like pattern around its eyes, gray paws, and a bushy tail with a gray tip.

descriptions.fr: Aidé par les coussinets doux de ses pattes, il pille silencieusement les réserves de nourriture des autres Pokémon. Il survit grâce à ses gains mal acquis.
descriptions.de: Mithilfe der weichen Ballen an seinen Pfoten plündert es lautlos die Vorräte anderer Pokémon. Es überlebt von seinen unrechtmäßig erworbenen Gütern.
descriptions.es: Ayudado por las blandas almohadillas de sus patas, asalta silenciosamente los almacenes de alimentos de otros Pokémon. Sobrevive gracias a sus ganancias mal habidas.
descriptions.it: Aiutato dai morbidi cuscinetti sulle zampe, assalta silenziosamente le riserve di cibo degli altri Pokémon. Sopravvive grazie ai suoi guadagni illeciti.
descriptions.ja: 足裏の柔らかい肉球を利用して、音もなく他のポケモンの食料を奪う。その盗んだもので生き延びている。
descriptions.ko: 발바닥의 부드러운 육구를 이용해 소리 없이 다른 포켓몬의 식량을 훔친다. 그 훔친 것으로 연명하고 있다.

name: thievul
description: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it.
appearance: Tall, slender red fox-like Pokemon with a dark gray mask-like pattern over its eyes, gray paws and belly, and a long, slender tail with a gray tip.

descriptions.fr: Il marque secrètement ses cibles potentielles avec une odeur. En suivant cette odeur, il traque ses proies et les dévalise au moment où elles s'y attendent le moins.
descriptions.de: Es markiert potenzielle Ziele heimlich mit einem Geruch. Indem es dem Geruch folgt, spürt es seine Opfer auf und stiehlt ihnen, wenn sie es am wenigsten erwarten.
descriptions.es: Marca secretamente a sus posibles objetivos con un aroma. Al seguirlo, acecha a sus víctimas y les roba cuando menos se lo esperan.
descriptions.it: Marchia segretamente le sue potenziali vittime con un odore. Seguendolo, le rintraccia e le deruba quando meno se lo aspettano.
descriptions.ja: 獲物を狙うときは、匂いを付けてから忍び寄る。相手が油断した隙に、大切そうにしているものを盗み出す。
descriptions.ko: 몰래 냄새로 먹이를 표시해 둔다. 그 냄새를 쫓아 먹이에게 접근하여 방심한 틈을 타 물건을 훔쳐낸다.

name: gossifleur
description: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly.
appearance: Small, white flower-like Pokemon with a green stem body, a large yellow-orange floral head with a dark brown center, and two green leaves for arms.

descriptions.fr: Il s'ancre au sol avec sa patte unique, puis se prélasse au soleil. Après avoir absorbé suffisamment de lumière solaire, ses pétales s'étendent et il s'épanouit avec éclat.
descriptions.de: Es verankert sich mit seinem einzigen Bein im Boden und sonnt sich anschließend. Nachdem es genug Sonnenlicht absorbiert hat, breiten sich seine Blütenblätter aus und es blüht prächtig.
descriptions.es: Se ancla al suelo con su única pata y luego se deleita con el sol. Tras absorber suficiente luz solar, sus pétalos se abren y florece brillantemente.
descriptions.it: Si ancora al terreno con la sua unica zampa, quindi si crogiola al sole. Dopo aver assorbito abbastanza luce solare, i suoi petali si aprono e fiorisce splendidamente.
descriptions.ja: １本足で地面に根を下ろし、日光を浴びて力を蓄える。十分吸い込んだ後、花びらを広げ鮮やかに咲き誇る。
descriptions.ko: 한쪽 다리로 땅에 뿌리내려 햇볕을 쬐고 힘을 비축한다. 충분히 햇볕을 쐬고 나면 꽃잎이 활짝 펴지며 화려하게 핀다.

name: eldegoss
description: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them.
appearance: Larger, white cotton-like Pokemon with a green stem body, a large white cotton fluff head with green leaves at its base, and two green leaf-like arms.

descriptions.fr: Les graines attachées à sa houppe de coton sont pleines de nutriments. Il les disperse au gré du vent afin que les plantes et d'autres Pokémon puissent en bénéficier.
descriptions.de: Die Samen, die an seiner Baumwollflocke haften, sind voller Nährstoffe. Es verbreitet sie mit dem Wind, damit Pflanzen und andere Pokémon davon profitieren können.
descriptions.es: Las semillas adheridas a su pelusa de algodón están llenas de nutrientes. Las esparce con el viento para que las plantas y otros Pokémon puedan beneficiarse de ellas.
descriptions.it: I semi attaccati alla sua palla di cotone sono pieni di nutrienti. Li sparge nel vento in modo che piante e altri Pokémon possano beneficiarne.
descriptions.ja: 綿毛に付いた種は栄養満点。風に乗せて種を運び、植物やポケモンたちに栄養を与える。
descriptions.ko: 솜털에 붙어 있는 씨앗은 영양 만점이다. 바람에 실어 씨앗을 날려 보내 식물이나 포켓몬들에게 영양분을 준다.

name: wooloo
description: Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed.
appearance: White sheep-like Pokemon with a round, fluffy body made of white wool, a black face, black legs, and two small black horns.

descriptions.fr: Sa toison bouclée est un coussin si efficace que ce Pokémon pourrait tomber d'une falaise et se relever indemne au fond.
descriptions.de: Sein gelocktes Vlies ist ein so wirksames Polster, dass dieses Pokémon von einer Klippe fallen und unten unversehrt wieder aufstehen könnte.
descriptions.es: Su rizada lana es un amortiguador tan eficaz que este Pokémon podría caerse de un acantilado y levantarse sin un rasguño en el fondo.
descriptions.it: La sua lanugine riccia è un cuscino così efficace che questo Pokémon potrebbe cadere da una scogliera e rialzarsi illeso in fondo.
descriptions.ja: くるくるの体毛はクッション性に優れ、崖から落ちても地面で跳ね返りノーダメージで立ち上がる。
descriptions.ko: 곱슬거리는 털은 쿠션성이 뛰어나 절벽에서 떨어져도 바닥에서 튕겨 올라 상처 하나 없이 일어선다.

name: dubwool
description: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You’ll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it.
appearance: Larger, white sheep-like Pokemon with a robust, fluffy white wool body, a black face, black legs, and prominent curling black horns.

descriptions.fr: Tissez un tapis avec sa laine élastique, et vous obtiendrez quelque chose de plus proche d'un trampoline. Vous commencerez à rebondir dès que vous poserez le pied dessus.
descriptions.de: Webt man einen Teppich aus seiner federnden Wolle, erhält man etwas, das einem Trampolin ähnlicher ist. Man beginnt zu hüpfen, sobald man einen Fuß darauf setzt.
descriptions.es: Si tejes una alfombra con su elástica lana, obtendrás algo más parecido a una cama elástica. Empezarás a botar en cuanto pongas un pie en ella.
descriptions.it: Tessendo un tappeto dalla sua lana elastica, si ottiene qualcosa di più simile a un trampolino. Si inizia a rimbalzare nel momento in cui ci si mette piede.
descriptions.ja: 弾力性に富んだ体毛でラグを編むとトランポリンのようになる。足を踏み入れた瞬間から飛び跳ねてしまう。
descriptions.ko: 탄력성이 뛰어난 털로 카펫을 만들면 트램펄린처럼 된다. 발을 딛는 순간부터 뛰어오르게 될 것이다.

name: chewtle
description: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.
appearance: Small, green turtle-like Pokemon with a large, orange beak-like mouth, a green shell, and small, stubby limbs.

descriptions.fr: L'irritation due à la pousse de ses dents le pousse apparemment à claquer ses mâchoires sur tout ce qui se trouve devant lui.
descriptions.de: Offenbar treibt der Juckreiz des Zahnens es dazu an, auf alles vor sich zu schnappen.
descriptions.es: Al parecer, el picor de la dentición lo impulsa a chasquear las mandíbulas contra cualquier cosa que tenga delante.
descriptions.it: A quanto pare, il prurito della dentizione lo spinge a schioccare le mascelle contro qualsiasi cosa gli stia davanti.
descriptions.ja: 歯がむず痒いらしく、目の前にあるものにはなんでも食いつく習性があるようだ。
descriptions.ko: 이가 가려운지 눈앞에 있는 것은 무엇이든 물어뜯으려 드는 습성이 있다.

name: drednaw
description: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.
appearance: Large, brown snapping turtle-like Pokemon with a rugged green shell, a powerful orange beak-like mouth, and a serrated crest on its head.

descriptions.fr: Doté de mâchoires capables de cisailler des barres d'acier, ce Pokémon très agressif dévore ses malheureuses proies.
descriptions.de: Mit Kiefern, die Stahlstangen zerschneiden können, beißt dieses hochan aggressive Pokémon seine unglückliche Beute nieder.
descriptions.es: Con unas mandíbulas capaces de cizallar barras de acero, este Pokémon tan agresivo devora a sus desafortunadas presas.
descriptions.it: Con mascelle capaci di tagliare barre d'acciaio, questo Pokémon altamente aggressivo azzanna le sue sfortunate prede.
descriptions.ja: 鉄骨をも噛み砕くアゴを持つ、極めて凶暴なポケモン。不運な獲物を容赦なく食い破る。
descriptions.ko: 철골마저도 씹어 부수는 턱을 가진 지극히 흉포한 포켓몬. 불운한 먹잇감을 가차 없이 뜯어먹는다.

name: yamper
description: This Pokémon is very popular as a herding dog in the Galar region. As it runs, it generates electricity from the base of its tail.
appearance: Small, yellow corgi-like Pokemon with a heart-shaped brown patch on its rear, blue eyes, and small brown paw pads.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est très populaire comme chien de berger dans la région de Galar. En courant, il génère de l'électricité à la base de sa queue.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ist in der Galar-Region als Hütehund sehr beliebt. Beim Laufen erzeugt es Strom aus der Basis seines Schweifes.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon es muy popular como perro pastor en la región de Galar. Mientras corre, genera electricidad desde la base de su cola.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è molto popolare come cane da pastore nella regione di Galar. Mentre corre, genera elettricità dalla base della sua coda.
descriptions.ja: ガラル地方で牧羊犬として人気。走ると尻尾の付け根から発電する。
descriptions.ko: 가라르지방에서 목양견으로 인기 많다. 달리면 꼬리 밑동에서 전기를 만들어낸다.

name: boltund
description: This Pokémon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days.
appearance: Sleek, yellow dog-like Pokemon with a lean, athletic build, brown markings on its legs and tail, and green eyes, featuring a lightning bolt-like tail.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon génère de l'électricité et la canalise dans ses pattes pour les maintenir puissantes. Boltund peut courir sans arrêt pendant trois jours complets.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon erzeugt Elektrizität und leitet sie in seine Beine, um sie stark zu halten. Boltund kann drei volle Tage lang ununterbrochen rennen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon genera electricidad y la canaliza a sus patas para mantenerlas fuertes. Boltund puede correr sin parar durante tres días completos.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon genera elettricità e la canalizza nelle sue zampe per mantenerle forti. Boltund può correre senza sosta per tre giorni interi.
descriptions.ja: 発電した電力を脚に流し続け、強靭な脚力をキープする。３日３晩走り続けられる。
descriptions.ko: 발전한 전력을 다리에 계속 흘려보내 강인한 각력을 유지한다. 꼬박 3일 밤낮을 계속 달릴 수 있다.

name: rolycoly
description: Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.
appearance: Black, rock-like Pokemon with a single red eye, resembling a lump of coal on a wheel, with a white, rectangular 'foot' on its underside.

descriptions.fr: La majeure partie de son corps a la même composition que le charbon. Il a d'ailleurs été découvert pour la première fois dans des mines de charbon il y a environ 400 ans.
descriptions.de: Der größte Teil seines Körpers hat dieselbe Zusammensetzung wie Kohle. Passenderweise wurde dieses Pokémon vor etwa 400 Jahren zum ersten Mal in Kohleminen entdeckt.
descriptions.es: La mayor parte de su cuerpo tiene la misma composición que el carbón. De hecho, este Pokémon fue descubierto por primera vez en minas de carbón hace unos 400 años.
descriptions.it: La maggior parte del suo corpo ha la stessa composizione del carbone. Appropriatamente, questo Pokémon fu scoperto per la prima volta nelle miniere di carbone circa 400 anni fa.
descriptions.ja: 体のほとんどが石炭と同じ成分。約４００年前、炭鉱で発見された。
descriptions.ko: 몸의 대부분이 석탄과 같은 성분이다. 약 400년 전 탄광에서 처음 발견되었다.

name: carkol
description: It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region.
appearance: Dark gray, cart-like Pokemon made of coal, with two glowing red eyes, two orange wheels, and a chimney-like protrusion on its back.

descriptions.fr: Il forme du charbon à l'intérieur de son corps. Le charbon qu'il laisse tomber a autrefois servi de combustible pour les habitants de la région de Galar.
descriptions.de: Es bildet Kohle in seinem Körper. Die von ihm fallengelassene Kohle befeuerte einst das Leben der Menschen in der Galar-Region.
descriptions.es: Forma carbón dentro de su cuerpo. El carbón que suelta este Pokémon sirvió una vez como combustible para la vida de las gentes de Galar.
descriptions.it: Genera carbone all'interno del proprio corpo. Il carbone che perdeva ha alimentato per anni le vite delle persone della regione di Galar.
descriptions.ja: 体内で石炭を作る。かつてガラル地方の人々の生活を支えた石炭は、このポケモンが落としたものだった。
descriptions.ko: 몸속에서 석탄을 만든다. 이 포켓몬이 떨어뜨린 석탄은 한때 가라르지방 사람들의 삶에 연료가 되었다.

name: coalossal
description: It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.
appearance: Massive, black rock-like Pokemon resembling a walking coal furnace, with glowing red eyes, prominent orange and red fiery cracks on its body, and a large, jagged coal crown on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il est généralement pacifique, mais le vandalisme des mines l'enrage. Les coupables seront incinérés par des flammes atteignant 1482 °C.
descriptions.de: Normalerweise ist es friedlich, doch Bergwerksvandalismus erzürnt es. Störenfriede werden von Flammen, die 1482 °C erreichen, eingeäschert.
descriptions.es: Suele ser pacífico, pero el vandalismo en las minas lo enfurece. Los culpables serán incinerados con llamas que alcanzan los 1482 °C.
descriptions.it: È generalmente pacifico, ma il vandalismo nelle miniere lo manda su tutte le furie. I colpevoli verranno inceneriti da fiamme che raggiungono i 1482 °C.
descriptions.ja: 普段は温厚だが、炭鉱を荒らす者には怒りを燃やす。その炎の温度は摂氏1482度に達し、標的を灰にする。
descriptions.ko: 평소에는 온화하지만 광산을 훼손하는 자에게는 분노한다. 범죄자들은 1482°C에 달하는 불꽃에 의해 소각될 것이다.

name: applin
description: It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it’s just an apple and nothing more.
appearance: Tiny, green apple-shaped dragon-like Pokemon with two small, yellow eyes, living inside a red apple, with only its head and tail peeking out.

descriptions.fr: Il passe toute sa vie à l'intérieur d'une pomme. Il se cache de ses ennemis naturels, les Pokémon oiseaux, en se faisant passer pour une simple pomme.
descriptions.de: Es verbringt sein gesamtes Leben im Inneren eines Apfels. Vor seinen natürlichen Feinden, den Vogel-Pokémon, versteckt es sich, indem es sich als einfacher Apfel ausgibt.
descriptions.es: Pasa toda su vida dentro de una manzana. Se esconde de sus enemigos naturales, los Pokémon pájaro, fingiendo ser solo una manzana.
descriptions.it: Trascorre la sua intera esistenza all'interno di una mela. Si nasconde dai suoi nemici naturali, i Pokémon Uccello, fingendo di essere una semplice mela.
descriptions.ja: リンゴの中で一生を過ごす。天敵である鳥ポケモンから身を守るため、リンゴになりきってやり過ごす。
descriptions.ko: 일생을 사과 속에서 보낸다. 천적인 새포켓몬으로부터 몸을 지키기 위해 그냥 사과인 척 위장한다.

name: flapple
description: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.
appearance: A small, green apple-shaped dragon with two large, pale green apple skin 'wings' on its back, a segment of the apple core forming its body, and two small yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il a mangé une pomme aigre, ce qui a provoqué son évolution. Dans ses joues, il stocke un acide capable de provoquer des brûlures chimiques.
descriptions.de: Der Verzehr eines sauren Apfels hat seine Entwicklung ausgelöst. In seinen Wangen speichert es eine Säure, die chemische Verbrennungen verursachen kann.
descriptions.es: Comió una manzana agria, lo que indujo su evolución. En sus mejillas, almacena un ácido capaz de causar quemaduras químicas.
descriptions.it: Ha mangiato una mela aspra, cosa che ne ha causato l'evoluzione. Nelle sue guance immagazzina un acido in grado di provocare ustioni chimiche.
descriptions.ja: 酸っぱいリンゴを食べて進化した。化学やけどを引き起こすほどの強酸を頬に溜めている。
descriptions.ko: 신맛 나는 사과를 먹고 진화했다. 화학 화상을 입힐 정도의 강산을 볼에 모아두고 있다.

name: appletun
description: Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.
appearance: A round, green dragon with a soft, pie-like apple skin shell on its back, two short green legs, and a cream-colored face with small black eyes and a large, dark green mouth.

descriptions.fr: Manger une pomme sucrée a causé son évolution. Une odeur de nectar émane de son corps, attirant les Pokémon Insecte dont il se nourrit.
descriptions.de: Der Verzehr eines süßen Apfels hat seine Entwicklung verursacht. Von seinem Körper geht ein nektarähnlicher Duft aus, der die Käfer-Pokémon anlockt, die es erbeutet.
descriptions.es: Comer una manzana dulce causó su evolución. De su cuerpo emana un aroma nectarino que atrae a los Pokémon bicho de los que se alimenta.
descriptions.it: Ha mangiato una mela dolce, cosa che ne ha causato l'evoluzione. Dal suo corpo emana un profumo di nettare che attira i Pokémon coleottero di cui si nutre.
descriptions.ja: 甘いリンゴを食べて進化した。体からは蜜のような香りが漂い、獲物である虫ポケモンをおびき寄せる。
descriptions.ko: 단맛 나는 사과를 먹고 진화했다. 몸에서 달콤한 꿀 향기가 나며, 먹이인 벌레포켓몬을 유인한다.

name: silicobra
description: As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand.
appearance: A sandy yellow-brown cobra with a large, coiled body, a wide, flat hood with two dark brown stripes, and two small, black eyes.

descriptions.fr: En creusant, il avale du sable et le stocke dans la poche de son cou. Cette poche peut contenir plus de 7,7 kg de sable.
descriptions.de: Beim Graben schluckt es Sand und speichert ihn in seinem Kehlsack. Dieser kann über 7,7 kg Sand fassen.
descriptions.es: Mientras cava, traga arena y la almacena en su bolsa del cuello. La bolsa puede contener más de 7,7 kg de arena.
descriptions.it: Mentre scava, inghiotte sabbia e la immagazzina nella sua sacca sul collo. La sacca può contenere più di 7,7 kg di sabbia.
descriptions.ja: 穴を掘りながら砂を飲み込み、首の袋に蓄える。その袋には約7.7キロ以上の砂が入る。
descriptions.ko: 구멍을 파면서 모래를 삼켜 목 주머니에 저장한다. 주머니에는 7.7kg 이상의 모래를 담을 수 있다.

name: sandaconda
description: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened.
appearance: A large, sandy brown cobra with a distinctive, large, sand-filled sac around its neck, a dark brown stripe running along its back, and a broad, flat tail.

descriptions.fr: Quand il contracte son corps, plus de 100 kg de sable jaillissent de son nez. S'il n'a plus de sable, il est découragé.
descriptions.de: Wenn es seinen Körper zusammenzieht, sprühen über 100 kg Sand aus seiner Nase. Wenn ihm der Sand ausgeht, wird es mutlos.
descriptions.es: Cuando contrae su cuerpo, más de 100 kg de arena salen disparados por su nariz. Si alguna vez se queda sin arena, se desanima.
descriptions.it: Quando contrae il suo corpo, più di 100 kg di sabbia spruzzano dal suo naso. Se rimane senza sabbia, si scoraggia.
descriptions.ja: 体を締めつけると約100キロ以上の砂が鼻から噴射される。砂を使い切るとしょんぼりする。
descriptions.ko: 몸을 조이면 100kg이 넘는 모래가 코에서 분사된다. 만약 모래가 떨어지면 낙담한다.

name: cramorant
description: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.
appearance: A blue cormorant-like bird with a white belly, large yellow eyes, a yellow beak, and white feathers around its neck and head.

descriptions.fr: Il est si fort qu'il peut mettre K.O. certains adversaires en un seul coup, mais il peut aussi oublier ce qu'il combat en plein milieu d'un affrontement.
descriptions.de: Es ist so stark, dass es manche Gegner mit einem einzigen Treffer K.O. schlagen kann, vergisst aber während eines Kampfes auch, worum es sich gerade schlägt.
descriptions.es: Es tan fuerte que puede noquear a algunos oponentes de un solo golpe, pero también puede olvidar contra qué está luchando en mitad del combate.
descriptions.it: È così forte da poter mandare KO alcuni avversari con un solo colpo, ma a volte dimentica contro chi sta lottando a metà battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 一撃で相手を倒すほど強いが、バトル中何をしていたのか忘れることもある。
descriptions.ko: 한 방에 상대를 쓰러뜨릴 정도로 강하지만 배틀 중 무엇과 싸우고 있는지 잊어버리기도 한다.

name: arrokuda
description: If it sees any movement around it, this Pokémon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It’s very proud of that jaw.
appearance: A small, torpedo-shaped gray barracuda with a bright red, pointed snout, a small dorsal fin, and two pectoral fins.

descriptions.fr: S'il voit le moindre mouvement autour de lui, ce Pokémon fonce droit dessus, la mâchoire pointue en avant. Il est très fier de cette mâchoire.
descriptions.de: Sieht es eine Bewegung in seiner Nähe, stürzt es sich sofort darauf und führt mit seinem scharfen Kiefer an. Auf diesen Kiefer ist es sehr stolz.
descriptions.es: Si ve cualquier movimiento a su alrededor, este Pokémon carga inmediatamente, liderando con su mandíbula afilada. Está muy orgulloso de esa mandíbula.
descriptions.it: Se avverte un qualsiasi movimento nelle vicinanze, si lancia subito all'attacco con la sua mascella appuntita. È molto fiero di questa mascella.
descriptions.ja: 周囲に動きを察すると、鋭い顎を突き出して真っすぐに突進する。自分の顎を誇りに思っている。
descriptions.ko: 주변에서 움직임을 감지하면 날카로운 턱을 내밀어 돌진한다. 자기 턱을 매우 자랑스러워한다.

name: barraskewda
description: This Pokémon has a jaw that’s as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda’s flesh is surprisingly tasty, too.
appearance: A long, slender gray barracuda with a large, pointed red snout, a prominent yellow dorsal fin, and two smaller yellow pectoral fins.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon a une mâchoire aussi tranchante qu'une lance et aussi solide que l'acier. Apparemment, sa chair est aussi étonnamment savoureuse.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon besitzt einen Kiefer, der so scharf wie ein Speer und so stark wie Stahl ist. Anscheinend ist Barraskewdas Fleisch überraschend schmackhaft.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon tiene una mandíbula tan afilada como una lanza y tan fuerte como el acero. Aparentemente, la carne de Barraskewda también es sorprendentemente sabrosa.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon ha una mascella affilata come una lancia e resistente come l'acciaio. A quanto pare, la sua carne è anche sorprendentemente saporita.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは槍のように鋭く鋼鉄のように頑丈な顎を持つ。カマスジョーの肉は意外にも美味だという。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 창처럼 날카롭고 강철처럼 단단한 턱을 지녔다. 배럴스커의 살은 의외로 맛도 좋다고 한다.

name: toxel
description: It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows.
appearance: A small, purple infant-like Pokémon with a light purple diaper-like marking on its belly, yellow electrical sacs on its cheeks, and a spiky crest of dark purple on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il stocke du poison dans une poche interne et le sécrète à travers sa peau. Toucher ce Pokémon provoque une sensation de picotement.
descriptions.de: Es speichert Gift in einem inneren Giftsack und sondert es über seine Haut ab. Wer es berührt, spürt ein Kribbeln.
descriptions.es: Almacena veneno en una bolsa interna y lo secreta a través de su piel. Tocar a este Pokémon provoca una sensación de cosquilleo.
descriptions.it: Immagazzina il veleno in una sacca interna e lo secerne attraverso la pelle. Chi lo tocca avverte un formicolio.
descriptions.ja: 体内の毒袋に毒をため込み、全身の皮膚から分泌する。触れるとしびれるような感覚が走る。
descriptions.ko: 체내의 독주머니에 독을 모아 피부를 통해 분비한다. 만지면 저릿저릿한 감각이 느껴진다.

name: toxtricity-amped
description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.
appearance: A lanky, purple punk-rock lizard with a yellow chest and belly, two large yellow horns on its head, spiky yellow shoulder pads, and two yellow electric guitar-like markings on its forearms.

descriptions.fr: Quand il émet un son qui rappelle une guitare, il frotte en fait ses griffes sur les protubérances de sa poitrine pour générer de l'électricité.
descriptions.de: Wenn es Geräusche erzeugt, die an Gitarrenklänge erinnern, kratzt es in Wahrheit an den Auswüchsen seiner Brust, um Elektrizität zu erzeugen.
descriptions.es: Cuando parece que toca la guitarra, en realidad está arañando las protuberancias de su pecho para generar electricidad.
descriptions.it: Quando sembra che suoni la chitarra, in realtà sta graffiando le protuberanze sul petto per generare elettricità.
descriptions.ja: ギターをかき鳴らしているように聞こえるのは、胸の突起を爪で引っかいて電気を発生させている音である。
descriptions.ko: 기타를 치는 듯한 소리가 나는 것은 가슴의 돌기를 손톱으로 긁어서 전기를 발생시키는 소리다.

display_names.ja: ストリンダー (ハイなすがた)

name: sizzlipede
description: It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot.
appearance: A long, segmented centipede with a fiery red-orange head and tail, a black body with yellow undersides, and multiple yellow legs.

descriptions.fr: Il stocke du gaz inflammable dans son corps et l'utilise pour générer de la chaleur. Les sections jaunes de son ventre deviennent particulièrement chaudes.
descriptions.de: Es speichert entflammbares Gas in seinem Körper und nutzt es zur Wärmeerzeugung. Die gelben Bereiche an seinem Bauch werden besonders heiß.
descriptions.es: Almacena gas inflamable en su cuerpo y lo usa para generar calor. Las secciones amarillas de su vientre se calientan especialmente.
descriptions.it: Immagazzina gas infiammabile nel corpo e lo usa per generare calore. Le sezioni gialle sul suo ventre si scaldano in particolare.
descriptions.ja: 可燃性のガスを体内に蓄え、熱を生み出す。お腹の黄色い部分が特に熱くなる。
descriptions.ko: 가연성 가스를 체내에 축적해 열을 발생시킨다. 배의 노란 부분이 특히 뜨거워진다.

name: centiskorch
description: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.
appearance: A massive, fiery red-orange centipede with a black underside, a segmented body, two large, curved horns on its head, and multiple yellow legs along its length.

descriptions.fr: Quand il chauffe, sa température corporelle atteint environ 815 degrés Celsius. Il fouette son corps et se projette sur ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Wenn es sich erhitzt, erreicht seine Körpertemperatur etwa 815 Grad Celsius. Es peitscht seinen Körper wie eine Geißel und stürmt auf Feinde zu.
descriptions.es: Cuando se calienta, su temperatura corporal alcanza unos 815 grados Celsius. Azota su cuerpo como un látigo y se lanza contra sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Quando si scalda, la sua temperatura corporea raggiunge circa gli 815 °C. Colpisce con il corpo come una frusta e si lancia contro i nemici.
descriptions.ja: 体が熱を帯びると体温は摂氏約815度にも達する。体をムチのようにしならせて敵に襲いかかる。
descriptions.ko: 몸이 열을 띠면 체온이 약 815℃에 달한다. 몸을 채찍처럼 휘둘러 적에게 돌진한다.

name: clobbopus
description: It’s very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land.
appearance: A small, light blue octopus with a white head resembling a beanie hat, two white suckers on each of its four arms, and two large, dark eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il est très curieux, mais sa façon d'explorer les choses est de tenter de les frapper avec ses tentacules. La recherche de nourriture le pousse à s'aventurer sur la terre ferme.
descriptions.de: Es ist sehr neugierig, doch untersucht es seine Umgebung stets, indem es sie mit seinen Tentakeln zu schlagen versucht. Auf der Suche nach Nahrung kommt es an Land.
descriptions.es: Es muy curioso, pero su forma de investigar es intentar golpear las cosas con sus tentáculos. La búsqueda de comida lo lleva a tierra firme.
descriptions.it: È molto curioso, ma la sua maniera di investigare le cose è provare a prenderle a pugni con i suoi tentacoli. La ricerca di cibo lo porta sulla terraferma.
descriptions.ja: 好奇心旺盛で気になるものはとりあえず触腕で殴ってみる。エサを求めて陸地に上がってくる。
descriptions.ko: 호기심이 왕성해 궁금한 것은 일단 촉완으로 때려본다. 먹이를 찾아 육지로 올라온다.

name: grapploct
description: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.
appearance: A muscular, dark blue humanoid octopus with white markings on its body resembling a grappling suit, a white headband, and powerful, white-suckered arms.

descriptions.fr: Son corps, entièrement composé de muscles, rend les prises de lutte qu'il effectue avec ses tentacules incroyablement puissantes.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper besteht aus puren Muskeln, wodurch die Kampfgriffe, die es mit seinen Tentakeln ausführt, unglaublich kräftig sind.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo, hecho solo de músculo, hace que los movimientos de agarre que realiza con sus tentáculos sean increíblemente poderosos.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo, formato solo da muscoli, rende potentissimi i movimenti di lotta che questo Pokémon esegue con i tentacoli.
descriptions.ja: 筋肉だけの体は触腕で繰り出す格闘技を途方もなく強力なものにしている。
descriptions.ko: 근육으로만 이루어진 몸은 촉완으로 사용하는 격투 기술을 엄청나게 강력하게 만든다.

name: sinistea
description: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.
appearance: A small, purple ghost-like Pokémon residing within a light purple teacup, with a white handle and a gold rim, and a single white eye on its teacup body.

descriptions.fr: On raconte que ce Pokémon est né lorsqu'un esprit solitaire a pris possession d'une tasse de thé froid abandonnée.
descriptions.de: Es heißt, dieses Pokémon entstand, als ein einsamer Geist eine kalte, vergessene Teetasse besetzte.
descriptions.es: Se dice que este Pokémon nació cuando un espíritu solitario poseyó una taza de té frío y olvidado.
descriptions.it: Si dice che questo Pokémon sia nato quando uno spirito solitario ha posseduto una tazza di tè freddo e avanzato.
descriptions.ja: 孤独な魂が冷めた残り物の紅茶に宿ったことで生まれたといわれているポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 고독한 영혼이 식어버린 남은 홍차에 깃들어 태어났다고 전해지는 포켓몬.

name: polteageist
description: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.
appearance: A purple ghost-like Pokémon inhabiting a light purple teapot with a golden lid, handle, and spout, featuring a single white eye on its teapot body.

descriptions.fr: Cette espèce vit dans des théières antiques. La plupart des théières sont des contrefaçons, mais de rares exemplaires sont authentiques.
descriptions.de: Diese Art lebt in antiken Teekannen. Die meisten Kannen sind Fälschungen, aber in seltenen Fällen findet man ein authentisches Exemplar.
descriptions.es: Esta especie vive en teteras antiguas. La mayoría son falsificaciones, pero en raras ocasiones se encuentra una obra auténtica.
descriptions.it: Questa specie vive in teiere antiche. La maggior parte delle teiere sono falsi, ma in rare occasioni se ne trova una autentica.
descriptions.ja: アンティークのティーポットを棲み処にする。ほとんどのティーポットは偽物だが、ごくまれに本物が見つかることがある。
descriptions.ko: 앤티크 찻주전자을 보금자리로 삼는다. 대부분의 찻주전자는 가짜지만 아주 드물게 진품이 발견되기도 한다.

name: hatenna
description: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.
appearance: A small, light pink humanoid creature with a dark blue hat-like head covering that obscures its eyes, and two small dark blue tendrils extending from its body.

descriptions.fr: Grâce à la protubérance sur sa tête, il perçoit les émotions des autres créatures. Si vous n'avez pas un tempérament calme, il ne vous fera jamais confiance.
descriptions.de: Mithilfe des Auswuchses auf seinem Kopf spürt es die Emotionen anderer Lebewesen. Ist man nicht ausgeglichen, wird es einem nie Vertrauen schenken.
descriptions.es: A través de la protuberancia de su cabeza, percibe las emociones de otras criaturas. Si no tienes una disposición tranquila, nunca se encariñará contigo.
descriptions.it: Tramite la protuberanza sulla testa, percepisce le emozioni delle altre creature. Se non hai un carattere calmo, non si affezionerà mai a te.
descriptions.ja: 頭の突起で他者の感情を感じ取る。穏やかな心を持っていないと決して懐かない。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 돌기로 다른 생물의 감정을 감지한다. 침착한 마음을 가지고 있지 않으면 절대 따르지 않는다.

name: hattrem
description: No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently.
appearance: A slightly larger light pink humanoid with a wide dark blue hat-like head covering that forms a conical shape, and two long, dark blue tendrils that curl upward.

descriptions.fr: Peu importe qui vous êtes, si vous approchez ce Pokémon avec de fortes émotions, il vous réduira violemment au silence.
descriptions.de: Wer auch immer du bist, wenn du starke Emotionen an dieses Pokémon heranträgst, wird es dich gewaltsam zum Schweigen bringen.
descriptions.es: Seas quien seas, si te acercas a este Pokémon con emociones fuertes, te silenciará violentamente.
descriptions.it: Chiunque tu sia, se porti emozioni forti vicino a questo Pokémon, ti metterà a tacere violentemente.
descriptions.ja: 誰であろうと強い感情をそばに持ち込むと、暴力的に静かにさせる。
descriptions.ko: 누구든 강한 감정을 지닌 채 가까이 다가가면 폭력적으로 조용하게 만든다.

name: hatterene
description: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.
appearance: A tall, slender light pink humanoid with a massive, dark blue bell-shaped hat that covers its entire body except for its lower legs, and long, trailing dark blue tendrils.

descriptions.fr: Il émet une puissance psychique suffisamment forte pour provoquer des maux de tête, dissuadant ainsi les autres de s'approcher.
descriptions.de: Es sendet psychische Kräfte aus, die stark genug sind, um Kopfschmerzen zu verursachen, um andere davon abzuhalten, sich zu nähern.
descriptions.es: Emite un poder psíquico tan potente que provoca jaquecas, disuadiendo así a los demás de acercarse.
descriptions.it: Emette un potere psichico tanto forte da provocare mal di testa, scoraggiando gli altri dall'avvicinarsi.
descriptions.ja: 他者が近づくのを防ぐため、頭痛を引き起こすほど強力なサイコパワーを放つ。
descriptions.ko: 다른 존재가 다가오는 것을 막기 위해 두통을 일으킬 만큼 강력한 에스퍼 파워를 방출한다.

name: impidimp
description: Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.
appearance: A small, imp-like creature with purple skin, a pinkish-red nose, pink tips on its ears, and a long, curly pink tail.

descriptions.fr: Par son nez, il aspire les émanations produites par les êtres humains et les Pokémon lorsqu'ils sont irrités. Il se nourrit de cette énergie négative.
descriptions.de: Durch seine Nase saugt es die Ausdünstungen ein, die Menschen und Pokémon ausscheiden, wenn sie genervt sind. Von dieser negativen Energie lebt es.
descriptions.es: Por la nariz, absorbe las emanaciones que producen las personas y los Pokémon cuando están molestos. Se nutre de esta energía negativa.
descriptions.it: Tramite il naso, risucchia le emanazioni prodotte da persone e Pokémon quando si sentono infastiditi. Prospera grazie a questa energia negativa.
descriptions.ja: 人やポケモンがイライラしたときに出る感情を鼻から吸い込む。その負の感情を栄養にしている。
descriptions.ko: 사람이나 포켓몬이 짜증을 느낄 때 내뿜는 기운을 코로 들이마신다. 그 부정적인 에너지를 양분 삼아 번성한다.

name: morgrem
description: When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair.
appearance: A lanky, dark pink imp-like creature with long, spiky green hair covering one eye, a mischievous grin, and a green tuft of fur on its chest.
