descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'il se met à quatre pattes comme pour implorer le pardon, il tente d'attirer ses adversaires pour les transpercer avec ses cheveux en forme de lance.
descriptions.de: Wenn es sich auf alle Viere begibt, als würde es um Vergebung bitten, versucht es, Gegner anzulocken, um sie mit seinem speerartigen Haar zu durchbohren.
descriptions.es: Cuando se postra a cuatro patas como si pidiera perdón, en realidad está atrayendo a sus oponentes para apuñalarlos con su pelo en forma de lanza.
descriptions.it: Quando si mette a quattro zampe come per chiedere perdono, in realtà sta attirando gli avversari per pugnalarli con i suoi capelli a forma di lancia.
descriptions.ja: 許しを請うように四つん這いになるときは、相手を誘い込み、槍のような髪で突き刺そうとしている。
descriptions.ko: 용서를 비는 듯 네 발로 엎드릴 때는 상대를 유인하여 창처럼 뾰족한 털로 꿰뚫으려는 속셈이다.

name: grimmsnarl
description: With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.
appearance: A large, muscular, dark pink humanoid with long, flowing green hair that forms a beard and covers much of its body, large green claws, and a broad, intimidating stance.

descriptions.fr: Grâce à ses cheveux enroulés autour de son corps qui renforcent ses muscles, ce Pokémon peut maîtriser même un Mackogneur.
descriptions.de: Mit den um seinen Körper gewickelten Haaren, die seine Muskeln stärken, kann dieses Pokémon selbst Machomei überwältigen.
descriptions.es: Con el pelo envuelto alrededor de su cuerpo, que ayuda a potenciar sus músculos, este Pokémon puede doblegar incluso a Machamp.
descriptions.it: Grazie ai peli avvolti intorno al corpo che ne esaltano i muscoli, questo Pokémon può sopraffare persino Machamp.
descriptions.ja: 全身に絡みつかせた体毛で筋肉を強化。カイリキーすら圧倒する。
descriptions.ko: 전신을 감싼 털로 근육을 강화한다. 괴력몬조차 압도할 수 있다.

name: obstagoon
description: Its voice is staggering in volume. Obstagoon has a tendency to take on a threatening posture and shout—this move is known as Obstruct.
appearance: A black and white badger-like Pokémon standing on two legs, with a zigzag pattern across its chest and legs, spiky black fur, and a long, pointed tongue.

descriptions.fr: Sa voix est d'un volume stupéfiant. Ixon a tendance à adopter une posture menaçante et à crier, une capacité connue sous le nom de Blocage.
descriptions.de: Seine Stimme ist von erstaunlichem Volumen. Barrikadax neigt dazu, eine bedrohliche Haltung einzunehmen und zu schreien – diese Attacke ist als Abblocker bekannt.
descriptions.es: Su voz es de un volumen asombroso. Obstagoon tiene la tendencia a adoptar una postura amenazante y gritar; este movimiento se conoce como Obstrucción.
descriptions.it: La sua voce ha un volume sbalorditivo. Obstagoon tende ad assumere una postura minacciosa e a gridare, una mossa nota come Sbarramento.
descriptions.ja: 驚くべき声量を持つ。威嚇するような体勢で叫ぶ行動は「ブロッキング」と呼ばれている。
descriptions.ko: 엄청난 성량을 지녔다. 위협적인 자세로 고함을 지르는 행동은 「블로킹」이라 불린다.

name: perrserker
description: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.
appearance: A bipedal, armored gray cat-like Pokémon with a long, braided beard of steel, a steel helmet, and sharp steel claws on its hands and feet.

descriptions.fr: Ce qui ressemble à un casque de fer est en réalité des poils durcis. Ce Pokémon vit pour le frisson du combat.
descriptions.de: Was wie ein Eisenhelm aussieht, ist tatsächlich gehärtetes Haar. Dieses Pokémon lebt für den Nervenkitzel des Kampfes.
descriptions.es: Lo que parece un casco de hierro es en realidad pelo endurecido. Este Pokémon vive para la emoción de la batalla.
descriptions.it: Ciò che sembra un elmo di ferro è in realtà pelo indurito. Questo Pokémon vive per il brivido della battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 鉄のヘルメットに見えるのは硬化した体毛。戦うスリルこそが生きがい。
descriptions.ko: 철 투구처럼 보이는 것은 사실 딱딱하게 굳은 털이다. 싸움의 스릴이 삶의 낙이다.

name: cursola
description: Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon’s core spirit.
appearance: A ghostly, pale blue coral structure, retaining the basic shape of a Corsola but with a translucent, ethereal appearance, glowing light blue in its core.

descriptions.fr: Sa carapace déborde d'une énergie d'un autre monde intensifiée. L'ectoplasme sert de protection à l'esprit central de ce Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Sein Panzer quillt über vor erhöhter jenseitiger Energie. Das Ektoplasma dient als Schutz für den Kerngeist dieses Pokémon.
descriptions.es: Su caparazón rebosa de su energía sobrenatural intensificada. El ectoplasma sirve como protección para el espíritu central de este Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Il suo guscio è straripante della sua accresciuta energia ultraterrena. L'ectoplasma serve da protezione per lo spirito centrale di questo Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 高まった異界のエネルギーが殻から溢れ出ている。生じるエクトプラズムは、本体の魂を守る。
descriptions.ko: 높아진 이계의 에너지가 껍데기에서 흘러넘친다. 생겨난 에너지는 본체의 영혼을 지킨다.

name: sirfetchd
description: Only Farfetch’d that have survived many battles can attain this evolution. When this Pokémon’s leek withers, it will retire from combat.
appearance: A valiant, white duck-like Pokémon with yellow feathers, carrying a large green leek stalk as a sword and a leek shield, with a stern expression and bushy yellow eyebrows.

descriptions.fr: Seuls les Canarticho ayant survécu à de nombreux combats peuvent atteindre cette évolution. Quand le poireau de ce Pokémon se flétrit, il se retire du combat.
descriptions.de: Nur Lauchzelot, die viele Kämpfe überlebt haben, können diese Entwicklung erreichen. Wenn der Lauch dieses Pokémon welkt, zieht es sich aus dem Kampf zurück.
descriptions.es: Solo los Farfetch'd que han sobrevivido a muchas batallas pueden alcanzar esta evolución. Cuando el puerro de este Pokémon se marchita, se retira del combate.
descriptions.it: Solo i Farfetch'd che sono sopravvissuti a molte battaglie possono raggiungere questa evoluzione. Quando il porro di questo Pokémon appassisce, si ritira dal combattimento.
descriptions.ja: 数多くの戦いを生き抜いたカモネギだけがなれる進化。持っているネギが枯れてしまうと引退する。
descriptions.ko: 수많은 싸움에서 살아남은 파오리만이 할 수 있는 진화다. 들고 있는 파가 시들면 싸움에서 은퇴한다.

name: mr-rime
description: It’s highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice in time with its graceful movements.
appearance: A bipedal, light blue mime-like Pokémon with a large belly, a black top hat, a black mustache, a black bow tie, and a blue cane, appearing to have icicles on its fingers.

descriptions.fr: Il est très doué pour les claquettes. Il agite sa canne de glace au rythme de ses mouvements gracieux.
descriptions.de: Es ist sehr geschickt im Stepptanz. Es schwingt seinen Eisstock im Takt seiner anmutigen Bewegungen.
descriptions.es: Es muy hábil en el claqué. Agita su bastón de hielo al ritmo de sus elegantes movimientos.
descriptions.it: È abilissimo nel tip-tap. Agita il suo bastone di ghiaccio a tempo con i suoi movimenti aggraziati.
descriptions.ja: タップダンスの達人。優雅な動きに合わせて、氷のステッキを振り回す。
descriptions.ko: 탭댄스의 달인이다. 우아한 움직임에 맞춰 얼음 지팡이를 휘두른다.

name: runerigus
description: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move.
appearance: A large, flat, dark gray slab of stone, resembling an ancient carving or tablet, with a single glowing yellow eye in the center and several shadowy, purple-edged arms extending from its sides.

descriptions.fr: Une puissante malédiction fut tissée dans une peinture ancienne. Après avoir absorbé l'esprit d'un Tutafeh, la peinture commença à bouger.
descriptions.de: Ein mächtiger Fluch wurde in ein altes Gemälde gewoben. Nachdem es den Geist eines Makabaja absorbiert hatte, begann das Gemälde sich zu bewegen.
descriptions.es: Una poderosa maldición fue tejida en una antigua pintura. Después de absorber el espíritu de un Yamask, la pintura comenzó a moverse.
descriptions.it: Una potente maledizione fu tessuta in un antico dipinto. Dopo aver assorbito lo spirito di uno Yamask, il dipinto iniziò a muoversi.
descriptions.ja: 古い絵画に強大な呪いが込められた。デスマスのお化けを吸収し、絵画が動き出した。
descriptions.ko: 오래된 그림에 강력한 저주가 깃들었다. 데스마스의 영혼을 흡수하자 그림이 움직이기 시작했다.

name: milcery
description: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.
appearance: A small, amorphous, white or cream-colored dollop-shaped Pokémon with two small yellow dot eyes, a tiny red dot mouth, and a distinctive swirl on top of its head resembling whipped cream, often adorned with a small red berry-like accent and sometimes a light blue bow.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est né de particules odorantes présentes dans l'air. Son corps est fait de crème.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon entstand aus süßlich duftenden Partikeln in der Luft. Sein Körper besteht aus Sahne.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon nace de partículas dulzonas que flotan en el aire. Su cuerpo está hecho de nata.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è nato da particelle dolciastre presenti nell'aria. Il suo corpo è fatto di panna.
descriptions.ja: 空中に漂う　甘い　香りの　粒子から　生まれた　ポケモン。　体は　クリームで　できている。
descriptions.ko: 공중에 떠다니는 달콤한 향기 입자에서 태어난 포켓몬. 몸은 크림으로 되어 있다.

name: alcremie
description: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.
appearance: A whipped cream-like entity with a large, swirled body, two wide eyes, and various edible-looking 'sweets' (like berries, ribbons, or clovers) adorning its head and body, with its primary body color varying greatly based on its specific form, ranging from white to pink, yellow, green, or other hues.

descriptions.fr: Quand il fait confiance à son Dresseur, il lui offre des Baies qu'il a décorées avec sa crème.
descriptions.de: Vertraut es einem Trainer, bietet es ihm mit Sahne verzierte Beeren an.
descriptions.es: Cuando confía en un Entrenador, le ofrece bayas que ha decorado con nata.
descriptions.it: Quando si fida di un Allenatore, gli offre delle bacche decorate con la sua panna.
descriptions.ja: トレーナーを　信頼すると　生クリームで　デコレーションした　きのみを　振る舞ってくれる。
descriptions.ko: 트레이너를 신뢰하면 생크림으로 장식한 나무열매를 대접해준다.

name: falinks
description: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute.
appearance: A formation of six bipedal, beetle-like creatures, primarily golden yellow with dark brown accents, linked together in a line; each individual creature has a round helmet with two dark brown horn-like protrusions, prominent dark brown eyes, a cylindrical body, and two stubby legs.

descriptions.fr: Cinq d'entre eux sont des troupiers, et un est le chef. Les ordres du chef sont absolus.
descriptions.de: Fünf sind die Truppler, einer ist der Kommandant. Dessen Befehle sind absolut.
descriptions.es: Cinco son soldados y uno es el líder. Las órdenes de este último son absolutas.
descriptions.it: Cinque di loro sono soldati, uno è il capo. Gli ordini di quest'ultimo sono assoluti.
descriptions.ja: ５匹が　兵隊で　１匹が　隊長。　隊長の　命令は　絶対。
descriptions.ko: 5마리는 병사고 1마리는 대장이다. 대장의 명령은 절대적이다.

name: pincurchin
description: It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.
appearance: A black, spiky, sea urchin-like Pokémon with a spherical body, yellow eyes, yellow spiky antennae-like appendages on its top, and a yellow mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il se nourrit d'algues qu'il racle des rochers avec ses dents. Du courant électrique s'écoule des extrémités de ses épines.
descriptions.de: Es ernährt sich von Algen, die es mit seinen Zähnen von Felsen kratzt. Von den Spitzen seiner Stacheln fließt elektrischer Strom.
descriptions.es: Se alimenta de algas, las cuales raspa de las rocas con sus dientes. De la punta de sus espinas fluye corriente eléctrica.
descriptions.it: Si nutre di alghe, che raschia dalle rocce con i denti. Dalla punta delle sue spine scorre corrente elettrica.
descriptions.ja: 海藻を　歯で　岩から　削り取り　食べる。　トゲの　先端からは　電気が　流れる。
descriptions.ko: 해초를 이빨로 바위에서 긁어내서 먹는다. 가시 끝에서는 전기가 흐른다.

name: snom
description: It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps.
appearance: A small, white, caterpillar-like Pokémon with a translucent icy-blue shell covered in spikes on its back, two small black eyes, and two antennae.

descriptions.fr: Il crache un fil imprégné d'une énergie glaciale et l'utilise pour s'accrocher aux branches, se déguisant en glaçon pendant qu'il dort.
descriptions.de: Es spuckt einen Faden aus, der mit eisiger Energie erfüllt ist, und benutzt ihn, um seinen Körper an Ästen zu befestigen, wodurch es sich im Schlaf als Eiszapfen tarnt.
descriptions.es: Escupe un hilo imbuido de energía gélida y lo usa para atar su cuerpo a las ramas, disfrazándose de carámbano mientras duerme.
descriptions.it: Emette un filo imbevuto di energia gelida e lo usa per legarsi ai rami, mascherandosi da ghiacciolo mentre dorme.
descriptions.ja: 冷気を含んだ　糸を　吐き出し　枝に　体を　括りつけ　寝ている間　つららに　擬態する。
descriptions.ko: 냉기를 머금은 실을 뱉어서 나뭇가지에 몸을 묶고 자는 동안 고드름으로 위장한다.

name: frosmoth
description: Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit.
appearance: A white moth-like Pokémon with large, elegant wings primarily white with light blue markings and dark blue veins, a fluffy white body, two feathery antennae, and two small black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Des écailles glacées tombent de ses ailes comme de la neige lorsqu'il vole au-dessus des champs et des montagnes. La température de ses ailes est inférieure à -178 degrés Celsius.
descriptions.de: Wenn es über Felder und Berge fliegt, fallen eisige Schuppen wie Schnee von seinen Flügeln. Die Temperatur seiner Flügel liegt unter -178 Grad Celsius.
descriptions.es: Escamas gélidas caen de sus alas como nieve mientras vuela sobre campos y montañas. La temperatura de sus alas es inferior a -178 grados Celsius.
descriptions.it: Squame ghiacciate cadono dalle sue ali come neve mentre vola su campi e montagne. La temperatura delle sue ali è inferiore a -178 gradi Celsius.
descriptions.ja: 野山を　飛びながら　翼から　氷の　鱗粉を　雪のように　降らせる。　翼の　温度は　氷点下１７８度。
descriptions.ko: 들과 산 위를 날면서 날개에서 얼음가루를 눈처럼 내린다. 날개의 온도는 영하 178도이다.

name: stonjourner
description: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.
appearance: A bipedal Pokémon composed of several large, gray, rectangular stone slabs arranged vertically, with a central 'head' stone featuring two bright yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il se tient dans les prairies, observant le soleil descendre du zénith à l'horizon. Ce Pokémon a un talent pour les coups de pied dynamiques.
descriptions.de: Es steht in Graslandschaften und beobachtet den Sonnenuntergang von ihrem höchsten Punkt bis zum Horizont. Dieses Pokémon hat ein Talent für dynamische Tritte.
descriptions.es: Permanece en las praderas, observando cómo el sol desciende del cénit al horizonte. Este Pokémon tiene talento para dar patadas dinámicas.
descriptions.it: Si erge nelle praterie, osservando il sole scendere dallo zenit all'orizzonte. Questo Pokémon ha un talento per sferrare calci dinamici.
descriptions.ja: 草原に　立ち　太陽が　真上から　地平線に　沈むのを　見届ける。　ダイナミックな　キックが　得意。
descriptions.ko: 초원에 서서 태양이 머리 위에서 지평선으로 지는 것을 지켜본다. 역동적인 킥이 특기다.

name: eiscue-ice
description: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.
appearance: A penguin-like Pokémon with a light blue body, two dark blue feet, and a large, cubic block of ice for a head, within which its small black eyes are visible.

descriptions.fr: Il a dérivé jusqu'ici, porté par les courants marins d'un endroit glacial. Il maintient sa tête gelée en permanence pour qu'elle reste bien froide.
descriptions.de: Es wurde von Meeresströmungen aus einem kalten Ort hierhergespült. Es hält seinen Kopf ständig eisig, damit er schön kalt bleibt.
descriptions.es: Llegó a la deriva con las corrientes oceánicas desde un lugar gélido. Mantiene su cabeza helada constantemente para asegurarse de que permanezca bien fría.
descriptions.it: È arrivato alla deriva trasportato dalle correnti oceaniche da un luogo gelido. Mantiene la testa ghiacciata costantemente per assicurarsi che rimanga ben fredda.
descriptions.ja: 氷の　海から　海流に乗って　流れ着いた。　いつも　頭を　氷で　冷やしていないと　落ち着かない。
descriptions.ko: 얼음 바다에서 해류를 타고 떠내려왔다. 항상 머리를 얼음으로 식히지 않으면 안절부절못한다.

display_names.ja: コオリッポ アイスフェイス

name: indeedee-male
description: It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need.
appearance: A bipedal, dark blue and white Pokémon with a sleek build, a white chest and face, dark blue ears, and a distinctive dark blue horn-like curl on its forehead, featuring gentle blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise les cornes de sa tête pour ressentir les émotions d'autrui. Les mâles servent de valets à ceux qu'ils accompagnent, veillant à tous leurs besoins.
descriptions.de: Es nutzt die Hörner auf seinem Kopf, um die Emotionen anderer zu erspüren. Männliche Exemplare agieren als Diener für jene, denen sie dienen, und kümmern sich um all ihre Bedürfnisse.
descriptions.es: Usa los cuernos de su cabeza para sentir las emociones ajenas. Los machos actúan como mayordomos de quienes sirven, cuidando de todas sus necesidades.
descriptions.it: Usa le corna sulla testa per percepire le emozioni altrui. Gli esemplari maschi agiscono come valletti per coloro che servono, curando ogni loro necessità.
descriptions.ja: 頭の　ツノで　他者の　感情を　察する。　オスは　仕える　相手の　世話を　甲斐甲斐しく　こなす。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 뿔로 다른 이의 감정을 감지한다. 수컷은 모시는 상대의 시중을 헌신적으로 해낸다.

name: morpeko-full-belly
description: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity.
appearance: A small, bipedal rodent-like Pokémon with a yellow-orange body, dark brown fur on its face, back, and paws, two small dark eyes, a small orange nose, and two prominent yellow cheeks.

descriptions.fr: En mangeant les graines stockées dans ses poches, ce Pokémon ne fait pas que satisfaire sa faim constante. Il génère également de l'électricité.
descriptions.de: Während es die in seinen taschenartigen Beuteln gelagerten Samen frisst, stillt dieses Pokémon nicht nur seinen ständigen Hunger. Es erzeugt auch Elektrizität.
descriptions.es: Al comer las semillas que guarda en sus sacos, este Pokémon no solo satisface su hambre constante, sino que también genera electricidad.
descriptions.it: Mangiando i semi immagazzinati nelle sue sacche simili a tasche, questo Pokémon non solo soddisfa la sua fame costante, ma genera anche elettricità.
descriptions.ja: ポシェットに　ためた　タネを　食べる　たびに　慢性的な　空腹を　満たしながら　発電する。
descriptions.ko: 주머니 같은 포켓에 모아둔 씨앗을 먹을 때마다 끊임없는 허기를 채우면서 전기를 생성한다.

display_names.ja: モルペコ まんぷくもよう

name: cufant
description: It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.
appearance: A small, light blue elephant-like Pokémon resembling a baby pachyderm constructed from copper, with large, round ears, a short trunk, and four sturdy legs.

descriptions.fr: Il creuse le sol avec sa trompe. Très puissant, il peut transporter des charges de plus de cinq tonnes sans difficulté.
descriptions.de: Es gräbt mit seinem Rüssel den Boden um. Es ist sehr stark und kann mühelos Lasten von über fünf Tonnen tragen.
descriptions.es: Excava el suelo con su trompa. Es muy fuerte y puede transportar cargas de más de cinco toneladas sin ningún problema.
descriptions.it: Scava il terreno con la sua proboscide. È molto forte e può trasportare carichi di oltre cinque tonnellate senza alcuna difficoltà.
descriptions.ja: 鼻を使って地面を掘る。５トンを超える荷物も軽々と運べる怪力の持ち主。
descriptions.ko: 코를 사용해서 땅을 판다. 5톤이 넘는 짐도 거뜬히 옮기는 괴력 포켓몬.

name: copperajah
description: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.
appearance: A large, teal-green elephant-like Pokémon resembling oxidized copper, with a broad, flat trunk ending in a shovel-like appendage, massive flat ears, and heavy, segmented legs.

descriptions.fr: Venu d’une autre région il y a longtemps, il a collaboré avec les humains. Sa peau verte est résistante à l’eau.
descriptions.de: Es kam vor langer Zeit aus einer anderen Region und arbeitete mit Menschen zusammen. Seine grüne Haut ist wasserbeständig.
descriptions.es: Llegaron de otra región hace mucho tiempo y trabajaron junto a los humanos. Su piel verde es resistente al agua.
descriptions.it: Arrivato da un’altra regione tempo fa, ha collaborato con gli umani. La sua pelle verde è resistente all’acqua.
descriptions.ja: 大昔に別の地方から渡来し、人々と共に働いた。緑色の皮膚は水に強い。
descriptions.ko: 아주 옛날 다른 지방에서 넘어와 사람들과 함께 일했다. 녹색 피부는 물에 강하다.

name: dracozolt
description: In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body, but it went extinct anyway after it depleted all its plant-based food sources.
appearance: A bipedal creature appearing stitched together, with a yellow, reptilian lower body and tail, sharp claws, and a green, bird-like upper body featuring a long neck, a small head with a beak, and orange eyes.

descriptions.fr: Dans l’Antiquité, ses puissantes pattes arrière le rendaient imbattable. Il s’est pourtant éteint en épuisant toutes ses ressources végétales.
descriptions.de: In alten Zeiten war es dank seines kräftigen Unterkörpers unschlagbar, doch starb es aus, nachdem es alle pflanzlichen Nahrungsquellen erschöpft hatte.
descriptions.es: En la antigüedad, era invencible gracias a su potente parte inferior, pero se extinguió tras agotar todas sus fuentes de alimento vegetal.
descriptions.it: Nell’antichità era imbattibile grazie al suo potente corpo inferiore, ma si estinse dopo aver esaurito tutte le sue fonti di cibo vegetale.
descriptions.ja: 大昔、強力な下半身で無敵を誇ったが、植物性の食料を食い尽くし絶滅した。
descriptions.ko: 옛날에는 강한 하반신으로 무적을 자랑했지만 식물성 먹이를 모두 먹어버려 멸종했다.

name: arctozolt
description: The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around.
appearance: A bipedal creature appearing stitched together, with a light blue, reptilian lower body and tail, sharp claws, and a dark blue, bird-like upper body featuring a long neck, a small head with a beak, and yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Les secousses de sa moitié supérieure gelée génèrent son électricité. Il a beaucoup de mal à se déplacer.
descriptions.de: Das Schütteln seiner gefrorenen oberen Hälfte erzeugt Elektrizität. Es hat Schwierigkeiten beim Gehen.
descriptions.es: La agitación de su mitad superior congelada es lo que genera su electricidad. Le cuesta mucho caminar.
descriptions.it: Il tremore della sua metà superiore congelata genera elettricità. Si muove con grande difficoltà.
descriptions.ja: 凍った上半身が震えることで電気を起こす。歩き回るのは苦手。
descriptions.ko: 얼어붙은 상반신이 떨려서 전기를 발생시킨다. 걸어 다니는 것은 서투르다.

name: dracovish
description: Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction.
appearance: A bipedal creature appearing stitched together, with a light blue, fish-like head featuring large eyes and a prominent fin, attached to a scaly, green reptilian body with four sturdy legs and a tail.

descriptions.fr: Ses puissantes pattes et mâchoires en faisaient le prédateur suprême de son époque. La surchasse de ses proies l’a mené à l’extinction.
descriptions.de: Kräftige Beine und Kiefer machten es zum Spitzenprädator seiner Zeit. Seine eigene Überjagung seiner Beute führte zu seinem Aussterben.
descriptions.es: Sus potentes patas y mandíbulas lo convirtieron en el depredador más temido de su época. La sobrecaza de sus presas lo llevó a la extinción.
descriptions.it: Zampe e mascelle potenti lo rendevano il predatore apicale del suo tempo. La sua stessa caccia eccessiva alle prede lo portò all’estinzione.
descriptions.ja: 強力な脚と顎は当時の生態系の頂点に君臨したが、獲物を食い尽くし絶滅した。
descriptions.ko: 강한 다리와 턱은 당시 생태계의 정점에 군림했지만 먹이를 모두 먹어버려서 멸종했다.

name: arctovish
description: Though it’s able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head.
appearance: A bipedal creature appearing stitched together, with a light blue, fish-like head featuring large eyes and a prominent fin, attached to a scaly, dark blue reptilian body with four sturdy legs and a tail.

descriptions.fr: Bien qu’il puisse capturer ses proies en gelant ses environs, il a du mal à les manger ensuite, sa bouche étant située sur le dessus de sa tête.
descriptions.de: Obwohl es Beute fangen kann, indem es seine Umgebung einfriert, hat es Schwierigkeiten, die Beute danach zu fressen, da sich sein Mund oben auf dem Kopf befindet.
descriptions.es: Aunque puede capturar presas congelando su entorno, le cuesta comerlas después porque su boca está en la parte superior de su cabeza.
descriptions.it: Sebbene possa catturare le prede congelando l’ambiente circostante, ha difficoltà a mangiarle in seguito perché la sua bocca si trova sulla sommità del capo.
descriptions.ja: 周囲を凍らせて獲物を捕らえるが、口が頭の上にあるため、捕まえても食べるのに苦労する。
descriptions.ko: 주변을 얼려서 먹이를 잡지만 입이 머리 위에 있어 잡은 먹이를 먹기 어렵다.

name: duraludon
description: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.
appearance: A tall, metallic gray bipedal Pokémon with a sleek, angular body, blocky forearms, a long neck, and a small head with two glowing green eyes, resembling a skyscraper.

descriptions.fr: Son corps ressemble à du métal poli, léger et résistant à la fois. Son seul inconvénient est qu’il rouille facilement.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper ähnelt poliertem Metall und ist sowohl leicht als auch stark. Der einzige Nachteil ist, dass es leicht rostet.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo, que parece metal pulido, es ligero y resistente. El único inconveniente es que se oxida con facilidad.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo, simile a metallo lucidato, è leggero e forte allo stesso tempo. L’unico difetto è che arrugginisce facilmente.
descriptions.ja: 磨かれた金属のような体は、軽くて丈夫。唯一の欠点は錆びやすいこと。
descriptions.ko: 닦은 금속 같은 몸은 가볍고 튼튼하다. 유일한 단점은 녹이 잘 슨다는 점.

name: dreepy
description: After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas.
appearance: A small, green, lizard-like Pokémon with a triangular head, two small red eyes, and a translucent, ghostly tail that tapers to a point.

descriptions.fr: Après être revenu à la vie sous forme de Pokémon Spectre, il erre dans les lieux où il vivait autrefois, dans les mers préhistoriques.
descriptions.de: Als Geister-Pokémon wiedergeboren, streift es durch die Gebiete, die es zu seinen Lebzeiten in prähistorischen Meeren bewohnte.
descriptions.es: Tras renacer como Pokémon de tipo Fantasma, Dreepy vaga por las zonas que habitaba cuando vivía en los mares prehistóricos.
descriptions.it: Dopo essere rinato come Pokémon Spettro, Dreepy vaga nelle aree che abitava quando era vivo nei mari preistorici.
descriptions.ja: ゴーストポケモンとして生まれ変わり、生前の棲み処だった太古の海をさまよう。
descriptions.ko: 고스트 포켓몬으로 다시 태어나 살아있을 적에 살았던 태고의 바다를 떠돈다.

name: drakloak
description: It’s capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve.
appearance: A medium-sized, green, salamander-like Pokémon with a large, flat, dark blue triangular head featuring red eyes, and a tail that holds a smaller Dreepy.

descriptions.fr: Capable de voler à plus de 200 km/h, il combat aux côtés des Fantyrm et les couve jusqu’à ce qu’ils évoluent.
descriptions.de: Es kann über 120 mph fliegen. Es kämpft an der Seite von Dreepy und umsorgt sie, bis sie sich erfolgreich entwickeln.
descriptions.es: Es capaz de volar a más de 120 mph. Lucha junto a Dreepy y los cuida con mimo hasta que evolucionan con éxito.
descriptions.it: È capace di volare a oltre 120 mph. Combatte al fianco dei Dreepy e li accudisce finché non si evolvono con successo.
descriptions.ja: 時速２００キロ超で飛ぶことができる。ドラメシヤと一緒に戦い、進化するまで面倒を見る。
descriptions.ko: 시속 200km가 넘는 속도로 날 수 있다. 드라메시야와 함께 싸우며 진화할 때까지 돌봐준다.

name: dragapult
description: When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.
appearance: A sleek, green dragon-like Pokémon with a flat, dark blue triangular head featuring red eyes, and two Dreepy nested in hollows on its forearms, resembling missile launchers.

descriptions.fr: Quand il ne se bat pas, il garde des Fantyrm dans les trous de ses cornes. Une fois le combat engagé, il les lance comme des missiles supersoniques.
descriptions.de: Wenn es nicht kämpft, bewahrt es Dreepy in den Löchern seiner Hörner auf. Sobald ein Kampf beginnt, schleudert es die Dreepy wie Überschallraketen.
descriptions.es: Cuando no lucha, guarda a los Dreepy en los agujeros de sus cuernos. En cuanto empieza un combate, los lanza como misiles supersónicos.
descriptions.it: Quando non combatte, tiene i Dreepy nei buchi delle sue corna. Una volta iniziato uno scontro, li lancia come missili supersonici.
descriptions.ja: 戦わないときは角の穴にドラメシヤをしまっている。バトルになると超音速ミサイルとして発射。
descriptions.ko: 싸우지 않을 때는 뿔의 구멍에 드라메시야를 넣어둔다. 배틀이 시작되면 초음속 미사일처럼 발사한다.

name: zacian
description: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.
appearance: A majestic wolf-like Pokémon with a predominantly blue and white body, golden accents on its legs and tail, and a prominent golden sword held in its mouth.

descriptions.fr: Connu comme un héros légendaire, ce Pokémon absorbe les particules de métal et les transforme en une arme qu'il utilise au combat.
descriptions.de: Als legendärer Held bekannt, absorbiert dieses Pokémon Metallpartikel und verwandelt sie in eine Waffe, die es im Kampf einsetzt.
descriptions.es: Conocido como un héroe legendario, este Pokémon absorbe partículas de metal, transformándolas en un arma que usa para el combate.
descriptions.it: Conosciuto come un eroe leggendario, questo Pokémon assorbe particelle di metallo e le trasforma in un'arma che usa in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 伝説の英雄として知られ、金属の粒子を吸収し、それを武器に変えて戦うポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 전설의 영웅으로 알려진 포켓몬. 금속 입자를 흡수하여 무기로 변화시킨 뒤 싸움에 이용한다.

name: zamazenta
description: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle.
appearance: A formidable wolf-like Pokémon with a predominantly red and white body, golden accents, and a large, circular, shield-like mane and chest plate covering its upper body.

descriptions.fr: Jadis, il a travaillé avec un roi pour sauver la région de Galar. Il absorbe le métal qu'il utilise ensuite au combat.
descriptions.de: In vergangenen Zeiten arbeitete es mit einem König des Volkes zusammen, um die Galar-Region zu retten. Es absorbiert Metall, das es dann im Kampf einsetzt.
descriptions.es: En el pasado, colaboró con un rey para salvar la región de Galar. Absorbe metal, que luego utiliza en el combate.
descriptions.it: In passato, ha collaborato con un re per salvare la regione di Galar. Assorbe il metallo che poi usa in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 過去には人々の王と共にガラル地方を救った。金属を吸収し、それを戦いに利用する。
descriptions.ko: 옛날에는 사람들의 왕과 함께 가라르지방을 구했다. 금속을 흡수하여 싸움에 이용한다.

name: eternatus
description: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.
appearance: A colossal, serpentine dragon with a skeletal purple and red body, sharp claws, glowing red eyes, and spiky appendages, resembling a cosmic skeletal dragon.

descriptions.fr: Le noyau sur sa poitrine absorbe l'énergie émanant des terres de la région de Galar. Cette énergie permet à Éthernatos de rester actif.
descriptions.de: Der Kern auf seiner Brust absorbiert Energie, die von den Ländern der Galar-Region ausgeht. Diese Energie ermöglicht es Endynalos, aktiv zu bleiben.
descriptions.es: El núcleo de su pecho absorbe la energía que emana de las tierras de la región de Galar. Esta energía es lo que le permite a Eternatus mantenerse activo.
descriptions.it: Il nucleo sul suo petto assorbe l'energia emanata dalle terre della regione di Galar. Questa energia permette a Eternatus di rimanere attivo.
descriptions.ja: 胸のコアはガラル地方の土地から放出されるエネルギーを吸収し、そのエネルギーがムゲンダイナを活動させる。
descriptions.ko: 가슴에 있는 코어가 가라르지방의 땅에서 방출되는 에너지를 흡수하여 무한다이노가 활동할 수 있게 한다.

name: kubfu
description: Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.
appearance: A small, bipedal bear cub-like Pokémon with a light brown body, white face, white chest marking, and a distinctive black headband-like pattern on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: Wushours s'entraîne assidûment pour perfectionner ses techniques. Celles qu'il maîtrise détermineront sa forme évoluée.
descriptions.de: Dakuma trainiert hart, um seine Attacken zu perfektionieren. Die von ihm gemeisterten Attacken bestimmen, welche Form es bei der Entwicklung annimmt.
descriptions.es: Kubfu entrena duro para perfeccionar sus movimientos. Los movimientos que domine determinarán la forma que adoptará al evolucionar.
descriptions.it: Kubfu si allena duramente per perfezionare le sue mosse. Le mosse che padroneggia determineranno la forma che assumerà quando si evolverà.
descriptions.ja: 技を磨くため厳しい修行に励む。どの技を極めるかで、進化後の姿が決まる。
descriptions.ko: 기술을 완성하기 위해 혹독한 수련을 한다. 어떤 기술을 연마하느냐에 따라 진화한 모습이 결정된다.

name: urshifu-single-strike
description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
appearance: A bipedal bear-like Pokémon with a dark gray and white muscular body, intense red eyes, and a prominent black and white pattern resembling a martial arts uniform.

descriptions.fr: Cette forme de Shifours croit fermement au KO en un coup. Sa stratégie consiste à bondir sur ses adversaires et à asséner un coup dévastateur avec un poing durci.
descriptions.de: Diese Form von Wulaosu glaubt fest an den K.O. mit einem einzigen Schlag. Seine Strategie ist es, Gegnern nahezukommen und einen verheerenden Schlag mit einer verhärteten Faust zu landen.
descriptions.es: Esta forma de Urshifu cree firmemente en el K.O. de un solo golpe. Su estrategia es saltar cerca de los enemigos y asestar un golpe devastador con un puño endurecido.
descriptions.it: Questa forma di Urshifu è una fervente sostenitrice del KO con un solo colpo. La sua strategia consiste nel balzare vicino ai nemici e sferrare un colpo devastante con un pugno indurito.
descriptions.ja: 一撃必殺を信じるイチゲキのかたのウーラオス。相手に飛び込み、硬化した拳で破壊的な一撃を叩き込むのが得意。
descriptions.ko: 일격필살을 신봉하는 일격의 태세 우라오스. 상대에게 뛰어들어 경화된 주먹으로 파괴적인 일격을 날리는 것이 특기다.

display_names.ja: ウーラオス いちげきのかた

name: zarude
description: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.
appearance: A large, dark gray ape-like Pokémon with green vines wrapped around its arms and waist, sharp red eyes, and white fur on its chest and face.

descriptions.fr: Dans les forêts denses, ce Pokémon vit en bande avec les autres de son espèce. Il est incroyablement agressif, et les autres Pokémon de la forêt le craignent.
descriptions.de: In dichten Wäldern lebt dieses Pokémon in einem Rudel mit anderen seiner Art. Es ist unglaublich aggressiv, und die anderen Pokémon des Waldes fürchten es.
descriptions.es: En los densos bosques, este Pokémon vive en manada con otros de su especie. Es increíblemente agresivo, y los demás Pokémon del bosque le temen.
descriptions.it: Nelle fitte foreste, questo Pokémon vive in branco con altri della sua specie. È incredibilmente aggressivo e gli altri Pokémon della foresta lo temono.
descriptions.ja: 密林で同族の群れを成して暮らすポケモン。非常に攻撃的で、森のほかのポケモンたちはザルードを恐れる。
descriptions.ko: 밀림에서 동족 무리를 지어 사는 포켓몬. 엄청나게 공격적이어서 숲의 다른 포켓몬들은 자루도를 무서워한다.

name: regieleki
description: This Pokémon is a cluster of electrical energy. It’s said that removing the rings on Regieleki’s body will unleash the Pokémon’s latent power.
appearance: A golem-like Pokémon primarily made of yellow electrical energy, with a round body, two prominent blue lightning bolt-shaped arms, and a single blue eye.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est un amas d'énergie électrique. On dit qu'en retirant les anneaux de son corps, on libérerait son pouvoir latent.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ist eine Ansammlung elektrischer Energie. Man sagt, dass das Entfernen der Ringe an Regielekis Körper seine latente Kraft entfesseln würde.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon es un cúmulo de energía eléctrica. Se dice que quitarle los anillos del cuerpo liberaría el poder latente del Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è un ammasso di energia elettrica. Si dice che rimuovendo gli anelli dal corpo di Regieleki si scatenerebbe il suo potere latente.
descriptions.ja: 電気を束ねて形作られたポケモン。体のリングが外れると、レジエレキの隠された力が解き放たれると言われている。
descriptions.ko: 전기의 덩어리로 이루어진 포켓몬. 몸에 붙은 링이 풀리면 레지에레키의 숨겨진 힘이 해방된다고 한다.

name: regidrago
description: An academic theory proposes that Regidrago’s arms were once the head of an ancient dragon Pokémon. The theory remains unproven.
appearance: A golem-like Pokémon made of red material, with a spherical body, two short legs, and a distinctive head resembling a dragon's maw with a single black eye inside.

descriptions.fr: Une théorie académique suggère que les bras de Regidrago étaient autrefois la tête d'un ancien Pokémon dragon. La théorie reste non prouvée.
descriptions.de: Eine akademische Theorie besagt, dass Regidragos Arme einst der Kopf eines alten Drachen-Pokémon waren. Die Theorie ist noch unbewiesen.
descriptions.es: Una teoría académica propone que los brazos de Regidrago fueron la cabeza de un antiguo Pokémon dragón. La teoría sigue sin ser probada.
descriptions.it: Una teoria accademica propone che le braccia di Regidrago fossero un tempo la testa di un antico Pokémon drago. La teoria rimane non provata.
descriptions.ja: レジドラゴの腕は、かつて古代のドラゴンポケモンの頭だったという学説がある。この学説は未だ証明されていない。
descriptions.ko: 레지드래고의 팔은 옛날 드래곤 포켓몬의 머리였다는 학설이 있다. 이 학설은 아직 증명되지 않았다.

name: glastrier
description: Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It’s also a belligerent Pokémon—anything it wants, it takes by force.
appearance: A powerful, robust white horse Pokémon with blue hooves, a blue mane and tail, and a determined expression, its face covered by a thick icy mask.

descriptions.fr: Blizzeval émet un froid intense de ses sabots. C'est aussi un Pokémon belliqueux : tout ce qu'il veut, il le prend par la force.
descriptions.de: Phantoross sendet intensive Kälte aus seinen Hufen aus. Es ist auch ein kriegerisches Pokémon – alles, was es will, nimmt es mit Gewalt.
descriptions.es: Glastrier emite un frío intenso de sus cascos. También es un Pokémon beligerante: todo lo que quiere, lo toma por la fuerza.
descriptions.it: Glastrier emette un freddo intenso dai suoi zoccoli. È anche un Pokémon belligerante: tutto ciò che vuole, lo prende con la forza.
descriptions.ja: ひづめから強烈な冷気を放つ。欲しいものは力ずくで奪い取る荒々しいポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 발굽에서 강렬한 냉기를 발사한다. 원하는 것은 힘으로 빼앗는 호전적인 포켓몬이다.

name: spectrier
description: It probes its surroundings with all its senses save one—it doesn’t use its sense of sight. Spectrier’s kicks are said to separate soul from body.
appearance: A slender, ghostly purple horse Pokémon with black hooves, a purple mane and tail, and an ethereal glow, its face covered by a wispy, dark mask.

descriptions.fr: Il explore son environnement avec tous ses sens, sauf un : il n'utilise pas sa vue. Les coups de sabot de Spectreval sépareraient l'âme du corps.
descriptions.de: Es erkundet seine Umgebung mit all seinen Sinnen, außer einem – es nutzt seinen Sehsinn nicht. Man sagt, dass Phantorosas Tritte Seele und Körper trennen.
descriptions.es: Explora su entorno con todos sus sentidos excepto uno: no usa su vista. Se dice que las patadas de Spectrier separan el alma del cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Sonda l'ambiente circostante con tutti i suoi sensi tranne uno: non usa la vista. Si dice che i calci di Spectrier separino l'anima dal corpo.
descriptions.ja: 視覚以外の感覚で周囲を探る。レイスポスの蹴りは魂と肉体を分離させると言われている。
descriptions.ko: 시각 이외의 감각으로 주위를 탐색한다. 레이스포스의 발차기는 혼과 육체를 분리한다고 전해진다.

name: calyrex
description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.
appearance: A small, white, bipedal rabbit-like Pokémon with large green ears, a white fluffy tail, and a prominent golden crown on its head, carrying a golden scepter.

descriptions.fr: Calyrex est un Pokémon miséricordieux, capable d'offrir soins et bénédictions. Il régnait sur la région de Galar en des temps immémoriaux.
descriptions.de: Calyrex ist ein barmherziges Pokémon, das Heilung und Segen spendet. Es herrschte in alten Zeiten über die Galar-Region.
descriptions.es: Calyrex es un Pokémon misericordioso, capaz de otorgar curación y bendiciones. Reinó sobre la región de Galar en tiempos antiguos.
descriptions.it: Calyrex è un Pokémon misericordioso, capace di offrire cure e benedizioni. Regnò sulla regione di Galar in tempi antichi.
descriptions.ja: 慈悲深く、癒しと祝福を与えることができるポケモン。かつてガラル地方を統治していた。
descriptions.ko: 자비로운 포켓몬으로, 치유와 축복을 베풀 수 있다. 옛날에는 가라르지방을 통치했다.

name: wyrdeer
description: The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.
appearance: A large, majestic deer-like Pokémon with a brown body, white belly, a distinctive black mask-like marking around its eyes, and ornate, dark brown and white antlers that curve upwards and outwards.

descriptions.fr: Ses orbes noirs brillent d'une lumière étrange lorsque le Pokémon dresse des barrières invisibles. La fourrure qu'il perd de sa barbe retient bien la chaleur et est un matériau très utile pour les vêtements d'hiver.
descriptions.de: Die schwarzen Kugeln leuchten mit einem unheimlichen Licht, wenn das Pokémon unsichtbare Barrieren errichtet. Die Haare, die es von seinem Bart abwirft, speichern gut Wärme und sind ein nützliches Material für Winterkleidung.
descriptions.es: Sus orbes negros brillan con una luz extraña cuando erige barreras invisibles. El pelaje de su barba retiene bien el calor y es un material muy útil para la ropa de invierno.
descriptions.it: Le sue sfere nere brillano di una luce inquietante quando erige barriere invisibili. La pelliccia che perde dalla sua barba trattiene bene il calore ed è un materiale molto utile per gli indumenti invernali.
descriptions.ja: 黒い宝玉は、見えない障壁を張る際に不気味な光を放つ。その髭から抜け落ちた毛は保温性が高く、冬の衣類に重宝される素材だ。
descriptions.ko: 보이지 않는 장벽을 세울 때 검은 구슬이 섬뜩한 빛을 낸다. 수염에서 빠진 털은 보온성이 뛰어나 겨울옷에 아주 유용하다.

name: kleavor
description: A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee.
appearance: A powerful, bipedal insectoid Pokémon with a rock-hard, dark gray body, two large axe-like forearms with glowing orange patterns, and sharp yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Une créature violente qui abat des arbres immenses avec ses haches rudimentaires et se protège avec de la pierre dure. Si l'on venait à rencontrer ce Pokémon dans la nature, la seule solution serait de fuir.
descriptions.de: Ein gewalttätiges Pokémon, das mit seinen groben Äxten riesige Bäume fällt und sich mit hartem Stein schützt. Wer diesem Pokémon in freier Wildbahn begegnet, dem bleibt nur die Flucht.
descriptions.es: Una criatura violenta que derriba árboles gigantes con sus toscas hachas y se protege con roca dura. Si uno se topa con este Pokémon en la naturaleza, la única salida es huir.
descriptions.it: Una creatura violenta che abbatte alberi imponenti con le sue rozze asce e si difende con pietre dure. Se ci si dovesse imbattere in questo Pokémon selvatico, l'unica soluzione sarebbe fuggire.
descriptions.ja: 粗雑な斧で高くそびえる木々を切り倒し、硬い石で身を守る凶暴な生物。もし野性でこのポケモンに遭遇したら、逃げるしかない。
descriptions.ko: 거친 도끼로 거대한 나무를 쓰러뜨리고 단단한 돌로 몸을 보호하는 난폭한 생물. 야생에서 이 포켓몬과 마주치면 도망치는 것만이 유일한 방법이다.

name: ursaluna
description: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.
appearance: Large, bipedal, bear-like, mostly dark brown with lighter brown fur on its belly and muzzle, a prominent yellow-orange moon-like disc on its forehead, and mud-like splotches on its limbs.

descriptions.fr: Je crois que c'est le terrain marécageux de Hisui qui a donné à Ursaluna sa stature robuste et sa nouvelle capacité à manipuler la tourbe à volonté.
descriptions.de: Ich glaube, dass Ursaluna seine stämmige Gestalt und die neu erworbene Fähigkeit, Torf nach Belieben zu manipulieren, dem sumpfigen Gelände Hisuis verdankt.
descriptions.es: Creo que fue el terreno pantanoso de Hisui lo que otorgó a Ursaluna su corpulento físico y su recién descubierta capacidad de manipular la turba a voluntad.
descriptions.it: Credo che sia stato il terreno paludoso di Hisui a conferire a Ursaluna il suo fisico massiccio e la sua nuova capacità di manipolare la torba a piacimento.
descriptions.ja: ヒスイの沼地が、ガチグマにその屈強な体格と、泥炭を意のままに操る新たな能力を与えたと考えられている。
descriptions.ko: 히스이지방의 늪지대가 다투곰에게 강인한 체격과 마음대로 이탄을 조종하는 새로운 능력을 부여했다고 여겨진다.

name: basculegion-male
description: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.
appearance: Long, slender fish with a blue-green body, a white underside, a red-orange stripe running along its lateral line, and spectral white fins on its back and tail with glowing red eyes.

descriptions.fr: S'enveloppe des âmes de ses congénères péris avant d'avoir atteint leur but de remonter les rivières. Aucune autre espèce des rivières de Hisui n'est l'égale de Paragruel.
descriptions.de: Hüllt sich in die Seelen seiner Artgenossen, die starben, bevor sie ihr Ziel, flussaufwärts zu schwimmen, erfüllen konnten. Keine andere Spezies in Hisuis Flüssen kann sich mit Salmagnis messen.
descriptions.es: Se envuelve en las almas de sus camaradas que perecieron antes de cumplir su objetivo de remontar el río. Ninguna otra especie de los ríos de Hisui es igual a Basculegion.
descriptions.it: Si avvolge nelle anime dei compagni periti prima di aver raggiunto il loro scopo di risalire la corrente. Nessun'altra specie di tutti i fiumi di Hisui è pari a Basculegion.
descriptions.ja: 川を遡上する目的を果たす前に命を落とした仲間たちの魂を身にまとう。ヒスイのどの川を見渡しても、イダイトウに匹敵する種はいない。
descriptions.ko: 강을 거슬러 오르려다 뜻을 이루지 못하고 죽은 동료들의 영혼을 몸에 두른다. 히스이지방의 어떤 강을 통틀어도 대쓰여너를 따를 종은 없다.

name: sneasler
description: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.
appearance: Tall, slender, bipedal feline-like creature with white fur, purple markings on its chest and limbs, long arms with sharp black claws, and a prominent white and purple feather-like crest on its head.

descriptions.fr: En raison de son poison virulent et de ses redoutables aptitudes physiques, aucune autre espèce ne peut espérer le surpasser sur les hautes terres gelées. Préférant la solitude, cette espèce ne forme pas de meutes.
descriptions.de: Aufgrund seines virulenten Gifts und seiner beeindruckenden körperlichen Leistungsfähigkeit kann keine andere Spezies auf den gefrorenen Hochebenen hoffen, es zu übertreffen. Da es die Einsamkeit bevorzugt, bildet diese Spezies keine Rudel.
descriptions.es: Debido al virulento veneno de Sneasler y a su imponente destreza física, ninguna otra especie podría superarlo en las tierras altas heladas. Prefiriendo la soledad, esta especie no forma manadas.
descriptions.it: A causa del suo veleno virulento e delle sue impressionanti prodezze fisiche, nessuna altra specie potrebbe sperare di superarlo sugli altipiani ghiacciati. Preferendo la solitudine, questa specie non forma branchi.
descriptions.ja: オオニューラの猛毒と圧倒的な身体能力ゆえ、凍てつく高地でこれに勝る種はいない。孤独を好み、群れをなすことはない。
descriptions.ko: 포푸니크의 맹독과 압도적인 신체 능력 때문에 얼어붙은 고지에서 이길 만한 종은 없다. 고독을 좋아하여 무리를 짓지 않는다.

name: overqwil
description: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself.
appearance: Globular, dark purple pufferfish-like body covered in numerous sharp white quills, dark red eyes, and a large, white-toothed mouth.

descriptions.fr: Ses épines acérées comme des lances et son tempérament sauvage lui ont valu le surnom de « démon des mers ». Il s'abreuve de poison pour se nourrir.
descriptions.de: Seine lanzenartigen Stacheln und sein wildes Temperament haben ihm den Spitznamen „Seeteufel“ eingebracht. Es nimmt Gift auf, um sich zu ernähren.
descriptions.es: Sus púas con forma de lanza y su temperamento salvaje le han valido el apodo de «demonio marino». Absorbe veneno para nutrirse.
descriptions.it: Le sue aculee a forma di lancia e il suo temperamento selvaggio gli sono valsi il soprannome di "demone marino". Assorbe il veleno per nutrirsi.
descriptions.ja: 槍のようなトゲと凶暴な気性から、「海の悪魔」というあだ名がついた。毒を吸い込んで栄養としている。
descriptions.ko: 창과 같은 가시와 사나운 성질 때문에 「바다의 악마」라는 별명을 얻었다. 독을 흡수하여 영양분으로 삼는다.

name: enamorus-incarnate
description: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.
appearance: Pink, humanoid-like cloud spirit with a white cloud collar, long pink hair, two large white cloud wings on its back, and an ornate golden coiled snake-like tail.

descriptions.fr: Quand il vient sur ces terres d'outre-mer, l'hiver rigoureux prend fin. Selon la légende, l'amour de ce Pokémon donne naissance à l'éclosion d'une nouvelle vie à travers Hisui.
descriptions.de: Wenn es von jenseits des Meeres in dieses Land fliegt, endet der harte Winter. Der Legende nach lässt die Liebe dieses Pokémon überall in Hisui neues Leben erblühen.
descriptions.es: Cuando vuela a esta tierra desde el mar, el crudo invierno llega a su fin. Según la leyenda, el amor de este Pokémon da origen al brote de nueva vida en todo Hisui.
descriptions.it: Quando giunge in questa terra da oltre il mare, il rigido inverno ha fine. Secondo la leggenda, l'amore di questo Pokémon fa nascere nuova vita in tutta Hisui.
descriptions.ja: 海を越えてこの地に飛来すると、厳しい冬が終わる。伝説によると、このポケモンの愛がヒスイ全土に新しい命の芽吹きをもたらすという。
descriptions.ko: 바다 건너 이 땅으로 날아오면 혹독한 겨울이 끝난다. 전설에 따르면 이 포켓몬의 사랑이 히스이지방 전역에 새로운 생명의 싹을 틔운다고 한다.

display_names.ja: ラブトロス けしんフォルム

name: sprigatito
description: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal feline with light green fur, darker green markings around its eyes and on its paws, and large pink eyes.

descriptions.fr: Sa fourrure duveteuse a une composition similaire à celle des plantes. Ce Pokémon se lave fréquemment le visage pour éviter qu'il ne se dessèche.
descriptions.de: Sein flauschiges Fell ist in seiner Zusammensetzung pflanzlich. Dieses Pokémon wäscht sich häufig das Gesicht, um es vor dem Austrocknen zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Su pelaje esponjoso es similar en composición a las plantas. Este Pokémon se lava la cara con frecuencia para evitar que se seque.
descriptions.it: La sua soffice pelliccia ha una composizione simile a quella delle piante. Si lava spesso il viso per evitare che si secchi.
descriptions.ja: そのフワフワの毛は植物と似た組成を持つ。乾燥を防ぐため、頻繁に顔を洗う。
descriptions.ko: 푹신푹신한 털은 식물과 비슷한 성분으로 되어 있다. 건조해지지 않도록 자주 세수한다.

name: floragato
description: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.
appearance: Bipedal feline with light green fur, darker green paws, a dark green mask-like marking around its eyes, and a large pink flower on a flexible stem forming a collar around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Floragato manie habilement la liane cachée sous sa longue fourrure, frappant ses adversaires avec le bouton floral dur.
descriptions.de: Felori schwingt geschickt die unter seinem langen Fell verborgene Ranke und schlägt mit der harten Blütenknospe auf seine Gegner ein.
descriptions.es: Floragato maneja con destreza la enredadera oculta bajo su largo pelaje, golpeando a sus oponentes con el duro brote floral.
descriptions.it: Floragato brandisce con destrezza la liana nascosta sotto la sua lunga pelliccia, colpendo i suoi avversari con il duro bocciolo del fiore.
descriptions.ja: ニャローテは長い毛皮の下に隠されたツルを巧みに操り、硬い花のつぼみを相手に叩きつける。
descriptions.ko: 플로라가토는 긴 털 아래 숨겨진 덩굴을 능숙하게 휘둘러 단단한 꽃봉오리로 상대를 내리친다.

name: meowscarada
description: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.
appearance: Tall, bipedal feline with dark green fur, a light green underside, a flowing cape-like pattern of fur, a large pink mask-like marking on its face, and a flower-shaped gem at its neck.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon utilise la fourrure réfléchissante tapissant sa cape pour camoufler la tige de sa fleur, créant ainsi l'illusion que la fleur flotte.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon nutzt das reflektierende Fell, das seinen Umhang auskleidet, um den Stiel seiner Blume zu tarnen und die Illusion zu erzeugen, dass die Blume schwebt.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon usa el pelaje reflectante que recubre su capa para camuflar el tallo de su flor, creando la ilusión de que esta flota.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon usa la pelliccia riflettente che riveste il suo mantello per camuffare lo stelo del fiore, creando l'illusione che esso fluttui.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは、マントの裏地にある反射する毛皮を使って花の茎をカモフラージュし、花が浮いているかのような錯覚を生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 망토 안감의 반사성 털을 이용해 꽃줄기를 위장하여 꽃이 떠 있는 듯한 착시를 만든다.

name: fuecoco
description: It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal crocodile-like creature with a red body, a yellow underside, a yellow tuft of hair on its head, and a distinct white flame-shaped marking above its eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il se prélasse sur des roches chaudes et utilise la chaleur absorbée par ses écailles carrées pour produire de l'énergie de feu.
descriptions.de: Es liegt auf warmen Felsen und nutzt die von seinen quadratischen Schuppen aufgenommene Wärme, um Feuerenergie zu erzeugen.
descriptions.es: Se tumba sobre rocas cálidas y usa el calor absorbido por sus escamas cuadradas para generar energía de tipo Fuego.
descriptions.it: Si sdraia su rocce calde e usa il calore assorbito dalle sue squame quadrate per creare energia di tipo Fuoco.
descriptions.ja: 暖かい岩の上で横になり、四角い鱗で吸収した熱を使って炎のエネルギーを生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 따뜻한 바위 위에 엎드려 네모난 비늘로 흡수한 열을 불꽃 에너지로 바꾼다.

name: crocalor
description: The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon’s head.
appearance: Bipedal crocodile with a predominantly red body, a yellow belly, a large flame-shaped yellow and red 'hat' on its head, and a small, white egg-like marking on its snout.

descriptions.fr: La combinaison de l'énergie de feu et de la vitalité débordante de Crocalor a fait apparaître une boule de feu en forme d'œuf sur la tête du Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Die Kombination aus Knattestuffls Feuerenergie und überbordender Vitalität hat dazu geführt, dass ein eiförmiger Feuerball auf dem Kopf des Pokémon erschienen ist.
descriptions.es: La energía de tipo Fuego de Crocalor y su desbordante vitalidad han hecho que le aparezca una bola de fuego con forma de huevo en la cabeza.
descriptions.it: La combinazione dell'energia di tipo Fuoco di Crocalor e della sua vitalità straripante ha fatto sì che gli apparisse sulla testa una palla di fuoco a forma di uovo.
descriptions.ja: アチゲータの炎のエネルギーとあふれる生命力が合わさることで、卵型の火の玉が頭に出現した。
descriptions.ko: 뜨아거의 불꽃 에너지와 넘치는 생명력이 합쳐지면서 달걀 모양의 불덩이가 머리 위에 나타났다.

name: skeledirge
description: The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge’s head gained a soul.
appearance: Large, bipedal crocodile with a dark red-orange body, a white belly, a ghostly white bird perched on its head, and large, dark red flames emanating from its mouth.

descriptions.fr: L'oiseau de feu change de forme lorsque Flâmigator chante. La rumeur dit qu'il est né quand la boule de feu sur la tête de Flâmigator a acquis une âme.
descriptions.de: Der feurige Vogel ändert seine Form, wenn Phlegleon singt. Gerüchten zufolge wurde der Vogel geboren, als der Feuerball auf Phlegleons Kopf eine Seele erhielt.
descriptions.es: El ave de fuego cambia de forma cuando Skeledirge canta. Se rumorea que nació cuando la bola de fuego de la cabeza de Skeledirge obtuvo un alma.
descriptions.it: L'uccello di fuoco cambia forma quando Skeledirge canta. Si dice che l'uccello sia nato quando la palla di fuoco sulla testa di Skeledirge ha acquisito un'anima.
descriptions.ja: ラウドボーンが歌う時、炎の鳥は形を変える。ラウドボーンの頭の火の玉が魂を得た時に鳥が生まれたという噂もある。
descriptions.ko: 라우드본이 노래를 부르면 불꽃 새의 모습이 변한다. 라우드본 머리 위의 불덩이가 영혼을 얻었을 때 이 새가 태어났다는 소문도 있다.

name: quaxly
description: This Pokémon migrated to Paldea from distant lands long ago. The gel secreted by its feathers repels water and grime."
appearance: Small, duckling-like bird with a white body, blue feet, a blue crest on its head resembling a pompadour, and large blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon a migré vers Paldea depuis des contrées lointaines il y a longtemps. Le gel sécrété par ses plumes repousse l'eau et la saleté.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ist vor langer Zeit aus fernen Ländern nach Paldea migriert. Das Gel, das seine Federn absondern, weist Wasser und Schmutz ab.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon migró a Paldea desde tierras lejanas hace mucho tiempo. El gel que secretan sus plumas repele el agua y la suciedad.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è migrato a Paldea da terre lontane molto tempo fa. Il gel secreto dalle sue piume respinge acqua e sporcizia.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは、遠い昔に遠方の地からパルデア地方へ移住してきた。羽から分泌されるジェルは水や汚れを弾く。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 아주 오래전 머나먼 땅에서 팔데아지방으로 이주해 왔다. 깃털에서 분비되는 젤은 물과 더러움을 튕겨낸다.

name: quaxwell
description: These Pokémon constantly run through shallow waters to train their legs, then compete with each other to see which of them kicks most gracefully.
appearance: Bipedal duck-like bird with a white body, blue feet, a larger blue crest on its head, and blue tail feathers arranged like a fan.

descriptions.fr: Ces Pokémon courent constamment dans les eaux peu profondes pour entraîner leurs pattes, puis s'affrontent pour voir lequel donne les coups de patte les plus gracieux.
descriptions.de: Diese Pokémon laufen ständig durch seichte Gewässer, um ihre Beine zu trainieren, und wetteifern dann miteinander, wer von ihnen am anmutigsten tritt.
descriptions.es: Estos Pokémon corren constantemente por aguas poco profundas para entrenar sus patas, y después compiten entre sí para ver quién da las patadas más elegantes.
descriptions.it: Questi Pokémon corrono costantemente in acque basse per allenare le zampe, poi competono per vedere chi di loro calcia con più grazia.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンたちは、脚を鍛えるため、常に浅瀬を走り回る。その後、一番優雅な蹴りを繰り出すのは誰かを競い合う。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬들은 다리를 훈련하기 위해 얕은 물을 끊임없이 달리며, 누가 가장 우아하게 발길질하는지 서로 경쟁한다.

name: quaquaval
description: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands.
appearance: Tall, bipedal peacock-like bird with a predominantly blue body, white chest, a large, elaborate fan-like tail of blue, green, and red feathers, and prominent blue feathers on its head and arms.

descriptions.fr: Un seul coup de patte d'un Palmaval peut faire rouler un camion. Ce Pokémon utilise ses puissantes pattes pour exécuter des danses frappantes venues de terres lointaines.
descriptions.de: Ein einziger Tritt von einem Bailonda kann einen Lastwagen ins Rollen bringen. Dieses Pokémon nutzt seine kräftigen Beine, um auffällige Tänze aus fernen Ländern aufzuführen.
descriptions.es: Una sola patada de Quaquaval puede hacer que un camión ruede. Este Pokémon usa sus potentes patas para realizar danzas llamativas de tierras lejanas.
descriptions.it: Un singolo calcio di Quaquaval può far rotolare un camion. Questo Pokémon usa le sue potenti zampe per eseguire danze appariscenti provenienti da terre lontane.
descriptions.ja: ウェーニバルの蹴りは、トラックをも転がすほどの威力がある。このポケモンは、その強力な脚を使って遠い異国の地から伝わる見事なダンスを披露する。
descriptions.ko: 웨이니발의 한 번의 발차기로 트럭을 굴릴 수 있다. 이 포켓몬은 강력한 다리를 이용해 먼 이국 땅에서 온 화려한 춤을 춘다.

name: lechonk
description: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.
appearance: Small, pig-like creature with a spherical dark gray body, a lighter gray face and belly, large floppy ears, and small pink hooves.

descriptions.fr: Il cherche de la nourriture toute la journée. Il possède un odorat très développé, mais ne l'utilise que pour fourrager.
descriptions.de: Es sucht den ganzen Tag nach Futter. Es besitzt einen ausgeprägten Geruchssinn, nutzt ihn aber nur zur Nahrungssuche.
descriptions.es: Busca comida todo el día. Posee un agudo sentido del olfato, pero no lo usa para nada más que para buscar alimento.
descriptions.it: Cerca cibo tutto il giorno. Possiede un acuto senso dell'olfatto, ma lo usa solo per procurarsi il cibo.
descriptions.ja: 一日中食べ物を探している。鋭い嗅覚を持つが、採餌以外には使わない。
descriptions.ko: 하루 종일 먹이를 찾아다닌다. 날카로운 후각을 가졌지만 먹이를 찾는 것 외에는 쓰지 않는다.

name: oinkologne-male
description: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.
appearance: Large, quadrupedal boar-like creature with a dark gray body, a lighter gray snout and belly, prominent tusks, and small pink hooves.

descriptions.fr: Couvalencia est fier de sa belle peau brillante. Il émet un parfum concentré depuis le bout de sa queue.
descriptions.de: Maskaganza ist stolz auf seine feine, glänzende Haut. Es sendet einen konzentrierten Duft von der Schwanzspitze aus.
descriptions.es: Oinkologne está orgulloso de su piel fina y brillante. Emite un aroma concentrado desde la punta de su cola.
descriptions.it: Oinkologne è fiero della sua pelle liscia e lucida. Emette un profumo concentrato dalla punta della coda.
descriptions.ja: パフュートンは、そのきめ細かくつややかな肌を誇りにしている。尻尾の先から濃厚な香りを放つ。
descriptions.ko: 퍼퓨돈은 곱고 윤기 있는 피부를 자랑한다. 꼬리 끝에서 농축된 향기를 뿜어낸다.

display_names.ja: パフュートン オス

name: tarountula
description: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.
appearance: Small, spherical spider with a predominantly white body, black markings, and a large white orb of webbing on its back resembling a yarn ball.

descriptions.fr: La boule de fils enroulée autour de son corps est suffisamment élastique pour dévier les faux de Cizayox, l'ennemi naturel de ce Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Der Fadenball, der seinen Körper umwickelt, ist elastisch genug, um die Sensen von Sichlor, dem natürlichen Feind dieses Pokémon, abzuwehren.
descriptions.es: La bola de hilos que envuelve su cuerpo es lo suficientemente elástica como para desviar las guadañas de Scyther, su enemigo natural.
descriptions.it: La palla di fili che avvolge il suo corpo è abbastanza elastica da deviare le falci di Scyther, il nemico naturale di questo Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 体に巻きついた糸玉は、このポケモンの天敵であるストライクの鎌をそらすほど伸縮性がある。
descriptions.ko: 몸을 감싼 실뭉치는 이 포켓몬의 천적인 스라크의 낫을 튕겨낼 정도로 탄성이 있다。

name: spidops
description: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.
appearance: Tall, praying mantis-like spider with a green body, white markings, and a prominent yellow and black web-like pattern on its abdomen and arms.

descriptions.fr: Il s'accroche aux branches et aux plafonds à l'aide de ses fils et se déplace sans un bruit. Il élimine ses proies avant même qu'elles ne le remarquent.
descriptions.de: Es klammert sich mit seinen Fäden an Äste und Decken und bewegt sich lautlos. Es überwältigt seine Beute, noch bevor diese es bemerkt.
descriptions.es: Se aferra a ramas y techos usando sus hilos y se mueve sin hacer ruido. Acaba con sus presas antes de que estas se den cuenta.
descriptions.it: Si aggrappa a rami e soffitti con i suoi fili e si muove senza far rumore. Neutralizza le sue prede prima ancora che se ne accorgano.
descriptions.ja: 糸を使い 枝や 天井に ぶら下がり 音もなく 移動する。 獲物に 気づかれる 前に 仕留める。
descriptions.ko: 실을 이용해 나뭇가지나 천장에 매달려 소리 없이 이동한다. 먹이가 눈치채기도 전에 해치운다.

name: nymble
description: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.
appearance: Small, insectoid creature with a predominantly green body, a yellow belly, black limbs, and large, round black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Sa troisième paire de pattes est repliée. Lorsqu'il est en difficulté, ce Pokémon bondit à plus de 9 mètres grâce à la force de ses pattes.
descriptions.de: Es hat sein drittes Beinpaar zusammengefaltet. Wenn es in Not gerät, springt es mit der Kraft seiner Beine über 9 Meter weit.
descriptions.es: Su tercer par de patas permanece plegado. Cuando se encuentra en apuros, salta más de 9 metros valiéndose de la fuerza de sus patas.
descriptions.it: Il suo terzo paio di zampe è ripiegato. Quando si trova in difficoltà, questo Pokémon salta per oltre 9 metri sfruttando la forza delle sue zampe.
descriptions.ja: 畳んでいる ３つ目の 足は 緊急時に ３０フィート (約９m) 以上も 跳びあがる 力を 秘める。
descriptions.ko: 셋째 다리를 접어두고 있다. 궁지에 몰리면 다리 힘을 이용해 약 9m 이상 점프한다.

name: lokix
description: When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order.
appearance: Bipedal, humanoid insectoid with a predominantly black body, green accents on its limbs and head, and two large, scythe-like arms.

descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'il décide de combattre de toutes ses forces, il se tient sur ses pattes précédemment repliées pour entrer en mode Affrontement. Il neutralise ses ennemis en un rien de temps.
descriptions.de: Wenn es sich dazu entschließt, mit voller Kraft zu kämpfen, stellt es sich auf seine zuvor zusammengefalteten Beine und geht in den Duellmodus über. Seine Gegner schaltet es im Handumdrehen aus.
descriptions.es: Cuando decide luchar con todas sus fuerzas, se pone de pie sobre sus patas plegadas para entrar en el Modo Combate. Neutraliza a sus enemigos en un abrir y cerrar de ojos.
descriptions.it: Quando decide di combattere al massimo delle sue forze, si poggia sulle zampe precedentemente ripiegate per entrare in Modalità Scontro. Neutralizza i suoi nemici in poco tempo.
descriptions.ja: 本気で 戦うと 決めたとき たたんでいた 脚で 立ちあがり 決戦モードへ。 敵を あっという間に 打ち負かす。
descriptions.ko: 진심으로 싸우기로 결심하면 접고 있던 다리로 서서 결전 모드에 돌입한다. 순식간에 적을 해치운다.

name: pawmi
description: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.
appearance: Small, bipedal rodent with an orange body, white belly, large yellow ear pads, and dark brown eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ses joues possèdent des poches électriques sous-développées. Elles ne peuvent produire de l'électricité que si Pohm le frotte furieusement avec les coussinets de ses pattes avant.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt unterentwickelte Stromsäcke an den Wangen. Diese können nur dann Elektrizität erzeugen, wenn Pamo sie wütend mit den Polstern an seinen Vorderpfoten reibt.
descriptions.es: Tiene sacos eléctricos subdesarrollados en las mejillas. Solo pueden producir electricidad si Pohm le los frota furiosamente con las almohadillas de sus patas delanteras.
descriptions.it: Ha sacche elettriche sottosviluppate sulle guance. Tali sacche possono produrre elettricità solo se Pawmi le sfrega furiosamente con i cuscinetti delle sue zampe anteriori.
descriptions.ja: 頬の 未発達な 発電器官は 前足の 肉球で ゴシゴシと 擦ることで ようやく 発電できる。
descriptions.ko: 뺨에 발달이 덜 된 발전 기관이 있다. 앞발의 육구로 격렬하게 비벼야만 전기를 만들 수 있다.

name: pawmo
description: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.
appearance: Bipedal rodent with an orange body, white belly, large yellow ear pads, and prominent yellow shock pads on its forearms.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque son groupe est attaqué, Pohmotte est le premier à se lancer dans la bataille, vainquant les ennemis avec une technique de combat utilisant les décharges électriques.
descriptions.de: Wird seine Gruppe angegriffen, ist Pamamo der Erste, der sich in den Kampf stürzt und Gegner mit einer Kampftechnik besiegt, die Elektroschocks einsetzt.
descriptions.es: Cuando atacan a su grupo, Pawmo es el primero en lanzarse al combate, derrotando a los enemigos con una técnica de lucha que utiliza descargas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando il suo gruppo viene attaccato, Pawmo è il primo a gettarsi nella mischia, sconfiggendo i nemici con una tecnica di lotta che sfrutta le scariche elettriche.
descriptions.ja: 群れが 襲われると いち早く 戦闘に 飛びだし 電撃を 浴びせる 格闘技で 敵を 撃退する。
descriptions.ko: 무리가 습격당하면 가장 먼저 전투에 뛰어들어 전격을 퍼붓는 격투 기술로 적을 물리친다.

name: pawmot
description: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.
appearance: Bipedal, electric rodent with an orange body, white belly, large yellow ear pads, prominent yellow shock pads on its forearms, and spiky fur on its head.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon réagit normalement lentement, mais une fois au combat, il terrasse ses ennemis avec des mouvements rapides comme l'éclair.
descriptions.de: Normalerweise reagiert dieses Pokémon langsam, doch sobald es in den Kampf zieht, schlägt es seine Gegner mit blitzschnellen Bewegungen nieder.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon suele reaccionar con lentitud, pero una vez entra en combate, derriba a sus enemigos con movimientos rápidos como un rayo.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon di solito è lento a reagire, ma una volta in battaglia, atterra i suoi nemici con movimenti fulminei.
descriptions.ja: ふだんは のんびりしているが 戦闘に なると 雷のように 速い 動きで 敵を 打ち倒す。
descriptions.ko: 평소에는 느긋하지만 전투에 들어가면 번개처럼 빠른 움직임으로 적을 쓰러뜨린다.

name: tandemaus
description: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.
appearance: Two small, bipedal mouse-like creatures with white bodies, black eyes, and long, thin tails, standing side-by-side.

descriptions.fr: Faisant preuve d'un excellent travail d'équipe, ils utilisent leurs incisives pour découper des morceaux de tout matériau pouvant être utile à un nid, puis s'enfuient avec.
descriptions.de: Sie arbeiten hervorragend zusammen und nutzen ihre Schneidezähne, um Stücke aus allem herauszuschneiden, was für ein Nest nützlich sein könnte, und machen sich dann damit davon.
descriptions.es: Exhiben un gran trabajo en equipo. Usan sus incisivos para cortar trozos de cualquier material que pueda ser útil para un nido y luego se los llevan.
descriptions.it: Con un eccellente lavoro di squadra, usano gli incisivi per tagliare pezzi di qualsiasi materiale utile per un nido, per poi portarseli via.
descriptions.ja: 抜群の チームワークで 巣作りに 役立つ どんな 材料でも 前歯で 切り取り 運び去る。
descriptions.ko: 뛰어난 팀워크를 발휘하여 둥지를 짓는 데 필요한 어떤 재료든 앞니로 잘라내어 가져간다.

name: maushold-family-of-four
description: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
appearance: Four small, bipedal mouse-like creatures with white bodies, black eyes, and long, thin tails, arranged as two larger mice with two smaller mice in front of them.

descriptions.fr: Les deux petits sont apparus un jour. Le groupe pourrait être une famille de Pokémon apparentés, mais personne ne le sait avec certitude.
descriptions.de: Die zwei Kleinen sind einfach eines Tages aufgetaucht. Die Gruppe mag eine Familie verwandter Pokémon sein, doch niemand weiß das mit Sicherheit.
descriptions.es: Los dos pequeños aparecieron un día sin más. El grupo podría ser una familia de Pokémon emparentados, pero nadie lo sabe a ciencia cierta.
descriptions.it: I due piccolini sono apparsi un giorno. Il gruppo potrebbe essere una famiglia di Pokémon imparentati, ma nessuno lo sa con certezza.
descriptions.ja: いつしか ２匹の ちいさい子も 現れ 家族に なったと 思われるが 詳しい ことは わからない。
descriptions.ko: 어느새 어린아이 두 마리도 나타났다. 가족으로 보이는 무리지만 자세한 것은 알려져 있지 않다.

display_names.ja: イッカネズミ 4ひきかぞく

name: fidough
description: This Pokémon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough’s breath induces fermentation in the Pokémon’s vicinity.
appearance: Small, quadrupedal dog-like creature with a light brown, dough-like body, floppy ears, and swirled markings resembling braided bread on its head and tail.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est doux et humide au toucher. La levure présente dans le souffle de Pâtachiot provoque la fermentation dans son environnement.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon fühlt sich glatt und feucht an. Die Hefe in Hefel’s Atem bewirkt eine Fermentation in seiner Umgebung.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon es suave y húmedo al tacto. La levadura presente en el aliento de Fidough induce la fermentación en las inmediaciones del Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è liscio e umido al tatto. Il lievito presente nel suo alito induce la fermentazione nelle vicinanze del Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 触ると しっとり なめらか。 パピモッチの 息に 含まれる 酵母が 周囲の ものを 発酵させる。
descriptions.ko: 만지면 축축하고 매끄럽다. 빵 반죽 포켓몬의 숨결에 포함된 효모가 주변의 것을 발효시킨다.

name: dachsbun
description: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon’s body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.
appearance: Medium-sized, quadrupedal dog-like creature with a golden-brown, baked-bread-like body, darker brown markings on its paws and snout, and a swirled pattern around its neck.

descriptions.fr: L'agréable arôme qui émane du corps de ce Pokémon aide le blé à pousser, ce qui explique pourquoi briochien est chéri par les villages agricoles.
descriptions.de: Der angenehme Duft, der von diesem Pokémon ausgeht, fördert das Weizenwachstum, weshalb Backel seine Wertschätzung in den Bauerndörfern genießt.
descriptions.es: El agradable aroma que emana del cuerpo de este Pokémon ayuda al trigo a crecer, por lo que Dachsbun ha sido muy valorado en las aldeas agrícolas.
descriptions.it: Il piacevole aroma che emana dal corpo di questo Pokémon aiuta il grano a crescere, per questo Dachsbun è tenuto in grande considerazione nei villaggi agricoli.
descriptions.ja: 体から 放つ 芳醇な 香りは 小麦の 成長を 助ける ため 農村で 大切に されてきた。
descriptions.ko: 몸에서 풍기는 향긋한 향기는 밀의 성장을 돕기 때문에 농촌 마을에서 소중히 여겨져 왔다.

name: smoliv
description: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.
appearance: Small, olive-like creature with a green body, a brown head resembling a pit, and a single green leaf growing from its top.

descriptions.fr: Il se protège de ses ennemis en émettant de l'huile du fruit sur sa tête. Cette huile est amère et astringente au point de faire grimacer n'importe qui.
descriptions.de: Es schützt sich vor Feinden, indem es Öl aus der Frucht auf seinem Kopf absondert. Dieses Öl ist bitter und so adstringierend, dass es jeden zusammenzucken lässt.
descriptions.es: Se protege de sus enemigos emitiendo aceite del fruto de su cabeza. Este aceite es tan amargo y astringente que hace estremecer a cualquiera.
descriptions.it: Si protegge dai nemici emettendo olio dal frutto sulla sua testa. Quest'olio è così amaro e astringente da far rabbrividire chiunque.
descriptions.ja: 頭の実に含まれる油を噴射して敵から身を守る。その油はひどく苦く渋く、誰の顔でも引きつらせる。
descriptions.ko: 머리 열매의 기름을 분사하여 적으로부터 몸을 지킨다. 그 기름은 몹시 쓰고 떫어 누구든 얼굴을 찡그리게 한다.

name: dolliv
description: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.
appearance: Larger, olive-like creature with a green body, a brown head, and two green leaves sprouting from its top, with a small olive attached to one of the leaves.

descriptions.fr: Dolliv partage son huile savoureuse et fraîchement parfumée avec les autres. Cette espèce coexiste avec les humains depuis des temps immémoriaux.
descriptions.de: Dolliv teilt sein wohlschmeckendes, frisch duftendes Öl mit anderen. Diese Spezies hat seit langer Zeit mit Menschen zusammengelebt.
descriptions.es: Dolliv comparte su sabroso aceite de aroma fresco con los demás. Esta especie ha coexistido con los humanos desde tiempos inmemoriales.
descriptions.it: Dolliv condivide con gli altri il suo olio saporito e dal profumo fresco. Questa specie coesiste con gli umani da tempo immemore.
descriptions.ja: おいしい新鮮な香りの油を他者と分け与える。この種は遠い昔から人間と共存してきた。
descriptions.ko: 맛있는 향긋한 기름을 다른 포켓몬과 나눈다. 이 종은 아주 먼 옛날부터 인간과 공존해 왔다.

name: arboliva
description: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.
appearance: Large, humanoid olive tree-like creature with a green body, a brown trunk-like lower body, and two large green leaves forming its 'hair,' with several small olives hanging from it.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon calme est très compatissant. Il partage son huile délicieuse et riche en nutriments avec les Pokémon affaiblis.
descriptions.de: Dieses ruhige Pokémon ist sehr mitfühlend. Es teilt sein köstliches, nährstoffreiches Öl mit geschwächten Pokémon.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon tranquilo es muy compasivo. Comparte su delicioso aceite rico en nutrientes con los Pokémon debilitados.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon calmo è molto compassionevole. Condivide il suo delizioso olio ricco di nutrienti con i Pokémon indeboliti.
descriptions.ja: 穏やかなこのポケモンはとても慈悲深い。弱ったポケモンには、そのおいしい栄養豊富な油を分け与える。
descriptions.ko: 온화한 이 포켓몬은 매우 자비롭다. 약해진 포켓몬에게는 맛있는 영양 풍부한 기름을 나눠준다.

name: squawkabilly-green-plumage
description: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.
appearance: A parrot-like Pokemon with vibrant green plumage covering its body, a lighter cream-colored chest and belly, an orange-yellow beak, and distinctive black rings around its eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ces Pokémon préfèrent vivre en ville. Ils forment des groupes basés sur la couleur de leurs plumes et se battent pour le territoire.
descriptions.de: Diese Pokémon bevorzugen das Leben in Städten. Sie bilden Schwärme basierend auf der Farbe ihrer Federn und kämpfen um Territorium.
descriptions.es: Estos Pokémon prefieren vivir en ciudades. Forman bandadas según el color de sus plumas y luchan por el territorio.
descriptions.it: Questi Pokémon preferiscono vivere nelle città. Formano stormi in base al colore delle loro piume e lottano per il territorio.
descriptions.ja: 都市に生息することを好む。羽の色ごとに群れを作り、縄張りをめぐって争う。
descriptions.ko: 도시에 서식하는 것을 선호한다. 깃털의 색에 따라 무리를 짓고 영역을 두고 싸운다.

display_names.ja: イキリンコ みどりいろのすがた

name: nacli
description: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.
appearance: A cubic, crystalline Pokemon resembling a block of salt, featuring a greyish-white body with an orange-yellow rock formation on its head, and dark indentations forming its "eyes" and "mouth."

descriptions.fr: Il est né dans une couche de sel gemme au plus profond de la terre. Cette espèce était particulièrement précieuse autrefois, car elle partageait son sel précieux.
descriptions.de: Es wurde tief unter der Erde in einer Steinsalzschicht geboren. Diese Spezies war früher besonders geschätzt, da sie kostbares Salz teilte.
