descriptions.es: Nació en una capa de sal gema en las profundidades de la tierra. Esta especie era especialmente apreciada antaño, ya que compartía sal preciosa.
descriptions.it: È nato in uno strato di salgemma nelle profondità della terra. Questa specie era particolarmente apprezzata un tempo, poiché condivideva sale prezioso.
descriptions.ja: 地中深くの岩塩層で生まれた。昔は貴重な塩を分け与えるため、特に重宝された。
descriptions.ko: 땅속 깊은 곳의 암염층에서 태어났다. 옛날에는 귀한 소금을 나눠줘서 특히 귀하게 여겨졌다.

name: naclstack
description: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body.
appearance: A Pokemon composed of two stacked, greyish-white crystalline salt blocks, with the smaller top block featuring an orange-yellow rock formation resembling a crown, and dark indentations for its eyes and mouth.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon sale à sec ses proies en les aspergeant de sel. Le processus de salaison prive le corps de la proie de son eau.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon trocknet seine Beute, indem es sie mit Salz besprüht. Der Pökelprozess entzieht der Beute das Wasser aus ihrem Körper.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon cura en seco a sus presas rociándolas con sal. El proceso de curado les roba el agua del cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon sala a secco le sue prede spruzzandovi del sale. Il processo di salatura sottrae l'acqua dal corpo della preda.
descriptions.ja: 獲物に塩を吹きつけて干物にする。塩漬けの過程で獲物の体から水分を奪う。
descriptions.ko: 사냥감에게 소금을 뿌려 건조시킨다. 절이는 과정에서 사냥감의 몸에서 수분을 빼앗는다.

name: garganacl
description: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.
appearance: A large, bipedal golem-like Pokemon constructed from greyish-white crystalline salt blocks, featuring a blocky body, dark indented eyes, and prominent orange-yellow rock formations on its head and shoulders.

descriptions.fr: Garganacl frotte ses doigts l'un contre l'autre et saupoudre de sel les Pokémon blessés. Même les blessures graves guérissent rapidement après cela.
descriptions.de: Garganacl reibt seine Fingerspitzen aneinander und bestreut verletzte Pokémon mit Salz. Selbst schwere Wunden heilen danach umgehend.
descriptions.es: Garganacl frota sus dedos y espolvorea sal sobre los Pokémon heridos. Incluso las heridas graves sanarán rápidamente después.
descriptions.it: Garganacl si strofina i polpastrelli e cosparge di sale i Pokémon feriti. Anche le ferite gravi guariscono prontamente dopo.
descriptions.ja: 指先をこすり合わせ、傷ついたポケモンに塩を振りかける。ひどい傷でもたちどころに癒える。
descriptions.ko: 손가락을 비벼서 다친 포켓몬에게 소금을 뿌려준다. 심한 상처도 금방 낫는다.

name: charcadet
description: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.
appearance: A small, bipedal Pokemon with a round black body covered in segmented orange-red armor plating on its head, chest, and limbs, featuring bright orange glowing eyes.

descriptions.fr: Un morceau de charbon brûlé a pris vie et est devenu un Pokémon. Possédant un esprit combatif ardent, Charcadet affrontera même des adversaires coriaces.
descriptions.de: Verbrannte Holzkohle erwachte zum Leben und wurde zu einem Pokémon. Mit einem feurigen Kampfgeist kämpft Charcadet selbst gegen harte Gegner.
descriptions.es: Un trozo de carbón quemado cobró vida y se convirtió en un Pokémon. Poseyendo un espíritu de lucha ardiente, Charcadet se enfrentará incluso a oponentes duros.
descriptions.it: Un pezzo di carbone bruciato ha preso vita ed è diventato un Pokémon. Possedendo uno spirito combattivo ardente, Charcadet affronterà anche avversari tosti.
descriptions.ja: 燃え尽きた炭が生命を宿し、ポケモンとなった。炎の闘志を秘め、強敵にも果敢に挑む。
descriptions.ko: 불타버린 숯이 생명을 얻어 포켓몬이 되었다. 불꽃 같은 투지를 품고 강한 상대에게도 과감히 도전한다.

name: armarouge
description: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.
appearance: A bipedal, humanoid knight-like Pokemon clad in golden-yellow and bright red armor, featuring a prominent helmet with a red crest, a red chest plate, and large, cannon-like red forearms, all over a dark blue-black body.

descriptions.fr: Armarouge a évolué grâce à une armure ayant appartenu à un guerrier distingué. Ce Pokémon est incroyablement loyal.
descriptions.de: Armarouge entwickelte sich durch die Nutzung einer Rüstung, die einem angesehenen Krieger gehörte. Dieses Pokémon ist unglaublich loyal.
descriptions.es: Armarouge evolucionó mediante el uso de una armadura que perteneció a un guerrero distinguido. Este Pokémon es increíblemente leal.
descriptions.it: Armarouge si è evoluto attraverso l'uso di un'armatura appartenuta a un distinto guerriero. Questo Pokémon è incredibilmente leale.
descriptions.ja: 著名な戦士の鎧を用いて進化した。このポケモンは信じられないほど忠実だ。
descriptions.ko: 저명한 전사가 사용했던 갑옷을 통해 진화했다. 이 포켓몬은 놀라울 정도로 충성심이 강하다.

name: ceruledge
description: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.
appearance: A bipedal, humanoid knight-like Pokemon with a dark blue-black body covered in deep violet and dark grey armor, distinguished by its glowing purple blade-like forearms and a distinct dark helmet with a plume.

descriptions.fr: Les lames enflammées sur ses bras brûlent ardemment avec le ressentiment persistant d'un épéiste tombé avant d'atteindre son objectif.
descriptions.de: Die feurigen Klingen an seinen Armen brennen lichterloh mit dem nachklingenden Groll eines Schwertkämpfers, der fiel, bevor er sein Ziel erreichte.
descriptions.es: Las ardientes cuchillas de sus brazos arden ferozmente con el resentimiento persistente de un espadachín que cayó antes de lograr su objetivo.
descriptions.it: Le lame infuocate sulle sue braccia bruciano ferocemente con il persistente risentimento di uno spadaccino caduto prima di compiere il suo obiettivo.
descriptions.ja: 両腕の燃え盛る剣は、目的を果たせず倒れた剣士の無念が宿り激しく燃える。
descriptions.ko: 양팔의 불타는 칼날은 목적을 이루지 못하고 쓰러진 검사의 한이 깃들어 맹렬하게 타오른다.

name: tadbulb
description: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.
appearance: A small, tadpole-like Pokemon with a dark green body and tail, featuring a large, translucent yellow-orange bulb on its head that glows, and wide yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Tadbulb secoue sa queue pour générer de l'électricité. S'il perçoit un danger, il fait clignoter sa tête pour alerter ses alliés.
descriptions.de: Tadbulb schüttelt seinen Schwanz, um Elektrizität zu erzeugen. Nimmt es Gefahr wahr, lässt es seinen Kopf blinken, um seine Verbündeten zu warnen.
descriptions.es: Tadbulb agita su cola para generar electricidad. Si percibe peligro, hará que su cabeza parpadee para alertar a sus aliados.
descriptions.it: Tadbulb scuote la coda per generare elettricità. Se percepisce un pericolo, fa lampeggiare la testa per avvisare i suoi alleati.
descriptions.ja: ズピカは尻尾を振って電気を生成する。危険を感じると、頭を点滅させて仲間を警告する。
descriptions.ko: 콜리플로는 꼬리를 흔들어 전기를 발생시킨다. 위험을 감지하면 머리를 깜빡여 동료들에게 경고한다.

name: bellibolt
description: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.
appearance: A large, stout, bipedal frog-like Pokemon with a bright green body, a prominent yellow glowing "belly button," and two large yellow, semi-circular bumps above its wide black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque ce Pokémon dilate et contracte son corps mou, la dynamo ombilicale de son ventre produit une énorme quantité d'électricité.
descriptions.de: Dehnt und zieht dieses Pokémon seinen wackeligen Körper zusammen, erzeugt die Nabelschnur-Dynamo in seinem Bauch eine riesige Menge Elektrizität.
descriptions.es: Cuando este Pokémon expande y contrae su cuerpo tambaleante, la dínamo en su ombligo produce una enorme cantidad de electricidad.
descriptions.it: Quando questo Pokémon espande e contrae il suo corpo oscillante, la dinamo ombelicale nel suo stomaco produce un'enorme quantità di elettricità.
descriptions.ja: ハラバリーがぐらぐらした体を伸縮させると、おへそにあるダイナモが大量の電気を生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 찌리포가 흔들거리는 몸을 팽창하고 수축시킬 때, 뱃속의 배꼽 다이나모는 엄청난 양의 전기를 생산한다.

name: wattrel
description: When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them.
appearance: A small, swift-like bird Pokemon with a sleek black body, a yellow beak, and distinct yellow markings on its chest and under its long, pointed wings, ending in a forked tail.

descriptions.fr: Quand ses ailes attrapent le vent, les os qu'elles contiennent produisent de l'électricité. Ce Pokémon plonge dans l'océan, capturant ses proies en les électrocutant.
descriptions.de: Wenn seine Flügel den Wind fangen, erzeugen die Knochen darin Elektrizität. Dieses Pokémon taucht ins Meer und fängt Beute, indem es sie durch Stromschläge außer Gefecht setzt.
descriptions.es: Cuando sus alas captan el viento, los huesos en su interior producen electricidad. Este Pokémon se zambulle en el océano, atrapando presas al electrocutarlas.
descriptions.it: Quando le sue ali catturano il vento, le ossa al loro interno producono elettricità. Questo Pokémon si tuffa nell'oceano, catturando le prede fulminandole.
descriptions.ja: カイデンの翼が風を捉えると、内部の骨が電気を生み出す。このポケモンは海に潜り、獲物を感電させて捕らえる。
descriptions.ko: 찌리비의 날개가 바람을 받으면 내부에 있는 뼈가 전기를 생성한다. 이 포켓몬은 바다로 뛰어들어 먹이를 감전시켜 잡는다.

name: kilowattrel
description: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.
appearance: A larger, elegant frigatebird-like Pokemon with a sleek black body, a striking vibrant yellow chest and throat, a yellow beak, and yellow accents along the edges of its long, pointed wings and forked tail.

descriptions.fr: Kilowattrel gonfle sa poche gulaire pour amplifier son électricité. En chevauchant le vent, ce Pokémon peut voler plus de 690 kilomètres en une journée.
descriptions.de: Kilowattrel bläht seinen Kehlsack auf, um seine Elektrizität zu verstärken. Indem es den Wind nutzt, kann dieses Pokémon über 690 Kilometer an einem Tag fliegen.
descriptions.es: Kilowattrel infla su saco gular para amplificar su electricidad. Al cabalgar el viento, este Pokémon puede volar más de 690 kilómetros en un día.
descriptions.it: Kilowattrel gonfia il suo sacco golare per amplificare la sua elettricità. Sfruttando il vento, questo Pokémon può volare per oltre 690 km in un giorno.
descriptions.ja: タイカイデンは喉の袋を膨らませて電気を増幅する。風に乗ることで、このポケモンは1日に700キロメートル以上飛ぶことができる。
descriptions.ko: 찌리비드는 목주머니를 부풀려 전기를 증폭시킨다. 바람을 타고 하루에 700킬로미터 이상 날 수 있다.

name: maschiff
description: It always scowls in an attempt to make opponents take it seriously, but even crying children will burst into laughter when they see Maschiff’s face.
appearance: A stocky, quadrupedal puppy-like Pokemon with predominantly dark brown fur, a lighter tan muzzle and chest, floppy ears, dark fur obscuring its eyes, and two distinct tan circular markings on its hindquarters.

descriptions.fr: Il fronce toujours les sourcils pour que ses adversaires le prennent au sérieux, mais même les enfants en pleurs éclatent de rire en voyant le visage de Grondogue.
descriptions.de: Es runzelt stets die Stirn, um Gegnern Respekt einzuflößen. Doch selbst weinende Kinder brechen in Lachen aus, wenn sie Maschiffs Gesicht sehen.
descriptions.es: Siempre frunce el ceño para que los oponentes lo tomen en serio, pero incluso los niños llorando estallarán en risas al ver la cara de Maschiff.
descriptions.it: Fronteggia sempre i suoi avversari con un'espressione corrucciata, nel tentativo di farsi prendere sul serio, ma persino i bambini che piangono scoppiano a ridere quando vedono la faccia di Maschiff.
descriptions.ja: オラチフはいつもしかめっ面をして相手に真剣に受け止めてもらおうとするが、泣いている子供でさえその顔を見ると笑い出してしまう。
descriptions.ko: 마쉬프는 항상 찡그린 표정을 지어 상대를 진지하게 대하게 만들려 하지만, 우는 아이들도 그 얼굴을 보면 웃음을 터뜨린다.

name: mabosstiff
description: This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies.
appearance: A large, powerful mastiff-like Pokemon with dark brown fur, a lighter tan muzzle and chest, shaggy fur obscuring its eyes, a prominent spiky dark mane around its neck, and two tan circular markings on its hindquarters.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon peut stocker de l'énergie dans son grand fanon. Mabosstiff libère toute cette énergie d'un coup pour balayer ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon kann Energie in seinem großen Wamme speichern. Mabosstiff entfesselt diese Energie auf einmal, um Feinde wegzublasen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon puede almacenar energía en su gran papada. Mabosstiff libera esta energía de golpe para hacer volar a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon può immagazzinare energia nella sua grande giogaia. Mabosstiff la rilascia tutta in una volta per spazzare via i nemici.
descriptions.ja: マフィティフは大きな肉垂にエネルギーを貯めることができる。そのエネルギーを一気に放出して敵を吹き飛ばす。
descriptions.ko: 마피티프는 큰 턱살에 에너지를 저장할 수 있다. 그 에너지를 한 번에 방출하여 적들을 날려버린다.

name: shroodle
description: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.
appearance: A small, bipedal rodent-like Pokemon with a pale purple body, large ears, dark grey paws and an eye mask, and distinctive bright pink tips on its fingers.

descriptions.fr: Bien que généralement décontracté, il enfoncera ses dents de devant acérées et imprégnées de poison dans quiconque l'énerve, provoquant la paralysie chez l'objet de sa fureur.
descriptions.de: Obwohl es normalerweise ein mildes Pokémon ist, wird es seine scharfen, mit Gift getränkten Vorderzähne in jeden versenken, der es verärgert, was zur Lähmung des Ziels seines Zorns führt.
descriptions.es: Aunque normalmente es un Pokémon tranquilo, clavará sus afilados dientes frontales empapados de veneno en cualquiera que lo enfade, causando parálisis en el objeto de su ira.
descriptions.it: Sebbene sia solitamente un Pokémon mite, affonderà i suoi denti anteriori affilati e intrisi di veleno in chiunque lo faccia arrabbiare, causando paralisi nella vittima della sua ira.
descriptions.ja: ボチは通常はおとなしいポケモンだが、怒らせた相手には鋭い毒液まみれの前歯を突き立て、麻痺させる。
descriptions.ko: 땃쮜는 평소에는 온순한 포켓몬이지만, 화나게 한 상대에게는 날카로운 독액 젖은 앞니를 박아 넣어 분노의 대상을 마비시킨다.

name: grafaiai
description: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.
appearance: A slender, bipedal lemur-like Pokemon with a grey body, white chest and facial markings, large purple eyes, bright pink-tipped fingers and toes, and a large bushy tail that has a pinkish end.

descriptions.fr: La couleur de sa salive toxique dépend de ce que le Pokémon mange. Grafaiai couvre ses doigts de sa salive et dessine des motifs sur les arbres dans les forêts.
descriptions.de: Die Farbe des giftigen Speichels hängt davon ab, was dieses Pokémon frisst. Grafaiai bedeckt seine Finger mit Speichel und zeichnet Muster auf Bäume in Wäldern.
descriptions.es: El color de su saliva venenosa depende de lo que coma el Pokémon. Grafaiai cubre sus dedos con su saliva y dibuja patrones en los árboles de los bosques.
descriptions.it: Il colore della sua saliva velenosa dipende da ciò che il Pokémon mangia. Grafaiai si copre le dita di saliva e disegna motivi sugli alberi nelle foreste.
descriptions.ja: タギングルは毒の唾液の色は、何を食べるかによって異なる。指に唾液を塗り、森の木々に模様を描く。
descriptions.ko: 그라파아이는 독성 침의 색깔은 무엇을 먹느냐에 따라 달라진다. 손가락에 침을 묻혀 숲의 나무에 무늬를 그린다.

name: bramblin
description: A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokémon.
appearance: A spherical, tumbleweed-like Pokemon made of dried brown plant material with small green shoots emerging, featuring two large yellow eyes with black pupils.

descriptions.fr: Une âme incapable de passer dans l'au-delà fut emportée par le vent jusqu'à s'emmêler dans des herbes séchées et devenir un Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Eine Seele, die nicht ins Jenseits übergehen konnte, wurde vom Wind herumgeweht, bis sie sich in trockenem Gras verfing und zu einem Pokémon wurde.
descriptions.es: Un alma incapaz de pasar al más allá fue arrastrada por el viento hasta que se enredó con hierba seca y se convirtió en un Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Un'anima incapace di passare nell'aldilà fu sballottata dal vento finché non si impigliò nell'erba secca e divenne un Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: アノクサは来世に進めなかった魂が風に吹き飛ばされ、枯れた草に絡みつき、ポケモンになった。
descriptions.ko: 바람그라스는 사후 세계로 넘어가지 못한 영혼이 바람에 휩쓸려 마른 풀과 엉키면서 포켓몬이 되었다.

name: brambleghast
description: It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it.
appearance: A large, complex tangle of dried brown thorny branches forming a roughly humanoid tumbleweed shape, featuring glowing yellow eyes with black pupils that emanate a reddish-orange energy, and scattered green leaf accents.

descriptions.fr: Il ouvrira les branches de sa tête pour envelopper sa proie. Une fois qu'il a absorbé toute l'énergie vitale dont il a besoin, il expulse et rejette la proie.
descriptions.de: Es öffnet die Äste seines Kopfes, um seine Beute zu umhüllen. Sobald es alle benötigte Lebensenergie absorbiert hat, stößt es die Beute aus und entsorgt sie.
descriptions.es: Abrirá las ramas de su cabeza para envolver a su presa. Una vez que absorbe toda la energía vital que necesita, expulsa a la presa y la desecha.
descriptions.it: Aprirà i rami della sua testa per avvolgere la sua preda. Una volta assorbita tutta l'energia vitale di cui ha bisogno, espelle la preda e la scarta.
descriptions.ja: アノホラグサは頭の枝を開いて獲物を包み込む。必要な生命エネルギーをすべて吸収すると、獲物を排出し、捨てる。
descriptions.ko: 새싹귀신은 머리의 가지를 열어 먹이를 감싼다. 필요한 생명 에너지를 모두 흡수하면 먹이를 뱉어내 버린다.

name: toedscool
description: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.
appearance: A Pokemon with a flat, round red cap resembling a mushroom, from which eight long, slender yellow tentacle-like legs extend, featuring two large white eyes with black pupils on its "head."

descriptions.fr: Toedscool vit dans les forêts humides. Les volants qui tombent de son corps sont moelleux et très délicieux.
descriptions.de: Horrorkrabbe lebt in feuchten Wäldern. Die Hautlappen, die von seinem Körper abfallen, sind zäh und sehr köstlich.
descriptions.es: Toedscool habita en bosques húmedos. Los apéndices que caen de su cuerpo son masticables y muy deliciosos.
descriptions.it: Toedscool vive nelle foreste umide. Le membrane che si staccano dal suo corpo sono gommose e molto deliziose.
descriptions.ja: オトシドリは湿気の多い森に生息している。体から落ちるひらひらは歯ごたえがあり、とても美味しい。
descriptions.ko: 오토시도리는 습한 숲에 산다. 몸에서 떨어지는 얇은 막은 쫄깃쫄깃하고 매우 맛있다.

name: toedscruel
description: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.
appearance: A large, tree-like Pokemon with a wide, flat red mushroom cap, a central "trunk" and numerous "arms" composed of twisting yellow tentacles, and two large white eyes with black pupils beneath its cap.

descriptions.fr: Ces Pokémon se regroupent et forment des colonies au fond des forêts. Ils détestent absolument l'approche des étrangers.
descriptions.de: Diese Pokémon bilden Gruppen und Kolonien tief in den Wäldern. Sie hassen es absolut, wenn sich Fremde nähern.
descriptions.es: Estos Pokémon se agrupan y forman colonias en lo profundo de los bosques. Odian absolutamente que los extraños se acerquen.
descriptions.it: Questi Pokémon si riuniscono in gruppi e formano colonie nelle profondità delle foreste. Odiano assolutamente quando gli estranei si avvicinano.
descriptions.ja: これらのポケモンはグループを形成し、森の奥深くでコロニーを作る。見知らぬ者が近づくことを極端に嫌う。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬들은 무리를 지어 숲 깊은 곳에 군집을 이룬다. 낯선 이가 접근하는 것을 극도로 싫어한다.

name: klawf
description: Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can’t remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head.
appearance: A large, armored crab-like Pokemon with a reddish-orange shell, lighter yellow undersides, and distinct dark blue markings forming a star-like pattern on its carapace, featuring two large yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Craparoi s'accroche la tête en bas aux falaises, attendant sa proie. Mais Craparoi ne peut pas rester longtemps dans cette position car le sang lui monte à la tête.
descriptions.de: Klibbe hängt kopfüber an Klippen und wartet auf Beute. Klibbe kann jedoch nicht lange in dieser Position bleiben, da ihm das Blut in den Kopf steigt.
descriptions.es: Klawf cuelga boca abajo de los acantilados, esperando a su presa. Pero Klawf no puede permanecer en esta posición por mucho tiempo porque la sangre se le sube a la cabeza.
descriptions.it: Klawf si aggrappa a testa in giù alle scogliere, aspettando la preda. Tuttavia, non può rimanere a lungo in questa posizione perché il sangue gli affluisce alla testa.
descriptions.ja: カルボウは崖から逆さまにぶら下がり、獲物を待つ。しかし、血が頭に上るため、長くこの姿勢を保つことはできない。
descriptions.ko: 클라프는 절벽에 거꾸로 매달려 먹이를 기다린다. 하지만 피가 머리로 쏠리기 때문에 오래 이 자세를 유지할 수 없다.

name: capsakid
description: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.
appearance: A small, bipedal Pokemon resembling a green bell pepper, featuring a short stem on its head, two small arms and legs, and round black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Plus ce Pokémon s'expose au soleil, plus son corps produit de substances épicées, rendant ses attaques d'autant plus piquantes.
descriptions.de: Je mehr Sonnenlicht dieses Pokémon abbekommt, desto mehr würzige Chemikalien produziert sein Körper, wodurch seine Attacken schärfer werden.
descriptions.es: Cuanto más sol recibe este Pokémon, más sustancias químicas picantes produce su cuerpo y, por lo tanto, más picantes se vuelven sus movimientos.
descriptions.it: Più questo Pokémon si espone alla luce solare, più sostanze chimiche piccanti produce il suo corpo, e più piccanti diventano le sue mosse.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは日光を浴びれば浴びるほど、体内で辛味成分を生成し、技がより辛くなる。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 햇빛을 쬐면 쬘수록 몸에서 매운 성분을 더 많이 만들어내 기술이 더욱 매워진다.

name: scovillain
description: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.
appearance: A bipedal, plant-like Pokemon with a green body, featuring two distinct heads: one fiery red chili pepper and one green chili pepper, with prominent yellow markings on its chest.

descriptions.fr: Sa tête rouge convertit les substances épicées en énergie de feu et projette un jet de flammes super piquant sur la zone environnante.
descriptions.de: Der rote Kopf wandelt würzige Chemikalien in Feuerenergie um und schleudert einen superscharfen Flammenstrahl in die Umgebung.
descriptions.es: La cabeza roja convierte las sustancias químicas picantes en energía de fuego y lanza un chorro de llamas superpicante a los alrededores.
descriptions.it: La testa rossa converte le sostanze chimiche piccanti in energia di fuoco e sprigiona un getto di fiamme super piccanti nell'area circostante.
descriptions.ja: 赤い頭は辛味成分を炎エネルギーに変換し、超激辛の炎の奔流で周囲を焼き尽くす。
descriptions.ko: 붉은 머리는 매운 성분을 불꽃 에너지로 바꾸고 주변 일대를 초고온의 불꽃으로 휩쓴다.

name: rellor
description: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.
appearance: A small, shiny black beetle-like Pokemon with purple accents on its carapace and two glowing yellow eyes, perpetually rolling a large brown mud ball with its front legs.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon crée une boule de boue en mélangeant du sable et de la terre avec de l'énergie psychique. Il chérit sa boule de boue plus que sa propre vie.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon erzeugt einen Schlammball, indem es Sand und Erde mit Psycho-Energie mischt. Es schätzt seinen Schlammball mehr als sein eigenes Leben.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon crea una bola de barro mezclando arena y tierra con energía psíquica. Atesora su bola de barro más que su propia vida.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon crea una palla di fango mescolando sabbia e terra con energia psichica. La sua palla di fango è più preziosa della sua stessa vita.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは砂と土をサイコエネルギーで混ぜて泥団子を作る。この泥団子を命よりも大切にしている。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 모래와 흙을 사이코 에너지로 섞어 진흙덩이를 만든다. 이 진흙덩이를 자신의 생명보다 소중히 여긴다.

name: rabsca
description: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.
appearance: An ornate, vibrant green scarab beetle-like Pokemon with yellow eyes and reddish-orange accents, partially encased within a brown spherical shell, from which its legs and mandibles extend.

descriptions.fr: Le corps qui soutient la boule bouge à peine. On pense donc que le véritable corps de ce Pokémon se trouve en réalité à l'intérieur de la boule.
descriptions.de: Der Körper, der den Ball stützt, bewegt sich kaum. Daher wird angenommen, dass der wahre Körper dieses Pokémon tatsächlich im Ball steckt.
descriptions.es: El cuerpo que sostiene la bola apenas se mueve. Por lo tanto, se cree que el verdadero cuerpo de este Pokémon está realmente dentro de la bola.
descriptions.it: Il corpo che sostiene la palla si muove a malapena. Si pensa quindi che il vero corpo di questo Pokémon si trovi in realtà all'interno della palla.
descriptions.ja: ボールを支える体はほとんど動かない。そのため、このポケモンの本当の体はボールの中にあると考えられている。
descriptions.ko: 공을 지탱하는 몸은 거의 움직이지 않는다. 그래서 이 포켓몬의 진짜 몸은 공 안에 있다고 여겨진다.

name: flittle
description: Flittle’s toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon’s belly.
appearance: A small, spherical yellow Pokemon with tiny wings, two small legs, and a prominent blue star or flower-like pattern covering its entire back, featuring two large black eyes.

descriptions.fr: Les orteils de Flittle lévitent à environ un centimètre du sol grâce au pouvoir psychique émis par les volants situés sur son ventre.
descriptions.de: Flaribelle Zehen schweben etwa einen halben Zoll über dem Boden, dank der Psycho-Kraft, die von den Rüschen an seinem Bauch ausgeht.
descriptions.es: Los dedos de los pies de Flittle levitan aproximadamente media pulgada sobre el suelo debido al poder psíquico emitido por los volantes en el vientre del Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Le dita di Flittle levitano a circa un centimetro dal suolo grazie al potere psichico emesso dalle volanti sulla pancia del Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: エスパードのつま先は、お腹のフリルから発せられるサイコパワーによって、地面から約1センチメートル浮き上がっている。
descriptions.ko: 플리트의 발가락은 배의 주름에서 방출되는 사이코 파워 때문에 지면에서 약 1cm 정도 떠 있다.

name: espathra
description: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.
appearance: A tall, elegant ostrich-like Pokemon with a white body, long yellow legs and chest markings, and a striking, large feathery crest on its head that displays vibrant red, orange, yellow, and blue hues around its blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il immobilise ses adversaires en les baignant de pouvoir psychique émanant de ses grands yeux. Malgré son apparence, il a un tempérament vicieux.
descriptions.de: Es immobilisiert Gegner, indem es sie mit Psycho-Kraft aus seinen großen Augen überflutet. Trotz seines Aussehens besitzt es ein bösartiges Temperament.
descriptions.es: Inmoviliza a los oponentes bañándolos en poder psíquico de sus grandes ojos. A pesar de su apariencia, tiene un temperamento vicioso.
descriptions.it: Immobilizza gli avversari inondandoli di potere psichico emanato dai suoi grandi occhi. Nonostante l'aspetto, ha un temperamento feroce.
descriptions.ja: 大きな目から発せられるサイコパワーで相手を麻痺させる。見た目とは裏腹に、凶暴な気性を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 큰 눈에서 뿜어지는 사이코 파워로 상대를 마비시킨다. 겉모습과는 달리 흉포한 성격을 지녔다.

name: tinkatink
description: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.
appearance: A small, imp-like bipedal Pokemon with a pink body, white face and belly, large white eyes, pink hair, and carrying a small dark grey metal hammer.

descriptions.fr: Il brandit son marteau fait main pour se protéger, mais le marteau est souvent volé par des Pokémon qui mangent le métal.
descriptions.de: Es schwingt seinen selbstgemachten Hammer zur Verteidigung, doch der Hammer wird oft von metallfressenden Pokémon gestohlen.
descriptions.es: Balancea su martillo hecho a mano para protegerse, pero el martillo a menudo es robado por Pokémon que comen metal.
descriptions.it: Brandisce il suo martello fatto a mano per proteggersi, ma il martello viene spesso rubato dai Pokémon che mangiano il metallo.
descriptions.ja: 手作りのハンマーを振り回して身を守るが、そのハンマーは金属を食べるポケモンによく盗まれる。
descriptions.ko: 손수 만든 망치를 휘둘러 몸을 지키지만, 망치는 금속을 먹는 포켓몬에게 자주 도둑맞는다.

name: tinkatuff
description: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.
appearance: A bipedal, imp-like Pokemon with a pink body, white face and belly, pink hair, and large white eyes, wielding a larger, more intricately crafted dark grey metal hammer with a reddish-pink handle.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon attaque les groupes de Scalpion et de Scalproie afin de récupérer le métal qui leur servira à fabriquer un marteau grand et robuste.
descriptions.de: Es greift Gruppen von Gladiantri und Caesurio an, um ihnen Metall abzunehmen, aus dem es einen großen und robusten Hammer herstellt.
descriptions.es: Ataca grupos de Pawniard y Bisharp para robarles el metal con el que construye un martillo enorme y robusto.
descriptions.it: Attacca gruppi di Pawniard e Bisharp per recuperare il metallo e forgiare un martello grande e robusto.
descriptions.ja: コマタナや　キリキザンの　群れを　襲撃し　奪った　金属で　大きく　頑丈な　ハンマーを　作りだす。
descriptions.ko: 자마슈나 절각참 무리를 습격해 빼앗은 금속으로 크고 튼튼한 해머를 만들어낸다.

name: tinkaton
description: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.
appearance: A powerful, bipedal humanoid imp-like Pokemon with a pink body, white face and belly, pink hair, and large white eyes, wielding an enormous dark grey metal hammer adorned with large pink ribbons.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon intelligent a un tempérament très audacieux. Il projette des rochers dans le ciel avec son marteau, visant les Corvaillus en plein vol.
descriptions.de: Dieses intelligente Pokémon hat ein sehr kühnes Gemüt. Es schleudert mit seinem Hammer Felsen in den Himmel und zielt dabei auf vorbeifliegende Krarmor.
descriptions.es: Este inteligente Pokémon tiene una disposición muy osada. Golpea rocas con su martillo para lanzarlas por los aires y derribar a los Corviknight voladores.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon intelligente e molto audace usa il suo martello per scagliare rocce in cielo, mirando ai Corviknight in volo.
descriptions.ja: 非常に　賢く　大胆な　性格。　ハンマーで　岩を　空へ　打ち上げ　空を　飛ぶ　アーマーガアを　狙撃する。
descriptions.ko: 매우 영리하고 대담한 성격. 해머로 바위를 하늘로 쏘아 올리며 하늘을 나는 아머까를 저격한다.

name: wiglett
description: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.
appearance: A long, slender, worm-like Pokemon with a pure white body, featuring a small pink nose and two distinct black eyes on its head.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon peut sentir l'odeur d'un Délestrin à plus de 20 mètres de distance et se cache alors dans le sable.
descriptions.de: Es nimmt den Geruch eines Nigiragi aus über 20 Metern Entfernung wahr und versteckt sich dann im Sand.
descriptions.es: Es es capaz de detectar el olor de un Veluza a más de 20 metros de distancia y, acto seguido, se oculta en la arena.
descriptions.it: È in grado di sentire l'odore di un Veluza a più di 20 metri di distanza e si nasconde nella sabbia.
descriptions.ja: ２０メートル以上離れた　ミガルーサの　匂いを　嗅ぎわけ　砂の中に　身を隠すことが　できる。
descriptions.ko: 20미터 이상 떨어진 미가루사의 냄새를 구분하여 모래 속에 몸을 숨길 수 있다.

name: wugtrio
description: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.
appearance: A trio of long, thin, white eel-like bodies with red snouts and black eyes, emerging from the ground, each head identical.

descriptions.fr: Malgré les apparences, il a un tempérament vicieux. Il s'enroule autour de sa proie avec son long corps et la traîne dans sa tanière.
descriptions.de: Entgegen seinem Aussehen hat es ein bösartiges Temperament. Es wickelt seine langen Körper um die Beute und schleift sie in seinen Bau.
descriptions.es: A pesar de lo que su apariencia sugiere, tiene un temperamento cruel. Envuelve a sus presas con sus largos cuerpos y las arrastra a su guarida.
descriptions.it: Contrariamente a quanto il suo aspetto suggerisce, ha un temperamento feroce. Avvolge le sue lunghe appendici intorno alla preda e la trascina nella sua tana.
descriptions.ja: 見た目に　反して　気性は　獰猛。　長い　体を　獲物に　巻きつけ　巣穴へ　引きずり込む。
descriptions.ko: 겉모습과는 달리 사나운 성격. 긴 몸을 먹잇감에 휘감아 굴속으로 끌고 들어간다.

name: bombirdier
description: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.
appearance: A large, dark grey avian Pokémon with a long, sharp yellow beak, prominent white chest feathers, and carrying a bundle of rocks and branches clutched in its red talons, with red wingtips.

descriptions.fr: Il rassemble des choses dans un tablier fait de plumes tombées et ajoutées à ses plumes de poitrine, puis les laisse tomber de hauts lieux pour s'amuser.
descriptions.de: Es sammelt Gegenstände in einer Schürze aus abgeworfenen und eigenen Brustfedern, um sie dann zum Spaß aus großer Höhe fallen zu lassen.
descriptions.es: Recoge objetos en un delantal formado por sus propias plumas pectorales y las que ha mudado, y luego los deja caer desde grandes alturas por diversión.
descriptions.it: Raccoglie oggetti in un "grembiule" formato dalle sue piume pettorali e da quelle mute, poi li lascia cadere da luoghi elevati per divertimento.
descriptions.ja: 抜け落ちた羽と　胸元の羽を　合わせた　エプロンに　物を　まとめて　高い　場所から　落として　楽しむ。
descriptions.ko: 빠진 털과 가슴 털을 합친 앞치마에 물건을 모아 높은 곳에서 떨어뜨리며 즐거워한다.

name: finizen
description: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.
appearance: A sleek, light blue dolphin-like Pokémon with a white underside, two small pectoral fins, a dorsal fin with a heart-shaped cutout, and a heart-shaped tail fin, featuring a single blowhole.

descriptions.fr: Il aime jouer avec les siens en utilisant l'anneau d'eau sur sa queue. Il utilise des ondes ultrasoniques pour détecter les émotions des autres créatures vivantes.
descriptions.de: Es spielt gerne mit Artgenossen, indem es den Wasserring an seinem Schwanz nutzt. Es setzt Ultraschallwellen ein, um die Emotionen anderer Lebewesen zu spüren.
descriptions.es: Le gusta jugar con los de su especie usando el anillo de agua de su cola. Utiliza ondas ultrasónicas para percibir las emociones de otros seres vivos.
descriptions.it: Ama giocare con i suoi simili usando l'anello d'acqua sulla coda. Usa le onde ultrasoniche per percepire le emozioni degli altri esseri viventi.
descriptions.ja: 尻尾の　水リングを　使って　仲間と　遊ぶのが　好き。　超音波で　生き物の　気持ちを　探る。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리의 물 링을 사용하여 동료들과 노는 것을 좋아한다. 초음파로 생물의 기분을 감지한다.

name: palafin-zero
description: This Pokémon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation.
appearance: A sleek, light blue dolphin-like Pokémon with a white underside, two small pectoral fins, a dorsal fin with a heart-shaped cutout, and a heart-shaped tail fin, appearing slightly larger than Finizen with a more determined expression.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon change d'apparence s'il entend ses alliés appeler à l'aide. Palafin ne montrera jamais son moment de transformation à personne.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon verändert sein Aussehen, wenn es seine Verbündeten um Hilfe rufen hört. Palafin zeigt niemandem seinen Verwandlungsmoment.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon cambia de aspecto si oye a sus aliados pidiendo ayuda. Palafin nunca le muestra a nadie su momento de transformación.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon cambia aspetto se sente i suoi alleati chiedere aiuto. Palafin non mostra mai a nessuno il momento della sua trasformazione.
descriptions.ja: 仲間が　助けを　求める声を　聞くと　姿を　変える。　変身の　瞬間を　誰にも　見せない。
descriptions.ko: 동료가 도움을 요청하는 소리를 들으면 모습을 바꾼다. 변신하는 순간을 아무에게도 보여주지 않는다.

display_names.ja: イルカマン ゼロのすがた

name: varoom
description: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.
appearance: A metallic grey, single-cylinder engine-like Pokémon with a large red eye on its side, a spiky exhaust pipe on its back, four small black gear-like legs, and a prominent silver crank on its front.

descriptions.fr: On raconte que ce Pokémon est né lorsqu'un Pokémon Poison inconnu est entré et a animé un moteur laissé dans une usine de recyclage.
descriptions.de: Es wird gesagt, dass dieses Pokémon entstand, als ein unbekanntes Gift-Pokémon in einen Motor eindrang und ihn beseelte, der in einer Schrottverwertungsanlage zurückgelassen worden war.
descriptions.es: Se dice que este Pokémon nació cuando un Pokémon de tipo Veneno desconocido entró e insufló vida a un motor abandonado en una fábrica de procesamiento de chatarra.
descriptions.it: Si dice che questo Pokémon sia nato quando un misterioso Pokémon Veleno è entrato in un motore abbandonato in una fabbrica di rottami, infondendogli la vita.
descriptions.ja: スクラップ工場に　放置された　エンジンに　正体不明の　どくタイプポケモンが　入り込み　生まれたと　言われている。
descriptions.ko: 폐품 처리 공장에 방치된 엔진에 정체불명의 독타입 포켓몬이 들어가 탄생했다고 전해진다.

name: revavroom
description: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders—now numbering eight—to generate energy.
appearance: A large, multi-cylinder engine-like Pokémon composed of eight metallic grey engine blocks fused together, featuring four black spiked wheels, a prominent red eye on its central body block, and exhaust pipes emerging from its top.

descriptions.fr: Il crée un gaz à partir de poison et de minéraux extraits de roches. Il le fait ensuite exploser dans ses cylindres — désormais au nombre de huit — pour générer de l'énergie.
descriptions.de: Es erzeugt ein Gas aus Gift und Mineralien aus Felsen. Dieses Gas zündet es dann in seinen nunmehr acht Zylindern, um Energie zu erzeugen.
descriptions.es: Produce un gas a partir de veneno y de minerales obtenidos de rocas. Detona el gas en sus cilindros, ahora ocho, para generar energía.
descriptions.it: Produce un gas da veleno e minerali estratti dalle rocce. Lo detona nei suoi otto cilindri per generare energia.
descriptions.ja: どくと　岩から　採れた　鉱物の　ガスを　生成。　８本に　増えた　シリンダーで　ガスを　爆発させて　エネルギーを　生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 독과 바위에서 채취한 광물로 가스를 생성. 8개로 늘어난 실린더에서 가스를 폭발시켜 에너지를 만들어낸다.

name: cyclizar
description: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal, lizard-like Pokémon with a green body, a tan underbelly, large black eyes, and black racing stripes on its back and sides, with a long tail featuring a tire-like segment near its base.

descriptions.fr: Apparemment, Cyclizar permet aux gens de le chevaucher depuis l'Antiquité. Des représentations de cela ont été trouvées dans des peintures murales vieilles de 10 000 ans.
descriptions.de: Offenbar erlaubt Mopex den Menschen seit der Antike, auf seinem Rücken zu reiten. Darstellungen davon wurden in 10 000 Jahre alten Wandmalereien gefunden.
descriptions.es: Al parecer, Cyclizar ha permitido a la gente montarlo desde la antigüedad. Se han encontrado representaciones de esto en murales de 10 000 años de antigüedad.
descriptions.it: A quanto pare, Cyclizar permette alle persone di cavalcarlo fin dall'antichità. Raffigurazioni di ciò sono state trovate in murales vecchi di 10 000 anni.
descriptions.ja: はるか　大昔から　人に　背に　乗せてきたと　言われる。　１万年前の　壁画にも　その　姿が　残されている。
descriptions.ko: 아주 먼 옛날부터 사람을 등에 태웠다고 전해진다. 1만 년 전 벽화에도 그 모습이 남아있다.

name: orthworm
description: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.
appearance: A long, segmented, metallic-red worm-like Pokémon with a large, shovel-shaped silver head, prominent silver plates on its back, and multiple small, yellow, drill-like appendages along its sides.

descriptions.fr: Quand il est attaqué, ce Pokémon utilise les tentacules de son corps comme des poings pour frapper l'adversaire avec une rafale de coups.
descriptions.de: Wird es angegriffen, schwingt dieses Pokémon die Ranken an seinem Körper wie Fäuste und bombardiert den Gegner mit einem Hagel von Schlägen.
descriptions.es: Cuando lo atacan, este Pokémon usa los zarcillos de su cuerpo como puños para golpear al oponente con una ráfaga de puñetazos.
descriptions.it: Quando attaccato, questo Pokémon brandisce i tentacoli sul suo corpo come pugni e tempesta l'avversario con una raffica di colpi.
descriptions.ja: 攻撃されると体の触手を拳のように振るい、相手にパンチの嵐を浴びせる。
descriptions.ko: 공격받으면 몸의 촉수를 주먹처럼 휘둘러 상대에게 주먹 세례를 퍼붓는다.

name: glimmet
description: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.
appearance: A purple geode-like Pokémon with a crystalline, yellow-orange flower-like structure on its head, featuring a grey underside and glowing yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il absorbe les nutriments des parois des grottes. Les pétales qu'il porte sont faits de poison cristallisé.
descriptions.de: Es absorbiert Nährstoffe aus Höhlenwänden. Die Blütenblätter, die es trägt, bestehen aus kristallisiertem Gift.
descriptions.es: Absorbe nutrientes de las paredes de las cuevas. Los pétalos que lo recubren están hechos de veneno cristalizado.
descriptions.it: Assorbe i nutrienti dalle pareti delle grotte. I petali che indossa sono fatti di veleno cristallizzato.
descriptions.ja: 洞窟の壁から養分を吸収する。身につけている花びらは結晶化した毒でできている。
descriptions.ko: 동굴 벽에서 영양분을 흡수한다. 몸에 두른 꽃잎은 결정화된 독으로 되어 있다.

name: glimmora
description: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.
appearance: A large, floating, crystalline Pokémon resembling a giant purple and yellow flower, with sharp, yellow crystal petals surrounding a central purple core and a long stem-like base.

descriptions.fr: Quand il détecte un danger, ce Pokémon ouvre ses pétales cristallins et tire des rayons depuis son corps conique.
descriptions.de: Wenn dieses Pokémon Gefahr wittert, öffnet es seine kristallinen Blütenblätter und feuert Strahlen aus seinem kegelförmigen Körper ab.
descriptions.es: Cuando detecta peligro, abre sus pétalos cristalinos y dispara rayos desde su cuerpo cónico.
descriptions.it: Quando questo Pokémon rileva un pericolo, apre i suoi petali cristallini e spara raggi dal suo corpo conico.
descriptions.ja: 危険を察知すると結晶の触手を開き、円錐状の体からビームを発射する。
descriptions.ko: 위험을 감지하면 결정 촉수를 펼쳐 원뿔형 몸통에서 빔을 발사한다.

name: greavard
description: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.
appearance: A small, ghost-like puppy Pokémon made of grey smoke with a single, glowing purple eye, a bone-shaped candle on its head with a flickering purple flame, and large floppy ears.

descriptions.fr: On dit qu'un Pokémon chien qui est mort dans la nature sans jamais interagir avec un humain a été réincarné en ce Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Es wird gesagt, dass ein Hunde-Pokémon, das in der Wildnis starb, ohne je mit einem Menschen interagiert zu haben, als dieses Pokémon wiedergeboren wurde.
descriptions.es: Se dice que un Pokémon perro que murió en la naturaleza sin haber interactuado nunca con un humano renació como este Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Si dice che un Pokémon cane morto in natura senza aver mai interagito con un umano sia rinato come questo Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 人と出会うことなく野垂れ死んだ犬ポケモンがこのポケモンに生まれ変わったと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 사람을 만나지 못하고 들에서 죽은 강아지 포켓몬이 이 포켓몬으로 다시 태어났다고 전해진다.

name: houndstone
description: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.
appearance: A large, four-legged ghost dog Pokémon with a dark grey, skeletal body covered in tattered white burial cloth, a glowing purple eye, and a prominent headstone-like structure on its back.

descriptions.fr: Lestombaile passe la plupart de son temps à dormir dans les cimetières. Parmi tous les Pokémon chiens, il est le plus loyal envers son maître.
descriptions.de: Horrornal verbringt die meiste Zeit schlafend auf Friedhöfen. Unter allen Hunde-Pokémon ist dieses seinem Meister am treuesten.
descriptions.es: Houndstone pasa la mayor parte del tiempo durmiendo en cementerios. Entre todos los Pokémon perro, este es el más leal a su amo.
descriptions.it: Houndstone trascorre la maggior parte del tempo dormendo nei cimiteri. Tra tutti i Pokémon cane, è il più leale al suo padrone.
descriptions.ja: ハカドッグはほとんどの時間を墓地で寝て過ごす。すべての犬ポケモンの中で、このポケモンが最も主人に忠実である。
descriptions.ko: 저승갓개는 대부분의 시간을 묘지에서 잠을 자며 보낸다. 모든 강아지 포켓몬 중에서 가장 주인에게 충성스럽다.

name: flamigo
description: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.
appearance: A tall, pink flamingo-like Pokémon with a long neck and legs, a yellow beak with a black tip, and distinct white heart-shaped markings on its upper body where its wings attach.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon nouerait la base de son cou pour empêcher l'énergie stockée dans son ventre de s'échapper par son bec.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon bindet anscheinend den Ansatz seines Halses zu einem Knoten, damit die in seinem Bauch gespeicherte Energie nicht durch seinen Schnabel entweicht.
descriptions.es: Al parecer, este Pokémon anuda la base de su cuello para que la energía almacenada en su vientre no se escape por su pico.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon apparentemente annoda la base del collo in modo che l'energia immagazzinata nella sua pancia non fuoriesca dal becco.
descriptions.ja: お腹にためたエネルギーがクチバシから逃げないように首の根元を結んでいるらしい。
descriptions.ko: 뱃속에 모아둔 에너지가 부리로 빠져나가지 않도록 목 밑동을 묶는다고 한다.

name: cetoddle
description: This species left the ocean and began living on land a very long time ago. It seems to be closely related to Wailmer.
appearance: A small, round, white whale-like Pokémon with a pink snout, a single spiracle on its head, two small pink flippers, and a short pink tail fin.

descriptions.fr: Cette espèce a quitté l'océan et a commencé à vivre sur terre il y a très longtemps. Elle semble être étroitement liée à Wailmer.
descriptions.de: Diese Spezies verließ den Ozean und begann vor sehr langer Zeit, an Land zu leben. Es scheint eng mit Wailmer verwandt zu sein.
descriptions.es: Esta especie abandonó el océano y comenzó a vivir en tierra hace mucho tiempo. Parece estar estrechamente relacionada con Wailmer.
descriptions.it: Questa specie ha lasciato l'oceano e ha iniziato a vivere sulla terraferma molto tempo fa. Sembra essere strettamente imparentata con Wailmer.
descriptions.ja: はるか昔、海を離れて陸で暮らすようになった種族。ホエルコと近縁らしい。
descriptions.ko: 아주 오래전 바다를 떠나 육지에서 살게 된 종이다. 고래왕자와 근연종인 듯하다.

name: cetitan
description: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin.
appearance: A massive, white whale-like Pokémon with a large pink head, two long pink horn-like tusks, four thick pink legs, and a sturdy body covered in thick white fur.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon erre dans les zones enneigées et glacées. Il protège son corps avec de puissants muscles et une épaisse couche de graisse sous sa peau.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon streift durch verschneite, eisige Gebiete. Es schützt seinen Körper mit kräftigen Muskeln und einer dicken Fettschicht unter der Haut.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon deambula por zonas nevadas y heladas. Protege su cuerpo con potentes músculos y una gruesa capa de grasa bajo la piel.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon vaga per le aree innevate e ghiacciate. Protegge il suo corpo con muscoli potenti e uno spesso strato di grasso sotto la pelle.
descriptions.ja: 雪や氷に覆われた地域を徘徊する。分厚い脂肪と屈強な筋肉で身を守る。
descriptions.ko: 눈과 얼음으로 뒤덮인 지역을 배회한다. 두꺼운 지방과 강인한 근육으로 몸을 보호한다.

name: veluza
description: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.
appearance: A large, elongated, white fish-like Pokémon with a prominent, jagged red dorsal fin running down its back, bright red eyes, and sharp, needle-like teeth, with dark blue markings on its body.

descriptions.fr: Quand Délestrin se débarrasse de sa chair superflue, son esprit s'aiguise et sa puissance psychique augmente. La chair superflue a une saveur douce mais délicieuse.
descriptions.de: Wenn Fletiamo überflüssiges Fleisch abwirft, schärft sich sein Geist und seine Psycho-Kraft nimmt zu. Das abgeworfene Fleisch hat einen milden, aber köstlichen Geschmack.
descriptions.es: Cuando Veluza se desprende de carne innecesaria, su mente se agudiza y su poder psíquico aumenta. La carne sobrante tiene un sabor suave pero delicioso.
descriptions.it: Quando Veluza scarta la carne superflua, la sua mente si affina e il suo potere psichico aumenta. La carne di scarto ha un sapore delicato ma delizioso.
descriptions.ja: ミガルーサが不要な肉を捨てると、精神が研ぎ澄まされ、サイコパワーが増加する。残った肉はマイルドだがおいしい味がする。
descriptions.ko: 캡틴바다이가 불필요한 살을 버리면 정신이 연마되고 초능력이 증가한다. 여분의 살은 부드럽지만 맛있다.

name: dondozo
description: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.
appearance: A massive, dark blue catfish-like Pokémon with a large white underbelly, prominent pink barbels around its mouth, a large, flat, fish-like tail, and lighter blue diamond patterns covering its back.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est un glouton, mais il est mauvais pour trouver de la nourriture. Il fait équipe avec un Nigirigon pour attraper des proies.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ist ein Vielfraß, aber schlecht darin, Nahrung zu beschaffen. Es verbündet sich mit einem Nigiragi, um Beute zu fangen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon es un glotón, pero es malo consiguiendo comida. Se asocia con un Tatsugiri para atrapar presas.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è un golosone, ma è scarso nel procurarsi il cibo. Si unisce a un Tatsugiri per catturare le prede.
descriptions.ja: ヘイラッシャは食いしん坊だが、食べ物を得るのが苦手だ。シャリタツと組んで獲物を捕らえる。
descriptions.ko: 어써러러는 대식가지만 먹이를 구하는 데 서툴다. 싸리용과 팀을 이뤄 먹이를 잡는다.

name: tatsugiri-curly
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: A small, orange, curl-shaped fish Pokémon with a light yellow underbelly, two small fins, large black eyes, and a prominent wavy, antenna-like fin on its head.

descriptions.fr: C'est un petit Pokémon Dragon. Il vit dans la bouche de Dondozo pour se protéger des ennemis extérieurs.
descriptions.de: Dieses kleine Drachen-Pokémon lebt zum Schutz vor äußeren Feinden im Maul von Dondozo.
descriptions.es: Este pequeño Pokémon de tipo Dragón vive en la boca de Dondozo para protegerse de sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Questo piccolo Pokémon Drago vive all'interno della bocca di Dondozo per proteggersi dai nemici esterni.
descriptions.ja: 小さなドラゴンのポケモン。外敵から身を守るため、ヘイラッシャの口の中で暮らす。
descriptions.ko: 작은 드래곤 포켓몬. 외부의 적으로부터 몸을 지키기 위해 헤이러샤의 입안에서 지낸다.

display_names.ja: シャリタツ へいちょーのすがた

name: annihilape
description: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.
appearance: A large, grey ape-like Pokémon with a muscular build, prominent black fur on its wrists and ankles, two large dark grey cuffs with broken chains on its wrists, glowing red eyes, and a perpetually enraged expression.

descriptions.fr: Sa colère a dépassé un point critique, ce qui lui a conféré un pouvoir qui n'est plus entravé par les limites de son corps physique.
descriptions.de: Seine Wut stieg ins Unermessliche, woraufhin es eine Kraft erlangte, die über die Grenzen seines physischen Körpers hinausgeht.
descriptions.es: Su ira ha superado un punto crítico, lo que le ha otorgado un poder que ya no está limitado por los confines de su cuerpo físico.
descriptions.it: La sua rabbia è salita oltre un punto critico, conferendogli un potere che non è più vincolato dai limiti del suo corpo fisico.
descriptions.ja: 怒りが限界を超えた時、肉体の限界に縛られない力を手に入れたポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 분노가 한계점을 넘어선 결과, 육체의 한계에 얽매이지 않는 힘을 얻은 포켓몬.

name: clodsire
description: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line.
appearance: A stout, brown, salamander-like Pokémon with a large, wide mouth, two small black eyes, and two rows of three purple, gill-like growths on its head, resembling a large, muddy newt.

descriptions.fr: Quand il est attaqué, ce Pokémon riposte en faisant sortir de grosses épines de son corps. C'est un mouvement risqué qui met tout en jeu.
descriptions.de: Wird es angegriffen, stößt dieses Pokémon dicke Stacheln aus seinem Körper. Eine riskante Bewegung, die alles auf eine Karte setzt.
descriptions.es: Cuando es atacado, este Pokémon se defiende sacando gruesas espinas de su cuerpo. Es un movimiento arriesgado que lo pone todo en juego.
descriptions.it: Quando attaccato, questo Pokémon reagisce estraendo dal suo corpo spine spesse. È una mossa rischiosa che mette tutto in gioco.
descriptions.ja: 攻撃されると、体から太いトゲを突き出して反撃する。すべてをかけた危険な一手だ。
descriptions.ko: 공격받으면 몸에서 굵은 가시를 튀어나오게 해 반격한다. 모든 것을 건 위험한 한 수다.

name: farigiraf
description: Now that the brain waves from the head and tail are synced up, the psychic power of this Pokémon is 10 times stronger than Girafarig’s.
appearance: A large, two-headed giraffe-like Pokémon with an orange and white spotted body, a long neck, and a second, smaller, spherical grey head at the end of its tail, connected to its main body by a striped collar, with its main head mostly grey with orange spots.

descriptions.fr: Maintenant que les ondes cérébrales de sa tête et de sa queue sont synchronisées, le pouvoir psychique de ce Pokémon est 10 fois plus fort que celui de Girafarig.
descriptions.de: Da die Gehirnwellen von Kopf und Schweif synchronisiert sind, ist die Psycho-Kraft dieses Pokémon zehnmal stärker als die von Girafarig.
descriptions.es: Ahora que las ondas cerebrales de su cabeza y cola están sincronizadas, el poder psíquico de este Pokémon es 10 veces más fuerte que el de Girafarig.
descriptions.it: Ora che le onde cerebrali della testa e della coda sono sincronizzate, il potere psichico di questo Pokémon è 10 volte più forte di quello di Girafarig.
descriptions.ja: 頭と尻尾の脳波が同期し、そのサイコパワーはキリンリキの10倍になった。
descriptions.ko: 머리와 꼬리의 뇌파가 동기화되어 사이코 파워는 키링키의 10배가 되었다.

name: dudunsparce-two-segment
description: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.
appearance: A long, serpentine Pokémon with a cream-colored body, two distinct segments, blue-and-yellow striped wings, a drill-like tail, and a round, cream-colored head with small blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon utilise sa queue dure pour construire son nid en forant des trous dans la roche-mère, profondément sous terre. Le nid peut atteindre une longueur de plus de dix kilomètres.
descriptions.de: Mithilfe seines harten Schweifes bohrt es Löcher in den tief unter der Erde liegenden Fels, um sein Nest zu bauen. Das Nest kann über zehn Kilometer lang werden.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon usa su dura cola para hacer su nido, perforando agujeros en la roca madre, en las profundidades subterráneas. El nido puede alcanzar longitudes de más de diez kilómetros.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon usa la sua coda dura per costruire il nido, scavando buchi nella roccia madre nel sottosuolo. Il nido può raggiungere lunghezze di oltre dieci chilometri.
descriptions.ja: 硬い尻尾で地中深くの岩盤に穴を掘り巣を作る。巣の全長は10キロメートルを超えることもある。
descriptions.ko: 단단한 꼬리로 땅속 깊은 곳에 있는 암반에 구멍을 뚫어 둥지를 만든다. 둥지의 전장은 10km를 넘을 때도 있다.

display_names.ja: ノココッチ ふたふしフォルム

name: kingambit
description: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.
appearance: A large, bipedal, humanoid Pokémon with a dark red and black armored body, a prominent gold mustache-like facial feature, a massive, gold-crested head resembling a shogun's helmet, and wielding a sharp, gold-bladed axe on its chest.

descriptions.fr: Seul un Scalproie qui domine tous les autres de sa vaste armée peut évoluer en Empiflor.
descriptions.de: Nur ein Caesurio, das sich in seiner riesigen Armee über alle anderen erhoben hat, kann sich zu Gladimperio entwickeln.
descriptions.es: Solo un Bisharp que se alza por encima de todos los demás en su vasto ejército puede evolucionar a Kingambit.
descriptions.it: Solo un Bisharp che si distingue sopra tutti gli altri nel suo vasto esercito può evolversi in Kingambit.
descriptions.ja: 広い軍勢の頂点に立つキリキザンだけが、ドドゲザンへと進化できる。
descriptions.ko: 거대한 군세의 정점에 선 절각참만이 도도감으로 진화할 수 있다.

name: great-tusk
description: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book.
appearance: A massive, grey, elephant-like Pokémon with large red tusks, thick, ridged grey skin, heavy club-like forelegs with black claws, and prominent red and yellow markings on its head and trunk, resembling a prehistoric mammoth.

descriptions.fr: Des observations de ce Pokémon ont eu lieu ces dernières années. Le nom « Fort-Ivoire » a été tiré d'une créature listée dans un certain livre.
descriptions.de: In den letzten Jahren gab es immer wieder Sichtungen dieses Pokémon. Der Name Wutstoß stammt von einer Kreatur, die in einem bestimmten Buch aufgeführt ist.
descriptions.es: Se han producido avistamientos de este Pokémon en los últimos años. El nombre Colmilargo fue tomado de una criatura listada en cierto libro.
descriptions.it: Avvistamenti di questo Pokémon sono avvenuti negli ultimi anni. Il nome Grandetesta è stato preso da una creatura elencata in un certo libro.
descriptions.ja: 近年、このポケモンが目撃されるようになった。とある書物に記された「イダイナキバ」という生物の名がつけられた。
descriptions.ko: 최근 몇 년간 이 포켓몬이 목격되었다. 어떤 서적에 기록된 '위대한엄니'라는 생물의 이름이 붙었다.

name: scream-tail
description: There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokémon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal.
appearance: A small, pink, fairy-like Pokémon with large, pointed ears, a long, fluffy tail, prominent fangs, blue eyes, and two small wings, resembling a prehistoric Jigglypuff.

descriptions.fr: Il n'y a eu qu'une seule observation rapportée de ce Pokémon. Il ressemble à une créature mystérieuse décrite dans un ancien journal d'expédition.
descriptions.de: Es gab nur eine einzige gemeldete Sichtung dieses Pokémon. Es ähnelt einem mysteriösen Wesen, das in einem alten Expeditionsjournal abgebildet ist.
descriptions.es: Solo se ha reportado un avistamiento de este Pokémon. Se asemeja a una criatura misteriosa representada en un antiguo diario de expedición.
descriptions.it: C'è stato solo un avvistamento riportato di questo Pokémon. Assomiglia a una creatura misteriosa raffigurata in un vecchio diario di spedizione.
descriptions.ja: 目撃例は一度きり。古い探検記に記された、謎の生物に似たポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 목격된 사례는 단 한 번뿐. 오래된 탐험 일지에 기록된 수수께끼의 생물과 닮은 포켓몬.

name: brute-bonnet
description: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon.
appearance: A large, mushroom-like Pokémon with a dark red cap, white spots, a brown stem-like body, green, leaf-like appendages around its base, black eyes, and a wide mouth, resembling a prehistoric Amoonguss.

descriptions.fr: Il est possible que la créature listée comme « Fongus-Furie » dans un certain livre soit en réalité ce Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Es ist möglich, dass die in einem bestimmten Buch als „Brutalos“ aufgeführte Kreatur tatsächlich dieses Pokémon ist.
descriptions.es: Es posible que la criatura listada como Sombrero Furia en cierto libro sea en realidad este Pokémon.
descriptions.it: È possibile che la creatura elencata come Fungofurioso in un certo libro sia in realtà questo Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: とある書物に記された「アラブルタケ」という生物は、このポケモンのことである可能性がある。
descriptions.ko: 어떤 서적에 기록된 '사나운버섯'이라는 생물은 이 포켓몬일 가능성이 있다.

name: flutter-mane
description: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.
appearance: A small, floating, ghost-like Pokémon with a wispy, light purple body, long, flowing hair-like tendrils, prominent yellow eyes with red pupils, two sharp teeth, and large, gold-colored claws, resembling a prehistoric Misdreavus.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon possède des caractéristiques similaires à celles de « Flotte-Mèche », une créature mentionnée dans un certain livre.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon weist ähnliche Merkmale auf wie das in einem bestimmten Buch erwähnte Wesen „Mähnenflattern“.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon tiene características similares a las de Melena Ondulada, una criatura mencionada en cierto libro.
descriptions.it: Este Pokémon tiene características similares a las de Crinealato, una criatura mencionada en cierto libro.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは、とある書物に記された「ハバタクカミ」という生物と、似た特徴を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 어떤 서적에 기록된 '날개치는머리'라는 생물과 비슷한 특징을 가지고 있다.

name: slither-wing
description: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.
appearance: A large, bipedal, insectoid Pokémon with a reddish-brown body, prominent yellow markings on its wings and head, large, feathery yellow antennae, and green legs, resembling a prehistoric Volcarona.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon mystérieux présente des similarités avec une créature qu'un ancien livre appelait Rampe-Ailes.
descriptions.de: Dieses mysteriöse Pokémon ähnelt einer Kreatur, die in einem alten Buch als Flatterflügel beschrieben wird.
descriptions.es: Este misterioso Pokémon guarda ciertas similitudes con una criatura que un libro antiguo describe como Colaguda.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon misterioso presenta alcune somiglianze con una creatura che un antico libro introduce come Alarugosa.
descriptions.ja: この謎のポケモンは、古い書物に記された「チヲハウハネ」という生物と類似点が見られる。
descriptions.ko: 이 의문의 포켓몬은 낡은 서적에 실린 「활개치는머리」라는 생물과 유사한 점을 가지고 있다.

name: sandy-shocks
description: No records exist of this Pokémon being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with a creature shown in an expedition journal.
appearance: A quadrupedal, badger-like Pokémon with a dark brown body, prominent yellow metallic spikes on its back and head, a long, striped tail, and large, magnet-like claws, resembling a prehistoric Magneton.

descriptions.fr: Il n'existe aucune trace de la capture de ce Pokémon. Les données sont lacunaires, mais ses caractéristiques correspondent à celles d'une créature figurant dans un carnet d'expédition.
descriptions.de: Von der Fanggeschichte dieses Pokémon existieren keinerlei Aufzeichnungen. Daten fehlen, aber seine Merkmale stimmen mit denen einer Kreatur überein, die in einem Expeditionsjournal beschrieben wurde.
descriptions.es: No existen registros de la captura de este Pokémon. Faltan datos, pero sus rasgos coinciden con los de una criatura que aparece en el diario de una expedición.
descriptions.it: Non esistono registri che attestino la cattura di questo Pokémon. I dati sono scarsi, ma le sue caratteristiche corrispondono a quelle di una creatura descritta nel diario di una spedizione.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンの捕獲記録は残されていない。データは不足しているが、探検記に載っている生物と特徴が一致する。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬의 포획 기록은 남아있지 않다. 데이터는 부족하지만, 탐험기에 실린 생물과 특징이 일치한다.

name: iron-treads
description: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.
appearance: A large, futuristic elephant-like Pokémon with a sleek, metallic grey body, prominent white tusks, black tread-like legs, glowing blue stripes, and blue eyes, resembling a robotic Donphan.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon ressemble étrangement à une arme scientifique qu'un magazine paranormal prétend avoir été envoyée sur cette planète par des extraterrestres.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ähnelt stark einer wissenschaftlichen Waffe, von der ein Magazin für Paranormales behauptete, sie sei von Außerirdischen auf diesen Planeten geschickt worden.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon se parece mucho a un arma científica que, según una revista paranormal, fue enviada a este planeta por alienígenas.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon assomiglia molto a un'arma scientifica che, secondo una rivista sul paranormale, è stata inviata su questo pianeta dagli alieni.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは、オカルト雑誌が地球に送り込まれた異星人の科学兵器だと主張する物体によく似ている。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 오컬트 잡지가 이 행성에 외계인이 보낸 과학 병기라고 주장하는 것에 흡사하다.

name: iron-bundle
description: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.
appearance: A bipedal, rounded, light blue-grey metallic robot resembling a penguin, featuring a large red-rimmed hexagonal opening on its belly, red visor-like eyes, and red thrusters where its feet would be.

descriptions.fr: Sa forme est similaire à celle d'un robot présenté dans un article de magazine paranormal. Ce robot aurait été créé par une civilisation antique.
descriptions.de: Seine Form ähnelt einem Roboter, der in einem Artikel eines Paranormal-Magazins vorgestellt wurde. Der Roboter soll von einer alten Zivilisation erschaffen worden sein.
descriptions.es: Su forma es similar a la de un robot que aparece en un artículo de una revista paranormal. Se decía que el robot había sido creado por una civilización antigua.
descriptions.it: La sua forma è simile a quella di un robot descritto in un articolo di una rivista sul paranormale. Si dice che il robot sia stato creato da un'antica civiltà.
descriptions.ja: その姿は、オカルト雑誌の記事に載っていたロボットに似ている。そのロボットは古代文明が作ったものだとされている。
descriptions.ko: 그 형태는 오컬트 잡지 기사에 실렸던 로봇과 유사하다. 그 로봇은 고대 문명이 만들었다고 전해진다.

name: iron-hands
description: It is very similar to a cyborg covered exclusively by a paranormal magazine. The cyborg was said to be the modified form of a certain athlete.
appearance: A large, hulking bipedal robot with a stout torso and massive forearms, colored dark blue-grey metallic with glowing yellow, segmented hands, yellow shoulder plating, and a singular horizontal yellow eye slit.

descriptions.fr: Il est très similaire à un cyborg exclusivement couvert par un magazine paranormal. Le cyborg aurait été la forme modifiée d'un certain athlète.
descriptions.de: Es ähnelt sehr stark einem Cyborg, über den ausschließlich ein Paranormal-Magazin berichtete. Der Cyborg soll die modifizierte Form eines bestimmten Athleten gewesen sein.
descriptions.es: Es muy similar a un cíborg cubierto exclusivamente por una revista paranormal. Se decía que el cíborg era la forma modificada de un atleta determinado.
descriptions.it: È molto simile a un cyborg di cui ha parlato in esclusiva una rivista sul paranormale. Si dice che il cyborg fosse la forma modificata di un certo atleta.
descriptions.ja: オカルト雑誌が独占取材したサイボーグに酷似している。そのサイボーグはあるアスリートが改造された姿だとされている。
descriptions.ko: 오컬트 잡지가 독점 취재한 사이보그와 매우 유사하다. 그 사이보그는 특정 선수의 개조된 형태라고 전해진다.

name: iron-jugulis
description: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.
appearance: A multi-headed dark blue-grey metallic dragon with a serpentine body, bat-like wings, and three heads that each feature a glowing pink eye, accented by pink glowing segments on its wings and body.

descriptions.fr: Il ressemble à un certain Pokémon présenté dans un magazine paranormal, décrit comme la progéniture d'un Hydreigon tombé amoureux d'un robot.
descriptions.de: Es ähnelt einem bestimmten Pokémon, das in einem Paranormal-Magazin vorgestellt wurde und als Nachkomme eines Trikephalo beschrieben wird, das sich in einen Roboter verliebt hat.
descriptions.es: Se parece a cierto Pokémon introducido en una revista paranormal, descrito como la descendencia de un Hydreigon que se enamoró de un robot.
descriptions.it: Assomiglia a un certo Pokémon introdotto in una rivista sul paranormale, descritto come la prole di un Hydreigon innamorato di un robot.
descriptions.ja: オカルト雑誌で紹介された、ロボットと恋に落ちたサザンドラの子供とされるポケモンに似ている。
descriptions.ko: 오컬트 잡지에서 소개된, 로봇과 사랑에 빠진 삼삼드래의 자손이라고 일컬어지는 포켓몬과 닮았다.

name: iron-moth
description: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.
appearance: A moth-like robot with a segmented, dark grey metallic body and four large, glowing orange-yellow rectangular wings featuring hexagonal patterns, complemented by orange-yellow antennae and a singular central eye.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon ressemble à un objet inconnu décrit dans un magazine paranormal comme un OVNI envoyé pour observer l'humanité.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ähnelt einem unbekannten Objekt, das in einem Paranormal-Magazin als UFO beschrieben wird, das zur Beobachtung der Menschheit entsandt wurde.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon se parece a un objeto desconocido descrito en una revista paranormal como un ovni enviado para observar a la humanidad.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon assomiglia a un oggetto sconosciuto descritto in una rivista sul paranormale come un UFO inviato per osservare l'umanità.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンは、オカルト雑誌に人類を観察するために送られた未確認飛行物体だと書かれた、未確認の物体に似ている。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 오컬트 잡지에 인류를 관찰하기 위해 보내진 UFO라고 쓰인 미확인 물체와 닮았다.

name: iron-thorns
description: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future.
appearance: A large, bipedal dark grey metallic robot resembling a dinosaur, covered in angular plating, with sharp green glowing spines running down its back and forearms, and a pair of glowing green eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il présente quelques similitudes avec un Pokémon présenté dans un magazine douteux comme un Tyranocif d'un milliard d'années dans le futur.
descriptions.de: Es weist einige Ähnlichkeiten mit einem Pokémon auf, das in einem zweifelhaften Magazin als Despotar aus einer Milliarde Jahre in der Zukunft vorgestellt wurde.
descriptions.es: Tiene algunas similitudes con un Pokémon presentado en una revista dudosa como un Tyranitar de mil millones de años en el futuro.
descriptions.it: Ha alcune somiglianze con un Pokémon introdotto in una rivista dubbia come un Tyranitar di un miliardo di anni nel futuro.
descriptions.ja: 疑惑のオカルト雑誌で、10億年後のバンギラスであると紹介されたポケモンに類似点がある。
descriptions.ko: 의혹의 오컬트 잡지에서 10억 년 후의 마기라스라고 소개된 포켓몬과 유사한 점이 있다.

name: frigibax
description: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.
appearance: A small, bipedal light blue reptilian Pokémon with a white underbelly, a white mask-like pattern around its large black eyes, and a prominent dark blue dorsal fin tipped with white that resembles an ice pick.

descriptions.fr: Frigibax absorbe la chaleur par sa nageoire dorsale et la convertit en énergie de glace. Plus la température est élevée, plus Frigibax stocke d'énergie.
descriptions.de: Frospino absorbiert Wärme über seine Rückenflosse und wandelt sie in Eisenergie um. Je höher die Temperatur, desto mehr Energie speichert Frospino.
descriptions.es: Frigibax absorbe el calor a través de su aleta dorsal y lo convierte en energía de hielo. Cuanto mayor sea la temperatura, más energía almacena Frigibax.
descriptions.it: Frigibax assorbe il calore tramite la sua pinna dorsale e lo converte in energia Ghiaccio. Più alta è la temperatura, maggiore è l'energia che accumula.
descriptions.ja: セビエは背びれで熱を吸収し、氷のエネルギーへと変換する。熱が高いほど、より多くのエネルギーを蓄える。
descriptions.ko: 세비에르가 등지느러미로 열을 흡수하여 얼음 에너지로 변환한다. 온도가 높을수록 더 많은 에너지를 저장한다.

name: arctibax
description: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.
appearance: A bipedal, robust dark blue reptilian Pokémon with a white underbelly, a white mask-like pattern across its face and cheeks, and a large dark blue dorsal fin with a white tip and segmented white edges.

descriptions.fr: Cryobyx gèle l'air autour de lui, protégeant son visage avec un masque de glace et transformant sa nageoire dorsale en une lame de glace.
descriptions.de: Cryospino friert die Luft um sich herum ein, schützt sein Gesicht mit einer Eismaske und verwandelt seine Rückenflosse in eine Eisklinge.
descriptions.es: Arctibax congela el aire a su alrededor, protegiendo su cara con una máscara de hielo y convirtiendo su aleta dorsal en una cuchilla de hielo.
descriptions.it: Arctibax congela l'aria intorno a sé, proteggendo il proprio viso con una maschera di ghiaccio e trasformando la pinna dorsale in una lama di ghiaccio.
descriptions.ja: セゴールは周囲の空気を凍らせ、顔を氷のマスクで保護し、背びれを氷の刃に変える。
descriptions.ko: 파비고르가 주변의 공기를 얼려 얼음 마스크로 얼굴을 보호하고 등지느러미를 얼음 칼날로 만든다.

name: baxcalibur
description: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.
appearance: A large, imposing bipedal dark blue reptilian Pokémon with a white underbelly featuring blue stripes, a white mask over its face, and a massive dark blue dorsal fin with a serrated white edge extending along its back.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon projette un souffle d'air cryogénique par sa bouche. Cet air peut geler instantanément même de la lave en fusion.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon speit kryogene Luft aus seinem Maul. Diese Luft kann selbst glühend heiße Lava auf der Stelle gefrieren lassen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon lanza aire criogénico por la boca. Dicho aire puede congelar al instante hasta la lava más candente.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon espelle aria criogenica dalla bocca. Quest'aria è in grado di congelare all'istante anche la lava incandescente.
descriptions.ja: 口から極低温の冷気を吐き出す。その冷気は溶岩をも一瞬で凍らせる。
descriptions.ko: 입에서 극저온의 냉기를 뿜어낸다. 이 냉기는 용암도 순식간에 얼려버린다.

name: gimmighoul
description: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.
appearance: A small, elusive Pokémon with two forms: either a shiny gold coin featuring a distinct spiral pattern, or a small black creature with a single light-blue glowing eye, peeking out from an old brown wooden chest with dark bands and a keyhole.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est né dans un coffre au trésor il y a environ 1 500 ans. Il aspire l'énergie vitale des vauriens qui tentent de voler le trésor.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon ist vor etwa 1 500 Jahren in einer Schatztruhe zur Welt gekommen. Es saugt Schurken, die versuchen, den Schatz zu stehlen, die Lebensenergie ab.
descriptions.es: Nació en el interior de un cofre del tesoro hace unos 1500 años. Absorbe la energía vital de los rufianes que intentan robar el tesoro.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è nato circa 1 500 anni fa all'interno di un forziere del tesoro. Assorbe la forza vitale degli imbroglioni che tentano di rubare il tesoro.
descriptions.ja: およそ1500年前に宝箱の中で生まれた。宝を奪おうとする悪党から生命エネルギーを吸い取る。
descriptions.ko: 약 1,500년 전에 보물상자 안에서 태어났다. 보물을 훔치려는 악당들에게서 생명 에너지를 빨아들인다.

name: gholdengo
description: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.
appearance: A tall humanoid Pokémon made entirely of stacked shiny gold coins, featuring a large smiling coin for a head with black button eyes, and riding a segmented gold surfboard.

descriptions.fr: Son corps semble être constitué de 1 000 pièces. Ce Pokémon s'entend bien avec les autres et se lie facilement d'amitié avec n'importe qui.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper scheint aus 1 000 Münzen zu bestehen. Dieses Pokémon versteht sich gut mit anderen und schließt schnell Freundschaft mit jedem.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo parece estar formado por 1000 monedas. Este Pokémon se lleva bien con los demás y entabla amistad rápidamente con cualquiera.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo sembra essere costituito da 1 000 monete. Questo Pokémon va d'accordo con tutti e fa amicizia con chiunque in un batter d'occhio.
descriptions.ja: 体は1000枚のコインでできているようだ。誰とでも仲良くなれる愛されポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 몸은 1,000개의 코인으로 이루어져 있는 듯하다. 누구와도 사이좋게 지내며 금세 친구가 된다.

name: wo-chien
description: The grudge of a person punished for writing the king’s evil deeds upon wooden tablets has clad itself in dead leaves to become a Pokémon.
appearance: A slug-like Pokémon with a body made of dark soil and wood, topped by a large, ornate shell composed of dark green, brown, and reddish-brown decaying leaves, featuring small glowing dark red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Le ressentiment d'une personne punie pour avoir consigné les mauvaises actions du roi sur des tablettes de bois s'est manifesté sous forme de Pokémon, en se recouvrant de feuilles mortes.
descriptions.de: Der Groll eines Menschen, der dafür bestraft wurde, die bösen Taten des Königs auf Holztafeln zu schreiben, hat sich in abgestorbenes Laub gehüllt und ist zu einem Pokémon geworden.
descriptions.es: El rencor de una persona castigada por plasmar las malas acciones de un rey en tablillas de madera ha tomado la forma de un Pokémon al cubrirse de hojas secas.
descriptions.it: Il rancore di una persona punita per aver trascritto le cattive azioni di un re su delle tavolette di legno si è rivestito di foglie morte, trasformandosi in un Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 国王の悪行を木簡に記し罰せられた者の恨みが、枯れ葉を身にまといポケモンとなった。
descriptions.ko: 국왕의 악행을 목간에 기록했다가 벌을 받은 자의 원념이 낙엽을 휘감아 포켓몬이 되었다.

name: chien-pao
description: This Pokémon can control 100 tons of fallen snow. It plays around innocently by leaping in and out of avalanches it has caused.
appearance: A sleek white quadrupedal feline Pokémon with black markings resembling cracks on its body, featuring two large broken red sword blades as fangs, a red sword hilt protruding from its forehead, and small glowing dark red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon peut contrôler 100 tonnes de neige tombée. Il s'amuse innocemment en bondissant dans les avalanches qu'il a provoquées et en en sortant.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon kann 100 Tonnen gefallenen Schnee kontrollieren. Es spielt arglos, indem es in selbst verursachte Lawinen springt und wieder herauskommt.
descriptions.es: Puede controlar 100 toneladas de nieve. Juega inocentemente entrando y saliendo de los aludes que provoca.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon può controllare 100 tonnellate di neve caduta. Gioca innocentemente, saltando dentro e fuori le valanghe che ha causato.
descriptions.ja: 100トンもの積雪を操る。自ら起こした雪崩の中を無邪気に飛び跳ねて遊ぶ。
descriptions.ko: 100톤이나 되는 쌓인 눈을 조종한다. 스스로 일으킨 눈사태 속을 천진난만하게 뛰어다니며 논다.

name: ting-lu
description: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon.
appearance: A massive, quadrupedal dark brown Pokémon resembling a deer or moose, featuring a colossal dark grey ritualistic vessel with glowing green cracks embedded on its head as antlers, and small glowing dark red eyes.

descriptions.fr: La peur qui s'est accumulée dans un ancien vase rituel s'est recouverte de rochers et de terre pour devenir un Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Die in ein altes Ritualgefäß gegossene Furcht hat sich in Felsen und Erde gehüllt und ist zu einem Pokémon geworden.
