descriptions.es: El miedo que se derramó en una antigua vasija ritual se ha revestido de rocas y tierra para convertirse en un Pokémon.
descriptions.it: La paura riversata in un'antica coppa rituale si è rivestita di rocce e terra, trasformandosi in un Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 古い祭器に注ぎ込まれた恐怖が、岩や土を身にまといポケモンとなった。
descriptions.ko: 오래된 제기에 부어졌던 공포가 바위와 흙을 휘감아 포켓몬이 되었다.

name: chi-yu
description: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.
appearance: A vibrant red fish-like Pokémon with a flowing tail, featuring two large, curved golden magatama beads as eyes and a black, flame-like fin atop its head.

descriptions.fr: Il contrôle des flammes dont la température dépasse les 3 000 °C. Il nage tranquillement dans la mer de lave qu'il crée en faisant fondre la roche et le sable.
descriptions.de: Es kontrolliert Flammen, die über 3 000 °C heiß sind. Es schwimmt lässig durch ein Meer aus Lava, das es durch das Schmelzen von Gestein und Sand erzeugt.
descriptions.es: Controla llamas que superan los 3000 °C. Nada con naturalidad por el mar de lava que crea al fundir roca y arena.
descriptions.it: Controlla fiamme che superano i 3 000 °C. Nuota tranquillamente attraverso il mare di lava che crea sciogliendo roccia e sabbia.
descriptions.ja: 3000度を超える炎を操る。岩や砂を溶かして作った溶岩の海を気ままに泳ぐ。
descriptions.ko: 3,000℃를 넘는 불꽃을 조종한다. 바위나 모래를 녹여서 만든 용암의 바다를 마음대로 헤엄친다.

name: roaring-moon
description: It is possible that this is the creature listed as Roaring Moon in an expedition journal that still holds many mysteries.
appearance: A large bipedal dark blue dragon with enormous, tattered red feathery wings, a massive cream-colored jaw, sharp teeth, and a prominent spiky crest atop its head.

descriptions.fr: Il est possible qu'il s'agisse de la créature nommée « Rugit-Lune » dans un carnet d'expédition encore empli de mystères.
descriptions.de: Es könnte sich hierbei um die Kreatur handeln, die in einem Expeditionsjournal voller Mysterien als „Brüllmond“ gelistet ist.
descriptions.es: Es posible que sea la criatura descrita como “Luna Rugiente” en un diario de expedición aún plagado de misterios.
descriptions.it: Potrebbe essere la creatura indicata come “Furiastella” in un diario di esplorazione che conserva ancora molti misteri.
descriptions.ja: 多くの謎が残された探検記に「トドロクツキ」と記された生物と同一である可能性がある。
descriptions.ko: 많은 수수께끼가 남겨진 탐험기에 「고동치는달」로 기록된 생물과 동일할 가능성이 있다.

name: iron-valiant
description: It has some similarities to a mad scientist’s invention covered in a paranormal magazine.
appearance: An elegant, bipedal humanoid robot with a white body and light blue-grey metallic plating, featuring a prominent pink bladed horn on its head, green glowing eyes, and sharp pink blade-like extensions on its elbows and hips.

descriptions.fr: Il présente quelques similitudes avec l'invention d'un savant fou qui a fait la une d'un magazine paranormal.
descriptions.de: Es weist einige Ähnlichkeiten mit der Erfindung eines verrückten Wissenschaftlers auf, über die in einem Magazin für Paranormales berichtet wurde.
descriptions.es: Guarda algunas similitudes con un invento de un científico loco sobre el que se publicó un artículo en una revista de fenómenos paranormales.
descriptions.it: Presenta alcune somiglianze con l'invenzione di uno scienziato pazzo su cui è stato pubblicato un articolo in una rivista paranormale.
descriptions.ja: オカルト雑誌に載っていたマッドサイエンティストの発明品と共通点が見られる。
descriptions.ko: 오컬트 잡지에 실렸던 매드 사이언티스트의 발명품과 공통점이 보인다.

name: koraidon
description: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
appearance: A large, muscular reptilian Pokémon with a vibrant red and deep purple scaled body, a prominent white feathery mane around its neck, white feathering on its limbs, and a large purple wheel-like throat sac and tail.

descriptions.fr: Il semble s'agir du « Roi Ailé » mentionné dans un ancien carnet d'expédition. On dit qu'il aurait fendu la terre de ses poings nus.
descriptions.de: Es scheint der in einem alten Expeditionsjournal erwähnte „Flügelkönig“ zu sein. Es hieß, es hätte das Land mit bloßen Fäusten gespalten.
descriptions.es: Parece ser el “Rey Alado” mencionado en un antiguo diario de expedición. Se decía que había dividido la tierra con sus puños desnudos.
descriptions.it: Sembra essere il “Re Alato” menzionato in un antico diario di esplorazione. Si dice che abbia spaccato la terra a pugni nudi.
descriptions.ja: 古い探検記に記された「翼の王」と思われる。素手で大地を叩き割ったと伝えられる。
descriptions.ko: 오래된 탐험기에 기록된 「날개의 왕」으로 보인다. 맨손으로 대지를 갈랐다고 전해진다.

name: miraidon
description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.
appearance: A sleek, robotic reptilian Pokémon with a predominantly black and deep purple metallic body, featuring glowing light blue energy accents on its head, chest, and limbs, and large light blue jet engines integrated into its chest and tail.

descriptions.fr: On sait peu de choses sur cette créature. Elle ressemble à Cyclizar, mais elle est bien plus impitoyable et puissante.
descriptions.de: Über dieses Pokémon ist noch vieles unbekannt. Es ähnelt Ritzerla, ist aber weitaus rücksichtsloser und mächtiger.
descriptions.es: Aún se sabe poco de esta criatura. Se parece a Cyclizar, pero es mucho más implacable y poderosa.
descriptions.it: Gran parte di questa creatura è ancora avvolta nel mistero. Assomiglia a Cyclizar, ma è molto più spietata e potente.
descriptions.ja: この生物についてはまだ不明な点が多い。モトトカゲに似ているが、はるかに冷酷で強力である。
descriptions.ko: 이 생물에 대해서는 아직 불명확한 점이 많다. 모토마자와 닮았지만, 훨씬 무자비하고 강력하다.

name: walking-wake
description: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.
appearance: A sleek, quadrupedal blue reptilian Pokémon with white markings on its muzzle and belly, long red feather-like plumes on its head and back, and a flowing blue and white tail resembling crashing waves.

descriptions.fr: Cette créature féroce est auréolée de mystère. Elle tire son nom d'un monstre aquatique mentionné dans un ancien journal d'expédition.
descriptions.de: Dieses wilde Wesen ist von Geheimnissen umgeben. Sein Name stammt von einem Wassermonster aus einem alten Expeditionsjournal.
descriptions.es: Esta feroz criatura está rodeada de misterio. Su nombre proviene de un monstruo acuático mencionado en un antiguo diario de expedición.
descriptions.it: Questa feroce creatura è avvolta nel mistero. Il suo nome deriva da un mostro acquatico menzionato in un vecchio diario di spedizione.
descriptions.ja: この獰猛な生き物は謎に包まれている。その名は、古い探検日誌に記載された水生生物から取られている。
descriptions.ko: 이 흉포한 생물은 수수께끼에 싸여 있다. 오래된 탐험 일지에 언급된 수중 괴물에서 이름을 따왔다.

name: iron-leaves
description: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.
appearance: A slender, bipedal deer-like robot with a white and light blue metallic body, featuring glowing green blades for antlers, similar blades on its forearms and calves, and bright pink glowing eyes.

descriptions.fr: Bon nombre de ses caractéristiques physiques correspondent à celles d'un Viridium du futur mentionné dans un magazine paranormal.
descriptions.de: Viele seiner physischen Merkmale stimmen mit denen eines Viridiums aus der Zukunft überein, über das in einem paranormalen Magazin berichtet wurde.
descriptions.es: Muchas de sus características físicas coinciden con las de un Virizion del futuro que apareció en una revista paranormal.
descriptions.it: Molte delle sue caratteristiche fisiche corrispondono a quelle di un Virizion del futuro di cui si parlava in una rivista paranormale.
descriptions.ja: その多くの身体的特徴は、超常現象雑誌に掲載された未来のビリジオンのものと一致する。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬의 많은 신체적 특징은 초자연적인 잡지에 실린 미래의 비리디온과 일치한다.

name: dipplin
description: Dipplin is two creatures in one Pokémon. Its evolution was triggered by a special apple grown only in one place.
appearance: A shiny green apple with a red blush, coated in dripping white caramel, from which two small, green worm-like heads with pink cheeks and small red eyes peek out from the top.

descriptions.fr: Pomdramour est deux créatures en un seul Pokémon. Son évolution a été déclenchée par une pomme spéciale qui ne pousse qu'à un seul endroit.
descriptions.de: Sirapfel ist zwei Kreaturen in einem Pokémon. Seine Entwicklung wurde durch einen speziellen Apfel ausgelöst, der nur an einem Ort wächst.
descriptions.es: Dipplin es dos criaturas en un Pokémon. Su evolución fue provocada por una manzana especial que solo crece en un lugar.
descriptions.it: Dipplin è due creature in un unico Pokémon. La sua evoluzione è stata innescata da una mela speciale che cresce solo in un unico luogo.
descriptions.ja: カミツオロチは1匹のポケモンに2つの生物が宿っている。その進化は、ある一箇所でしか育たない特別なリンゴによって引き起こされた。
descriptions.ko: 달콤한고동은 하나의 포켓몬에 두 마리의 생물이 들어있다. 특정 장소에서만 자라는 특별한 사과로 인해 진화했다고 한다.

name: poltchageist
description: Supposedly, the regrets of a tea ceremony master who died before perfecting his craft lingered in some matcha and became a Pokémon.
appearance: A small, dark green matcha tea caddy with a white and gold floral pattern, a gold lid, two glowing black eyes, and a visible crack on its side.

descriptions.fr: On raconte que les regrets d'un maître de cérémonie du thé, mort avant d'avoir perfectionné son art, se sont attardés dans du matcha et sont devenus un Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Angeblich verweilten die Reue eines Teemeisters, der starb, bevor er sein Handwerk perfektionieren konnte, in etwas Matcha und wurden zu einem Pokémon.
descriptions.es: Supuestamente, los remordimientos de un maestro de la ceremonia del té que murió antes de perfeccionar su arte, perduraron en un poco de matcha y se convirtieron en un Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Si narra che i rimpianti di un maestro della cerimonia del tè, morto prima di perfezionare la sua arte, si siano attardati in un po' di matcha e siano diventati un Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 伝説によると、その技を完璧にする前に亡くなった茶道師匠の未練が、抹茶に宿ってポケモンになったという。
descriptions.ko: 전설에 따르면, 차를 달이는 기술을 완성하지 못하고 죽은 다도 명장의 후회가 찻가루에 스며들어 포켓몬이 되었다고 한다.

name: sinistcha
description: It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life-force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful.
appearance: A large, ornate dark green matcha tea bowl with a white and gold floral pattern, a gold whisk-like handle protruding from its top, two glowing black eyes, and a visible crack on its side.

descriptions.fr: Il fait semblant d'être du thé, essayant de tromper les gens pour qu'ils le boivent afin de leur vider leur force vitale. Sa ruse est généralement infructueuse.
descriptions.de: Es gibt sich als Tee aus, um Leute zum Trinken zu verleiten und ihnen dann die Lebensenergie zu entziehen. Sein Trick ist jedoch meist erfolglos.
descriptions.es: Finge ser té, intentando engañar a la gente para que lo beba y así drenar su fuerza vital. Su estratagema suele ser infructuosa.
descriptions.it: Si finge tè, cercando di ingannare le persone affinché lo bevano per prosciugarne l'energia vitale. Il suo stratagemma è generalmente infruttuoso.
descriptions.ja: お茶に化けて人々を騙し、飲ませて生命力を吸い取ろうとする。しかし、その策略はたいてい失敗に終わる。
descriptions.ko: 차인 척하며 사람들을 속여 마시게 한 뒤 생명력을 빼앗으려 한다. 하지만 그 속임수는 대개 성공하지 못한다.

name: okidogi
description: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.
appearance: A muscular, bipedal white-furred dog-like Pokémon with green fur on its forearms and lower legs, wearing a green collar adorned with pink beads, and a pink mask over its eyes, with pink chains draped around its shoulders.

descriptions.fr: Après que tous ses muscles ont été stimulés par la chaîne toxique autour de son cou, Félicanis s'est transformé et a acquis un physique puissant.
descriptions.de: Nachdem all seine Muskeln durch die giftige Kette um seinen Hals stimuliert wurden, verwandelte sich Boninu und bekam einen kräftigen Körperbau.
descriptions.es: Después de que todos sus músculos fueran estimulados por la cadena tóxica alrededor de su cuello, Okidogi se transformó y obtuvo un físico poderoso.
descriptions.it: Dopo che tutti i suoi muscoli sono stati stimolati dalla catena tossica intorno al suo collo, Okidogi si è trasformato e ha acquisito un fisico potente.
descriptions.ja: 首に巻かれた毒の鎖によって全身の筋肉が刺激され、イイネイヌは変身して強力な体格を手に入れた。
descriptions.ko: 목에 걸린 독 사슬에 의해 모든 근육이 자극되어, 조타구는 변신하여 강력한 체격을 얻었다.

name: munkidori
description: The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokémon's psychic powers to bloom.
appearance: A slender, bipedal white-furred monkey-like Pokémon with blue fur on its forearms and lower legs, wearing a blue collar adorned with pink beads, and a pink mask over its eyes, with pink chains draped around its shoulders.

descriptions.fr: La chaîne est faite de toxines qui améliorent les capacités. Elle a stimulé le cerveau de Fortusimia et a fait éclore les pouvoirs psychiques du Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Die Kette besteht aus Toxinen, die die Fähigkeiten verbessern. Sie stimulierte Munkidori's Gehirn und ließ die psychischen Kräfte des Pokémon erblühen.
descriptions.es: La cadena está hecha de toxinas que mejoran las capacidades. Estimuló el cerebro de Munkidori y provocó que los poderes psíquicos del Pokémon florecieran.
descriptions.it: La catena è fatta di tossine che migliorano le capacità. Ha stimolato il cervello di Munkidori e ha fatto sbocciare i poteri psichici del Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: その鎖は能力を高める毒素でできている。それはマシマシラの脳を刺激し、ポケモンのサイキックパワーを開花させた。
descriptions.ko: 이 사슬은 능력을 강화하는 독소로 만들어졌다. 그것은 마시마시라의 뇌를 자극하여 포켓몬의 초능력을 개화시켰다.

name: fezandipiti
description: Fezandipiti owes its beautiful looks and lovely voice to the toxic stimulants emanating from the chain wrapped around its body.
appearance: An elegant, bipedal bird-like Pokémon with a predominantly white body adorned with vibrant purple and gold accents, featuring a purple mask around its red eyes, a tall purple feather plume and a smaller golden one on its head, a golden neck ring with a purple gem, and a long, flowing white tail with each feather tipped in purple.

descriptions.fr: Favianos doit sa belle apparence et sa jolie voix aux stimulants toxiques émanant de la chaîne enroulée autour de son corps.
descriptions.de: Fezandipiti verdankt sein schönes Aussehen und seine liebliche Stimme den toxischen Stimulanzien, die von der um seinen Körper gewickelten Kette ausgehen.
descriptions.es: Fezandipiti debe su hermosa apariencia y su encantadora voz a los estimulantes tóxicos que emanan de la cadena envuelta alrededor de su cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Fezandipiti deve il suo aspetto magnifico e la sua voce incantevole agli stimolanti tossici emanati dalla catena avvolta intorno al suo corpo.
descriptions.ja: キチキギスは、体に巻き付いた鎖から放たれる毒の刺激物によって、その美しい姿と愛らしい声を得ている。
descriptions.ko: 복숭아롱이는 몸에 감긴 사슬에서 나오는 독성 자극제로 인해 아름다운 외모와 사랑스러운 목소리를 얻었다.

name: ogerpon
description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
appearance: A small, slender green humanoid Pokémon with brown root-like feet, wearing a white horned ogre mask with red eyes, and holding a gnarled wooden club.

descriptions.fr: Le type de ce Pokémon change selon le masque qu'il porte. Il déconcerte ses ennemis avec des mouvements agiles et des coups de pied.
descriptions.de: Der Typ dieses Pokémon ändert sich je nachdem, welche Maske es trägt. Es verwirrt seine Feinde mit flinken Bewegungen und Tritten.
descriptions.es: El tipo de este Pokémon cambia según la máscara que lleve. Confunde a sus enemigos con movimientos ágiles y patadas.
descriptions.it: Il tipo di questo Pokémon cambia in base alla maschera che indossa. Confonde i suoi nemici con movimenti agili e calci.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンのタイプは、身につけている仮面によって変化する。素早い動きと蹴りで敵を翻弄する。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬의 타입은 쓰고 있는 가면의 종류에 따라 변한다. 민첩한 움직임과 발차기로 적을 혼란시킨다.

name: archaludon
description: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.
appearance: A large bipedal grey metallic dragon with dark blue plating, a long neck and tail, whose forelegs arch upwards to form a bridge-like structure, featuring two large yellow 'headlights' on its chest and glowing yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il collecte l'électricité statique de son environnement. Les rayons qu'il projette lorsqu'il est à quatre pattes sont incroyablement puissants.
descriptions.de: Es sammelt statische Elektrizität aus seiner Umgebung. Die Strahlen, die es auf allen vieren abfeuert, sind enorm mächtig.
descriptions.es: Acumula electricidad estática de su entorno. Los rayos que lanza cuando se apoya en sus cuatro patas son increíblemente potentes.
descriptions.it: Raccoglie elettricità statica dall'ambiente circostante. I raggi che lancia quando è a quattro zampe sono incredibilmente potenti.
descriptions.ja: 周囲の静電気を集める。四つん這いで放つビームは絶大な威力を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 주변의 정전기를 모은다. 네 발로 서서 쏘는 빔은 엄청난 위력을 지닌다.

name: hydrapple
description: Seven syrpents live inside an apple made of syrup. The syrpent in the center is the commander.
appearance: A large, glossy green apple body with a red blush, from which seven smaller green dragon heads, each with a small red mouth and yellow eyes, emerge, surrounded by a gooey white caramel-like substance.

descriptions.fr: Sept dracoflots vivent à l'intérieur d'une pomme de sirop. Le dracoflot central en est le commandant.
descriptions.de: Sieben Sirpenten leben in einem Apfel aus Sirup. Die zentrale Sirpente ist der Kommandant.
descriptions.es: Siete hidradragones viven en una manzana de sirope. El hidradragón central es el comandante.
descriptions.it: Sette dragozampi vivono all'interno di una mela di sciroppo. Il dragozampa al centro è il comandante.
descriptions.ja: シロップでできたリンゴの中に７匹のキリントルが暮らす。中央のキリントルが司令塔。
descriptions.ko: 시럽으로 된 사과 안에 일곱 마리의 시럽벌레가 살고 있다. 중앙에 있는 시럽벌레가 사령관이다.

name: gouging-fire
description: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal red and orange reptilian Pokémon with a long neck and tail, prominent yellow-tipped spikes on its back, a collar of brown scales, and fiery orange plumes erupting from its head and tail.

descriptions.fr: Ses observations sont très rares. Une courte vidéo le montre semant le chaos et crachant des piliers de flammes.
descriptions.de: Es gibt nur sehr wenige Sichtungsberichte dieses Wesens. Ein kurzes Video zeigt, wie es wütet und Flammensäulen spuckt.
descriptions.es: Existen muy pocos informes de avistamientos de esta criatura. Un breve vídeo muestra cómo causa estragos y escupe pilares de fuego.
descriptions.it: Ci sono pochissime segnalazioni di avvistamenti di questa creatura. Un breve video lo mostra scatenato, mentre sputa pilastri di fiamme.
descriptions.ja: 目撃情報はごくわずか。短い動画には暴れながら炎の柱を噴き上げる姿が記録されている。
descriptions.ko: 목격 정보가 극히 적다. 짧은 영상에는 날뛰면서 불꽃 기둥을 뿜어내는 모습이 기록되어 있다.

name: raging-bolt
description: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.
appearance: A tall, long-necked, quadrupedal dinosaur-like creature with a predominantly yellow body covered in jagged black stripes, a blue-grey cloud-like mane around its neck, red eyes, golden cuffs on its forelegs, and a long, bushy, storm cloud-like tail tipped with a lightning bolt.

descriptions.fr: Il réduirait en cendres tout ce qui l'entoure grâce à la foudre qu'il projette depuis sa fourrure. On en sait très peu sur cette créature.
descriptions.de: Es soll alles in seiner Umgebung mit Blitzen verbrennen, die es aus seinem Fell schleudert. Sehr wenig ist über dieses Wesen bekannt.
descriptions.es: Se dice que incinera todo a su alrededor con los rayos que lanza desde su pelaje. Se sabe muy poco sobre esta criatura.
descriptions.it: Si dice che incenerisca tutto ciò che lo circonda con i fulmini che lancia dalla sua pelliccia. Si sa molto poco di questa creatura.
descriptions.ja: 体毛から放つ雷で周囲のあらゆるものを焼き払うといわれる。この生命体についてはほとんどわかっていない。
descriptions.ko: 털에서 뿜어내는 번개로 주위의 모든 것을 태워버린다고 전해진다. 이 생명체에 대해서는 알려진 바가 거의 없다.

name: iron-boulder
description: It resembles a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a Terrakion that had been modified by an evil organization.
appearance: A large, bipedal, metallic creature with a muscular, angular build, primarily light blue-grey on its head and forelegs, dark blue-grey on its chest and upper legs, four sharp horn-like projections on its head, and glowing orange energy lines tracing its face, chest, and limbs.

descriptions.fr: Il ressemble à un Pokémon décrit dans une revue douteuse comme un Terrakium modifié par une organisation maléfique.
descriptions.de: Es ähnelt einem Pokémon, das in einem zweifelhaften Magazin als ein von einer bösen Organisation modifiziertes Terrakium beschrieben wird.
descriptions.es: Se parece a un Pokémon que, según una revista de dudosa reputación, era un Terrakion modificado por una organización malvada.
descriptions.it: Assomiglia a un Pokémon descritto in una rivista di dubbia fama come un Terrakion modificato da una malvagia organizzazione.
descriptions.ja: うさんくさい雑誌に「悪の組織が改造したテラキオン」として紹介されたポケモンに似ている。
descriptions.ko: 수상한 잡지에 「악의 조직이 개조한 테라키온」으로 소개된 포켓몬과 닮았다.

name: iron-crown
description: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.
appearance: A sleek, quadrupedal, metallic creature with a slender deer-like build, primarily light blue-grey on its head and upper body, dark blue-grey on its lower body and legs, a distinctive crown-like structure on its head, and glowing orange energy lines tracing its metallic plates.

descriptions.fr: Il ressemble à un objet mystérieux présenté dans un magazine paranormal comme une arme de pointe ayant la forme d'un Cobaltium.
descriptions.de: Es ähnelt einem mysteriösen Objekt, das in einem paranormalen Magazin als eine hochmoderne Waffe in Form eines Kobaliums vorgestellt wurde.
descriptions.es: Se parece a un objeto misterioso que, según una revista paranormal, era un arma de vanguardia con forma de Cobalion.
descriptions.it: Assomiglia a un misterioso oggetto introdotto in una rivista paranormale come un'arma all'avanguardia a forma di Cobalion.
descriptions.ja: オカルト雑誌で「コバルオンに似た最新兵器」として紹介された謎の物体に酷似している。
descriptions.ko: 오컬트 잡지에서 「코바르온을 닮은 최신 병기」로 소개된 의문의 물체와 흡사하다.

name: terapagos
description: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.
appearance: A small, four-legged, turtle-like creature with a light blue-green body, a large, ornate shell composed of numerous iridescent hexagonal crystal plates arranged in a rainbow gradient, each representing a different color, all centered around a prominent white crystalline core.

descriptions.fr: Terapagos se protège en transformant l'énergie en cristaux durs. Ce Pokémon est la source du phénomène de la Téracristallisation.
descriptions.de: Terapagos schützt sich selbst, indem es seine Fähigkeit nutzt, Energie in harte Kristalle umzuwandeln. Dieses Pokémon ist die Quelle des Terakristall-Phänomens.
descriptions.es: Terapagos se protege usando su poder para transformar la energía en cristales duros. Este Pokémon es la fuente del fenómeno de la Teracristalización.
descriptions.it: Terapagos si protegge usando il suo potere per trasformare l'energia in duri cristalli. Questo Pokémon è la fonte del fenomeno Teracristal.
descriptions.ja: エネルギーを硬質な結晶に変える力で身を守る。テラスタル現象の根源とされるポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 에너지를 경질의 결정으로 바꾸는 힘으로 몸을 보호한다. 테라스탈 현상의 근원이라고 여겨지는 포켓몬이다.

name: pecharunt
description: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.
appearance: A small, round, peach-shaped creature with a white, slightly translucent body, small purple nubs for arms, yellow eyes with tiny white pupils, pink cheek marks, and a distinctive purple swirl cresting its head.

descriptions.fr: Il nourrit les autres de Mochi Toxique qui fait ressortir leurs désirs et leurs capacités. Ceux qui le mangent tombent sous son contrôle, enchaînés à sa volonté.
descriptions.de: Es füttert andere mit giftigem Mochi, das Wünsche und Fähigkeiten weckt. Wer das Mochi isst, gerät unter Pecharunts Kontrolle und wird an seinen Willen gefesselt.
descriptions.es: Alimenta a otros con mochi tóxico que saca a relucir sus deseos y habilidades. Quienes lo comen caen bajo su control, encadenados a su voluntad.
descriptions.it: Nutre gli altri con un mochi tossico che fa emergere desideri e capacità. Chi lo mangia cade sotto il suo controllo, incatenato alla sua volontà.
descriptions.ja: 欲や能力を引き出す毒の餅を人に与える。餅を食べた者はペシュワントの意のままに操られる。
descriptions.ko: 욕심이나 능력을 끌어내는 독의 떡을 다른 이에게 준다. 떡을 먹은 자는 복숭악동의 뜻대로 조종당한다.

name: deoxys-attack
description: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKéMON’s chest appears to be its brain.
appearance: A slender, bipedal alien-like Pokemon with a predominantly red and blue body, featuring a large, pointed red head crest, blade-like red arms, two large black eyes with blue pupils, and a visible green brain-like organ in its translucent blue chest.

descriptions.fr: L'ADN d'un virus spatial a muté subitement sous l'effet d'un rayon laser, donnant naissance à DEOXYS. L'organe cristallin sur la poitrine de ce POKéMON semble être son cerveau.
descriptions.de: Die DNS eines Weltraumvirus mutierte schlagartig durch einen Laserstrahl zu DEOXYS. Das kristalline Organ auf der Brust dieses POKéMONs scheint sein Gehirn zu sein.
descriptions.es: El ADN de un virus espacial sufrió una mutación repentina al exponerse a un rayo láser, dando lugar a DEOXYS. El órgano cristalino en el pecho de este POKéMON parece ser su cerebro.
descriptions.it: Il DNA di un virus spaziale subì una mutazione improvvisa a causa di un raggio laser, dando origine a DEOXYS. L'organo cristallino sul petto di questo POKéMON sembra essere il suo cervello.
descriptions.ja: 宇宙ウィルスのＤＮＡがレーザー照射で突然変異しデオキシスになった。胸の結晶体が脳のようだ。
descriptions.ko: 우주 바이러스의 DNA가 레이저 조사로 돌연변이하여 테오키스가 되었다. 가슴의 결정체가 뇌인 것 같다.

display_names.ja: デオキシス アタックフォルム

name: deoxys-defense
description: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKéMON’s chest appears to be its brain.
appearance: A bulky, bipedal alien-like Pokemon with a predominantly orange and blue body, featuring large, shield-like orange arms, broad shoulder plates, two large black eyes with blue pupils, and a visible green brain-like organ in its translucent blue chest.

descriptions.fr: L'ADN d'un virus spatial a muté subitement sous l'effet d'un rayon laser, donnant naissance à DEOXYS. L'organe cristallin sur la poitrine de ce POKéMON semble être son cerveau.
descriptions.de: Die DNS eines Weltraumvirus mutierte schlagartig durch einen Laserstrahl zu DEOXYS. Das kristalline Organ auf der Brust dieses POKéMONs scheint sein Gehirn zu sein.
descriptions.es: El ADN de un virus espacial sufrió una mutación repentina al exponerse a un rayo láser, dando lugar a DEOXYS. El órgano cristalino en el pecho de este POKéMON parece ser su cerebro.
descriptions.it: Il DNA di un virus spaziale subì una mutazione improvvisa a causa di un raggio laser, dando origine a DEOXYS. L'organo cristallino sul petto di questo POKéMON sembra essere il suo cervello.
descriptions.ja: 宇宙ウィルスのＤＮＡがレーザー照射で突然変異しデオキシスになった。胸の結晶体が脳のようだ。
descriptions.ko: 우주 바이러스의 DNA가 레이저 조사로 돌연변이하여 테오키스가 되었다. 가슴의 결정체가 뇌인 것 같다.

display_names.ja: デオキシス ディフェンスフォルム

name: deoxys-speed
description: The DNA of a space virus underwent a sudden mutation upon exposure to a laser beam and resulted in DEOXYS. The crystalline organ on this POKéMON’s chest appears to be its brain.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal alien-like Pokemon with a predominantly purple and blue body, featuring long, thin limbs, a streamlined head with a pointed crest, two large black eyes with blue pupils, and a visible green brain-like organ in its translucent blue chest.

descriptions.fr: L'ADN d'un virus spatial a subi une mutation soudaine après exposition à un rayon laser, donnant naissance à DEOXYS. L'organe cristallin sur sa poitrine semble être son cerveau.
descriptions.de: Die DNA eines Weltraumvirus mutierte plötzlich durch einen Laserstrahl und führte zur Entstehung von DEOXYS. Das kristalline Organ auf der Brust dieses POKéMONs scheint sein Gehirn zu sein.
descriptions.es: El ADN de un virus espacial sufrió una mutación repentina al ser expuesto a un rayo láser, dando como resultado a DEOXYS. El órgano cristalino en el pecho de este POKéMON parece ser su cerebro.
descriptions.it: Il DNA di un virus spaziale ha subito una mutazione improvvisa a seguito dell'esposizione a un raggio laser, dando vita a DEOXYS. L'organo cristallino sul petto di questo POKéMON sembra essere il suo cervello.
descriptions.ja: 宇宙ウィルスのDNAがレーザーに当たったことで突然変異を起こし、デオキシスになった。胸の結晶のような器官が脳らしい。
descriptions.ko: 우주 바이러스의 DNA가 레이저에 닿아 돌연변이를 일으켜서 디오키시스가 되었다. 가슴의 수정 같은 기관이 뇌라고 한다.

display_names.ja: デオキシス スピードフォルム

name: wormadam-sandy
description: When BURMY evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.
appearance: A brown, conical bag-like bug Pokemon composed of sandy material, featuring small yellow eyes, two short antennae, and a dark brown, circular opening at its bottom.

descriptions.fr: Quand CHENIPOT a évolué, son manteau est devenu une partie de son corps. Il ne le perd jamais.
descriptions.de: Als BURMY sich entwickelte, wurde sein Mantel zu einem Teil seines Körpers. Der Mantel wird niemals abgeworfen.
descriptions.es: Cuando BURMY evolucionó, su capa pasó a formar parte de su cuerpo. Nunca se la desprende.
descriptions.it: Quando BURMY si è evoluto, il suo mantello è diventato parte del suo corpo. Non lo perde mai.
descriptions.ja: ミノムッチが進化する際、ミノが体の一部となる。このミノは決して脱ぎ捨てられない。
descriptions.ko: 도롱충이가 진화하면서 몸을 감싸던 도롱이 몸의 일부가 되었다. 한 번 몸에 붙은 도롱은 벗겨지지 않는다.

display_names.ja: ミノマダム すなちのミノ

name: wormadam-trash
description: When BURMY evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.
appearance: A gray, conical bag-like bug Pokemon composed of crumpled metallic or trash material, featuring small yellow eyes, two short antennae, and a dark gray, circular opening at its bottom.

descriptions.fr: Quand CHENIPOT a évolué, son manteau est devenu une partie de son corps. Il ne le perd jamais.
descriptions.de: Als BURMY sich entwickelte, wurde sein Mantel zu einem Teil seines Körpers. Der Mantel wird niemals abgeworfen.
descriptions.es: Cuando BURMY evolucionó, su capa pasó a formar parte de su cuerpo. Nunca se la desprende.
descriptions.it: Quando BURMY si è evoluto, il suo mantello è diventato parte del suo corpo. Non lo perde mai.
descriptions.ja: ミノムッチが進化する際、ミノが体の一部となる。このミノは決して脱ぎ捨てられない。
descriptions.ko: 도롱충이가 진화하면서 몸을 감싸던 도롱이 몸의 일부가 되었다. 한 번 몸에 붙은 도롱은 벗겨지지 않는다.

display_names.ja: ミノマダム ゴミのミノ

name: shaymin-sky
description: It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant.
appearance: A white, quadrupedal hedgehog-like Pokemon with a green grass-like mane resembling a scarf, two delicate pink Gracidea flowers on its head, and small, expressive dark eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il vit dans les parterres de fleurs et évite d'être détecté en se recroquevillant pour ressembler à une plante fleurie.
descriptions.de: Es lebt in Blumenbeeten und vermeidet Entdeckung, indem es sich zusammenrollt und wie eine blühende Pflanze aussieht.
descriptions.es: Vive en campos de flores y evita que lo detecten al acurrucarse y parecer una planta con flores.
descriptions.it: Vive tra i fiori e, per non farsi scoprire, si raggomitola su se stesso, assumendo le sembianze di una pianta fiorita.
descriptions.ja: 花畑に生息し、身を丸めて花のような姿になり、発見されないようにしている。
descriptions.ko: 꽃밭에 서식하며 몸을 웅크려 꽃 같은 모습이 되어 발견되지 않도록 하고 있다.

display_names.ja: シェイミ スカイフォルム

name: giratina-origin
description: A Pokémon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.
appearance: A long, serpentine, golden and black bodied dragon-like Pokemon with six red-tipped spikes protruding from its back, three gold, wing-like appendages on each side, a gold helmet-like head with a single red eye, and two gold horns.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon qui vivrait dans un monde à l'envers du nôtre. Il apparaît dans un ancien cimetière.
descriptions.de: Ein POKéMON, das angeblich in einer Welt auf der Rückseite unserer existiert. Es erscheint auf einem alten Friedhof.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon que, según se dice, vive en un mundo del revés. Aparece en un cementerio antiguo.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON che si dice viva in un mondo al di là del nostro. Appare in un antico cimitero.
descriptions.ja: 我々の世界の裏側にあるという世界に棲むといわれるポケモン。古い墓場に姿を現す。
descriptions.ko: 우리 세계의 뒷면에 있다고 하는 세계에 산다고 전해지는 포켓몬. 오래된 묘지에 모습을 드러낸다.

display_names.ja: ギラティナ オリジンフォルム

name: rotom-heat
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: A fiery orange-red plasma-like entity with a blue face, two white oval eyes, and a straight mouth, encased within a red oven.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est composé de plasma. Il est connu pour infiltrer les appareils électroniques et y semer le chaos.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper besteht aus Plasma. Es ist bekannt dafür, elektronische Geräte zu infiltrieren und Chaos anzurichten.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo está compuesto de plasma. Se sabe que se infiltra en aparatos electrónicos y causa estragos.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo è composto di plasma. È noto per infiltrarsi negli apparecchi elettronici e creare scompiglio.
descriptions.ja: プラズマでできた体を持つ。家電に潜り込みいたずらをすることで知られている。
descriptions.ko: 플라스마로 된 몸을 가지고 있다. 가전에 침투해 장난치는 것으로 알려져 있다.

display_names.ja: ロトム ヒートフォルム

name: rotom-wash
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: A light blue plasma-like entity with a blue face, two white oval eyes, and a straight mouth, encased within a blue washing machine.

appearance: A gray-white plasma-like entity with a blue face, two white oval eyes, and a straight mouth, encased within a gray electric fan.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est composé de plasma. Il est connu pour infiltrer les appareils électroniques et y semer le chaos.

display_names.ja: ロトム スピンフォルム

name: rotom-mow
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
appearance: A green plasma-like entity with a blue face, two white oval eyes, and a straight mouth, encased within a green lawnmower.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est composé de plasma. Il est connu pour infiltrer les appareils électroniques et y semer le chaos.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper besteht aus Plasma. Es ist bekannt dafür, elektronische Geräte zu infiltrieren und Chaos anzurichten.

display_names.ja: ロトム カットフォルム

name: castform-sunny
description: CASTFORM’s appearance changes with the weather. This POKéMON gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body.
appearance: A white cloud-like Pokemon with a head resembling a bright red sun, featuring two small dark eyes and a faint mouth.

descriptions.fr: L'apparence de Morpheo change selon le temps. Ce Pokémon a acquis la capacité d'utiliser l'immense pouvoir de la nature pour protéger son corps minuscule.
descriptions.de: Morpheos Aussehen ändert sich mit dem Wetter. Dieses Pokémon erlangte die Fähigkeit, die immense Kraft der Natur zu nutzen, um seinen winzigen Körper zu schützen.
descriptions.es: La apariencia de Castform cambia según el clima. Este Pokémon obtuvo la habilidad de usar el vasto poder de la naturaleza para proteger su diminuto cuerpo.
descriptions.it: L'aspetto di Castform cambia con il tempo. Questo Pokémon ha acquisito la capacità di usare il vasto potere della natura per proteggere il suo minuscolo corpo.
descriptions.ja: ポワルンの姿は天気によって変化する。このポケモンは、その小さな体を守るため、大自然の強大な力を利用する能力を得た。
descriptions.ko: 캐스퐁의 모습은 날씨에 따라 변한다. 이 포켓몬은 작은 몸을 보호하기 위해 자연의 거대한 힘을 사용하는 능력을 얻었다.

display_names.ja: ポワルン たいようのすがた

name: castform-rainy
description: CASTFORM’s appearance changes with the weather. This POKéMON gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body.
appearance: A white cloud-like Pokemon with a head resembling a blue rain cloud, featuring two small dark eyes and a faint mouth.

descriptions.fr: L'apparence de Morpheo change selon le temps. Ce Pokémon a acquis la capacité d'utiliser l'immense pouvoir de la nature pour protéger son corps minuscule.
descriptions.de: Morpheos Aussehen ändert sich mit dem Wetter. Dieses Pokémon erlangte die Fähigkeit, die immense Kraft der Natur zu nutzen, um seinen winzigen Körper zu schützen.
descriptions.es: La apariencia de Castform cambia según el clima. Este Pokémon obtuvo la habilidad de usar el vasto poder de la naturaleza para proteger su diminuto cuerpo.
descriptions.it: L'aspetto di Castform cambia con il tempo. Questo Pokémon ha acquisito la capacità di usare il vasto potere della natura per proteggere il suo minuscolo corpo.
descriptions.ja: ポワルンの姿は天気によって変化する。このポケモンは、その小さな体を守るため、大自然の強大な力を利用する能力を得た。
descriptions.ko: 캐스퐁의 모습은 날씨에 따라 변한다. 이 포켓몬은 작은 몸을 보호하기 위해 자연의 거대한 힘을 사용하는 능력을 얻었다.

display_names.ja: ポワルン あまみずのすがた

name: castform-snowy
description: CASTFORM’s appearance changes with the weather. This POKéMON gained the ability to use the vast power of nature to protect its tiny body.
appearance: A white cloud-like Pokemon with a head resembling an icy blue snow cloud, featuring two small dark eyes and a faint mouth.

descriptions.fr: L'apparence de Morpheo change selon le temps. Ce Pokémon a acquis la capacité d'utiliser l'immense pouvoir de la nature pour protéger son corps minuscule.
descriptions.de: Morpheos Aussehen ändert sich mit dem Wetter. Dieses Pokémon erlangte die Fähigkeit, die immense Kraft der Natur zu nutzen, um seinen winzigen Körper zu schützen.
descriptions.es: La apariencia de Castform cambia según el clima. Este Pokémon obtuvo la habilidad de usar el vasto poder de la naturaleza para proteger su diminuto cuerpo.
descriptions.it: L'aspetto di Castform cambia con il tempo. Questo Pokémon ha acquisito la capacità di usare il vasto potere della natura per proteggere il suo minuscolo corpo.
descriptions.ja: ポワルンの姿は天気によって変化する。このポケモンは、その小さな体を守るため、大自然の強大な力を利用する能力を得た。
descriptions.ko: 캐스퐁의 모습은 날씨에 따라 변한다. 이 포켓몬은 작은 몸을 보호하기 위해 자연의 거대한 힘을 사용하는 능력을 얻었다.

display_names.ja: ポワルン (ゆきぐものすがた)

name: basculin-blue-striped
description: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they’ll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.
appearance: A green-bodied fish Pokemon with a prominent red snout, large yellow eyes, and distinctive horizontal blue stripes running along its sides.

descriptions.fr: Les Bargantua rouges et bleus s'entendent si mal qu'ils se battent instantanément. Ces Pokémon sont très hostiles.
descriptions.de: Rot- und Blau-Barschwa verstehen sich so schlecht, dass sie sich sofort streiten. Diese Pokémon sind sehr feindselig.
descriptions.es: Los Basculin de rayas rojas y azules se llevan tan mal que empiezan a pelear al instante. Estos Pokémon son muy hostiles.
descriptions.it: I Basculin a strisce rosse e blu vanno d'accordo così male che iniziano a lottare all'istante. Questi Pokémon sono molto ostili.
descriptions.ja: 赤いバスラオと青いバスラオは仲が悪く、すぐにケンカを始めてしまう。このポケモンは非常に攻撃的だ。
descriptions.ko: 붉은 줄무늬 배쓰나이와 푸른 줄무늬 배쓰나이는 사이가 좋지 않아 금방 싸움을 시작한다. 이 포켓몬들은 매우 적대적이다.

name: darmanitan-zen
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
appearance: A large, dark blue, ape-like Pokemon with a stony texture, crossed arms over its chest, and a serene expression, featuring glowing yellow eyes and a slightly open mouth.

descriptions.fr: Son feu interne brûle à 1 371 °C, générant une puissance suffisante pour détruire un camion-benne d'un seul coup de poing.
descriptions.de: Sein inneres Feuer brennt bei 1.371 °C und erzeugt genug Kraft, um einen Kipplaster mit einem einzigen Schlag zu zerstören.
descriptions.es: Su fuego interno arde a 1.371 °C, generando suficiente poder para destruir un camión volquete de un solo puñetazo.
descriptions.it: Il suo fuoco interno brucia a 1.371 °C, generando una potenza sufficiente a distruggere un camion ribaltabile con un solo pugno.
descriptions.ja: 体内の炎は1,371 °Cで燃え盛り、ダンプカーをパンチ一発で破壊するほどのパワーを生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 몸속의 불꽃은 1,371 °C로 타오르며 덤프트럭을 한 방에 파괴할 만한 힘을 만든다.

display_names.ja: ヒヒダルマ (だるまモード)

name: meloetta-pirouette
description: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.
appearance: A bipedal, dancer-like Pokemon with a white body, a black hair-like head crest, and orange skirt-like markings around its waist, featuring large blue eyes and a small mouth.

descriptions.fr: Ses mélodies sont chantées avec une méthode de vocalisation spéciale qui peut contrôler les sentiments de ceux qui l'entendent.
descriptions.de: Seine Melodien werden mit einer speziellen Vokalisation gesungen, die die Gefühle derer kontrollieren kann, die sie hören.
descriptions.es: Sus melodías se cantan con un método de vocalización especial que puede controlar los sentimientos de quienes las escuchan.
descriptions.it: Le sue melodie sono cantate con un metodo di vocalizzazione speciale che può controllare i sentimenti di chi le ascolta.
descriptions.ja: そのメロディは、聞いた者の感情を操る特殊な発声方法で歌われる。
descriptions.ko: 멜로디는 듣는 자의 감정을 조종할 수 있는 특별한 발성법으로 노래된다.

display_names.ja: メロエッタ (ステップフォルム)

name: tornadus-therian
description: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.
appearance: A green, muscular, bipedal bird-like genie Pokemon with a white cloud lower body, a long, purple beak, and a green plume-like tail, featuring sharp yellow eyes and a white horn on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: La moitié inférieure de son corps est enveloppée d'un nuage d'énergie. Il fonce dans le ciel à 322 km/h.
descriptions.de: Die untere Hälfte seines Körpers ist in eine Energiewolke gehüllt. Es rast mit 322 km/h durch den Himmel.
descriptions.es: La mitad inferior de su cuerpo está envuelta en una nube de energía. Atraviesa el cielo a 322 km/h.
descriptions.it: La metà inferiore del suo corpo è avvolta in una nuvola di energia. Sfreccia nel cielo a 322 km/h.
descriptions.ja: 体の半分はエネルギーの雲に包まれている。時速322 kmで空を駆け巡る。
descriptions.ko: 몸의 하반신은 에너지의 구름에 싸여 있다. 시속 322 km로 하늘을 질주한다.

display_names.ja: トルネロス (れいじゅうフォルム)

name: thundurus-therian
description: Countless charred remains mar the landscape of places through which Thundurus has passed.
appearance: A blue, muscular, bipedal dragon-like genie Pokemon with a white cloud lower body, a prominent white horn on its forehead, and a long, purple, lightning-bolt-shaped tail, featuring sharp yellow eyes and a purple beak-like snout.

descriptions.fr: D'innombrables restes calcinés défigurent le paysage des endroits où Fulguris est passé.
descriptions.de: Unzählige verkohlte Überreste verunstalten die Landschaften, die Voltolos passiert hat.
descriptions.es: Innumerables restos calcinados desfiguran el paisaje de los lugares por los que ha pasado Thundurus.
descriptions.it: Innumerevoli resti carbonizzati deturpano il paesaggio dei luoghi attraversati da Thundurus.
descriptions.ja: ボルトロスが通り過ぎた場所には、数えきれないほどの焦げ跡が残されている。
descriptions.ko: 볼트로스가 지나간 장소에는 셀 수 없는 검게 그을린 흔적이 남아있다.

display_names.ja: ボルトロス (れいじゅうフォルム)

name: landorus-therian
description: Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as “The Guardian of the Fields.”
appearance: An orange, muscular, quadrupedal tiger-like genie Pokemon with a white cloud lower body, two prominent white horns on its head, and a long, brown, club-shaped tail, featuring sharp yellow eyes and a brown snout.

descriptions.fr: Les terres visitées par Démétéros produisent des récoltes si abondantes qu'il a été surnommé « Le Gardien des Champs ».
descriptions.de: Von Demeteros besuchte Länder bringen so reiche Ernten, dass es als „Der Wächter der Felder“ gefeiert wird.
descriptions.es: Las tierras visitadas por Landorus otorgan cosechas tan abundantes que ha sido aclamado como "El Guardián de los Campos".
descriptions.it: Le terre visitate da Landorus garantiscono raccolti così abbondanti che è stato acclamato come "Il Guardiano dei Campi".
descriptions.ja: ランドロスが訪れた土地は、豊かな作物が実ることから「畑の守り神」と称えられている。
descriptions.ko: 랜드로스가 방문한 땅은 풍요로운 수확을 가져다주어 「밭의 수호신」이라고 칭송받는다.

display_names.ja: ランドロス (れいじゅうフォルム)

name: kyurem-black
description: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.
appearance: A bipedal, draconic Pokemon with a mostly gray, icy body, a prominent black left arm and shoulder, and a black, bipedal lower body, featuring a single bright yellow eye on its face.

descriptions.fr: Il génère une puissante énergie glaciale en lui-même, mais son corps s'est figé lorsque cette énergie s'est échappée.
descriptions.de: Es erzeugt eine starke, eisige Energie in sich, aber sein Körper erstarrte, als diese Energie entwich.
descriptions.es: Genera una poderosa energía congelante en su interior, pero su cuerpo se congeló cuando la energía se filtró.
descriptions.it: Genera una potente energia congelante al suo interno, ma il suo corpo si è congelato quando l'energia è fuoriuscita.
descriptions.ja: その身には強力な氷のエネルギーが生成されるが、それが漏れ出して体は凍りついた。
descriptions.ko: 강력한 얼음 에너지를 몸속에서 만들어내지만, 그 에너지가 새어 나와 몸이 얼어붙었다.

name: kyurem-white
description: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.
appearance: A bipedal, draconic Pokemon with a mostly gray, icy body, a prominent white right arm and shoulder, and a white, bipedal lower body, featuring a single bright yellow eye on its face.

descriptions.fr: Il génère une énergie glaciale puissante en son corps, mais son corps s'est gelé quand l'énergie a fui.
descriptions.de: Es erzeugt eine mächtige, eisige Energie in seinem Inneren, doch sein Körper ist gefroren, als die Energie austrat.
descriptions.es: Genera una potente energía helada en su interior, pero su cuerpo se congeló al filtrarse dicha energía.
descriptions.it: Genera una potente energia gelida al suo interno, ma il suo corpo si è congelato quando l'energia è fuoriuscita.
descriptions.ja: 体内で強力な冷凍エネルギーを生み出すが、そのエネルギーが漏れ出したため、体は凍りついた。
descriptions.ko: 몸 안에서 강력한 냉동 에너지를 만들어내지만, 그 에너지가 새어나와 몸이 얼어붙었다.

name: keldeo-resolute
description: By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It excels at using leg moves while battling.
appearance: A small, white, quadrupedal equine Pokemon with a long, blue mane and tail, and a distinctive orange sword-like horn on its forehead, featuring large blue eyes and a small mouth.

descriptions.fr: En projetant de l'eau depuis ses sabots, il peut glisser sur l'eau. Il excelle dans l'utilisation de mouvements de jambe au combat.
descriptions.de: Indem es Wasser aus seinen Hufen stößt, kann es über Wasser gleiten. Es beherrscht im Kampf ausgezeichnet Beinattacken.
descriptions.es: Al lanzar agua por sus cascos, puede deslizarse sobre ella. Destaca en el uso de ataques con las patas durante el combate.
descriptions.it: Spruzzando acqua dagli zoccoli, può scivolare sull'acqua. Eccelle nell'usare mosse che coinvolgono le zampe in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: ひづめから水を噴射し、水上を滑走する。バトルでは脚を使った技が得意。
descriptions.ko: 발굽에서 물을 분사하여 물 위를 활주한다. 배틀에서는 다리를 사용한 기술이 특기다.

display_names.ja: ケルディオ (かくごのすがた)

name: meowstic-female
description: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust.
appearance: A white and black bipedal feline-like Pokemon with a mostly white body, prominent black ear tufts, black markings around its blue eyes, and a white, curled tail, featuring a small mouth.

descriptions.fr: En cas de danger, il dresse ses oreilles et libère une puissance psychique suffisante pour réduire en poussière un camion de 10 tonnes.
descriptions.de: Bei Gefahr richtet es seine Ohren auf und setzt genug Psycho-Kraft frei, um einen 10-Tonnen-LKW zu Staub zu zermahlen.
descriptions.es: En peligro, alza las orejas y libera un poder psíquico capaz de reducir a polvo un camión de 10 toneladas.
descriptions.it: In pericolo, alza le orecchie e sprigiona una potenza psichica sufficiente a ridurre in polvere un camion da 10 tonnellate.
descriptions.ja: 危機が迫ると耳を立て、10トントラックを粉砕するほどのサイコパワーを放つ。
descriptions.ko: 위기에 처하면 귀를 세워 10톤 트럭을 부술 정도의 에스퍼 파워를 방출한다.

name: aegislash-blade
description: Generations of kings were attended by these Pokémon, which used their spectral power to manipulate and control people and Pokémon.
appearance: A floating sword and shield Pokemon consisting of a golden hilt and dark gray blade, levitating behind a golden shield with a purple core, yellow eye-like markings, and a flowing purple ribbon-like arm.

descriptions.fr: Des générations de rois furent servies par ces Pokémon, qui utilisaient leur pouvoir spectral pour manipuler et contrôler gens et Pokémon.
descriptions.de: Generationen von Königen dienten diese Pokémon, die ihre spektrale Kraft nutzten, um Menschen und Pokémon zu manipulieren und zu kontrollieren.
descriptions.es: Generaciones de reyes fueron atendidas por estos Pokémon, que usaban su poder espectral para manipular y controlar a personas y Pokémon.
descriptions.it: Intere generazioni di re furono servite da questi Pokémon, che usavano il loro potere spettrale per manipolare e controllare persone e Pokémon.
descriptions.ja: 代々の王に仕え、人やポケモンを操るスペクトルパワーを使い、支配を助けたポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 대대로 왕을 섬기며 사람과 포켓몬을 조종하는 스펙트럼 파워로 지배를 도운 포켓몬이다.

display_names.ja: ギルガルド (ブレードフォルム)

name: pumpkaboo-small
description: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
appearance: A small, orange pumpkin-like Pokemon with a short, brown stem, small yellow eyes, and a small, triangular mouth, with a dark gray, ghost-like body peering from a hole in its back.

descriptions.fr: Un esprit piégé dans ce monde hante son corps en forme de citrouille. Au coucher du soleil, il s'agite et devient actif.
descriptions.de: Sein Kürbiskörper wird von einem in dieser Welt gefangenen Geist bewohnt. Bei Sonnenuntergang wird es ruhelos und aktiv.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo calabaza está habitado por un espíritu atrapado en este mundo. Al atardecer, se agita y se vuelve activo.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo a forma di zucca è abitato da uno spirito intrappolato in questo mondo. Al tramonto, diventa irrequieto e attivo.
descriptions.ja: この世に留まる魂がカボチャの体に宿っている。日が暮れると落ち着きがなくなり活動的になる。
descriptions.ko: 이 세상에 머무르는 영혼이 호박 몸에 깃들어 있다. 해가 지면 안절부절못하며 활동적이 된다.

display_names.ja: バケッチャ (小さいサイズ)

name: pumpkaboo-large
description: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
appearance: An orange, pumpkin-shaped creature with two stubby black arm-like protrusions, a black face featuring two yellow oval eyes and a thin yellow mouth, and a green, curly stem topped with a two-part leaf.

descriptions.fr: Un esprit piégé dans ce monde hante son corps en forme de citrouille. Au coucher du soleil, il s'agite et devient actif.
descriptions.de: Sein Kürbiskörper wird von einem in dieser Welt gefangenen Geist bewohnt. Bei Sonnenuntergang wird es ruhelos und aktiv.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo calabaza está habitado por un espíritu atrapado en este mundo. Al atardecer, se agita y se vuelve activo.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo a forma di zucca è abitato da uno spirito intrappolato in questo mondo. Al tramonto, diventa irrequieto e attivo.
descriptions.ja: この世に留まる魂がカボチャの体に宿っている。日が暮れると落ち着きがなくなり活動的になる。
descriptions.ko: 이 세상에 머무르는 영혼이 호박 몸에 깃들어 있다. 해가 지면 안절부절못하며 활동적이 된다.

display_names.ja: バケッチャ (大きいサイズ)

display_names.ja: バケッチャ (特大サイズ)

name: gourgeist-small
description: Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
appearance: A pink, pumpkin-shaped creature with a ruffled collar-like top, a black face featuring two yellow oval eyes and a thin yellow mouth, a short green stem with a two-part leaf, and two long, thin, black rope-like arms.

descriptions.fr: Chantant de voix étranges, ils errent dans les rues de la ville la nuit de la nouvelle lune. Quiconque entend leur chant est maudit.
descriptions.de: Mit unheimlichen Stimmen singend, wandern sie in der Neumondnacht durch die Straßen der Stadt. Jeder, der ihr Lied hört, ist verflucht.
descriptions.es: Cantando con voces espeluznantes, vagan por las calles de la ciudad la noche de luna nueva. Quien oiga su canción es maldecido.
descriptions.it: Cantando con voci inquietanti, vagano per le strade cittadine nella notte di luna nuova. Chiunque ascolti il loro canto viene maledetto.
descriptions.ja: 不気味な声で歌いながら新月の夜に町の通りをさまよう。その歌を聞いた者は呪われる。
descriptions.ko: 섬뜩한 목소리로 노래하며 신월의 밤에 마을 거리를 배회한다. 그 노래를 들은 자는 저주받는다.

display_names.ja: パンプジン (小さいサイズ)

name: gourgeist-large
description: Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
appearance: A pink, pumpkin-shaped creature with a ruffled collar-like top, a black face featuring two yellow oval eyes and a thin yellow mouth, a short green stem with a two-part leaf, and two long, thin, black rope-like arms.
