display_names.ja: パンプジン (特大サイズ)

name: venusaur-mega
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.
appearance: A massive, blue-green quadrupedal creature with a large, gnarled tree trunk supporting a huge pink flower and additional green foliage on its back, featuring a prominent dark green gem embedded in its forehead.

descriptions.fr: La plante fleurit lorsqu'elle absorbe l'énergie solaire. Il reste en mouvement pour chercher la lumière du soleil.
descriptions.de: Die Pflanze blüht, wenn sie Sonnenenergie absorbiert. Es bleibt in Bewegung, um Sonnenlicht zu suchen.
descriptions.es: La planta florece cuando absorbe energía solar. Se mantiene en movimiento para buscar la luz del sol.
descriptions.it: La pianta fiorisce quando assorbe energia solare. Si muove costantemente per cercare la luce del sole.
descriptions.ja: 太陽エネルギーを吸収する時に植物が咲く。日光を求めて動き回る。
descriptions.ko: 태양 에너지를 흡수할 때 식물이 꽃을 피운다. 햇빛을 찾아 계속 움직인다.

name: charizard-mega-x
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.
appearance: A bipedal, dark gray, dragon-like creature with large, clawed wings featuring blue undersides, blue flames erupting from its mouth, and two sharp, backward-curving horns on its head.

descriptions.fr: Crache un feu assez chaud pour faire fondre des rochers. Connu pour provoquer des feux de forêt involontairement.
descriptions.de: Spuckt Feuer aus, das heiß genug ist, um Felsbrocken zu schmelzen. Bekannt dafür, unbeabsichtigt Waldbrände zu verursachen.
descriptions.es: Escupe fuego lo suficientemente caliente como para derretir rocas. Se sabe que causa incendios forestales sin intención.
descriptions.it: Sputa fuoco abbastanza caldo da sciogliere massi. Noto per causare incendi boschivi involontariamente.
descriptions.ja: 岩を溶かすほど熱い炎を吐く。意図せず森林火災を引き起こすことで知られる。
descriptions.ko: 바위를 녹일 만큼 뜨거운 불꽃을 내뿜는다. 의도치 않게 산불을 일으키는 것으로 알려져 있다.

name: charizard-mega-y
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.
appearance: A bipedal, orange, dragon-like creature with a more streamlined body, two small horns on its head and a single, longer horn on its snout, large pointed wings with segmented thumb-claws, and prominent flame vents on its wrists.

descriptions.fr: Crache un feu assez chaud pour faire fondre des rochers. Connu pour provoquer des feux de forêt involontairement.
descriptions.de: Spuckt Feuer aus, das heiß genug ist, um Felsbrocken zu schmelzen. Bekannt dafür, unbeabsichtigt Waldbrände zu verursachen.
descriptions.es: Escupe fuego lo suficientemente caliente como para derretir rocas. Se sabe que causa incendios forestales sin intención.
descriptions.it: Sputa fuoco abbastanza caldo da sciogliere massi. Noto per causare incendi boschivi involontariamente.
descriptions.ja: 岩を溶かすほど熱い炎を吐く。意図せず森林火災を引き起こすことで知られる。
descriptions.ko: 바위를 녹일 만큼 뜨거운 불꽃을 내뿜는다. 의도치 않게 산불을 일으키는 것으로 알려져 있다.

name: blastoise-mega
description: A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.
appearance: A large, bipedal blue turtle with a massive, white shell on its back featuring a single, colossal black-barreled cannon in the center, flanked by two smaller ones, and two additional smaller cannons on its forearms.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON brutal avec des jets d'eau pressurisés sur sa carapace. Ils sont utilisés pour des charges à grande vitesse.
descriptions.de: Ein brutales POKéMON mit Druckwasserstrahlen auf seinem Panzer. Sie werden für schnelle Rammangriffe verwendet.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON brutal con chorros de agua a presión en su caparazón. Se utilizan para embestidas de alta velocidad.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON brutale con getti d'acqua pressurizzata sul guscio. Vengono usati per cariche ad alta velocità.
descriptions.ja: 甲羅に高圧水流ジェットを持つ凶暴なポケモン。高速の体当たり攻撃に利用される。
descriptions.ko: 등껍질에 고압 물대포를 가진 난폭한 포켓몬. 고속 태클에 사용된다.

name: alakazam-mega
description: Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.
appearance: A bipedal, yellow fox-like creature with a long, flowing white beard and mustache, large red eyes, and a prominent red gem on its forehead, levitating five bent spoons around its body with two main spoons in its hands.

descriptions.fr: Son cerveau peut surpasser un superordinateur. Son quotient intellectuel serait de 5 000.
descriptions.de: Sein Gehirn kann einen Supercomputer übertreffen. Sein Intelligenzquotient soll 5.000 betragen.
descriptions.es: Su cerebro puede superar a un superordenador. Se dice que su cociente intelectual es de 5.000.
descriptions.it: Il suo cervello può superare un supercomputer. Si dice che il suo quoziente intellettivo sia di 5.000.
descriptions.ja: その脳はスーパーコンピューターを凌駕する。知能指数は5,000と言われている。
descriptions.ko: 뇌는 슈퍼컴퓨터를 능가한다. 지능 지수는 5,000이라고 한다.

name: gengar-mega
description: Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.
appearance: A large, dark purple, spherical ghost-like creature with stubby limbs, a prominent jagged grin and glowing red eyes, featuring several sharp spikes protruding from its back and head, and an elongated tail.

descriptions.fr: Sous une pleine lune, ce POKéMON aime imiter les ombres des gens et rire de leur frayeur.
descriptions.de: Bei Vollmond imitiert dieses POKéMON gerne die Schatten von Menschen und lacht über ihre Furcht.
descriptions.es: Bajo la luna llena, a este POKéMON le gusta imitar las sombras de las personas y reírse de su miedo.
descriptions.it: Sotto la luna piena, a questo POKéMON piace imitare le ombre delle persone e ridere della loro paura.
descriptions.ja: 満月の夜には、人々の影を真似て、その恐怖をあざ笑うのが好きだ。
descriptions.ko: 보름달 아래에서 이 POKéMON은 사람들의 그림자를 흉내 내고 그들의 두려움을 비웃는 것을 좋아한다.

name: kangaskhan-mega
description: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.
appearance: A large, bipedal, marsupial-like creature with light brown fur and a dark gray belly, now with its smaller, light brown baby, featuring red eyes and prominent fangs, standing protectively in front of it.

descriptions.fr: Le petit s'aventure rarement hors de la poche protectrice de sa mère avant l'âge de 3 ans.
descriptions.de: Das Jungtier wagt sich selten vor dem Alter von 3 Jahren aus dem schützenden Beutel seiner Mutter.
descriptions.es: La cría rara vez se aventura fuera de la bolsa protectora de su madre hasta que tiene 3 años.
descriptions.it: Il cucciolo raramente si avventura fuori dal marsupio protettivo della madre prima dei 3 anni.
descriptions.ja: 幼体は3歳になるまで、母親の保護的な袋からめったに出ない。
descriptions.ko: 새끼는 3살이 될 때까지 어미의 보호 주머니 밖으로 거의 나오지 않는다.

name: pinsir-mega
description: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.
appearance: A large, dark brown, beetle-like creature with powerful mandibles featuring golden spikes, large, segmented iridescent wings, and two prominent, sharp horns on its head.

descriptions.fr: S'il ne parvient pas à écraser sa victime dans ses pinces, il la balance et la projette avec force.
descriptions.de: Wenn es das Opfer nicht in seinen Zangen zerquetschen kann, schleudert es es herum und wirft es hart weg.
descriptions.es: Si no logra aplastar a la víctima con sus pinzas, la balanceará y la lanzará con fuerza.
descriptions.it: Se non riesce a schiacciare la vittima con le sue chele, la farà roteare e la scaglierà con forza.
descriptions.ja: 獲物を挟んで潰すのに失敗した場合、振り回して強く投げ飛ばす。
descriptions.ko: 집게로 먹이를 부수지 못하면, 흔들어 강하게 내던진다.

name: gyarados-mega
description: Once it begins to rampage, a GYARADOS will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.
appearance: A massive, serpentine creature with a mostly blue body, a white belly, and large, red fins fanning from its head, dorsal side, and tail, featuring prominent yellow side fins and a fierce, toothy mouth with a red interior.

descriptions.fr: Une fois qu'il commence à faire des ravages, un GYARADOS réduira tout en cendres, même lors d'une violente tempête.
descriptions.de: Sobald es wütet, wird ein GYARADOS alles niederbrennen, selbst in einem heftigen Sturm.
descriptions.es: Una vez que comienza a descontrolarse, un GYARADOS quemará todo, incluso en una tormenta violenta.
descriptions.it: Una volta che inizia a imperversare, un GYARADOS brucerà tutto, anche durante una forte tempesta.
descriptions.ja: 一度暴れ出すと、ギャラドスは激しい嵐の中でも全てを焼き尽くす。
descriptions.ko: 난폭해지기 시작하면, 폭풍우 속에서도 모든 것을 불태운다.

name: aerodactyl-mega
description: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.
appearance: A large, gray, reptilian creature with wide, bat-like wings and a long tail, featuring jagged, crystalline formations of various dark purple or blue hues protruding from its head, neck, and wings, and a fierce, toothy beak.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon qui parcourait les cieux à l'ère des dinosaures. Ses dents sont comme des lames de scie.
descriptions.de: Ein Pokémon, das in der Dinosaurierzeit die Lüfte durchstreifte. Seine Zähne sind wie Sägeblätter.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon que vagaba por los cielos en la era de los dinosaurios. Sus dientes son como hojas de sierra.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon che vagava nei cieli nell'era dei dinosauri. I suoi denti sono come lame di sega.
descriptions.ja: 恐竜時代に空をさまよっていたポケモン。その歯はノコギリの刃のようだ。
descriptions.ko: 공룡 시대에 하늘을 배회했던 포켓몬. 이빨은 톱날과 같다.

name: mewtwo-mega-x
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.
appearance: A bipedal, purple and white humanoid creature with a heavily muscled physique, a prominent purple head crest, and a long, thin tail, featuring large, muscular arms and two large, dark purple protrusions on its shoulders.

descriptions.fr: Il a été créé par un scientifique après des années d'horribles expériences de manipulation génétique et d'ingénierie de l'ADN.
descriptions.de: Es wurde von einem Wissenschaftler nach Jahren entsetzlicher Genspleiß- und DNA-Experimente erschaffen.
descriptions.es: Fue creado por un científico tras años de horribles experimentos de empalme genético e ingeniería de ADN.
descriptions.it: È stato creato da uno scienziato dopo anni di orribili esperimenti di giunzione genetica e ingegneria del DNA.
descriptions.ja: 長年の忌まわしい遺伝子操作とDNA工学実験の結果、ある科学者によって生み出された。
descriptions.ko: 오랜 세월에 걸친 끔찍한 유전자 접합과 DNA 공학 실험 끝에 한 과학자에 의해 만들어졌다.

name: mewtwo-mega-y
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.
appearance: A slender, bipedal, white and purple humanoid creature with a large, elongated head, a prominent purple tail-like appendage extending from the back of its head, and a long, thin tail; its arms and legs are thin and delicate.

descriptions.fr: Il a été créé par un scientifique après des années d'horribles expériences de manipulation génétique et d'ingénierie de l'ADN.
descriptions.de: Es wurde von einem Wissenschaftler nach Jahren entsetzlicher Genspleiß- und DNA-Experimente erschaffen.
descriptions.es: Fue creado por un científico tras años de horribles experimentos de empalme genético e ingeniería de ADN.
descriptions.it: È stato creato da uno scienziato dopo anni di orribili esperimenti di giunzione genetica e ingegneria del DNA.
descriptions.ja: 長年の忌まわしい遺伝子操作とDNA工学実験の結果、ある科学者によって生み出された。
descriptions.ko: 오랜 세월에 걸친 끔찍한 유전자 접합과 DNA 공학 실험 끝에 한 과학자에 의해 만들어졌다.

name: ampharos-mega
description: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.
appearance: A large, white, sheep-like creature with a long, wavy, pink fur mane and tail, featuring a prominent red gem on its forehead and two golden rings on its neck and tail, and three smaller golden rings on its forelegs.

descriptions.fr: L'extrémité de sa queue brille intensément et peut être vue de loin. Elle sert de phare aux personnes égarées.
descriptions.de: Die Spitze seines Schweifes leuchtet hell und ist von Weitem sichtbar. Sie dient Verirrten als Leuchtfeuer.
descriptions.es: La punta de su cola brilla intensamente y se puede ver desde lejos. Actúa como un faro para las personas perdidas.
descriptions.it: L'estremità della sua coda brilla intensamente ed è visibile da lontano. Serve da faro per le persone smarrite.
descriptions.ja: 尻尾の先が強く輝き、遠くからでも見える。迷子になった人々の目印となる。
descriptions.ko: 꼬리 끝이 밝게 빛나 멀리서도 볼 수 있다. 길 잃은 사람들에게 등대 역할을 한다.

name: scizor-mega
description: It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.
appearance: A bipedal, red, insectoid creature with a metallic body, large, sharp, pincer-like claws, and four transparent, iridescent wings resembling those of a dragonfly, featuring two dark gray spikes on its shoulders.

descriptions.fr: Son corps est dur comme l'acier. Il intimide ses ennemis en levant ses pinces ornées d'un motif en forme d'œil.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper ist stahlhart. Es schüchtert Gegner ein, indem es seine scherenförmigen Zangen mit Augenmuster aufrichtet.
descriptions.es: Tiene un cuerpo duro como el acero. Intimida a los enemigos levantando sus pinzas con patrón de ojos.
descriptions.it: Ha un corpo duro come l'acciaio. Intimorisce i nemici sollevando le sue pinze a forma di occhi.
descriptions.ja: 鋼鉄のように硬い体を持つ。目玉模様のハサミを上げて相手を威嚇する。
descriptions.ko: 강철처럼 단단한 몸을 가졌다. 눈동자 무늬가 있는 집게를 들어 적을 위협한다.

name: heracross-mega
description: It is usually docile, but if it is disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.
appearance: A large, blue, bipedal beetle-like creature with a powerful, yellow, cross-shaped horn extending from its forehead, large black wings with blue undersides, and sharp claws on its hands and feet.

descriptions.fr: Il est généralement docile, mais s'il est dérangé pendant qu'il sirote du miel, il chasse l'intrus avec sa corne.
descriptions.de: Es ist normalerweise sanftmütig, doch wird es beim Honignaschen gestört, jagt es den Eindringling mit seinem Horn davon.
descriptions.es: Suele ser dócil, pero si lo molestan mientras sorbe miel, persigue al intruso con su cuerno.
descriptions.it: È solitamente docile, ma se viene disturbato mentre sorseggia miele, scaccia l'intruso con il suo corno.
descriptions.ja: 普段はおとなしいが、蜜を吸っているときに邪魔されると、ツノで侵入者を追い払う。
descriptions.ko: 평소에는 온순하지만 꿀을 빨아먹는 도중에 방해받으면 뿔로 침입자를 쫓아낸다.

name: houndoom-mega
description: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.
appearance: A bipedal, dark gray canine-like creature with large, curved horns and prominent bone-like protrusions from its back, neck, and tail, featuring fiery red rings around its ankles and a skull-like marking on its chest.

descriptions.fr: Si vous êtes brûlé par les flammes qu'il projette de sa gueule, la douleur ne disparaîtra jamais.
descriptions.de: Wer von den Flammen, die es aus seinem Maul speit, verbrannt wird, dessen Schmerz wird niemals vergehen.
descriptions.es: Si te queman las llamas que lanza por la boca, el dolor nunca desaparecerá.
descriptions.it: Se vieni bruciato dalle fiamme che spara dalla bocca, il dolore non svanirà mai.
descriptions.ja: 口から放つ炎に焼かれると、その痛みは決して消えない。
descriptions.ko: 입에서 뿜는 불꽃에 타면 그 아픔은 결코 사라지지 않는다.

name: tyranitar-mega
description: Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.
appearance: A massive, bipedal, green, dinosaur-like creature with heavy, rock-like armor plating, a prominent, spiky tail, and sharp claws, featuring two large red eyes and sharp teeth, with multiple red spikes protruding from its shoulders and back.

descriptions.fr: Son corps ne peut être blessé par aucune attaque, il est donc très désireux de lancer des défis à ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper kann von keiner Art von Angriff verletzt werden, daher ist es sehr erpicht darauf, Gegner herauszufordern.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo no puede ser dañado por ningún tipo de ataque, por lo que está muy ansioso por desafiar a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo non può essere danneggiato da alcun tipo di attacco, perciò è molto desideroso di affrontare i nemici.
descriptions.ja: あらゆる攻撃が体を傷つけられないため、敵に挑戦することを非常に熱望している。
descriptions.ko: 그 어떤 공격으로도 몸을 상하게 할 수 없으므로 적에게 도전하기를 매우 열망한다.

name: blaziken-mega
description: In battle, BLAZIKEN blows out intense flames from its wrists and attacks foes courageously. The stronger the foe, the more intensely this POKéMON’s wrists burn.
appearance: A bipedal, red and yellow, bird-like creature with large, muscular legs, fiery plumes erupting from its wrists, and two prominent, red, horn-like crests on its head, resembling a lean, agile fighter.

descriptions.fr: Au combat, BRASÉGALI projette d'intenses flammes depuis ses poignets et attaque ses ennemis courageusement. Plus l'ennemi est fort, plus les poignets de ce POKéMON brûlent intensément.
descriptions.de: Im Kampf stößt LOHGOCK intensive Flammen aus seinen Handgelenken aus und attackiert Gegner mutig. Je stärker der Gegner, desto intensiver brennen die Handgelenke dieses POKéMON.
descriptions.es: En combate, BLAZIKEN arroja intensas llamas de sus muñecas y ataca a los enemigos con valentía. Cuanto más fuerte es el enemigo, con más intensidad arden las muñecas de este POKéMON.
descriptions.it: In lotta, BLAZIKEN spara fiamme intense dai polsi e attacca i nemici con coraggio. Più forte è il nemico, più intensamente i polsi di questo POKéMON bruciano.
descriptions.ja: バトルでは、バシャーモは手首から激しい炎を噴き出し、勇敢に敵を攻撃する。敵が強ければ強いほど、このポケモンは手首が激しく燃える。
descriptions.ko: 배틀에서 번치코는 손목에서 격렬한 불꽃을 뿜어내며 적을 용감하게 공격한다. 적이 강할수록 이 포켓몬의 손목은 더욱 격렬하게 불타오른다.

name: gardevoir-mega
description: GARDEVOIR has the ability to read the future. If it senses impending danger to its TRAINER, this POKéMON is said to unleash its psychokinetic energy at full power.
appearance: A slender, bipedal, white humanoid creature with a long, elegant gown-like body, long, flowing green hair, and a prominent red horn-like protrusion on its chest, with two large, white, translucent arm-fin-like structures.

descriptions.fr: GARDEVOIR a la capacité de lire l'avenir. S'il pressent un danger imminent pour son DRESSEUR, ce POKéMON libère son énergie psychokinétique à pleine puissance.
descriptions.de: GARDEVOIR hat die Fähigkeit, die Zukunft zu lesen. Spürt es eine drohende Gefahr für seinen TRAINER, so entfesselt dieses POKéMON angeblich seine psychokinetische Energie mit voller Kraft.
descriptions.es: GARDEVOIR tiene la habilidad de leer el futuro. Si percibe un peligro inminente para su ENTRENADOR, se dice que este POKéMON desata su energía psicocinética a plena potencia.
descriptions.it: GARDEVOIR ha la capacità di leggere il futuro. Se percepisce un pericolo imminente per il suo ALLENATORE, si dice che questo POKéMON scateni la sua energia psicocinetica a piena potenza.
descriptions.ja: サーナイトは未来を読む能力を持つ。トレーナーに迫る危険を感じると、このポケモンはサイコキネシスエネルギーを全力で解放すると言われている。
descriptions.ko: 가디안은 미래를 읽는 능력을 가졌다. 트레이너에게 다가오는 위험을 감지하면 이 포켓몬은 사이코키네시스 에너지를 전력으로 해방한다고 알려져 있다.

name: mawile-mega
description: MAWHILE’s huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its foe into letting down its guard. When the foe least expects it, MAWHILE chomps it with its gaping jaws.
appearance: A small, bipedal humanoid creature with a black body, a yellow face featuring red eyes and a small mouth, and two massive, gaping, fanged jaws with yellow interiors that grow from the back of its head.

descriptions.fr: Les énormes mâchoires de MYSDIBULE sont en réalité des cornes d'acier transformées. Son visage d'apparence docile sert à endormir la vigilance de l'ennemi. Quand l'ennemi s'y attend le moins, MYSDIBULE le mord avec ses mâchoires béantes.
descriptions.de: MAWILEs riesige Kiefer sind eigentlich transformierte Stahlhörner. Sein sanft aussehendes Gesicht dient dazu, Gegner in Sicherheit zu wiegen. Wenn der Gegner es am wenigsten erwartet, schnappt MAWILE ihn mit seinen weit geöffneten Kiefern.
descriptions.es: Las enormes mandíbulas de MAWILE son en realidad cuernos de acero transformados. Su cara de aspecto dócil sirve para adormecer al enemigo para que baje la guardia. Cuando el enemigo menos lo espera, MAWILE lo muerde con sus mandíbulas abiertas.
descriptions.it: Le enormi fauci di MAWILE sono in realtà corna d'acciaio trasformate. Il suo viso dall'aspetto docile serve a indurre l'avversario ad abbassare la guardia. Quando il nemico meno se lo aspetta, MAWILE lo azzanna con le sue fauci spalancate.
descriptions.ja: クチートの巨大な顎は、実は変形した鋼鉄のツノである。おとなしそうな顔は相手を油断させるために使われる。相手が全く予期していない時に、クチートはその大きく開いた顎で噛みつく。
descriptions.ko: 입치트의 거대한 턱은 사실 변형된 강철 뿔이다. 온순해 보이는 얼굴은 적이 방심하도록 유도하는 역할을 한다. 적이 전혀 예상치 못할 때, 입치트는 크게 벌린 턱으로 적을 물어뜯는다.

name: aggron-mega
description: AGGRON claims an entire mountain as its own territory. It mercilessly beats up anything that violates its environment. This POKéMON vigilantly patrols its territory at all times.
appearance: A massive, quadrupedal, dark gray creature covered in heavy, metallic armor plating, featuring sharp horns on its head, prominent red eyes, and a single, large, dark gray horn on its snout, with a spiky tail.

descriptions.fr: AGGRON revendique une montagne entière comme son territoire. Il bat sans merci tout ce qui viole son environnement. Ce POKéMON patrouille vigilamment son territoire à tout moment.
descriptions.de: AGGRON beansprucht einen ganzen Berg als sein Territorium. Es verprügelt gnadenlos alles, was seine Umgebung verletzt. Dieses POKéMON patrouilliert jederzeit wachsam in seinem Gebiet.
descriptions.es: AGGRON reclama una montaña entera como su propio territorio. Golpea sin piedad a cualquiera que viole su entorno. Este POKéMON patrulla su territorio vigilantemente en todo momento.
descriptions.it: AGGRON rivendica un'intera montagna come suo territorio. Batte senza pietà qualsiasi cosa violi il suo ambiente. Questo POKéMON pattuglia vigilantemente il suo territorio in ogni momento.
descriptions.ja: AGGRONは山全体を自分の縄張りとしている。その環境を侵すものには容赦なく襲いかかる。このポケモンは常に縄張りを警戒してパトロールしている。
descriptions.ko: AGGRON은 산 전체를 자신의 영역으로 주장한다. 환경을 침범하는 것은 무엇이든 무자비하게 공격한다. 이 포켓몬은 항상 영역을 경계하며 순찰한다.

name: medicham-mega
description: It is said that through meditation, MEDICHAM heightens energy inside its body and sharpens its sixth sense. This POKéMON hides its presence by merging itself with fields and mountains.
appearance: A bipedal, blue and red humanoid creature with a turban-like headpiece featuring two long, white, tentacle-like braids that extend downwards, and a prominent red oval marking on its chest, with sharp claws on its hands and feet.

descriptions.fr: On dit que grâce à la méditation, MEDICHAM accroît l'énergie à l'intérieur de son corps et aiguise son sixième sens. Ce POKéMON cache sa présence en se fondant dans les champs et les montagnes.
descriptions.de: Es heißt, dass MEDICHAM durch Meditation die Energie in seinem Körper steigert und seinen sechsten Sinn schärft. Dieses POKéMON verbirgt seine Anwesenheit, indem es sich mit Feldern und Bergen verschmilzt.
descriptions.es: Se dice que, a través de la meditación, MEDICHAM aumenta la energía dentro de su cuerpo y agudiza su sexto sentido. Este POKéMON oculta su presencia fusionándose con campos y montañas.
descriptions.it: Si dice che attraverso la meditazione, MEDICHAM aumenti l'energia all'interno del suo corpo e acuisca il suo sesto senso. Questo POKéMON nasconde la sua presenza fondendosi con campi e montagne.
descriptions.ja: MEDICHAMは瞑想することで、体内のエネルギーを高め、第六感を研ぎ澄ますと言われている。このポケモンは、野原や山に溶け込むことで気配を消す。
descriptions.ko: MEDICHAM은 명상을 통해 몸속 에너지를 높이고 육감을 날카롭게 한다고 전해진다. 이 포켓몬은 들판과 산에 융화되어 자신의 존재를 숨긴다.

name: manectric-mega
description: MANECTRIC is constantly discharging electricity from its mane. The sparks sometimes ignite forest fires. When it enters a battle, this POKéMON creates thunderclouds.
appearance: A sleek, quadrupedal, blue canine-like creature with a large, yellow, lightning bolt-shaped mane extending down its back and tail, and prominent yellow spikes on its forelegs and face, with red eyes.

descriptions.fr: MANECTRIC décharge constamment de l'électricité de sa crinière. Les étincelles provoquent parfois des incendies de forêt. Quand il entre en combat, ce POKéMON crée des nuages d'orage.
descriptions.de: MANECTRIC entlädt ständig Elektrizität aus seiner Mähne. Die Funken entzünden manchmal Waldbrände. Wenn es in einen Kampf geht, erzeugt dieses POKéMON Gewitterwolken.
descriptions.es: MANECTRIC descarga constantemente electricidad de su melena. Las chispas a veces provocan incendios forestales. Cuando entra en combate, este POKéMON crea nubes de tormenta.
descriptions.it: MANECTRIC scarica costantemente elettricità dalla sua criniera. Le scintille a volte provocano incendi boschivi. Quando entra in battaglia, questo POKéMON crea nubi temporalesche.
descriptions.ja: MANECTRICはたてがみから常に電気を放出している。その火花が山火事を起こすこともある。バトルに入ると、このポケモンは雷雲を発生させる。
descriptions.ko: MANECTRIC은 갈기에서 끊임없이 전기를 방출한다. 불꽃이 때때로 산불을 일으키기도 한다. 배틀에 들어가면 이 포켓몬은 먹구름을 만들어낸다.

name: banette-mega
description: BANETTE generates energy for laying strong curses by sticking pins into its own body. This POKéMON was originally a pitiful plush doll that was thrown away.
appearance: A ghostly, purple, humanoid puppet-like creature with a large, jagged zipper across its mouth, prominent red eyes, and three long, ribbon-like appendages flowing from its head, with a long, segmented tail that ends in a hand-like shape.

descriptions.fr: BANETTE génère de l'énergie pour jeter de puissantes malédictions en plantant des épingles dans son propre corps. Ce POKéMON était à l'origine une misérable poupée de chiffon jetée.
descriptions.de: BANETTE erzeugt Energie für starke Flüche, indem es Nadeln in seinen eigenen Körper steckt. Dieses POKéMON war ursprünglich eine bemitleidenswerte Plüschpuppe, die weggeworfen wurde.
descriptions.es: BANETTE genera energía para lanzar fuertes maldiciones clavándose alfileres en su propio cuerpo. Este POKéMON era originalmente un lamentable muñeco de peluche que fue desechado.
descriptions.it: BANETTE genera energia per scagliare potenti maledizioni conficcando spilli nel proprio corpo. Questo POKéMON era originariamente una misera bambola di pezza gettata via.
descriptions.ja: BANETTEは自分の体にピンを刺すことで、強力な呪いをかけるためのエネルギーを生み出す。このポケモンは、もともとは捨てられたかわいそうなぬいぐるみが変化したものだ。
descriptions.ko: BANETTE은 자신의 몸에 핀을 꽂아 강력한 저주를 거는 에너지를 만들어낸다. 이 포켓몬은 원래 버려진 불쌍한 봉제인형이었다.

name: absol-mega
description: Every time ABSOL appears before people, it is followed by a disaster such as an earthquake or a tidal wave. As a result, it came to be known as the disaster POKéMON.
appearance: A quadrupedal, white, feline-like creature with a long, flowing white mane, a prominent scythe-like dark blue horn extending from its head, and large, feathered dark blue wings on its back, with a single crescent-shaped blade on its tail.

descriptions.fr: Chaque fois qu'ABSOL apparaît devant les gens, il est suivi par une catastrophe comme un tremblement de terre ou un raz-de-marée. En conséquence, il a été surnommé le POKéMON désastre.
descriptions.de: Jedes Mal, wenn ABSOL vor Menschen erscheint, folgt eine Katastrophe wie ein Erdbeben oder eine Flutwelle. Infolgedessen wurde es als Katastrophen-POKéMON bekannt.
descriptions.es: Cada vez que ABSOL aparece ante la gente, le sigue un desastre como un terremoto o un maremoto. Como resultado, llegó a ser conocido como el POKéMON desastre.
descriptions.it: Ogni volta che ABSOL appare davanti alle persone, è seguito da un disastro come un terremoto o un'onda anomala. Di conseguenza, è diventato noto come il POKéMON disastro.
descriptions.ja: ABSOLは人々の前に現れるたびに、地震や津波などの災害が起こるとされている。その結果、災害ポケモンとして知られるようになった。
descriptions.ko: ABSOL이 사람들 앞에 나타날 때마다 지진이나 해일 같은 재앙이 뒤따른다. 그 결과, 재앙 포켓몬으로 알려지게 되었다.

name: garchomp-mega
description: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.
appearance: This large bipedal dragon-like Pokemon is predominantly dark blue with a red underside and red scythe-like protrusions on its arms, a red star on its chest, two large red horn-like features on its head, and two smaller red horns on its lower jaw, all while sporting yellow eyes and a mouth full of sharp teeth.

descriptions.fr: Quand il replie son corps et déploie ses ailes, il ressemble à un avion à réaction. Il vole à la vitesse du son.
descriptions.de: Wenn es seinen Körper zusammenfaltet und seine Flügel ausbreitet, sieht es aus wie ein Düsenflugzeug. Es fliegt mit Schallgeschwindigkeit.
descriptions.es: Cuando pliega su cuerpo y extiende sus alas, parece un avión a reacción. Vuela a velocidad sónica.
descriptions.it: Quando ripiega il suo corpo ed estende le sue ali, sembra un jet. Vola a velocità sonica.
descriptions.ja: 体を折りたたみ、翼を広げるとジェット機のように見える。音速で飛ぶ。
descriptions.ko: 몸을 접고 날개를 펼치면 제트기처럼 보인다. 음속으로 비행한다.

name: lucario-mega
description: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.
appearance: This lean, bipedal, canine-like Pokemon has a blue upper body and arms, black legs and torso, cream-colored markings on its thighs and chest, two long black dreadlock-like appendages extending from its head, red eyes, a black snout, and prominent red spikes on its hands and chest.

descriptions.fr: Il a la capacité de percevoir les auras de toutes choses. Il comprend le langage humain.
descriptions.de: Es hat die Fähigkeit, die Auren aller Dinge zu spüren. Es versteht menschliche Sprache.
descriptions.es: Tiene la capacidad de sentir las auras de todas las cosas. Entiende el habla humana.
descriptions.it: Ha la capacità di percepire le aure di tutte le cose. Comprende il linguaggio umano.
descriptions.ja: あらゆるものの波動を感知する能力を持つ。人間の言葉を理解する。
descriptions.ko: 모든 것의 아우라를 감지하는 능력을 가졌다. 사람의 말을 이해한다.

name: abomasnow-mega
description: It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman.
appearance: This massive ape-like Pokemon is covered in shaggy white fur, features a large green tree-like growth on its back that supports two huge ice shards forming an X, has four prominent green leaves on its head, and possesses red eyes with a small black nose.

descriptions.fr: Il déclenche des blizzards dans les montagnes toujours ensevelies sous la neige. C'est l'abominable homme des neiges.
descriptions.de: Es peitscht Schneestürme in Bergen auf, die immer im Schnee begraben sind. Es ist der abscheuliche Schneemensch.
descriptions.es: Desencadena ventiscas en montañas que siempre están cubiertas de nieve. Es el abominable hombre de las nieves.
descriptions.it: Scatena bufere di neve sulle montagne sempre sepolte dalla neve. È l'abominevole uomo delle nevi.
descriptions.ja: いつも雪に埋もれている山で猛吹雪を巻き起こす。雪男そのものだ。
descriptions.ko: 항상 눈에 파묻힌 산에서 눈보라를 일으킨다. 설인 그 자체다.

name: floette-eternal
description: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.
appearance: This small, delicate humanoid Pokemon has white skin, a dark grey dress with a red stripe, black sleeves, black hair with a white cap-like feature, blue eyes, and holds a very large black flower with striking red petal tips and a yellow pistil.

descriptions.fr: Il voltige autour des champs de fleurs et prend soin des fleurs qui commencent à faner. Il extrait le pouvoir caché des fleurs pour combattre.
descriptions.de: Es flattert über Blumenfeldern umher und pflegt Blumen, die zu welken beginnen. Es zieht die verborgene Kraft der Blumen für den Kampf heraus.
descriptions.es: Aletea por los campos de flores y cuida de las que empiezan a marchitarse. Extrae el poder oculto de las flores para la batalla.
descriptions.it: Svolazza tra i campi di fiori e si prende cura dei fiori che iniziano ad appassire. Estrae il potere nascosto dei fiori per la battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 花畑を飛び回り、枯れ始めた花を世話する。花の隠された力を引き出して戦う。
descriptions.ko: 꽃밭을 날아다니며 시들기 시작한 꽃을 돌본다. 꽃의 숨겨진 힘을 끌어내 싸운다.

display_names.ja: えいえんのはなフラエッテ

name: latias-mega
description: LATIAS is highly sensitive to the emotions of people. If it senses any hostility, this POKéMON ruffles the feathers all over its body and cries shrilly to intimidate the foe.
appearance: This sleek, white avian-dragon Pokemon has large red wings, red streaks on its back and tail, a single prominent white horn on its forehead, red triangular ear-like fins, a light blue pentagonal marking on its chest, and light blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: LATIAS est très sensible aux émotions des gens. S'il perçoit une hostilité, ce POKéMON hérisse les plumes sur tout son corps et pousse un cri aigu pour intimider l'ennemi.
descriptions.de: LATIAS ist sehr empfindlich gegenüber den Emotionen von Menschen. Wenn es Feindseligkeit spürt, sträubt dieses POKéMON die Federn an seinem ganzen Körper und schreit schrill, um den Gegner einzuschüchtern.
descriptions.es: LATIAS es muy sensible a las emociones de las personas. Si detecta alguna hostilidad, este POKéMON eriza las plumas de todo su cuerpo y grita con agudeza para intimidar al enemigo.
descriptions.it: LATIAS è estremamente sensibile alle emozioni delle persone. Se percepisce ostilità, questo POKéMON arruffa le piume su tutto il corpo e grida stridulamente per intimidire il nemico.
descriptions.ja: LATIASは人々の感情にとても敏感だ。敵意を感じると、全身の羽毛を逆立てて甲高い声で叫び、相手を威嚇する。
descriptions.ko: LATIAS는 사람들의 감정에 매우 민감하다. 적대감을 감지하면 이 포켓몬은 온몸의 깃털을 세우고 날카로운 소리로 울부짖어 상대를 위협한다.

name: latios-mega
description: LATIOS has the ability to make its foe see an image of what it has seen or imagines in its head. This POKéMON is intelligent and understands human speech.
appearance: This sleek, white avian-dragon Pokemon has large blue wings, blue streaks on its back and tail, a single prominent white horn on its forehead, blue triangular ear-like fins, a light green pentagonal marking on its chest, and light green eyes.

descriptions.fr: Latios a la capacité de faire voir à son ennemi une image de ce qu'il a vu ou imagine dans sa tête. Ce Pokémon est intelligent et comprend le langage humain.
descriptions.de: Latios besitzt die Fähigkeit, seinem Gegner ein Bild dessen zu zeigen, was es gesehen oder sich vorgestellt hat. Dieses Pokémon ist intelligent und versteht menschliche Sprache.
descriptions.es: Latios puede hacer que su enemigo vea una imagen de lo que ha visto o imaginado. Este Pokémon es inteligente y entiende el habla humana.
descriptions.it: Latios ha la capacità di far vedere al nemico un'immagine di ciò che ha visto o che immagina nella sua mente. Questo Pokémon è intelligente e comprende il linguaggio umano.
descriptions.ja: ラティオスは 敵に 自分の 見たものや 想像したものを イメージとして見せる 能力を 持つ。 この ポケモンは 知的で 人間の 言葉を 理解する。
descriptions.ko: 라티오스는 적에게 자신이 보거나 상상한 것을 이미지로 보여주는 능력을 가졌다. 이 포켓몬은 지적이며 인간의 말을 이해한다.

name: swampert-mega
description: SWAMPERT is very strong. It has enough power to easily drag a boulder weighing more than a ton. This POKéMON also has powerful vision that lets it see even in murky water.
appearance: This bulky, bipedal, blue-grey amphibian Pokemon exhibits extremely muscular limbs with two large black fins on its forearms, a single prominent orange fin on its head, an orange tail fin, orange gills on its cheeks, and orange eyes with black pupils.

descriptions.fr: Laggron est très fort. Il a assez de puissance pour traîner facilement un rocher pesant plus d'une tonne. Ce Pokémon a aussi une vision puissante qui lui permet de voir même dans l'eau trouble.
descriptions.de: Sumpex ist sehr stark. Es besitzt genug Kraft, um mühelos einen tonnenschweren Felsen zu ziehen. Dieses Pokémon hat zudem ein scharfes Sehvermögen, das es ihm ermöglicht, selbst in trübem Wasser zu sehen.
descriptions.es: Swampert es muy fuerte. Tiene la fuerza suficiente para arrastrar fácilmente una roca de más de una tonelada. Este Pokémon también posee una visión potente que le permite ver incluso en aguas turbias.
descriptions.it: Swampert è molto forte. Ha abbastanza forza da trascinare facilmente un masso che pesa più di una tonnellata. Questo Pokémon ha anche una vista potente che gli permette di vedere anche nell'acqua torbida.
descriptions.ja: ラグラージは とても 強い。 1トンを 超える 岩を 簡単に 引きずるほどの 力を 持つ。 この ポケモンは 濁った 水の中も 見通せる 優れた 視力も 持つ。
descriptions.ko: 대짱이는 매우 강하다. 1톤이 넘는 바위를 쉽게 끌어당길 정도의 힘을 지녔다. 이 포켓몬은 흐린 물속에서도 볼 수 있는 강력한 시력도 가졌다.

name: sceptile-mega
description: The leaves growing on SCEPTILE’s body are very sharp edged. This POKéMON is very agile - it leaps all over the branches of trees and jumps on its foe from above or behind.
appearance: This lean, reptilian bipedal Pokemon is green with a yellow belly, red markings on its neck and chest, prominent leaf-like blades on its arms, a long green tail tipped with a Christmas tree-like structure adorned with red orbs, and yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: Les feuilles qui poussent sur le corps de Jungko sont très tranchantes. Ce Pokémon est très agile ; il bondit d'une branche à l'autre et saute sur son ennemi d'en haut ou par derrière.
descriptions.de: Die Blätter, die auf Gewaldros' Körper wachsen, sind sehr scharfkantig. Dieses Pokémon ist sehr wendig – es springt über die Äste der Bäume und greift seinen Gegner von oben oder hinten an.
descriptions.es: Las hojas que le crecen en el cuerpo a Sceptile tienen los bordes muy afilados. Este Pokémon es muy ágil: salta por las ramas de los árboles y ataca a su enemigo desde arriba o por detrás.
descriptions.it: Le foglie che crescono sul corpo di Sceptile sono molto affilate. Questo Pokémon è molto agile: salta tra i rami degli alberi e si avventa sul nemico dall'alto o da dietro.
descriptions.ja: ジュカインの 体に 生えている 葉っぱは とても 鋭い 切れ味を 持つ。 この ポケモンは とても 素早く 木の 枝から 枝へ 飛び移り 敵に 上や 後ろから 飛びかかる。
descriptions.ko: 나무킹의 몸에 자라는 잎은 가장자리가 매우 날카롭다. 이 포켓몬은 매우 민첩하여 나뭇가지 사이를 뛰어다니고 위나 뒤에서 적에게 뛰어든다.

name: sableye-mega
description: SABLEYE lead quiet lives deep inside caverns. They are feared, however, because these POKéMON are thought to steal the spirits of people when their eyes burn with a sinister glow in the darkness.
appearance: This small, purple goblin-like Pokemon is mostly hidden behind a massive, translucent red crystal shield with gold-colored facets, revealing large glowing red eyes, a red gem on its forehead, and a wide grin with sharp teeth.

descriptions.fr: Ténéfix mène une vie tranquille au fond des cavernes. Il est toutefois craint, car on dit que ce Pokémon dérobe les esprits des gens quand ses yeux brillent d'une lueur sinistre dans l'obscurité.
descriptions.de: Zobiris leben ein ruhiges Leben tief in Höhlen. Sie werden jedoch gefürchtet, da man glaubt, dass diese Pokémon die Seelen von Menschen stehlen, wenn ihre Augen in der Dunkelheit unheimlich leuchten.
descriptions.es: Sableye lleva una vida tranquila en lo más profundo de las cavernas. No obstante, se le teme porque se cree que este Pokémon roba las almas de la gente cuando sus ojos arden con un brillo siniestro en la oscuridad.
descriptions.it: Sableye conduce una vita tranquilla in fondo alle caverne. È tuttavia temuto, poiché si pensa che questo Pokémon rubi gli spiriti della gente quando i suoi occhi bruciano con un bagliore sinistro nell'oscurità.
descriptions.ja: ヤミラミは 洞窟の 奥深くで 静かに 暮らしている。 しかし 暗闇で 目が 不気味な 光を 発すると 人間の 魂を 奪い去ると 恐れられている。
descriptions.ko: 깜까미는 동굴 깊숙한 곳에서 조용히 생활한다. 하지만 어둠 속에서 눈이 섬뜩하게 빛날 때 사람의 영혼을 훔쳐간다고 알려져 두려워하고 있다.

name: altaria-mega
description: ALTARIA dances and wheels through the sky among billowing, cotton-like clouds. By singing melodies in its crystal-clear voice, this POKéMON makes its listeners experience dreamy wonderment.
appearance: This graceful bird-like Pokemon is almost entirely enveloped in massive, soft white clouds of down, from which a small blue head with red eyes and a tiny yellow beak emerges, complemented by two long feathery white tendrils behind its head.

descriptions.fr: Altaria danse et virevolte dans le ciel parmi les nuages cotonneux et ondulants. En chantant des mélodies de sa voix cristalline, ce Pokémon fait ressentir à ses auditeurs un émerveillement onirique.
descriptions.de: Altaria tanzt und wirbelt am Himmel zwischen aufgewirbelten, baumwollartigen Wolken. Indem es Melodien mit seiner glasklaren Stimme singt, versetzt dieses Pokémon seine Zuhörer in traumhafte Verzückung.
descriptions.es: Altaria danza y revolotea por el cielo entre nubes algodonosas y ondeantes. Cantando melodías con su voz cristalina, este Pokémon hace que sus oyentes experimenten un asombro de ensueño.
descriptions.it: Altaria danza e volteggia nel cielo tra nuvole fluttuanti e simili al cotone. Cantando melodie con la sua voce cristallina, questo Pokémon fa provare ai suoi ascoltatori una meraviglia onirica.
descriptions.ja: チルタリスは 湧き上がる 綿雲の 中を 空中で 舞い踊る。 透き通るような 歌声で メロディを 歌い 聞く者を 夢のような 不思議な 感動へと いざなう。
descriptions.ko: 파비코리는 솟아오르는 솜털 같은 구름 속을 하늘에서 춤추며 돌고 돈다. 맑고 투명한 목소리로 멜로디를 노래하여 듣는 사람을 꿈같은 신비로움에 빠져들게 한다.

name: gallade-mega
description: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.
appearance: This white humanoid knight-like Pokemon features a green helmet-like head with a red crest, black lower body and legs, green chest armor, large red blade-like extensions on its elbows, a red spike on its chest, and light blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Maître de courtoisie et d'escrime, il combat avec les lames extensibles de ses coudes.
descriptions.de: Als Meister der Höflichkeit und des Schwertkampfes kämpft es mit ausfahrbaren Schwertern an seinen Ellbogen.
descriptions.es: Maestro de la cortesía y la esgrima, lucha usando espadas extensibles en sus codos.
descriptions.it: Maestro di cortesia e spadaccino, combatte usando spade estensibili dai gomiti.
descriptions.ja: 礼儀正しく 剣術の 達人。 肘から 伸びる 剣で 戦う。
descriptions.ko: 예의 바른 검술의 달인. 팔꿈치에서 늘어나는 검으로 싸운다.

name: audino-mega
description: It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.
appearance: This fluffy white rabbit-like Pokemon has a large pink bow on its head, two very long white ears with pink tips, a soft pink neck collar, two large gold-tipped earfeelers, and two white wing-like appendages on its back with pink undersides and gold markings, all while displaying light blue eyes and a pink nose.

descriptions.fr: Il touche les autres avec les capteurs de ses oreilles, utilisant le son de leurs battements de cœur pour déterminer leurs émotions.
descriptions.de: Es berührt andere mit den Fühlern an seinen Ohren und erkennt anhand des Herzschlags, wie sie sich fühlen.
descriptions.es: Toca a los demás con los sensores de sus orejas, usando el sonido de sus latidos para saber cómo se sienten.
descriptions.it: Tocca gli altri con le antenne sulle orecchie, usando il suono del loro battito cardiaco per capire come si sentono.
descriptions.ja: 耳の 触角で 相手に 触れ 心臓の 音で 相手の 気持ちが わかる。
descriptions.ko: 귀의 촉각으로 상대를 만져 심장 소리로 상대의 기분을 안다.

name: sharpedo-mega
description: Nicknamed “the bully of the sea,” SHARPEDO is widely feared. Its cruel fangs grow back immediately if they snap off. Just one of these POKéMON can thoroughly tear apart a supertanker.
appearance: This dark blue torpedo-shaped shark Pokemon has a jagged white belly, red markings around its massive mouth and on its dorsal fin, four prominent yellow spikes on its nose, two yellow spikes above each black eye, and large yellow gill markings.

descriptions.fr: Surnommé « le tyran des mers », Sharpedo est très craint. Ses crocs cruels repoussent immédiatement s'ils se cassent. Un seul de ces Pokémon peut déchirer entièrement un superpétrolier.
descriptions.de: Als „Tyrann der Meere“ bekannt, ist Tohaido weithin gefürchtet. Seine grausamen Reißzähne wachsen sofort nach, falls sie abbrechen. Nur ein einziges dieser Pokémon kann einen Supertanker vollständig zerreißen.
descriptions.es: Apodado «el matón del mar», Sharpedo es muy temido. Sus crueles colmillos vuelven a crecer inmediatamente si se rompen. Solo uno de estos Pokémon puede destrozar por completo un superpetrolero.
descriptions.it: Soprannominato il “bullo dei mari”, Sharpedo è molto temuto. Le sue zanne crudeli ricrescono immediatamente se si spezzano. Solo uno di questi Pokémon può smembrare completamente una superpetroliera.
descriptions.ja: 「海のギャング」の 異名を持つ サメハダーは 広く 恐れられている。 抜け落ちた 凶悪な 牙は すぐに 生え揃う。 1匹で スーパータンカーを バラバラに してしまう。
descriptions.ko: '바다의 폭군'이라는 별명을 가진 샤크니아는 널리 두려워진다. 잔혹한 송곳니는 부러져도 바로 다시 자라난다. 이 포켓몬 한 마리로도 초대형 유조선을 완전히 파괴할 수 있다.

name: slowbro-mega
description: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.
appearance: This pink bipedal Pokemon has its entire lower body encased by a massive, grey Shellder with a spiral pattern and black eyes, leaving only its pink upper body and head with red eyes, a small snout, and tiny mouth visible.

descriptions.fr: Le Kokiyas accroché à la queue de Ramoloss se nourrirait des restes de son hôte.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, der Muschas, der sich an Flegmon's Schwanz festklammert, ernähre sich von den Resten seines Wirtes.
descriptions.es: Se dice que el Shellder que se ha enganchado a la cola de Slowpoke se alimenta de los restos de su anfitrión.
descriptions.it: Si dice che lo Shellder attaccato alla coda di Slowpoke si nutra degli avanzi del suo ospite.
descriptions.ja: ヤドンに 噛みついている シェルダーは 宿主の 食べ残しを 食べていると いわれる。
descriptions.ko: 야돈의 꼬리에 붙어 있는 셀러는 숙주의 남은 먹이를 먹는다고 알려져 있다.

name: steelix-mega
description: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.
appearance: This enormous grey serpentine Pokemon is composed of metallic segments, covered in numerous crystalline yellow spikes, features two prominent yellow jaw spikes, blue eyes, and is encircled by a ring of small floating blue rock shards around its neck.

descriptions.fr: On pense que son corps s'est transformé suite à l'accumulation interne de fer due à l'ingestion de terre.
descriptions.de: Man nimmt an, sein Körper habe sich durch die interne Ansammlung von Eisen, das es beim Verschlucken von Erde aufnahm, verwandelt.
descriptions.es: Se cree que su cuerpo se transformó como resultado de la acumulación interna de hierro al tragar tierra.
descriptions.it: Si pensa che il suo corpo si sia trasformato a causa dell'accumulo interno di ferro dovuto all'ingestione di terra.
descriptions.ja: 土を 飲み込むことで 内部に 鉄が 蓄積し 体が 変質したと 考えられている。
descriptions.ko: 흙을 삼켜 체내에 철이 축적되어 몸이 변질된 것으로 추정된다.

name: pidgeot-mega
description: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP.
appearance: This large brown bird Pokemon features a cream belly and leg feathers, long red tail feathers, a massive yellow crest with red tips extending backwards from its head, and possesses sharp red eyes and a short yellow beak.

descriptions.fr: Lors de la chasse, il rase la surface de l'eau à grande vitesse pour attraper des proies imprudentes comme MAGIKARP.
descriptions.de: Bei der Jagd gleitet es mit hoher Geschwindigkeit über die Wasseroberfläche, um unvorsichtige Beute wie MAGIKARP zu erbeuten.
descriptions.es: Cuando caza, roza la superficie del agua a gran velocidad para atrapar presas desprevenidas como MAGIKARP.
descriptions.it: Durante la caccia, sfiora la superficie dell'acqua ad alta velocità per catturare prede incaute come MAGIKARP.
descriptions.ja: 狩りの際、水面を高速で滑空し、コイキングなどの不用心な獲物を捕らえます。
descriptions.ko: 사냥할 때 수면을 고속으로 스쳐 지나가 잉어킹 같은 부주의한 먹이를 낚아챕니다。

name: glalie-mega
description: GLALIE has a body made of rock, which it hardens with an armor of ice. This POKéMON has the ability to freeze moisture in the atmosphere into any shape it desires.
appearance: This large dark grey spherical Pokemon is covered in sharp ice spikes, characterized by a massive lower jaw of ice with sharp teeth, two prominent ice horns on its head, a large yellow 'scar' marking across its left red eye, and another red eye on the right.

descriptions.fr: ONIGLALI possède un corps rocheux qu'il durcit avec une armure de glace. Ce POKÉMON a la capacité de geler l'humidité de l'atmosphère sous n'importe quelle forme.
descriptions.de: FIRNONTOR besitzt einen Körper aus Fels, den es mit einer Eisrüstung verhärtet. Dieses POKÉMON hat die Fähigkeit, Feuchtigkeit in der Atmosphäre in jede gewünschte Form zu gefrieren.
descriptions.es: GLALIE tiene un cuerpo de roca que endurece con una armadura de hielo. Este POKÉMON tiene la habilidad de congelar la humedad de la atmósfera en cualquier forma que desee.
descriptions.it: GLALIE ha un corpo di roccia che indurisce con un'armatura di ghiaccio. Questo POKÉMON ha la capacità di congelare l'umidità dell'atmosfera in qualsiasi forma desideri.
descriptions.ja: オニゴーリは岩でできた体を氷の装甲で固める。このポケモンは、大気中の水分をどんな形にでも凍らせる能力を持っている。
descriptions.ko: 얼음귀신은 바위로 된 몸을 얼음 갑옷으로 단단하게 만든다. 이 포켓몬은 대기 중의 습기를 원하는 어떤 형태로든 얼릴 수 있는 능력을 가지고 있다。

name: diancie-mega
description: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.
appearance: This small, white crystal humanoid Pokemon resembles a princess with a pink gown, a large pink diamond on its head, two large floating red crystal ribbons on its back, a small black skirt, a tiara-like arrangement of small white crystals, and pink eyes.

descriptions.fr: Une transformation soudaine de Strassie, son corps rose et scintillant est dit être la plus belle vue du monde entier.
descriptions.de: Eine plötzliche Transformation von AMAGARGA, sein rosafarbener, schimmernder Körper gilt als der schönste Anblick der ganzen Welt.
descriptions.es: Una transformación repentina de Carbink, su cuerpo rosado y brillante es considerado la visión más hermosa del mundo entero.
descriptions.it: Una trasformazione improvvisa di Carbink, il suo corpo rosa e scintillante è considerato la vista più bella del mondo intero.
descriptions.ja: メレシーが突然変異したもので、そのピンク色の輝く体は世界で最も美しい光景だと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 멜리시가 갑자기 변형된 것으로, 분홍빛으로 반짝이는 몸은 세상에서 가장 아름다운 광경이라고 전해진다。

name: metagross-mega
description: METAGROSS has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This POKéMON can float in the air by tucking in its four legs.
appearance: This immense blue metallic quad-legged robotic Pokemon, formed from four Metang, features four long grey metallic legs ending in sharp points, a large red 'X' marking across its face, four red eyes, a prominent yellow orb on its forehead, and a yellow spike protruding from its lower jaw.

descriptions.fr: MÉTALOSSE possède quatre cerveaux au total. Combinés, les quatre cerveaux peuvent résoudre des calculs difficiles plus rapidement qu'un superordinateur. Ce POKÉMON peut flotter dans les airs en repliant ses quatre pattes.
descriptions.de: METAGROSS hat insgesamt vier Gehirne. Zusammen können die vier Gehirne schwierige Berechnungen schneller als ein Supercomputer lösen. Dieses POKÉMON kann in der Luft schweben, indem es seine vier Beine einzieht.
descriptions.es: METAGROSS tiene un total de cuatro cerebros. Combinados, los cuatro cerebros pueden realizar cálculos difíciles más rápido que una supercomputadora. Este POKÉMON puede flotar en el aire recogiendo sus cuatro patas.
descriptions.it: METAGROSS ha quattro cervelli in totale. Combinati, i quattro cervelli possono risolvere calcoli difficili più velocemente di un supercomputer. Questo POKÉMON può fluttuare nell'aria ripiegando le sue quattro zampe.
descriptions.ja: メタグロスは合計4つの脳を持つ。それらを組み合わせることで、4つの脳はスーパーコンピューターよりも速く難しい計算をこなすことができる。このポケモンは4本の足をたたむことで空中に浮かぶことができる。
descriptions.ko: 메타그로스는 총 4개의 뇌를 가지고 있다. 4개의 뇌가 합쳐지면 슈퍼컴퓨터보다 빠르게 어려운 계산을 처리할 수 있다. 이 포켓몬은 4개의 다리를 접어 공중에 뜰 수 있다。

name: kyogre-primal
description: KYOGRE has the power to create massive rain clouds that cover the entire sky and bring about torrential downpours. This POKéMON saved people who were suffering from droughts.
appearance: This colossal dark blue whale-like Pokemon features luminous light blue lines patterned across its skin, large glowing yellow orbs on its fins and tail, a distinct red glowing symbol on its forehead, and bright yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: KYOGRE a le pouvoir de créer d'énormes nuages de pluie qui couvrent le ciel entier et provoquent des pluies torrentielles. Ce POKÉMON a sauvé des gens qui souffraient de sécheresses.
descriptions.de: KYOGRE hat die Kraft, gewaltige Regenwolken zu erschaffen, die den gesamten Himmel bedecken und sintflutartige Regenfälle hervorrufen. Dieses POKÉMON rettete Menschen, die unter Dürren litten.
descriptions.es: KYOGRE tiene el poder de crear enormes nubes de lluvia que cubren todo el cielo y provocan aguaceros torrenciales. Este POKÉMON salvó a personas que sufrían de sequías.
descriptions.it: KYOGRE ha il potere di creare enormi nuvole di pioggia che coprono l'intero cielo e causano acquazzoni torrenziali. Questo POKÉMON ha salvato persone che soffrivano di siccità.
descriptions.ja: カイオーガは空全体を覆う巨大な雨雲を作り、土砂降りの雨を降らせる力を持つ。このポケモンは干ばつに苦しむ人々を救った。
descriptions.ko: 가이오가는 하늘 전체를 뒤덮는 거대한 비구름을 만들어 폭우를 내리게 하는 힘을 가지고 있다. 이 포켓몬은 가뭄으로 고통받는 사람들을 구했다。

name: groudon-primal
description: GROUDON has long been described in  mythology as the POKéMON that raised lands and expanded continents. This POKéMON took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with KYOGRE.
appearance: This immense red dinosaur-like quadrupedal Pokemon has black markings on its underside, glowing yellow lines patterned across its skin, large black claws, distinct orange glowing magma-like markings on its body, yellow eyes, and black stripes on its face.

descriptions.fr: GROUDON a longtemps été décrit dans la mythologie comme le POKÉMON qui a élevé les terres et étendu les continents. Ce POKÉMON s'est endormi après une bataille cataclysmique avec KYOGRE.
descriptions.de: GROUDON wurde in der Mythologie lange als das POKÉMON beschrieben, das Länder erhob und Kontinente erweiterte. Dieses POKÉMON fiel nach einem katastrophalen Kampf mit KYOGRE in Schlaf.
descriptions.es: GROUDON ha sido descrito durante mucho tiempo en la mitología como el POKÉMON que elevó las tierras y expandió los continentes. Este POKÉMON se durmió después de una batalla catacísmica con KYOGRE.
descriptions.it: GROUDON è stato a lungo descritto nella mitologia come il POKÉMON che ha innalzato le terre e ampliato i continenti. Questo POKÉMON si addormentò dopo una battaglia cataclismatica con KYOGRE.
descriptions.ja: グラードンは神話において、大地を隆起させ大陸を広げたポケモンとして長く語られてきた。このポケモンはカイオーガとの壊滅的な戦いの後、眠りについた。
descriptions.ko: 그란돈은 신화에서 오랫동안 대지를 융기시키고 대륙을 확장시킨 포켓몬으로 묘사되어 왔다. 이 포켓몬은 가이오가와의 파괴적인 전투 후에 잠들었다。

name: rayquaza-mega
description: RAYQUAZA lived for hundreds of millions of years in the earth’s ozone layer,  never descending to the ground. This POKéMON appears to feed on water and particles in the atmosphere.
appearance: This extraordinarily long green serpentine dragon Pokemon is adorned with black markings, possesses two long gold glowing tendrils originating from its jaw and extending backwards, golden crescent shapes on its head and body, and has piercing red eyes.

descriptions.fr: RAYQUAZA a vécu pendant des centaines de millions d'années dans la couche d'ozone de la Terre, ne descendant jamais au sol. Ce POKÉMON semble se nourrir d'eau et de particules dans l'atmosphère.
descriptions.de: RAYQUAZA lebte Hunderte Millionen Jahre in der Ozonschicht der Erde und stieg nie zum Boden herab. Dieses POKÉMON scheint sich von Wasser und Partikeln in der Atmosphäre zu ernähren.
descriptions.es: RAYQUAZA vivió durante cientos de millones de años en la capa de ozono de la Tierra, sin descender nunca al suelo. Este POKÉMON parece alimentarse de agua y partículas en la atmósfera.
descriptions.it: RAYQUAZA ha vissuto per centinaia di milioni di anni nello strato di ozono terrestre, non scendendo mai a terra. Questo POKÉMON sembra nutrirsi di acqua e particelle nell'atmosfera.
descriptions.ja: レックウザは何億年もの間、地球のオゾン層に生息し、地上に降り立つことはなかった。このポケモンは、大気中の水や粒子を食べているようだ。
descriptions.ko: 레쿠쟈는 수억 년 동안 지구의 오존층에서 살았으며, 결코 지상으로 내려오지 않았다. 이 포켓몬은 대기 중의 물과 입자를 먹고 사는 것으로 보인다。

name: pikachu-rock-star
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a fluffy red wig with a gold star hairpin, a black studded vest, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a black lightning bolt tail.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKÉMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKÉMON versammeln, kann sich ihre Elektrizität aufbauen und Gewitterstürme verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKÉMON se reúnen, su electricidad podría acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando diversi di questi POKÉMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e causare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: これらのポケモンが何匹か集まると、電気がたまり雷雨を引き起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬들이 여럿 모이면 전기가 축적되어 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다。

display_names.ja: ハードロック・ピカチュウ

name: pikachu-belle
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a light blue formal gown with white frills, a matching light blue bow on its head, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a heart-shaped tail.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKÉMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKÉMON versammeln, kann sich ihre Elektrizität aufbauen und Gewitterstürme verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKÉMON se reúnen, su electricidad podría acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando diversi di questi POKÉMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e causare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: これらのポケモンが何匹か集まると、電気がたまり雷雨を引き起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬들이 여럿 모이면 전기가 축적되어 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다。

display_names.ja: アイドル・ピカチュウ

name: pikachu-pop-star
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a pink ruffled dress, a matching pink bow with a microphone on its head, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a star-shaped tail tip.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKÉMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKÉMON versammeln, kann sich ihre Elektrizität aufbauen und Gewitterstürme verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKÉMON se reúnen, su electricidad podría acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando diversi di questi POKÉMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e causare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: これらのポケモンが何匹か集まると、電気がたまり雷雨を引き起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬들이 여럿 모이면 전기가 축적되어 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다。

display_names.ja: アイドル・ピカチュウ

name: pikachu-phd
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a black academic gown and a grey mortarboard cap with a yellow tassel, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a lightning bolt tail.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn mehrere dieser POKéMON zusammenkommen, kann sich ihre Elektrizität aufbauen und Gewitter verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se agrupan, su electricidad puede acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando diversi di questi POKéMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e causare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: これらのポケモンが何匹か集まると、その電気が蓄積され、雷雨を引き起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬 여러 마리가 모이면 전기가 축적되어 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다.

display_names.ja: ドクター・ピカチュウ

name: pikachu-libre
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent wears a blue luchador mask with red trim and white eye markings, a red and blue wrestling costume with white accents, and has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a lightning bolt tail.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn mehrere dieser POKéMON zusammenkommen, kann sich ihre Elektrizität aufbauen und Gewitter verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se agrupan, su electricidad puede acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando diversi di questi POKéMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e causare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: これらのポケモンが何匹か集まると、その電気が蓄積され、雷雨を引き起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬 여러 마리가 모이면 전기가 축적되어 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다.

display_names.ja: マスクド・ピカチュウ

name: pikachu-cosplay
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow rodent has brown ear tips, brown back stripes, black eyes, small red cheek pouches, and a distinct black heart-shaped tip at the end of its tail, indicating its nature as a dress-up performer.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn mehrere dieser POKéMON zusammenkommen, kann sich ihre Elektrizität aufbauen und Gewitter verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se agrupan, su electricidad puede acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando diversi di questi POKéMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e causare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: これらのポケモンが何匹か集まると、その電気が蓄積され、雷雨を引き起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬 여러 마리가 모이면 전기가 축적되어 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다.

name: hoopa-unbound
description: This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space.
appearance: This massive purple humanoid genie-like Pokemon has six powerful arms adorned with gold bracelets, a black lower torso and legs, a gold ring around its waist, a long black ponytail-like feature, dark blue eyes, a large pink jewel on its forehead, and several large gold rings floating around its body, displaying a wide menacing mouth with teeth.

descriptions.fr: Ce trouble-fête envoie tout et n'importe quoi vers des endroits lointains grâce à son anneau qui peut déformer l'espace.
descriptions.de: Dieser Unruhestifter verschickt mit seinem Raum verzerrenden Ring alles Mögliche an weit entfernte Orte.
descriptions.es: Este gamberro envía cualquier cosa a lugares lejanos usando su aro, el cual puede distorsionar el espacio.
descriptions.it: Questo monello invia qualsiasi cosa in luoghi lontani usando il suo anello, che può deformare lo spazio.
descriptions.ja: このいたずら者は、空間を歪めることのできる輪を使って、あらゆるものを遠く離れた場所に送り出す。
descriptions.ko: 이 말썽꾸러기는 공간을 왜곡할 수 있는 고리를 사용해 온갖 것을 먼 곳으로 날려 보낸다.

name: camerupt-mega
description: CAMERUPT has a volcano inside its body. Magma of 18,000 degrees F courses through its body. Occasionally, the humps on this POKéMON’s back erupt, spewing the superheated magma.
appearance: This large red camel-like quadrupedal Pokemon has a black underside and legs, its two dorsal humps replaced by a single large black volcano with orange magma flowing from the top, large grey rock-like growths on its back and knees, and a black face with red eyes.

descriptions.fr: CAMERUPT a un volcan dans son corps. Du magma à 18 000 degrés F traverse son corps. Occasionnellement, les bosses sur le dos de ce POKéMON entrent en éruption, crachant le magma surchauffé.
descriptions.de: CAMERUPT hat einen Vulkan in seinem Körper. 18.000 Grad F heißes Magma strömt durch seinen Körper. Gelegentlich brechen die Höcker auf dem Rücken dieses POKéMONs aus und speien das überhitzte Magma.
descriptions.es: CAMERUPT tiene un volcán dentro de su cuerpo. Magma a 18.000 grados F recorre su cuerpo. Ocasionalmente, las jorobas en la espalda de este POKéMON entran en erupción, expulsando el magma sobrecalentado.
descriptions.it: CAMERUPT ha un vulcano all'interno del suo corpo. Magma a 18.000 gradi F scorre attraverso il suo corpo. Occasionalmente, le gobbe sul dorso di questo POKéMON eruttano, sputando il magma surriscaldato.
descriptions.ja: バクーダは体内に火山を持つ。18,000°F（約9,982℃）のマグマが体内を駆け巡っている。時折、このポケモンの背中のコブが噴火し、超高温のマグマを噴き出す。
descriptions.ko: 폭타는 몸 안에 화산을 지니고 있다. 18,000F도(약 9,982℃)의 마그마가 몸속을 흐른다. 이따금 이 포켓몬의 등 혹에서 폭발이 일어나 초고열 마그마를 뿜어낸다.

name: lopunny-mega
description: An extremely cautious Pokémon. It cloaks its body with its fluffy ear fur when it senses danger.
appearance: A slender, bipedal, rabbit-like Pokemon with brown fur, long cream-colored ears tipped with pink fluff, a large cream-colored ruff around its neck, and long dark brown ear-like tufts extending from its hips to its ankles, ending in pink puffs; it has large red eyes and a small nose.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON extrêmement prudent. Il enveloppe son corps de la fourrure de ses oreilles lorsqu'il sent un danger.
descriptions.de: Ein extrem vorsichtiges Pokémon. Es hüllt seinen Körper mit seinem flauschigen Ohrfell ein, wenn es Gefahr wittert.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON extremadamente cauto. Cubre su cuerpo con el pelaje de sus orejas cuando siente peligro.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON estremamente cauto. Riveste il suo corpo con la pelliccia soffice delle sue orecchie quando avverte un pericolo.
descriptions.ja: 非常に用心深いポケモン。危険を感じると、ふわふわの耳の毛で体を覆う。
descriptions.ko: 매우 신중한 포켓몬. 위험을 감지하면 복슬복슬한 귀의 털로 몸을 감싼다.

name: salamence-mega
description: SALAMENCE came about as a result of a strong, long-held dream of growing wings. It is said that this powerful desire triggered a sudden mutation in this POKéMON’s cells, causing it to sprout its magnificent wings.
appearance: A massive, quadrupedal blue dragon whose large, crescent-shaped red wings have fused into an armored shell on its back with a white indentation, possessing a white belly, a pointed snout, a small mouth, and two short horns on its head.

descriptions.fr: DRATTAK est né du désir puissant et persistant de faire pousser des ailes. On dit que ce désir ardent a déclenché une mutation soudaine dans les cellules de ce POKéMON, lui faisant pousser de magnifiques ailes.
descriptions.de: BRUTALANDA entstand aus einem starken, lang gehegten Traum, Flügel zu entwickeln. Man sagt, dass dieser mächtige Wunsch eine plötzliche Mutation in den Zellen dieses POKéMONs auslöste, wodurch ihm prächtige Flügel wuchsen.
descriptions.es: SALAMENCE surgió como resultado de un fuerte y arraigado sueño de desarrollar alas. Se dice que este poderoso deseo provocó una mutación repentina en las células de este POKéMON, haciendo que le brotaran sus magníficas alas.
descriptions.it: SALAMENCE è nato da un forte e a lungo coltivato sogno di mettere ali. Si dice che questo potente desiderio abbia innescato una mutazione improvvisa nelle cellule di questo POKéMON, facendogli spuntare le sue magnifiche ali.
descriptions.ja: ボーマンダは、強く長く抱き続けた「翼を生やしたい」という夢の結果として生まれた。この強力な願望が、このポケモンの細胞に突然変異を引き起こし、見事な翼を生やしたと言われている。
descriptions.ko: 보만다는 오랫동안 강하게 날개를 갖고 싶다는 꿈을 꾼 결과 태어났다. 이 강력한 염원이 포켓몬의 세포에 돌연변이를 일으켜 멋진 날개를 돋게 했다고 전해진다.

name: beedrill-mega
description: It has three poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly.
appearance: An insectoid Pokemon with a yellow and black striped body, large, sharp dark brown stingers replacing its forearms and on its tail, and four narrow, clear wings on its back; it has red eyes and a black, pointed mouthpart.

descriptions.fr: Il possède trois dards empoisonnés sur ses pattes avant et sa queue. Ils sont utilisés pour poignarder son ennemi à plusieurs reprises.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt drei giftige Stachel an seinen Vorderbeinen und seinem Schwanz. Diese werden eingesetzt, um seinen Gegner wiederholt zu stechen.
descriptions.es: Tiene tres aguijones venenosos en sus patas delanteras y en su cola. Los usa para apuñalar a su enemigo repetidamente.
descriptions.it: Ha tre pungiglioni velenosi sulle zampe anteriori e sulla coda. Vengono usati per trafiggere ripetutamente il nemico.
descriptions.ja: 前脚と尻尾に3本の毒針を持つ。これらを使い、敵を繰り返し突き刺す。
descriptions.ko: 앞다리와 꼬리에 3개의 독침을 가지고 있다. 이것들을 이용해 적을 반복적으로 찌른다.

name: rattata-alola
description: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal rodent with primarily black fur, a lighter purple belly, and a prominent tuft of purple fur on its head; it has large ears, red eyes, a small pink nose, and visible fangs.

descriptions.fr: Mord tout ce qu'il attaque. Petit et très rapide, on le voit couramment dans de nombreux endroits.
descriptions.de: Es beißt alles, was es angreift. Klein und sehr schnell, ist es an vielen Orten ein gewöhnlicher Anblick.
descriptions.es: Muerde cualquier cosa cuando ataca. Pequeño y muy rápido, es una vista común en muchos lugares.
descriptions.it: Morde qualsiasi cosa quando attacca. Piccolo e molto veloce, è una vista comune in molti luoghi.
descriptions.ja: 攻撃する際は何でも噛みつく。小さく非常に素早いので、多くの場所でよく見られる。
descriptions.ko: 공격할 때는 무엇이든 물어뜯는다. 작고 매우 빨라서 많은 곳에서 흔히 볼 수 있다.

name: raticate-alola
description: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.
appearance: A stout, bipedal rodent with dark gray fur, a cream-colored belly, and large, rounded cheeks; it has wide, pink-lined ears, red eyes, a small pink nose, and two prominent yellow incisors protruding from its upper jaw.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise ses moustaches pour maintenir son équilibre. Apparemment, il ralentit si elles sont coupées.
descriptions.de: Es benutzt seine Barthaare, um das Gleichgewicht zu halten. Offenbar wird es langsamer, wenn sie abgeschnitten werden.
descriptions.es: Usa sus bigotes para mantener el equilibrio. Aparentemente, se ralentiza si se los cortan.
descriptions.it: Usa i suoi baffi per mantenere l'equilibrio. Apparentemente, rallenta se vengono tagliati.
descriptions.ja: ひげを使ってバランスを保つ。切られると動きが鈍くなるらしい。
descriptions.ko: 수염으로 균형을 잡는다. 잘리면 움직임이 느려지는 것 같다.

name: raticate-totem-alola
description: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.
appearance: A stout, bipedal rodent with dark gray fur, a cream-colored belly, and large, rounded cheeks; it has wide, pink-lined ears, red eyes, a small pink nose, and two prominent yellow incisors protruding from its upper jaw, appearing visually identical to standard Alolan Raticate.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise ses moustaches pour maintenir son équilibre. Apparemment, il ralentit si elles sont coupées.
descriptions.de: Es nutzt seine Schnurrhaare, um das Gleichgewicht zu halten. Werden sie abgeschnitten, wird es anscheinend langsamer.
descriptions.es: Usa sus bigotes para mantener el equilibrio. Al parecer, si se los cortan, se ralentiza.
descriptions.it: Usa i baffi per mantenere l'equilibrio. Sembra che, se gli vengono tagliati, rallenti.
descriptions.ja: ひげで バランスを とっている。 ひげを 切られると 動きが 鈍くなるらしい。
descriptions.ko: 수염으로 균형을 잡는다. 수염이 잘리면 움직임이 둔해지는 것 같다.

name: pikachu-original-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: A small, yellow, rodent-like creature with black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a jagged brown stripe on its back and tail, wearing a red and white baseball cap with a green symbol; it has a small black nose and mouth.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKéMON versammeln, kann ihre Elektrizität Gewitterstürme verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se juntan, su electricidad podría acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando più di questi POKéMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e provocare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: 何匹もの ポケモンが 集まると その 電気は 溜まって 雷雲を 作ることがある。
descriptions.ko: 여러 마리의 포켓몬이 모이면 그들의 전기가 모여 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다.

display_names.ja: ピカチュウ (オリジナルキャップ)

appearance: A small, yellow, rodent-like creature with black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a jagged brown stripe on its back and tail, wearing a white and green baseball cap with a black symbol; it has a small black nose and mouth.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKéMON versammeln, kann ihre Elektrizität Gewitterstürme verursachen.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKéMON versammeln, kann ihre Elektrizität Gewitterstürme verursachen.
