display_names.ja: ピカチュウ カロスキャップ

name: pikachu-alola-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: A small, yellow, rodent-like creature with black-tipped ears, red cheek pouches, and a jagged brown stripe on its back and tail, wearing a white baseball cap with a yellow bill and a large black stripe on the front; it has a small black nose and mouth.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKéMON versammeln, kann ihre Elektrizität Gewitterstürme verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se juntan, su electricidad podría acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando più di questi POKéMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e provocare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: 何匹もの ポケモンが 集まると その 電気は 溜まって 雷雲を 作ることがある。
descriptions.ko: 여러 마리의 포켓몬이 모이면 그들의 전기가 모여 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다.

display_names.ja: ピカチュウ アローラキャップ

name: raichu-alola
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
appearance: A bipedal, light brown rodent with a white belly, large light blue eyes, and long, pointed ears that are white on the inside and tipped with brown; its tail is yellow and ends in a large, rounded, flat disc, and it has a small black nose and mouth.

descriptions.fr: Sa longue queue lui sert de para-foudre pour se protéger de sa propre puissance à haute tension.
descriptions.de: Sein langer Schweif dient als Erdung, um sich vor seiner eigenen Hochspannung zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Su larga cola le sirve de toma de tierra para protegerse de su propia descarga de alta tensión.
descriptions.it: La sua lunga coda serve da messa a terra per proteggersi dalla sua stessa alta tensione.
descriptions.ja: 長い 尻尾は アースの 役目を する。 自らの 高圧な 電気から 身を 守るのだ。
descriptions.ko: 긴 꼬리는 접지 역할을 하여 자신의 고전압 파워로부터 몸을 보호한다.

name: sandshrew-alola
description: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.
appearance: A small, bipedal, light blue armadillo-like Pokemon covered in icy-blue plates, with a white belly and white claws; it has small black eyes and no visible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il creuse de profonds tunnels dans les zones arides et éloignées de l'eau. Il ne sort que pour chasser sa nourriture.
descriptions.de: Es gräbt tiefe Gänge in trockenen, wasserarmen Gebieten. Nur zur Nahrungssuche kommt es an die Oberfläche.
descriptions.es: Excava profundas galerías subterráneas en zonas áridas y lejos del agua. Solo emerge para cazar.
descriptions.it: Scava profonde gallerie sotterranee in luoghi aridi e lontani dall'acqua. Emerge solo per cacciare.
descriptions.ja: 水気の ない 乾燥した 大地に 深く 潜っている。 エサを 捕るときだけ 姿を 現す。
descriptions.ko: 물기 없는 건조한 대지에 깊이 숨어 있다. 먹이를 잡을 때만 모습을 드러낸다.

name: sandslash-alola
description: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.
appearance: A bipedal, light blue armadillo-like Pokemon covered in large, sharp icy-blue spines on its back and head, with a white belly, white claws, and a single large horn on its forehead; it has small black eyes and no visible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il se roule en boule hérissée de piquants lorsqu'il est menacé. Il peut rouler ainsi pour attaquer ou s'échapper.
descriptions.de: Bei Gefahr rollt es sich zu einer stacheligen Kugel zusammen. In diesem Zustand kann es rollend angreifen oder fliehen.
descriptions.es: Se enrolla formando una bola de pinchos cuando se siente amenazado. Puede rodar así para atacar o escapar.
descriptions.it: Quando è minacciato, si appallottola in una sfera spinosa. Può rotolare in questa forma per attaccare o fuggire.
descriptions.ja: 危険が 迫ると 針の ボールに 丸まる。 そのまま 転がって 攻撃や 逃走を する。
descriptions.ko: 위험이 다가오면 가시가 돋은 공처럼 몸을 웅크린다. 그 상태로 굴러서 공격하거나 도망친다.

name: vulpix-alola
description: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal fox with white fur, a light blue body, six white fluffy tails, and a prominent light blue forelock on its head; it has large blue eyes, a tiny black nose, and a small mouth.

descriptions.fr: À la naissance, il n’a qu’une queue. Elle se divise par l’extrémité à mesure qu’il grandit.
descriptions.de: Bei der Geburt hat es nur einen Schweif. Dieser teilt sich mit zunehmendem Alter an der Spitze.
descriptions.es: Al nacer solo tiene una cola. Esta se va dividiendo por la punta a medida que crece.
descriptions.it: Alla nascita ha una sola coda. Questa si divide dalla punta man mano che il Pokémon cresce.
descriptions.ja: 生まれたときは　１本しか　ない　しっぽも　成長するにつれて　先端から　分かれていく。
descriptions.ko: 태어났을 때는 꼬리가 한 개밖에 없지만 성장할수록 끝부분부터 갈라진다.

name: ninetales-alola
description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.
appearance: An elegant, quadrupedal fox with slender, white fur, a light blue body, nine long, flowing white tails, and light blue accents on its ear tips and forelock; it has large blue eyes, a tiny black nose, and a small mouth.

descriptions.fr: Très intelligent et très rancunier. S’agripper à l’une de ses nombreuses queues peut provoquer une malédiction de 1 000 ans.
descriptions.de: Sehr klug und sehr rachsüchtig. Wer einen seiner vielen Schweife ergreift, kann einem 1000-jährigen Fluch zum Opfer fallen.
descriptions.es: Muy inteligente y muy vengativo. Agarrarse a una de sus muchas colas puede provocar una maldición de 1000 años.
descriptions.it: Molto intelligente e vendicativo. Afferrare una delle sue numerose code può costare una maledizione di 1000 anni.
descriptions.ja: 非常に賢く　執念深い。　数あるしっぽの　どれか１本でも　つかむと　１０００年の　呪いを　かけられる。
descriptions.ko: 매우 영리하고 끈질기다. 수많은 꼬리 중 단 한 개라도 잡으면 1000년 저주에 걸린다.

name: diglett-alola
description: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.
appearance: A small, cylindrical creature with a dark brown, metallic body and three prominent blonde hair-like strands on its head; it has a pink nose and two small eyes, but no visible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il vit à environ un mètre sous terre où il se nourrit de racines. Il apparaît parfois à la surface.
descriptions.de: Es lebt etwa einen Meter unter der Erde, wo es sich von Pflanzenwurzeln ernährt. Manchmal zeigt es sich auch oberirdisch.
descriptions.es: Vive a un metro bajo tierra, donde se alimenta de raíces de plantas. A veces aparece en la superficie.
descriptions.it: Vive a circa un metro sotto terra, dove si nutre di radici di piante. A volte appare in superficie.
descriptions.ja: 地下１メートルの　地面で　植物の　根っこを　食べて　暮らしている。　稀に　地上に　姿を　現す。
descriptions.ko: 지하 1m 땅속에서 식물의 뿌리를 먹고 생활한다. 가끔 지상으로 모습을 드러낸다.

name: dugtrio-alola
description: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.
appearance: Three cylindrical creatures with dark brown, metallic bodies emerging from the ground, each sporting three prominent blonde hair-like strands on their heads; they each have pink noses and two small eyes, but no visible mouths.

descriptions.fr: C’est une équipe de triplés de Diglett. Il provoque d’énormes séismes en creusant 100 km sous terre.
descriptions.de: Ein Team aus drei Digda. Es löst gewaltige Erdbeben aus, indem es sich 100 km tief in die Erde gräbt.
descriptions.es: Un equipo de trillizos de Diglett. Provoca grandes terremotos al excavar 100 km bajo tierra.
descriptions.it: Un trio di Diglett. Provoca enormi terremoti scavando 100 km sotto terra.
descriptions.ja: ３匹の　ディグダの　チーム。　地下１００キロまで　潜り　巨大な　地震を　起こす。
descriptions.ko: 디그다 삼형제 팀이다. 지하 100km까지 파고들어 거대한 지진을 일으킨다.

name: meowth-alola
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.
appearance: A small, quadrupedal cat with dark gray fur, cream-colored paws and face, and a distinctive gold coin-like emblem on its forehead; it has large, narrow red eyes and a small mouth with visible fangs.

descriptions.fr: Il se lave le visage régulièrement pour garder la pièce sur son front impeccable. Il ne s’entend pas avec le Miaouss de Galar.
descriptions.de: Es wäscht sein Gesicht regelmäßig, um die Münze auf seiner Stirn fleckenlos zu halten. Es versteht sich nicht gut mit Galar-Mauzi.
descriptions.es: Se lava la cara regularmente para mantener impecable la moneda de su frente. No se lleva bien con el Meowth de Galar.
descriptions.it: Si lava il muso regolarmente per tenere immacolata la moneta sulla fronte. Non va d’accordo con Meowth di Galar.
descriptions.ja: 額の　小判を　ピカピカに　保つため　定期的に　顔を　洗う。　ガラルニャースとは　仲が　悪い。
descriptions.ko: 이마의 금화가 반짝이도록 정기적으로 세수를 한다. 가라르 나옹과는 사이가 좋지 않다.

name: persian-alola
description: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.
appearance: A regal, quadrupedal cat with sleek, dark gray fur, a cream-colored muzzle, and a large, rounded head featuring a prominent cream-colored gem-like orb on its forehead; it has narrowed blue eyes and a small mouth with visible fangs.

descriptions.fr: Bien que sa fourrure fasse l’objet de nombreuses admirations, il est difficile à élever à cause de sa méchanceté capricieuse.
descriptions.de: Obwohl sein Fell viele Bewunderer hat, ist es aufgrund seiner launischen Bosheit schwer als Haustier zu halten.
descriptions.es: Aunque su pelaje tiene muchos admiradores, es difícil de criar como mascota debido a su malicia caprichosa.
descriptions.it: Nonostante la sua pelliccia abbia molti ammiratori, è difficile da allevare come animale domestico a causa della sua capricciosa malizia.
descriptions.ja: 美しい　毛並みは　憧れの的だが　気分屋で　意地悪なため　飼うのは　なかなか　難しい。
descriptions.ko: 아름다운 털은 동경의 대상이지만 변덕스럽고 심술궂어 키우기 어렵다.

name: geodude-alola
description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.
appearance: A small, rounded rock-like creature with a gray, metallic body, two muscular arms ending in three-digit hands, and a thick tuft of black, metallic hair on its head; it has two large, glowing yellow eyes and a small mouth.

descriptions.fr: On le trouve dans les champs et les montagnes. Les gens le prennent souvent pour un rocher et trébuchent dessus.
descriptions.de: Man findet es in Feldern und Bergen. Häufig treten Menschen darauf oder stolpern darüber, da sie es mit Felsbrocken verwechseln.
descriptions.es: Se encuentra en campos y montañas. La gente suele pisarlo o tropezar con él, confundiéndolo con una roca.
descriptions.it: Si trova nei campi e in montagna. La gente spesso lo scambia per un masso e ci calpesta o inciampa.
descriptions.ja: 野山に　生息。　岩と　間違えて　踏んだり　蹴ったりする　者が　後を　絶たない。
descriptions.ko: 들과 산에 서식한다. 바위로 착각하여 밟거나 넘어지는 사람이 끊이지 않는다.

name: graveler-alola
description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.
appearance: A multi-limbed, gray, metallic rock creature with four arms, two on its upper body and two on its lower body, each ending in three-fingered hands, and a prominent tuft of black, metallic hair on its head; it has two large, glowing yellow eyes and a small mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il se déplace en dévalant les pentes. Il roule sur n’importe quel obstacle sans ralentir ni changer de direction.
descriptions.de: Es rollt Abhänge hinunter, um sich fortzubewegen. Dabei überwindet es jedes Hindernis, ohne langsamer zu werden oder die Richtung zu ändern.
descriptions.es: Se mueve rodando por las pendientes. Atraviesa cualquier obstáculo sin aminorar la velocidad ni cambiar de dirección.
descriptions.it: Per muoversi rotola giù per le pendii. Supera qualsiasi ostacolo senza rallentare o cambiare direzione.
descriptions.ja: 坂道を　転がって　移動する。　どんな　障害物も　スピードを　落とさず　進路を　変えず　乗り越える。
descriptions.ko: 비탈길을 굴러서 이동한다. 어떤 장애물도 속도를 늦추거나 방향을 바꾸지 않고 넘어간다.

name: golem-alola
description: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.
appearance: A large, quadrupedal, gray, metallic rock creature with a cannon-like appendage on its back, a prominent tuft of black, metallic hair on its head, and two large arms with three-fingered hands; it has two large, glowing yellow eyes and a small mouth.

descriptions.fr: Son corps rocheux est extrêmement dur. Il peut facilement résister aux explosions de dynamite sans subir de dégâts.
descriptions.de: Sein felsartiger Körper ist extrem hart. Es hält Sprengungen mit Dynamit problemlos stand, ohne Schaden zu nehmen.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo rocoso es extremadamente duro. Puede resistir fácilmente explosiones de dinamita sin sufrir daños.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo roccioso è estremamente duro. Può resistere facilmente alle esplosioni di dinamite senza subire danni.
descriptions.ja: 岩石のような　体は　とてつもなく　頑丈。　ダイナマイトの　爆発も　平気で　耐える。
descriptions.ko: 바위 같은 몸은 엄청나게 단단하다. 다이너마이트 폭발에도 아무렇지 않게 버틴다.

name: grimer-alola
description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.
appearance: A dark gray, amorphous sludge creature with large, green crystal-like growths on its body, particularly around its base and on its back; it has large, glowing green eyes and a perpetually open mouth with a green tongue.

descriptions.fr: Il apparaît dans les zones sales. Il prospère en aspirant la boue polluée rejetée par les usines.
descriptions.de: Es taucht in schmutzigen Gebieten auf. Es gedeiht, indem es verschmutzten Schlamm aufsaugt, der aus Fabriken gepumpt wird.
descriptions.es: Aparece en zonas sucias. Prospera absorbiendo el lodo contaminado que se bombea de las fábricas.
descriptions.it: Appare in zone sporche. Prospera assorbendo il fango inquinato che viene pompato dalle fabbriche.
descriptions.ja: 汚い場所に　現れる。　工場から　排出される　汚染された　ヘドロを　吸い込んで　成長する。
descriptions.ko: 더러운 장소에 나타난다. 공장에서 배출되는 오염된 진흙을 빨아들여 성장한다.

name: muk-alola
description: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.
appearance: A large, amorphous sludge creature with a dark gray and purple body, covered in numerous, sharp, iridescent crystal-like growths, especially on its back, head, and 'fingers'; it has large, glowing green eyes and a perpetually open mouth with a green tongue.

descriptions.fr: Épaissement recouvert d'une boue sale et nauséabonde. Il est si toxique que même ses empreintes de pas contiennent du poison.
descriptions.de: Dick mit einem ekelhaften, üblen Schlamm bedeckt. Es ist so giftig, dass selbst seine Fußabdrücke Gift enthalten.
descriptions.es: Cubierto de una espesa y repugnante porquería. Es tan tóxico que incluso sus huellas contienen veneno.
descriptions.it: Ricoperto da uno spesso e ripugnante fango. È così tossico che persino le sue impronte contengono veleno.
descriptions.ja: 汚い、悪臭を放つヘドロで厚く覆われている。その毒性は非常に高く、足跡にも毒が含まれる。
descriptions.ko: 더럽고 역겨운 진흙으로 두껍게 뒤덮여 있다. 너무 유독해서 발자국에도 독이 들어 있다.

name: exeggutor-alola
description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.
appearance: A very tall, palm tree-like Pokemon with a long, segmented brown neck, four distinct heads (three light green and one light brown at the tail-tip) each with two black eyes, a pink nose, and a small mouth, crowned with large green leaves.

descriptions.fr: La légende raconte que, dans de rares occasions, l'une de ses têtes tombe et continue d'exister en tant que NOEUNOEUF.
descriptions.de: Der Legende nach fällt ihm in seltenen Fällen ein Kopf ab und entwickelt sich zu einem OWEI.
descriptions.es: La leyenda cuenta que, en raras ocasiones, una de sus cabezas se desprende y continúa su vida como un EXEGGCUTE.
descriptions.it: La leggenda narra che, in rare occasioni, una delle sue teste si stacca e continua a vivere come un EXEGGCUTE.
descriptions.ja: 稀に、頭部の一つが落ちてタマタマとして生き続けるという伝説がある。
descriptions.ko: 전설에 따르면 드물게 머리 중 하나가 떨어져 나가 아라리로서 살아간다고 한다.

name: marowak-alola
description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.
appearance: A bipedal, dark brown reptile-like Pokemon with a skull covering its head, featuring a prominent horn, orange tribal markings on its body, and glowing blue eyes, always wielding a flaming bone club.

descriptions.fr: L'os qu'il tient est son arme principale. Il le lance habilement comme un boomerang pour mettre KO ses cibles.
descriptions.de: Der Knochen, den es hält, ist seine Hauptwaffe. Es wirft den Knochen geschickt wie einen Bumerang, um Ziele KO zu schlagen.
descriptions.es: El hueso que sostiene es su arma principal. Lo lanza hábilmente como un bumerán para noquear a sus objetivos.
descriptions.it: L'osso che tiene è la sua arma principale. Lo lancia abilmente come un boomerang per mettere KO i suoi obiettivi.
descriptions.ja: 持っている骨が最大の武器。ブーメランのように巧みに投げて相手をKOする。
descriptions.ko: 들고 있는 뼈가 주요 무기다. 부메랑처럼 능숙하게 던져 상대를 KO시킨다.

name: greninja-battle-bond
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.
appearance: A lean, bipedal, dark blue frog-like ninja Pokemon with a long, pink tongue wrapped around its neck like a scarf, white shuriken-like markings on its thighs, and a large red shuriken formed from water on its back, with prominent red markings above its yellow eyes and a larger blue fin on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il crée des shurikens d'eau comprimée. Quand il les fait tourner et les lance à grande vitesse, ces étoiles peuvent fendre le métal en deux.
descriptions.de: Es erschafft Wurfsterne aus komprimiertem Wasser. Wenn es sie mit hoher Geschwindigkeit schleudert, können diese Sterne Metall spalten.
descriptions.es: Crea estrellas ninja de agua comprimida. Cuando las hace girar y las lanza a gran velocidad, estas estrellas pueden partir el metal por la mitad.
descriptions.it: Crea shuriken di acqua compressa. Quando li fa ruotare e li lancia ad alta velocità, queste stelle possono spaccare il metallo in due.
descriptions.ja: 圧縮した水で手裏剣を作る。高速で回転させて投げつけると、その手裏剣は金属を両断する。
descriptions.ko: 압축된 물로 수리검을 만든다. 고속으로 회전시켜 던지면 이 수리검은 금속을 두 동강 낼 수 있다.

display_names.ja: ゲッコウガ きずなのちから

name: greninja-ash
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.
appearance: A bipedal, dark blue frog-like ninja Pokemon characterized by a long, pink tongue wrapped around its neck, white shuriken-like growths on its thighs, a large red shuriken made of water on its back, and distinct red markings above its yellow eyes with an enlarged blue head fin, appearing visually identical to Battle Bond Greninja.

descriptions.fr: Il crée des shurikens d'eau comprimée. Quand il les fait tourner et les lance à grande vitesse, ces étoiles peuvent fendre le métal en deux.
descriptions.de: Es erschafft Wurfsterne aus komprimiertem Wasser. Wenn es sie mit hoher Geschwindigkeit schleudert, können diese Sterne Metall spalten.
descriptions.es: Crea estrellas ninja de agua comprimida. Cuando las hace girar y las lanza a gran velocidad, estas estrellas pueden partir el metal por la mitad.
descriptions.it: Crea shuriken di acqua compressa. Quando li fa ruotare e li lancia ad alta velocità, queste stelle possono spaccare il metallo in due.
descriptions.ja: 圧縮した水で手裏剣を作る。高速で回転させて投げつけると、その手裏剣は金属を両断する。
descriptions.ko: 압축된 물로 수리검을 만든다. 고속으로 회전시켜 던지면 이 수리검은 금속을 두 동강 낼 수 있다.

name: zygarde-10-power-construct
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: This serpentine Pokémon is composed of interlocking hexagonal segments, featuring a white head with a black faceplate and a single red hexagonal eye, an emerald green spine pattern over a black body, and two small green fins on its head.

descriptions.fr: Quand l'écosystème de la région de Kalos tombe en désarroi, il apparaît et révèle son pouvoir secret.
descriptions.de: Gerät das Ökosystem der Kalos-Region in Unordnung, erscheint es und offenbart seine geheime Kraft.
descriptions.es: Cuando el ecosistema de la región de Kalos cae en desorden, aparece y revela su poder secreto.
descriptions.it: Quando l'ecosistema della regione di Kalos cade nel caos, appare e rivela il suo potere segreto.
descriptions.ja: カロス地方の生態系が乱れた時、姿を現し、その秘めたる力を解き放つ。
descriptions.ko: 칼로스지방의 생태계가 혼란에 빠질 때 나타나 비밀스러운 힘을 드러낸다.

name: zygarde-50-power-construct
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: This canine-serpentine Pokémon has an upper body resembling a black dog with emerald green accents and white hexagonal chest markings, a lower serpentine body of black and green segments, a white head with black markings, and a single red hexagonal eye, topped with two large, emerald green fin-like protrusions on its back.

descriptions.fr: Quand l'écosystème de la région de Kalos tombe en désarroi, il apparaît et révèle son pouvoir secret.
descriptions.de: Gerät das Ökosystem der Kalos-Region in Unordnung, erscheint es und offenbart seine geheime Kraft.
descriptions.es: Cuando el ecosistema de la región de Kalos cae en desorden, aparece y revela su poder secreto.
descriptions.it: Quando l'ecosistema della regione di Kalos cade nel caos, appare e rivela il suo potere segreto.
descriptions.ja: カロス地方の生態系が乱れた時、姿を現し、その秘めたる力を解き放つ。
descriptions.ko: 칼로스지방의 생태계가 혼란에 빠질 때 나타나 비밀스러운 힘을 드러낸다.

name: zygarde-complete
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: This large, humanoid Pokémon is a composite of hexagonal segments, featuring a black body with emerald green and teal limbs, a white head with black markings and a single red hexagonal eye, a prominent red hexagonal core on its chest, and large, asymmetrical emerald green and teal wing-like structures on its back.

descriptions.fr: Quand l'écosystème de la région de Kalos tombe en désarroi, il apparaît et révèle son pouvoir secret.
descriptions.de: Gerät das Ökosystem der Kalos-Region in Unordnung, erscheint es und offenbart seine geheime Kraft.
descriptions.es: Cuando el ecosistema de la región de Kalos cae en desorden, aparece y revela su poder secreto.
descriptions.it: Quando l'ecosistema della regione di Kalos cade nel caos, appare e rivela il suo potere segreto.
descriptions.ja: カロス地方の生態系が乱れた時、姿を現し、その秘めたる力を解き放つ。
descriptions.ko: 칼로스지방의 생태계가 혼란에 빠질 때 나타나 비밀스러운 힘을 드러낸다.

display_names.ja: ジガルデ・パーフェクトフォルム

name: gumshoos-totem
description: When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location...but it’s always snoozing by nightfall.
appearance: This mustelid-like Pokémon has a stocky, yellow-tan body with darker brown patches on its back and limbs, a prominent, long, orange-brown mane of fur combed back over its head and neck, and a small pink mouth with large, dark, round eyes.

descriptions.fr: Quand il trouve une trace de sa proie, il surveille patiemment l'endroit... mais il s'endort toujours à la tombée de la nuit.
descriptions.de: Findet es eine Spur seiner Beute, lauert es geduldig an diesem Ort... doch bei Einbruch der Nacht schläft es immer ein.
descriptions.es: Cuando encuentra un rastro de su presa, vigila pacientemente el lugar... pero siempre se queda dormido al anochecer.
descriptions.it: Quando trova una traccia della sua preda, sorveglia pazientemente il luogo... ma si addormenta sempre al calar della sera.
descriptions.ja: 獲物の痕跡を見つけると、辛抱強くその場所を見張るが、夜になると必ず眠ってしまう。
descriptions.ko: 먹이의 흔적을 발견하면 끈기 있게 그 장소를 주시하지만, 밤이 되면 항상 잠들어 버린다.

name: vikavolt-totem
description: It zips around, on sharp lookout for an opening. It concentrates electrical energy within its large jaws and uses it to zap its enemies.
appearance: This beetle-like Pokémon features a dark blue-grey body with segmented yellow legs, a yellow face with two prominent red cylindrical eyes, and large yellow mandibles tipped with red that extend from its head, complemented by jagged yellow wing-like structures on its back.

descriptions.fr: Il file à toute vitesse, à l'affût de la moindre ouverture. Il concentre l'énergie électrique dans ses grandes mâchoires et l'utilise pour électrocuter ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Es saust umher, immer auf der Suche nach einer Lücke. Es konzentriert elektrische Energie in seinen großen Kiefern und setzt sie ein, um Feinde zu schocken.
descriptions.es: Vuela a toda velocidad, buscando una apertura. Concentra energía eléctrica en sus grandes mandíbulas y la usa para electrocutar a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Si muove velocemente, in cerca di un'apertura. Concentra energia elettrica nelle sue grandi mascelle e la usa per folgorare i suoi nemici.
descriptions.ja: 素早く動き回り、隙を鋭く狙う。大きな顎に電気エネルギーを集中させ、敵を感電させる。
descriptions.ko: 빠르게 돌아다니며 틈을 노린다. 큰 턱에 전기 에너지를 집중시켜 적을 감전시킨다.

name: oricorio-pom-pom
description: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.
appearance: This avian Pokémon has a slender yellow body with black wingtips and tail feathers, a black crest on its head from which two white pom-pom structures extend, and a small black beak with black eyes that have white pupils.

descriptions.fr: Il frappe ses ailes l'une contre l'autre pour créer du feu. En exécutant sa magnifique danse, il enveloppe ses adversaires de flammes intenses.
descriptions.de: Es schlägt seine Flügel aneinander, um Feuer zu erzeugen. Während es die Schritte seines wunderschönen Tanzes ausführt, hüllt es seine Gegner in intensive Flammen.
descriptions.es: Bate sus alas para crear fuego. Mientras ejecuta los pasos de su hermoso baile, envuelve a sus oponentes en intensas llamas.
descriptions.it: Batte le ali per creare fuoco. Mentre esegue i passi della sua splendida danza, avvolge i suoi avversari in fiamme intense.
descriptions.ja: 翼を打ち合わせて火花を散らす。華麗なステップで踊りながら、激しい炎を相手に浴びせる。
descriptions.ko: 날개를 서로 부딪쳐 불꽃을 일으킨다. 아름다운 춤을 추면서 격렬한 불꽃을 상대에게 퍼붓는다.

display_names.ja: オドリドリ ポンポン踊りのすがた

name: oricorio-pau
description: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.
appearance: This avian Pokémon has a slender pink body with black wingtips and tail feathers, a pink flower-like crest with a black center on its head, and a small black beak with black eyes that have white pupils.

descriptions.fr: Il frappe ses ailes l'une contre l'autre pour créer du feu. En exécutant sa magnifique danse, il enveloppe ses adversaires de flammes intenses.

descriptions.it: Batte le ali per creare fuoco. Mentre esegue i passi della sua splendida danza, avvolge i suoi avversari in fiamme intense.

display_names.ja: オドリドリ パチパチ踊りのすがた

name: oricorio-sensu
description: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.
appearance: This avian Pokémon has a slender purple body with black wingtips and tail feathers, a purple fan-like crest with white tips on its head, and a small black beak with black eyes that have white pupils.

descriptions.fr: Il frappe ses ailes l'une contre l'autre pour créer du feu. En exécutant sa magnifique danse, il enveloppe ses adversaires de flammes intenses.
descriptions.de: Es schlägt seine Flügel aneinander, um Feuer zu erzeugen. Während es die Schritte seines wunderschönen Tanzes ausführt, hüllt es seine Gegner in intensive Flammen.

descriptions.it: Batte le ali per creare fuoco. Mentre esegue i passi della sua splendida danza, avvolge i suoi avversari in fiamme intense.

display_names.ja: オドリドリ(まいスタイル)

name: lycanroc-midnight
description: Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.
appearance: This bipedal, wolf-like Pokémon has a dark red-brown body covered in shaggy fur, a lighter muzzle, chest, and tail tip, bright red eyes, and a wild mane of fur around its neck and shoulders, with several fur spikes protruding from its back, often displaying a snarl revealing pointed teeth.

descriptions.fr: Ses mouvements rapides désorientent ses ennemis. Bien pourvu de griffes et de crocs, il utilise aussi les roches acérées de sa crinière comme armes.
descriptions.de: Seine schnellen Bewegungen verwirren seine Feinde. Ausgestattet mit Klauen und Reißzähnen, setzt es auch die scharfen Felsen in seiner Mähne als Waffen ein.
descriptions.es: Sus movimientos rápidos confunden a sus enemigos. Bien equipado con garras y colmillos, también usa las rocas afiladas de su melena como armas.
descriptions.it: I suoi movimenti rapidi confondono i nemici. Ben equipaggiato con artigli e zanne, usa anche le rocce appuntite della sua criniera come armi.
descriptions.ja: 素早い動きで相手を惑わす。爪や牙だけでなく、たてがみの鋭い岩も武器にして戦う。
descriptions.ko: 재빠른 움직임으로 상대를 교란시킨다. 발톱이나 이빨뿐만 아니라 갈기의 날카로운 바위도 무기로 싸운다.

display_names.ja: ルガルガン(まよなかのすがた)

name: wishiwashi-school
description: When it’s in trouble, its eyes moisten and begin to shine. The shining light attracts its comrades, and they stand together against their enemies.
appearance: This large, torpedo-shaped fish is a collective of many smaller fish, forming a dark blue body with lighter blue fin-like structures on its back and tail, large glowing yellow eyes made of clustered smaller fish, and a distinctive yellow ring marking encircling its lower body.

descriptions.fr: En cas de danger, ses yeux s’humidifient et brillent. Cette lumière attire ses congénères qui se regroupent pour affronter leurs ennemis.
descriptions.de: Gerät es in Schwierigkeiten, befeuchten sich seine Augen und beginnen zu leuchten. Das leuchtende Licht lockt seine Artgenossen an, und gemeinsam stellen sie sich den Feinden.
descriptions.es: Cuando está en apuros, sus ojos se humedecen y empiezan a brillar. Esa luz brillante atrae a sus compañeros, y juntos se enfrentan a sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Quando è in difficoltà, i suoi occhi si inumidiscono e iniziano a brillare. La luce brillante attira i suoi compagni, che si uniscono per affrontare i nemici.
descriptions.ja: 危険が迫ると瞳が潤み光りだす。その光に引き寄せられた仲間たちが集まって敵に立ち向かう。
descriptions.ko: 위험에 처하면 눈동자가 촉촉해지며 빛나기 시작한다. 그 빛에 이끌려 동료들이 모여들어 적에게 맞선다.

name: lurantis-totem
description: It requires a lot of effort to maintain Lurantis’s vivid coloring, but some collectors enjoy this work and treat it as their hobby.
appearance: This insectoid Pokémon resembles a pink praying mantis with a green, leafy cape-like structure on its back, two large green blade-like forearms with orange tips, large white insectoid eyes with small black pupils, and a small black mouth.

descriptions.fr: Entretenir les couleurs vives de Floramantis demande beaucoup d'efforts, mais certains collectionneurs apprécient ce travail et en font leur passe-temps.
descriptions.de: Die lebhaften Farben von Mantidea zu erhalten, erfordert viel Aufwand, doch manche Sammler genießen diese Arbeit und sehen sie als ihr Hobby an.
descriptions.es: Mantener el vívido colorido de Lurantis requiere mucho esfuerzo, pero algunos coleccionistas disfrutan de este trabajo y lo consideran su afición.
descriptions.it: Mantenere la vivace colorazione di Lurantis richiede un notevole sforzo, ma alcuni collezionisti apprezzano questo lavoro e lo considerano un hobby.
descriptions.ja: ラランテスの鮮やかな体色を保つのはとても手間だが、その世話を楽しむ収集家もいて趣味にしている。
descriptions.ko: 라란티스의 선명한 체색을 유지하는 데는 많은 노력이 필요하지만, 그 보살핌을 즐기는 수집가들도 있어 취미로 삼고 있다.

name: salazzle-totem
description: For some reason, only females have been found. It creates a reverse harem of male Salandit that it lives with.
appearance: This sleek, reptilian Pokémon has a predominantly black body with striking fuchsia markings around its yellow eyes with black pupils, fuchsia stripes on its limbs and whip-like tail, and two fuchsia horn-like protrusions on its head.

descriptions.fr: Pour une raison inconnue, seules des femelles ont été trouvées. Elles s'entourent d'un harem inversé de Malamandre mâles avec lesquels elles vivent.
descriptions.de: Aus unbekannten Gründen wurden nur weibliche Exemplare gefunden. Es bildet ein umgekehrtes Harem aus männlichen Molunk, mit denen es zusammenlebt.
descriptions.es: Por alguna razón, solo se han encontrado hembras. Crea un harén invertido de Salandit machos con los que vive.
descriptions.it: Per qualche ragione, sono stati trovati solo esemplari femmina. Crea un harem inverso di Salandit maschi con cui vive.
descriptions.ja: なぜかメスしか発見されていない。オスのヤトウモリを逆ハーレムにし、一緒に生活している。
descriptions.ko: 어째서인지 암컷만 발견되고 있다. 수컷 야도롱들을 역하렘으로 만들어 함께 생활한다.

name: minior-orange-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This spherical Pokémon is encased in a dark grey, rough, rocky shell with several sharp black spikes, completely obscuring its inner orange core and lacking any visible facial features on its outer surface.

descriptions.fr: Originaire de la couche d'ozone, il tombe au sol quand la coquille qui l'enveloppe devient trop lourde.
descriptions.de: Ursprünglich in der Ozonschicht beheimatet, stürzt es zur Erde, wenn die Hülle, die seinen Körper umschließt, zu schwer wird.
descriptions.es: Originario de la capa de ozono, se precipita al suelo cuando el caparazón que envuelve su cuerpo se vuelve demasiado pesado.
descriptions.it: Originario della fascia di ozono, precipita al suolo quando il guscio che avvolge il suo corpo diventa troppo pesante.
descriptions.ja: オゾン層に生息しているが体を覆う殻が重くなりすぎると地上に落下してくる。
descriptions.ko: 오존층에 서식하지만 몸을 감싼 껍질이 너무 무거워지면 지상으로 떨어진다.

display_names.ja: メテノ(りゅうせいのすがた)

name: minior-yellow-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This spherical Pokémon is encased in a dark grey, rough, rocky shell with several sharp black spikes, completely obscuring its inner yellow core and lacking any visible facial features on its outer surface.

name: minior-green-meteor
description: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.
appearance: This spherical Pokémon is encased in a dark grey, rough, rocky shell with several sharp black spikes, completely obscuring its inner green core and lacking any visible facial features on its outer surface.

descriptions.fr: Originaire de la couche d'ozone, il tombe au sol quand la coquille qui l'enveloppe devient trop lourde.
descriptions.de: Ursprünglich in der Ozonschicht beheimatet, stürzt es zur Erde, wenn die Hülle, die seinen Körper umschließt, zu schwer wird.
descriptions.es: Originario de la capa de ozono, se precipita al suelo cuando el caparazón que envuelve su cuerpo se vuelve demasiado pesado.
descriptions.it: Originario della fascia di ozono, precipita al suolo quando il guscio che avvolge il suo corpo diventa troppo pesante.
descriptions.ja: オゾン層に生息しているが体を覆う殻が重くなりすぎると地上に落下してくる。
descriptions.ko: 오존층에 서식하지만 몸을 감싼 껍질이 너무 무거워지면 지상으로 떨어진다.

display_names.ja: メテノ(りゅうせいのすがた)

display_names.ja: メテノ バイオレットコア

name: mimikyu-busted
description: Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.
appearance: This Pokémon features a tattered, off-white, Pikachu-like disguise with crudely drawn black eyes and red cheek blushes, its neck visibly broken to reveal a dark grey, shadowy, blob-like body beneath with two small, glowing red eyes and a dark stick-like neck.

descriptions.fr: Son véritable aspect est inconnu. Un chercheur qui a vu ce qui se cachait sous son haillon a été terrassé par la terreur et est mort sous le choc.
descriptions.de: Sein wahres Aussehen ist unbekannt. Ein Forscher, der sah, was sich unter seinem Fetzen verbarg, wurde von Entsetzen überwältigt und starb an dem Schock.
descriptions.es: Su verdadero aspecto es desconocido. Un erudito que vio lo que había bajo su harapo fue superado por el terror y murió del shock.
descriptions.it: Il suo vero aspetto è ignoto. Uno studioso che ha visto cosa si nascondeva sotto il suo straccio è stato sopraffatto dal terrore ed è morto per lo shock.
descriptions.ja: その真の姿は不明。布の下を見た学者は、恐怖に打ちのめされてショック死した。
descriptions.ko: 본모습은 알 수 없다. 그 너덜너덜한 천 아래를 본 학자는 공포에 질려 쇼크사했다。

name: mimikyu-totem-disguised
description: Its actual appearance is unknown. A scholar who saw what was under its rag was overwhelmed by terror and died from the shock.
appearance: This Pokémon is entirely concealed by a large, pristine, off-white, Pikachu-like disguise with crudely drawn black eyes and red cheek blushes, featuring upright black-tipped ears and a stick-like tail protruding from its back.

descriptions.fr: Son véritable aspect est inconnu. Un chercheur qui a vu ce qui se cachait sous son haillon a été terrassé par la terreur et est mort sous le choc.

display_names.ja: ぬしミミッキュ ばれたすがた

name: kommo-o-totem
description: When it spots enemies, it threatens them by jingling the scales on its tail. Weak opponents will crack and flee in panic.
appearance: This bipedal, dragon-like Pokémon has a dark grey body with a lighter grey underside, a yellow snout, two prominent yellow scales covering its black slit eyes, and several large, red-orange metallic scales adorning its head, forearms, and tail, with a distinctive ring around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Quand il repère des ennemis, il les menace en faisant tinter les écailles de sa queue. Les adversaires faibles craquent et fuient paniqués.
descriptions.de: Entdeckt es Feinde, droht es ihnen, indem es die Schuppen an seinem Schwanz erklingen lässt. Schwache Gegner zerbrechen und fliehen panisch.
descriptions.es: Cuando detecta enemigos, los amenaza haciendo tintinear las escamas de su cola. Los oponentes débiles se quiebran y huyen despavoridos.
descriptions.it: Quando avvista dei nemici, li minaccia facendo tintinnare le scaglie della coda. Gli avversari deboli si demoralizzano e fuggono nel panico.
descriptions.ja: 敵を見つけると尻尾の鱗を鳴らして威嚇する。弱い相手は怯んでパニックになり逃げ出す。
descriptions.ko: 적을 발견하면 꼬리 비늘을 울려 위협한다. 약한 상대는 움츠러들어 공황 상태가 되어 도망친다。

name: magearna-original
description: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.
appearance: This humanoid, metallic, doll-like Pokémon is primarily silver with a white skirt-like lower body, featuring a red floral pattern on its chest, a large gold gear on its back, gold trim on its skirt, and a silver head with two large, white, circular eyes with black pupils, a small mouth, and two flower-like protrusions resembling bunny ears.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon artificiel, construit il y a plus de 500 ans, peut comprendre le langage humain mais ne peut pas parler lui-même.
descriptions.de: Dieses vor über 500 Jahren erbaute künstliche Pokémon versteht die menschliche Sprache, kann aber selbst nicht sprechen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon artificial, construido hace más de 500 años, puede entender el habla humana, pero no puede hablar por sí mismo.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon artificiale, costruito più di 500 anni fa, può comprendere il linguaggio umano ma non può parlare.
descriptions.ja: 500年以上前に作られた人工のポケモン。人の言葉を理解できるが、自分で話すことはできない。
descriptions.ko: 500년도 더 전에 만들어진 인조 포켓몬. 사람의 말을 이해할 수는 있지만 스스로 말할 수는 없다。

display_names.ja: マギアナ 500ねんまえのすがた

name: pikachu-partner-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow, mouse-like Pokémon has red cheek pouches, black-tipped ears, and two brown stripes on its back, a lightning bolt-shaped tail, and wears a red and white baseball cap with a blue brim.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKéMON versammeln, kann sich ihre Elektrizität aufbauen und Gewitterstürme verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se reúnen, su electricidad puede acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando più di questi POKéMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e causare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: 何匹も集まると、その電気が蓄積され、雷嵐を引き起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 여러 마리가 모이면 그 전기가 축적되어 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다。

display_names.ja: ピカチュウ 相棒の帽子

name: marowak-totem
description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.
appearance: This bipedal, dark brown, reptilian Pokémon wields a bony club tipped with green flames and wears a bone skull mask, with additional green flame-like markings on its head and back, appearing larger than its standard form with a visible glowing aura.

descriptions.fr: L'os qu'il tient est son arme principale. Il le lance habilement comme un boomerang pour mettre K.O. ses cibles.
descriptions.de: Der Knochen, den es hält, ist seine Hauptwaffe. Es wirft den Knochen geschickt wie einen Bumerang, um Ziele auszuschalten.
descriptions.es: El hueso que sujeta es su arma principal. Lo lanza hábilmente como un bumerán para noquear a sus objetivos.
descriptions.it: L'osso che stringe è la sua arma principale. Lo lancia abilmente come un boomerang per mettere K.O. i suoi bersagli.
descriptions.ja: 骨は最大の武器。ブーメランのように巧みに投げつけて相手をKOする。
descriptions.ko: 뼈는 가장 큰 무기. 부메랑처럼 능숙하게 던져 상대를 KO시킨다。

name: ribombee-totem
description: It rolls up pollen into puffs. It makes many different varieties, some used as food and others used in battle.
appearance: This small, yellow and white insectoid Pokémon has large black eyes, two yellow antennae, two small black wings, a large white collar, and yellow scarf-like markings, appearing notably larger than its standard form with a visible glowing aura.

descriptions.fr: Il roule le pollen pour en faire des petites boules. Il en fabrique de nombreuses variétés, certaines utilisées comme nourriture et d'autres au combat.
descriptions.de: Es rollt Pollen zu kleinen Kugeln. Es stellt viele verschiedene Sorten her, manche als Nahrung, andere im Kampf.
descriptions.es: Enrolla el polen en bolas. Fabrica muchas variedades diferentes, algunas usadas como alimento y otras en combate.
descriptions.it: Arrotola il polline in piccole sfere. Ne produce molte varietà diverse, alcune usate come cibo e altre in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 花粉を丸めて玉にする。食料として使うものや、バトルで使うものなど、様々な種類を作る。
descriptions.ko: 꽃가루를 뭉쳐 경단을 만든다. 식량으로 쓰는 것과 배틀에 사용하는 것 등 다양한 종류를 만든다。

name: rockruff-own-tempo
description: It’s considered to be a good Pokémon for beginners because of its friendliness, but its disposition grows rougher as it grows up.
appearance: This puppy-like Pokémon has brown fur with a lighter brown muzzle and belly, a shaggy mane of spiky brown fur, blue eyes, and a short fluffy tail, distinguished by its unique triangular orange-red pupils.

descriptions.fr: Il est considéré comme un bon Pokémon pour les débutants en raison de sa gentillesse, mais son tempérament devient plus rude en grandissant.
descriptions.de: Aufgrund seiner Freundlichkeit gilt es als gutes Pokémon für Anfänger, doch sein Wesen wird mit zunehmendem Alter rauer.
descriptions.es: Se considera un buen Pokémon para principiantes debido a su amabilidad, pero su carácter se vuelve más brusco a medida que crece.
descriptions.it: È considerato un buon Pokémon per principianti grazie alla sua amichevolezza, ma il suo carattere si incattivisce crescendo.
descriptions.ja: 優しいので初心者向けのポケモンとされているが、成長すると気性が荒くなる。
descriptions.ko: 상냥해서 초심자에게 적합한 포켓몬으로 여겨지지만 성장하면 성질이 거칠어진다。

display_names.ja: イワンコ マイペース

name: lycanroc-dusk
description: Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.
appearance: This quadrupedal, dog-like Pokémon has orange-brown fur with a white underside and muzzle, green eyes, a shaggy mane of spiky orange-brown fur with a small white rock at the base of its neck, and a bushy tail.

descriptions.fr: Ses mouvements rapides déroutent ses ennemis. Bien pourvu de griffes et de crocs, il utilise aussi les roches acérées de sa crinière comme armes.
descriptions.de: Seine schnellen Bewegungen verwirren seine Feinde. Gut ausgestattet mit Klauen und Reißzähnen, nutzt es auch die scharfen Felsen in seiner Mähne als Waffen.
descriptions.es: Sus movimientos rápidos confunden a sus enemigos. Bien equipado con garras y colmillos, también usa las afiladas rocas de su melena como armas.
descriptions.it: I suoi rapidi movimenti confondono i nemici. Ben equipaggiato con artigli e zanne, usa anche le rocce appuntite della sua criniera come armi.
descriptions.ja: 素早い動きで敵を翻弄する。爪や牙はもちろん、たてがみの鋭い岩も武器として使う。
descriptions.ko: 재빠른 움직임으로 적을 농락한다. 발톱과 이빨은 물론 갈기에 있는 날카로운 바위도 무기로 쓴다。

display_names.ja: ルガルガン たそがれのすがた

name: araquanid-totem
description: It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokémon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown.
appearance: This large, spider-like Pokémon has a dark blue body with a light blue underside, four long legs, two large black eyes, and a prominent clear water bubble encasing its head, appearing larger than its standard form with a visible glowing aura.

descriptions.fr: Il donne des coups de tête avec la bulle d'eau sur sa tête. Les petits Pokémon sont aspirés dans la bulle et s'y noient.
descriptions.de: Es stößt mit der Wasserblase auf seinem Kopf zu. Kleine Pokémon werden in die Blase gesaugt und ertrinken dort.
descriptions.es: Ataca dando cabezazos con la burbuja de agua que tiene en la cabeza. Los Pokémon pequeños quedan atrapados y se ahogan.
descriptions.it: Sferra capocciate con la bolla d'acqua sulla testa. I Pokémon più piccoli vengono risucchiati al suo interno e vi annegano.
descriptions.ja: 頭部の水泡をぶつけ頭突き攻撃する。小さなポケモンは泡に吸い込まれ溺れ死ぬ。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 물방울로 박치기를 한다. 작은 포켓몬은 물방울에 빨려 들어가 익사한다.

name: togedemaru-totem
description: The spiny fur on its back is normally at rest. When this Pokémon becomes agitated, its fur stands on end and stabs into its attackers.
appearance: This small, spherical, gray Pokémon has a white face and belly, small black eyes, pink cheek pouches, a spiky collar of yellow and black metal, and a yellow tail ending in a lightning bolt shape, appearing larger than its standard form with a visible glowing aura.

descriptions.fr: Sa fourrure épineuse est normalement aplatie. Quand il s'agite, ses piquants se hérissent et transpercent ses assaillants.
descriptions.de: Sein stacheliges Fell liegt normalerweise flach an. Wenn dieses Pokémon erregt ist, stellen sich seine Stacheln auf und durchbohren seine Angreifer.
descriptions.es: Su pelaje espinoso suele estar en reposo. Cuando este Pokémon se agita, su pelaje se eriza y apuñala a sus atacantes.
descriptions.it: La sua pelliccia spinosa di norma è appiattita. Quando si agita, le sue spine si rizzano e trafiggono gli aggressori.
descriptions.ja: 背中のトゲの毛は普段は寝ている。興奮すると逆立ち襲いかかった敵を刺し貫く。
descriptions.ko: 등에 난 가시털은 평소에는 누워 있다. 흥분하면 역으로 서서 습격한 적을 꿰뚫는다.

name: necrozma-dusk
description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.
appearance: This large, dark gray crystalline humanoid has a pointed head, sharp claws, and a broad chest, distinguished by an ornate yellow, orange, and red armor-like structure that resembles Solgaleo around its upper body, head, and arms, with sharp red eyes and a visible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Cette forme de vie, qui rappelle les Ultra-Chimères et qui semble dormir sous terre, viendrait d'un autre monde et aurait vécu il y a très longtemps.
descriptions.de: Es erinnert an die Ultrabestien. Man nimmt an, dass diese Lebensform, die anscheinend unter der Erde schläft, in alten Zeiten aus einer anderen Welt kam.
descriptions.es: Similar a los Ultraentes, se cree que esta forma de vida, aparentemente dormida bajo tierra, procede de otro mundo y llegó en la antigüedad.
descriptions.it: Ricorda le Ultracreature. Si crede che questa forma di vita, che apparentemente dorme sottoterra, provenga da un altro mondo in tempi antichi.
descriptions.ja: ウルトラビーストに似た生命体。地中で眠っているようだが太古の昔、別の世界から来たとされる。
descriptions.ko: 울트라비스트를 닮은 생명체. 지하에서 잠들어 있는 듯하지만 태고의 옛날에 다른 세계에서 왔다고 전해진다.

display_names.ja: ネクロズマ たそがれのたてがみ

name: necrozma-dawn
description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.
appearance: This large, dark gray crystalline humanoid has a pointed head, sharp claws, and a broad chest, distinguished by an ornate blue, purple, and yellow armor-like structure that resembles Lunala around its upper body, head, and arms, with sharp red eyes and a visible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Cette forme de vie, qui rappelle les Ultra-Chimères et qui semble dormir sous terre, viendrait d'un autre monde et aurait vécu il y a très longtemps.
descriptions.de: Es erinnert an die Ultrabestien. Man nimmt an, dass diese Lebensform, die anscheinend unter der Erde schläft, in alten Zeiten aus einer anderen Welt kam.
descriptions.es: Similar a los Ultraentes, se cree que esta forma de vida, aparentemente dormida bajo tierra, procede de otro mundo y llegó en la antigüedad.
descriptions.it: Ricorda le Ultracreature. Si crede che questa forma di vita, che apparentemente dorme sottoterra, provenga da un altro mondo in tempi antichi.
descriptions.ja: ウルトラビーストに似た生命体。地中で眠っているようだが太古の昔、別の世界から来たとされる。
descriptions.ko: 울트라비스트를 닮은 생명체. 지하에서 잠들어 있는 듯하지만 태고의 옛날에 다른 세계에서 왔다고 전해진다.

display_names.ja: ネクロズマ あかつきのつばさ

name: necrozma-ultra
description: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.
appearance: This massive, glowing white crystalline dragon-like being features a central dark core, six large wings made of light, a long serpentine neck, sharp red eyes, and emanates a rainbow-colored aura from its body and head, which has a prominent red crystal at its tip and no discernible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Cette forme de vie, qui rappelle les Ultra-Chimères et qui semble dormir sous terre, viendrait d'un autre monde et aurait vécu il y a très longtemps.
descriptions.de: Es erinnert an die Ultrabestien. Man nimmt an, dass diese Lebensform, die anscheinend unter der Erde schläft, in alten Zeiten aus einer anderen Welt kam.
descriptions.es: Similar a los Ultraentes, se cree que esta forma de vida, aparentemente dormida bajo tierra, procede de otro mundo y llegó en la antigüedad.
descriptions.it: Ricorda le Ultracreature. Si crede che questa forma di vita, che apparentemente dorme sottoterra, provenga da un altro mondo in tempi antichi.
descriptions.ja: ウルトラビーストに似た生命体。地中で眠っているようだが太古の昔、別の世界から来たとされる。
descriptions.ko: 울트라비스트를 닮은 생명체. 지하에서 잠들어 있는 듯하지만 태고의 옛날에 다른 세계에서 왔다고 전해진다.

name: pikachu-starter
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow, mouse-like Pokémon has red cheek pouches, black-tipped ears, two brown stripes on its back, and a lightning bolt-shaped tail, characterized by slightly softer, more rounded features compared to other Pikachus.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKéMON versammeln, kann ihre Elektrizität Blitzeinschläge und Gewitter verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se juntan, su electricidad puede acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando più POKéMON di questa specie si radunano, la loro elettricità può creare tempeste.
descriptions.ja: 複数のＰＯＫéＭＯＮが集まるとその電気はたまって雷雲を呼び落雷を引き起こす。
descriptions.ko: 여러 마리가 모이면 전기가 모여 뇌운을 불러 번개를 떨어뜨린다.

name: eevee-starter
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
appearance: This quadrupedal, fox-like Pokémon has light brown fur, a fluffy cream-colored collar, a long bushy cream-tipped tail, large dark eyes, and a small dark nose, characterized by slightly softer, more rounded features compared to other Eevees.

descriptions.fr: Son code génétique est irrégulier. Il peut muter s'il est exposé aux radiations des PIERREs élémentaires.
descriptions.de: Sein genetischer Code ist unregelmäßig. Es kann mutieren, wenn es der Strahlung von Element-STEINEN ausgesetzt wird.
descriptions.es: Su código genético es irregular. Puede mutar si se expone a la radiación de las PIEDRAS elementales.
descriptions.it: Il suo codice genetico è irregolare. Può mutare se esposto alle radiazioni delle PIETRE elementari.
descriptions.ja: 遺伝子の構造が不安定でさまざまな進化の可能性を秘めている。
descriptions.ko: 유전자의 구조가 불안정하여 다양한 진화의 가능성을 지니고 있다.

name: pikachu-world-cap
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This yellow, mouse-like Pokémon has red cheek pouches, black-tipped ears, two brown stripes on its back, a lightning bolt-shaped tail, and wears a white baseball cap with a red brim and a stylized blue 'W' on the front.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKéMON versammeln, kann ihre Elektrizität Blitzeinschläge und Gewitter verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se juntan, su electricidad puede acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando più POKéMON di questa specie si radunano, la loro elettricità può creare tempeste.
descriptions.ja: 複数のＰＯＫéＭＯＮが集まるとその電気はたまって雷雲を呼び落雷を引き起こす。
descriptions.ko: 여러 마리가 모이면 전기가 모여 뇌운을 불러 번개를 떨어뜨린다.

display_names.ja: ピカチュウ ワールドキャップ

name: meowth-galar
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.
appearance: This bipedal feline has shaggy, dark gray fur with a lighter gray belly, prominent black claws, green eyes, a large gold coin on its forehead, and a long, thin tail ending in a small tuft.

descriptions.fr: Il se lave régulièrement le visage pour garder la pièce sur son front impeccable. Il ne s'entend pas avec les Miaouss de Galar.
descriptions.de: Es wäscht sein Gesicht regelmäßig, um die Münze auf seiner Stirn makellos zu halten. Es versteht sich nicht mit Galar-Mauzi.
descriptions.es: Se lava la cara con regularidad para mantener impecable la moneda de su frente. No se lleva bien con los Meowth de Galar.
descriptions.it: Si lava il muso regolarmente per tenere immacolata la moneta sulla fronte. Non va d'accordo con i Meowth di Galar.
descriptions.ja: 顔をこまめに洗い額の小判をピカピカに磨く。ガラルニャースとは仲が悪い。
descriptions.ko: 얼굴을 꼼꼼하게 씻어 이마의 동전을 깨끗하게 닦는다. 가라르 나옹과는 사이가 나쁘다.

display_names.ja: ニャース ガラルのすがた

name: ponyta-galar
description: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.
appearance: This quadrupedal unicorn-like creature has a white body, a long flowing light blue mane and tail with purple and pink accents, large blue eyes, and a pointed blue horn on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: Ses sabots sont 10 fois plus durs que le diamant. Il peut piétiner n'importe quoi et le rendre complètement plat en peu de temps.
descriptions.de: Seine Hufe sind zehnmal härter als Diamanten. Es kann in kurzer Zeit alles vollständig platt trampeln.
descriptions.es: Sus cascos son 10 veces más duros que los diamantes. Puede aplastar cualquier cosa completamente en poco tiempo.
descriptions.it: I suoi zoccoli sono 10 volte più duri dei diamanti. Può calpestare qualsiasi cosa e appiattirla completamente in poco tempo.
descriptions.ja: 蹄はダイヤモンドの１０倍硬い。どんな物でもあっという間に踏み潰して平らにする。
descriptions.ko: 발굽은 다이아몬드보다 10배나 단단하다. 어떤 물건이라도 순식간에 짓밟아 납작하게 만든다.

display_names.ja: ポニータ ガラルのすがた

name: rapidash-galar
description: Very competitive, this POKéMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.
appearance: This quadrupedal unicorn-like creature has a white body, a long flowing light blue mane and tail with purple and pink accents, a prominent pointed horn spiraling white and blue on its forehead, and large blue eyes.

descriptions.fr: Très compétitif, ce POKéMON poursuivra tout ce qui bouge vite dans l'espoir de faire la course.
descriptions.de: Dieses sehr wettkampforientierte POKéMON jagt allem hinterher, was sich schnell bewegt, in der Hoffnung, ein Rennen zu bestreiten.
descriptions.es: Muy competitivo, este POKéMON persigue cualquier cosa que se mueva rápido con la esperanza de competir contra ella.
descriptions.it: Estremamente competitivo, questo POKéMON insegue qualsiasi cosa si muova velocemente nella speranza di gareggiare.
descriptions.ja: 非常に競争心が強く、素早く動くものを見ると、レースをしようと追いかける。
descriptions.ko: 승부욕이 매우 강해서 빨리 움직이는 것을 보면 경주라도 하려는 듯 뒤쫓아간다.

display_names.ja: ギャロップ ガラルのすがた

name: slowpoke-galar
description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.
appearance: This pink, bipedal hippopotamus-like creature has a yellow patch on its head and two large yellow patches on its lower back/tail base, small black eyes, a round pink nose, and a perpetually vacant expression.

descriptions.fr: Incroyablement lent et niais. Il lui faut 5 secondes pour ressentir la douleur lorsqu'il est attaqué.
descriptions.de: Unglaublich langsam und dusselig. Es dauert 5 Sekunden, bis es Schmerz empfindet, wenn es angegriffen wird.
descriptions.es: Increíblemente lento y despistado. Tarda 5 segundos en sentir dolor cuando es atacado.
descriptions.it: Incredibilmente lento e tonto. Ci vogliono 5 secondi perché senta dolore quando viene attaccato.
descriptions.ja: 信じられないほど動きが鈍く、ぼんやりしている。攻撃されても痛みに気づくまで5秒かかる。
descriptions.ko: 믿을 수 없을 정도로 느리고 멍하다. 공격받아도 아픔을 느끼기까지 5초가 걸린다.

display_names.ja: ヤドン ガラルのすがた

name: slowbro-galar
description: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.
appearance: This bipedal pink creature features a large gray shell-like organism (Shellder) biting its right arm, which now has a dark gray tip, while its head is yellow with pink patches, small black eyes, a pink nose, and a perpetually vacant expression.

descriptions.fr: On dit que le KOKIYAS accroché à la queue de RAMOLOSS se nourrit des restes de son hôte.
descriptions.de: Das MUSCHEL, das sich am Schweif von FLEGMON festklammert, soll sich von den Resten des Wirts ernähren.
descriptions.es: Se dice que el SHELLDER que se aferra a la cola de SLOWPOKE se alimenta de las sobras de su anfitrión.
descriptions.it: Si dice che lo SHELLDER attaccato alla coda di SLOWPOKE si nutra degli avanzi del suo ospite.
descriptions.ja: ヤドンのしっぽに噛みついたシェルダーは、宿主の残飯を食べていると言われている。
descriptions.ko: 야돈의 꼬리에 물린 셀러는 숙주의 남은 음식을 먹고 산다고 전해진다.

name: farfetchd-galar
description: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.
appearance: This bipedal duck-like bird has brown feathers, a cream-colored belly, a small white oval on its forehead, black eyes, a yellow beak, and brandishes a large green leek as a weapon, maintaining a perpetually stern expression.

descriptions.fr: La pousse de poireau qu'il tient est son arme. Il l'utilise comme une épée de métal.
descriptions.de: Der Lauchstängel, den es hält, ist seine Waffe. Er wird wie ein Metallschwert benutzt.
descriptions.es: La rama de cebolleta que sostiene es su arma. La usa como una espada de metal.
descriptions.it: Il ramoscello di cipollina che tiene in mano è la sua arma. Lo usa proprio come una spada di metallo.
descriptions.ja: 持っている長ネギの茎が武器。まるで金属製の剣のように使われる。
descriptions.ko: 들고 있는 대파 줄기가 무기다. 마치 금속제 검처럼 사용된다.

name: weezing-galar
description: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.
appearance: This gray, spherical creature consists of two heads resembling top hats, one larger than the other, both adorned with green and black smokestacks and brown 'mustaches' of smoke, featuring pink 'eyes', a dark gray body band, and a dark gray base.

descriptions.fr: Là où deux types de gaz toxiques se rencontrent, 2 SMOGO peuvent fusionner en un SMOGOGO après de nombreuses années.
descriptions.de: Wo zwei Arten von giftigen Gasen aufeinandertreffen, können 2 SMOGONs über viele Jahre zu einem SMOGMOG verschmelzen.
descriptions.es: Donde dos tipos de gases venenosos se encuentran, 2 KOFFINGs pueden fusionarse en un WEEZING a lo largo de muchos años.
descriptions.it: Dove due tipi di gas velenosi si incontrano, 2 KOFFING possono fondersi in un WEEZING nel corso di molti anni.
descriptions.ja: ２種類の毒ガスが交差する場所では、長い年月をかけて２匹のドガースが合体し、マタドガスになることがある。
descriptions.ko: 두 종류의 독가스가 만나는 곳에서는 긴 세월을 거쳐 2마리의 또가스가 합체하여 또도가스가 되는 일이 있다.

name: mr-mime-galar
description: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.
appearance: This bipedal, human-like creature has a pale blue-white body, light blue and dark blue stripes on its belly and legs, a red nose, a white hat-like growth on its head, light blue hands and feet, and a perpetually cheerful expression.

descriptions.fr: S'il est interrompu pendant qu'il mime, il giflera l'agresseur avec ses larges mains.
descriptions.de: Wird es beim Mimikry unterbrochen, schlägt es den Übeltäter mit seinen breiten Händen.
descriptions.es: Si se le interrumpe mientras mima, abofeteará al ofensor con sus anchas manos.
descriptions.it: Se interrotto mentre mima, schiaffeggerà l'aggressore con le sue larghe mani.
descriptions.ja: パントマイム中に邪魔されると、幅広の手で邪魔者を叩き回す。
descriptions.ko: 마임 중에 방해받으면 넓적한 손으로 방해꾼을 때려눕힌다.

name: articuno-galar
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.
appearance: This large, elegant bird has a predominantly purple body, long flowing dark purple tail feathers, pointed light blue wings, and a prominent mask-like face with a sharp pink beak and yellow eyes, conveying a stern expression.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON oiseau légendaire qui apparaîtrait aux personnes condamnées et perdues dans les montagnes glacées.
descriptions.de: Ein legendäres Vogel-POKéMON, das scheinbar dem Untergang geweihten Menschen erscheint, die in eisigen Bergen verloren sind.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON pájaro legendario que, se dice, aparece ante las personas condenadas que se pierden en las montañas heladas.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON uccello leggendario che si dice appaia alle persone condannate e perse nelle montagne ghiacciate.
descriptions.ja: 氷山で遭難し、絶望に打ちひしがれた人々の前に現れると言われている伝説の鳥 POKéMON。
descriptions.ko: 얼음 산에서 조난당해 절망에 빠진 사람들의 앞에 나타난다고 전해지는 전설의 새 POKéMON.

name: zapdos-galar
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.
appearance: This large, powerful bird has a predominantly orange body, muscular black legs, black-tipped yellow wings, a sharp yellow beak, and black eyes with distinct black markings around its eyes and on its chest, giving it an aggressive appearance.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON oiseau légendaire qui apparaîtrait des nuages en laissant tomber d'énormes éclairs.
descriptions.de: Ein legendäres Vogel-POKéMON, das angeblich aus Wolken erscheint und gewaltige Blitze herabwirft.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON pájaro legendario que, se dice, aparece de las nubes mientras descarga enormes relámpagos.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON uccello leggendario che si dice appaia dalle nuvole lasciando cadere enormi fulmini.
descriptions.ja: 雲の中から現れ、巨大な稲妻を落としながら飛ぶと言われている伝説の鳥 POKéMON。
descriptions.ko: 구름 속에서 나타나 거대한 번개를 떨어뜨리며 날아다닌다고 전해지는 전설의 새 POKéMON.

name: moltres-galar
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.
appearance: This large, dark bird has a predominantly black body, flowing red-orange 'flame' feathers on its head and tail, powerful red-orange wings, a sharp black beak, and red eyes with prominent black markings around its eyes, giving it an intimidating expression.

descriptions.fr: Connu comme l'oiseau légendaire de feu. Chaque battement de ses ailes crée un éblouissant éclair de flammes.
descriptions.de: Bekannt als der legendäre Feuervogel. Jeder Flügelschlag erzeugt einen blendenden Flammenblitz.
descriptions.es: Conocido como el pájaro legendario de fuego. Cada aleteo de sus alas crea un deslumbrante destello de llamas.
descriptions.it: Conosciuto come l'uccello leggendario di fuoco. Ogni battito delle sue ali crea un abbagliante lampo di fiamme.
descriptions.ja: 伝説の炎の鳥として知られる。羽ばたくたびに、まばゆい炎の閃光を放つ。
descriptions.ko: 전설의 불새로 알려져 있다. 날갯짓 한 번에 눈부신 불꽃 섬광이 생긴다.

name: slowking-galar
description: It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.
appearance: This pink, bipedal creature wears a large gray shell (Shellder) on its head with yellow swirls and a purple gem-like growth on its forehead, a purple frilled collar, a yellow face with black eyes, a small pink nose, and often appears thoughtful.

descriptions.fr: Il possède une intelligence et une intuition incroyables. Quelle que soit la situation, il reste calme et posé.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt unglaublichen Intellekt und Intuition. Egal wie die Situation ist, es bleibt ruhig und besonnen.
descriptions.es: Posee una inteligencia e intuición increíbles. Sea cual sea la situación, se mantiene calmado y sereno.
descriptions.it: Possiede un'intelligenza e un'intuizione incredibili. Indipendentemente dalla situazione, rimane calmo e posato.
descriptions.ja: 並外れた知性と直感を持つ。どんな状況でも、冷静沈着だ。
descriptions.ko: 뛰어난 지성과 직감을 지닌다. 어떤 상황에서도 침착함을 잃지 않는다.

name: corsola-galar
description: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.
appearance: This white, ghost-like coral creature has a translucent appearance, two small pink eyes, a sad expression, and features two short branches on its head and four on its back, all ending in rounded nubs.

descriptions.fr: Il mue et grandit continuellement. La pointe de sa tête est prisée comme un trésor pour sa beauté.
descriptions.de: Es häutet sich ständig und wächst dabei. Die Spitze seines Kopfes wird wegen ihrer Schönheit als Schatz geschätzt.
descriptions.es: Muda y crece sin cesar. La punta de su cabeza es un tesoro muy apreciado por su belleza.
descriptions.it: Muta e cresce continuamente. La punta della sua testa è considerata un tesoro per la sua bellezza.
descriptions.ja: 常に脱皮と成長を繰り返す。頭の先の部分は、その美しさから宝として珍重されている。
descriptions.ko: 계속해서 탈피하며 성장한다. 머리 끝부분은 아름다움 때문에 보물로 소중히 여겨진다.

name: zigzagoon-galar
description: ZIGZAGOON restlessly wanders everywhere at all times. This POKéMON does so because it is very curious. It becomes interested in anything that it happens to see.
appearance: This small, badger-like quadruped has white and black fur forming jagged stripes across its body, a black mask-like marking around its eyes, a pink nose, and a small, pointed tail.

descriptions.fr: ZIGZAGOON erre sans cesse partout et à tout moment. Ce POKéMON agit ainsi parce qu'il est très curieux. Il s'intéresse à tout ce qu'il voit.
descriptions.de: ZIGZAGOON wandert rastlos und ständig überall umher. Dieses POKéMON tut dies, weil es sehr neugierig ist. Es interessiert sich für alles, was es zufällig sieht.
descriptions.es: ZIGZAGOON deambula sin descanso por todas partes. Este POKéMON es muy curioso y se interesa por cualquier cosa que ve.
descriptions.it: ZIGZAGOON vaga incessantemente ovunque in ogni momento. Questo POKéMON lo fa perché è molto curioso. Si interessa a qualsiasi cosa che gli capiti di vedere.
descriptions.ja: ジグザグマは常に落ち着きなくあらゆる場所をさまよう。好奇心旺盛なため、目にするものすべてに興味を持つ。
descriptions.ko: 직구리는 쉬지 않고 언제나 여기저기 돌아다닌다. 호기심이 왕성하여 눈에 들어오는 모든 것에 흥미를 보인다.

name: linoone-galar
description: LINOONE always runs full speed and only in straight lines. If facing an obstacle, it makes a right-angle turn to evade it. This POKéMON is very challenged by gently curving roads.
appearance: This bipedal badger-like creature has white and black fur forming jagged stripes across its body, prominent black claws, a black mask-like marking around its eyes, and a long, pointed tail.

descriptions.fr: LINÉON court toujours à pleine vitesse et uniquement en ligne droite. Face à un obstacle, il effectue un virage à angle droit pour l'éviter. Ce POKéMON est très gêné par les routes légèrement courbées.
descriptions.de: GERADAKIS rennt immer mit voller Geschwindigkeit und nur geradeaus. Trifft es auf ein Hindernis, biegt es im rechten Winkel ab, um es zu umgehen. Dieses POKéMON hat große Probleme mit sanft geschwungenen Straßen.
descriptions.es: LINOONE corre siempre a toda velocidad y solo en línea recta. Si se encuentra un obstáculo, gira en ángulo recto para esquivarlo. Este POKéMON tiene muchas dificultades con las carreteras con curvas suaves.
descriptions.it: LINOONE corre sempre a tutta velocità e solo in linea retta. Se incontra un ostacolo, fa una curva ad angolo retto per evitarlo. Questo POKéMON è molto in difficoltà con le strade leggermente curve.
descriptions.ja: マッスグマは常に全速力で一直線に走る。障害物にぶつかると直角に曲がって避ける。緩やかなカーブの道にはとても苦戦する。
descriptions.ko: 직구리는 항상 전속력으로 직선으로만 달린다. 장애물을 만나면 직각으로 꺾어 피한다. 완만한 곡선 도로를 달리는 것을 매우 어려워한다.

name: darumaka-galar
description: When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.
appearance: This small, white, snowman-like creature has a dark blue belly and feet, a red head with a prominent black 'eyebrow' marking, two pointed ice-like growths on its head, and a visible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Quand son feu intérieur brûle, il ne peut pas se calmer et court partout. Quand le feu diminue, il s'endort.
descriptions.de: Wenn sein inneres Feuer brennt, kann es sich nicht beruhigen und rennt herum. Wenn das Feuer nachlässt, schläft es ein.
descriptions.es: Cuando su fuego interno arde, no puede calmarse y corre sin parar. Cuando el fuego disminuye, se queda dormido.
descriptions.it: Quando il suo fuoco interno brucia, non riesce a calmarsi e corre in giro. Quando il fuoco diminuisce, si addormenta.
descriptions.ja: 腹の炎が燃えているときは、落ち着きがなく走り回る。炎が弱まると、眠ってしまう。
descriptions.ko: 뱃속의 불이 타오를 때는 흥분해서 뛰어다니고, 불꽃이 약해지면 잠들어 버린다.

name: darmanitan-galar-standard
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
appearance: This large, white, ape-like creature has a dark blue belly and feet, a wide red mouth, a prominent red 'eyebrow' marking above its eyes, two large, pointed ice-like growths on its head, and ice-like fur around its neck.

descriptions.fr: Son feu interne brûle à 2 500 °F, générant une puissance suffisante pour détruire un camion-benne d'un seul coup de poing.
descriptions.de: Sein inneres Feuer brennt bei 2 500 °F und erzeugt genug Kraft, um einen Kipplaster mit einem einzigen Schlag zu zerstören.
descriptions.es: Su fuego interno arde a 2500 °F, lo que le da suficiente poder como para destruir un camión volquete de un solo puñetazo.
descriptions.it: Il suo fuoco interno brucia a 2500 °F, generando una potenza tale da poter distruggere un autocarro con cassone ribaltabile con un solo pugno.
descriptions.ja: 腹の炎は2500°Fで燃え盛り、ダンプカーをパンチ一発で破壊するほどのパワーを生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 뱃속의 불은 2500°F로 타오르며, 한 방의 주먹으로 덤프트럭을 부술 정도의 파워를 만들어낸다.

name: darmanitan-galar-zen
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
appearance: This round, white, snowman-like body features a reddish-orange head emerging from the top, which has a large, toothy, black-lined mouth with glowing white teeth and a single orange pupil in each red eye, while dark blue, spiral-shaped ice covers its white chest and its hands glow with orange energy.

descriptions.fr: Son feu interne brûle à 2 500 °F, générant une puissance suffisante pour détruire un camion-benne d'un seul coup de poing.
descriptions.de: Sein inneres Feuer brennt bei 2 500 °F und erzeugt genug Kraft, um einen Kipplaster mit einem einzigen Schlag zu zerstören.
descriptions.es: Su fuego interno arde a 2500 °F, lo que le da suficiente poder como para destruir un camión volquete de un solo puñetazo.
descriptions.it: Il suo fuoco interno brucia a 2500 °F, generando una potenza tale da poter distruggere un autocarro con cassone ribaltabile con un solo pugno.
descriptions.ja: 腹の炎は2500°Fで燃え盛り、ダンプカーをパンチ一発で破壊するほどのパワーを生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 뱃속의 불은 2500°F로 타오르며, 한 방의 주먹으로 덤프트럭을 부술 정도의 파워를 만들어낸다.

display_names.ja: ガラルのヒヒダルマ (ゼンモード)

name: yamask-galar
description: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.
appearance: This slender, black, shadowy body, reminiscent of a spirit, features two small, glowing red eyes on its black head and a subtle upward curve for its mouth, while it holds a cracked, rectangular, light gray ancient shield-like object adorned with faint purple symbols.

descriptions.fr: Chacun d'eux porte un masque qui était autrefois son visage quand il était humain. Parfois, ils le regardent et pleurent.
descriptions.de: Jeder von ihnen trägt eine Maske, die einst sein menschliches Gesicht war. Manchmal sehen sie sie an und weinen.
descriptions.es: Cada uno lleva una máscara que solía ser su rostro cuando era humano. A veces la miran y lloran.
descriptions.it: Ognuno di loro porta una maschera che era il suo volto quando era umano. A volte la guardano e piangono.
descriptions.ja: それぞれ人間だった頃の顔を模した仮面を持っている。時々それを見て泣き出すことがある。
descriptions.ko: 인간이었을 적의 얼굴이었던 가면을 각각 들고 다닌다. 가끔 가면을 보며 눈물을 흘리기도 한다.

name: stunfisk-galar
description: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.
appearance: This flat, circular, brownish-gray body, resembling a bear trap, features a large, wide, orange-lined mouth with prominent white teeth that resemble spikes, two small black beady eyes above its mouth, and two thin orange-tipped antenna-like appendages sprouting from its top, all while its back is patterned with three concentric brown rings.

descriptions.fr: Sa peau est très dure, il n'est donc pas blessé même si des lutteurs de sumo lui marchent dessus. Il sourit en transmettant de l'électricité.
descriptions.de: Seine Haut ist sehr hart, sodass es selbst von Sumoringern unversehrt bleibt, wenn sie darauf treten. Es lächelt, wenn es Elektrizität überträgt.
descriptions.es: Su piel es muy dura, por lo que no sufre daño incluso si un luchador de sumo lo pisa. Sonríe cuando transmite electricidad.
descriptions.it: La sua pelle è molto dura, quindi non si ferisce anche se viene calpestato da lottatori di sumo. Sorride quando trasmette elettricità.
descriptions.ja: 皮膚が非常に硬いので、力士に踏まれても怪我をしない。電気を流すときは笑顔になる。
descriptions.ko: 피부가 매우 단단해서 씨름선수에게 밟혀도 상처 입지 않는다. 전기를 통하게 할 때는 미소를 짓는다.

name: zygarde-10
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: This canine-like body, primarily dark green and black, is covered in a lighter green hexagonal pattern, featuring two small black eyes with white pupils on its green head, no visible mouth, and two short, pointed green protrusions on either side of its head with a large black spike pointing backward from its crown.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque l'écosystème de la région de Kalos tombe en désordre, il apparaît et révèle son pouvoir secret.
descriptions.de: Wenn das Ökosystem der Kalos-Region aus dem Gleichgewicht gerät, erscheint es und offenbart seine geheime Kraft.
descriptions.es: Cuando el ecosistema de la región de Kalos cae en desorden, aparece y revela su poder secreto.
descriptions.it: Quando l'ecosistema della regione di Kalos cade in disordine, appare e rivela il suo potere segreto.
descriptions.ja: カロス地方の生態系が乱れたとき、姿を現し秘密の力を発揮する。
descriptions.ko: 칼로스지방의 생태계가 혼란에 빠졌을 때, 모습을 드러내 비밀스러운 힘을 발휘한다.

name: cramorant-gulping
description: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.
appearance: This dark blue, cormorant-like bird with a white belly and yellow beak and feet features two large, round white eyes with small black pupils and a long, pointed yellow beak, out of which the tailfin of a yellow Arrokuda fish prominently protrudes, having been swallowed headfirst into its throat.

descriptions.fr: Il est si fort qu'il peut mettre K.O. certains adversaires en un seul coup, mais il peut aussi oublier ce qu'il combat en plein milieu du combat.
descriptions.de: Es ist so stark, dass es manche Gegner mit einem einzigen Treffer ausschalten kann, aber es kann auch mitten im Kampf vergessen, worum es kämpft.
descriptions.es: Es tan fuerte que puede noquear a algunos oponentes de un solo golpe, pero también puede olvidar contra qué está luchando en medio del combate.
descriptions.it: È così forte da poter mandare KO alcuni avversari con un solo colpo, ma potrebbe anche dimenticare cosa sta combattendo a metà dello scontro.
descriptions.ja: 一撃で相手を倒すほどの強さを持つが、戦闘中に何と戦っているか忘れてしまうこともある。
descriptions.ko: 한 방으로 상대를 쓰러뜨릴 정도로 강하지만, 싸움 도중에 무엇과 싸우고 있는지 잊어버리는 경우도 있다.

display_names.ja: ウッウ (うのミサイル フォーム)

name: cramorant-gorging
description: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.
appearance: This dark blue, cormorant-like bird with a white belly and yellow beak and feet features two large, round white eyes with small black pupils and a long, pointed yellow beak, out of which the tail and ears of a yellow Pikachu prominently protrude, having been swallowed headfirst into its throat.

descriptions.fr: Il est si fort qu'il peut mettre K.O. certains adversaires en un seul coup, mais il peut aussi oublier son adversaire en plein combat.
descriptions.de: Es ist so stark, dass es manche Gegner mit einem einzigen Treffer ausschalten kann, aber es kann mitten im Kampf vergessen, gegen wen es kämpft.
descriptions.es: Es tan fuerte que puede noquear a algunos oponentes de un solo golpe, pero también puede olvidar contra quién está luchando a mitad del combate.
descriptions.it: È così forte che può mandare KO alcuni avversari con un solo colpo, ma potrebbe anche dimenticare contro chi sta combattendo a metà della lotta.
descriptions.ja: 一撃で相手を倒すほどのパワーを持つが、戦いの最中に相手のことを忘れてしまうこともある。
descriptions.ko: 한 번의 공격으로 상대를 쓰러뜨릴 정도로 강하지만, 싸움 도중에 싸우던 상대에 대해 잊어버리는 경우도 있다.

display_names.ja: ウッウ (ゴクゴク フォーム)

name: toxtricity-low-key
description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.
appearance: This slender, bipedal, reptilian body with a dark blue and purple color scheme features a light yellow zigzag pattern on its chest, two yellow pointed ear-like structures atop its head, purple 'sweatband' markings around its forearms, four purple spines protruding from its back, and two glowing yellow eyes with purple pupils above a subtle black mouth.

descriptions.fr: Quand ce Pokémon semble gratter une guitare, il gratte en réalité les protubérances de sa poitrine pour générer de l'électricité.
descriptions.de: Wenn dieses Pokémon klingt, als würde es eine Gitarre zupfen, kratzt es in Wahrheit an den Auswüchsen seiner Brust, um Elektrizität zu erzeugen.
descriptions.es: Cuando este Pokémon suena como si estuviera tocando una guitarra, en realidad está arañando las protuberancias de su pecho para generar electricidad.
descriptions.it: Quando questo Pokémon sembra suonare una chitarra, in realtà sta graffiando le protubérances sul suo petto per generare elettricità.
descriptions.ja: ギターを弾いているような音を出すのは、胸の突起を引っかいて電気を発生させているためだ。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬이 기타를 치는 듯한 소리를 낼 때는 사실 가슴에 있는 돌기를 긁어 전기를 만들어내고 있는 것이다.

display_names.ja: ストリンダー (ローなすがた)

name: eiscue-noice
