description: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.
appearance: This small, penguin-like body is light blue with a white face and belly, featuring two small, black, beady eyes set in its white face, a small yellow pointed beak-like mouth, and a single light blue strand of hair-like ice flopping over its forehead, all while its flippers are light blue and its feet are yellow.

descriptions.fr: Il a dérivé depuis un endroit glacé, porté par les courants océaniques. Il garde sa tête constamment glacée pour s'assurer qu'elle reste bien froide.
descriptions.de: Es wurde von den Meeresströmungen aus einem eisigen Ort hergetrieben. Es hält seinen Kopf ständig vereist, damit er schön kalt bleibt.
descriptions.es: Llegó a la deriva con las corrientes marinas desde un lugar gélido. Mantiene su cabeza constantemente helada para asegurarse de que permanezca bien fría.
descriptions.it: È arrivato alla deriva dalle correnti oceaniche di un luogo gelido. Mantiene la testa costantemente ghiacciata per assicurarsi che rimanga ben fredda.
descriptions.ja: 極寒の海流に乗って漂着した。頭の氷は常に冷たく保たれており、溶けることはない。
descriptions.ko: 혹한의 해류를 타고 떠내려왔다. 머리의 얼음은 항상 차갑게 유지되어 녹지 않는다.

display_names.ja: コオリッポ (ナイスフェイス)

name: indeedee-female
description: It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need.
appearance: This bipedal humanoid form with a white, dark blue, and light blue color scheme features a large, white, heart-shaped pattern covering its chest and belly bordered by light blue, dark blue arms ending in white hands, two large blue eyes with black pupils and prominent dark blue eyelashes, a small delicate mouth, and two horn-like dark blue antennae curving from its head.

descriptions.fr: Il utilise les cornes sur sa tête pour capter les émotions des autres. Les mâles servent de valets à ceux qu'ils servent, veillant à tous leurs besoins.
descriptions.de: Es nutzt die Hörner auf seinem Kopf, um die Emotionen anderer zu spüren. Männliche Individuen dienen denjenigen, denen sie dienen, als Kammerdiener und kümmern sich um all ihre Bedürfnisse.
descriptions.es: Utiliza los cuernos de su cabeza para sentir las emociones de los demás. Los machos actúan como mayordomos para aquellos a quienes sirven, atendiendo todas sus necesidades.
descriptions.it: Usa le corna sulla testa per percepire le emozioni altrui. I maschi servono come valletti per coloro che servono, occupandosi di ogni loro esigenza.
descriptions.ja: 頭の角で他者の感情を察知する。オスは仕える者の執事となり、あらゆる世話をこなす。
descriptions.ko: 머리의 뿔로 다른 사람의 감정을 감지한다. 수컷은 자신이 모시는 사람들의 집사가 되어 모든 필요를 돌본다.

name: morpeko-hangry
description: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity.
appearance: This small, rodent-like body is predominantly dark purple and black with matted, spiky fur, featuring a horizontal black stripe across its belly that glows red with energy, dark purple flushed cheeks with a single red spot, narrow and angry eyes with a red iris, and a tight frown for a mouth, while it clutches a glowing red berry in its paws.

descriptions.fr: En mangeant les graines stockées dans ses poches, ce Pokémon ne fait pas que satisfaire sa faim constante. Il génère aussi de l'électricité.
descriptions.de: Wenn es die in seinen beutelähnlichen Taschen gespeicherten Samen frisst, stillt dieses Pokémon nicht nur seinen ständigen Hunger. Es erzeugt dabei auch Elektrizität.
descriptions.es: Mientras come las semillas almacenadas en sus bolsas, este Pokémon no solo satisface su hambre constante. También está generando electricidad.
descriptions.it: Mentre mangia i semi conservati nelle sue tasche, questo Pokémon non solo soddisfa la sua fame costante. Genera anche elettricità.
descriptions.ja: ポケットのような袋に蓄えたタネを食べることで、常に満たされない空腹を満たすだけでなく、電気も生み出す。
descriptions.ko: 주머니 같은 곳에 저장해 둔 씨앗을 먹음으로써 끊임없는 배고픔을 해소할 뿐만 아니라 전기도 만들어낸다.

display_names.ja: モルペコ (はらぺこもよう)

name: zacian-crowned
description: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.
appearance: This large, quadrupedal wolf-like body with light blue and white fur is adorned with golden armor plating resembling a crown on its head and a collar around its neck and forelegs, features piercing blue eyes, and clasps a large, ornate golden sword with a blue gem firmly in its mouth, all while its mane and tail flow long with gold highlights.

descriptions.fr: Connu comme un héros légendaire, ce Pokémon absorbe les particules métalliques, les transformant en une arme qu'il utilise au combat.
descriptions.de: Bekannt als legendärer Held, absorbiert dieses Pokémon Metallpartikel und verwandelt sie in eine Waffe, die es im Kampf einsetzt.
descriptions.es: Conocido como un héroe legendario, este Pokémon absorbe partículas de metal, transformándolas en un arma que utiliza para luchar.
descriptions.it: Conosciuto come un eroe leggendario, questo Pokémon assorbe particelle metalliche, trasformandole in un'arma che usa per combattere.
descriptions.ja: 伝説の英雄と謳われる。金属の粒子を吸収して、戦いに使う武器へと変える。
descriptions.ko: 전설의 영웅으로 불린다. 금속 입자를 흡수하여 싸움에 사용하는 무기로 바꾼다.

name: zamazenta-crowned
description: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle.
appearance: This large, quadrupedal wolf-like body with red and white fur is adorned with a massive, golden, shield-shaped mane around its head and neck, features fierce red eyes, and has golden armor plating covering its forelegs and chest, all while its fur is long and flowing with red and white highlights.

descriptions.fr: Par le passé, il a collaboré avec un roi pour sauver la région de Galar. Il absorbe du métal qu'il utilise ensuite au combat.
descriptions.de: In vergangenen Zeiten arbeitete es mit einem König der Menschen zusammen, um die Galar-Region zu retten. Es absorbiert Metall, das es dann im Kampf einsetzt.
descriptions.es: En tiempos pasados, trabajó junto a un rey del pueblo para salvar la región de Galar. Absorbe metal que luego utiliza en la batalla.
descriptions.it: In passato, ha collaborato con un re del popolo per salvare la regione di Galar. Assorbe metallo che poi usa in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: 過去には人々の王と共にガラル地方を救った。金属を吸収して、戦いに使う。
descriptions.ko: 과거에는 사람들의 왕과 함께 가라르지방을 구했다. 금속을 흡수하여 싸움에 사용한다.

display_names.ja: ザマゼンタ (たてのおう)

name: eternatus-eternamax
description: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.
appearance: Its colossal, skeletal, serpent-like body, composed of black and purple bone-like structures, is massively elongated and distorted, surrounded by swirling red-pink energy that also forms vast, jagged wings and two enormous hand-like appendages extending from a pulsing thorny core on its chest, all while its head features two glowing red eyes and a menacing, fanged mouth.

descriptions.fr: Le noyau sur sa poitrine absorbe l'énergie émanant des terres de la région de Galar. C'est cette énergie qui permet à Éthernatos de rester actif.
descriptions.de: Der Kern auf seiner Brust absorbiert Energie, die von den Ländern der Galar-Region ausgeht. Diese Energie ermöglicht es Endynalos, aktiv zu bleiben.
descriptions.es: El núcleo de su pecho absorbe la energía que emana de las tierras de la región de Galar. Esta energía es lo que permite a Eternatus mantenerse activo.
descriptions.it: Il nucleo sul suo petto assorbe l'energia emanante dalle terre della regione di Galar. Questa energia è ciò che permette a Eternatus di rimanere attivo.
descriptions.ja: 胸のコアがガラル地方の大地から湧き出すエネルギーを吸収する。そのエネルギーがムゲンダイナの活動源となる。
descriptions.ko: 가슴의 코어가 가라르지방의 대지에서 솟아나는 에너지를 흡수한다. 그 에너지가 무한다이노의 활동원이 된다.

display_names.ja: ムゲンダイナ (ムゲンダイマックス)

name: urshifu-rapid-strike
description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
appearance: This bipedal, bear-like humanoid with a strong, athletic build features dark gray fur with white fur on its chest and face, prominent light blue eyebrows and a blue stripe on its nose, two short blue horns extending from the sides of its head, a long flowing white beard and mustache-like fur, and blue-tipped hands and feet adorned with blue arm and leg bands.

descriptions.fr: Cette forme de Shifours est une fervente adepte du K.O. en un coup. Sa stratégie est de bondir près de ses ennemis et de leur asséner un coup dévastateur avec un poing durci.
descriptions.de: Diese Form von Wulaosu ist ein starker Verfechter des K.O.s mit einem Schlag. Seine Strategie ist es, Feinde anzuspringen und ihnen mit einer verhärteten Faust einen verheerenden Schlag zu versetzen.
descriptions.es: Esta forma de Urshifu cree firmemente en el K.O. de un solo golpe. Su estrategia es saltar cerca de los enemigos y asestar un golpe devastador con un puño endurecido.
descriptions.it: Questa forma di Urshifu crede fermamente nel K.O. in un solo colpo. La sua strategia è di balzare vicino ai nemici e assestare un colpo devastante con un pugno indurito.
descriptions.ja: 一撃必殺を信条とするウーラオス。敵の懐に飛び込み、鍛え上げた拳で渾身の一撃を叩き込む。
descriptions.ko: 일격필살을 신조로 삼는 우라오스. 적의 품으로 뛰어들어 단련된 주먹으로 혼신의 일격을 날린다.

display_names.ja: ウーラオス (れんげきのかた)

name: zarude-dada
description: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.
appearance: This large, bipedal ape-like body is covered in dark fur, featuring a bright pinkish-red cape-like marking draped over its shoulders and chest, piercing yellow eyes, large fangs, and a green vine wrapped around its arm extending to a leaf at its elbow, all while its fur is spiky around its head and shoulders.

descriptions.fr: Dans les forêts denses, ce Pokémon vit en bande avec d'autres de son espèce. Il est incroyablement agressif, et les autres Pokémon de la forêt le craignent.
descriptions.de: In dichten Wäldern lebt dieses Pokémon in einem Rudel mit Artgenossen. Es ist unglaublich aggressiv, und die anderen Pokémon des Waldes fürchten es.
descriptions.es: En los densos bosques, este Pokémon vive en manada con otros de su especie. Es increíblemente agresivo, y los demás Pokémon del bosque le temen.
descriptions.it: Nelle fitte foreste, questo Pokémon vive in branco con altri della sua specie. È incredibilmente aggressivo e gli altri Pokémon della foresta lo temono.
descriptions.ja: 密林の中で同族と群れで暮らす。非常に攻撃的で、森のほかのポケモンたちに恐れられている。
descriptions.ko: 밀림 속에서 동족과 무리 지어 산다. 매우 공격적이고 숲의 다른 포켓몬들은 이 포켓몬을 두려워한다.

name: calyrex-ice
description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.
appearance: This form features a small, white, humanoid Calyrex with a large head and golden crown with green gems, large green eyes, and a simple mouth, riding atop a majestic, white and light blue equine Glastrier that boasts a large white mane and tail, deep blue hooves, and prominent ice protrusions on its head and jaw.

descriptions.fr: Calyrex est un Pokémon miséricordieux, capable d'apporter guérison et bénédictions. Il régnait sur la région de Galar dans les temps anciens.
descriptions.de: Calyrex ist ein barmherziges Pokémon, das Heilung und Segen spenden kann. Es herrschte in vergangenen Zeiten über die Galar-Region.
descriptions.es: Calyrex es un Pokémon misericordioso, capaz de proporcionar curación y bendiciones. Reinó sobre la región de Galar en tiempos pretéritos.
descriptions.it: Calyrex è un Pokémon misericordioso, capace di donare guarigione e benedizioni. Regnò sulla regione di Galar in tempi antichi.
descriptions.ja: バドレックスは、癒やしと祝福を与える慈悲深いポケモンだ。かつてガラル地方を治めていた。
descriptions.ko: 바드렉스는 치유와 축복을 베푸는 자비로운 포켓몬이다. 옛날에 가라르지방을 다스렸다.

display_names.ja: バドレックス (はくばじょうのすがた)

name: calyrex-shadow
description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.
appearance: This form features a small, white, humanoid Calyrex with a large head and golden crown with green gems, large green eyes, and a simple mouth, riding atop a swift, black and purple equine Spectrier that boasts a long, flowing purple mane and tail, black hooves, and spectral white markings around its eyes and muzzle.

descriptions.fr: Calyrex est un Pokémon miséricordieux, capable d'apporter guérison et bénédictions. Il régnait sur la région de Galar dans les temps anciens.
descriptions.de: Calyrex ist ein barmherziges Pokémon, das Heilung und Segen spenden kann. Es herrschte in vergangenen Zeiten über die Galar-Region.
descriptions.es: Calyrex es un Pokémon misericordioso, capaz de proporcionar curación y bendiciones. Reinó sobre la región de Galar en tiempos pretéritos.
descriptions.it: Calyrex è un Pokémon misericordioso, capace di donare guarigione e benedizioni. Regnò sulla regione di Galar in tempi antichi.
descriptions.ja: バドレックスは、癒やしと祝福を与える慈悲深いポケモンだ。かつてガラル地方を治めていた。
descriptions.ko: 바드렉스는 치유와 축복을 베푸는 자비로운 포켓몬이다. 옛날에 가라르지방을 다스렸다.

display_names.ja: バドレックス (こくばじょうのすがた)

name: venusaur-gmax
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.
appearance: This colossal, reptilian body, with green skin and dark green splotches, features a massively enlarged pink-red flower with green leaves on its back that glows with intense energy and sprouts immense, thorny vines, while it has two large, dark red eyes and a wide mouth with visible fangs.

descriptions.fr: La plante fleurit quand elle absorbe l'énergie solaire. Il reste en mouvement pour chercher la lumière du soleil.
descriptions.de: Die Pflanze blüht, wenn sie Sonnenenergie aufnimmt. Es bleibt in Bewegung, um Sonnenlicht zu suchen.
descriptions.es: Su planta florece cuando absorbe energía solar. Se mantiene en movimiento para buscar la luz del sol.
descriptions.it: La sua pianta fiorisce quando assorbe energia solare. Si sposta per cercare la luce del sole.
descriptions.ja: 太陽エネルギーを吸収すると、背中の花が咲き開く。日差しを求めて常に動き回る。
descriptions.ko: 태양 에너지를 흡수하면 등 뒤의 꽃이 피어난다. 햇빛을 찾아 끊임없이 움직인다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスフシギバナ

name: charizard-gmax
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.
appearance: This colossal, draconic body, with orange skin and a cream belly, features immensely larger wings that glow with intense, fiery energy, appearing as pure flame at the tips, while its horns and tail flame also intensify, its eyes glow red-orange, and smoke billows from its mouth.

descriptions.fr: Crache un feu assez chaud pour faire fondre des rochers. Connu pour provoquer involontairement des incendies de forêt.
descriptions.de: Speit Feuer, das heiß genug ist, um Felsbrocken zu schmelzen. Ist dafür bekannt, unbeabsichtigt Waldbrände zu verursachen.
descriptions.es: Escupe fuego lo suficientemente caliente como para derretir rocas. Se sabe que provoca incendios forestales de forma involuntaria.
descriptions.it: Sputa fuoco abbastanza caldo da sciogliere massi. È noto per causare incendi boschivi involontariamente.
descriptions.ja: 岩をも溶かすほどの灼熱の炎を吐き出す。意図せず山火事を引き起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 바위마저 녹일 만큼 뜨거운 불꽃을 뿜어낸다. 의도치 않게 산불을 일으키는 경우가 있다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスリザードン

name: blastoise-gmax
description: A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.
appearance: This colossal, turtle-like body, with blue skin and a cream belly, features a shell transformed into a massive, multi-barreled water cannon with numerous glowing light blue nozzles, while water swirls intensely around its powerful legs and tail and its eyes glow with blue energy.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON brutal avec des jets d'eau pressurisés sur sa carapace. Ils sont utilisés pour des attaques à grande vitesse.
descriptions.de: Ein brutales POKéMON mit Druckwasserstrahlen auf seinem Panzer. Sie werden für Hochgeschwindigkeitstakeln eingesetzt.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON brutal con chorros de agua a presión en su caparazón. Los usa para embestidas a alta velocidad.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON brutale con getti d'acqua pressurizzata sul guscio. Li usa per attacchi ad alta velocità.
descriptions.ja: 甲羅に備えた高圧放水砲を持つ凶暴なポケモン。高速タックルに利用される。
descriptions.ko: 등껍질에 고압 분사포를 지닌 난폭한 포켓몬. 고속 태클에 이용한다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスカメックス

name: butterfree-gmax
description: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
appearance: This colossal, insectoid body, with a light purple body and blue compound eyes, features immensely large, white wings covered in vibrant, iridescent purple scales that glow and shimmer, shedding sparkling powder, and greatly elongated antennae that glow with energy.

descriptions.fr: En combat, il bat des ailes à grande vitesse pour libérer une poussière très toxique dans l'air.
descriptions.de: Im Kampf schlägt es seine Flügel mit hoher Geschwindigkeit, um hochgiftigen Staub in die Luft abzugeben.
descriptions.es: En combate, aletea a gran velocidad para liberar polvo altamente tóxico en el aire.
descriptions.it: In lotta, sbatte le ali ad alta velocità per rilasciare polvere altamente tossica nell'aria.
descriptions.ja: 戦闘中、高速で羽ばたき、非常に毒性の強い粉塵を空中にまき散らす。
descriptions.ko: 배틀 중에는 고속으로 날개를 퍼덕여 매우 독성이 강한 가루를 공중에 살포한다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスバタフリー

name: pikachu-gmax
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
appearance: This extremely elongated and plump, spherical Pikachu body, with yellow fur, red cheeks, black ear tips, and brown stripes, features a massive, jagged lightning bolt tail glowing with electric energy, along with signature red cheek pouches, black-tipped ears, and narrow, determined eyes.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque plusieurs de ces POKéMON se rassemblent, leur électricité peut s'accumuler et provoquer des orages.
descriptions.de: Wenn sich mehrere dieser POKéMON versammeln, kann sich ihre Elektrizität aufbauen und Gewitter verursachen.
descriptions.es: Cuando varios de estos POKéMON se reúnen, su electricidad puede acumularse y causar tormentas eléctricas.
descriptions.it: Quando più di questi POKéMON si radunano, la loro elettricità può accumularsi e causare tempeste di fulmini.
descriptions.ja: 複数の個体が集まると、その電気が蓄積され、雷雨を引き起こすことがある。
descriptions.ko: 여러 마리가 모이면 그 전기가 축적되어 뇌우를 일으킬 수 있다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスピカチュウ

name: meowth-gmax
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.
appearance: This extremely elongated, almost serpentine cat-like body, with cream fur and brown stripes, features a notably stretched form, an immensely larger signature gold coin on its forehead, narrow eyes, a mischievous grin for a mouth, and prominent whiskers.

descriptions.fr: Il se lave régulièrement le visage pour garder la pièce sur son front impeccable. Il ne s'entend pas avec Miaouss de Galar.
descriptions.de: Es wäscht sein Gesicht regelmäßig, um die Münze auf seiner Stirn makellos zu halten. Es versteht sich nicht mit Galar-Mauzi.
descriptions.es: Se lava la cara regularmente para mantener impecable la moneda de su frente. No se lleva bien con el Meowth de Galar.
descriptions.it: Si lava regolarmente la faccia per mantenere immacolata la moneta sulla fronte. Non va d'accordo con Meowth di Galar.
descriptions.ja: 額の小判をぴかぴかに保つため、定期的に顔を洗う。ガラルニャースとは仲が悪い。
descriptions.ko: 이마의 코인을 깨끗하게 유지하기 위해 규칙적으로 얼굴을 닦는다. 가라르 나옹과는 사이가 좋지 않다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスニャース

name: machamp-gmax
description: Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon.
appearance: This colossal, muscular, bipedal humanoid body, with gray skin, a red 'belt' marking, and yellow eyes, features four powerful arms ending in massive, glowing red fists that pulse with energy, along with prominent brow ridges that enhance its intense expression.

descriptions.fr: Utilisant ses muscles puissants, il lance des coups de poing qui peuvent envoyer la victime par-dessus l'horizon.
descriptions.de: Mit seinen schweren Muskeln wirft es kraftvolle Schläge, die das Opfer bis über den Horizont schleudern können.
descriptions.es: Usando sus pesados músculos, lanza puñetazos potentes que pueden enviar a la víctima más allá del horizonte.
descriptions.it: Usando i suoi muscoli pesanti, sferra pugni potenti che possono mandare la vittima oltre l'orizzonte.
descriptions.ja: 重い筋肉を駆使し、相手を水平線の彼方まで吹き飛ばすほどの強力なパンチを繰り出す。
descriptions.ko: 무거운 근육을 사용하여 상대를 수평선 너머로 날려버릴 만큼 강력한 펀치를 날린다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスカイリキー

name: gengar-gmax
description: Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.
appearance: This colossal, round, shadowy body, with dark purple skin, red eyes, and white fangs, features its lower half shrouded in a swirling, dark purple-black void out of which its massive upper body emerges, all while its eyes glow fiercely red, its wide mouth reveals numerous sharp white fangs, and its spiky back is more pronounced.

descriptions.fr: Sous la pleine lune, ce POKéMON aime imiter les ombres des gens et rire de leur peur.
descriptions.de: Bei Vollmond imitiert dieses POKéMON gerne die Schatten von Menschen und lacht über deren Angst.
descriptions.es: Bajo la luna llena, a este POKéMON le gusta imitar las sombras de las personas y reírse de su miedo.
descriptions.it: Sotto la luna piena, a questo POKéMON piace imitare le ombre delle persone e ridere della loro paura.
descriptions.ja: 満月の夜には、人々の影に化けて、彼らの恐怖を嘲笑うことを好む。
descriptions.ko: 보름달이 뜨는 밤에는 사람들의 그림자를 흉내 내어 그들의 공포를 비웃는 것을 좋아한다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスゲンガー

name: kingler-gmax
description: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.
appearance: This colossal, crab-like body, with a red shell and cream belly, features an immensely larger right claw covered in glowing, hardened white foam that resembles solidified bubbles, while its left claw is normal-sized, and it has large, stalked eyes and a dark slit for a mouth.

descriptions.fr: Sa grande pince possède une puissance d'écrasement de 10000 PV. Cependant, sa taille énorme la rend difficile à manier.
descriptions.de: Seine große Schere besitzt eine Quetschkraft von 10000 KP. Ihre enorme Größe macht sie jedoch unhandlich im Gebrauch.
descriptions.es: Su gran pinza posee un poder aplastante de 10000 PS. Sin embargo, su enorme tamaño la hace difícil de manejar.
descriptions.it: La sua grande chela ha una potenza di 10000 PS. Tuttavia, le sue enormi dimensioni la rendono difficile da maneggiare.
descriptions.ja: 巨大なハサミには10000馬力の　粉砕力がある。しかし　大きすぎて　扱いにくい。
descriptions.ko: 거대한 집게는 10000마력의 분쇄력을 가졌다. 너무 커서 다루기 어렵다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスキングラー

name: lapras-gmax
description: A POKéMON that has been over­ hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.
appearance: This colossal, plesiosaur-like body, with blue skin and a cream belly, features a shell transformed into an enormous, multi-tiered iceberg-like structure adorned with glowing, ethereal musical notes, while water swirls around its neck and fins, and it has large, gentle eyes and a slight smile for a mouth.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON qui a été chassé à outrance, presque jusqu'à l'extinction. Il peut transporter des personnes à travers l'eau.
descriptions.de: Ein POKéMON, das fast bis zur Ausrottung überjagt wurde. Es kann Menschen über das Wasser befördern.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON que ha sido cazado en exceso casi hasta la extinción. Puede transportar personas a través del agua.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON cacciato quasi fino all'estinzione. Può trasportare persone attraverso l'acqua.
descriptions.ja: 乱獲されて　絶滅寸前まで追い込まれた　POKéMON。人間を乗せて　海を渡ることができる。
descriptions.ko: 남획되어 멸종 위기까지 몰린 POKéMON. 사람을 태우고 바다를 건널 수 있다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスラプラス

name: eevee-gmax
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
appearance: This colossal, canine-like body, with brown fur, dark brown paws, and black eyes, features incredibly voluminous fur, especially around its neck, forming a massive, fluffy cream-colored ruff, and an exceptionally large, bushy cream-tipped tail, all while its small, delicate mouth is barely visible amidst the fur.

descriptions.fr: Son code génétique est irrégulier. Il peut muter s'il est exposé aux radiations des PIERREs élémentaires.
descriptions.de: Sein genetischer Code ist unregelmäßig. Es kann mutieren, wenn es der Strahlung von Elementsteinen ausgesetzt wird.
descriptions.es: Su código genético es irregular. Puede mutar si se expone a la radiación de las PIEDRAs elementales.
descriptions.it: Il suo codice genetico è irregolare. Potrebbe mutare se esposto alle radiazioni delle PIETRE elementari.
descriptions.ja: 遺伝子構造が　不安定。エレメントストーンから放たれる　放射線を浴びると　突然変異を　起こす。
descriptions.ko: 유전자 구조가 불안정하다. 속성 돌에서 방출되는 방사선을 쬐면 돌연변이를 일으킨다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスイーブイ

name: snorlax-gmax
description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.
appearance: This colossal, bear-like body, with dark blue-green fur and a cream belly, features a massive belly that has become a miniature landscape, covered in green grass and sprouting a full-grown, dark green tree with brown bark, while its eyes are mostly closed in a sleepy expression and its small mouth is slightly open.

descriptions.fr: Très paresseux. Il ne fait que manger et dormir. À mesure que sa masse arrondie s'accumule, il devient de plus en plus indolent.
descriptions.de: Sehr faul. Frisst und schläft nur. Mit zunehmendem Körperumfang wird es immer träger.
descriptions.es: Muy perezoso. Solo come y duerme. A medida que su voluminosa masa aumenta, se vuelve cada vez más indolente.
descriptions.it: Molto pigro. Si limita a mangiare e dormire. Man mano che la sua mole aumenta, diventa sempre più ozioso.
descriptions.ja: 超級の面倒くさがり。食っては寝てを繰り返す。丸々とした巨体が増えるほど怠惰になっていく。
descriptions.ko: 엄청나게 귀찮아한다. 먹고 자는 것을 반복한다. 둥글고 거대한 몸집이 커질수록 게을러진다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスカビゴン

name: garbodor-gmax
description: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth.
appearance: This colossal, amorphous, trash-pile-like body, primarily dark green and gray, is an enormous, towering pile of diverse urban waste, including building fragments, vehicles, and tires, forming a grotesque, towering cityscape, while its eyes glow red and its fanged mouth is wide open, leaking purple sludge.

descriptions.fr: Il serre ses adversaires avec son bras gauche et les achève avec le gaz empoisonné malodorant qu'il régurgite de sa bouche.
descriptions.de: Es packt Gegner mit seinem linken Arm und erledigt sie mit übel riechendem giftigen Gas, das es aus seinem Mund ausstößt.
descriptions.es: Sujeta a los oponentes con su brazo izquierdo y los remata con el gas venenoso maloliente que eructa por su boca.
descriptions.it: Afferra gli avversari con il braccio sinistro e li finisce con il gas velenoso e maleodorante che erutta dalla bocca.
descriptions.ja: 左腕で相手を締め上げ　口から吐き出す　悪臭の毒ガスで　とどめを刺す。
descriptions.ko: 왼팔로 상대를 조르고 입에서 내뿜는 악취의 독가스로 숨통을 끊는다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスダストダス

name: melmetal-gmax
description: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
appearance: Melmetal-Gmax is a colossal, silver-grey humanoid golem made of metallic nuts and bolts, with a massive right arm ending in a blunt fist, and a prominent orange-glowing hexagonal nut on its chest, alongside two wide, rectangular yellow-orange eyes.

descriptions.fr: Vénéré il y a longtemps pour sa capacité à créer du fer à partir de rien, il est revenu à la vie après 3 000 ans pour une raison inconnue.
descriptions.de: Einst für seine Fähigkeit verehrt, Eisen aus dem Nichts zu erschaffen, ist es aus irgendeinem Grund nach 3000 Jahren wieder zum Leben erwacht.
descriptions.es: Venerado hace mucho tiempo por su capacidad de crear hierro de la nada, por alguna razón ha vuelto a la vida después de 3.000 años.
descriptions.it: Venerato in tempi antichi per la sua capacità di creare ferro dal nulla, per qualche motivo è tornato in vita dopo 3000 anni.
descriptions.ja: 遥か昔　何もない場所から鉄を生み出す力を持つと崇められていた。3000年の時を経て　なぜか復活した。
descriptions.ko: 먼 옛날, 아무것도 없는 곳에서 쇠를 만들어내는 힘을 가졌다고 추앙받았다. 3000년의 시간을 거쳐 어째서인지 부활했다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスメルメタル

name: rillaboom-gmax
description: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.
appearance: Rillaboom-Gmax is a gigantic, muscular green gorilla with a blonde pompadour, a prominent dark brown wood-like chest and legs, and a towering, three-tiered orange-yellow glowing drum tree formed from its original drum, which it wields with large, leafy drumsticks.

descriptions.fr: En battant des tambours, il puise dans la puissance de sa souche d'arbre spéciale. Les racines de la souche suivent sa direction au combat.
descriptions.de: Durch Trommeln zapft es die Kraft seines speziellen Baumstumpfes an. Die Wurzeln des Stumpfes folgen seinen Anweisungen im Kampf.
descriptions.es: Tamborileando, aprovecha el poder de su tronco de árbol especial. Las raíces del tronco siguen su dirección en la batalla.
descriptions.it: Con le sue percussioni attinge all'energia del suo tronco speciale. Le radici del tronco seguono la sua direzione in battaglia.
descriptions.ja: ドラムを叩き　特別な切り株が持つ力を引き出す。切り株の根っこは　戦いの最中　指示通りに動く。
descriptions.ko: 드럼을 쳐서 특별한 나무 그루터기가 가진 힘을 끌어낸다. 그루터기의 뿌리는 배틀 중에 지시하는 대로 움직인다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスゴリランダー

name: cinderace-gmax
description: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched.
appearance: Cinderace-Gmax is a tall, white bipedal rabbit with orange-tipped ears, wrists, and feet, a yellow-orange chest pattern, and red eyes, standing dynamically on one foot atop a colossal, flaming dark red Pyro Ball emitting intense blue and orange flames.

descriptions.fr: Il jongle avec un caillou avec ses pieds, le transformant en un ballon de football ardent. Ses tirs frappent durement les adversaires et les laissent brûlés.
descriptions.de: Es jongliert einen Kieselstein mit seinen Füßen und verwandelt ihn in einen brennenden Fußball. Seine Schüsse treffen Gegner hart und lassen sie versengt zurück.
descriptions.es: Hace malabares con una piedra con sus pies, convirtiéndola en un balón de fútbol ardiente. Sus tiros golpean fuertemente a los oponentes y los dejan quemados.
descriptions.it: Fa giocoleria con un sasso, trasformandolo in un ardente pallone da calcio. I suoi tiri colpiscono duramente gli avversari e li lasciano scottati.
descriptions.ja: 小石を足でリフティングして　燃え盛るサッカーボールに変える。シュートは相手を激しく打ち据え　焦がす。
descriptions.ko: 작은 돌을 발로 리프팅하여 불타오르는 축구공으로 바꾼다. 슛은 상대를 거세게 내리쳐 그슬린다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスエースバーン

name: inteleon-gmax
description: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.
appearance: Inteleon-Gmax is a slender, blue bipedal chameleon with black and yellow accents, purple eyes, and a whip-like tail that forms an immense, spiraling transparent water tower, poised with its right hand extended like a sniper.

descriptions.fr: Il possède de nombreuses capacités cachées, telles que des doigts qui peuvent tirer de l'eau et une membrane sur son dos qu'il peut utiliser pour planer dans les airs.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt viele verborgene Fähigkeiten, wie Fingerspitzen, die Wasser schießen können, und eine Membran auf seinem Rücken, mit der es durch die Luft gleiten kann.
descriptions.es: Tiene muchas capacidades ocultas, como dedos que pueden disparar agua y una membrana en su espalda que puede usar para planear por el aire.
descriptions.it: Possiede molte abilità nascoste, come le dita in grado di sparare acqua e una membrana sulla schiena che gli permette di planare nell'aria.
descriptions.ja: 指先から水を撃ち出す　隠れた能力が多数。背中の皮膜で空中を滑空できる。
descriptions.ko: 손끝에서 물을 쏘는 등 숨겨진 능력이 많다. 등 부분의 피막으로 공중을 활공할 수 있다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスインテレオン

name: corviknight-gmax
description: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.
appearance: Corviknight-Gmax is a massive, metallic black raven-like bird encased in segmented, sharp armor, featuring glowing red eyes, a sharp silver beak, and broad wings that generate a powerful dark-blue gale around its form.

descriptions.fr: Ce POKéMON règne en maître dans les cieux de la région de Galar. L'éclat noir de son corps d'acier pourrait semer la terreur dans le cœur de n'importe quel ennemi.
descriptions.de: Dieses POKéMON herrscht über die Himmel der Galar-Region. Der schwarze Glanz seines Stahlkörpers könnte jedem Feind Terror einjagen.
descriptions.es: Este POKéMON reina supremo en los cielos de la región de Galar. El brillo negro de su cuerpo de acero podría infundir terror en el corazón de cualquier enemigo.
descriptions.it: Questo POKéMON regna sovrano nei cieli della regione di Galar. La lucentezza nera del suo corpo d'acciaio potrebbe instillare terrore nel cuore di qualsiasi nemico.
descriptions.ja: ガラル地方の空の王者。鋼のボディの　黒い光沢は　どんな相手にも　恐怖を植え付ける。
descriptions.ko: 가라르지방 하늘의 왕자. 강철 보디의 검은 광택은 어떤 상대에게도 공포를 심어준다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスアーマーガア

name: orbeetle-gmax
description: It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.
appearance: Orbeetle-Gmax is a colossal, disc-shaped ladybug-like Pokemon with a metallic red shell on its back and two large, pointed wings, a small black head with yellow compound eyes, surrounded by multiple glowing blue, purple, and pink concentric energy rings.

descriptions.fr: Il est réputé pour son intelligence supérieure. La taille impressionnante de son cerveau est la preuve de son immense pouvoir psychique.
descriptions.de: Es ist berühmt für seine hohe Intelligenz. Die enorme Größe seines Gehirns ist ein Beweis für seine gewaltige Psycho-Kraft.
descriptions.es: Es famoso por su alto nivel de inteligencia. El gran tamaño de su cerebro es prueba de su inmenso poder psíquico.
descriptions.it: È famoso per la sua elevata intelligenza e le dimensioni del suo cervello dimostrano che possiede un immenso potere psichico.
descriptions.ja: 非常に高い知能を持つことで知られ、その巨大な脳は計り知れないサイコパワーを宿している証である。
descriptions.ko: 매우 높은 지능을 가진 것으로 알려져 있으며, 거대한 뇌는 헤아릴 수 없는 사이코파워를 지니고 있다는 증거다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスイオルブ

name: drednaw-gmax
description: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.
appearance: Drednaw-Gmax is a gigantic, bipedal snapping turtle with a dark green and brown patterned shell that transforms into a massive, jagged, rock-like mountain covered in white foamy water, a strong yellow-brown beak, and intense red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Ses mâchoires, capables de cisailler des barres d'acier, lui permettent de broyer ses proies malchanceuses.
descriptions.de: Seine Kiefer können Stahlstangen zerreißen. Dieses äußerst aggressive Pokémon beißt seine unglückliche Beute erbarmungslos.
descriptions.es: Con mandíbulas capaces de cortar barras de acero, este Pokémon extremadamente agresivo devora a sus desafortunadas presas.
descriptions.it: Con mascelle in grado di tranciare barre d'acciaio, questo Pokémon estremamente aggressivo azzanna le sue sfortunate prede.
descriptions.ja: 鉄骨を寸断するアゴで、獲物として目をつけたものを容赦なく食いちぎる、きわめて獰猛なポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 철골을 절단하는 턱으로, 먹이로 점찍은 것을 가차 없이 씹어 삼키는 매우 흉포한 포켓몬이다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスカジリガメ

name: coalossal-gmax
description: It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.
appearance: Coalossal-Gmax is a towering, dark grey coal monster with a red-orange rocky face, glowing yellow eyes, and a prominent chin spike, its body covered in burning veins of coal and rock, and a colossal, multi-tiered fiery mountain range on its back spewing glowing red-orange coals.

descriptions.fr: Généralement pacifique, le vandalisme des mines l'enrage. Les coupables seront incinérés par des flammes atteignant 1 480 degrés Celsius.
descriptions.de: Normalerweise friedlich, aber Vandalismus in Minen macht es wütend. Täter werden mit Flammen von über 1 480 Grad Celsius eingeäschert.
descriptions.es: Generalmente pacífico, el vandalismo en las minas lo enfurece. Los infractores serán incinerados por llamas que alcanzan los 1480 grados Celsius.
descriptions.it: Normalmente è pacifico, ma il vandalismo nelle miniere lo fa infuriare. I trasgressori vengono inceneriti con fiamme che raggiungono i 1480 gradi Celsius.
descriptions.ja: 普段はおとなしいが、炭鉱を荒らす者には容赦なく襲いかかり、およそ1480℃の炎で焼き尽くす。
descriptions.ko: 평소에는 온순하지만, 탄광을 훼손하는 자에게는 가차 없이 달려들어 약 1480℃의 불꽃으로 태워버린다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスセキタンザン

name: flapple-gmax
description: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.
appearance: Flapple-Gmax is a large, green apple split into two massive, ribbed wings with brown stems, revealing a small, green dragon-like creature with yellow eyes and a tiny red mouth peeking out from its core.

descriptions.fr: Son évolution fut déclenchée par la consommation d'une pomme acide. Dans ses joues, il stocke un acide capable de provoquer des brûlures chimiques.
descriptions.de: Der Verzehr eines sauren Apfels löste seine Entwicklung aus. In seinen Wangen speichert es eine Säure, die Verätzungen verursachen kann.
descriptions.es: Comió una manzana agria, lo que indujo su evolución. En sus mejillas, almacena un ácido capaz de causar quemaduras químicas.
descriptions.it: Ha mangiato una mela aspra, cosa che ha causato la sua evoluzione. Nelle sue guance, immagazzina un acido capace di provocare ustioni chimiche.
descriptions.ja: 酸っぱいりんごを食べて進化した。頬には化学やけどを起こすほどの酸を蓄えている。
descriptions.ko: 신맛이 나는 사과를 먹고 진화했다. 뺨에는 화학 화상을 일으킬 정도의 산을 비축하고 있다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスアップリュー

name: appletun-gmax
description: Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.
appearance: Appletun-Gmax is a colossal, round, green apple pie with soft yellowish-green skin and thick, creamy-white glaze drizzled over its top, from which its small, green dragon-like head with yellow eyes, a tiny red mouth, and small green wings emerges, topped by a gigantic, glowing, translucent strawberry.

descriptions.fr: Manger une pomme sucrée a causé son évolution. Un parfum miellé émane de son corps, attirant les Pokémon Insecte dont il se nourrit.
descriptions.de: Der Verzehr eines süßen Apfels verursachte seine Entwicklung. Ein nektarartiger Duft strömt von seinem Körper aus und lockt die Käfer-Pokémon an, die es jagt.
descriptions.es: Comer una manzana dulce causó su evolución. Un aroma nectarino emana de su cuerpo, atrayendo a los Pokémon Bicho de los que se alimenta.
descriptions.it: Mangiare una mela dolce ha causato la sua evoluzione. Un profumo di nettare emana dal suo corpo, attirando i Pokémon coleottero di cui si ciba.
descriptions.ja: 甘いりんごを食べて進化した。体から蜜のような匂いを漂わせ、捕食対象のむしポケモンを誘い込む。
descriptions.ko: 단맛이 나는 사과를 먹고 진화했다. 몸에서 꿀 같은 향기가 나, 포식 대상인 벌레 포켓몬을 유인한다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスタルップル

name: sandaconda-gmax
description: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened.
appearance: Sandaconda-Gmax is a colossal, brown-yellow snake with dark brown diamond markings on its back, yellow eyes, and a wide head, coiling upright to form a towering, swirling sand pillar with a massive sandstorm emanating from its mouth.

descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'il contracte son corps, plus de 100 kg de sable sont projetés par son nez. S'il vient à manquer de sable, il est découragé.
descriptions.de: Wenn es seinen Körper zusammenzieht, spritzen über 100 Kilogramm Sand aus seiner Nase. Geht ihm der Sand aus, wird es mutlos.
descriptions.es: Cuando contrae su cuerpo, más de 100 kilos de arena brotan de su nariz. Si se queda sin arena, se desanima.
descriptions.it: Quando contrae il corpo, oltre 100 kg di sabbia fuoriescono dal suo naso. Se rimane senza sabbia, si scoraggia.
descriptions.ja: 体を収縮させると、鼻から100㎏以上の砂を噴き出す。砂がなくなると、途端に落ち込んでしまう。
descriptions.ko: 몸을 수축하면 코에서 100kg 이상의 모래를 뿜어낸다. 모래가 없어지면 갑자기 의기소침해진다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスサダイジャ

name: toxtricity-amped-gmax
description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.
appearance: Toxtricity-Amped-Gmax is a tall, purple, punk-rock newt-like creature with a yellow lightning bolt on its chest, purple and teal spikes, a vibrant yellow mohawk, black eyes, and a spiky mouth, glowing with yellow electricity that forms a giant electric guitar around its body.

descriptions.fr: Quand ce Pokémon semble gratter une guitare, il griffe en fait les protubérances sur sa poitrine pour générer de l'électricité.
descriptions.de: Wenn dieses Pokémon klingt, als würde es eine Gitarre zupfen, kratzt es in Wahrheit an den Auswüchsen seiner Brust, um Elektrizität zu erzeugen.
descriptions.es: Cuando este Pokémon parece tocar una guitarra, en realidad está arañando las protuberancias de su pecho para generar electricidad.
descriptions.it: Quando sembra che stia strimpellando una chitarra, in realtà sta graffiando le protuberanze sul suo petto per generare elettricità.
descriptions.ja: まるでギターを弾いているように見えるが、胸の突起を引っ掻くことで電気を生み出しているのだ。
descriptions.ko: 마치 기타를 연주하는 것처럼 보이지만, 가슴의 돌기를 긁어서 전기를 만들어내고 있는 것이다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスストリンダー

name: centiskorch-gmax
description: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.
appearance: Centiskorch-Gmax is a gigantic, fiery centipede with a long, segmented red and orange body that arches high, resembling a colossal fire-spitting volcano, featuring a small red head with yellow eyes, two antennae, and numerous yellow-orange legs, constantly emitting intense flames.

descriptions.fr: Quand il s'échauffe, sa température corporelle atteint environ 815 degrés Celsius. Il fouette son corps comme un fouet et se projette sur ses ennemis.
descriptions.de: Wenn es sich aufheizt, erreicht seine Körpertemperatur etwa 815 Grad Celsius. Es schlägt seinen Körper wie eine Peitsche und stürzt sich auf seine Feinde.
descriptions.es: Cuando se calienta, su temperatura corporal alcanza unos 815 grados Celsius. Lanza su cuerpo como un látigo y se abalanza sobre sus enemigos.
descriptions.it: Quando si scalda, la sua temperatura corporea raggiunge circa 815 gradi Celsius. Scaglia il suo corpo come una frusta e si lancia contro i nemici.
descriptions.ja: 体が熱くなると、体温はおよそ815℃に達する。体をムチのようにしならせて、敵に飛びかかる。
descriptions.ko: 몸이 뜨거워지면 체온은 약 815℃에 도달한다. 몸을 채찍처럼 휘둘러 적에게 덮쳐든다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスマルヤクデ

name: hatterene-gmax
description: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.
appearance: Hatterene-Gmax is a tall, slender humanoid figure draped in a massive, conical dark blue cloak with bright blue eyes, from which long, flowing blue hair-like tendrils with pink, purple, and green tips emerge, resembling powerful witch-like hands.

descriptions.fr: Il émet un pouvoir psychique assez puissant pour provoquer des maux de tête, dissuadant ainsi l'approche d'autrui.
descriptions.de: Es sendet Psycho-Kraft aus, die stark genug ist, um Kopfschmerzen zu verursachen, um andere von der Annäherung abzuhalten.
descriptions.es: Emite un poder psíquico lo suficientemente fuerte como para causar dolores de cabeza, disuadiendo así el acercamiento de otros.
descriptions.it: Emette un potere psichico talmente forte da causare mal di testa, scoraggiando così l'avvicinamento degli altri.
descriptions.ja: 他者が近づくのを deterrent するために、頭痛を引き起こすほどの強力なサイコパワーを放つ。
descriptions.ko: 다른 이들의 접근을 막기 위해 두통을 일으킬 정도로 강력한 사이코파워를 방출한다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスブリムオン

name: grimmsnarl-gmax
description: With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.
appearance: Grimmsnarl-Gmax is a massive, hulking dark-green humanoid covered in long, thick dark green hair that forms into powerful braids resembling claws and fists, featuring a broad, intimidating dark-pink face with glowing yellow eyes, sharp fangs, and a large nose.

descriptions.fr: Grâce aux poils enroulés autour de son corps qui renforcent ses muscles, ce Pokémon peut maîtriser même un Mackogneur.
descriptions.de: Mit den Haaren, die seinen Körper umwickeln und seine Muskeln verstärken, kann dieses Pokémon sogar Machomei überwältigen.
descriptions.es: Con el cabello enrollado alrededor de su cuerpo que ayuda a potenciar sus músculos, este Pokémon puede abrumar incluso a Machamp.
descriptions.it: Con i peli avvolti intorno al suo corpo che rafforzano i suoi muscoli, questo Pokémon può sopraffare persino Machamp.
descriptions.ja: 体に巻き付いた体毛で筋肉を強化し、カイリキーさえも圧倒する力を発揮する。
descriptions.ko: 몸에 감긴 털로 근육을 강화하여 괴력몬마저도 압도하는 힘을 발휘한다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスオーロンゲ

name: alcremie-gmax
description: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.
appearance: Alcremie-Gmax is a colossal, multi-tiered wedding cake with creamy-white frosting, vibrant pink and red fruit decorations, a small white head with pink eyes and a tiny mouth adorned with a red strawberry, and topped by a gigantic, glowing, translucent strawberry crown.

descriptions.fr: Quand il fait confiance à un Dresseur, il lui offre des Baies qu'il a décorées avec de la crème.
descriptions.de: Vertraut es einem Trainer, bietet es diesem Beeren an, die es mit Sahne verziert hat.
descriptions.es: Cuando confía en un Entrenador, le ofrece bayas que ha decorado con nata.
descriptions.it: Se si fida di un Allenatore, gli offre delle bacche decorate con della panna.
descriptions.ja: トレーナーに　心を許すと　クリームで　デコレーションした　きのみを　ふるまってくれる。
descriptions.ko: 트레이너에게 마음을 열면 크림으로 장식한 나무열매를 대접해준다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスマホイップ

name: copperajah-gmax
description: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.
appearance: Copperajah-Gmax is a gigantic, metallic-blue elephant with four massive legs, small yellow eyes, two large dark-blue metallic tusks, and a powerful, segmented trunk resembling a massive industrial crane, its body emitting steam from various joints.

descriptions.fr: Ils sont venus d'une autre région il y a longtemps et ont travaillé avec les humains. Leur peau verte est résistante à l'eau.
descriptions.de: Vor langer Zeit kamen sie aus einer anderen Region und arbeiteten mit Menschen zusammen. Ihre grüne Haut ist wasserresistent.
descriptions.es: Vinieron de otra región hace mucho tiempo y trabajaron junto a los humanos. Su piel verde es resistente al agua.
descriptions.it: Vennero da un'altra regione molto tempo fa e lavorarono insieme agli umani. La loro pelle verde è resistente all'acqua.
descriptions.ja: 遠い昔　ほかの地方から　やってきて　人間と　力を合わせ働いた。　緑色の肌は　水に強い。
descriptions.ko: 먼 옛날 다른 지방에서 넘어와 인간과 함께 힘을 합쳐 일했다. 녹색 피부는 물에 강하다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスダイオウドウ

name: duraludon-gmax
description: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.
appearance: Duraludon-Gmax is a colossal, bipedal, metallic grey dragon with an elongated, tower-like body, two small, sharp dark-blue wings, glowing red lines running along its form, and an angular head with two glowing red eyes, its upper body transformed into a glowing red energy cannon.

descriptions.fr: Son corps ressemble à du métal poli, et il est à la fois léger et robuste. Son seul inconvénient est qu'il rouille facilement.
descriptions.de: Sein Körper ähnelt poliertem Metall und ist sowohl leicht als auch stark. Der einzige Nachteil ist, dass es leicht rostet.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo parece metal pulido, y es ligero y fuerte a la vez. El único inconveniente es que se oxida con facilidad.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo ricorda il metallo lucidato, ed è sia leggero che resistente. L'unico inconveniente è che arrugginisce facilmente.
descriptions.ja: 磨かれた　金属のような　体は　軽量で　丈夫。　唯一の　欠点は　サビやすいこと。
descriptions.ko: 연마된 금속 같은 몸은 경량이면서 튼튼하다. 유일한 단점은 녹슬기 쉽다는 것이다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスジュラルドン

name: urshifu-single-strike-gmax
description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
appearance: Urshifu-Single-Strike-Gmax is a massive, dark grey humanoid bear with a white muzzle, dark red armor-like markings around its black eyes and on its body, pointed red ears, and a colossal, shadowy, dark purple fist enveloped in dark energy.

descriptions.fr: Cette forme de Shifours est une fervente adepte du K.O. en un coup. Sa stratégie est de bondir près de l'adversaire et d'asséner un coup dévastateur avec un poing durci.
descriptions.de: Diese Form von Urshifu ist ein starker Verfechter des Ein-Treffer-K.O. Seine Strategie ist es, Gegnern nahezuspringen und einen verheerenden Schlag mit einer gehärteten Faust zu landen.
descriptions.es: Esta forma de Urshifu cree firmemente en el K.O. de un solo golpe. Su estrategia es saltar cerca de los enemigos y asestar un golpe devastador con un puño endurecido.
descriptions.it: Questa forma di Urshifu crede fermamente nel K.O. in un colpo solo. La sua strategia consiste nel balzare vicino ai nemici e assestare un colpo devastante con un pugno indurito.
descriptions.ja: 一撃必殺を　強く信じる　ウーラオス。　相手に　飛び込み　硬化させた　拳で　一撃必殺を　叩き込む。
descriptions.ko: 일격필살을 굳게 믿는 우라오스. 상대에게 달려들어 경화시킨 주먹으로 일격필살을 날린다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスウーラオス

name: urshifu-rapid-strike-gmax
description: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
appearance: Urshifu-Rapid-Strike-Gmax is a massive, dark grey humanoid bear with a white muzzle, bright blue armor-like markings around its black eyes and on its body, pointed blue ears, and a colossal, swirling, bright blue wave of water formed into an open hand.

descriptions.fr: Cette forme de Shifours est une fervente adepte du K.O. en un coup. Sa stratégie est de bondir près de l'adversaire et d'asséner un coup dévastateur avec un poing durci.
descriptions.de: Diese Form von Urshifu ist ein starker Verfechter des Ein-Treffer-K.O. Seine Strategie ist es, Gegnern nahezuspringen und einen verheerenden Schlag mit einer gehärteten Faust zu landen.
descriptions.es: Esta forma de Urshifu cree firmemente en el K.O. de un solo golpe. Su estrategia es saltar cerca de los enemigos y asestar un golpe devastador con un puño endurecido.
descriptions.it: Questa forma di Urshifu crede fermamente nel K.O. in un colpo solo. La sua strategia consiste nel balzare vicino ai nemici e assestare un colpo devastante con un pugno indurito.
descriptions.ja: 一撃必殺を　強く信じる　ウーラオス。　相手に　飛び込み　硬化させた　拳で　一撃必殺を　叩き込む。
descriptions.ko: 일격필살을 굳게 믿는 우라오스. 상대에게 달려들어 경화시킨 주먹으로 일격필살을 날린다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスウーラオス

name: toxtricity-low-key-gmax
description: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.
appearance: Toxtricity-Low-Key-Gmax is a tall, blue, punk-rock newt-like creature with a light blue lightning bolt on its chest, dark blue and green spikes, a light blue mohawk, black eyes, and a spiky mouth, glowing with light blue electricity that forms a giant electric guitar around its body.

descriptions.fr: Quand ce Pokémon donne l'impression de jouer de la guitare, il gratte en fait les protubérances sur sa poitrine pour générer de l'électricité.
descriptions.de: Wenn dieses Pokémon klingt, als würde es Gitarre spielen, kratzt es in Wahrheit an den Ausstülpungen auf seiner Brust, um Elektrizität zu erzeugen.
descriptions.es: Cuando este Pokémon suena como si estuviera tocando una guitarra, en realidad está arañando las protuberancias de su pecho para generar electricidad.
descriptions.it: Quando questo Pokémon sembra suonare la chitarra, in realtà sta graffiando le protuberanze sul suo petto per generare elettricità.
descriptions.ja: ギターを　かき鳴らすように　聞こえるが　胸の　突起を　爪で　ひっかき　電気を　発生させている。
descriptions.ko: 기타를 연주하는 것처럼 들리지만 가슴의 돌기를 손톱으로 긁어서 전기를 발생시키고 있다.

display_names.ja: キョダイマックスストリンダー

name: growlithe-hisui
description: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.
appearance: Growlithe-Hisui is a quadrupedal puppy-like Pokemon with thick, shaggy off-white fur covering its head and neck, reddish-brown fur on its body, two brown patches around its black eyes, a small dark nose, and a small horn-like rock protrusion on its forehead.

descriptions.fr: Très protecteur de son territoire. Il aboie et mord pour repousser les intrus de son espace.
descriptions.de: Sehr territorial. Es bellt und beißt, um Eindringlinge aus seinem Bereich zu vertreiben.
descriptions.es: Muy protector de su territorio. Ladrará y morderá para repeler a los intrusos de su espacio.
descriptions.it: Molto protettivo del suo territorio. Abbaia e morde per respingere gli intrusi dal suo spazio.
descriptions.ja: 自分の　縄張りを　とても　大切にする。　侵入者がいれば　吠えたり　噛みついたりして　追い払う。
descriptions.ko: 자신의 영역을 매우 중요하게 생각한다. 침입자가 있으면 짖거나 물어뜯어 쫓아낸다.

name: arcanine-hisui
description: A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
appearance: Arcanine-Hisui is a large, quadrupedal canine with a flowing, voluminous mane and tail of shaggy off-white fur, a reddish-brown body, distinctive black markings around its black eyes, a dark nose, and sharp, rock-like fangs, adorned with large, flame-like rock protrusions on its back and head.

descriptions.fr: Un POKéMON admiré depuis le passé pour sa beauté. Il court avec agilité comme s'il avait des ailes.
descriptions.de: Ein POKéMON, das seit der Vergangenheit für seine Schönheit bewundert wird. Es läuft agil, als ob es Flügel hätte.
descriptions.es: Un POKéMON admirado desde el pasado por su belleza. Corre con agilidad como si tuviera alas.
descriptions.it: Un POKéMON ammirato fin dal passato per la sua bellezza. Corre con agilità come se avesse delle ali.
descriptions.ja: 過去から　その美しさに　賞賛されてきた　ポケモン。　翼あるかのように　俊敏に　駆け抜ける。
descriptions.ko: 과거부터 그 아름다움에 찬사를 받아온 포켓몬. 날개를 단 듯 민첩하게 달린다.

name: voltorb-hisui
description: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL, they have zapped many people.
appearance: Voltorb-Hisui is a spherical Pokemon resembling a wooden Poke Ball, with a smooth brown lower half and a lighter, woody textured upper half, featuring a large, angry black oval for an eye and a small dark hole where a mouth might be on its upper half.

descriptions.fr: Généralement trouvé dans les centrales électriques. Facilement confondu avec une POKé BALL, il a électrocuté de nombreuses personnes.
descriptions.de: Normalerweise in Kraftwerken zu finden. Leicht mit einem POKé BALL zu verwechseln, hat es viele Menschen geschockt.
descriptions.es: Generalmente se encuentra en centrales eléctricas. Fácilmente confundido con una POKé BALL, ha electrocutado a muchas personas.
descriptions.it: Generalmente si trova nelle centrali elettriche. Facilmente scambiato per una POKé BALL, ha fulminato molte persone.
descriptions.ja: 発電所に　よく生息する。　モンスターボールと　間違えられやすく　多くの人を　しびれさせた。
descriptions.ko: 발전소에서 자주 서식한다. 몬스터볼로 착각하기 쉬워 많은 사람들을 감전시켰다.

name: electrode-hisui
description: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.
appearance: Electrode-Hisui is a large, spherical Pokemon resembling an inverted wooden Poke Ball, with a smooth brown upper half and a lighter, woody textured lower half separated by a wooden band, its face featuring large, angry black oval eyes, a small dark hole for a mouth, and a tuft of light brown fur or wood shavings on top.

descriptions.fr: Il stocke de l'énergie électrique sous très haute pression. Il explose souvent avec peu ou pas de provocation.
descriptions.de: Es speichert elektrische Energie unter sehr hohem Druck. Es explodiert oft mit wenig oder keiner Provokation.
descriptions.es: Almacena energía eléctrica a muy alta presión. A menudo explota con poca o ninguna provocación.
descriptions.it: Immagazzina energia elettrica a pressione molto elevata. Esplode spesso con poca o nessuna provocazione.
descriptions.ja: 非常に　高い圧力で　電気エネルギーを　蓄えている。　少しの刺激でも　しばしば　爆発する。
descriptions.ko: 매우 높은 압력으로 전기 에너지를 저장한다. 약간의 자극에도 종종 폭발한다.

name: typhlosion-hisui
description: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
appearance: Typhlosion-Hisui is a bipedal badger-like Pokemon with a slender, somewhat spectral purple-grey body, a white belly, dark-purple fur on its head and back, calm-looking red eyes, a small dark nose and mouth, and a collar of spectral purple flames constantly emanating from its neck and tail.

descriptions.fr: Quand sa fureur atteint son paroxysme, son corps devient si brûlant que tout ce qu'il touche s'enflamme instantanément.
descriptions.de: Wenn seine Wut ihren Höhepunkt erreicht, wird es so heiß, dass alles, was es berührt, sofort in Flammen aufgeht.
descriptions.es: Cuando su furia alcanza el máximo, se vuelve tan candente que cualquier cosa que lo toque se incendia al instante.
descriptions.it: Quando la sua furia raggiunge l'apice, diventa così rovente che qualunque cosa lo tocchi si incendia all'istante.
descriptions.ja: 怒りが頂点に達すると触れたものが即座に燃え上がるほど高熱の炎をまとう。
descriptions.ko: 분노가 극에 달하면 만지는 것이 순식간에 불타오를 정도로 고열의 불꽃을 휘감는다.

name: qwilfish-hisui
description: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.
appearance: Qwilfish-Hisui is a round, dark blue pufferfish-like Pokemon covered in sharp, pointed white spikes, with a lighter blue belly, a small, pointed dark blue fin on its back, two small black beady eyes, and a small, puckered mouth.

descriptions.fr: Pour projeter ses épines empoisonnées, il doit gonfler son corps en buvant plus de dix litres d'eau d'un coup.
descriptions.de: Um seine Giftstacheln abzufeuern, muss es seinen Körper aufblasen, indem es auf einmal über zehn Liter Wasser trinkt.
descriptions.es: Para disparar sus púas venenosas, debe inflar su cuerpo bebiendo de una sola vez más de diez litros de agua.
descriptions.it: Per sparare le sue spine velenose, deve gonfiare il corpo bevendo più di dieci litri d'acqua in una volta sola.
descriptions.ja: 毒のトゲを飛ばすため一気に１０リットル以上の水を飲み込み体を膨らませる。
descriptions.ko: 독가시를 쏘기 위해 단번에 10리터 이상의 물을 마셔 몸을 부풀린다.

name: sneasel-hisui
description: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.
appearance: Sneasel-Hisui is a slender, bipedal weasel-like Pokemon with primarily grey fur, a white belly, bright red eyes, a prominent dark purple facial marking over its right eye, a long, pointed dark purple ear on its right side, a large dark purple claw on its left hand, and a long tail tipped with a dark purple plume.

descriptions.fr: Ses pattes dissimulent des griffes acérées. S'il est attaqué, il les sort soudainement pour surprendre son ennemi.
descriptions.de: Seine Pfoten verbergen scharfe Krallen. Wird es angegriffen, fährt es sie plötzlich aus und erschreckt seinen Gegner.
descriptions.es: Sus patas ocultan unas garras afiladas. Si lo atacan, las extiende de repente para asustar a su enemigo.
descriptions.it: Le sue zampe nascondono affilati artigli. Se attaccato, li estende all'improvviso per spaventare il nemico.
descriptions.ja: 鋭い爪を隠し持った手足で敵に襲われた際には爪を閃かせて相手を怯ませる。
descriptions.ko: 날카로운 손톱을 숨긴 손발로 적에게 습격당하면 손톱을 번뜩여 상대를 위협한다.

name: samurott-hisui
description: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.
appearance: Samurott-Hisui is a large, quadrupedal sea otter-like Pokemon with a sleek, dark blue body, a cream-colored underbelly, a large, pointed dark blue shell on its back, a dark blue face with large yellow eyes and a small dark nose, framed by two prominent, swirling white shell-like whiskers, and forelegs armed with sharp, pointed dark blue shells.

descriptions.fr: Un coup de l'épée intégrée à son armure peut terrasser un adversaire. Un simple regard de sa part suffit à calmer tout le monde.
descriptions.de: Ein einziger Hieb des in seine Rüstung integrierten Schwertes kann einen Gegner zu Fall bringen. Ein einfacher Blick von ihm bringt jeden zur Ruhe.
descriptions.es: Un solo tajo de la espada integrada en su armadura puede derribar a un oponente. Una simple mirada suya silencia a cualquiera.
descriptions.it: Un solo fendente della spada integrata nella sua armatura può mettere al tappeto un avversario. Un suo semplice sguardo ammutolisce chiunque.
descriptions.ja: 鎧に仕込まれた刀の一振りは相手を怯ませる。たった一睨みで誰もが静まり返る。
descriptions.ko: 갑옷에 숨겨진 칼 한 번 휘두르는 것으로 상대를 겁먹게 한다. 단 한 번 노려보는 것만으로도 모두가 조용해진다.

name: lilligant-hisui
description: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.
appearance: Lilligant-Hisui is a graceful, bipedal plant-like Pokemon with a green body, white arms, long green dancer-like legs, gentle black eyes, a small closed mouth, and a head adorned with a large, vibrant pink flower with a prominent yellow center, topped by two large, curling green leaves, and a small pink flower on its chest.

descriptions.fr: Même les Dresseurs aguerris ont du mal à faire éclore sa magnifique fleur. Ce Pokémon est populaire auprès des célébrités.
descriptions.de: Selbst erfahrene Trainer haben Mühe, seine wunderschöne Blume zum Blühen zu bringen. Dieses Pokémon ist bei Prominenten beliebt.
descriptions.es: Incluso los Entrenadores veteranos tienen dificultades para hacer florecer su hermosa flor. Este Pokémon es popular entre las celebridades.
descriptions.it: Anche i più esperti Allenatori faticano a far schiudere il suo magnifico fiore. Questo Pokémon è molto popolare tra i VIP.
descriptions.ja: 美しい花を咲かせるのは熟練のトレーナーでも至難の業。著名人に人気のポケモン。
descriptions.ko: 아름다운 꽃을 피우게 하는 것은 숙련된 트레이너에게도 어려운 일이다. 유명 인사들에게 인기 있는 포켓몬.

name: zorua-hisui
description: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.
appearance: This small, quadrupedal fox-like Pokémon has white-grey fur with black paws, inner ears, and black tips on its large, fluffy collar and tail, featuring striking red eyes and a red, mask-like marking above them, with no visible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il prend l'apparence d'autrui pour les surprendre. Apparemment, il se transforme souvent en enfant silencieux.
descriptions.de: Es nimmt die Gestalt anderer an, um sie zu überraschen. Anscheinend verwandelt es sich oft in ein stilles Kind.
descriptions.es: Adopta la forma de otros para sorprenderlos. Al parecer, a menudo se transforma en un niño silencioso.
descriptions.it: Assume le sembianze altrui per sorprenderli. A quanto pare, si trasforma spesso in un bambino silenzioso.
descriptions.ja: 他者の姿に変身し驚かす。物静かな子供の姿に化けることが多いようだ。
descriptions.ko: 다른 모습으로 변신하여 놀라게 한다. 말없는 아이의 모습으로 변하는 경우가 많은 듯하다.

name: zoroark-hisui
description: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.
appearance: This slender, bipedal Pokémon is covered in white fur, featuring black hands and feet, a long, flowing white mane that transitions to red tips, and a large bushy white tail also tipped with red, all framing red eyes and a black snout with no distinct mouth.

descriptions.fr: Les liens entre ces Pokémon sont très forts. Il protège la sécurité de sa meute en trompant ses adversaires.
descriptions.de: Die Bindungen zwischen diesen Pokémon sind sehr stark. Es schützt die Sicherheit seines Rudels, indem es seine Gegner austrickst.
descriptions.es: Los lazos entre estos Pokémon son muy fuertes. Protege la seguridad de su manada engañando a sus oponentes.
descriptions.it: I legami tra questi Pokémon sono molto forti. Protegge la sicurezza del suo branco ingannando gli avversari.
descriptions.ja: 同士の絆が非常に強く相手を欺くことで仲間を守る。
descriptions.ko: 동족 간의 유대가 매우 강하며 상대를 속이는 것으로 동료를 지킨다.

name: braviary-hisui
description: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.
appearance: This large, eagle-like Pokémon has a dark greyish-blue body, white back and wings, a white tail, a fluffy white collar, and a vibrant purple head adorned with a red flame-like emblem on its forehead, red eyes, a light grey beak, and light grey talons, with a notable white feathery beard.

descriptions.fr: Il se bat pour ses amis sans se soucier du danger. Il peut transporter une voiture en plein vol.
descriptions.de: Es kämpft für seine Freunde, ohne an die eigene Gefahr zu denken. Eines kann ein Auto im Flug tragen.
descriptions.es: Luchan por sus amigos sin pensar en el peligro. Uno de ellos puede cargar un coche mientras vuela.
descriptions.it: Combatte per i suoi amici senza curarsi del pericolo. Un esemplare può trasportare un'automobile mentre è in volo.
descriptions.ja: 仲間のためなら己の身の危険を顧みず戦う。車一台を抱えたまま飛べる。
descriptions.ko: 동료를 위해서라면 자신의 몸의 위험을 돌아보지 않고 싸운다. 자동차 한 대를 들고 날 수 있다.

name: sliggoo-hisui
description: It drives away opponents by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes devolved, so it can’t see anything.
appearance: This slug-like Pokémon has a dark grey-purple body with a light grey underbelly, featuring two prominent yellow horn-like antennae tipped with dark purple spots, small yellow dot eyes, and a yellowish-orange dome-shaped shell on its back marked with dark purple spots, with no visible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il chasse ses adversaires en sécrétant un liquide collant capable de dissoudre n'importe quoi. Ses yeux ont régressé, donc il ne peut rien voir.
descriptions.de: Es vertreibt Gegner, indem es eine klebrige Flüssigkeit absondert, die alles auflösen kann. Seine Augen haben sich zurückentwickelt, sodass es nichts sehen kann.
descriptions.es: Ahuyenta a sus oponentes segregando un líquido pegajoso que puede disolver cualquier cosa. Sus ojos han degenerado, por lo que no puede ver nada.
descriptions.it: Allontana gli avversari secernendo un liquido appiccicoso che può dissolvere qualsiasi cosa. I suoi occhi si sono atrofizzati, quindi non riesce a vedere nulla.
descriptions.ja: あらゆるものを溶かす粘液で敵を退ける。目は退化してしまい何も見えない。
descriptions.ko: 모든 것을 녹이는 점액으로 적을 물리친다. 눈은 퇴화되어 아무것도 볼 수 없다.

name: goodra-hisui
description: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokémon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime.
appearance: This large, bipedal, dragon-like Pokémon has a dark metallic purple-grey body, a light grey underbelly, and a prominent rusty metallic brown shell on its back adorned with dark purple spots, featuring two large yellow snail-like horns with dark purple tips, yellow eyes with green pupils and light grey rings, and a small, downturned line mouth.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon Dragon très amical câlinera son Dresseur adoré, le laissant couvert d'une bave collante.
descriptions.de: Dieses sehr freundliche Drachen-Pokémon umarmt seinen geliebten Trainer und hinterlässt ihn mit klebrigem Schleim bedeckt.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon de tipo Dragón tan amigable abrazará a su querido Entrenador, dejándolo cubierto de una baba pegajosa.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon di tipo Drago molto amichevole abbraccerà il suo Allenatore prediletto, lasciandolo ricoperto di melma appiccicosa.
descriptions.ja: とても人懐っこいドラゴンポケモン。大好きなトレーナーを抱きしめるとねばねばした粘液まみれにしてしまう。
descriptions.ko: 매우 다정한 드래곤 포켓몬. 가장 좋아하는 트레이너를 껴안으면 끈적끈적한 점액투성이로 만들어버린다.

name: avalugg-hisui
description: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.
appearance: This massive, flat-bodied, quadrupedal Pokémon resembles an iceberg, colored light blue-grey with a darker blue belly, featuring a large, flat, sectioned back, two pointed dark blue-grey ice spikes on its shoulders and smaller ones on its hindquarters, a flat, angular head with a large darker blue-grey chin, yellow eyes, and a small, downturned mouth.

descriptions.fr: Son corps recouvert de glace est dur comme l'acier. Sa masse imposante écrase tout sur son passage.
descriptions.de: Sein eisbedeckter Körper ist stahlhart. Sein schwerfälliger Körperbau zermalmt alles, was sich ihm in den Weg stellt.
descriptions.es: Su cuerpo cubierto de hielo es tan duro como el acero. Su imponente armazón aplasta todo lo que se interpone en su camino.
descriptions.it: Il suo corpo ricoperto di ghiaccio è duro come l'acciaio. La sua mole massiccia schiaccia qualsiasi cosa gli si pari davanti.
descriptions.ja: 氷に覆われた体は鋼のように硬い。その巨体は、立ちはだかるものすべてを押し潰す。
descriptions.ko: 얼음으로 뒤덮인 몸은 강철처럼 단단하다. 그 거대한 몸은 앞을 가로막는 모든 것을 짓누른다.

name: decidueye-hisui
description: It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble at distances over a hundred yards.
appearance: This tall, bipedal, owl-like Pokémon features dark green primary plumage with red accents on its wingtips and tail, a dark green face with a reddish-brown mask, a light brown chest and underbelly, dark brown legs, a yellow beak, and red eyes, all crowned by a large, conical, red-tipped straw hat-like headpiece and an arrow-like chest feather.

descriptions.fr: Il tire des plumes-flèches de ses ailes avec une telle précision qu'il peut percer un caillou à plus de cent mètres de distance.
descriptions.de: Es verschießt Federpfeile von seinen Flügeln mit solcher Präzision, dass es einen Kieselstein auf über hundert Meter Entfernung durchbohren kann.
descriptions.es: Dispara sus plumas-flecha desde las alas con tal precisión que puede atravesar una pequeña piedra a más de cien metros de distancia.
descriptions.it: Scaglia piume-frecce dalle sue ali con una tale precisione da poter trafiggere un sassolino a oltre cento metri di distanza.
descriptions.ja: 翼から放つ矢羽は百メートル先の小石も射貫く精密さ。
descriptions.ko: 날개에서 발사하는 깃털 화살은 100미터 이상 떨어진 조약돌도 꿰뚫는 정교함을 지녔다.

name: dialga-origin
description: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.
appearance: This celestial, centaur-like Pokémon has a dark blue and grey metallic body with a heavily armored silver chest piece, from which a large diamond-shaped jewel protrudes; its small head bears four light blue glowing spikes and no discernible mouth or eyes, while its long, segmented, serpent-like tail is tipped with a light blue glowing diamond.

descriptions.fr: Il a le pouvoir de contrôler le temps. Il apparaît dans les mythes de la région de Sinnoh comme une divinité antique.
descriptions.de: Es hat die Macht, die Zeit zu kontrollieren. In den Mythen der Sinnoh-Region erscheint es als uralte Gottheit.
descriptions.es: Tiene el poder de controlar el tiempo. En los mitos de la región de Sinnoh, aparece como una deidad ancestral.
descriptions.it: Ha il potere di controllare il tempo. Nei miti della regione di Sinnoh, appare come un'antica divinità.
descriptions.ja: 時を司る力を持つ。シンオウ地方の神話においては、古の神として描かれている。
descriptions.ko: 시간을 다스리는 힘을 지녔다. 신오지방 신화에서는 오랜 옛날의 신으로 묘사되어 있다.

display_names.ja: ディアルガ (オリジンフォルム)

name: palkia-origin
description: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.
appearance: This celestial, centaur-like Pokémon has a light purple and grey metallic body with a heavily armored silver chest piece, from which a large pearl-shaped jewel protrudes; its small head bears four light pink glowing spikes and no discernible mouth or eyes, while its long, segmented, serpent-like tail is tipped with a light pink glowing pearl.

descriptions.fr: Il a la capacité de déformer l'espace. Il est décrit comme une divinité dans la mythologie de la région de Sinnoh.
descriptions.de: Es hat die Fähigkeit, den Raum zu verzerren. In der Mythologie der Sinnoh-Region wird es als Gottheit beschrieben.
descriptions.es: Tiene la capacidad de distorsionar el espacio. En la mitología de la región de Sinnoh, se le describe como una deidad.
descriptions.it: Ha la capacità di distorcere lo spazio. Nella mitologia della regione di Sinnoh, è descritto come una divinità.
descriptions.ja: 空間を歪める能力を持つ。シンオウ地方の神話では、神として描かれている。
descriptions.ko: 공간을 왜곡하는 능력을 지녔다. 신오지방 신화에서는 신으로 묘사되어 있다.

display_names.ja: パルキア (オリジンフォルム)

name: basculin-white-striped
description: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they’ll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.
appearance: This elongated, fish-like Pokémon is primarily light green with a white belly, featuring a distinct jagged white stripe running horizontally along its midsection, light green fins, red eyes with black pupils, and a small, downturned mouth revealing visible teeth.

descriptions.fr: Les Bargantua rouges et bleus s'entendent si mal qu'ils se battent instantanément. Ces Pokémon sont très hostiles.
descriptions.de: Rote und blaue Barschuft verstehen sich so schlecht, dass sie sofort zu kämpfen beginnen. Diese Pokémon sind sehr feindselig.
descriptions.es: Los Basculin rojos y azules se llevan tan mal que empiezan a pelear al instante. Estos Pokémon son muy hostiles.
descriptions.it: I Basculin rossi e blu vanno così poco d'accordo che iniziano a lottare all'istante. Questi Pokémon sono molto ostili.
descriptions.ja: 赤いバスラオと青いバスラオは仲が悪く、すぐに喧嘩を始める。非常に好戦的なポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 붉은색 배쓰나이와 푸른색 배쓰나이는 사이가 나빠서 금방 싸움을 시작한다. 매우 호전적인 포켓몬이다.

name: basculegion-female
description: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.
appearance: This large, elongated, fish-like Pokémon has a dark green upper body with a greyish-white belly, featuring a darker green head with prominent red lips and two red cheek markings, dark eyes with white pupils, a light green ghost-like fin behind its head, a body covered in small lighter green circular markings, and flowing dark green and greyish-white fins, culminating in a tattered, veil-like tail.

descriptions.fr: Il se vêt des âmes de ses congénères qui ont péri avant d'accomplir leur objectif de remonter le courant. Aucune autre espèce de toutes les rivières d'Hisui n'est l'égale de Paragruel.
descriptions.de: Es kleidet sich in die Seelen von Artgenossen, die gestorben sind, bevor sie ihre Ziele beim Aufstieg des Flusses erfüllten. Keine andere Spezies in Hisuis Flüssen ist Basculegion ebenbürtig.
descriptions.es: Se viste con las almas de los compañeros que perecieron antes de cumplir su objetivo de remontar el río. Ninguna otra especie de Hisui es rival para Basculegion.
descriptions.it: Si riveste delle anime dei compagni periti prima di raggiungere la meta di risalire la corrente. Nessun'altra specie di Hisui può eguagliare Basculegion.
descriptions.ja: 川を遡るという目標を果たすことなく命を落とした仲間たちの魂を身にまとう。ヒスイのどの川を見てもイダイトウに匹敵するポケモンはいない。
descriptions.ko: 강을 거슬러 오르는 목표를 이루지 못하고 목숨을 잃은 동료들의 영혼을 몸에 두른다. 히스이의 어떤 강을 살펴봐도 대쓰여너에 필적하는 포켓몬은 없다.

name: enamorus-therian
description: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.
appearance: This Pokémon has a pinkish-purple human-like upper body with white accents, a white cloud-like headpiece resembling hair, a dark green serpent-like lower body adorned with pink heart-shaped markings, yellow eyes with green pupils, a pink snout with two small fangs, and light pink rings on its arms.

descriptions.fr: Quand il s'envole vers cette terre depuis l'autre côté de la mer, l'hiver rigoureux prend fin. Selon la légende, l'amour de ce Pokémon donne naissance à l'éclosion de la vie nouvelle à travers Hisui.
descriptions.de: Wenn es von jenseits des Meeres in dieses Land fliegt, nimmt der strenge Winter ein Ende. Der Legende nach lässt die Liebe dieses Pokémon frisches Leben in Hisui sprießen.
descriptions.es: Cuando vuela a esta tierra desde el otro lado del mar, el crudo invierno llega a su fin. Según la leyenda, el amor de este Pokémon da origen al brote de nueva vida en Hisui.
descriptions.it: Quando vola verso questa terra da oltre il mare, l'amaro inverno finisce. Secondo la leggenda, l'amore di questo Pokémon fa sbocciare nuova vita in tutta Hisui.
descriptions.ja: 海の向こうからこの地へ飛来すると、厳しい冬は終わりを告げる。伝承によれば、このポケモンの愛がヒスイに新しい命の芽吹きをもたらすという。
descriptions.ko: 바다 건너편에서 이곳으로 날아오면 혹독한 겨울은 끝을 고한다. 전승에 따르면 이 포켓몬의 사랑이 히스이에 새로운 생명의 싹틈을 가져온다고 한다.

display_names.ja: ラブトロス (れいじゅうフォルム)

name: tauros-paldea-combat-breed
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.
appearance: This muscular, black-furred, bovine Pokémon features a grey muzzle, three black tails, dark grey horns that curl forward, a distinctive thick grey wavy marking on its forehead, red eyes, and a visible black nose and mouth.

descriptions.fr: Quand il cible un ennemi, il charge furieusement en fouettant son corps avec ses longues queues.
descriptions.de: Wenn es ein Ziel ins Visier nimmt, stürmt es wütend los und peitscht seinen Körper mit seinen langen Schweifen.
descriptions.es: Cuando fija un objetivo, arremete furiosamente mientras azota su cuerpo con sus largas colas.
descriptions.it: Quando individua un nemico, carica furiosamente frustando il proprio corpo con le sue lunghe code.
descriptions.ja: 標的を定めるや否や、長く伸びた尻尾で体を打ちつけながら猛然と突進する。
descriptions.ko: 표적을 정하면 길게 뻗은 꼬리로 몸을 때리면서 맹렬하게 돌진한다.

display_names.ja: パルデアケンタロス (コンバット種)

name: tauros-paldea-blaze-breed
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.
appearance: This muscular, black-furred, bovine Pokémon features a grey muzzle, three black tails, horns that are orange-red at the base and fade to dark grey tips, a prominent fiery red wavy marking glowing subtly on its forehead, red eyes, and a visible black nose and mouth.

descriptions.fr: Quand il cible un ennemi, il charge furieusement en fouettant son corps avec ses longues queues.
descriptions.de: Wenn es ein Ziel ins Visier nimmt, stürmt es wütend los und peitscht seinen Körper mit seinen langen Schweifen.
descriptions.es: Cuando fija un objetivo, arremete furiosamente mientras azota su cuerpo con sus largas colas.
descriptions.it: Quando individua un nemico, carica furiosamente frustando il proprio corpo con le sue lunghe code.
descriptions.ja: 標的を定めるや否や、長く伸びた尻尾で体を打ちつけながら猛然と突進する。
descriptions.ko: 표적을 정하면 길게 뻗은 꼬리로 몸을 때리면서 맹렬하게 돌진한다.

display_names.ja: パルデアケンタロス (ブレイズ種)

name: tauros-paldea-aqua-breed
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.
appearance: This muscular, black-furred, bovine Pokémon features a grey muzzle, three black tails, horns that are light blue at the base and fade to dark grey tips, a prominent light blue wavy marking glowing subtly on its forehead, red eyes, and a visible black nose and mouth.

descriptions.fr: Quand il cible un ennemi, il charge furieusement en fouettant son corps avec ses longues queues.
descriptions.de: Wenn es ein Ziel ins Visier nimmt, stürmt es wütend los und peitscht seinen Körper mit seinen langen Schweifen.
descriptions.es: Cuando fija un objetivo, arremete furiosamente mientras azota su cuerpo con sus largas colas.
