descriptions.it: Quando individua un nemico, carica furiosamente frustando il proprio corpo con le sue lunghe code.
descriptions.ja: 標的を定めるや否や、長く伸びた尻尾で体を打ちつけながら猛然と突進する。
descriptions.ko: 표적을 정하면 길게 뻗은 꼬리로 몸을 때리면서 맹렬하게 돌진한다.

display_names.ja: パルデアケンタロス (オーダッシュ種)

name: wooper-paldea
description: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
appearance: This small, slug-like Pokémon has a brown body with a lighter brown belly, short dark brown limbs, two prominent purple-brown star-shaped gills protruding from its head, small black dot eyes, and a tiny downturned line mouth.

descriptions.fr: Ce POKéMON vit dans l'eau froide. Il quitte l'eau pour chercher de la nourriture quand il fait froid dehors.
descriptions.de: Dieses POKéMON lebt in kaltem Wasser. Wenn es draußen kalt wird, verlässt es das Wasser, um nach Nahrung zu suchen.
descriptions.es: Este POKÉMON vive en aguas frías. Abandona el agua para buscar comida cuando hace frío en el exterior.
descriptions.it: Questo POKÉMON vive in acque fredde. Quando fa freddo fuori, lascia l'acqua in cerca di cibo.
descriptions.ja: この　ポケモンは　冷たい　水辺で　暮らす。　外が　冷え込むと　エサを　探しに　水から　出る。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 차가운 물가에서 산다. 바깥 기온이 내려가면 먹이를 찾아 물 밖으로 나온다.

name: oinkologne-female
description: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.
appearance: This large, robust, pig-like Pokémon is primarily dark brown with a lighter brown snout, belly, and inner ears, featuring a large, curly black ribbon-like appendage on one side of its head, a short, curly black pigtail for a tail, large eyes with black pupils, and a visible pink snout and mouth.

descriptions.fr: Fragroin est fier de sa peau lisse et brillante. Il émet un parfum concentré depuis le bout de sa queue.
descriptions.de: MonSkaraberg ist stolz auf seine feine, glänzende Haut. Es stößt einen konzentrierten Duft aus seiner Schwanzspitze aus.
descriptions.es: Oinkologne está orgulloso de su piel fina y brillante. Emite un aroma concentrado desde la punta de su cola.
descriptions.it: Fragroin è fiero della sua pelle liscia e brillante. Emette un aroma concentrato dalla punta della sua coda.
descriptions.ja: パフュートンは　なめらかな　ツヤ肌が　自慢。　尻尾の　先から　濃縮された　香りを　放出する。
descriptions.ko: 파밀리주는 윤기 나는 매끈한 피부가 자랑이다. 꼬리 끝에서 농축된 향기를 방출한다.

name: dudunsparce-three-segment
description: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.
appearance: This elongated, serpentine Pokémon has a yellow body divided into three segments by white bands, a white underbelly, small white wings on its upper back, large round black eyes, a small orange beak-like mouth, small white horn-like antennae, and a pointed white tail tip.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon utilise sa queue dure pour creuser son nid en perforant la roche-mère, profondément sous terre. Le nid peut atteindre plus de dix kilomètres de long.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon nutzt seinen harten Schwanz, um Nester in den Untergrund zu bohren. Diese Nester können über 10 Kilometer lang werden.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon usa su dura cola para construir su nido perforando la roca madre en las profundidades subterráneas. El nido puede alcanzar longitudes de más de diez kilómetros.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon usa la sua dura coda per scavare il nido perforando la roccia madre in profondità sotto terra. Il nido può raggiungere lunghezze di oltre dieci chilometri.
descriptions.ja: この　ポケモンは　硬い　尻尾で　地下深くの　岩盤を　掘り進み　巣穴を　作る。　巣穴は　１０キロメートルを　超えることも。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 단단한 꼬리로 지하 깊숙한 곳의 암반을 파고들어 둥지를 만든다. 둥지는 10km를 넘을 수도 있다.

name: palafin-hero
description: This Pokémon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation.
appearance: This muscular, bipedal, dolphin-like Pokémon has a light blue body with a white chest and belly, light blue fins, a dorsal fin resembling a cape, a small fin on its head, a prominent light pink heart-shaped emblem on its chest, and a short snout with a small mouth and dark eyes with tiny white pupils.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon change d'apparence s'il entend ses alliés appeler à l'aide. Palafin ne montrera jamais son moment de transformation à personne.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon verändert sein Aussehen, wenn es seine Verbündeten um Hilfe ruft. Delfinator zeigt niemandem seinen Verwandlungsmoment.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon cambia su aspecto si oye a sus aliados pidiendo ayuda. Palafin nunca muestra a nadie su momento de transformación.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon cambia aspetto se sente i suoi alleati chiamare aiuto. Palafin non mostra mai a nessuno il suo momento di trasformazione.
descriptions.ja: この　ポケモンは　仲間が　助けを　求める声を　聞くと　姿を　変える。　イルカマンは　その　変化の　瞬間を　誰にも　見せない。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 동료가 도움을 요청하는 소리를 들으면 모습을 바꾼다. 돌핀맨은 그 변화의 순간을 누구에게도 보여주지 않는다.

display_names.ja: イルカマン (マイティフォルム)

name: maushold-family-of-three
description: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
appearance: This group consists of three small, white, mouse-like figures—one adult and two smaller children—all with grey inner ears, paws, and tail tips, small black dot eyes, no visible mouths, and distinct blue, red, and yellow shirt-like markings on their chests respectively.

descriptions.fr: Les deux petits sont apparus un jour, comme par magie. Ce groupe pourrait être une famille de Pokémon apparentés, mais personne ne le sait avec certitude.
descriptions.de: Die zwei Kleinen sind einfach eines Tages aufgetaucht. Die Gruppe könnte eine Familie verwandter Pokémon sein, aber niemand weiß es genau.
descriptions.es: Los dos pequeños aparecieron un día sin más. El grupo podría ser una familia de Pokémon emparentados, pero nadie lo sabe con certeza.
descriptions.it: I due piccoli sono apparsi un giorno, così, dal nulla. Il gruppo potrebbe essere una famiglia di Pokémon imparentati, ma nessuno lo sa con certezza.
descriptions.ja: 小さな　２匹は　ある日　突然　現れた。　血縁のある　家族なのか　誰も　知らない。
descriptions.ko: 작은 두 마리는 어느 날 갑자기 나타났다. 혈연관계인 가족인지 아무도 모른다.

display_names.ja: 3びきかぞくのイッカネズミ

name: tatsugiri-droopy
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: This small, fish-like Pokémon is primarily orange with a white underbelly, featuring a distinctive white, droopy wave-like marking on its head, large black eyes, a small downturned mouth with tiny black teeth, and wavy orange fins.

descriptions.fr: C'est un petit Pokémon Dragon. Il vit à l'intérieur de la bouche de Dondozo pour se protéger des ennemis extérieurs.
descriptions.de: Dies ist ein kleines Drachen-Pokémon. Es lebt im Maul von Heerashai, um sich vor äußeren Feinden zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Este es un pequeño Pokémon Dragón. Vive dentro de la boca de Dondozo para protegerse de los enemigos del exterior.
descriptions.it: Questo è un piccolo Pokémon Drago. Vive all'interno della bocca di Dondozo per proteggersi dai nemici esterni.
descriptions.ja: 小さな　ドラゴンの　ポケモン。　外敵から　身を　守るため　ヘイラッシャの　口の中に　暮らしている。
descriptions.ko: 작은 드래곤 포켓몬. 외적으로부터 몸을 지키기 위해 어써러셔의 입속에서 살아간다.

display_names.ja: シャリタツ (たれ目のすがた)

name: tatsugiri-stretchy
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: This small, fish-like Pokémon is primarily pink with a white underbelly, featuring a distinctive white, straight, stretched-out hood-like marking on its head, large black eyes, a small downturned mouth with tiny black teeth, and triangular pink fins.

descriptions.fr: C'est un petit Pokémon Dragon. Il vit à l'intérieur de la bouche de Dondozo pour se protéger des ennemis extérieurs.
descriptions.de: Dies ist ein kleines Drachen-Pokémon. Es lebt im Maul von Heerashai, um sich vor äußeren Feinden zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Este es un pequeño Pokémon Dragón. Vive dentro de la boca de Dondozo para protegerse de los enemigos del exterior.
descriptions.it: Questo è un piccolo Pokémon Drago. Vive all'interno della bocca di Dondozo per protegersi dai nemici esterni.
descriptions.ja: 小さな　ドラゴンの　ポケモン。　外敵から　身を　守るため　ヘイラッシャの　口の中に　暮らしている。
descriptions.ko: 작은 드래곤 포켓몬. 외적으로부터 몸을 지키기 위해 어써러셔의 입속에서 살아간다.

name: squawkabilly-blue-plumage
description: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.
appearance: This small, bird-like Pokémon has predominantly blue plumage with a white belly, white wingtip and tail feathers, a prominent white plume cresting its head, a black mask-like marking around its black eyes with white pupils, two small pink cheek markings, and a yellow-orange beak.

descriptions.fr: Ces Pokémon préfèrent vivre en ville. Ils forment des groupes en fonction de la couleur de leurs plumes et se disputent les territoires.
descriptions.de: Diese Pokémon leben am liebsten in Städten. Sie bilden Schwärme nach der Farbe ihrer Federn und kämpfen um Reviere.
descriptions.es: Estos Pokémon prefieren vivir en ciudades. Forman bandadas según el color de sus plumas y luchan por el territorio.
descriptions.it: Questi Pokémon preferiscono vivere in città. Si raggruppano in base al colore delle loro piume e lottano per il territorio.
descriptions.ja: この　ポケモンは　街での　生活を　好む。　羽の　色で　群れを　作り　縄張りを　争う。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬은 도시 생활을 선호한다. 깃털색에 따라 무리를 지어 세력권을 다툰다.

display_names.ja: イキリンコ (しろいろのすがた)

name: gimmighoul-roaming
description: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.
appearance: This small, dark brown, ghost-like entity emits a blue glow, featuring a single, large yellow eye, and lacks any discernible mouth or other facial features, appearing to float.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon est né il y a environ 1 500 ans dans un coffre au trésor. Il aspire la force vitale des vauriens qui tentent de voler le trésor.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon wurde vor etwa 1.500 Jahren in einer Schatztruhe geboren. Es saugt Schurken, die versuchen, den Schatz zu stehlen, die Lebensenergie ab.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon nació hace unos 1.500 años dentro de un cofre del tesoro. Absorbe la fuerza vital de los canallas que intentan robar el tesoro.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon è nato circa 1.500 anni fa all'interno di un forziere del tesoro. Sottrae l'energia vitale ai malviventi che cercano di rubare il tesoro.
descriptions.ja: 約1500年前に宝箱の中で生まれたポケモン。宝を奪おうとする悪党から生命エネルギーを吸い取る。
descriptions.ko: 약 1,500년 전 보물상자 안에서 태어난 포켓몬. 보물을 훔치려는 악당에게서 생명 에너지를 빨아들인다.

display_names.ja: コレクレー (とほフォルム)

name: koraidon-limited-build
description: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.
appearance: This large, reptilian Pokémon is predominantly red with white fur around its neck and chest, featuring a large white and red feather-like head crest, yellow eyes, prominent white fangs, a blue-marked tire-like inflated throat sac, and large red scale-formed wheel-like structures on its back, tail, and forelegs.

descriptions.fr: Il semble s'agir du Roi Ailé mentionné dans un ancien carnet d'expédition. On dit qu'il aurait fendu la terre à mains nues.
descriptions.de: Es scheint der Geflügelte König zu sein, der in einem alten Expeditionsjournal erwähnt wird. Man sagt, es habe das Land mit bloßen Fäusten gespalten.
descriptions.es: Parece ser el Rey Alado mencionado en un antiguo diario de expedición. Se dice que dividió la tierra con sus puños desnudos.
descriptions.it: Sembra essere il Re Alato menzionato in un antico diario di spedizione. Si diceva che avesse diviso la terra a mani nude.
descriptions.ja: 古い探検記に記された「翼の王」のようだ。大地を素手で裂いたといわれている。
descriptions.ko: 오래된 탐험 일지에 기록된 「날개의 왕」인 듯하다. 맨손으로 대지를 갈랐다고 전해진다.

display_names.ja: コライドン (しょぼしょぼモード)

display_names.ja: コライドン 滑空フォルム

name: miraidon-low-power-mode
description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.
appearance: A sleek, bipedal robotic dragon with a primarily dark purplish-blue body, featuring prominent glowing magenta accents along its angular limbs, tail, and face, with its front wheels retracted into its forelegs and a distinctive 'V' shaped visor glowing magenta on its face.

descriptions.fr: Beaucoup de choses restent inconnues à propos de cette créature. Elle ressemble à Cyclizar, mais elle est bien plus impitoyable et puissante.
descriptions.de: Über dieses Wesen ist noch vieles unbekannt. Es ähnelt Mopex, ist aber weitaus rücksichtsloser und mächtiger.
descriptions.es: Aún se desconoce mucho sobre esta criatura. Se parece a Cyclizar, pero es mucho más implacable y poderosa.
descriptions.it: Molte cose restano sconosciute su questa creatura. Somiglia a Cyclizar, ma è molto più spietato e potente.
descriptions.ja: この生命体には不明な点が多い。モトトカゲに似ているが、はるかに冷酷で強力だ。
descriptions.ko: 이 생명체에 대해서는 미지인 점이 많다. 모토마와 닮았지만, 훨씬 더 잔인하고 강력하다.

display_names.ja: ミライドン ていでんフォルム

name: miraidon-drive-mode
description: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.
appearance: A sleek robotic dragon with a dark purplish-blue body, its forelegs transformed into large glowing magenta wheels and its tail forming another large wheel, while glowing magenta energy patterns emanate from its chest and head, which features a 'V' shaped visor.

display_names.ja: ミライドン 滑空フォルム

name: ursaluna-bloodmoon
description: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.
appearance: A large, bipedal bear-like Pokemon with primarily dark reddish-brown fur, a creamy white belly and muzzle, a prominent dark crescent moon marking on its forehead, and one dark, shadowed eye, while the other is open and glowing yellow.

descriptions.fr: Je pense que c'est le terrain marécageux d'Hisui qui a donné à Ursaluna sa corpulence robuste et sa nouvelle capacité à manipuler la tourbe à volonté.
descriptions.de: Ich vermute, es war das sumpfige Gelände Hisuis, das Ursaluna seinen kräftigen Körperbau und die neu entdeckte Fähigkeit verlieh, Torf nach Belieben zu manipulieren.
descriptions.es: Creo que fue el terreno pantanoso de Hisui lo que otorgó a Ursaluna su físico fornido y su recién descubierta capacidad para manipular la turba a voluntad.
descriptions.it: Credo che sia stato il terreno paludoso di Hisui a conferire a Ursaluna la sua corporatura robusta e la ritrovata capacità di manipolare la torba a piacimento.
descriptions.ja: ヒスイの湿地がガチグマの強靭な体格と、意のままに泥炭を操る能力を与えたのだろう。
descriptions.ko: 히스이의 늪지대가 다투곰에게 튼튼한 체격과 마음대로 이탄을 조작하는 능력을 주었을 것이다.

display_names.ja: ガチグマ アカツキ

name: ogerpon-wellspring-mask
description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
appearance: A small, bipedal, plant-like creature with a green body, featuring a light blue, tear-drop shaped mask with white markings resembling tears and two small, pointed ears, adorned with green leafy vines trailing from its head and back.

descriptions.fr: Le type de ce Pokémon varie selon le masque qu'il porte. Il déconcerte ses ennemis avec des mouvements agiles et des coups de pied.
descriptions.de: Der Typ dieses Pokémon ändert sich je nach getragener Maske. Es verwirrt seine Gegner mit flinken Bewegungen und Tritten.
descriptions.es: El tipo de este Pokémon cambia según la máscara que lleve. Confunde a sus enemigos con movimientos ágiles y patadas.
descriptions.it: Il tipo di questo Pokémon cambia a seconda della maschera che indossa. Disorienta i suoi nemici con movimenti agili e calci.
descriptions.ja: このポケモンのタイプは　つけている　仮面によって　変化する。　素早い　動きと　蹴りで　敵を　幻惑する。
descriptions.ko: 이 포켓몬의 타입은 쓰고 있는 가면으로 바뀐다. 날쌘 움직임과 발길질로 적을 혼란시킨다.

display_names.ja: オーガポン いどのめん

name: ogerpon-hearthflame-mask
description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
appearance: A small, bipedal, plant-like creature with a green body, featuring a bright red, heart-shaped mask with two short, upward-curving horns, and adorned with green leafy vines trailing from its head and back.

display_names.ja: オーガポン かまどのめん

name: ogerpon-cornerstone-mask
description: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
appearance: A small, bipedal, plant-like creature with a green body, featuring a dark gray, angular mask with a prominent green, four-leaf clover-like gem in its center and three smaller green gems, adorned with green leafy vines trailing from its head and back.

display_names.fr: Ogerpon Masque de la Pierre Angulaire
display_names.ja: オーガポン いしずえのめん

name: terapagos-terastal
description: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.
appearance: A large turtle-like creature with a white, segmented shell covered in various clear, multi-faceted crystal-like structures in shades of red, blue, green, and yellow, radiating an aura of energy, while its body is a pale blue-white.

descriptions.fr: Terapagos se protège en utilisant son pouvoir de transformer l'énergie en cristaux durs. Ce Pokémon est la source du phénomène de la Téracristallisation.
descriptions.de: Terapagos schützt sich, indem es seine Kraft nutzt, Energie in harte Kristalle umzuwandeln. Es ist die Quelle des Terakristall-Phänomens.
descriptions.es: Terapagos se protege usando su poder para transformar energía en cristales duros. Este Pokémon es la fuente del fenómeno de la Teracristalización.
descriptions.it: Terapagos si protegge usando il suo potere di trasformare l'energia in cristalli duri. Questo Pokémon è la fonte del fenomeno Teracristal.
descriptions.ja: テラパゴスは　エネルギーを　硬い　結晶に　変える　力で　身を　守る。　テラスタル現象の　根源と　される　ポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 테라파고스는 에너지를 단단한 결정으로 바꾸는 힘으로 자신을 지킨다. 테라스탈현상의 근원이라고 전해지는 포켓몬이다.

display_names.ja: テラパゴス テラスタル

name: terapagos-stellar
description: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.
appearance: A large turtle-like creature with a white, segmented shell covered in various clear, multi-faceted crystal-like structures in shades of red, blue, green, and yellow, radiating an intense aura, while its body is a dark purplish-blue with glowing white star-like patterns.

descriptions.fr: Terapagos se protège en utilisant son pouvoir de transformer l'énergie en cristaux durs. Ce Pokémon est la source du phénomène de la Téracristallisation.
descriptions.de: Terapagos schützt sich, indem es seine Kraft nutzt, Energie in harte Kristalle umzuwandeln. Es ist die Quelle des Terakristall-Phänomens.
descriptions.es: Terapagos se protege usando su poder para transformar energía en cristales duros. Este Pokémon es la fuente del fenómeno de la Teracristalización.
descriptions.it: Terapagos si protegge usando il suo potere di trasformare l'energia in cristalli duri. Questo Pokémon è la fonte del fenomeno Teracristal.
descriptions.ja: テラパゴスは　エネルギーを　硬い　結晶に　変える　力で　身を　守る。　テラスタル現象の　根源と　される　ポケモンだ。
descriptions.ko: 테라파고스는 에너지를 단단한 결정으로 바꾸는 힘으로 자신을 지킨다. 테라스탈현상의 근원이라고 전해지는 포켓몬이다.

display_names.ja: テラパゴス ステラ

name: clefable-mega
description: A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.
appearance: A larger, more ethereal bipedal fairy with a deeper pink body, larger pointed ears with brown tips, multiple white feathery wings on its back, a larger spiraling hair curl, and delicate white star-like markings on its cheeks.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon fée timide et rarement aperçu. Il s'enfuit et se cache dès qu'il détecte la présence d'humains.
descriptions.de: Ein scheues Feen-Pokémon, das selten zu sehen ist. Es rennt und versteckt sich, sobald es Menschen wahrnimmt.
descriptions.es: Un tímido Pokémon hada que rara vez se ve. Corre y se esconde en el momento en que siente a la gente.
descriptions.it: Un timido Pokémon folletto che si vede raramente. Corre a nascondersi nel momento in cui percepisce la presenza di persone.
descriptions.ja: めったに　みかけない　おとなしい　ようせいポケモン。　ひとの　気配を　感じると　すぐに　逃げ隠れる。
descriptions.ko: 좀처럼 보기 드문 조용한 요정 포켓몬. 사람의 기척을 느끼면 바로 숨어버린다.

name: victreebel-mega
description: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.
appearance: An enlarged, more menacing pitcher plant creature with a dark green body and a large, wide-open mouth rimmed with sharp white teeth and a vibrant red interior, featuring an exaggerated, curling vine whip with a red tip.

descriptions.fr: On dit qu'il vit en énormes colonies au fond des jungles, bien que personne n'en soit jamais revenu.
descriptions.de: Man sagt, es lebe in riesigen Kolonien tief in den Dschungeln, obwohl niemand je von dort zurückgekehrt ist.
descriptions.es: Se dice que vive en enormes colonias en lo profundo de las selvas, aunque nadie ha regresado jamás de allí.
descriptions.it: Si dice che viva in enormi colonie nelle profondità delle giungle, anche se nessuno è mai tornato da lì.
descriptions.ja: ジャングルの　奥地に　巨大な　コロニーが　あると　いわれるが　帰ってきた者は　いない。
descriptions.ko: 정글 깊은 곳에 거대한 군락을 이룬다고 하지만 돌아온 자는 아무도 없다.

name: starmie-mega
description: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.
appearance: A larger, more elaborate star-shaped creature composed of two joined starfish, one primarily purple and the other yellow-orange, each segment ending in a pointed tip, and a large, glowing red central core gem surrounded by smaller blue and yellow gems.

descriptions.fr: Son noyau central brille des sept couleurs de l'arc-en-ciel. Certaines personnes considèrent son noyau comme une pierre précieuse.
descriptions.de: Sein zentraler Kern leuchtet in den sieben Farben des Regenbogens. Manche Menschen schätzen den Kern als Juwel.
descriptions.es: Su núcleo central brilla con los siete colores del arcoíris. Algunas personas valoran el núcleo como una gema.
descriptions.it: Il suo nucleo centrale brilla dei sette colori dell'arcobaleno. Alcune persone considerano il nucleo come una gemma.
descriptions.ja: 中央の　コアは　虹の　七色に　輝く。　コアを　宝石として　珍重する　者も　いる。
descriptions.ko: 중앙의 코어는 무지개의 7가지 색으로 빛난다. 코어를 보석으로 귀하게 여기는 사람도 있다.

name: dragonite-mega
description: An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.
appearance: A significantly larger, more robust draconic Pokemon with a deeper orange body, a more armored appearance featuring sharper claws and a longer, more pointed tail, prominent green wings, and a more stern expression with defined facial scales.

descriptions.fr: Un Pokémon marin extrêmement rare. Son intelligence serait comparable à celle des humains.
descriptions.de: Ein extrem selten zu sehendes Meeres-Pokémon. Seine Intelligenz soll der von Menschen entsprechen.
descriptions.es: Un Pokémon marino extremadamente raro. Se dice que su inteligencia iguala la de los humanos.
descriptions.it: Un Pokémon marino estremamente raro. Si dice che la sua intelligenza eguagli quella degli umani.
descriptions.ja: めったに　姿を　見せない　海のポケモン。　人間と　同じくらいの　知能を　持つという。
descriptions.ko: 좀처럼 모습을 보이지 않는 바다 포켓몬. 인간과 동등한 정도의 지능을 지녔다고 전해진다.

name: meganium-mega
description: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.
appearance: A larger, more graceful sauropod-like Pokemon with a pale green body and a vibrant pink flower with a yellow center encircling its neck, featuring an additional tier of smaller pink petals and two long, green antennae with red tips emerging from its head.

descriptions.fr: L'arôme qui émane de ses pétales contient une substance qui calme les sentiments agressifs.
descriptions.de: Das Aroma, das von seinen Blütenblättern ausgeht, enthält eine Substanz, die aggressive Gefühle besänftigt.
descriptions.es: El aroma que emana de sus pétalos contiene una sustancia que calma los sentimientos agresivos.
descriptions.it: L'aroma che si sprigiona dai suoi petali contiene una sostanza che calma i sentimenti aggressivi.
descriptions.ja: 花びらから　立ち上る　香りは　攻撃的な　気持ちを　鎮める　成分を　含んでいる。
descriptions.ko: 꽃잎에서 풍기는 향기에는 공격적인 마음을 진정시키는 성분이 포함되어 있다.

name: feraligatr-mega
description: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.
appearance: A larger, more powerful bipedal crocodilian with a dark blue body, a cream-colored belly, and numerous sharp, bone-like spikes extending from its back, forearms, and tail, featuring an enlarged, toothy maw and glowing red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Quand il mord avec ses mâchoires massives et puissantes, il secoue la tête et déchire sauvagement sa victime.
descriptions.de: Wenn es mit seinen massiven und kräftigen Kiefern zubeißt, schüttelt es den Kopf und zerfetzt sein Opfer brutal.
descriptions.es: Cuando muerde con sus mandíbulas masivas y poderosas, sacude la cabeza y desgarra salvajemente a su víctima.
descriptions.it: Quando morde con le sue mascelle massicce e potenti, scuote la testa e dilania selvaggiamente la sua vittima.
descriptions.ja: 巨大で強力な顎で噛みつくと、頭を振り回し、獲物を無残に引き裂く。
descriptions.ko: 거대하고 강력한 턱으로 물면, 고개를 흔들어 희생자를 잔인하게 찢어버린다.

name: skarmory-mega
description: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.
appearance: A larger, more formidable avian Pokemon with a metallic gray body, featuring larger, more angular steel wings with sharp, blade-like feathers, a more pronounced metallic crest, and sharpened talons.

descriptions.fr: Ses ailes robustes semblent lourdes, mais elles sont en réalité creuses et légères, lui permettant de voler librement dans le ciel.
descriptions.de: Seine robusten Flügel wirken schwer, sind aber hohl und leicht, wodurch es frei am Himmel fliegen kann.
descriptions.es: Sus robustas alas parecen pesadas, pero en realidad son huecas y ligeras, lo que le permite volar libremente por el cielo.
descriptions.it: Le sue robuste ali sembrano pesanti, ma sono in realtà cave e leggere, permettendogli di volare liberamente nel cielo.
descriptions.ja: 頑丈な翼は重そうに見えるが、実際は中空で軽く、空を自由に飛び回ることができる。
descriptions.ko: 튼튼한 날개는 무거워 보이지만 실제로는 비어있고 가벼워서 하늘을 자유롭게 날 수 있다.

name: froslass-mega
description: It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees F. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.
appearance: A larger, more spectral human-like figure with a white, translucent body, long flowing ribbon-like 'arms' ending in pointed tips, a crown of ice crystal spikes on its head, and a long, flowing icy tail.

descriptions.fr: Il gèle ses adversaires avec un souffle glacial atteignant près de -60 degrés F. Ce qui semble être son corps est en réalité creux.
descriptions.de: Es friert Gegner mit einem eisigen Atem von fast -60 Grad F ein. Was sein Körper zu sein scheint, ist tatsächlich hohl.
descriptions.es: Congela a sus enemigos con un aliento gélido de casi -60 grados F. Lo que parece ser su cuerpo es en realidad hueco.
descriptions.it: Congela i nemici con un alito glaciale di quasi -60 gradi F. Ciò che sembra il suo corpo è in realtà cavo.
descriptions.ja: およそ華氏-60度（摂氏-51度）の冷気で敵を凍らせる。その体と思しき部分は実は空洞だ。
descriptions.ko: 거의 영하 60도 F의 얼음 숨결로 적을 얼린다. 몸처럼 보이는 부분은 사실 비어있다.

name: emboar-mega
description: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.
appearance: A significantly larger, more heavily armored bipedal pig-like Pokemon with a primarily red-orange body, a prominent yellow flame pattern on its chest, large, glowing fiery patterns on its shoulders, and long, dark tusks protruding from its jaw.

descriptions.fr: Il peut lancer un Poing Feu en enflammant ses poings grâce à son menton ardent. Il se soucie profondément de ses amis.
descriptions.de: Es kann mit seinem feurigen Kinn seine Fäuste in Brand setzen, um einen Flammenwurf zu vollführen. Es kümmert sich zutiefst um seine Freunde.
descriptions.es: Puede lanzar un Puño Fuego encendiendo sus puños con su barbilla ardiente. Se preocupa profundamente por sus amigos.
descriptions.it: Può sferrare un Pugno di Fuoco incendiando i suoi pugni con il suo mento fiammeggiante. Tiene molto ai suoi amici.
descriptions.ja: 燃え盛る顎で拳に火をつけ、炎のパンチを繰り出す。仲間を深く大切に思っている。
descriptions.ko: 불타는 턱으로 주먹에 불을 붙여 불꽃펀치를 날린다. 친구들을 매우 아낀다.

name: excadrill-mega
description: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates.
appearance: A larger, more heavily armored mole-like Pokemon with a dark brown body and red accents, featuring two significantly larger and sharper steel drills on its head, larger steel claws, and a more robust, segmented metallic shell on its back.

descriptions.fr: Il peut aider à la construction de tunnels. Sa foreuse a évolué en un acier assez robuste pour percer des plaques de fer.
descriptions.de: Es kann beim Tunnelbau helfen. Sein Bohrer hat sich zu Stahl entwickelt, der stark genug ist, um Eisenplatten zu durchbohren.
descriptions.es: Puede ayudar en la construcción de túneles. Su taladro ha evolucionado a un acero lo suficientemente fuerte como para perforar placas de hierro.
descriptions.it: Può aiutare nella costruzione di tunnel. La sua trivella si è evoluta in acciaio abbastanza forte da perforare piastre di ferro.
descriptions.ja: トンネル工事を手伝うことができる。そのドリルは鉄板を貫くほど強い鋼に進化している。
descriptions.ko: 터널 공사를 도울 수 있다. 드릴은 철판을 뚫을 만큼 강한 강철로 진화했다.

name: scolipede-mega
description: With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails.
appearance: A larger, more elongated centipede-like Pokemon with a dark red and purple segmented body, featuring numerous larger, sharper spikes along its back and tail, a more prominent, horned head, and several pairs of scythe-like forelegs.

descriptions.fr: Avec des mouvements rapides, il pourchasse ses ennemis, les attaquant sans relâche avec ses cornes jusqu'à ce qu'il l'emporte.
descriptions.de: Mit schnellen Bewegungen jagt es seine Gegner und greift sie unerbittlich mit seinen Hörnern an, bis es siegt.
descriptions.es: Con movimientos rápidos, persigue a sus enemigos, atacándolos implacablemente con sus cuernos hasta que prevalece.
descriptions.it: Con movimenti rapidi, insegue i suoi nemici, attaccandoli incessantemente con le sue corna fino a prevalere.
descriptions.ja: 素早い動きで敵を追い詰め、角で容赦なく攻撃し、勝利するまで攻め続ける。
descriptions.ko: 빠른 움직임으로 적을 추격하고 뿔로 끈질기게 공격하여 승리할 때까지 싸운다.

name: scrafty-mega
description: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.
appearance: A larger, more muscular bipedal lizard-like Pokemon with an orange and black body, a more pronounced yellow mohawk, and dramatically enlarged, loose white skin resembling baggy pants around its lower body and tail.

descriptions.fr: Des groupes d'entre eux rossent tout ce qui entre sur leur territoire. Chacun peut cracher un liquide acide de sa bouche.
descriptions.de: Gruppen von ihnen verprügeln alles, was ihr Territorium betritt. Jeder kann saure Flüssigkeit aus seinem Maul spucken.
descriptions.es: Grupos de ellos golpean todo lo que entra en su territorio. Cada uno puede escupir líquido ácido por la boca.
descriptions.it: Gruppi di loro picchiano qualsiasi cosa entri nel loro territorio. Ciascuno può sputare liquido acido dalla bocca.
descriptions.ja: 群れで縄張りに侵入したものを叩きのめす。それぞれが口から酸性の液体を吐き出すことができる。
descriptions.ko: 무리가 되어 영역에 침입한 것을 때려눕힌다. 각각 입에서 산성 액체를 뱉을 수 있다.

name: eelektross-mega
description: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.
appearance: Alternate form of eelektross.

descriptions.fr: Ils rampent hors de l'océan en utilisant leurs bras. Ils attaquent leurs proies sur le rivage et les traînent immédiatement dans l'océan.
descriptions.de: Sie kriechen mit ihren Armen aus dem Ozean. Sie greifen Beute an Land an und ziehen sie sofort ins Meer.
descriptions.es: Salen del océano arrastrándose con sus brazos. Atacan a sus presas en tierra y las arrastran inmediatamente al océano.
descriptions.it: Escono dall'oceano strisciando con le loro braccia. Attaccano le prede a terra e le trascinano immediatamente nell'oceano.
descriptions.ja: 腕を使って海から這い上がる。陸上の獲物を襲い、すぐに海中に引きずり込む。
descriptions.ko: 팔을 사용하여 바다 밖으로 기어 나온다. 육상의 먹이를 공격하여 즉시 바다로 끌고 들어간다.

name: chandelure-mega
description: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.
appearance: An enlarged, more elaborate chandelier-like Pokemon composed of a central dark purple body with a large, glowing purple flame on top, surrounded by numerous smaller floating blue and purple flames and spectral, ribbon-like arms.

descriptions.fr: Il absorbe un esprit, qu'il consume ensuite. En agitant les flammes sur ses bras, il plonge ses adversaires dans une transe hypnotique.
descriptions.de: Es absorbiert einen Geist und verbrennt ihn dann. Durch das Schwenken der Flammen an seinen Armen versetzt es seine Gegner in einen hypnotischen Trancezustand.
descriptions.es: Absorbe un espíritu, que luego quema. Agitando las llamas de sus brazos, sume a sus enemigos en un trance hipnótico.
descriptions.it: Assorbe uno spirito, che poi brucia. Agitando le fiamme sulle sue braccia, mette i suoi nemici in uno stato di trance ipnotica.
descriptions.ja: 魂を吸収し、それを燃やす。腕の炎を揺らすことで、敵を催眠状態に陥らせる。
descriptions.ko: 영혼을 흡수하여 태운다. 팔에 있는 불꽃을 흔들어 적을 최면에 빠뜨린다.

name: chesnaught-mega
description: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.
appearance: A significantly larger, more heavily armored bipedal armadillo-like Pokemon with a brown and green body, featuring an enlarged, spiky green 'shell' shield covering its back and arms, and sharper, more pronounced claws.

descriptions.fr: Son Charge est assez puissant pour retourner un char de 50 tonnes. Il protège ses alliés du danger avec son propre corps.
descriptions.de: Seine Tackle-Attacke ist kraftvoll genug, um einen 50-Tonnen-Panzer umzuwerfen. Es schützt seine Verbündeten mit seinem eigenen Körper vor Gefahr.
descriptions.es: Su Placaje es lo suficientemente contundente como para voltear un tanque de 50 toneladas. Protege a sus aliados del peligro con su propio cuerpo.
descriptions.it: Il suo Azione è abbastanza potente da ribaltare un carro armato da 50 tonnellate. Protegge i suoi alleati dal pericolo con il proprio corpo.
descriptions.ja: 50トンの戦車をもひっくり返すほどの強烈な体当たりを繰り出す。自らの体で仲間を危険から守る。
descriptions.ko: 50톤 전차를 뒤집을 만큼 강력한 몸통박치기를 한다. 자신의 몸으로 동료들을 위험에서 지킨다.

name: delphox-mega
description: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.
appearance: A larger, more mystical bipedal fox-like Pokemon with a golden-orange fur coat, an extended staff-like stick infused with purple flames, and longer, more flowing white fur around its arms and neck.

descriptions.fr: Il contemple la flamme au bout de sa branche pour atteindre un état de concentration qui lui permet de voir l'avenir.
descriptions.de: Es blickt in die Flamme an der Spitze seines Astes, um sich zu konzentrieren und die Zukunft vorherzusehen.
descriptions.es: Contempla la llama de la punta de su rama para alcanzar un estado de concentración que le permite ver el futuro.
descriptions.it: Fissa la fiamma all'estremità del suo ramo per raggiungere uno stato di concentrazione che gli permette di vedere il futuro.
descriptions.ja: 枝の先の炎を見つめることで集中力を高め、未来を予知する。
descriptions.ko: 가지 끝의 불꽃을 응시하여 집중 상태에 돌입하면 미래를 예지할 수 있다.

name: greninja-mega
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.
appearance: A larger, more agile frog-like ninja Pokemon with a dark blue body and a longer, red scarf-like tongue, featuring enhanced, dark purple armor-like scales on its forearms and shins, and white markings on its head.

descriptions.fr: Il crée des shurikens faits d'eau compressée. Lorsqu'il les fait tournoyer et les lance à grande vitesse, ils peuvent fendre le métal en deux.
descriptions.de: Es erzeugt Wurfsterne aus komprimiertem Wasser. Schleudert es diese mit hoher Geschwindigkeit, können sie Metall spalten.
descriptions.es: Crea estrellas ninja de agua comprimida. Cuando las hace girar y las lanza a gran velocidad, estas estrellas pueden partir el metal por la mitad.
descriptions.it: Crea stelle ninja di acqua compressa. Quando le fa roteare e le lancia ad alta velocità, queste stelle possono tagliare il metallo a metà.
descriptions.ja: 圧縮した水で手裏剣を作る。それを高速で回転させて投げると、金属をも両断する。
descriptions.ko: 압축한 물로 수리검을 만든다. 고속으로 회전시켜 던지면 금속마저 두 동강 낸다.

name: pyroar-mega
description: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride.
appearance: A larger, more regal lion-like Pokemon with a golden-brown body, featuring an even more voluminous and fiery red-orange mane that extends down its back, and glowing red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Le mâle avec la plus grande crinière de flammes est le chef de la bande.
descriptions.de: Das Männchen mit der größten Flammenmähne ist der Anführer des Rudels.
descriptions.es: El macho con la melena de fuego más grande es el líder de la manada.
descriptions.it: Il maschio con la criniera di fuoco più grande è il capobranco.
descriptions.ja: 一番大きな炎のたてがみを持つオスが、群れのリーダーとなる。
descriptions.ko: 가장 큰 불꽃 갈기를 가진 수컷이 무리의 리더가 된다.

name: floette-mega
description: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.
appearance: A larger, more ethereal fairy-like creature with a white body, a long, flowing green skirt-like leaf, and holding an enormous, vibrant red flower with glowing yellow accents and multiple layers of petals.

descriptions.fr: Il voltige autour des champs de fleurs et prend soin des fleurs qui commencent à faner. Il tire le pouvoir caché des fleurs pour le combat.
descriptions.de: Es schwebt über Blumenfeldern und kümmert sich um welkende Blumen. Es nutzt die verborgene Kraft der Blumen im Kampf.
descriptions.es: Aletea por los campos de flores y cuida de aquellas que empiezan a marchitarse. Extrae el poder oculto de las flores para combatir.
descriptions.it: Svolazza tra i campi di fiori e si prende cura di quelli che stanno per appassire. Estrae il potere nascosto dei fiori per la lotta.
descriptions.ja: 花畑を舞い、しおれ始めた花を世話する。花の秘めた力を引き出して戦う。
descriptions.ko: 꽃밭을 맴돌며 시들기 시작한 꽃을 보살핀다. 꽃의 숨겨진 힘을 끌어내 싸운다.

name: malamar-mega
description: It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it forces others to do whatever it wants.
appearance: A significantly larger, more menacing cephalopod-like Pokemon with an inverted body, featuring a dark blue and black color scheme, more numerous and intricate tentacle appendages with glowing purple patterns, and a prominent dark hood-like structure with glowing red eyes.

descriptions.fr: Il possède les pouvoirs hypnotiques les plus puissants de tous les Pokémon et force les autres à faire ce qu'il veut.
descriptions.de: Es verfügt über die stärksten hypnotischen Kräfte aller Pokémon und zwingt andere, seinen Willen zu tun.
descriptions.es: Posee los poderes hipnóticos más convincentes de cualquier Pokémon y obliga a los demás a hacer lo que él quiere.
descriptions.it: Brandisce i poteri ipnotici più persuasivi di qualsiasi Pokémon e costringe gli altri a fare ciò che vuole.
descriptions.ja: あらゆるポケモンの中で最も強力な催眠術を操り、相手を意のままに操る。
descriptions.ko: 모든 포켓몬 중에서 가장 강한 최면술을 부려 다른 포켓몬을 자기 뜻대로 조종한다.

name: barbaracle-mega
description: When they evolve, two Binacle multiply into seven. They fight with the power of seven Binacle.
appearance: Barbaracle's body transforms into a more aggressive, craggy structure of dark grey rock, with its central body armored by jagged stone plates, and its multiple barnacle-hands become larger, culminating in sharper, glowing blue claws.

descriptions.fr: Lorsqu'ils évoluent, deux Binacle se multiplient en sept. Ils combattent avec la puissance de sept Binacle.
descriptions.de: Wenn sie sich entwickeln, vervielfachen sich zwei Binacle zu sieben. Sie kämpfen mit der Kraft von sieben Binacle.
descriptions.es: Cuando evolucionan, dos Binacle se multiplican en siete. Combaten con el poder de siete Binacle.
descriptions.it: Quando si evolvono, due Binacle si moltiplicano in sette. Lottano con la forza di sette Binacle.
descriptions.ja: 進化すると2匹のウデッポウが7匹に増える。7匹分の力で戦う。
descriptions.ko: 진화하면 두 마리의 거북손이 일곱 마리로 불어난다. 일곱 마리의 힘으로 싸운다.

name: dragalge-mega
description: Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker, and they spit it indiscriminately at anything that enters their territory.
appearance: Dragalge becomes longer and more serpentine with a deeper purple body, its flowing 'seaweed' fins and crests become more elaborate, spiky, and radiate faint yellow-orange luminescence along their edges, while its eyes sharpen to a piercing golden gleam.

descriptions.fr: Leur poison est assez fort pour corroder la coque d'un pétrolier, et ils le crachent sans discernement sur tout ce qui pénètre leur territoire.
descriptions.de: Ihr Gift ist stark genug, um den Rumpf eines Tankers zu zerfressen, und sie spucken es wahllos auf alles, was ihr Territorium betritt.
descriptions.es: Su veneno es lo suficientemente fuerte como para corroer el casco de un petrolero, y lo escupen indiscriminadamente a cualquier cosa que entre en su territorio.
descriptions.it: Il loro veleno è abbastanza forte da corrodere lo scafo di una petroliera e lo sputano indiscriminatamente contro qualsiasi cosa entri nel loro territorio.
descriptions.ja: 毒はタンカーの船体を溶かすほど強力で、縄張りに入ったものには無差別に吐きかける。
descriptions.ko: 독은 탱커의 선체를 녹일 만큼 강력하며 자신의 영역에 들어온 모든 것을 가리지 않고 뱉어낸다.

name: hawlucha-mega
description: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama.
appearance: Hawlucha takes on a more muscular and angular physique, its red and green plumage becoming more vibrant and razor-edged, with elongated, ornate 'mask' feathers and wing tips, and prominent golden, belt-like markings emblazoned across its chest.

descriptions.fr: Bien que son corps soit petit, ses compétences de combat sont si efficaces qu'il peut rivaliser avec de grands costauds comme Mackogneur et Hariyama.
descriptions.de: Obwohl sein Körper klein ist, ermöglichen ihm seine kampferprobten Fähigkeiten, mit großen Raufbolden wie Machomei und Hariyama mitzuhalten.
descriptions.es: Aunque su cuerpo es pequeño, sus hábiles técnicas de lucha le permiten mantenerse a la par de grandes brutos como Machamp y Hariyama.
descriptions.it: Sebbene il suo corpo sia piccolo, le sue abili tecniche di lotta gli permettono di tenere testa a grossi picchiatori come Machamp e Hariyama.
descriptions.ja: 小さな体だが、優れた格闘術でカイリキーやハリテヤマのような巨漢にも引けを取らない。
descriptions.ko: 몸집은 작지만 뛰어난 격투술로 괴력몬이나 하리뭉 같은 거한에게도 뒤지지 않는다.

name: zygarde-mega
description: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.
appearance: Zygarde's immense serpentine body becomes significantly more armored with crystalline green and black scales, glowing red and blue hexagonal patterns pulsate intensely along its limbs and tail, and its head sprouts more elaborate, multi-pronged horn-like structures.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque l'écosystème de la région de Kalos tombe en désarroi, il apparaît et révèle son pouvoir secret.
descriptions.de: Wenn das Ökosystem der Kalos-Region in Unordnung gerät, erscheint es und offenbart seine geheime Kraft.
descriptions.es: Cuando el ecosistema de la región de Kalos se desequilibra, aparece y revela su poder secreto.
descriptions.it: Quando l'ecosistema della regione di Kalos cade nel caos, appare e rivela il suo potere segreto.
descriptions.ja: カロス地方の生態系が乱れるとき、姿を現し秘めたる力を解き放つ。
descriptions.ko: 칼로스지방의 생태계가 어지러워지면 모습을 드러내 숨겨진 힘을 해방한다.

name: drampa-mega
description: It has a compassionate personality, but if it is angered, it completely destroys its surroundings with its intense breath.
appearance: Drampa's draconic body grows more robust with deeper blue scales, its white cloud-like fur on its head and chest expands into a magnificent, flowing mane and beard, and its normally gentle eyes gain a sharper, golden glint above its small, visible mouth.

descriptions.fr: Il a une personnalité compatissante, mais s'il est en colère, il détruit complètement son environnement avec son souffle intense.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt eine mitfühlende Persönlichkeit, aber wenn es wütend wird, zerstört es seine Umgebung mit seinem intensiven Atem vollständig.
descriptions.es: Tiene una personalidad compasiva, pero si se enfada, destruye por completo su entorno con su intenso aliento.
descriptions.it: Ha una personalità compassionevole, ma se si arrabbia, distrugge completamente l'ambiente circostante con il suo respiro intenso.
descriptions.ja: 優しい性格だが、怒らせると激しい息で周囲を完全に破壊する。
descriptions.ko: 상냥한 성격이지만 화나게 하면 격렬한 숨결로 주위를 완전히 파괴한다.

name: falinks-mega
description: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute.
appearance: The leader Falinks grows substantially, its golden armor becoming spikier and more pronounced with red accents, while the five smaller Falinks become more tightly integrated into its body, forming armored segments that resemble a singular, powerful insectoid legion.

descriptions.fr: Cinq d'entre eux sont des soldats, et un est l'officier. Les ordres de l'officier sont absolus.
descriptions.de: Fünf von ihnen sind Soldaten, und einer ist der Anführer. Die Befehle des Anführers sind absolut.
descriptions.es: Cinco son soldados, y uno es el líder. Las órdenes del líder son absolutas.
descriptions.it: Cinque sono soldati e uno è il capo. Gli ordini del capo sono assoluti.
descriptions.ja: 5匹が兵士で、1匹が指揮官だ。指揮官の命令は絶対である。
descriptions.ko: 다섯은 병사이며, 하나는 지휘관이다. 지휘관의 명령은 절대적이다.

name: raichu-mega-x
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
appearance: Raichu's body becomes more muscular with darker brown fur and a more prominent white belly, its tail grows longer and ends in a larger, more jagged lightning bolt shape, and its cheeks develop larger, more defined yellow electric sacs with visible energy crackling around them.

descriptions.fr: Sa longue queue sert de mise à la terre pour le protéger de sa propre puissance à haute tension.
descriptions.de: Sein langer Schweif dient als Erdung, um sich vor seiner eigenen Hochspannungsenergie zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Su larga cola actúa como toma de tierra para protegerse de su propia energía de alto voltaje.
descriptions.it: La sua lunga coda funge da messa a terra per proteggerlo dalla sua stessa potenza ad alta tensione.
descriptions.ja: 長い尻尾は、自身の高電圧から身を守るためのアースとして機能する。
descriptions.ko: 긴 꼬리는 스스로의 고전압 파워로부터 몸을 보호하는 접지 역할을 한다.

name: raichu-mega-y
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
appearance: Raichu's body slims down, its fur a lighter orange-brown, while its ears become significantly larger and more elegant, resembling gliding fins, and its tail splits into two flowing, whip-like lightning bolts, all accentuating its small, dark eyes and petite mouth.

descriptions.fr: Sa longue queue sert de mise à la terre pour le protéger de sa propre puissance à haute tension.
descriptions.de: Sein langer Schweif dient als Erdung, um sich vor seiner eigenen Hochspannungsenergie zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Su larga cola actúa como toma de tierra para protegerse de su propia energía de alto voltaje.
descriptions.it: La sua lunga coda funge da messa a terra per proteggerlo dalla sua stessa potenza ad alta tensione.
descriptions.ja: 長い尻尾は、自身の高電圧から身を守るためのアースとして機能する。
descriptions.ko: 긴 꼬리는 스스로의 고전압 파워로부터 몸을 보호하는 접지 역할을 한다.

name: chimecho-mega
description: CHIMECHO makes its cries echo inside its hollow body. When this POKéMON becomes enraged, its cries result in ultrasonic waves that have the power to knock foes flying.
appearance: Chimecho's bell-shaped body becomes more intricately patterned with gold filigree over its light blue base, its small mouth and eyes remain distinct, and its clapper-like appendage elongates, adorned with multiple smaller, tinkling bells.

descriptions.fr: CHIMÉCHO fait résonner ses cris à l'intérieur de son corps creux. Lorsqu'il entre en rage, ses cris génèrent des ondes ultrasoniques capables de projeter les ennemis au loin.
descriptions.de: PALIMPALIM lässt seine Schreie in seinem hohlen Körper widerhallen. Wenn es in Rage gerät, erzeugen seine Schreie Ultraschallwellen, die die Kraft haben, Gegner wegzuschleudern.
descriptions.es: CHIMECCHO hace resonar sus gritos dentro de su cuerpo hueco. Cuando este POKéMON se enfurece, sus gritos producen ondas ultrasónicas con el poder de hacer volar a los enemigos.
descriptions.it: CHINGLING fa risuonare le sue grida all'interno del suo corpo cavo. Quando si infuria, le sue grida generano onde ultrasoniche in grado di scagliare via i nemici.
descriptions.ja: チリーンは中空の体内で鳴き声を反響させる。激怒すると、その鳴き声は敵を吹き飛ばす力を持つ超音波となる。
descriptions.ko: 치렁은 속이 빈 몸 안에서 울음소리를 울린다. 이 포켓몬이 격분하면 울음소리는 적을 날려버릴 수 있는 초음파가 된다.

name: absol-mega-z
description: Every time ABSOL appears before people, it is followed by a disaster such as an earthquake or a tidal wave. As a result, it came to be known as the disaster POKéMON.
appearance: Absol's sleek, white feline body becomes even more refined and angular, its dark mane and tail grow longer and flow like shadows, and it sports four large, razor-sharp scythe-like blades: one on its head, two emerging from its back like crystalline wings, and one at the end of its tail.

descriptions.fr: Chaque fois qu'ABSOL apparaît devant les gens, il est suivi d'une catastrophe telle qu'un tremblement de terre ou un raz-de-marée. C'est pourquoi il est surnommé le POKéMON Désastre.
descriptions.de: Jedes Mal, wenn ABSOL vor Menschen erscheint, folgt eine Katastrophe wie ein Erdbeben oder eine Flutwelle. Daher ist es als das Katastrophen-POKéMON bekannt.
descriptions.es: Cada vez que ABSOL aparece ante la gente, le sigue un desastre como un terremoto o un maremoto. Por ello, llegó a ser conocido como el POKéMON Desastre.
descriptions.it: Ogni volta che ABSOL appare davanti alle persone, è seguito da un disastro come un terremoto o un'onda anomala. Per questo è stato soprannominato il POKéMON Disastro.
descriptions.ja: アブソルが人々の前に現れるたびに、地震や津波などの災害が続く。その結果、災害ポケモンとして知られるようになった。
descriptions.ko: 앱솔이 사람들 앞에 나타날 때마다 지진이나 해일 같은 재앙이 뒤따른다. 그 결과 재앙 포켓몬으로 알려지게 되었다.

name: staraptor-mega
description: It has a savage nature. It will courageously challenge foes that are much larger.
appearance: Staraptor's body becomes more streamlined and powerfully built, its black and white plumage gaining sharper edges and a metallic sheen, its prominent red crest elongates into a dramatic, sweeping plume, and its talons and beak grow notably larger and more menacing.

descriptions.fr: Il a une nature sauvage. Il défie courageusement des ennemis bien plus grands que lui.
descriptions.de: Es besitzt eine wilde Natur. Es fordert mutig Gegner heraus, die weitaus größer sind als es selbst.
descriptions.es: Posee una naturaleza salvaje. Desafiará con valentía a enemigos mucho más grandes.
descriptions.it: Ha una natura selvaggia. Sfidano coraggiosamente avversari molto più grandi.
descriptions.ja: 荒々しい性質を持つ。自分よりもはるかに大きい敵にも勇敢に立ち向かう。
descriptions.ko: 사나운 성질을 지녔다. 자신보다 훨씬 큰 적에게도 용감하게 도전한다.

name: garchomp-mega-z
description: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.
appearance: Garchomp's body becomes even bulkier and more heavily armored, its blue scales darken and are covered in numerous larger, jagged spikes and blades, its head-fins transform into an imposing crown of sharp edges, and its mouth reveals rows of menacing teeth.

descriptions.fr: Quand il replie son corps et déploie ses ailes, il ressemble à un avion à réaction. Il vole à une vitesse supersonique.
descriptions.de: Wenn es seinen Körper zusammenfaltet und seine Flügel ausbreitet, sieht es aus wie ein Düsenflugzeug. Es fliegt mit Schallgeschwindigkeit.
descriptions.es: Cuando pliega su cuerpo y extiende sus alas, parece un avión a reacción. Vuela a velocidad sónica.
descriptions.it: Quando ripiega il corpo e distende le ali, assomiglia a un jet. Vola a velocità sonica.
descriptions.ja: 体を折りたたみ、翼を広げるとジェット機のように見える。音速で飛行する。
descriptions.ko: 몸을 접고 날개를 펼치면 제트기처럼 보인다. 음속으로 비행한다.

name: lucario-mega-z
description: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.
appearance: Lucario's lean, fighting form becomes more defined with darker blue fur and cream-colored accents, its dreadlock-like appendages grow longer and more numerous, shimmering with a faint blue aura, and its forearms gain sharp, crystalline energy spikes that extend past its knuckles.

descriptions.fr: Il a la capacité de percevoir l'aura de toutes choses. Il comprend le langage humain.
descriptions.de: Es hat die Fähigkeit, die Auren aller Dinge zu spüren. Es versteht die menschliche Sprache.
descriptions.es: Tiene la habilidad de sentir el aura de todas las cosas. Entiende el habla humana.
descriptions.it: Ha la capacità di percepire l'aura di ogni cosa. Comprende il linguaggio umano.
descriptions.ja: あらゆるもののオーラを感じ取る能力を持つ。人間の言葉を理解する。
descriptions.ko: 모든 것의 오라를 감지하는 능력이 있다. 인간의 말을 이해한다.

name: heatran-mega
description: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.
appearance: Heatran's body grows larger and more segmented, its steel plates becoming darker and hotter, interspersed with rivers of molten orange lava that glow intensely from within, and its four legs become thicker, ending in powerful, stomping hooves.

descriptions.fr: Il réside dans les grottes volcaniques. Il s'accroche avec ses pattes en forme de croix pour ramper sur les plafonds et les murs.
descriptions.de: Es lebt in vulkanischen Höhlen. Es krallt sich mit seinen kreuzförmigen Füßen fest, um an Decken und Wänden zu kriechen.
descriptions.es: Habita en cuevas volcánicas. Se agarra con sus patas en forma de cruz para trepar por techos y paredes.
descriptions.it: Dimora nelle grotte vulcaniche. Si aggrappa con le sue zampe a croce per arrampicarsi su soffitti e pareti.
descriptions.ja: 火山洞窟に生息する。十字の形をした足で岩に食い込み、天井や壁を這い回る。
descriptions.ko: 화산 동굴에 서식한다. 십자 모양의 발로 땅을 파고 천장과 벽을 기어 다닌다.

name: darkrai-mega
description: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.
appearance: Darkrai's shadowy form becomes more imposing and elongated, its tattered cloak-like appendages flow even more dramatically, and its single, glowing blue eye is framed by a more intricate, spectral mask, with sharper white hair-like elements emerging from its head.

descriptions.fr: Il peut endormir les gens et leur faire faire des rêves. Il est actif les nuits de nouvelle lune.
descriptions.de: Es kann Menschen einschläfern und ihnen Träume bereiten. Es ist in Neumondnächten aktiv.
descriptions.es: Puede adormecer a las personas y hacerlas soñar. Está activo durante las noches de luna nueva.
descriptions.it: Può addormentare le persone e farle sognare. È attivo nelle notti di luna nuova.
descriptions.ja: 人々を眠らせ、夢を見させることができる。新月の夜に活動する。
descriptions.ko: 사람들을 잠들게 하고 꿈을 꾸게 할 수 있다. 초승달 밤에 활동한다.

name: golurk-mega
description: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.
appearance: Golurk's colossal body becomes even more massive and heavily armored, its stone segments reinforced with ancient, glowing green glyphs, its fists enlarge significantly, and a prominent, ornate chest plate adds to its formidable, silent appearance.

descriptions.fr: Il traverse le ciel à des vitesses Mach. Retirer le sceau sur sa poitrine rend son énergie interne incontrôlable.
descriptions.de: Es fliegt mit Mach-Geschwindigkeit durch den Himmel. Entfernt man das Siegel auf seiner Brust, gerät seine innere Energie außer Kontrolle.
descriptions.es: Atraviesa el cielo a velocidades Mach. Si se retira el sello de su pecho, su energía interna se descontrola.
descriptions.it: Attraversa il cielo a velocità Mach. Rimuovere il sigillo sul suo petto rende la sua energia interna incontrollabile.
descriptions.ja: マッハの速度で空を飛行する。胸の封印が外れると、内部エネルギーが暴走する。
descriptions.ko: 마하의 속도로 하늘을 비행한다. 가슴의 봉인이 풀리면 내부 에너지가 폭주한다.

name: meowstic-mega
description: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust.
appearance: Meowstic's lithe feline body becomes more elegant and elongated, its dark fur gains a deeper hue, its ears become larger and more intricately curled, emitting faint, visible rings of psychic energy, and its eyes glow with an intense, piercing blue.

descriptions.fr: En cas de danger, il lève ses oreilles et libère une puissance psychique suffisante pour réduire un camion de 10 tonnes en poussière.
descriptions.de: In Gefahr hebt es seine Ohren und setzt genug Psycho-Kraft frei, um einen 10-Tonnen-LKW zu Staub zu zermahlen.
descriptions.es: En peligro, levanta las orejas y libera suficiente poder psíquico para reducir a polvo un camión de 10 toneladas.
descriptions.it: In caso di pericolo, alza le orecchie e rilascia una potenza psichica sufficiente a ridurre in polvere un camion da 10 tonnellate.
descriptions.ja: 危機に瀕すると耳を立て、10トンのトラックを粉砕するほどのサイコパワーを放つ。
descriptions.ko: 위험에 처하면 귀를 세워 10톤 트럭을 가루로 만들 정도의 에스퍼 파워를 방출한다.

name: crabominable-mega
description: It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokémon evolved and grew fur.
appearance: Crabominable's massive body becomes even more robust and shaggy, covered in thick, white fur with prominent ice crystals clinging to its limbs, its large, powerful claws grow into formidable, ice-covered weapons, and its small, determined eyes peer out from its snowy mane.

descriptions.fr: Il visait le sommet mais s'est perdu et a fini sur une montagne enneigée. Forcé d'endurer le froid, ce Pokémon a évolué et a développé de la fourrure.
descriptions.de: Es wollte den Gipfel erklimmen, verirrte sich jedoch und landete auf einem schneebedeckten Berg. Gezwungen, der Kälte standzuhalten, entwickelte sich dieses Pokémon und bekam Fell.
descriptions.es: Apuntaba a la cima, pero se perdió y acabó en una montaña nevada. Obligado a soportar el frío, este Pokémon evolucionó y le creció pelaje.
descriptions.it: Puntava alla cima ma si è perso ed è finito su una montagna innevata. Costretto a sopportare il freddo, questo Pokémon si è evoluto e ha sviluppato la pelliccia.
descriptions.ja: 頂上を目指したが道に迷い、雪山で力尽きた。寒さに耐えるうちに進化し、体毛が生えた。
descriptions.ko: 정상을 노렸지만 길을 잃고 설산에서 조난당했다. 추위를 견디는 동안 진화하여 털이 자랐다.

name: golisopod-mega
description: With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater—or even air—right in two.
appearance: Golisopod's imposing, armored body becomes even more formidable, its purple and grey carapace gaining sharper, more segmented plates, its four large, razor-sharp scythe-like limbs extend dramatically, and its head becomes more angular with menacing yellow eyes.

descriptions.fr: D'un coup d'éclat de ses gigantesques griffes acérées, il fend l'eau de mer – ou même l'air – en deux.
descriptions.de: Mit einem blitzschnellen Hieb seiner riesigen scharfen Klauen spaltet es Meerwasser – oder sogar Luft – entzwei.
descriptions.es: Con un destello de sus gigantescas y afiladas garras, parte en dos el agua del mar, o incluso el aire.
descriptions.it: Con un fulmineo fendente delle sue gigantesche e affilate artigli, taglia in due l'acqua di mare, o persino l'aria.
descriptions.ja: 巨大な鋭い爪を閃かせ、海水はおろか空気すらも両断する。
descriptions.ko: 거대한 날카로운 발톱을 번뜩이며 해수는 물론 공기마저 두 동강 낸다.

name: magearna-mega
description: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.
appearance: Magearna's spherical body becomes more streamlined and elegant, its metallic shell gaining intricate gold filigree over its crimson and white plating, its eyes glow with a soft, ethereal light, and its chest opens slightly to reveal a more complex, pulsating soul-heart mechanism.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon artificiel, construit il y a plus de 500 ans, peut comprendre la parole humaine mais ne peut pas parler lui-même.
descriptions.de: Dieses vor über 500 Jahren konstruierte künstliche Pokémon kann menschliche Sprache verstehen, aber selbst nicht sprechen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon artificial, construido hace más de 500 años, puede entender el habla humana pero no puede hablar por sí mismo.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon artificiale, costruito più di 500 anni fa, può comprendere il linguaggio umano ma non può parlare.
descriptions.ja: 500年以上前に作られた人工のポケモン。人の言葉を理解できるが、自ら話すことはできない。
descriptions.ko: 500년도 더 전에 만들어진 인공 포켓몬. 사람의 말을 이해할 수 있지만, 스스로 말할 수는 없다.

name: magearna-original-mega
description: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.
appearance: Magearna's spherical body, cast in an elegant bronze hue with striking red accents, becomes more ornate, its metallic shell adorned with intricate clockwork patterns, and its glowing eyes and slightly revealed, intricate soul-heart mechanism pulsate with a stronger, ancient energy.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon artificiel, construit il y a plus de 500 ans, peut comprendre la parole humaine mais ne peut pas parler lui-même.
descriptions.de: Dieses vor über 500 Jahren konstruierte künstliche Pokémon kann menschliche Sprache verstehen, aber selbst nicht sprechen.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon artificial, construido hace más de 500 años, puede entender el habla humana pero no puede hablar por sí mismo.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon artificiale, costruito più di 500 anni fa, può comprendere il linguaggio umano ma non può parlare.
descriptions.ja: 500年以上前に作られた人工のポケモン。人の言葉を理解できるが、自ら話すことはできない。
descriptions.ko: 500년도 더 전에 만들어진 인공 포켓몬. 사람의 말을 이해할 수 있지만, 스스로 말할 수는 없다.

display_names.ja: メガオリジナルマギアナ

name: zeraora-mega
description: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.
appearance: Zeraora's sleek, agile body becomes even more electrified, its yellow and black fur developing sharper, more defined lightning bolt patterns that subtly crackle with energy, its forearms gain larger, visible electric conduits, and its bright blue eyes glow with intense power.

descriptions.fr: Il électrifie ses griffes et déchire ses adversaires avec elles. Même s'ils esquivent son attaque, ils seront électrocutés par les étincelles volantes.
descriptions.de: Es elektrifiziert seine Klauen und reißt seine Gegner damit in Stücke. Selbst wenn sie seinem Angriff ausweichen, werden sie von den fliegenden Funken elektrisiert.
descriptions.es: Electrifica sus garras y desgarra a sus oponentes con ellas. Aunque esquiven su ataque, serán electrocutados por las chispas voladoras.
descriptions.it: Elettrifica i suoi artigli e con essi fa a pezzi i suoi avversari. Anche se schivano il suo attacco, verranno fulminati dalle scintille volanti.
descriptions.ja: 爪を帯電させ、相手を切り裂く。攻撃をかわしても、飛び散る火花で感電してしまう。
descriptions.ko: 발톱을 대전시켜 상대를 갈기갈기 찢어버린다. 공격을 피하더라도 튀는 불꽃에 감전된다.

name: scovillain-mega
description: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.
appearance: Scovillain's twin pepper-heads become larger and more vibrant, the green head intensely verdant and the red head fiercely scarlet, both now with sharper, fang-like teeth, while its draconic body thickens and sprouts more prominent, spiky leaf-like fins along its back.

descriptions.fr: La tête rouge convertit les produits chimiques épicés en énergie de feu et projette un jet de flammes super épicées sur les environs.
descriptions.de: Der rote Kopf wandelt scharfe Chemikalien in Feuerenergie um und schleudert einen super-scharfen Flammenstrahl in die Umgebung.
descriptions.es: La cabeza roja convierte los químicos picantes en energía de fuego y rocía el área circundante con un chorro de llamas súper picantes.
descriptions.it: La testa rossa converte le sostanze chimiche piccanti in energia infuocata e bombarda l'area circostante con un getto di fiamme super piccanti.
descriptions.ja: 赤い頭は辛味成分を炎エネルギーに変換し、周囲を激辛の炎で焼き尽くす。
descriptions.ko: 붉은 머리는 매운 화학 물질을 불꽃 에너지로 변환하여 주변 지역을 매우 매운 불꽃으로 휩쓴다.

name: glimmora-mega
description: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.
appearance: Glimmora's crystalline flower-like structure expands dramatically, its iridescent purple petals becoming larger and more numerous, revealing a more intricate, glowing yellow core, and its tendril-like 'roots' beneath grow longer and sharper.

descriptions.fr: Lorsque ce Pokémon détecte un danger, il ouvre ses pétales cristallins et tire des rayons de son corps conique.
descriptions.de: Wenn dieses Pokémon Gefahr wittert, öffnet es seine kristallinen Blütenblätter und feuert Strahlen aus seinem konischen Körper ab.
descriptions.es: Cuando este Pokémon detecta peligro, abre sus pétalos cristalinos y dispara rayos desde su cuerpo cónico.
descriptions.it: Quando questo Pokémon rileva un pericolo, apre i suoi petali cristallini e spara raggi dal suo corpo conico.
descriptions.ja: 危険を察知すると、結晶のようになった花弁を開き、円錐形の体からビームを放つ。
descriptions.ko: 위험을 감지하면 결정화된 꽃잎을 열고 원뿔 모양의 몸에서 빔을 발사한다.

name: tatsugiri-curly-mega
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: Tatsugiri's curly, orange and white sushi-like body elongates gracefully, its 'sushi topping' fins become more flowing and iridescent, and its small, perpetually surprised-looking eyes are framed by subtle, elegant patterns.

descriptions.fr: C'est un petit Pokémon dragon. Il vit dans la bouche de Dondozo pour se protéger des ennemis extérieurs.
descriptions.de: Dies ist ein kleines Drachen-Pokémon. Es lebt im Maul von Dondozo, um sich vor äußeren Feinden zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Este es un pequeño Pokémon dragón. Vive dentro de la boca de Dondozo para protegerse de los enemigos del exterior.
descriptions.it: Questo è un piccolo Pokémon drago. Vive all'interno della bocca di Dondozo per proteggersi dai nemici esterni.
descriptions.ja: 小さなドラゴンのポケモン。外敵から身を守るため、ヘイラッシャの口の中で暮らしている。
descriptions.ko: 작은 드래곤 포켓몬이다. 바깥의 적으로부터 몸을 지키기 위해 헤롱헤롱의 입속에서 생활한다.

display_names.ja: メガまきまきシャリタツ

name: tatsugiri-droopy-mega
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: Tatsugiri's droopy, pinkish-purple and white sushi-like body expands, its head-fin becoming more pronounced and flowing like a delicate veil, and its small, sad-looking eyes gain a deeper, more reflective sheen.

descriptions.fr: C'est un petit Pokémon Dragon. Il vit à l'intérieur de la bouche de Dondozo pour se protéger des ennemis extérieurs.
descriptions.de: Dies ist ein kleines Drachen-Pokémon. Es lebt im Maul von Dondozo, um sich vor äußeren Feinden zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Este es un pequeño Pokémon de tipo Dragón. Vive dentro de la boca de Dondozo para protegerse de los enemigos del exterior.
descriptions.it: È un piccolo Pokémon di tipo Drago. Vive all'interno della bocca di Dondozo per proteggersi dai nemici esterni.
descriptions.ja: 小さなドラゴンポケモン。外敵から身を守るため、ヘイラッシャの口の中で暮らす。
descriptions.ko: 작은 드래곤 포켓몬. 외부의 적들로부터 자신을 보호하기 위해 헤이랏샤의 입안에서 산다.

display_names.ja: メガへそのおシャリタツ

name: tatsugiri-stretchy-mega
description: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
appearance: Tatsugiri's stretchy, yellow and white sushi-like body becomes more slender and elongated, its dorsal fin transforms into a more intricate, segmented ribbon, and its small, determined eyes peer forward with increased focus.

descriptions.fr: C'est un petit Pokémon Dragon. Il vit à l'intérieur de la bouche de Dondozo pour se protéger des ennemis extérieurs.
descriptions.de: Dies ist ein kleines Drachen-Pokémon. Es lebt im Maul von Dondozo, um sich vor äußeren Feinden zu schützen.
descriptions.es: Este es un pequeño Pokémon de tipo Dragón. Vive dentro de la boca de Dondozo para protegerse de los enemigos del exterior.
descriptions.it: È un piccolo Pokémon di tipo Drago. Vive all'interno della bocca di Dondozo per proteggersi dai nemici esterni.
descriptions.ja: 小さなドラゴンポケモン。外敵から身を守るため、ヘイラッシャの口の中で暮らす。
descriptions.ko: 작은 드래곤 포켓몬. 외부의 적들로부터 자신을 보호하기 위해 헤이랏샤의 입안에서 산다.

display_names.ja: メガのびのびシャリタツ

name: baxcalibur-mega
description: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.
appearance: Baxcalibur's formidable draconic body grows even more immense, its blue and white scales transforming into jagged, armor-like ice plates, its dorsal fin elongates into a massive, serrated ice blade, and its powerful jaws reveal rows of crystalline fangs.

descriptions.fr: Ce Pokémon projette de l'air cryogénique par sa bouche. Cet air peut instantanément geler même de la lave en fusion.
descriptions.de: Dieses Pokémon schleudert kryogenische Luft aus seinem Maul. Diese Luft kann selbst flüssige, glühend heiße Lava augenblicklich einfrieren.
descriptions.es: Este Pokémon expulsa aire criogénico por la boca. Este aire puede congelar instantáneamente incluso lava al rojo vivo.
descriptions.it: Questo Pokémon spara aria criogenica dalla bocca. Quest'aria può congelare all'istante anche la lava incandescente.
descriptions.ja: 口から極低温の冷気を放つポケモン。溶岩のように熱い液体も瞬時に凍らせる。
descriptions.ko: 입에서 극저온의 냉기를 뿜어내는 포켓몬. 용암처럼 뜨거운 액체도 순식간에 얼려버린다.
